STH_admonition.58.desc_02: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] we have managed to subdue to Borg Cube, but many of our military and scientific personnel who were on the cube when it reactivated were assimilated and subsequently lost in the battle. There are enough sizeable chunks of debris that should allow us to conduct further investigations, but as part of a galaxy wide project, to avoid any further financial impact to the Empire.
STH_admonition.58.desc_03: Species 3783, the Romulans, have managed to destroy one of our long range tactical vessels orbiting planet designated Terix. The vessel had suffered a catastrophic sub-matrix collapse and was no longer of any use to the collective. Had the vessel been fully operational we would have added their biological distinctiveness to our own. Their victory is irrelevant.
STH_admonition.58.name: Borg Artifact destroyed
STH_admonition.6.desc: The Zhat Vash handler had seen the effects of the Admonition on many minds over the years and few could survive the terrible message and it looks very much like [leader_trait_zhat_vash_recruit_name.GetName] will be joining the list of victims, as they lay screaming on the dead surface of Aia. They may recover in time and join the ranks of the Zhat Vash to fight the future that was presented in the Admonition. A future where all organic life is wiped out by a relentless force of synthetic life, a future the Zhat Vash is determined to prevent.
STH_admonition.6.name: The Admonition
STH_admonition.60.desc: Our sensors in the Terix System have detected a fleet of Ferengi pirates on their way to the Borg wreckage, it appears they are commanded by known scoundrel DaiMon Nunk and have the audacity to claim salvage rights! Destroy them and show them the error of attempting to steal from us.
STH_admonition.60.name: Ferengi Pirates Sighted near Borg Cube
STH_admonition.61.desc: Attention Rom-eww-lan Empire, I am DaiMon Nunk, mighty warlord and unparalleled capitalist - I claim salvage rights to this wreck under intergalactic law ...90..3. You will leave this vessel to us or we will be forced to prevent anyone from having it.
STH_admonition.61.name: Incoming Message
STH_admonition.63.desc: Following a fierce fight over a damaged Borg Cube, our forces have defeated those filthy Ferengi pirates and killed their hideously little leader. They will not trouble us again. The Borg ship is now all ours, and the recommendation from our Scientific leaders is to invite a galaxy wide project in to oversee the reclamation of the Cube, this will ensure that we obtain all the benefits without the costs.
STH_admonition.63.name: Ferengi Pirates destroyed
STH_admonition.64.desc: Following a fierce fight over a wrecked Borg Cube, the pirates under DaiMon Nunk appear to have be defeated. Leaving the Cube in the hands of the Romulan Star Empire. Scientists across the quadrant are curious to understand what is next for this once mighty ship.
STH_admonition.64.name: Ferengi Pirates destroyed
STH_admonition.8.desc: The Zhat Vash are an ancient and secret Romulan cabal of Tal Shiar operatives. According to sources, it was thousands upon thousands of years old, and it supposedly predated the departure of the Romulan people from Vulcan. In Romulan the term Zhat Vash is used to refer to the dead, the 'only reliable keepers of secrets'. Their sole purpose is to prevent the utter devastation wrought by the synthetic 'Destroyer', called Seb-Cheneb, contained within the Admonition, they dedicated themselves to eliminating synthetics so as to prevent another such event. Subsequent generations of Zhat Vash would also submit themselves to Admonition, so as to strengthen themselves for their task. The last question remains, should we embrace the Zhat Vash or put an end to this legend...
STH_admonition.8.name: The Zhat Vash
STH_agency.1.a: Financiar el intercambio médico entre especies.
STH_agency.1.desc:
Si bien las necesidades médicas de la mayoría de las especies son únicas, existe la lógica de agrupar recursos para ayudar a la investigación. 

Los médicos de [Root.GetName], liderados por el Doctor [fundador de IME.GetName], han propuesto la formación del Intercambio Médico Interspecies, para promover la investigación médica y la colaboración entre especies. Si bien existen costos asociados con el mantenimiento de la organización, es probable que los beneficios los superen con creces. 

Si se financia, el Doctor [fundIME.GetName] se colocaría en comisión de servicio permanente en el Intercambio médico entre especies.
STH_agency.1.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_agency.101.desc: The pacification of the stricken Borg cube and its disconnection from the Borg hive mind has led to a unique opportunity to setup a cross species and inter-agency scientific initiative to study the Artifact at close proximity. A department will be set up to investigate the technology and a second division will study the Borg themselves and do whatever can be done to free as many of them from the grip of the collective.
STH_agency.101.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.104.desc: The Galaxy wide project, named the Borg Reclamation Project have formally approached us to ask if we would like to join the project and work with scientists from across the galaxy at the Artifact. \n\nTogether the best minds across multiple species should be able to make massive breakthroughs and deepen our knowledge of this unique race.
STH_agency.104.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.106.desc: The [From.GetName]'s government has decided that they no longer wish to participate in the Borg Reclamation Project.
STH_agency.106.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.107.desc: Our association with the Borg Reclamation Project has come to an end, and our leaders have asked us to withdrawn funding and sever the ties. As a result the benefits of being part of the program will be removed.
STH_agency.107.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.111.a: We will be leaving the project.
STH_agency.111.desc_01: We understand that the project is a massive undertaking and resources are tight, but together as a community we could accomplish great things, will you reconsider?
STH_agency.111.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.112.c: Request a scientist to work with us.
STH_agency.112.d: Assign a scientist to the project.
STH_agency.112.desc_01: Greetings, [Root.Leader.GetTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName], I am Administrator [borg_reclamation_project.Leader.GetName] of the Borg Reclamation Project. Together we are changing the lives of the assimilated and the X-Bs here at the Artifact. \n\nWhat can the project do for you today?
STH_agency.112.desc_02: Greetings, [Root.Leader.GetTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName], I am Administrator [borg_reclamation_project.Leader.GetName] of the Borg Reclamation Project. We are doing amazing things here at the project and changing the lives of the assimilated and the X-Bs here at the Artifact, we would welcome a closer working relationship. \n\nWhat can the project do for you today?
STH_agency.112.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.112.q: Tell us more about the about the project.
STH_agency.114.a.tooltip: Scientist [brp_hireLeader1.GetName] is now on secondment to [Root.GetName] as part of the B.R.P.
STH_agency.114.b.tooltip: Scientist [brp_hireLeader2.GetName] is now on secondment to [Root.GetName] as part of the B.R.P.
STH_agency.114.desc_01: There are a number of experts currently available for a temporary assignment to your science division, Scientists [brp_hireLeader1.GetName] and [brp_hireLeader2.GetName] are available to report to your science department with immediate effect.
STH_agency.114.desc_02: Scientist [hireLeader1.GetName] has expressed an interest in spending a secondment within your science division, should I put the request in?
STH_agency.114.desc_03: Unfortunately all our scientists are busy working on critical projects within the Artifact and cannot be disturbed right now.
STH_agency.114.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.115.desc_01: The project will only be able to grow and complete its goals with more dedicated scientific minds, we would welcome anyone who wishes to work at the Artifact.
STH_agency.115.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.116.desc_01: We can provide an update on the latest research and findings from our teams working with the drones and E-Bs. Once we have transferred the data over to your scientists it will take some time before we have accumulated more research to send on.
STH_agency.116.name: The Borg Reclamation Project
STH_agency.201.desc_01: Greetings [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName], we are currently recharging the time crystals after bringing the last fleet through to this century, as soon as it is ready we will attempt to bring reinforcements.
STH_agency.201.name: 32nd Century Starfleet Outpost
STH_agency.202.desc: The temporal rift opens and from it emerges a fleet from the 32nd Century ready and willng to do their duties as Starfleet officers to protect the future.
STH_agency.202.name: Fleet from the Future
STH_agency.205.desc: My officers stand ready to make the leap to this century to aid us in battle.
STH_agency.205.name: Heroes from the Future
STH_agency.206.desc: As promised the temporal portal brings forth a new fleet with one of the 32nd Century's greatest leaders. These fleets will be able to aid us in our war against the Andromedan Invaders.
STH_agency.206.name: Heroes arrive to aid the fight
STH_agency.220.desc: As part of the ungoing war operation we request control of the following fleets to join with ours to defeat the invaders.
STH_agency.220.name: Transfer Fleet Command
STH_agency.5.a: Únase al intercambio médico entre especies.
STH_agency.5.desc:
La administración de [IME_notifier.GetName] nos invitó formalmente a unirnos al programa Intercambio de especies de intercambio médico. 

Aunque las necesidades médicas de la mayoría de las especies son únicas, existe una lógica en la agrupación de recursos para ayudar a la investigación. 

Los médicos de [Root.GetName] han recomendado participar en el Intercambio médico entre especies para promover la investigación médica y la colaboración entre especies. Si bien existen costos asociados con el mantenimiento de la organización, es probable que los beneficios los superen con creces.
STH_agency.5.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_agency.50.a: Únase al intercambio médico entre especies.
STH_agency.50.b: Deje el Intercambio médico entre especies.
STH_agency.50.desc_01: Saludos, [Root.Leader.GetTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName], soy el administrador [interspecies_medical_exchange.Leader.GetName] del Intercambio médico entre especies. \n\n¿Cómo podemos ser de ayuda hoy?
STH_agency.50.desc_02: Saludos, [Root.Leader.GetTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName], soy el administrador [interspecies_medical_exchange.Leader.GetName] del Intercambio médico entre especies. \n\nAunque las necesidades médicas de la mayoría de las especies son únicas, existe una lógica en la agrupación de recursos para ayudar a la investigación. El Intercambio médico entre especies promueve la investigación médica y la colaboración entre especies. Hay costos asociados con unirse a la organización, sin embargo, es probable que los beneficios los superen con creces.
STH_agency.50.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_agency.50.q: ¿Qué es el intercambio médico entre especies?
STH_agency.60.desc_01: Actualmente hay varios médicos disponibles para la comisión de servicio en I.M.E., Médicos [hireLeader1.GetName] y [hireLeader2.GetName], por ejemplo. ¿Desea solicitar una transferencia?
STH_agency.60.desc_02: El buen Doctor [hireLeader1.GetName] está actualmente disponible para su comisión aquí en el I.M.E. ¿Desea solicitar la transferencia de [hireLeader1.GetHerHis]?
STH_agency.60.desc_03: Lamentablemente, actualmente no tenemos personal disponible para la transferencia.
STH_agency.60.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_agency.70.a.tooltip: Doctor [loanLeader1.GetName] es enviado al Intercambio Médico Interspecies.
STH_agency.70.b.tooltip: Doctor [loanLeader2.GetName] es enviado al Intercambio Médico Interspecies.
STH_agency.70.desc_01: Siempre estamos agradecidos por cualquier préstamo temporal de personal al Intercambio médico entre especies. ¿Tenías a alguien en mente?
STH_agency.70.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_agency.8.desc: El gobierno de [From.GetName] ha decidido unirse al programa de Intercambio médico entre especies.
STH_agency.8.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_agency.80.desc_01: Apreciamos que la financiación del I.M.E. utiliza recursos que podrían gastarse en otro lugar ... pero ¿seguramente ve el beneficio en cooperación?
STH_agency.80.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_agency.9.desc: El gobierno de [From.GetName] ha decidido retirarse del programa de Intercambio médico entre especies.
STH_agency.9.name: Intercambio médico entre especies
STH_ancient_capsule.1.b: Deje la cápsula a su suerte.
STH_ancient_capsule.1.desc: En investigaciones posteriores, la órbita de la cápsula se está deteriorando rápidamente acercándola más y más a [From.GetName]. \n\nSi [Root.Fleet.GetName] no ajusta la órbita de la cápsula con su [Root.Owner.GetTractorBeam], ciertamente será destruido.
STH_ancient_capsule.1.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_ancient_capsule.10.desc.machine: Después de que las cámaras de almacenamiento fueron devueltas a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula reparados, parecen ansiosos por comenzar su vida en un nuevo siglo, y se hacen los arreglos para su regreso a la operación.
STH_ancient_capsule.10.desc: Después de que las cámaras criogénicas fueron devueltas a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula se descongelaron, parecen ansiosos por comenzar su vida en un nuevo siglo, y se hacen los arreglos para su regreso a [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] , donde muchos historiadores ansiosos los esperan.
STH_ancient_capsule.10.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_ancient_capsule.11.desc.machine: Después de que las cámaras de almacenamiento fueron devueltas a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula reparados, parecen ansiosos por comenzar su vida en un nuevo siglo, y se hacen los arreglos para su regreso a la operación. \n\n Uno de los ocupantes de la cápsula parece haber sido un administrador designado antes de ser almacenado, y ha ofrecido sus servicios a [Root.Owner.GetName].
STH_ancient_capsule.11.desc: Después de que las cámaras criogénicas fueron devueltas a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula se descongelaron, parecen ansiosos por comenzar su vida en un nuevo siglo, y se hacen los arreglos para su regreso a [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] . \n\n Uno de los ocupantes de la cápsula parece haber sido un administrador talentoso antes de ser almacenado, y ha ofrecido sus servicios a [Root.Owner.GetName].
STH_ancient_capsule.11.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_ancient_capsule.12.desc.machine:
Después de que las cámaras de almacenamiento fueron devueltas a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula reparados, parecen confundidos y erráticos. 

 Pasan varios días y su comportamiento extraño continúa. Es solo después de que un miembro de la tripulación es descubierto desmantelado que los archivos de la nave revelan que los ocupantes de la cápsula han sufrido un mal funcionamiento irreparable de la matriz de personalidad, desmantelado y almacenado en el espacio para futuras reparaciones. 

Se redondean rápidamente y se colocan en el bergantín hasta su regreso a [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName].
STH_ancient_capsule.12.desc:
Después de que las cámaras criogénicas fueron llevadas de vuelta a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula se descongelaron, parecen confundidos y nerviosos. 

 Pasan varios días y su comportamiento extraño continúa. Es solo después de que un miembro de la tripulación es descubierto asesinado que los archivos de la nave revelan que los ocupantes de la cápsula son criminales violentos, enviados al espacio como una alternativa a la pena capital. 

Se redondean rápidamente y se colocan en el bergantín hasta su regreso a [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName].
STH_ancient_capsule.12.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_ancient_capsule.13.desc.machine:
Después de que las cámaras de almacenamiento fueron devueltas a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula reparados, parecen confundidos y erráticos. 

 Pasan varios días y su comportamiento extraño continúa. Solo después de que una explosión dañe una gran parte de la bahía de carga del barco, los archivos del barco revelan que los ocupantes de la cápsula han sufrido un mal funcionamiento irreparable de la matriz de personalidad, desmantelado y almacenado en el espacio para futuras reparaciones. 

Se redondean rápidamente y se colocan en el bergantín hasta su regreso a [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName].
STH_ancient_capsule.13.desc:
Después de que las cámaras criogénicas fueron llevadas de vuelta a [Root.GetFleetName] y los ocupantes de la cápsula se descongelaron, parecen confundidos y nerviosos. 

 Pasan varios días y su comportamiento extraño continúa. Solo después de que una explosión dañe una gran parte de la bahía de carga del barco, los archivos del barco revelan que los ocupantes de la cápsula son criminales violentos, ex terroristas, de hecho, enviados al espacio como una alternativa a la pena capital. 

Se redondean rápidamente y se colocan en el bergantín hasta su regreso a [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName].
STH_ancient_capsule.13.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_ancient_capsule.2.a.machine: Repara los ocupantes de la cápsula.
STH_ancient_capsule.2.a: Despertar a los ocupantes de la cápsula.
STH_ancient_capsule.2.desc.machine:
El ingeniero jefe del [Root.GetFleetName] ha modificado con éxito la órbita de la cápsula con el [Root.Owner.GetTractorBeam]. 

 [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] lidera a un equipo visitante emitido a bordo. Confirmando que la cápsula es de origen [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName], [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] descubre varias cámaras de almacenamiento antiguas. Varios parecen estar ocupados. 

La investigación adicional revela que todos los ocupantes de la cápsula fueron registrados como desmantelados cientos de años antes, aunque el ingeniero jefe de [Root.GetFleetName] cree que pueden repararse.
STH_ancient_capsule.2.desc:
El ingeniero jefe del [Root.GetFleetName] ha modificado con éxito la órbita de la cápsula con el [Root.Owner.GetTractorBeam]. 

 [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] lidera a un equipo visitante emitido a bordo. Confirmando que la cápsula es de origen [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName], [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] descubre varias cámaras de hibernación criogénicas antiguas. Varios parecen estar ocupados. 

La investigación adicional revela que todos los ocupantes de la cápsula fueron declarados muertos cientos de años antes, aunque el médico de [Root.GetFleetName] cree que pueden revivirse y curarse con técnicas médicas modernas.
STH_ancient_capsule.2.name: Investigar la cápsula
STH_ancient_capsule.21.desc.machine: Se coloca una baliza de mensajes al lado de la cápsula, notificando a los barcos que pasan de la naturaleza del buque como instalación de almacenamiento [Root.Owner.GetName].
STH_ancient_capsule.21.desc: Se coloca una baliza de mensajes al lado de la cápsula, notificando a los barcos que pasan de la naturaleza del barco como una tumba.
STH_ancient_capsule.21.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_ancient_capsule.90.desc: Desafortunadamente, la órbita en descomposición de la cápsula se calculó mal y entró en la atmósfera de [FromFrom.GetName] antes de lo esperado, quemándose. \n\nLos escaneos del campo de escombros no son concluyentes.
STH_ancient_capsule.90.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_ancient_capsule.91.desc:
Desafortunadamente, la órbita en descomposición de la cápsula se calculó mal y entró en la atmósfera de [FromFrom.GetName] antes de lo esperado, quemándose. 

Los tanques de almacenamiento de combustible en el exterior de la cápsula perforados durante el descenso se dispararon como proyectiles. Aunque las probabilidades estaban astronómicamente en su contra, uno de los tanques explotó a menos de 100 metros del [Root.GetFleetName], causando daños menores al casco. 

Los escaneos del campo de escombros no son concluyentes.
STH_ancient_capsule.91.name: Cápsula antigua
STH_andorian_flavour.1.desc: La larga rivalidad entre [officerA.GetName] y [officerB.GetName] finalmente ha escalado hasta el punto de violencia. Mientras que el origen de la pelea se olvida a ambas partes, el último insulto - a la [Root.GetFleetName] en sí ha dejado [oficialA.GetName] no más que declarar Ushaan. \n\n El transbordador [oficialB.GetName] se espera dentro de la semana, mientras que los preparativos para el duelo se hacen en el buque insignia.
STH_andorian_flavour.1.name: Ushaan
STH_andorian_flavour.11.desc: For too long those arrogant pointed eared fools in the Vulcan High Command have defied the unjust agreements made in the Territorial Compromise Treaty and have kept us away from Weytahn. A world that rightly belonged to us after the hard work that our settlers put into transforming this world. \n\nIt is time we reclaimed what belongs to us.
STH_andorian_flavour.11.name: Weytahn
STH_andorian_flavour.12.a: Your emotional threats do not concern us.
STH_andorian_flavour.12.desc: Attention Vulcan High Command, this is General [andorian_empire_leader.GetName] of the Andorian Imperial Navy, for too long now you have held onto our property and enforce this agreement with the laughable 2050s Territorial Compromise. This world is ours by rights and we once again press our claim for this world in which Andorian citizens gave their lives to build.\n\nReturn it to us, or we take it by force.
STH_andorian_flavour.12.name: Incoming Message from Andorian Empire
STH_andorian_flavour.13.desc: Rather predictably the Vulcans have refused to listen to reason and have rejected our demand to return Weytahn to us, it seems they will only listen to a show of force. \n\nOur generals have recommended sending a strike team to the planet's surface and setting up a garrison, this action will bring those fools in the High Council back to the negotiating table.
STH_andorian_flavour.13.name: Weytahn request rejected
STH_andorian_flavour.14.b: There is no need for Human involvement.
STH_andorian_flavour.14.desc: Our sentry outposts in the DX Cancri system have detected Andorian military troops on surface of Paan Mokar, which is a direct violation of the Territorial Compromise Treaty of 2050. This is a clear act of agression against our borders and once again puts Vulcan at risk, to make matters more confusing the Andorian General on the planet has only agreed to speak with us if the Human's are present.
STH_andorian_flavour.14.name: Andorian troops on Paan Mokar
STH_andorian_flavour.15.desc: In a bold move the Andorian Imperial Guard have laid seize to the Vulcan world of Paan Mokar, which was once known as Weytahn and a former Andorian Colony. \n\nIt remains to be seen how the Vulcan's respond to this act.
STH_andorian_flavour.15.name: Andor seizes former colony
STH_andorian_flavour.16.desc: Following our rightlful reclaiming of Weytahn the Vulcans have refused to negoiate or call in the Pink skins to aid the situation, instead they have launched a counter attack against our forces using the full force of their military. Many of our ground troops were killed in the attack and this is a clear act of war against the Andorian Empire and we must respond to this insult.
STH_andorian_flavour.16.name: Vulcan escalates Weytahn conflict
STH_andorian_flavour.17.desc: In a further overly emotional response from the Andorians they have reacted to our logical enforcement of the Territorial Compromise Treaty by declaring all out war against us. This dispute will now be settled by war.
STH_andorian_flavour.17.name: Andor declares war
STH_andorian_flavour.18.desc: The deteriorating situation between the neighbouring states of Vulcan and Andor reached boiling point today as the Andorian Empire declared war on the Vulcan High Command over a seemingly insignificant planetoid.
STH_andorian_flavour.18.name: Andor and Vulcan go to war
STH_andorian_flavour.19.desc: Our raid on Paan Mokar was not successful and appears to have ended in a firefight between our forces and the Andorians entrenched on the surface. Bloodshed is always a regretable outcome of situations like this and it is logical that this act will result in a negative outcome from the Andorian government.
STH_andorian_flavour.19.name: Raid unsuccessful
STH_andorian_flavour.2.desc: El [oficialA.GetName] y el [oficialB.GetName] están de pie en la arena formada a bordo del buque insignia de [Root.GetFleetName]. \Le deseo una muerte rápida, capitán", grita el [oficialB.GetName], y hace un gesto para que el [oficialA.GetName] haga el primer movimiento. El capitán [oficialA.GetName] desenfunda su ushaan-tor y arremete directamente contra el [oficialB.GetName], que esquiva sin esfuerzo. El ruido de la hoja contra la hoja resuena en toda la sala, y el público guarda silencio. \Ambas partes comienzan a gruñir fuertemente a medida que avanza la batalla. Una bota de refilón alcanza al capitán [oficialA.GetName] en el pecho, empujando a [oficialA.GetHerHim] hacia el borde, aunque concediéndole un momento de respiro. \El [oficialB.GetName] se lanza en una ráfaga de golpes cansados hacia el [oficialA.GetName], que los desvía mientras el [oficialA.GetSheHe] espera una apertura. De repente, los ojos de [agenteB.GetName] se abren de par en par, presa del pánico, cuando [agenteB.GetSheHe] juzga mal un golpe. El ushaan-tor de [oficialA.GetName] se clava en el pecho de [oficialB.GetName] y momentos después [oficialB.GetSheHe] cae al suelo, muerto.
STH_andorian_flavour.2.name: Ushaan
STH_andorian_flavour.20.desc: It seems that logic has triumphed within the Andorian government following our strike against Paan Mokar and they have backed down and removed their forces from the planet. Paan Mokar is once again under the full control of the High Council.
STH_andorian_flavour.20.name: Andoria backs down
STH_andorian_flavour.21.desc: Our strikes teams have successfully captured and neutralised the Andorian forces on Paan Mokar following an impressive raid against their stronghold within the colony. \n\nAll Andorian infiltration has been removed from the planet and it returns to our full control.
STH_andorian_flavour.21.name: Andorian forces captured
STH_andorian_flavour.22.desc: Regretfully our troops were captured and removed from the planet by a sneaky and cowardly attack by the Vulcans, our troops have been returned to us but we have lost what little hold we have over the colony and it appears the Vulcan's have fortified their position preventing any reattempt.
STH_andorian_flavour.22.name: Our forces removed from Weytahn
STH_andorian_flavour.23.desc: Following military intervention the Vulcans have removed all Andorian forces from the planetoid that both empires were fighting over. With little recource available to them except all out war, the Andorians have withdrawn their claims on the planet.
STH_andorian_flavour.23.name: Andor withdraws from Weytahn
STH_andorian_flavour.24.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], we come to you in an uncustomary position of formally requesting aid from your Starfleet. A few days ago a contingent of armed forces from the Andorian Empire unlawfully broke a long-established treaty between our worlds and placed troops on the Vulcan colony at Paan Mokar. \n\nThe logical response is to attempt a diplomatic solution, however the Andorians rarely act logically.
STH_andorian_flavour.24.name: Incoming communication from Vulcan
STH_andorian_flavour.26.b: The risk to Vulcan is too high.
STH_andorian_flavour.26.desc:
[weytahn_ue_leader.GetName] has reported back from Weytahn, they were successfully able to locate the Andorian forces and bring the Andorians and the Vulcans to the negotiating table. Although both sides were initially reluctant to the idea of relenquishing control of the planet, the promise of peace and avoiding a large scale war seems to have convinced both sides to look for a diplomatic solution. 

The question of who retains control of the planet will be heavily influenced by our input. 

The Andorians were the first species to colonise and own the planet, however its location on Vulcan's doorstep make this a strategically important world.
STH_andorian_flavour.26.name: Negotiations
STH_andorian_flavour.28.b.tooltip: Weytahn will gain the modifer Demilitarised Planet, preventing military installations to be built on the planet or system.
STH_andorian_flavour.28.desc_01:
Following tense negotiations in which neither side were prepared to back down, an agreement was finally reached between Vulcan and Andoria, largely thanks to the unrelenting tenacity of our negotiating team. 

On the agreement that the Andorians limit the size of the colony and are restricted from converting the system into a military base, the planet of Paan Mokar will be handed over to the Andorians and hense forth be known as Weytahn once again. United Earth will carry the responsibility of ensuring that the Andorians remain within the confines of the agreement. 

The establishment of a new Territorial Compromise Agreement will help to strengthen the fragile bond between the three powers. 

Vulcan will require us to enforce the demilitarization of the planet, failure to do so will seriously harm our relationship with them, however it will earn us extra favour with the Andorians if we do not.
STH_andorian_flavour.28.desc_02: Following a prolonged period of negotiations a compromise has been reached between ourselves and the Andorian government. In exchange for multiple assorances and the agreement that United Earth will ensure that the Andorians remain true to the treaty we have agreed to allow the Andorians to keep the colony on Paan Mokar and the surrounding system. The establishment of a formal treaty should put an end to the ongoing threat to our borders and despite the loss of the colony, the decision was logical. The humans must now uphold the agreements they have made as part of the treaty.
STH_andorian_flavour.28.desc_03: Following a spirited period of negotiations a great victory for the peoples of Andorian was won. The pink skins played their part magnificantly and in the end it was agreed Weytahn would be formally handed over to the Andorian Empire alongside formal structuring of the borders between us. Many within the Imperial Guard did not believe the Vulcan's could be worked with, so this is a positive step forward and worth a glass of Andorian Whiskey.
STH_andorian_flavour.28.name: Andoria to keep Weytahn
STH_andorian_flavour.3.desc: El [oficialA.GetName] y el [oficialB.GetName] están de pie en la arena formada a bordo del buque insignia de [Root.GetFleetName]. \Le deseo una muerte rápida, capitán", grita el [oficialB.GetName], y hace un gesto para que el [oficialA.GetName] haga el primer movimiento. El capitán [oficialA.GetName] desenfunda su ushaan-tor y arremete directamente contra el [oficialB.GetName], que esquiva sin esfuerzo. El ruido de la hoja contra la hoja resuena en toda la sala, y el público guarda silencio. \Ambas partes comienzan a gruñir fuertemente a medida que avanza la batalla. Una bota de refilón alcanza al capitán [oficialA.GetName] en el pecho, empujando a [oficialA.GetHerHim] hacia el borde, aunque concediéndole un momento de respiro. \El [oficialB.GetName] se lanza en una ráfaga de golpes cansados hacia el [oficialA.GetName], que los desvía mientras el [oficialA.GetSheHe] espera una apertura. De repente, los ojos de [agenteB.GetName] se abren de par en par, presa del pánico, cuando [agenteB.GetSheHe] juzga mal una estocada. El ushaan-tor de [oficialA.GetName] corta la antena derecha de [oficialB.GetName]. Gritando de dolor, [oficialB.GetName] se desploma en el suelo, mientras que [oficialA.GetName] comienza a reír.
STH_andorian_flavour.3.name: Ushaan
STH_andorian_flavour.30.desc_01:
Following tense negotiations in which neither side were prepared to back down, an agreement was finally reached between Vulcan and Andoria, largely thanks to the unrelenting tenacity of our negotiating team. 

Our negotiating team believed the threat to Vulcan's borders was too great to allow the Andorians to keep the planet so close to the Vulcan homeworld. 

Whilst the tension between Vulcan and Andor has been diminished, we have missed an opportunity to bolster our fledgling relationship with the Imperial Guard.
STH_andorian_flavour.30.desc_02: Following a protracted period of negotiations a compromise has been reached between ourselves and the Andorian government. In exchange for us relinquishing any claims on Andorian territory and the organised removal of any of our listening outposts, then the colony on Paan Mokar will remain in our control. Our skepticism over the trustworthiness of the Andorians has been somewhat alleviated by their actions here today and our initial reservations over the Humans involvement also appears to have been slightly unfounded.
STH_andorian_flavour.30.desc_03: Every negotiation must come with a compromise and this not something we Andorians should be afraid of, however Pink Skins remain under the heel of their Vulcan superiors and were not brave enough to support our claim on Weytahn. With both Vulcan and Earth in support of us abandoning our claim, we have little choice but to accept the new treaty. \n\nOur team did mention that the Vulcan Ambassador acted with honour and dignity, perhaps not all Vulcan's are as bad as first thought.
STH_andorian_flavour.30.name: Vulcan to keep Weytahn
STH_andorian_flavour.31.desc: Our troops have successfully landed and entrenched themselves within our former colony on Weytahn, effectively blocking any ability for the Vulcan's to interact with their forces on the planet's surface. Stubbornly the Vulcan's are refusing to open a dialogue with us. The Imperial Guard have recommended that we reach out to the pink skins on Earth to act as an intermediary as their actions in dealing with the Vulcan's has appeared to be even handed so far.
STH_andorian_flavour.31.name: Troops successfully deployed to Weytahn
STH_andorian_flavour.32.desc: Following our insistance the Vulcans have caved in and handed Weytahn and the surrounding territory back to the Andorian Empire. They clearly did not believe they could challenge our fleets in combat. \n\nWe should consider this matter resolved for now.
STH_andorian_flavour.32.name: Vulcan hands Weytahn to Andoria
STH_andorian_flavour.33.desc_01: As agreed we have enforced the Demilitarization of Weytahn, all military installations on the planet and system have been removed and Starfleet will enforce this agreement for the next 25 years. \n\nThe Andorians cooperated with the Starfleet officers and even though the Vulcan's didn't openly express any gratidude most believe they were thankful.
STH_andorian_flavour.33.desc_02: As agreed we have allowed the Demilitarization of Weytahn and Starfleet has carried out the action as agreed. No military or army installations will be allowed to be built within the system for the next 25 years.
STH_andorian_flavour.33.desc_03: Starfleet has successfully fulfilled their duty and removed all weapons from the Andorian Imperial Guard facilities on Paan Mokar. This provides us with a certain degree of assurance that both United Earth and Andor can be trusted. However the High Command will continue to monitor the situation.
STH_andorian_flavour.33.name: Weytahn Demilitarised
STH_andorian_flavour.34.desc_01: Our failure to fulfill our obligation to remove the military from Weytahn has raised a smile from the Andorian Empire, but despite the Vulcan's lack of outward emotions it is clear that our actions have seriously impacted our relationship with our oldest allies.
STH_andorian_flavour.34.desc_02: General Shran's faith in the Pink Skins has proven to be well placed, they have refused to get further involved in the situation on Weytahn allowing us to keep our military installations in place. It is only a shame we couldnt have been there to witness the Vulcan's faces when they were told.
STH_andorian_flavour.34.desc_03: Humanity has once again proven why we are correct in our assessment that they are not ready to join the galactic community. Their failure to act on the agreement has once against demonstrated their lack of maturity. \n\nWith both Andor and Earth set against further action against the colony, it would be illogical for us to take further actions at this point.
STH_andorian_flavour.34.name: Weytahn not Demilitarised
STH_andorian_flavour.4.desc: El [oficialA.GetName] y el [oficialB.GetName] están de pie en la arena formada a bordo del buque insignia de [Root.GetFleetName]. \Le deseo una muerte rápida, capitán", grita el [oficialB.GetName], y hace un gesto para que el [oficialA.GetName] haga el primer movimiento. El capitán [oficialA.GetName] desenfunda su ushaan-tor y arremete directamente contra el [oficialB.GetName], que esquiva sin esfuerzo. El ruido de la hoja contra la hoja resuena en toda la sala, y el público guarda silencio. \Ambas partes comienzan a gruñir fuertemente a medida que avanza la batalla. Una bota de refilón alcanza al capitán [oficialA.GetName] en el pecho, empujando a [oficialA.GetHerHim] hacia el borde, aunque concediéndole un momento de respiro. \El [oficialB.GetName] se lanza en una ráfaga de golpes cansados hacia el [oficialA.GetName], que los desvía mientras el [oficialA.GetSheHe] espera una apertura. De repente, los ojos de [agenteA.GetName] se abren de par en par, presa del pánico, cuando [agenteA.GetSheHe] juzga mal un golpe. El ushaan-tor de [oficialB.GetName] corta la antena derecha de [oficialA.GetName]. Gritando de dolor, [oficialA.GetName] se desploma en el suelo, mientras que [oficialB.GetName] comienza a reír.
STH_andorian_flavour.4.name: Ushaan
STH_andorian_flavour.5.desc: El [oficialA.GetName] y el [oficialB.GetName] están de pie en la arena formada a bordo del buque insignia de [Root.GetFleetName]. \Le deseo una muerte rápida, capitán", grita el [oficialB.GetName], y hace un gesto para que el [oficialA.GetName] haga el primer movimiento. El capitán [oficialA.GetName] desenfunda su ushaan-tor y arremete directamente contra el [oficialB.GetName], que esquiva sin esfuerzo. El ruido de la hoja contra la hoja resuena en toda la sala, y el público guarda silencio. \Ambas partes comienzan a gruñir fuertemente a medida que avanza la batalla. Una bota de refilón alcanza al capitán [oficialA.GetName] en el pecho, empujando a [oficialA.GetHerHim] hacia el borde, aunque concediéndole un momento de respiro. \El [oficialB.GetName] se lanza en una ráfaga de golpes cansados hacia el [oficialA.GetName], que los desvía mientras el [oficialA.GetSheHe] espera una apertura. De repente, los ojos de [agenteA.GetName] se abren de par en par, presa del pánico, cuando [agenteA.GetSheHe] juzga mal un golpe. El ushaan-tor de [oficialB.GetName] se clava en el pecho de [oficialA.GetName] y momentos después [oficialA.GetSheHe] cae al suelo, muerto.
STH_andorian_flavour.5.name: Ushaan
STH_andromeda.1.desc: Reports are coming in from the planet [andromeda_pre_planet_1.GetName] they are under attack and taking heavy damage from an unknown assailant with powerful weaponary. They request aid from [root.GetName] as soon as possible.
STH_andromeda.1.name: Planet under siege
STH_andromeda.10.desc: Admiral Vance has confirmed that his teams have set up a base of operations close to [Root.Capital_scope.GetName] and they should be able to periodically bring additional ships to aid us in the battle against the Andromedan Invasion fleets.
STH_andromeda.10.name: Future Starfleet base set up
STH_andromeda.1007.desc: A massive tear in the fabric of space itself has appeared in the [andromeda_origin_system.GetName] system! As informed it looks like the Andromedans are opening the tears as some kind of one-way portal from their galaxy. Fleets of strange vessels are pouring out, attacking everything in sight. This looks like the beginning of their major invasion!\n\nWe have intercepted a powerful signal being sent from the arriving vessels to somewhere on the other side of the portal. It sounds like... a war cry.
STH_andromeda.1007.name: Andromedan Invasion
STH_andromeda.1008.desc: Instruments across the [Root.GetName] have suddenly picked up a subspace power surge of massive proportions coming from somewhere within our galaxy. Our scientists are struggling to come up with an explanation for this event - nothing of its like has ever been recorded.\n\nThe exact origin point of this sudden power surge has yet to be identified, but we are still in the process of analyzing the available data.
STH_andromeda.1008.name: Galactic Power Surge
STH_andromeda.1009.desc: The source of the massive power surge we detected earlier has been identified. It comes from some kind of gigantic subspace tear in the [andromeda_origin_system.GetName] system. Fleets of strange spacecraft are pouring out of this portal, and early reports speak of indiscriminate attacks against everyone coming into contact with them.\n\nWe have intercepted a powerful signal being sent from the arriving vessels to somewhere on the other side of the portal. It sounds like... a war cry.
STH_andromeda.1010.desc: We... are the Andromedans... all life in this Galaxy will end at our hands... prepare for your doom.
STH_andromeda.1010.name: Intercepted Transmission
STH_andromeda.1011.desc: We have lost our colony on [Root.GetName]! After taking up positions in orbit, the extradimensional invaders bombarded the surface and wiped out our citizens below. Nothing remains of the planet bar the shattered remains.
STH_andromeda.1011.name: [Root.GetName] Obliterated
STH_andromeda.1013.a: A major victory for the Milky Way.
STH_andromeda.1013.desc: The dimensional portal in the [andromeda_origin_system.GetName] system has been destroyed! This means that the Andromedan invaders can no longer receive reinforcements from their galaxy. \n\nWith the destruction of this portal, the end of these invasions is finally in sight. A profound sense of elation has settled over most of the galaxy. The [portal_killer.GetName] has won much admiration, since it was their ships that struck the final blow against the portal. The crews of those vessels will be celebrated as heroes for generations to come.
STH_andromeda.1013.name: Andromedan Portal destroyed
STH_andromeda.1016.desc: A major blow has been struck against the invaders from Andromeda with the destruction of one of their portals.
STH_andromeda.1016.name: First Portal Destroyed
STH_andromeda.1050.b: Can there be peace between us?
STH_andromeda.1050.c: You picked the wrong galaxy to invade!
STH_andromeda.1050.d: You will be another stain under the boot of [Root.GetName].
STH_andromeda.1050.desc: ...behold... the glory... of the Andromedan race ... the last race you will ever see before you are destroyed.
STH_andromeda.1050.f: You will be assimilated, resistance is futile.
STH_andromeda.1050.name: Incoming Message
STH_andromeda.11.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] we are picking up energy signitures from various locations across the quadrant, it appears the Andromedan fleets are massing and forming gateways to bring in more ships. \n\nWe must prepare our fleets and rally the galaxy to come to defend itself.
STH_andromeda.11.name: The Invasion Begins
STH_andromeda.1110.a: This has gone from bad to worse.
STH_andromeda.1110.desc: Our instruments have detected a new subspace power surge, this time coming from the [second_portal_system.GetName] system! A second massive wormhole has appeared, and its energy signature appears to be almost identical to that of the first dimensional rift which opened in our galaxy.\n\nIt looks like the mysterious invaders have opened a second gateway to their realm through which they can send even more reinforcements.
STH_andromeda.1110.name: A second portal
STH_andromeda.1116.name: Second Portal Destroyed
STH_andromeda.1210.desc: A third dimensional portal has appeared in the [third_portal_system.GetName] system! Who does this one belong to?\n\nWe are picking up a transmission coming from the other side of it.
STH_andromeda.1210.name: Third Portal
STH_andromeda.1211.desc: We come to join the fight... prepared to meet your end.
STH_andromeda.1216.name: Third Portal Destroyed
STH_andromeda.1271.a: Our spiritual armor has weathered yet another storm.
STH_andromeda.1271.b: One day, perhaps we will be the ones invading their realm.
STH_andromeda.1271.c: Unfortunate that no opportunity to study their dimension presented itself.
STH_andromeda.1271.d: If only a peaceful solution has been possible.
STH_andromeda.1271.desc: The last vestiges of the Andromedan invaders have been wiped out, hopefully ridding the galaxy of this threat for good.\n\nSpecies everywhere are celebrating the news of this great victory, safe at last in the knowledge that they won't be eliminated by this vicious attack after all. Perhaps this is the beginning of a new era of galactic cooperation and friendship?
STH_andromeda.1271.e: The galactic economy should make a swift recovery.
STH_andromeda.1271.f: Those creatures made a mistake when they invaded our dimension.
STH_andromeda.1271.g: They were a fascinating, if dangerous, form of life.
STH_andromeda.1271.h: A shame they were so aggressive. We could have learned much from each other.
STH_andromeda.1271.name: Andromeda Invasion Defeated
STH_andromeda.2.desc:
As the fleet enters orbit of [andromeda_pre_planet_1.GetName] the devastation can be seen by all. Vast regions of the planet's surface reduced to charred debris and the casulty reports make concerning reading. 

More worrying is that the attackers fled the scene before they could be ID. 

Whomever poccesses this much firepower and speed is a considerable threat. Our scientists recommend we remain in orbit to look for any clues on who might be behind this attack, whilst our military commanders recommend suring up our defences.
STH_andromeda.2.name: Attackers Flee
STH_andromeda.3.desc: Our scientists have uncovered some interesting information about the culprits who attacked our planet a high spike in X-rays consistant with an object crossing the galactic barrier. They believe that they should be able to scan for these energy reading and provide us with an early warning of future attacks.
STH_andromeda.3.name: Clues found
STH_andromeda.4.desc: All outbound communication from [andromeda_pre_planet_2.GetName] have stopped and planetary comm networks have gone offline. It appears our mysterious attackers have struck again with catastrophic impact, reducing [andromeda_pre_planet_2.GetName] to a shattered ruin of the world it once was. This is a clear act of war against [root.GetName] and must not go unanswered.
STH_andromeda.4.name: [andromeda_pre_planet_2.GetName] destroyed by attackers
STH_andromeda.5.desc: Our early warning system has paid off as the tell tale signs of our attackers were found approaching the orbit of [andromeda_pre_planet_3.GetName]. With the planet in clear danger we must mass our fleets and defend our people.
STH_andromeda.5.name: [andromeda_pre_planet_3.GetName] under attack
STH_andromeda.6.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerName] we are detecting a temporal energy surge and a vortex is opening, there is another ship entering the battle... it is opening hailing frequencies, it's the Enterprise?!
STH_andromeda.6.desc_02: [Root.GetRulerName] we are detecting a temporal energy surge and a vortex is opening, there is another ship entering the battle... it is opening hailing frequencies, it claims to be the USS Voyager?!
STH_andromeda.6.name: There is another ship entering the battle
STH_andromeda.7.desc: Despite putting up a tough fight the mysterious ship has finally been destroyed thanks to the brilliant efforts of our fleets. Maybe this will bring justice for those who lost their lives and provide the answers we need to understand why we are under attack.
STH_andromeda.7.name: Invaders Ship Destroyed
STH_andromeda.8.b: What can you tell us of these attackers?
STH_andromeda.8.d: There must be no further impacts to the timeline.
STH_andromeda.8.desc:
Greetings [Root.GetRulerName] [Root.GetRulerName], you must forgive this intrusion, my crew and I risk much by breaching the Temporal accords to speak with you today but the situation is grave. My name is Fleet Admiral Charles Vance and I am an officer in Starfleet from the 32nd Century. 

The enemy you face has been provided with technology from my future and the ability to cross to our galaxy from the Andromeda Galaxy in a bid to launch a preemptive strike against the races of the Milky Way. Their attacks against us in our own time failed and now they hope to destroy all life here to ensure they succeed. 

 I have heard many stories of the Starfleet of this era and many of you are heroes and legends to us, now we must help you, we can set up a base of operations and bring forth reinforcements to help ensure our future is not lost.
STH_andromeda.8.name: Incoming hail from Starfleet?
STH_andromeda.9.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], you must forgive this intrusion, my crew and I risk much by breaching the Temporal accords to speak with you today but the situation is grave. My name is Fleet Admiral Charles Vance and I am an officer in Starfleet, but not the Starfleet you know, we are from the 32nd Century. \n\nThe enemy you face has been provided with technology from my future and the ability to cross to our galaxy from the Andromeda Galaxy in a bid to launch a preemptive strike against the races of the Milky Way. Their attacks against us in our own time failed and now they hope to destroy all life here to ensure they succeed. We must be allowed to help you, we can bring forth reinforcements to help ensure our future is not lost.
STH_andromeda.9.name: Incoming hail from Starfleet
STH_andromeda.9998.desc:
[Root.GetName], you and your brave crews have my thanks for their work in ensuring that the galaxy has a future safe from the Andromedan threat. 

We must now return to our own time, now that it has been secured. Rest assured that the future is in safe hands.

See you out there!
STH_andromeda.9998.name: The Future is safe
STH_archaeology_events.1.desc: Varios miembros de la tripulación han muerto en [From.Planet.GetName] luego del colapso de un túnel cerca del sitio de excavación después de que un generador de integridad estructural fallara debido a un mantenimiento deficiente.
STH_archaeology_events.1.name: Colapso del túnel
STH_archaeology_events.10.desc: The investigation of the [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] facility has stumbled upon a cache of artefacts of unknown purpose. \n\nThe artefacts were recovered when a console was accidentally activated, triggering the rematerialisation sequence on what was revealed to be a transporter pad. [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] reports that the [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] builders of the facility must have possessed advanced transporter technology to enable them to preserve items in transporter stasis indefinitely without degradation.
STH_archaeology_events.10.name: [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] Artefacts
STH_archaeology_events.100.desc: Los pulsos de croniton observados desde la órbita se han localizado en una sola fuente, varios kilómetros debajo de la superficie de [From.Planet.GetName]. \n\nDespués de varios días de análisis, los científicos de [Root.GetName] han podido escanear parcialmente a través de la burbuja de distorsión alrededor de la fuente de los cronitones y han detectado lo que parece ser un buque [Root.Owner.GetName] rodeado por la roca
STH_archaeology_events.100.name: Nave espacial enterrada
STH_archaeology_events.11.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] has been injured after the investigation of the [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] facility stumbled upon a cache of artefacts of unknown purpose. \n\nThe artefacts were recovered when a console was accidentally activated, triggering the rematerialisation sequence on what was revealed to be a transporter pad. [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] was knocked back by a modest explosion caused by the transporter-overlay of one of a [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] artefact and a portable generator from the [Root.GetFleetName].
STH_archaeology_events.11.name: [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] Artefacts
STH_archaeology_events.110.desc: La nave estelar [Root.Owner.GetName] debajo de la superficie de [From.Planet.GetName] ha eludido la identificación, ajustándose a ninguna configuración conocida de naves reportadas como desaparecidas o no. \n\nIngenieros de [Root.GetName] han excavado varios túneles hasta el borde de la burbuja de distorsión del cronitón que rodea la embarcación, y se ha comenzado la construcción de un inversor subespacial localizado, que se cree que podrá dispersar la radiación del cronitón. .
STH_archaeology_events.110.name: Nave espacial enterrada
STH_archaeology_events.12.desc: Several crew have been killed investigating the [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] facility, after an internal security system was accidentally triggered. \n\nLuckily the power cells connected to the security grid were already at reduced capacity, but the automated systems were still able to vaporise a number of the [Root.GetFleetName]'s crew before they were fully drained.
STH_archaeology_events.12.name: [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] Security Systems Activated
STH_archaeology_events.120.desc:
El inversor subespacial ha dispersado con éxito la burbuja de cronitón alrededor del recipiente enterrado [Root.Owner.GetName]. 

A medida que un equipo de seguridad de [Root.GetName] entra en la nave, el misterio solo se profundiza. El recipiente es del futuro. 

Aunque todos los sistemas informáticos se han deshabilitado por completo, un solo datapad en el puente muestra una entrada de registro de casi sesenta años en el futuro. 

 Un análisis más detallado de la nave indica que, si bien casi todos sus sistemas han sido destruidos, todavía hay una gran cantidad de tecnología recuperable para desenterrar. [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ordena la excavación inmediata de la embarcación, para su análisis en [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName].
STH_archaeology_events.120.name: Nave espacial enterrada
STH_archaeology_events.13.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] has been injured investigating the [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] facility, after an internal security system was accidentally triggered. \n\nLuckily the power cells connected to the security grid were already at reduced capacity, but the automated systems were still able to stun and severely wound the [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] before they were fully drained.
STH_archaeology_events.13.name: [From.GetDigSiteOriginator] Security Systems Activated
STH_archaeology_events.130.desc:
La embarcación del futuro ha sido completamente desenterrada de los kilómetros de roca bajo la cual fue enterrada en [From.Planet.GetName], y usando [Root.GetName] '[Root.Owner.GetTractorBeam] pronto la ve elevada. orbita. 

A medida que el barco entra en la urdimbre junto con varios remolcadores, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] lee la única entrada de registro que se recuperará incluso parcialmente. 

 '--- s log, stardate ---. Hemos detectado un te --- ral --ortion en el ----- múltiple. Estamos --- pero --- debemos --- y en el barco ''.
STH_archaeology_events.130.name: Nave espacial enterrada
STH_archaeology_events.14.desc: Las fluctuaciones desconocidas del sistema han causado una sobrecarga del conducto de plasma en una consola tripulada a bordo del barco, lo que ha resultado en una explosión y numerosas víctimas.
STH_archaeology_events.14.name: Error del sistema
STH_archaeology_events.140.desc: Varios miembros de la tripulación han muerto por exposición a la radiación de cronitones mientras intentaban obtener acceso a la embarcación enterrada en [From.Planet.GetName]. \n\n Las investigaciones iniciales sugieren que las inoculaciones de radiación de cronitón proporcionadas a la tripulación eran de hecho inoculaciones de radiación de taquiones. El oficial médico responsable de la confusión ha sido disciplinado.
STH_archaeology_events.140.name: Exposición a la radiación de cronitones
STH_archaeology_events.141.desc: Un número considerable de tripulantes han muerto por exposición a la radiación de cronitones mientras intentaban obtener acceso a la embarcación enterrada en [From.Planet.GetName]. \n\n Las investigaciones iniciales sugieren que las inoculaciones de radiación de cronitón proporcionadas a la tripulación eran de hecho inoculaciones de radiación de taquiones, creadas después de una falla en el conjunto de replicación médica.
STH_archaeology_events.141.name: Exposición a la radiación de cronitones
STH_archaeology_events.142.desc: Después de un aumento repentino en la radiación de cronitones, un miembro de la tripulación que trabajaba en la excavación en [From.Planet.GetName] ha logrado convertir ingeniosamente una parte de la radiación en energía almacenable utilizando la matriz de deflectores de [Root.GetName] y varias unidades de deflectores condensadores EPS de grado.
STH_archaeology_events.142.name: Exposición a la radiación de cronitones
STH_archaeology_events.143.desc: Mientras investigaba el buque desde el futuro, la expedición descubrió varios fragmentos de troncos conservados en uno de los cuartos de la tripulación del barco. \n\nAunque los registros arrojan poca luz sobre las identidades de la tripulación, el análisis lingüístico ha revelado algunas tendencias culturales interesantes.
STH_archaeology_events.143.name: Investigación futura de la nave espacial
STH_archaeology_events.144.desc: Mientras investigaba el barco desde el futuro, la expedición descubrió varios registros de sensores parciales recuperables desde la interfaz de la computadora de navegación del barco. \n\nAunque los registros arrojan poca luz sobre las circunstancias del paso del barco en el tiempo, los registros contienen escaneos de alta resolución de una serie de fenómenos astronómicos.
STH_archaeology_events.144.name: Investigación futura de la nave espacial
STH_archaeology_events.145.desc: Mientras investigaba el buque desde el futuro, la expedición descubrió varios dispositivos de almacenamiento de energía completamente cargados en la bahía de carga del barco. \n\nAunque el funcionamiento exacto de las tiendas de energía es un misterio, sí utilizan una interfaz compatible con los estándares actuales.
STH_archaeology_events.145.name: Investigación futura de la nave espacial
STH_archaeology_events.15.desc: Las fluctuaciones desconocidas del sistema han causado numerosas sobrecargas en la línea de conductos de plasma en las consolas tripuladas a bordo del barco, lo que ha resultado en explosiones y numerosas bajas.
STH_archaeology_events.15.name: Error del sistema
STH_archaeology_events.16.desc: Las fluctuaciones desconocidas del sistema han provocado que todas las esclusas de aire en una de las cubiertas inferiores se descompriman a la vez, lo que resulta en una gran pérdida de tripulación y vida.
STH_archaeology_events.16.name: Error del sistema
STH_archaeology_events.17.desc: Las fluctuaciones del sistema han sido identificadas y reparadas por un miembro de la tripulación, dando una idea de la causa de estos errores.
STH_archaeology_events.17.name: Error del sistema
STH_archaeology_events.18.desc: The treacherous conditions on the planet's surface have gotten much worse, a deadly sand storm springs up from out of nowhere, but still [Leader.GetName] presses onwards in their trance-like state. Oblivious to the injuries sustained by their crew.
STH_archaeology_events.18.name: Sand Storm!
STH_archaeology_events.19.desc: Just as the expedition started to believe they were safe, the ground beneath them gives way, luckily [Leader.GetName] was able to avoid injury, but a number of the expedition party were not so lucky. \n\nThe company doctor recommend immediate evac for the injured, whilst [Leader.GetName] insists on continuing the journey.
STH_archaeology_events.19.name: Sink Hole
STH_archaeology_events.2.desc: Un gran número de tripulantes han muerto en [From.Planet.GetName] luego del colapso de un túnel cerca del sitio de excavación luego de que una serie de generadores de integridad estructural fallaran debido al mal mantenimiento de las baterías que los alimentaban.
STH_archaeology_events.2.name: Colapso del túnel
STH_archaeology_events.20.desc: Throughout the search [Leader.GetName] has remained single minded as if transfixed by a vision only they can see, but now suddenly as if guided by a mysterious source they double their pace, muttering that the end is close Mr Russell.
STH_archaeology_events.20.name: A mysterious clue
STH_archaeology_events.21.desc: Suddenly [Leader.GetName] stumbled as the ground beneath them gives way. The medic rushes to their aid and notes that the Captain has taken a notible injury, yet they seem unaware of the pain and damage they have caused themselves.
STH_archaeology_events.21.name: Leader injured
STH_archaeology_events.22.desc: All of a sudden [Leader.GetName] collapses to the ground, uttering a single message, that they have failed the prophets before closing their eyes and passing away. Whatever has happened will remain a mystery between [Leader.GetName] and the Celestial Beings.
STH_archaeology_events.22.name: [Leader.GetName] killed
STH_archaeology_events.23.desc: The investigation continues into the local population, however as [Leader.GetName] is reviewing the team's workload for the current day they identify a request order for an unknown vessel to be dispatched to the planet's surface. The co-ordinates lead to a large lake just south of the Ba'ku village.
STH_archaeology_events.23.name: Mission to Ba'ku
STH_archaeology_events.24.desc: The observation team led by [Leader.GetName] have sent back an interesting report on the local residents of the planet, there has been clear evidence that prolonged resident beneath the Metaphasic radiation of the planets ring structure has enhanced the Ba'ku's cognitive abilities. The levels of focus and mental discipline shown by the Ba'ku mirrors even the most advanced telepathic species of the Alpha Quadrant, one scientist hypothesized that they might even be able to manipulate other perception of time itself.
STH_archaeology_events.24.name: Mission to Ba'ku
STH_archaeology_events.25.desc: We have received a further update from the team in the Briar Patch. The current view from [Leader.GetName] is that despite their outward appearance the Baku are much older than they outwardly appear. The planet's unique radiation appears to have a regenerative effect on the population, something that seems to be of keen interest to our Son'a partners.
STH_archaeology_events.25.name: Mission to Ba'ku
STH_archaeology_events.3.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha salvado heroicamente las vidas de docenas de tripulantes tras el colapso de una parte de la red de túneles cerca del sitio de excavación en [From.Planet.GetName]. El [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] se arriesgó a sufrir lesiones para mantener una serie de generadores de integridad estructural en línea el tiempo suficiente para que la tripulación escapara.
STH_archaeology_events.3.name: Colapso del túnel
STH_archaeology_events.4.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha salvado heroicamente las vidas de docenas de tripulantes tras el colapso de una parte de la red de túneles cerca del sitio de excavación en [From.Planet.GetName], pero gravemente herido [Root.Leader .GetHerHim] self en el proceso. El [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] fue mutilado por la caída de escombros mientras intentaba mantener una serie de generadores de integridad estructural en línea el tiempo suficiente para que la tripulación escapara.
STH_archaeology_events.4.name: Colapso del túnel
STH_archaeology_events.5.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha sido asesinado, salvando heroicamente las vidas de docenas de tripulantes tras el colapso de una parte de la red de túneles cerca del sitio de excavación en [From.Planet.GetName]. El [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] resultó gravemente herido por la caída de escombros mientras intentaba mantener una serie de generadores de integridad estructural en línea el tiempo suficiente para que la tripulación escapara.
STH_archaeology_events.5.name: Colapso del túnel
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.1.c: El equipo visitante es prescindible, deja la órbita.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.1.desc:
Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] Abre un canal a la fuente de la transmisión en la superficie y es recibido por un sistema automatizado de comunicación holográfica. Hace varias preguntas sobre la [Root.GetFleetName] Intención de compra, pero revela poco antes de cerrar el canal. 

El capitán prepara y conduce un equipo ausente del personal superior al planeta, radiante en vegetación espesa. Al cabo de unos instantes, el Jefe de Seguridad advirtió que había desechos de tritanium en la zona, dañados de una manera muy superior a nuestra tecnología actual. 

El oficial ejecutivo es abordado por lo que parece ser un comandante de la flota de alto nivel, sin embargo después de una serie de preguntas sospechosas el impostor se revela como otro holograma antes de una serie de zánganos de armas colocados en el equipo visitante. El grupo se aparta de la primera oleada de drones, pero se ve obligado a retirarse a una cueva cercana después de que el Oficial Médico Jefe esté lesionado. 

En órbita, el [Root.GetFleetName] está bajo ataque de una plataforma de armas orbital invisible, mientras que las comunicaciones alrededor del planeta parecen estar atascadas.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.1.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.2.desc:
El Capitan[Root.GetLeaderName] y el equipo visitante ejecuta una heroica campaña guerrillera contra la fuente de los drones de combate de superficie, una fábrica automatizada todavía inmaculada y decorada con anuncios alienígenas. Después de una lucha phaser prolongada a través de las entrañas de la fábrica el equipo visitante llegar a la central de la computadora central y deshabilitar con éxito toda la red de defensa de la fábrica. 

En órbita, la plataforma de armas tartamudea a momentos de inactividad después de colapsar los Escudos del [Root.GetFleetName]. 

La fábrica en la superficie aparece intacta, y con el mínimo esfuerzo podría ser reiniciado con nuevas rutinas de comando.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.2.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.3.desc:
El Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] Y el equipo visitante ejecuta una heroica campaña de guerrilla contra la fuente de los drones de combate de superficie, una fábrica automatizada aún inmaculada y decorada con anuncios alienígenas. Después de una lucha phaser prolongada a través de las entrañas de la fábrica el equipo de distancia llegar a la base central de la computadora y destruir con éxito toda la red de defensa de la fábrica. 

En órbita, la plataforma de armas tartamudea a momentos de inactividad después de colapsar los Escudos del [Root.GetFleetName], y cae en la atmósfera desintegrándose en la reentrada. 

La fábrica en la superficie comienza a sufrir un fallo en cascada en su generador de materia / antimateria. El equipo visitante se emite momentos antes de que el sitio de la fábrica se vaporice.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.3.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.4.desc:
El Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] y el equipo visitante ejecuta una heroica campaña de guerrilla contra la fuente de los drones de combate de superficie, una fábrica automatizada aún inmaculada y decorada con anuncios alienígenas. Después de una lucha phaser prolongada a través de las entrañas de la fábrica el equipo de distancia llegar a la base central de la computadora y destruir con éxito toda la red de defensa de la fábrica, pero no antes de un relé de potencia explota, matando al capitán [Root.GetLeaderName]. 

En órbita, la plataforma de armas tartamudea a momentos de inactividad después de colapsar los Escudos del [Root.GetFleetName], Y cae en la atmósfera desintegrándose en la reentrada. 

La fábrica en la superficie comienza a sufrir un fallo en cascada en su generador de materia / antimateria. El equipo visitante se emite momentos antes de que el sitio de la fábrica se vaporice.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.4.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.5.desc:
El Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] y el equipo de distancia jury-rig varios comunicadores y tricorders para cortar a través de la señal de interferencia. El capitán pide hablar con el representante holográfico de nuevo y momentos después aparece en la cueva, mientras que una serie de anuncios de anuncios holográficos muestran varios productos alienígenas detrás de él. 

Una conversación con el holograma se produce y revela su propósito como mecanismo para facilitar la venta de los principales sistemas de armas de exportación primarios del planeta y que los ataques hasta ahora han sido parte de su rutina de demostración de ventas preprogramada. 

El equipo visitante puede suponer que la civilización responsable de los sistemas de armas debe haber sido destruida por sus propias invenciones. 

Después de mucha negociación el Capitán[Root.GetLeaderName] Es capaz de persuadir al holograma para que se ponga de pie bajo la condición de que toda la instalación de armas sea comprada por una gran suma. 

El holograma insiste en incluir una serie de documentos de investigación a la orden de compra, aumentando el costo en un 25%, pero proporcionando a nuestros científicos una gran cantidad de información.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.5.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.6.desc:
El Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] y el equipo de distancia jury-rig varios comunicadores y tricorders para cortar a través de la señal de interferencia. El capitán pide hablar con el representante holográfico de nuevo y momentos después aparece en la cueva, mientras que una serie de anuncios de anuncios holográficos muestran varios productos alienígenas detrás de él. 

Una conversación con el holograma se produce y revela su propósito como un mecanismo para facilitar la venta de los principales sistemas de armas de exportación primarios del planeta y que los ataques hasta ahora han sido parte de su rutina de demostración de ventas preprogramada. 

El equipo visitante puede suponer que la civilización responsable de los sistemas de armas debe haber sido destruida por sus propias invenciones. 

Después de mucha negociación el Capitán[Root.GetLeaderName] Es capaz de persuadir al holograma para que se ponga de pie bajo la condición de que toda la instalación de armas sea comprada por una gran suma. El capitán es capaz de negociar con éxito una reducción en el costo de la instalación del precio solicitado. El holograma desaparece, es la matriz aparentemente eliminado como la venta se confirma.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.6.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.7.desc: El timonel de la [Root.GetFleetName] toma la decisión de abandonar la órbita para salvar a la nave de una destrucción inminente, presumiendo en el apagón de las comunicaciones que el equipo visitante se ha perdido. \n\nLa plataforma de armas sigue sin embargo, y después de una serie de maniobras inspiradas a través del sistema estelar la plataforma finalmente alcanza la [Root.GetFleetName]. Un golpe de mala suerte hace que sean destruidas las salvaguardias de la contención de la antimateria del barco, y el barco se vaporiza con todas las miembros perdidos. La plataforma de armas está atrapada en la explosión, y de alguna manera la energía se canaliza hacia el haz de transferencia de energía de la plataforma hacia el planeta. La instalación de drones en la superficie es destruida, matando al equipo visitante.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.7.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.8.desc: El timonel de la [Root.GetFleetName] toma la decisión de abandonar la órbita para salvar a la nave de una destrucción inminente, presumiendo en el apagón de las comunicaciones que el equipo visitante se ha perdido. \n\nLa plataforma de armas sigue sin embargo, y después de una serie de maniobras inspiradas a través del sistema estelar la plataforma finalmente alcanza la [Root.GetFleetName]. Un tiro de buena suerte golpea hacia fuera las salvaguardias de la contención de la antimateria de la plataforma de las armas y se vaporiza. De alguna manera, una parte de la energía de la explosión se canaliza hacia el haz de transferencia de energía de la plataforma hacia el planeta. La instalación de drones en la superficie es destruida. El equipo visitante puede regresar a la nave con los restos de un número de drones destruidos.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_event.8.name: Arsenal de la Libertad
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_fail.1.desc:
El Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] Abre un canal a la fuente de la transmisión en la superficie y es recibido por un sistema automatizado de comunicación holográfica. Hace varias preguntas sobre la [Root.GetFleetName] Intención de compra, pero revela poco antes de cerrar el canal. 

El Capitan[Root.GetLeaderName] Se prepara para dirigir un equipo ausente del personal superior al planeta, pero es interrumpido por la aparición repentina de una plataforma de armas orbitales. Temiendo por la seguridad de la nave, el capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] ordena que el barco salga de órbita. 

Como el barco lo hace, la antigua plataforma de armas parece sufrir una falla mecánica y se vaporiza. De alguna manera, la energía de la explosión se canaliza hacia el haz de transferencia de energía de la plataforma hacia el planeta, destruyendo el área cerca del sitio de transmisión original y eliminando cualquier posibilidad de descubrir el misterio de la señal.
STH_arsenalOfFreedom_fail.2.desc:
El Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] Abre un canal a la fuente de la transmisión en la superficie y es recibido por un sistema automatizado de comunicación holográfica. Hace varias preguntas sobre la [Root.GetFleetName] iIntención de compra, pero revela poco antes de cerrar el canal. 

El Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName]Se prepara para dirigir un equipo ausente del personal superior al planeta, pero es interrumpido por la aparición repentina de una plataforma de armas orbitales. Temiendo por la seguridad de la nave, el capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] ordena que el barco salga de órbita. 

Como la nave lo hace, la antigua plataforma de armas parece sufrir una falla mecánica y se vaporiza. De alguna manera, la energía de la explosión se canaliza hacia el haz de transferencia de energía de la plataforma hacia el planeta, destruyendo el área cerca del sitio de transmisión original y eliminando cualquier posibilidad de descubrir el misterio de la señal. 

 El [Root.GetFleetName] es atrapado en la explosión de la plataforma de armas y es destruido, matando a todos sus miembros.
STH_babel.10.desc: No poder asistir a la conferencia ha sido un gran revés para la paz, veamos qué depara el futuro.
STH_babel.10.name: Cumbre de Babel
STH_babel.11.a: Entendido Una oportunidad para una paz duradera.
STH_babel.11.c: Nuestro buque insignia mostrará nuestra creencia en la paz.
STH_babel.11.d: This is not in our interests.
STH_babel.11.desc:
Después de muchos años de conflicto y tensión, ¡los diplomáticos de los poderes del cuadrante Alfa y Beta cercanos han organizado una cumbre de paz en un lugar con el nombre en código Babel One para trazar un rumbo hacia el futuro. 

Los representantes de la Tierra, Tellar Prime, Andoria y Vulcan asistirán. 

 Una escolta militar debería llevar a nuestros principales diplomáticos a esta conferencia, lo que podría cambiar el curso de la diplomacia galáctica en Esta región del espacio y el resultado en cada carrera trabajando más estrechamente juntos.
STH_babel.11.name: Una invitación para unirse a la cumbre de paz en Babel One
STH_babel.13.desc:
Today is a momentous day, the major powers of the Alpha and Beta Quadrant have formed a strategic alliance with the goal of tackling issues together and securing the safety of 

[cop_earth.GetName] 
[cop_vulcan.GetName] 
[cop_andoria.GetName] 
[cop_tellar.GetName] 

These states will move forward together and face their challenges as a united front.
STH_babel.13.name: The Coalition of Planets Formed
STH_babel.14.desc: In a historic moment an alliance between [cop_earth.GetName] [cop_vulcan.GetName] [cop_andoria.GetName] [cop_tellar.GetName] has been formed with each government agreeing to provide mutual protection and cooperation. This will result in a major power shift within the quadrant and only time will tell what the future holds for this Coalition of Planets.
STH_babel.14.name: The Coalition of Planets Formed
STH_babel.2.a.tooltip: Las rivalidades terminan entre todas las partes.
STH_babel.2.a: Es hora de dejar de lado las viejas rivalidades.
STH_babel.2.b: No hay puntos en común, no podemos continuar.
STH_babel.2.desc: La cumbre está en marcha y las discusiones son intensas, el tema se convierte en discusiones sobre viejas rivalidades y quejas. Las relaciones entre Vulcano, Andor y Tellar han fluctuado a lo largo de los años y muchos consideran que la Tierra es demasiado joven para ser confiable. ¿Cómo se puede construir la paz con tanta historia?
STH_babel.2.name: Bienvenido a la cumbre de Babel
STH_babel.21.desc: Following on from the success at the Babel Conference the ambassadors and representatives from each ot the major powers have drawn up a proposal to form an interstate alliance for mutual protection and assurance. Signing this agreement will mean the termination of any existing agreements and a commitment to joining the Coalition of Planets. This may open the way to further strengthening of this relationship.
STH_babel.21.name: Vote to form a new alliance
STH_babel.22.desc: Old wounds are hard to heal and despite the efforts of all involved at the Babel the conference descended into chaos with diplomats from all sides resorting to shouts and threats rather than talking leaving all parties in a state of outrage.
STH_babel.22.name: Babel Conference Complete
STH_babel.4.a.tooltip: Las opiniones mejoraron entre los asistentes a la conferencia.
STH_babel.4.b.tooltip: Los asistentes a la conferencia están indignados.
STH_babel.4.b: Estamos solos Que comience la rivalidad.
STH_babel.4.desc: Gracias a las intensas negociaciones, se ha logrado un progreso real y se ha alcanzado un gran avance. La pregunta sigue siendo: ¿es hora de generar confianza y mirarnos de manera positiva o seguimos adelante solos?
STH_babel.4.name: Hora de decidir el futuro
STH_babel.5.a: La paz ha sido asegurada por ahora.
STH_babel.5.desc: La conferencia llega a su fin con todas las partes desconfiadas de esta nueva dirección pero optimistas. Quizás se acerca el momento de consolidar el acuerdo con una coalición segura y podamos mirar juntos hacia el futuro.
STH_babel.5.name: Babel Summit Complete
STH_babel.6.desc: The government of [Root.owner.GetName] back on [Root.capital_scope.GetName] has approved the proposal to form an interstate alliance of like minded governments across the Alpha and Beta quadrants. This alliance will be the first steps to bringing peace and security to the powers involved. Each government will need to vote on the process and the conference will reconvene in ten days to decide on their future.
STH_babel.6.name: The Coalition of Planets
