STH_bajoran_flavour.1.desc: Limpiando el espejo en forma de mente con el polen de Moreka, eres testigo de la gloria intachable de los Profetas. \ n Eres el emisario de confianza \ ny eres el avatar de una fuerza incomparable. \ nTodas las tareas inalcanzables del mundo \ nse vuelven fácilmente alcanzables con tu gracia. \n\nAkorem Laan crece en fama con cada nuevo poema que escribe. Se sabe que el Kai en particular encuentra gran alegría en sus obras, con la última pieza de Akorem, Gaudaal's Lament, sin excepción.
STH_bajoran_flavour.1.name: Lamento de Gaudaal
STH_bajoran_flavour.200.desc:
Siguiendo la guía de Ranjen [bhala_discoverer.GetName] después de que [bhala_discoverer.GetSheHe] experimentó una visión pagh'tem'far, un equipo arqueológico en [Root.GetName] desenterró una aguja bantica de lo que parece ser la antigua ciudad de B ' hala, pensamiento perdido hace más de veinte mil años. 

 [bhala_discoverer.GetName] pudo determinar la ubicación de la aguja bantica después de analizar una pintura recientemente descubierta de la plaza de la ciudad que incluía la aguja. Como las marcas únicas de cada aguja indican su posición dentro del universo más amplio, la extrapolación simple permitió determinar una ubicación. 

La excavación de las ruinas de esta ciudad perdida requerirá una cantidad sustancial de recursos, pero podría revelar secretos ocultos y acercarnos a los Profetas.
STH_bajoran_flavour.200.name: Ciudad perdida de B'hala
STH_bajoran_flavour.201.a: Si es la voluntad de los Profetas.
STH_bajoran_flavour.201.b: [From.GetName] honrará sus compromisos con nuestros aliados.
STH_bajoran_flavour.201.desc: Con el descubrimiento de B'hala completo, Ranjen [bhala_discoverer.GetName] ha sido contactado nuevamente por los Profetas. Advertencia [bhala_discoverer.GetHerHim] de que el compromiso de [Root.GetName] con la comunidad galáctica pondría en riesgo a [From.GetName], Ranjen [bhala_discoverer.GetName] describió enjambres de langostas de las estrellas que descienden para consumir [From.GetName].\n\nEl gobierno está dividido sobre cómo reaccionar ante la revelación. Si bien las visiones de [bhala_discoverer.GetName] demostraron ser ciertas al localizar a B'hala, no todos están preparados para abandonar los acuerdos interestelares de [Root.GetName] y retirarse al aislamiento.
STH_bajoran_flavour.201.name: Ciudad perdida de B'hala
STH_bajoran_flavour.202.desc: Tras el descubrimiento de la antigua ciudad perdida de B'hala en [FromFrom.GetName], el [From.GetName] se retiró de sus acuerdos interestelares y entró en un período de aislamiento. \n\nRanjen [FromFromFrom.GetName], la persona cuyas supuestas visiones religiosas condujeron al descubrimiento de la ciudad, afirmó ser testigo de una segunda visión que sugiere que la ruina caería [FromFrom.GetName] si continuara interactuando con la galaxia más amplia .
STH_bajoran_flavour.202.name: Aislamiento [From.GetName]
STH_bajoran_flavour.300.desc: Nuestra reciente integración del planeta Bajor y su población ha llevado a una posición interesante, Bajor tiene una gran cantidad de recursos y una población que fácilmente podríamos esclavizar y poner a trabajar por el bien de [Root.GetName], muchos en [Root. capital_scope.GetName] cree que esta podría ser una oportunidad fácil para saquear un mundo de sus riquezas, mientras los tontos religiosos del planeta se sientan indefensos a nuestros pies.
STH_bajoran_flavour.300.name: La cuestión bajorana
STH_bajoran_mechanics.10.d: Allow Vedeks to choose among their own.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.10.desc: The Vedek Assembly will sometimes fill its ranks from those deemed worthy among the civilian population. The nomination of a talented administrator or defender of the Faith is seen as a noble calling for the individual selected.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.10.name: Nominations to the Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.100.b: Make a donation to the Faith.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.100.desc_01: Kai [bajoranLeader.GetName] convenes this year's Commune of the Vedek Assembly, starting a process which will over several days discuss and rule on many matters of the Bajoran faith. \n\nWhile the Prophets have willed a degree of separation between the Faith and the government, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]'s presence at proceedings is a courtesy afforded to the [Root.GetName]'s civilian leadership.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.100.desc_02: While Bajor still awaits the election of a new Kai, Vedek [bajoranLeader.GetName] convenes the year's Commune of the Vedek Assembly, starting a process which will over several days discuss and rule on many matters of the Bajoran faith. \n\nWhile the Prophets have willed a degree of separation between the Faith and the government, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]'s presence at proceedings is a courtesy afforded to the [Root.GetName]'s civilian leadership.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.100.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.101.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]'s request for a private audience with a member of the Faith has been provisionally granted. Scheduling is difficult, but a number of potential appointments are offered.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.101.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.102.desc_01:
Greetings child, I am Kai [From.GetName]. I am told you wish to make a donation to the Faith? 

I cannot tell you how much this gladdens me, the resources will be invaluable to our good works. 

Come child, let us talk of the light we can bring into the world.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.102.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.103.desc_01: Greetings child, I am Kai [From.GetName]. I am told you wish to dispatch an expedition to uncover an Orb of the Prophets? This is most gratifying to hear! \n\nThere are several possible locations in which an Orb may be found, where would you wish to begin?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.103.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc51:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Horran's First Prophecy: 'She built the walls high, keeping faith in her heart, and the city was safe.' 

Now what do you think Horran's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc52:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Shabren's Sixth Prophecy: 'From the ashes, new structures were built to honour Bajor and the Prophets, and the Prophets were glad.' 

Now what do you think Shabren's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc53:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Talnot's First Prophecy: 'The wise man spreads the seed of the Faith far, and spreads it wide.' 

Now what do you think Talnot's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc54:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Kodak's Second Prophecy: 'And where the devout found but rock and clay, the wisdom of the Prophets turned the land fertile.' 

Now what do you think Kodak's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc55:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Trakor's Second Prophecy: 'Wisdom within comes easiest to those whose eyes are open to wisdom without.' 

Now what do you think Trakor's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc56:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Zocal's Eigth Prophecy: 'Joy breeds joy, just as sorrow breeds sorrow. The holiest act is in kindness.' 

Now what do you think Zocal's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc57:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Talnot's Last Prophecy: 'With the poison burned, the work of those of the land shall be rewarded and the harvests made bountiful.' 

Now what do you think Talnot's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc58:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Grinsel's First Prophecy: 'To the skies lie salvation, the heavens the temple of the Prophets.' 

Now what do you think Grinsel's intention was?
STH_bajoran_mechanics.111.desc59:
Greetings, I am Vedek [FromFrom.GetName]. You seek an audience with me? I am honoured to pass along the Prophets' knowledge. 

Let us talk of Harel's Tenth Prophecy: 'And beneath the hills lie a bounty, and those who work that bounty are blessed.' 

Now what do you think Harel's intention was?

STH_bajoran_mechanics.112.desc_01: The private appointment between [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] and Kai [FromFrom.GetName] had been scheduled for the morning of the fifth day of the Commune. In the Kai's antechamber however, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] grew impatient with a number of perceived delays and spoke harshly with the attending Ranjens. \n\nOn hearing of the altercation, the Kai postponed the meeting indefinitely.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.112.desc_02: The private appointment between [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] and Vedek [FromFrom.GetName] had been scheduled for the morning of the third day of the Commune. In the Vedek's antechamber however, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] grew impatient with a number of perceived delays and spoke harshly with the attending Ranjen. \n\nOn hearing of the altercation, the Vedek postponed the meeting indefinitely.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.112.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.130.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Contemplation, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision of [Root.Capital.GetName] in which the people were at peace with one another. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.130.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.131.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Contemplation, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.131.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.132.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Prophecy and Change, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision of [Root.Capital.GetName] in which the people were refocused on their children and raising their families. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.132.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.133.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Prophecy and Change, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.133.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.134.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Time, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision of the past, and of changes to come. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.134.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.135.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Time, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.135.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.136.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Wisdom, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision wherein the figures of Bajoran science spoke of their craft. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.136.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.137.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Wisdom, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.137.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.138.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Unity, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision wherein the figures of Bajoran culture and art spoke of their craft. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.138.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.139.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Unity, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.139.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.140.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Souls, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision of the joys of the many festivals spread throughout the year. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.140.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.141.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Souls, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.141.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.142.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Memory, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision of the struggles that brought the [Root.GetRulerTitle] to power. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.142.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.143.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Memory, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.143.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.144.desc: Having consulted the Orb of Peace, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision of many factions within the [Root.GetName] rallying around their common cause. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.144.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.145.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of Peace, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.145.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.146.desc: Having consulted the Orb the Emissary, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] experienced a vision of many factions within the [Root.GetName] rallying around their common cause. \n\nAfter several hours introspection, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] conveys the content of the vision to the entire [Root.GetName] in a public announcement.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.146.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.147.desc: Attempting to consult the Orb of the Emissary, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] spends hours in the Orb Chamber only to see nothing. \n\nNews of the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s failure to be judged worthy by the Prophets soon spreads.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.147.name: Vedek Assembly
STH_bajoran_mechanics.5.desc: The entire [Root.GetName] mourns today as news spreads of the death of Kai [deadBajoranKai.GetName].\n\nThe Vedek Assembly will now convene to begin the process of selecting a new Kai.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.5.name: Death of Kai [deadBajoranKai.GetName]
STH_bajoran_mechanics.6.a: Allow Vedeks to choose among themselves.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.6.desc: The [Root.GetName] mourns today as news spreads of the death of Vedek [deadBajoranVedek.GetName]. \n\nThe Vedek Assembly will now convene to begin the process of selecting a replacement for [deadBajoranVedek.GetName], though many are open to nominations from the civilian administration.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.6.name: Death of Vedek [deadBajoranKai.GetName]
STH_bajoran_mechanics.8.desc: While the loss of the previous Kai was a blow to the [Root.GetName], the Vedek Assembly has come together to elect a new Kai to lead the Faith. The leading Vedeks have come together and will select a new Kai to guide the Bajoran people and help them walk the path of the Prophets.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.8.name: Time for the Vedeks to Elect a new Kai
STH_bajoran_mechanics.9.desc: With an open seat on the Vedek Assembly time has come to select a new Vedek to join its numbers. The assembled Ranjen, plus notable leaders with strong faith, are available to join the ranks of the Vedek Assembly to serve the people and Prophets.
STH_bajoran_mechanics.9.name: Time to appoint a new Vedek to the Assembly
STH_bajoran_story.1.b: Just the folly of an old Ranjen.
STH_bajoran_story.1.desc:
Incense drifted on the southern wind through the temple interior, spilling out to the walled Ranjens' garden. A dozen shaggy-haired Dakthara lay dozing in the sun until the pack-father raised its long ears to the sound of the coming footsteps. 

'And you're sure it was a vision and not just a dream?' [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] asked Ranjen Biral. 

'Quite sure, yes. Their words were curiously arranged but they told me enough. There is an Orb we must find, the Orb of Prophecy. And we must start in the Denorios Belt.' 

The [Root.GetRulerTitle] turned [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] gaze to the sky above. 

'We'll need a ship...' the Ranjen said, absently.
STH_bajoran_story.1.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.10.desc: The last viable location of the subspace wake has been identified as no less than the [orbOfProphecy5Target.GetName] black hole. \n\nRetrieval of the Orb may prove impossible if it has had the misfortune to drop below the event horizon...
STH_bajoran_story.10.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.1000.b: Sensor ghosts are not our concern.
STH_bajoran_story.1000.desc: Severe neutrino disturbances have been detected in the region of the [bajoran_system.GetName]'s Denorios Belt. [Root.GetName] scientists urge the dispatch of a scientific mission to study the anomalies.
STH_bajoran_story.1000.name: Explore the Denorios Belt
STH_bajoran_story.1005.desc: While the source of the neutrino disturbances was not discovered, the survey of the Denorios Belt has provided scientists on [Root.Capital.GetName] with gigaquads of data to pour over.
STH_bajoran_story.1005.name: Explore the Denorios Belt
STH_bajoran_story.1010.desc_01: The source of the neutrino disturbances has been discovered, a stable wormhole linking [bajoran_system.GetName] with the Gamma Quadrant! Many believe this to be the Celestial Temple of prophecy. \n\nRegardless of the nature of the phenomenon, the wormhole will change the strategic balance of the entire sector.
STH_bajoran_story.1010.desc_02: The source of the neutrino disturbances has been discovered, a stable wormhole linking [bajoran_system.GetName] with the Gamma Quadrant! The wormhole will almost certainly change the strategic balance of the entire sector.
STH_bajoran_story.1010.name: Explore the Denorios Belt
STH_bajoran_story.1011.b: This is a threat to us all...
STH_bajoran_story.1011.desc: A stable wormhole has been discovered in the [bajoran_system.GetName] system, apparently terminating deep in the Gamma Quadrant. \n\nOur analysts believe this could change the balance of power in the region.
STH_bajoran_story.1011.name: Bajoran Wormhole
STH_bajoran_story.1012.b: This is a threat to us all...
STH_bajoran_story.1012.desc: A stable wormhole has been discovered in the [idran_system.GetName] system, apparently terminating deep in the Alpha Quadrant. \n\nOur analysts believe this could change the balance of power in the region.
STH_bajoran_story.1012.name: Idran Wormhole
STH_bajoran_story.1013.desc: [the_emissary.GetName] wakes up in a green field, with no sign of their ship or crew. Disoriented and confused they shout out, but no one is in sight. Slowly a glowing blue-white orb floats towards the Captain getting closer and closer. Alarmed [the_emissary.GetName] reaches for their weapon.
STH_bajoran_story.1013.name: The Emissary
STH_bajoran_story.1014.desc:
<LIMBO> 

Who are you..? 

It is corporeal, a physical entity. 

Why is it here, what disruption will it bring?
STH_bajoran_story.1014.name: The Emissary
STH_bajoran_story.1015.desc:
<SHIPS BRIDGE> 

It is responding to visual and auditory stimuli. 

Linguist communication. 

It brings disruption.
STH_bajoran_story.1015.name: The Emissary
STH_bajoran_story.1016.desc_01:
<HOMESTEAD> 

We seek new life. 

Understandings. 

Can the [the_emissary.GetName] explain their existence?
STH_bajoran_story.1016.name: The Emissary
STH_bajoran_story.1017.desc: The [emissary_ship.GetName] and [the_emissary.GetName] emerge from the Wormhole unscathed with the knowledge the Wormhole, otherwise known as the Celestial Temple to the Bajorans is the home of a race of non-corporeal beings existing outside of linear time, simultaneously aware of the past, present, and the future. Their origins remain unknown, but they claim to be 'of Bajor', they have declared [the_emissary.GetName] their Emissary and have granted safe passage through their domain.
STH_bajoran_story.1017.name: The Emissary
STH_bajoran_story.1018.desc: There has been no sign of [emissary_ship.GetName] and [the_emissary.GetName] since they went to investigate the readings in the Denorios Belt, we can only assumed their ship was destroyed.
STH_bajoran_story.1018.name: The Emissary
STH_bajoran_story.1019.desc: La llegada del Emisario fue predicha por varios escritores bajoranos, quienes escribieron lo que vieron en varias Profecías. Se reveló que [the_emissary.GetName] era el Emissary después de sobrevivir a su encuentro con los Profetas dentro de su templo, todo Bajor se regocija y su opinión sobre [the_emissary_country.GetName] ha mejorado enormemente para traerles a su Emissary.
STH_bajoran_story.1019.name: El emisario bajorano
STH_bajoran_story.1022.desc: The discovery of the Bajoran Wormhole is a major strategic and tactical advancement our admirals have recommended moving the local starbase to the mouth of the wormhole to stake our claim to it and make it more defendable. \n\nDev Note: The Starbase in the Bajoran system will be replaced by a basic outpost and a new deep space military ship will be constructed close to the Wormhole. Before building the structure via the construction ship megastructure menu make sure that you have a Nor-Class starbase setup in your ship designer.
STH_bajoran_story.1022.name: Relocate Station to Wormhole
STH_bajoran_story.11.desc:
Disaster has struck the search for the Orb of Prophecy. While initially elated to find compelling evidence that the Orb did indeed arrive in the [orbOfProphecy5Target.GetName] system, the crew of the [Root.GetFleetName] soon turned to despair after refined measurements proved the Orb had fallen beneath the event horizon. 

[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] appeared particularly affected by the revelation, until [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] froze in thought for several minutes on the bridge. Awakening as if from a daze, [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] muttered 'I know what must be done' before leaving in a shuttle. 

Protests from the crew of the [Root.GetFleetName] were left unanswered as the shuttle plunged deep beneath the event horizon of the black hole...
STH_bajoran_story.11.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.12.a: Give the Orb to the Kai.
STH_bajoran_story.12.desc:
Long minutes pass as the crew of the [Root.GetFleetName] try to comprehend the actions of [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] as [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] plunged into the black hole. Just moments before the Executive Officer would give the order to return to [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName], [Root.GetLeaderName]'s shuttle reappeared above the event horizon. 

'The Prophets rewarded my faith', [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] messaged over the communications channel.
'They have given me the Orb to protect. Now let's go home.'
STH_bajoran_story.12.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.13.desc: Despite some initial misgivings, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] was convinced to entrust the safety of the Orb of Prophecy to the Kai. \n\nAll of [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] celebrates the success of the holy expedition.
STH_bajoran_story.13.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.14.desc: Despite strong protest, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] was forced to entrust the safety of the Orb of Prophecy to the Kai. \n\nWhile all of [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] celebrated the success of the holy expedition, the treatment of [Root.GetLeaderName] and [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] perceived role as protector of the Orb being denied has exposed deep divisions across the [Root.Owner.GetName].
STH_bajoran_story.14.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.15.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] has been granted permanent custodianship of the Orb of Prophecy. \n\nAll of [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] celebrates the success of the holy expedition.
STH_bajoran_story.15.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.16.desc:
[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] has been granted permanent custodianship of the Orb of Prophecy. 

While all of [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] celebrates the success of the holy expedition, many protest the apparent disrespect to the Kai made by [Root.GetLeaderName] in [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] refusal to allow the Orb of Prophecy to sit with the other Orbs. 

While the protests have yet to turn violent, it is clear the situation will not be forgotten any time soon.
STH_bajoran_story.16.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.18.desc: The death of [fromfrom.GetName] has meant that the Orb of Prophecy kept in [fromfrom.GetHerHis] care can now be given to the Kai for safekeeping alongside the other Orbs.
STH_bajoran_story.18.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.2.desc: After extensive consultation between Ranjen Biral and the leading experts on the Denorios Belt, it appears that a clue has at last been uncovered to the location of the Orb of Prophecy. \n\nA surge in neutrinos was detected several months ago localised to a volume one million kilometres in diameter. Extrapolating for orbital drift leaves a region that while substantial is still surveyable.
STH_bajoran_story.2.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.2000.desc: While several ancient texts appeared to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found on Bajor, none of those investigated uncovered one. Several minor historical artefacts were uncovered however, resulting in the expedition being seen as at least a partial success. \n\nScholars believe at least one orb is still to be uncovered, likely in one of the lost cities.
STH_bajoran_story.2000.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2001.desc.finished: While ancient texts appeared to suggest all likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found on Bajor had been investigated, disaster struck the expedition as a number of researchers were killed or injured when an underground chamber they were surveying collapsed.
STH_bajoran_story.2001.desc: While several ancient texts appeared to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found on Bajor, none of those investigated uncovered one. Worse, a number of researchers were killed or injured when an underground chamber they were surveying collapsed. \n\nScholars believe at least one orb is still to be uncovered, likely in one of the lost cities.
STH_bajoran_story.2001.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2010.desc: The $r_orb_of_contemplation$ has been recovered by the expedition, dug out of several hundred metres of rock near the site of the ancient city of R'hali. \n\nThe entire [Root.GetName] celebrates as another facet of the Prophets' will is revealed.
STH_bajoran_story.2010.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2011.desc: The $r_orb_of_memory$ has been recovered by the expedition, dug out of several hundred metres of rock near the site of the ancient city of R'hali. \n\nThe entire [Root.GetName] celebrates as another facet of the Prophets' will is revealed.
STH_bajoran_story.2011.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2100.desc.finished: While verteron detectors failed to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found in the Denorios Belt, several kiloquads of useful data were uncovered. \n\nScholars believe no more orbs remain to be uncovered in the Denorios Belt.
STH_bajoran_story.2100.desc: While verteron detectors appeared to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found in the Denorios Belt, none of those investigated uncovered one. Several kiloquads of useful data were uncovered however, resulting in the expedition being seen as at least a partial success. \n\nScholars believe at least one orb is still to be uncovered in the Denorios Belt.
STH_bajoran_story.2100.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2101.desc.finished: Verteron detectors failed to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found in the Denorios Belt. Worse, a tetryon surge destroyed an EPS conduit on the Expedition vessel, killing a number of the crew. \n\nScholars believe no more orbs remain to be uncovered in the Denorios Belt.
STH_bajoran_story.2101.desc: Verteron detectors failed to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found in the Denorios Belt. Worse, a tetryon surge destroyed an EPS conduit on the Expedition vessel, killing a number of the crew. \n\nScholars believe at least one orb is still to be uncovered in the Denorios Belt.
STH_bajoran_story.2101.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2110.desc: The $r_orb_of_peace$ has been recovered by the expedition, pulled from a subspace tetryon eddy and into normal space by the expedition ship's main deflector. \n\nThe entire [Root.GetName] celebrates as another facet of the Prophets' will is revealed.
STH_bajoran_story.2110.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2111.desc: The $r_orb_of_souls$ has been recovered by the expedition, pulled from a subspace tetryon eddy and into normal space by the expedition ship's main deflector. \n\nThe entire [Root.GetName] celebrates as another facet of the Prophets' will is revealed.
STH_bajoran_story.2111.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2200.desc.finished: While ancient texts appeared to suggest all likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found outside of the Bajoran system had been investigated, several minor alien artefacts were uncovered in the expedition.
STH_bajoran_story.2200.desc: While several ancient texts appeared to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found outside of the Bajoran system, none of those investigated uncovered one. Several minor alien artefacts were uncovered however, resulting in the expedition being seen as at least a partial success. \n\nScholars believe at least one orb is still to be uncovered, likely in a nearby star system.
STH_bajoran_story.2200.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2201.desc.finished: While ancient texts appeared to suggest all likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found outside of the Bajoran system had been investigated, disaster struck the expedition as a number of researchers were killed or injured when an underground chamber they were surveying collapsed.
STH_bajoran_story.2201.desc: While several ancient texts appeared to suggest likely locations in which an Orb of the Prophets could be found outside of the Bajoran system, none of those investigated uncovered one. Worse, a number of researchers were killed or injured when an underground chamber they were surveying collapsed. \n\nScholars believe at least one orb is still to be uncovered, likely in a nearby star system.
STH_bajoran_story.2201.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2210.desc: The $r_orb_of_time$ has been recovered by the expedition, extracted from the vault of an alien outpost apparently abandoned for several millennia. \n\nThe entire [Root.GetName] celebrates as another facet of the Prophets' will is revealed.
STH_bajoran_story.2210.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2211.desc: The $r_orb_of_unity$ has been recovered by the expedition, extracted from the vault of an alien outpost apparently abandoned for several millennia. \n\nThe entire [Root.GetName] celebrates as another facet of the Prophets' will is revealed.
STH_bajoran_story.2211.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.2212.desc: The $r_orb_of_wisdom$ has been recovered by the expedition, extracted from the vault of an alien outpost apparently abandoned for several millennia. \n\nThe entire [Root.GetName] celebrates as another facet of the Prophets' will is revealed.
STH_bajoran_story.2212.name: Orb of the Prophets Expedition
STH_bajoran_story.3.desc: Months of surveying the Denorios Belt have revealed further clues as to the location of the orb. The same neutrino pulse that was originally tied to the surveyed volume has left a subspace wake on a course leaving the system. \n\nAstrophysicists on [Root.Capital.GetName] are rushing to localise the target location.
STH_bajoran_story.3.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.4.desc:
The analysis of the Denorios subspace wake has proven more difficult than expected, as a number of possible end-points are implied by the data collected so far. 

While it will take several decades to resolve all possible variations, the first candidate has been identified: 

[orbOfProphecy2Target.GetName], an arid world light years away in the [orbOfProphecy2Target.Solar_System.GetName] system.
STH_bajoran_story.4.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.5.desc: After hours with the baking sun above them, the expedition group under [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.GetLeaderName] have surveyed [orbOfProphecy2Target.GetName] and found nothing. \n\nBefore returning to the [Root.GetFleetName] [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.GetLeaderName] pauses, apparently lost in thought. After some concern from [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] officers, [FromFrom.GetLeaderName] claims to have had a vision from the Prophets. The Orb is not here...
STH_bajoran_story.5.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.6.desc: A second potential location for the Orb of Prophecy has been identified by astrophysicists on [Root.Capital.GetName]. \n\nLight years away in the [orbOfProphecy3Target.Solar_System.GetName] system, a barren world may hold the Prophets' gift.
STH_bajoran_story.6.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.7.desc:
'I hate EVA work', said [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.GetLeaderName]'s chief of security over the away team communications link. 

'Personally I would have found it far more tolerable if we had actually found what we came for!' [FromFrom.GetLeaderName] replied. 

It appears that [orbOfProphecy3Target.GetName] was another false lead on the hunt for the Orb of Prophecy.
STH_bajoran_story.7.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.8.desc: Despite the lack of success so far, public participation in the hunt for the Orb of Prophecy has helped increase the computational capacity available to astrophysicists on [Root.Capital.GetName]. \n\nA third potential location for the Orb of Prophecy has been revealed, [orbOfProphecy4Target.GetName] - a gas giant in the [orbOfProphecy2Target.Solar_System.GetName] system. Fortunately it is believed that only one more viable target location remains uncalculated, leading many to suspect the hunt may soon be over.
STH_bajoran_story.8.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_bajoran_story.9.desc:
The winds of [orbOfProphecy4Target.GetName] brush about the shuttle, parked in the narrow band of the atmosphere suitable for [Root.GetSpeciesName] respiration. 

The search for the Orb has proven unsuccessful yet again. While one further candidate location is believed to be close to being calculated, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.GetLeaderName] can't help but feel saddened by yet another failure. 

Opening the rear shuttle door and sitting on the edge with [FromFrom.Leader.GetHerHis] legs dangling, [FromFrom.Leader.GetSheHe] reflects for a moment before preparing the shuttle to return to the [FromFrom.GetFleetName].
STH_bajoran_story.9.name: The Orb of Prophecy
STH_borg.1.desc: The [FromFromFrom.Species.GetBorgSpecies] vessel has been captured in [From.GetBorgCoordinates]. \n[FromFromFrom.Species.GetBorgSpecies] leader designated [FromFrom.GetName] possesses useful knowledge and experience. Assimilate.
STH_borg.1.name: Contact established with [FromFromFrom.GetName]
STH_borg.1004.desc: La captura reciente de [FromFrom.GetName] no puede mantenerse mientras el Unicomplex permanezca intacto. Demasiados sistemas de seguridad pueden permanecer inactivos antes de potencialmente asimilar a nuestro personal a bordo de la instalación. \n\nPara eliminar este riesgo, debemos demoler [From.GetName]. Podemos hacerlo de una manera que maximice nuestro potencial de recursos recuperados, o de una manera que aumente el potencial de ingeniería inversa de la tecnología Borg restante.
STH_borg.1004.name: Reclamación Unicomplex
STH_borg.1007.desc: El [LastKilledCountryName] ha sido destruido, y con su pérdida, la galaxia se ha vuelto más segura. \n\nRecoger las ruinas de los barcos y mundos de [LastKilledCountryName] llevará meses, pero el potencial de ganancia tecnológica es significativo.
STH_borg.1007.name: El fin del colectivo
STH_borg.103.a: Otro paso más hacia la perfección.
STH_borg.103.desc: El Colectivo ha asimilado individuos de la especie [from.GetName], designados  [from.GetBorgSpecies] § !, por primera vez. Su distinción biológica se ha agregado a la nuestra.
STH_borg.103.name: [from.GetName] Asimilación
STH_borg.1051.b: [De From.Get Species Name] ¡no se tolerará la agresión!
STH_borg.1051.desc_01: Las comunicaciones desde el sistema [From.GetName] se han detenido, y los últimos mensajes recibidos mencionan el enfoque de una gran embarcación con una forma geométrica simple ...
STH_borg.1051.desc_02: Las comunicaciones desde el sistema [From.GetName] se han detenido, y los últimos mensajes recibidos mencionan el acercamiento de un buque [FromFrom.GetSpeciesName], deslizándose en una órbita geoestacionaria ...
STH_borg.1051.name: Colonia silenciosa
STH_borg.1052.b: [De From.Get Species Name] ¡no se tolerará la agresión!
STH_borg.1052.desc_01: Los escaneos de largo alcance indican que la colonia en [From.GetName] ha sido destruida.
STH_borg.1052.desc_02: Los escaneos de largo alcance indican que la colonia en [From.GetName] ha sido destruida por [FromFrom.GetSpeciesName].
STH_borg.1052.name: Colonia silenciosa
STH_borg.106.desc: Se ha asimilado a suficientes individuos de [from.GetBorgSpecies] que los beneficios marginales de la investigación han alcanzado una meseta. Aunque llevar la perfección a más de [from.GetBorgSpecies] seguirá siendo una ventaja para el Colectivo, debemos extendernos para asimilar nuevas razas si deseamos mejorar nuestra perfección.
STH_borg.106.name: [from.GetName] Asimilación
STH_borg.3.desc: Somos los Borg. Baje sus escudos y entregue sus naves. La existencia, como usted la conoce, ha terminado. Su distintividad biológica y tecnológica se añadirá a la nuestra. Usted será asimilado.
STH_borg.3.name: Transmisión entrante
STH_borg.301.desc: Nuestras fuerzas han conquistado [FROMFROM.GetName] del Colectivo, pero el desafío de manejar los drones restantes en el planeta es inmenso. \n\n Como este mundo era originalmente parte de [FROM.GetName], una opción sería devolver el control a [FROM.GetSpeciesNamePlural]. Alternativamente, podríamos conservar el mundo para nosotros y arriesgarnos a ser invadidos por la población de drones.
STH_borg.301.name: De-la asimilación
STH_borg.302.desc: Nuestras fuerzas han conquistado [FROMFROM.GetName] del Colectivo, pero el desafío de manejar los drones restantes en el planeta es inmenso.
STH_borg.302.name: De-la asimilación
STH_borg.303.desc: Las fuerzas [From.GetName] han conquistado [FROMFROM.GetName] del Colectivo y lo han devuelto al [Root.GetName]. El desafío de manejar los drones restantes en el planeta es inmenso.
STH_borg.303.name: De-la asimilación
STH_borg.5.desc: Mapeo completo. Los nodos astrométricos [This.capital_scope.GetName] ahora están rastreando todas las formaciones estelares conocidas en el cúmulo galáctico principal. Listo para operaciones topográficas. \ n \ nActualización de pantalla visual posible. \ n \ nEste evento brinda a los jugadores Borg la opción de convertir el esquema de nombres de mapas en uno más amigable con la tradición. Recomendado solo para usuarios experimentados en campañas para un jugador.
STH_borg.5.name: Mapeo espacial Borg
STH_borg.5.no.tooltip: Seleccionar esta opción mantendrá la visualización del mapa de galaxias actual. \ N \ nRRecomendado para nuevos jugadores.
STH_borg.5.yes.tooltip: ¡Al elegir esta opción, se le asignará un nombre diferente a todos los sistemas solares en la galaxia con coordenadas Borg. \ n \ n ¡Esto no se puede deshacer! Recomendado solo para jugadores experimentados.
STH_borg.5.yes: Somos los Borg. Los nombres son irrelevantes. Continuar.
STH_borg.5001.desc: In the wreckage of a Borg vessel our engineers have uncovered an intact Transwarp node complete with computer algorithm that allows the safe navigation of these treacherous tunnels through space. \n\nOur scientists believe they can reverse engineer the tech and allow us to use Borg Transwarp Conduits to travel through space.
STH_borg.5001.name: Borg Transwarp Node Discovered
STH_borg.6001.c: Asimilar la tecnología y la tripulación de la nave.
STH_borg.6001.d: Preparar la construcción de un cubo.
STH_borg.6001.desc_01: Los drones tácticos de [nave_borg_asimiladora.GetName] han superado con éxito las defensas de [nave_borg_invadida.GetName] y pronto tendrán el control total de sus sistemas. La nave, la tripulación y la tecnología se adaptarán para servirnos. La resistencia es inútil. La asimilación completa de la nave tendrá lugar en [Root.Capital.GetName], dando al colectivo acceso a un nuevo activo táctico. Alternativamente, podemos desmontar la nave y utilizar los componentes principales para dar servicio al Colectivo. La combinación de las partes con otras naves asimiladas podría permitir la creación de un cubo Borg. Esperamos más instrucciones.
STH_borg.6001.desc_02: La nave alienígena recientemente capturada, designada [nave_invadida_borg.GetName], está lista para su asimilación completa. La nave, la tripulación y la tecnología se adaptarán para servirnos. La resistencia es inútil. La asimilación completa de la nave tendrá lugar en [Raíz.Capital.GetName], dando al colectivo acceso a un nuevo activo táctico. Alternativamente, podemos desmontar la nave y utilizar los componentes principales para dar servicio al Colectivo. La combinación de las partes con otras naves asimiladas podría permitir la creación de un cubo Borg. Esperamos nuevas instrucciones. v
STH_borg.6001.name: Nave hostil capturada
STH_borg.6002.desc: Hemos completado con éxito la asimilación de una nave capturada. Su tecnología y tripulación están ahora a nuestro servicio. La nave ha sido reconfigurada para igualar la perfección de los Borg, y ahora está lista para ser asignada en [Raíz.Capital.GetName].
STH_borg.6002.name: La nave ha sido asimilada
STH_borg.6004.desc: Un Cubo marca el pináculo de la perfección Borg, nuestros drones han combinado los diseños imperfectos de naves menores para adaptarse y ahora servirnos y han permitido la construcción de un nuevo Cubo Borg. Su construcción nos acerca un poco más a la perfección y a impartir esa perfección a otros.
STH_borg.6004.name: Cubo listo para el despliegue
STH_borg.6006.desc: A pesar de la destrucción del objetivo, nuestros drones lograron obtener una serie de materiales valiosos que pueden ser utilizados para el servicio del Colectivo.
STH_borg.6006.name: Objetivo de asimilación destruido
STH_borg.6007.desc: ¡Atención! Antes de que la nave enemiga se autodestruyera, su tripulación consiguió cargar un virus en el neuroprocesador de un dron derrotado. Este virus se transmitió inadvertidamente a [borg_assimilator_vessel.GetName], provocando su explosión. El código ofensivo ha sido aislado y eliminado. Nos adaptaremos a esta pérdida.
STH_borg.6007.name: Nave saboteada
STH_borg.6160.b: Empiece a buscar soluciones de inmediato.
STH_borg.6160.desc_01: Hemos comenzado nuestro primer combate contra naves alienígenas hostiles. El Colectivo utilizará sus conocimientos y experiencia para analizar los datos de la batalla, de modo que podamos producir adaptaciones útiles contra sus armas. Objetivo: Anulación total del potencial de combate del enemigo.\NLas flotas borg buscarán automáticamente adaptaciones a las armas y defensas del enemigo durante la batalla. El progreso se puede ver en el registro de situación. La producción de daño del enemigo se reduce en la cantidad indicada. (Se actualiza periódicamente durante el combate).
STH_borg.6160.desc_02: Nos hemos enfrentado a los Borg. Aunque los informes iniciales fueron positivos, las descripciones posteriores de las operaciones de combate pintan un cuadro inquietante: Los Borg están creando rápidamente contramedidas contra nuestras armas en tiempo real. Los principales analistas militares de [Root.capital_scope.GetName] sugieren que los Borg aprenderán a eludir todas nuestras tecnologías de armamento en un tiempo aterradoramente corto. Debemos ser cuidadosos. Las flotas Borg eventualmente se volverán casi imposibles de derrotar si son atacadas por mucho tiempo. La efectividad de la adaptación de los Borg se reduce con cada nueva tecnología que investigan.§.
STH_borg.6160.name: Los Borg se adaptan
STH_borg.6201.desc: La [nave_invadida_borg.GetName] informa que ha perdido contacto con su sección de ingeniería con temperaturas que alcanzan los 39,1 grados centígrados, poco después de este informe perdimos contacto con la nave. Las lecturas de los sensores sugieren que los drones Borg fueron transportados a bordo de la nave poco antes de la destrucción de su nave. Los Borg buscarán establecer un colectivo a bordo de la nave e intentarán tomar el control de la misma. La tripulación buscará iniciar la autodestrucción o el enfoque más arriesgado que es luchar contra los drones.
STH_borg.6201.name: Presencia Borg detectada en nuestro barco
STH_borg.6202.desc: En un alarde de resistencia sin sentido, una nave enemiga que fue abordada por [nave_borg_asimiladora.GetName] se ha autodestruido, negando a su primitiva tripulación el don de la asimilación.
STH_borg.6202.name: Objetivo de asimilación destruido
STH_borg.6203.a: Somos los Borg. La resistencia es inútil.
STH_borg.6203.desc: Mientras la nave enemiga [borg_invaded_ship.GetName] intentaba retirarse, [borg_assimilator_vessel.GetName] ha transportado con éxito un grupo de drones a bordo. Los drones iniciarán los protocolos de asimilación y comenzarán la asimilación del objetivo. Su distintivo tecnológico se adaptará para servirnos.
STH_borg.6203.name: Protocolo de asimilación comprometido
STH_borg.6205.desc: La última transmisión de la nave [borg_invaded_ship.GetName] indicó que los Borg tenían el control del 90% de la nave, incluyendo la navegación y los motores de la nave. Debemos suponer que la tripulación ha muerto o ha sufrido un destino peor. La nave ha encendido sus motores y ha desaparecido dejando sólo una señal transwarp que se dirige a las profundidades del territorio Borg donde los Borg completarán la asimilación de nuestra nave.
STH_borg.6205.name: Barco perdido al Colectivo Borg
STH_borg.6206.desc: Estamos recibiendo una transmisión de nuestra nave desaparecida, parece que tuvieron éxito en repeler la invasión Borg de su nave. El Colectivo ha sufrido una poderosa derrota hoy y se ha trazado una línea... ¡hasta aquí y no más allá! Con el control restablecido sobre la nave, ha sido devuelta a su plena disposición operativa. Puede que incluso seamos capaces de aprender de algunos restos de tecnología Borg.
STH_borg.6206.name: Barco repelió la invasión Borg
STH_borg.6207.desc: Los esfuerzos para asimilar el [borg_invaded_ship.GetName] fueron infructuosos. Todos los drones asignados a esta tarea han sido neutralizados por los defensores enemigos. Restableciendo la prioridad del objetivo y actualizando las proyecciones de gasto de los drones para compensar.
STH_borg.6207.name: Objetivo de asimilación perdido
STH_borg.6300.desc: Durante nuestra asimilación del [De.GetName], el Colectivo secuestró con éxito a un individuo de la jerarquía de liderazgo primitiva del enemigo. La mente de este dron posee amplios datos sobre la tecnología y las estrategias de batalla de su especie. Hemos asimilado a este líder, ahora designado como [De.GetName], para facilitar las operaciones contra el [De.GetName].\N-Asignar directiva de líder.
STH_borg.6300.keep.tooltip: Este líder servirá al Colectivo en el rol actual de [FromFrom.GetHisHer] como  [FromFrom.GetTitle] .  \ N
STH_borg.6300.keep: Utilice el conocimiento y la experiencia de [FromFrom.GetHisHer].
STH_borg.6300.kill.tooltip: Este líder se perderá. La identidad de [FromFrom.GetHisHerCap] será absorbida por el Colectivo más amplio como un dron genérico. \ N
STH_borg.6300.locutus.tooltip: Este líder ustituirá nuestro enviado actual como el nuevo Locutus§ !, permitiendo operaciones especiales contra el [FromFromFrom.GetName] . \ n
STH_borg.6300.name: Líder asimilado
STH_borg.6301.desc: En un desastroso giro de los acontecimientos, nuestro líder a bordo del [De.GetName] ha sido secuestrado y asimilado por los Borg. [De.GetSheCap] ha llamado a nuestras fuerzas, exigiendo nuestra rendición inmediata. Debemos considerar la terrible realidad de que ahora estamos luchando contra el conocimiento y la experiencia de la persona que [De.GetSheHe] una vez fue.
STH_borg.6301.name: Líder asimilado
STH_borg.6302.desc: En un alarde de astucia y acción decisiva, la tripulación de la [De.GetName] ha evitado con éxito que [De.GetName]§ sea asimilada por los Borg. Aunque la pérdida de la [De.GetName] es desafortunada, [De.GetName] ha prometido devolver la lucha a los Borg tan pronto como [De.GetSheHe] sea asignado a un nuevo mando. Hoy hemos tenido mucha suerte.
STH_borg.6302.name: Líder escapó de la asimilación
STH_borg.6502.desc: Bombardment and extraction operation, successful. Collective Tactical vessel has now harvested enough material from the planet designated [borg_scope_location.GetName] to construct a new Borg tactical asset, based on the size of the planetary harvest, a new vessel is available to command.
STH_borg.6502.name: City Harvest Successful
STH_borg.6503.desc: The Borg have harvested the infrastructure from [borg_scope_location.GatName] and converted the people and resources into a new Borg vessel.
STH_borg.6503.name: City Havested by the Borg
STH_borg.7001.b: Es un día oscuro para el [Owner.GetName].
STH_borg.7001.desc: La [borg_invaded_fleet.GetName] se está hundiendo en el caos ahora que los Borg se han adaptado a las últimas armas. Estamos recibiendo informes de drones Borg en casi todas las naves restantes. Los equipos de seguridad están intentando repeler a los invasores, pero si son derrotados es probable que perdamos la flota a manos del Colectivo.
STH_borg.7001.name: Flota comprometida por drones Borg
STH_borg.7002.desc: A pesar de los esfuerzos de nuestras tripulaciones, la presencia borg en toda la [borg_invaded_fleet.GetName] fue demasiado fuerte y nuestras defensas fueron superadas. Estamos marcando la flota como perdida y potencialmente hostil.
STH_borg.7002.name: [borg_invaded_fleet.GetName] se ha perdido para los Borg
STH_borg.7004.desc: Estamos recibiendo una transmisión de la [borg_invaded_fleet.GetName], parece que tuvieron éxito en repeler la invasión Borg de sus naves. El Colectivo ha sufrido una poderosa derrota hoy y se ha trazado una línea... ¡hasta aquí y no más allá! Con el control restablecido sobre la flota, ésta ha vuelto a estar plenamente operativa. Puede que incluso seamos capaces de aprender de algunos restos de tecnología Borg.
STH_borg.7004.name: La flota repelió la invasión Borg
STH_borg.7005.desc: Nuestra flota fue capaz de derrotar parcialmente a los Borg, pero desafortunadamente el [borg_invaded_fleet_ship.GetName] se perdió con todas las manos en el proceso. Las naves restantes pudieron librarse de la incursión borg y escapar de la batalla.
STH_borg.7005.name: Nave [borg_invaded_fleet.GetName] destruida
STH_borg.7006.desc: Nos hemos adaptado completamente contra la [borg_invaded_fleet.Owner.GetName] de [borg_invaded_fleet.GetName]. Los escaneos indican que ya no tiene suficientes naves o tripulación para resistir un asalto directo mediante el transporte masivo de drones tácticos. Remodelar todos los haces de transporte para penetrar los escudos enemigos. Prepara los drones para su despliegue.
STH_borg.7006.name: Protocolo de asimilación comprometido
STH_borg.7007.desc: En un acto de desesperación, una flota que se enfrentaba a nuestras fuerzas autodestruyó sus naves en lugar de permitir que fueran asimiladas. La pérdida de los drones desplegados es irrelevante. Nos adaptaremos.
STH_borg.7007.name: Destino de asimilación autodestruido
STH_borg.7008.desc: El número de drones tácticos era insuficiente, por lo que no se pudo asimilar la flota enemiga. Reagruparse y perseguir los objetivos.
STH_borg.7008.name: Intento de asimilación fallido
STH_borg.7009.desc: Hemos asegurado el control de la [De.GetName]. Comenzaremos a analizar y asimilar sus características biológicas y tecnológicas. Se requieren aproximadamente de 30 a 90 ciclos de computación para esta tarea. Las naves irrelevantes serán desmontadas para obtener recursos. Las naves restantes se adaptarán para que nos sirvan.
STH_borg.7009.name: Flota asegurada
STH_borg.7010.desc: Hemos analizado varias naves de flotas capturadas recientemente y no hemos encontrado ningún otro distintivo que merezca ser asimilado. Por lo tanto, estas naves han sido redirigidas a [Root.Capital.GetName] para su desmontaje. Los recursos y los drones a bordo se redistribuirán por todo el Colectivo, acercándonos a la perfección.
STH_borg.7010.name: Embarcaciones capturadas reutilizadas
STH_borg.7020.desc: Assimilation Protocols Completed. Drones aboard asset designated [borg_ship_convert.GetName] have completed the assimilation of the vessel and are ready to return the unit to [Root.Capital_scope.GetName] to complete its full integration into the collective.\n\nSecondary protocols now engaged...
STH_borg.7020.name: Assimilation Protocols Complete
STH_borg.7051.desc: Assimilation Units have breached the defences of ship designate [This.GetName], primary assimilation objective engaged, drones will attempt to gain control of vessels primary systems. \n\nSecondary Obective Begin assimilation of ships organic element.
STH_borg.7051.name: [This.GetName] Under Assimilation
STH_borg.7052.desc: The organic crew have resisted our attempts to gain control over the assimilation target and have terminated the existence of the vessel, crew and all drones onboard.
STH_borg.7052.name: [This.GetName] Destroyed
STH_borg.8.name: Data Assimilation
STH_borg.9001.b: Reduce the structure to space dust.
STH_borg.9001.desc: Our forces report that they have concluded the orbital bombardment of [From.GetName]. All active Borg drones have been deactivated and the Borg structure appears powerless and in ruin. We now have to make a decision on what to do with the structure. The safest option is to destroy what remains of the facility and lay to rest the drones that were once individuals, however our scientists are eager to get their hands on the technology which would greatly boost our own.
STH_borg.9001.name: [From.GetName] Bombarded
STH_borg.9002.desc: A fleet belonging to the [From.From.GetName] has destroyed [From.GetName]. All Borg units have been rendered inoperable. Our adaption algorithms were unable to adapt quickly enough to neutralise threat. Target losses are unacceptable, appropriate counter-measures engaged.\n\nResistance must be brought to acceptable levels, further loss to the Collective cannot be permitted.
STH_borg.9002.name: [From.GetName] Destroyed
STH_borg.9003.desc: [borg_facility_leader.GetName] has reported back from their assignment on the derelict Borg facility with positive news, they have successfully managed to tap into a fraction of the Collectives database and download terrabytes of valuable research information from under the nose of the Collective. The research crews are eager to leave the strange facility as soon as possible.
STH_borg.9003.name: Borg Facility Successfully investigated
STH_borg.9004.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] we have worrying news from the [borg_science_ship.GetName], we have lost all communications from the ship, the last transmission we received was an update log and then a broken communication from the ship. It appears they attempted to bring a number of dead drones back onboard the [borg_science_ship.GetName] for further study.\n\nWorryingly the last message we received was a broken distress call from the second officer reporting that [borg_facility_leader.GetName] had been assimilated and that the Borg now controlled over 95% of the ship. All communications have been lost since that point and we can only assume the ship has been assimilated by the Borg!
STH_borg.9004.name: Science Ship Assimilated
STH_borg.9005.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] we have worrying news from the [borg_science_ship.GetName], we have lost all communications from the ship, the last transmission we received was an update log and then a broken communication from the ship. It appears they attempted to bring a number of dead drones back onboard the [borg_science_ship.GetName] for further study.\n\nWe received a final transmission from the [borg_science_ship.GetName] claiming that the Borg were attempting to take control of [borg_science_ship.GetName], [borg_science_ship.GetHerHis] final order was to activate the ships self-destruct command to prevent the ship being lost to the borg.
STH_borg.9005.name: Science Ship Destroyed
STH_borg.9006.desc: Assimilation Report Complete, drone reactivation successful. Tactical assets have successfully completed the assimiliation of [borg_science_ship.GetName] the vessel will now serve the collective.
STH_borg.9006.name: Assimilation Complete
STH_borg.9007.desc: It appears that the Borg have invested the considerable resources of the collective into adapting to our defenses, it appears are shields currently offer little protection against their weaponary.
STH_borg.9007.name: The Borg Have Adapted
STH_borg.9008.desc: Adaption Protocol Engaged. Enemy defenses have been analysed and tactical weaknesses have been assessed. Our tactical threat has been increased for a short duration.
STH_borg.9008.name: Adaption Protocol Engaged
STH_borg.9009.a: The line is drawn here and no further!
STH_borg.9009.desc: We have successfully managed to re-modulate our shields, removing the increased damage the Borg are able to inflict on our vessels.
STH_borg.9009.name: Shields Remodulated
STH_borg.9010.desc: Assimilation Target has adapted its defenses. Collective weapon threat has returned to regular levels. Continue assimilation drive. Their resistance is futile.
STH_borg.9010.name: Species have Remodulated their Defense
STH_borg.9101.desc: The destruction of Cube [FromFrom.GetName] has activated the emergency Sphere ejection protocol. \n\nSphere designation [borgSphereTemp.GetName] is now active.
STH_borg.9101.name: Cube Destruction Emergency Protocol
STH_borg.9102.desc: As the debris from the Borg Cube clears, a smaller Borg Sphere emerges from the destruction of the Cube and enters the battle.
STH_borg.9102.name: A Sphere emerges!
STH_borg_anomaly.1.desc_01: Los nodos de análisis a bordo de [Root.GetName] indican que después de los escaneos, [From.GetName] no parece estar hecho de un material similar a su planeta padre. Este y otros indicadores astronómicos sugieren que hace aproximadamente 12 mil millones de ciclos [From.GetName] era un planetoide deshonesto, que desde entonces ha sido atrapado en el pozo de gravedad de su primario.
STH_borg_anomaly.1.desc_02: Los nodos de análisis a bordo de [Root.GetName] indican que, tras el escaneo de [From.GetName], varias grandes porciones de su corteza no parecen estar formadas por un material similar al de su planeta madre. Esto y otros indicadores astronómicos dan una alta probabilidad de que hace aproximadamente 19 millones de ciclos [De.GetName] fue sometido a un evento de impacto significativo.
STH_borg_anomaly.1.name: Luna anómala
STH_borg_anomaly.2.desc_01: Los nodos de análisis a bordo de [Root.GetName] indican que tras los escaneos, [From.GetName] demuestra perturbaciones iónicas anormalmente severas capaces de degradar levemente los implantes corticales Borg. \Se ha calculado que el estudio adicional es de mayor valor que cualquier pérdida potencial de Drones.
STH_borg_anomaly.2.desc_02: Los nodos de análisis a bordo de [Root.GetName] indican que tras los escaneos, [From.GetName] demuestra perturbaciones gravimétricas anormalmente severas capaces de inutilizar temporalmente los campos de amortiguación inercial Borg. \Se ha calculado que el estudio adicional es de mayor valor que cualquier pérdida potencial de Drones.
STH_borg_anomaly.2.name: Luna anómala
STH_borg_anomaly.3.desc: Parece que parte de la flora de [From.GetName] ha desarrollado mecanismos de defensa efectivos a través de la selección natural. Numerosos árboles y hongos exudan esporas que actúan como un poderoso ácido en organismos no vegetales. \n\nEl nodo de liderazgo [Root.GetLeaderName] determinó con éxito una contramedida a los filamentos más dañinos de estas esporas, haciendo que los bosques del planeta sean menos corrosivos para los tejidos orgánicos, sin embargo, no antes de que varios drones fueran irreparablemente dañados.
STH_borg_anomaly.3.name: Flora ácida
STH_borg_anomaly.3.tooltip: Agrega las selvas Acid Jungles modificador a [From.GetName]: \ n £ blocker Noxious Swamp  + 3 \ n £ society  + 2 \n\n-10 £ minerales para reemplazar drones
STH_borg_crisis.1.desc: A lo largo de los cuadrantes Alfa y Beta, han aparecido lecturas extrañas que parecían estar vinculadas a la rama teórica de la tecnología transwarp. [Root.GetName] solo tiene datos limitados sobre este método de transporte, que se teoriza para permitir un viaje más rápido que la deformación en todo el universo. \n\nMientras se ha informado que faltan naves cerca de estas anomalías transwarp, para cuando [Root .GetSpeciesName] el barco se acerca a la llamada de socorro que el área ya se ha estabilizado. ¿Qué debemos hacer?
STH_borg_crisis.1.name: Anomalía Transwarp
STH_borg_crisis.100.name: TRANSMISIÓN ENTRANTE
STH_borg_crisis.2.desc: Los escaneos de largo alcance han detectado una serie de despliegues de barcos extraños en el espacio [From.GetName]. \n\n Hasta ahora, nuestros tácticos no han podido determinar la intención detrás de las acciones de [From.GetName].
STH_borg_crisis.2.name: Lecturas extrañas
STH_borg_crisis.250.desc: El gigantesco cubo continúa atacando [borgAssimilatingPlanet.GetName], diezmando a la población. \n\nNuestros escaneos de largo alcance sugieren que la atmósfera del planeta se ha transformado en una con altas concentraciones de flúor, monóxido de carbono y metano.
STH_borg_crisis.250.name: Cubo Borg
STH_borg_crisis.260.desc: El cubo masivo ha sido destruido y se ha evitado un posible escenario de final de vida para todos los mundos habitados en este sector de la galaxia. \n\nMientras quedan pequeños restos del cubo en sí, permanecen numerosos fragmentos de escombros y pueden proporcionar una pista sobre sus orígenes.
STH_borg_crisis.260.name: Cubo de asimilación Borg
STH_borg_crisis.261.desc: Los escaneos de largo alcance indican que el cubo masivo ha sido destruido y se ha evitado un escenario de final de vida potencial para todos los mundos habitados en este sector de la galaxia. \n\nMientras quedan pequeños restos del cubo en sí, permanecen numerosos restos y pueden proporcionar un pista de sus orígenes ...
STH_borg_crisis.261.name: Cubo Borg destruido
STH_borg_crisis.3.desc: Se ha descubierto una posible apertura a un Corredor Transwarp, sin embargo, los requisitos de recursos para abrir el corredor subespacial son sustanciales. La exploración requerirá una gran inversión de las reservas de energía [Root.GetName].
STH_borg_crisis.3.name: Corredor Transwarp Descubierto
STH_borg_crisis.4.desc: La actividad inusual detectada previamente en el espacio [From.GetName] parece continuar, con emisiones de partículas consistentes con la formación de tecnología de deformación que se observa cada vez con mayor frecuencia.
STH_borg_crisis.4.name: Lecturas extrañas
STH_borg_crisis.5.desc_01: Los esfuerzos para abrir un portal en la red transwarp han sido exitosos, permitiendo el acceso a distancias más largas que las que [Root.GetName] han recorrido antes. \n\nLa telemetría inicial del sensor sugiere evidencia de vida inteligente, sin embargo, esto no es seguro. Hay varias opciones disponibles.
STH_borg_crisis.5.desc_02: A pesar de los retrasos en la realización del proyecto de transwarp, los esfuerzos para abrir un portal en la red de transwarp han sido exitosos, permitiendo el acceso a distancias más allá de las que [Root.GetName] han viajado antes. \n\nLa telemetría de sensor inicial sugiere evidencia de vida inteligente, Sin embargo, esto no es seguro. Hay varias opciones disponibles.
STH_borg_crisis.5.desc_03: Después de incursiones previas en la red transwarp, el [Root.GetName] ha acumulado una gran cantidad de conocimiento sobre el dominio. \n\n La exploración continua podría devolver datos valiosos.
STH_borg_crisis.5.name: Corredor Transwarp
STH_borg_crisis.6.desc: Se ha detectado un gran recipiente en forma de cubo que emerge de una anomalía transwarp en el espacio [From.GetName]. Se han observado explosiones de energía consistentes con municiones subespaciales de alto rendimiento, lo que sugiere un combate continuo entre estos invasores y el [From.GetName].
STH_borg_crisis.6.name: Invasión Borg
STH_borg_crisis.7.a: Alerta roja. Contrataremos a los Borg.
STH_borg_crisis.7.b: Hoy es un buen día para morir.
STH_borg_crisis.7.desc: Se ha detectado una gran vasija en forma de cubo que deja una abertura transwarp y se dirige a mundos habitables. Según el mensaje recibido antes de la destrucción de los sistemas de monitoreo automatizado y los niveles de potencia de su armamento desde el buque, podemos asumir un alto nivel de hostilidad.
STH_borg_crisis.7.f: No hay problema que no se pueda resolver con dinero.
STH_borg_crisis.7.name: Invasión Borg
STH_borg_crisis.8.desc:
La exploración de esta rama del corredor transwarp ha llevado las sondas de [Root.GetName] a los confines del espacio conocido, cerca de la frontera con el Cuadrante Delta. 

 Los datos recopilados por las sondas en el viaje a través de la red transwarp , y al llegar al límite del Cuadrante Delta ha proporcionado datos de investigación sustanciales. 

Las sondas dejaron de transmitirse poco después de la llegada, lo que se cree que es una falla ...
STH_borg_crisis.8.name: Corredor Transwarp
STH_borg_flavour.50.desc: Se han detectado varias cepas de hongos que crecen en [Root.GetName], resistiendo todos los agentes de esterilización no corrosivos. \n\nLa resistencia es inútil. Se ha preparado un proyecto de investigación especial para continuar estudiando este hongo.
STH_borg_flavour.50.name: Crecimientos fúngicos en [Root.GetName]
STH_borg_flavour.51.desc: En un examen más detallado, los crecimientos fúngicos en [Root.GetName] parecen haber sido alterados por nanoprobes de asimilación que sufren errores de codificación que se resolvieron varios siglos antes. \n\nCómo estas nanoprobes evitaron más de un millón de revisiones de código sigue siendo un misterio.
STH_borg_flavour.51.name: Crecimientos fúngicos en [Root.GetName]
STH_borg_operation.1005.desc: Displaying available target types. Resource allocation sufficient for single target acquisition and assimilation. Designate priority objective configuration.
STH_borg_operation.1005.name: Parameter Designation
STH_borg_operation.1006.desc_fail: Error. Contact null. No target available. Operation terminated. Returning to [random_borg_system.GetBorgCoordinates] and standing by for objective revision.
STH_borg_operation.1007.desc: We have just received some troubling news. Apparently, while the [FromFrom.GetName] was conducting a routine patrol away from the [FromFrom.Fleet.GetName], it was suddenly ambushed by a [From.GetSpecies] vessel coming out of a transwarp conduit. The [FromFrom.GetName] has not been heard from since. We can only assume that it was either destroyed or assimilated.
STH_borg_operation.1007.name: Ship Ambushed!
STH_borg_operation.1010.name: Objective Report: No Target
STH_borg_operation.1101.warning.tooltip: This may provoke a hostile response!
STH_borg_operation.1153.a: We must be ready to defend ourselves in the future.
STH_borg_operation.1153.desc: An analysis of unique magnetic resonance traces left around the site of the colony has confirmed our worst fears: The settlement was destroyed by the Borg. How they managed to extract the entire colony so quickly has not yet been determined, but the outcome speaks for itself. We have clearly caught the Collective's attention.
STH_borg_operation.1153.name: Report on Lost Colony
STH_borg_operation.1154.a: The line must be drawn here!
STH_borg_operation.1154.desc: First responders have arrived at [From.GetName] in time to witness a [FromFrom.GetSpecies] vessel literally 'scooping' our settlement up with its tractor beams. Initial scans indicate that while much of the colony has been devastated by the attack, many of the structures and people remain. We cannot be certain if our forces will be enough to stop them, but we must try!
STH_borg_operation.1154.name: Colony Rescue
STH_borg_operation.1155.desc: Despite our best efforts, we have failed to stop the [FromFrom.GetSpecies] from destroying our colony on [From.GetName]. The attacking Cube has disappeared into a transwarp conduit and is now well beyond our reach. Nothing remains of the colony's infrastructure, and we can only assume that the population has been totally assimilated.
STH_borg_operation.1155.name: Rescue Attempt Failed
STH_borg_operation.1156.desc: Thanks to the quick response by our forces, we have successfully driven back the [From.GetSpecies] threat! Our colony is safe, though it will take some time for the damage to be repaired. Nevertheless, we should be grateful for our hard-won victory. We can probably expect more attacks like this in the future.
STH_borg_operation.1156.name: Rescue Attempt Succeeded
STH_borg_operation.5001.desc: Analysis of assimilated data has revealed a potentially useful memory engram. This knowledge could expedite one of our operations in [From.Target.GetBorgSpecies] territory.
STH_borg_operation.5001.name: Bonus Analysis: Experience
STH_borg_operation.5002.desc: Analysis of assimilated data has expanded our understanding of [From.Target.GetBorgSpecies]'s technological distinctiveness beyond initial projections. These advancements will add to our perfection.
STH_borg_operation.5002.name: Bonus Analysis: Technology
STH_borg_story.1.desc:
As the [Root.GetName] has grown, so too has the capacity and necessity for elements of the Collective to operate in relative isolation. 

This isolation is necessary to prevent recurrent decision loops and feedback paths that would otherwise emerge due to the finite speed of transwarp communications... but it comes with inherent risks to the cohesion of the Collective. 

Self monitoring nodes within [Root.Capital.GetName] have alerted the discovery of a potentially catastrophic ethos/identity fragmentation path building across a number of secondary nodes. The effort to repair these nodes is substantial, but could prevent a fracturing of the Collective itself.
STH_borg_story.1.name: Imperfect Thinking
STH_borg_story.100.desc_01: Diving for their phaser the Captain is able to get off a number of shots taking down a couple of unsuspecting Drones before they could adapt, using their knowledge of the ship the commanding officer is soon able to to position themselves close to the Warp Coolant conduit. The Queen is too quick though and swats aside the Captains attempt to release the deadly gas. The Captain falls back against the solid form of another Borg Drone. Pinned by unflinching cold hands the Captain struggles to free themself, to escape the tubes that are forced against their neck. Assimilation is painful, but nothing matches the despair of knowing that your failure could spell the end of your species chances...
STH_borg_story.100.desc_02: Moving close to the Queen and offering their lives as a Drone the commanding officer is soon able to to position themselves close to the Warp Coolant conduit, the Borg Queen smiles coldly and without joy and in a swift motion grabs the captain. 'You will make an excellent drone'. \n\nPinned by unflinching cold hands the Captain struggles to free themself, to escape the tubes that are forced against their neck. Assimilation is painful, but nothing matches the despair of knowing that your failure could spell the end of your species chances...
STH_borg_story.100.name: Resistance is Futile
STH_borg_story.101.name: A noble sacrifice.
STH_borg_story.103.a: Time to return to the future.
STH_borg_story.103.desc_01: History records First Contact, in Human context, to specifically refer to the first official publicly and globally known contact between Humans and extraterrestrials. The First Contact took place on the evening of April 5, 2063, when a Vulcan survey ship, the T'Plana-Hath, having detected the warp signature of the Phoenix, touched down in Bozeman, central Montana. And just as history records, the events play out thanks to the efforts of the crew of [sth_first_contact_ship.GetName]. History secured, the Captain and their crew can watch as the Humankind and the Vulcans meet for the first time only pausing to take a small memento of this historic occasion.
STH_borg_story.103.desc_02: History records First Contact, in Human context, to specifically refer to the first official publicly and globally known contact between Humans and extraterrestrials. The First Contact took place on the evening of April 5, 2063, when a Vulcan survey ship, the T'Plana-Hath, having detected the warp signature of the Phoenix, touched down in Bozeman, central Montana. And just as history records, the events play out thanks to the efforts of the crew of [sth_first_contact_ship.GetName]. History secured, the crew can watch as the Humankind and the Vulcans meet for the first time, only pausing to take a small memento of this historic occasion.
STH_borg_story.103.name: First Contact
STH_borg_story.104.a: Time to return to the future.
STH_borg_story.104.name: First Contact
STH_borg_story.105.a: Time to return to the future.
STH_borg_story.105.desc: History records First Contact, in Human context, to specifically refer to the first official publicly and globally known contact between Humans and extraterrestrials. The First Contact took place on the evening of April 5, 2063, when a Vulcan survey ship, the T'Plana-Hath, having detected the warp signature of the Phoenix, touched down in Bozeman, central Montana. And just as history records, the events play out thanks to the efforts of the crew of [sth_first_contact_ship.GetName]. The Phoenix may never have survived its flight, but its attempt did not go unnoticed by the Vulcans and a 'persuaded' Doctor Cochrane was there to greet them. Thankfully Vulcan's increased words of caution about humanities attempts to travel further into space some one hundred years later were met with the same deaf ears from early Starfleet Admirals and a very determined Captain Archer.
STH_borg_story.105.name: First Contact
STH_borg_story.106.desc: The Vulcans detected the journey of the Phoenix and as they had done in the un-altered timeline they came to investigate, but they did not find humanity waiting for them. Instead an assimilated 24th Century ship lie in weight, the conflict was over quickly and the Borg had access to the T'Plana-Hath's records and security codes. An event that forever changed the formation of the United Federation of Planets and set in motion a new timeline..
STH_borg_story.106.name: First Contact Failed
STH_borg_story.107.desc: The events of First Contact never came to pass, the Borg ensured that the Phoenix's flight remained undetected and with control over a 24th Century starship, Vulcan and Earth never stood a chance of meeting and humanity's future would never play out as it should.
STH_borg_story.107.name: First Contact Failed
STH_borg_story.108.desc: The events of First Contact never came to pass, the Borg ensured that the Phoenix's flight remained undetected and with control over a 24th Century starship, Vulcan and Earth never stood a chance of meeting and humanity's future would never play out as it should. The remaining crew on Earth continued to resist the Borg stalling their progress at every opportunity, eventually managed to sacrifice themselves to destroy their former ship to stop the Borg advancing further into the Alpha Quadrant and using advanced weapons against the Vulcan's, Andorians and the other powers of the time. Eventually a Coalition of Planets was formed and many humans were rescued from Earth and accepted into this new Coalition that kept the Borg pinned into the Sol system.
STH_borg_story.108.name: A new history
STH_borg_story.109.a: Time to return to the future.
STH_borg_story.109.desc_01: History records First Contact, in Human context, to specifically refer to the first official publicly and globally known contact between Humans and extraterrestrials. The First Contact took place on the evening of April 5, 2063, when a Vulcan survey ship, the T'Plana-Hath, having detected the failed warp signature of the Phoenix, touched down in Bozeman, central Montana. Private records from the Vulcan High Command would later reveal that in addition to the earth ship mysterious debris was found above the planet. Further investigation at the time would almost make the Vulcan Science Directorate reevaluate its stance on time travel.
STH_borg_story.109.desc_02: History records First Contact, in Human context, to specifically refer to the first official publicly and globally known contact between Humans and extraterrestrials.
