Aunque las pruebas no son concretas y los representantes de los Vorta han negado rotundamente tales "ridículas afirmaciones", todas las pruebas apuntan a que esta es la causa. \Nuestros servicios de seguridad han recomendado la aplicación de una serie de medidas, incluyendo análisis de sangre y barridos de rutina para los cambiaformas, sin embargo, estas medidas no serán populares entre nuestros ciudadanos.
STH_dominion_flavour.1123.name: Se sospecha de la participación del Dominio
STH_dominion_flavour.1124.desc: Parece que los sólidos no son tan tontos como pensábamos al principio y han deducido correctamente que uno de los nuestros estaba detrás de las acciones de su enviado. Naturalmente, los vorta han negado rotundamente las acusaciones y han refutado las afirmaciones de que tendríamos algún interés en perjudicar a nuestros vecinos. Es probable que hayan mejorado sus medidas de seguridad, lo que haría mucho más difícil un nuevo intento de sustituir a uno de sus enviados.
STH_dominion_flavour.1124.name: Incidente diplomático
STH_dominion_flavour.1900.a: Excelente. Esto traerá una rápida victoria al Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.1900.desc: El Fundador que se hace pasar por el gobernante de [De.Dueño.GetName] ha declarado públicamente su apoyo a nuestro esfuerzo de guerra, y ha anunciado el despliegue de ayuda militar a todas las campañas actuales del Dominio. Las fuerzas de [De.Dueño.GetName] se están moviendo para unirse a nuestras flotas mientras hablamos.
STH_dominion_flavour.1900.name: [From.Owner.GetName] Se une a nuestra guerra
STH_dominion_flavour.2001.desc: Un buque de guerra con un Fundador desapareció en la urdimbre. \n\nMientras se desconoce el estado exacto de la nave, los escaneos de su estela subespacial indican que puede haber sufrido un mal funcionamiento del motor. El análisis vectorial sugiere una probabilidad del 84% de que la nave haya pasado por el sistema [FromFrom.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.2001.name: Nave perdida
STH_dominion_flavour.2002.desc: Los sensores indican que una embarcación de diseño [From.GetName] parece haberse estrellado en el planeta [FromFrom.GetName] en el sistema [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nMientras arriesgado, las recompensas por recuperar la embarcación podrían ser significativas. Se necesitará un equipo de encuestas completo para identificar el sitio exacto del accidente.
STH_dominion_flavour.2002.name: Lecturas anómalas
STH_dominion_flavour.2010.desc_01: El buque de guerra parece haberse desintegrado en el impacto con el planeta. No se han encontrado sobrevivientes, y el Fundador se presume muerto.
STH_dominion_flavour.2010.desc_02: El buque de guerra parece haberse desintegrado en el impacto con el planeta. No se han encontrado sobrevivientes y no queda tecnología por recuperar.
STH_dominion_flavour.2010.name: Lugar del accidente
STH_dominion_flavour.2020.desc_01: El buque de guerra parece haberse mantenido intacto en el impacto con el planeta. Mientras se confirma la muerte de la tripulación del buque, el Fundador ha sido recuperado y está en camino de regreso al Gran Enlace.
STH_dominion_flavour.2020.desc_02: El buque de guerra [changelingEmpire.GetName] parece haber permanecido intacto en el impacto con el planeta. \n\nNo se han encontrado sobrevivientes, pero el barco en sí parece ser recuperable. Si esto es aconsejable dado el potencial de llamar la atención de [changelingEmpire.GetName] permanece indeciso.
STH_dominion_flavour.2020.desc_03: El buque de guerra parece haberse mantenido intacto en el impacto con el planeta. No se han encontrado sobrevivientes, pero el barco en sí parece ser recuperable.
STH_dominion_flavour.2020.name: Lugar del accidente
STH_dominion_flavour.2021.desc_01: El esfuerzo de recuperación del buque de guerra [changelingEmpire.GetName] está progresando a un ritmo rápido, sin embargo, las cosas se han complicado por la aparición de un representante de [changelingEmpire.GetName] que exige la devolución del buque y la retirada de nuestros activos, en violación flagrante de [ Root.Owner.GetName] soberanía.
STH_dominion_flavour.2021.desc_02: El esfuerzo de recuperación del buque de guerra ha progresado a un ritmo rápido, con el buque siendo remolcado con éxito en órbita. \n\nA pesar de algunos daños, parece capaz de ingresar al servicio activo.
STH_dominion_flavour.2021.name: Lugar del accidente
STH_dominion_flavour.2022.desc: A pesar de las amenazas de [FromFrom.GetName], nuestros activos han recuperado con éxito el buque de guerra y lo han puesto en órbita a [From.GetName]. \n\nA pesar de algunos daños, parece capaz de entrar en servicio activo.
STH_dominion_flavour.2022.name: Lugar del accidente
STH_dominion_flavour.2023.desc: Las amenazas de [FromFrom.GetName] han demostrado ser efectivas, nuestros activos en [From.GetName] han sido diezmados por un ataque quirúrgico que ha resultado en la destrucción del vaso después de la aparente recuperación de un artículo desde su interior. \n\nCómo esto afectará las relaciones de [Root.Owner.GetName] con el [FromFrom.GetName] sigue siendo incierto.
STH_dominion_flavour.2023.name: Lugar del accidente
STH_dominion_flavour.2024.desc: El [FromFrom.Owner.GetName] ha alertado al [Root.GetName] de la presencia de un buque de guerra estrellado en la superficie de [From.GetName]. Después de investigar el sitio, un Fundador lesionado ha sido recuperado y está en camino de regreso al Gran Enlace.
STH_dominion_flavour.2024.name: Fundador recuperado
STH_dominion_flavour.2025.desc: [FromFrom.Owner.GetName] ha localizado un buque de guerra [Root.GetName] estrellado en la superficie de [From.GetName], pero ha rechazado nuestras demandas de permitir el acceso [Root.GetName] al sitio. \n\nMientras el barco tiene valor, el potencial que el Fundador asignado al barco aún puede estar vivo es la preocupación más apremiante.
STH_dominion_flavour.2025.name: Lugar del accidente
STH_dominion_flavour.2026.desc: El [FromFrom.Owner.GetName] ha localizado un buque de guerra [Root.GetName] estrellado en la superficie de [From.GetName]. Al aceptar nuestras demandas para permitir que [Root.GetName] acceda al sitio, un Fundador lesionado ha sido recuperado y está en camino de regreso al Gran Enlace.
STH_dominion_flavour.2026.name: Fundador recuperado
STH_dominion_flavour.2050.a.tooltip: Jem'Hadar First es asignado como líder.
STH_dominion_flavour.2050.a: El Jem'Hadar ha demostrado su lealtad.
STH_dominion_flavour.2050.b.tooltip: El clon de [Root.Leader.GetName] se activa y se asigna como líder.
STH_dominion_flavour.2050.c: ¡La disciplina es obligatoria! Ejecutar a los involucrados.
STH_dominion_flavour.2050.desc:
Las tensiones entre los sujetos Vorta y Jem'Hadar de [Root.GetName] se consideran en muchos sentidos como uno de los diversos métodos de control que emplean los Fundadores para garantizar el buen funcionamiento de [Root.Owner.GetName]. 

Recientemente un argumento entre el supervisor de Vorta de [Root.GetName] [Root.Leader.GetName] y [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] Jem'Hadar First se ha intensificado y ha resultado en la muerte de [Root.Leader.GetName]. 

En circunstancias normales, el Primero sería ejecutado, sin embargo, dada la naturaleza teológica del argumento y la aparente falta de respeto que [Root.Leader.GetName] mostraba a [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] dioses en él, hay espacio para flexibilidad.
STH_dominion_flavour.2050.name: Desacuerdo violento
STH_dominion_flavour.3000.desc_01: El flujo y reflujo de nuestro gran dominio es como una marea que inunda los imperios de lo sólido. Nuestros leales administradores de Vorta intentan una vez más plantear el asunto de nuestros ciudadanos sólidos. Tantas necesidades y deseos, minucias de logística, suministros de alimentos, medicinas y mantas, informes sobre informes de todos los rincones de nuestro vasto Dominio. Nos ahogamos en los detalles. ¿Cómo se ha llegado a esto, que en nuestra necesidad de protegernos del sólido terminamos cuidando su bienestar? \n\nDespués de horas de deliberación, el Gran Enlace acepta, sin embargo, que se debe hacer algo con respecto a uno de los miembros de nuestro tema.
STH_dominion_flavour.3000.name: Sobre el tema de los sólidos
STH_dominion_flavour.3001.desc_01: Producto Interno Bruto. Centros urbanos. Reubicación de poblaciones. Cómo a los Vorta les encantan sus números y estadísticas. ¡Han compilado una cuidadosa lista de sugerencias sobre qué hacer en cada asunto posible relacionado con el  [From.GetName]  - que van desde políticas amistosas hasta demandas enérgicas. \n\nGeneralmente, tímidamente, advierten que incluso la amenaza inminente de las tropas Jem'Hadar no será suficiente para hacer sentir todas nuestras demandas. El segmento que está en tierra, conversando con el Vorta, siente calor y afecto hacia las criaturas simples, pero pronto se desvanece, al igual que la advertencia. La precaución permanece sin embargo; nunca olvidaremos el peligro que pueden presentar los sólidos.
STH_dominion_flavour.3001.f: Deconstrucción de demanda de  estaciones de publicación§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3001.name: Administración sólida
STH_dominion_flavour.3010.a.tooltip: ¡Exija un pequeño tributo modesto de [From.GetName], un envío de materias primas y cristales de dilitio igual a 100 £ minerales Minerales y £ energía Energy unidades. \n\n ¡Esto dañará ligeramente nuestras relaciones, causando una £ £ temporal -12 modificador de opinión y costos -25 puntos de influencia £ Influence§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3010.b.tooltip: ¡Exija un tributo moderado de [From.GetName], un envío de materias primas y cristales de dilitio igual a 250 £ minerales Minerales y £ energía Energy unidades. \n\nEsto dañará nuestras relaciones, causando una £ £ temporal -25 modificador de opinión y costos -50 puntos de influencia £ Influence§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3010.c.tooltip: ¡Exija un tributo significativamente grande de [From.GetName], un envío de materias primas y cristales de dilitio igual a 500 £ minerales Minerales y £ energía Energy unidades. \n\n¡Esto dañará en gran medida nuestras relaciones, causando una £ £ temporal -50 modificador de opinión y costos -75 puntos de influencia £ Influence§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3010.desc_01: Al Enlace no le importan los bienes y las baratijas, pero la riqueza material del Dominio es necesaria para mantener las flotas y los ejércitos jem'hadar. A cambio, proporcionamos orden y estabilidad a nuestros Sólidos, y todo lo que requerimos es un exiguo impuesto.\NSin embargo, a veces no es suficiente, y se necesita más material. Dejamos a un lado las advertencias y precauciones de los Vorta: sabemos muy bien que los Sólidos son capaces de proporcionar más. Sólo tenemos que saber dónde empujar.
STH_dominion_flavour.3010.name: Tributo Sólido
STH_dominion_flavour.302.a: Convierta [jemHadarElder.GetName] en general. La victoria es vida.
STH_dominion_flavour.302.b: Usa [jemHadarElder.GetName] para entrenar a nuestras fuerzas terrestres.
STH_dominion_flavour.302.desc: [jemHadarElder.GetName], uno de nuestros Jem'Hadar Firsts ha alcanzado la venerable edad de veinte ciclos. Un veterano de muchas escaramuzas y duelos, la riqueza de la experiencia brindada por el anciano en el arte de la guerra y la lealtad es sustancial. \n\nEste Honorable Anciano ha demostrado ser [jemHadarElder.GetHerHim] como un maestro táctico y valiente guerrero, capaz de derrotar a fuerzas numéricamente superiores con gran habilidad. ¿Qué haremos con [jemHadarElder.GetHerHim]?
STH_dominion_flavour.302.name: Anciano honrado
STH_dominion_flavour.3020.a.tooltip:
¡Pide una pequeña unidad de patrulla Jem'Hadar en los astilleros de [From.GetName], compuesta de 3 luz Attack Fighters§ !. ¡Esto causará una leve opinión £ -10 impacto en nuestras relaciones con  [From.GetName] § !, debido a la interrupción de su economía. 

Esta comisión nos costará: 

Influencia: £ influencia -100 \ nMinerales: £ minerales -250 \ n Energía: £ energía -250 

La unidad de patrulla estará lista para su uso en 30 £ ship_stats_build_time Days en órbita alrededor de £ planet  [from.Capital.GetName] § !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3020.b.tooltip:
¡Pide un pequeño ala destructora Jem'Hadar en los astilleros de [From.GetName], compuesto por 1 medio Destroyer y 3 luz Attack Fighters§ !. ¡Esto causará una ligera opinión de £ -20 impacto en nuestras relaciones con  [From.GetName] § !, debido a la interrupción de su economía. 

Esta comisión nos costará: 

Influencia: £ influencia -150 \ nMinerales: £ minerales -500 \ n Energía: £ energía -500 

 ¡El ala destructora estará lista para usarse en 90 £ ship_stats_build_time Days en órbita alrededor de £ planet  [from.Capital.GetName] § !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3020.c.tooltip:
¡Comisione una poderosa Fuerza de Tarea Jem'Hadar en los astilleros de [From.GetName], compuesta de 1 pesado Cruiser§ !, 1 medio Destroyer y 3 luz Attack Fighters§ !. ¡Esto causará una opinión £ -30 impacto en nuestras relaciones con  [From.GetName] § !, debido a la interrupción de su economía. 

Esta comisión nos costará: 

Influencia: £ influencia -250 \ nMinerales: £ minerales -750 \ nEnergía: £ energía -750 

El equipo de trabajo estará listo para su uso en 180 £ ship_stats_build_time Days en órbita alrededor de £ planet  [from.Capital.GetName] § !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3020.desc_01: Mantenemos a nuestros ciudadanos seguros, y a cambio les damos un margen de maniobra. Hay una guarnición Jem'Hadar en cada planeta y en cada ciudad, pero es responsabilidad de cada miembro defender su propio territorio con su propia milicia y armada. \n\nSin embargo, cuando las mareas de guerra agitan el flujo del Enlace, Tenemos todo el derecho de comandar todas las instalaciones de construcción civil a nuestras necesidades. Luego, los Vorta se quejan del costo y la molestia para la economía local, como es su forma, pero lo importante es que los Jem'Hadar ganen sus barcos a tiempo, para proteger el bien de todo el Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.3020.name: Disposiciones Navales
STH_dominion_flavour.3021.desc_01: Muy por encima de la superficie de [MemberCapital.GetName], el planeta capital del  [From.GetName] § !, los trabajadores con exceso de trabajo de los astilleros imperiales han terminado la solicitud de emergencia autorizada por el gobierno del Dominio. El ritmo vertiginoso del proyecto se cobró la vida de varios trabajadores debido a accidentes, pospuso los pedidos existentes e interrumpió en gran medida la economía local. Aún así, pocos se atrevieron a expresar cualquier disidencia: una nueva y brillante flota de buques de guerra Jem'Hadar ya está lista para su uso.
STH_dominion_flavour.3021.name: Flota requisada llega
STH_dominion_flavour.3022.desc_01: Muy por encima de la superficie de [MemberCapital.GetName], el planeta capital del  [From.GetName] § !, los trabajadores con exceso de trabajo de los astilleros imperiales han terminado la solicitud de emergencia autorizada por el gobierno del Dominio. El ritmo vertiginoso del proyecto se cobró la vida de varios trabajadores debido a accidentes, pospuso los pedidos existentes e interrumpió en gran medida la economía local. Aún así, pocos se atrevieron a expresar cualquier disidencia: una nueva y brillante flota de buques de guerra Jem'Hadar ya está lista para su uso.
STH_dominion_flavour.3022.name: Flota requisada llega
STH_dominion_flavour.3023.desc_01: Muy por encima de la superficie de [MemberCapital.GetName], el planeta capital del  [From.GetName] § !, los trabajadores con exceso de trabajo de los astilleros imperiales han terminado la solicitud de emergencia autorizada por el gobierno del Dominio. El ritmo vertiginoso del proyecto se cobró la vida de varios trabajadores debido a accidentes, pospuso los pedidos existentes e interrumpió en gran medida la economía local. Aún así, pocos se atrevieron a expresar cualquier disidencia: una nueva y brillante flota de buques de guerra Jem'Hadar ya está lista para su uso.
STH_dominion_flavour.3023.name: Flota requisada llega
STH_dominion_flavour.303.a: Haz de [jemHadarElder.GetName] un almirante. La victoria es vida.
STH_dominion_flavour.303.b: Usa [jemHadarElder.GetName] para entrenar a nuestras fuerzas navales.
STH_dominion_flavour.303.desc: [jemHadarElder.GetName], uno de nuestros Jem'Hadar Firsts ha alcanzado la venerable edad de veinte ciclos. Un veterano de muchas escaramuzas y duelos, la riqueza de la experiencia brindada por el anciano en el arte de la guerra y la lealtad es sustancial. \n\nEste Honorable Anciano ha demostrado ser [jemHadarElder.GetHerHim] como un maestro táctico conocido por nunca retirarse, capaz de comandar decenas de naves y derrotar fuerzas numéricamente superiores. ¿Qué haremos con [jemHadarElder.GetHerHim]?
STH_dominion_flavour.303.name: Anciano honrado
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.a.tooltip: ¡A un costo de 250 £ influencia Influencia§ !, asumimos el control directo sobre [MemberPlanet1.GetName]. ¡Esto causará una gran opinión £ -125 impacto en nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName], debido a la pérdida del mundo.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.b.tooltip: ¡A un costo de 250 £ influencia Influencia§ !, asumimos el control directo sobre [MemberPlanet2.GetName]. ¡Esto causará una gran opinión £ -125 impacto en nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName], debido a la pérdida del mundo.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.c.tooltip: A un costo de 250 £ influencia Influencia, Asumimos el control directo sobre [MemberPlanet3.GetName]. ¡Esto causará una gran opinión £ -125 impacto en nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName], debido a la pérdida del mundo.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.d.tooltip: A un costo de 250 £ influencia Influencia§ !, asumimos el control directo sobre [MemberPlanet4.GetName]. ¡Esto causará una gran opinión £ -125 impacto en nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName], debido a la pérdida del mundo.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.desc_01: Durante miles de años, Dominion se ha expandido. Rodeando el Gran Enlace hay un núcleo bajo la autoridad directa de nuestros esclavos más leales, los Vorta y Jem'Hadar. Alrededor de eso, una capa de miembros de Dominion, mala dirección, rumores y engaños. Incluso nuestros ciudadanos más leales no saben la verdad sobre los verdaderos líderes del Dominio. \n\nSin embargo, a veces, incluso esta estrategia debe ser repensada, y un planeta que pertenece a nuestros miembros debe ser sometido a nuestro pleno y directo controlar. Esto no se puede hacer fácil o económicamente, y ha habido casos en los que un miembro elige rebelarse, en lugar de aceptar nuestro dictado. Así son las cosas, y es por eso que los Jem'Hadar siempre están listos para aplastar cualquier rebelión.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.e.tooltip: A un costo de 250 £ influencia Influencia§ !, asumimos el control directo sobre [MemberPlanet5.GetName]. ¡Esto causará una gran opinión £ -125 impacto en nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName], debido a la pérdida del mundo.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.f.tooltip: ¡A un costo de 250 £ influencia Influencia§ !, asumimos el control directo sobre [MemberPlanet6.GetName]. ¡Esto causará una gran opinión £ -125 impacto en nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName], debido a la pérdida del mundo.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.g.tooltip: ¡A un costo de 350 £ influencia Influencia§ !, asumimos el control directo sobre el mundo Capital de [member_capital.GetName]. ¡Esto causará una opinión extremadamente grande de £ -175 impacto en nuestras relaciones con el [From.GetName], debido a la pérdida de su mundo.
STH_dominion_flavour.3030.name: Asumiendo control directo
STH_dominion_flavour.3040.a.tooltip: ¡Invierta una cantidad relativamente pequeña de recursos, gastando 300 £ minerales Minerales y £ energía Energy para mejorar temporalmente las relaciones por £ opinion  + 25 con [From.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3040.a: ¡Financia una Spequeña escala Campaña de propaganda.
STH_dominion_flavour.3040.b.tooltip: ¡Invierta una cantidad relativamente moderada de recursos, gastando 650 £ minerales Minerales y £ energía Energy para mejorar temporalmente las relaciones por £ opinion  + 50 con [From.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3040.c.tooltip: ¡Invierta una cantidad relativamente grande de recursos, gastando 1000 £ minerales Minerales y £ energía Energy para mejorar temporalmente las relaciones por £ opinion  + 75 con [From.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3040.d.tooltip: ¡Invierta una cantidad significativa de recursos, gastando 1500 £ minerales Minerales y £ energía Energy para mejorar temporalmente las relaciones por £ opinion  + 100 con [From.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3040.desc_01: Los tesoreros de Vorta fruncen los labios y fruncen el ceño: están acostumbrados a recaudar impuestos y tributos, explotando a la población de  [From.GetName] § !, sin gastar activos valiosos en temas. Para ellos, la lealtad es fácil, arraigada en sus propios genes. Aún así, entienden el valor de la propaganda dirigida, y Great Link siente que es necesario mejorar nuestras relaciones con  [From.GetName] § !. Los ingenieros de optimización de opinión de multitudes ya están sentando las bases para una campaña social de varios niveles que garantizará que la opinión de nuestros ciudadanos sobre los Fundadores mejore notablemente.
STH_dominion_flavour.3040.name: Propaganda dirigida
STH_dominion_flavour.3050.a.tooltip:
Puede asignar un Almirante Jem'Hadar como Gobernador Provincial a [From.GetName]. Solo un líder de cada tipo puede ser asignado a este imperio en un momento dado. El Almirante ganará el Aval Naval beneficio. 

 Gobernador Provincial - Agregado Naval 

 £ ship_stats_damage Daño de la nave:  + 10%  \ n £ ship_stats_shield Shield Health:  + 10%  \ n £ ship_stats_hitpoints Salud del barco:  + 10%
STH_dominion_flavour.3050.b.tooltip:
Usted puede asignar un Jem'Hadar General como Gobernador Provincial a [From.GetName]. Solo un líder de cada tipo puede ser asignado a este imperio en un momento dado. El General ganará el Ajil Militar beneficio. 

 Gobernador Provincial - Agregado Militar 

 £ Army_ship Daño del Ejército:  + 33%  \ n £ army_ship Salud del Ejército:  + 33%
STH_dominion_flavour.3050.c.tooltip:
Puede asignar un gobernador de Vorta como  gobernador provincial a [From.GetName]. Solo un líder de cada tipo puede ser asignado a este imperio en un momento dado. El gobernador obtendrá el Chief Administrator buff. 

Gobernador provincial - Administrador principal 

 £ minerales Minerales:  + 15%  \ n £ energía Energía:  + 15%
STH_dominion_flavour.3050.d.tooltip:
Puede asignar un Científico Vorta como Gobernador Provincial a [From.GetName]. Solo un líder de cada tipo puede ser asignado a este imperio en un momento dado. El científico obtendrá el beneficio Proctor. 

 Gobernador provincial - Proctor 

 £ shipclass_science_ship Global Research:  + 15%
STH_dominion_flavour.3050.desc_01:
Proyecciones, gráficos y figuras: la conferencia del Vorta continúa, pero no necesitamos su información. Podemos sentir la perturbación y las ondas en el Gran Enlace que indica que algo no está bien. Más allá de las cifras, sabemos en el fondo que hay algo fundamentalmente incorrecto en el gobierno de [From.GetName]. 

No sabemos si es pura incompetencia, ineficiencia o injerto, pero está claro que se deben tomar medidas. . The Great Link ha decidido: ¡nombraremos un  Gobernador Provincial en los que podemos confiar para supervisar el [From.GetName] y devolverlos al redil como engranajes funcionales en nuestro gran Dominio. 

Asignar un gobernador provincial a un miembro del Dominio eliminará al líder seleccionado de su lista. Mientras esté asignado, el miembro de Dominion obtendrá un beneficio considerable, dependiendo del tipo de líder que asigne. Solo los líderes Vorta o Jem'Hadar pueden ser utilizados como Gobernadores Provinciales.
STH_dominion_flavour.3050.name: Un diente sólido
STH_dominion_flavour.3051.a.tooltip: Recupera a tu Almirante de su posición con [from.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3051.b.tooltip: Recupera a tu General de su posición con [from.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3051.c.tooltip: Recupera a tu gobernador de su posición con [from.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3051.d.tooltip: Recupera a tu científico de su posición con [from.GetName].
STH_dominion_flavour.3051.desc_01: ¡Ha llegado el momento de recuperar nuestro valioso Gobernador Provincial desde [From.GetName]. Las perturbaciones y las ondas en el Gran Enlace indican que las ondas se han suavizado un poco. Siempre habrá un requisito para nuestra presencia estable entre los sólidos.
STH_dominion_flavour.3051.name: Trabajos sólidos
STH_dominion_flavour.3060.a.tooltip: ¡Ordene la disolución de los  [From.GetName] 's Frontier Outpost en el sistema [MemberOutpostSystem1.GetName]. \n\n ¡Esto agriará nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName] y causará -50 £ opinion Opinión con ellos. Sin embargo, ganaremos  + 25  £ influencia Influencia y Unity§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3060.b.tooltip: ¡Ordene la disolución de los  [From.GetName] 's Frontier Outpost en el sistema [MemberOutpostSystem2.GetName]. \n\n ¡Esto agriará nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName] y causará -50 £ opinion Opinión con ellos. Sin embargo, ganaremos  + 25  £ influencia Influencia y Unity§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3060.c.tooltip: ¡Ordene la disolución de los  [From.GetName] 's Frontier Outpost en el sistema [MemberOutpostSystem3.GetName]. \n\n ¡Esto agriará nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName] y causará -50 £ opinion Opinión con ellos. Sin embargo, ganaremos  + 25  £ influencia Influencia y Unity§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3060.d.tooltip: ¡Ordene la disolución de los  [From.GetName] 's Frontier Outpost en el sistema [MemberOutpostSystem4.GetName]. \n\n ¡Esto agriará nuestras relaciones con [From.GetName] y causará -50 £ opinion Opinión con ellos. Sin embargo, ganaremos  + 25  £ influencia Influencia y Unity§ !.
STH_dominion_flavour.3060.desc_01: El Dominio no ha resistido durante diez mil años porque nos hemos expandido imprudentemente a través de las estrellas. Los Jem'Hadar no entienden esto: desean que los sujetemos a todos, que los llevemos al límite. Con el tiempo, obtendrán su deseo, pero como siempre, debemos hacerlo con cuidado. \n\nPara mantener nuestras fronteras seguras, debemos mostrar moderación y enseñar a nuestros ciudadanos una moderación similar. El crecimiento y la expansión deben mantenerse cuidadosamente y, cuando sea necesario, recortarse.
STH_dominion_flavour.3060.name: Fronteras sólidas
STH_dominion_flavour.4001.desc: Hola, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] te saludamos desde el poderoso Dominio con una oferta que harías bien en aceptar. Somos una potencia milenaria y tecnológicamente avanzada, fundada bajo el gobierno absoluto de un grupo de sabios y poderosos Fundadores y te damos la bienvenida para que compartas la gloria de nuestro imperio.
STH_dominion_flavour.4001.name: Saludos de sus vecinos el Dominio
STH_dominion_flavour.4002.desc: La pura audacia de [dom_member_target_country.GetName], han rechazado nuestra oferta de unirse al Dominio y han despreciado la oferta de bienvenida de los Fundadores. No se puede permitir que esta afrenta al poder de los Fundadores continúe sin respuesta. ¿Debemos declarar la guerra o permitirles esta única transgresión?
STH_dominion_flavour.4002.name: Oferta rechazada
STH_dominion_flavour.4003.desc: Los líderes de [dom_member_target_country.GetName] han visto la sabiduría de unirse al poderoso Dominio para servir al capricho de los Fundadores. Este es otro fabuloso día en la historia del Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.4003.name: Un nuevo miembro se une al Dominio
STH_dominion_flavour.4004.desc: Nuestros equipos diplomáticos han recibido la notificación de que [dom_member_target_country.GetName] ha rechazado la oferta del Dominio de unirse a ellos. Los Changelings no están acostumbrados a ser rechazados y parece que el Dominio se está preparando para tomar sus mundos por la fuerza.
STH_dominion_flavour.4004.name: [dom_member_target_country.GetName] han rechazado el Dominio
STH_dominion_flavour.4005.desc: Nuestros equipos diplomáticos han recibido la notificación de que [dom_member_target_country.GetName] se ha unido al Dominio para servir a los Changelings. La inclusión de este nuevo estado galáctico sólo aumentará el alcance del Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.4005.name: [dom_member_target_country.GetName] se han unido al Dominio
STH_dominion_flavour.500.desc: A new world, [FROM.GetName] has aligned themselves with the mighty Dominion, due to their status, we can uplift them to a full Dominion Member with all the privileges and responsibilities to the Founders that demands.
STH_dominion_flavour.500.name: New Subject for the Dominion
STH_dominion_flavour.5000.desc: El poderoso Dominio nunca ha tenido éxito quedándose quieto y tenemos un número de aliados dentro de nuestra alianza actual que agradecerían la oportunidad de unirse al Dominio y compartir los beneficios que todos los miembros comparten. Hemos identificado los objetivos que figuran a continuación con los que deberíamos empezar a abrir vínculos diplomáticos y prepararlos para el proceso de firmar nuestros tratados y abrazar nuestro poder. Debemos estar preparados para que no todos los estados acojan la integración, pero en última instancia sólo importa la voluntad del Gran Enlace.
STH_dominion_flavour.5000.name: Expandir el Dominio
STH_dominion_flavour.5002.desc: Los líderes de [dominionAccessionState.GetName] han visto la sabiduría de unirse al poderoso Dominio para servir a los poderosos Fundadores. Este es otro fabuloso día en la historia del Dominio. Como dirían los jem'hadar, la victoria es la vida.
STH_dominion_flavour.5002.name: Nuevo miembro del Dominio
STH_dominion_flavour.5003.a: Muy bien, estás por tu cuenta.
STH_dominion_flavour.5003.b: ¿Podemos preguntar por qué ha decidido esto?
STH_dominion_flavour.5003.c.tooltip: Si el Dominio es convenientemente superior a su objetivo, se les obligará a convertirse en miembros del Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.5003.c: Si nadie rechaza el Dominio, se unirá por la fuerza.
STH_dominion_flavour.5003.desc: Saludos Fundador, soy [dominionAccessionStateRuler.GetName] representando los intereses de [dominionAccessionState.GetName], hemos revisado la membresía ofrecida y sentimos que no es para nosotros. Hay demasiadas diferencias entre nuestras culturas y nos preocupan varias de sus políticas y tácticas. Por favor, considere esto como un rechazo formal de su oferta.
STH_dominion_flavour.5003.name: Membresía del Dominio rechazada
STH_dominion_flavour.5004.desc: Saludos Fundador, en nombre de [dominionAccessionState.GetName], nos disculpamos formalmente con el benévolo Dominio por cualquier ofensa creada, nos equivocamos al rechazar la oferta de membresía y nos gustaría reanudar formalmente el proceso para unirnos al Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.5004.name: Membresía del Dominio aceptada
STH_dominion_flavour.5005.desc: Fundador, en nombre de [dominionAccessionState.GetName], somos un pueblo fuerte y orgulloso y no seremos intimidados a tomar decisiones que no funcionen en nuestro mejor interés. No importa cuántas naves jem'hadar veamos en nuestras fronteras, seguiremos siendo independientes.
STH_dominion_flavour.5005.name: Membresía del Dominio rechazada
STH_dominion_flavour.5050.desc: Los Fundadores sólo esperan lo mejor de sus dirigentes y hemos identificado a los siguientes líderes que están muy por debajo de nuestros altos estándares. Si nos deshacemos de esta paja, surgirá un reto y una mejor clase de científicos. \N - Los siguientes líderes han sido marcados como los más débiles en su campo \N - [dominion_chaff_leader_1.GetName] \N - [dominion_chaff_leader_2.GetName] \N - [dominion_chaff_leader_3.GetName] \N - [dominion_chaff_leader_4.GetName]. \Eliminar estos líderes nos dará un grupo más pequeño de mejores líderes, con un mayor incentivo para actuar.
STH_dominion_flavour.5050.name: Encontraremos científicos que puedan...
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.b.tooltip: El Dominio recibirá 5000 créditos de energía de nuestras reservas.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.b: Presentar energía para hacer funcionar sus mundos.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.c.tooltip: El Dominio recibirá 5000 minerales, 5000 aleaciones y 5000 alimentos de nuestros recursos.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.c: Regalar una suma de materiales de nuestras reservas.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.d.tooltip: Una de nuestras naves será desmantelada al azar para proporcionar materiales para construir una flota adicional para el Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.d: Construirles una flota de naves de guerra.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.desc: Nuestra pertenencia a la poderosa familia del Dominio tiene un precio, como leales servidores de los Fundadores estamos obligados a rendir homenaje a su poderío y presentarles una ofrenda de agradecimiento por su protección y la paz que supone formar parte del poderoso Dominio. \N - Hay una serie de artículos que podríamos complacerles y mantener a los Jem'Hadar fuera de nuestros planetas.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.e.tooltip: La base estelar dentro de [tribute_system.GetName] será transferida al Dominio junto con los planetas y recursos que haya en ella.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.f.tooltip: No se hará ningún tributo al Dominio y viviremos con las consecuencias de esa decisión.
STH_dominion_flavour.6001.name: Homenaje a los fundadores
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.a: Este es el orden de las cosas.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_01: Como debe ser con el orden de las cosas, los sólidos de [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] nos han presentado una ofrenda en alabanza de todo lo que reciben del Dominio. Han rendido tributo al poder y la majestad del Dominio con una ofrenda de réditos de energía para mantener la maquinaria del estado en movimiento.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_02: Como debe ser con el orden de las cosas, los sólidos de [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] nos han presentado una ofrenda en alabanza de todo lo que reciben del Dominio. Han rendido tributo al poder y la majestuosidad del Dominio con una ofrenda de ecursos valiosos para mantener la maquinaria del estado en movimiento.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_03: Como debe ser con el orden de las cosas, los sólidos de [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] han puesto su tiempo y esfuerzo en entregarnos una flota de buques de guerra para complementar nuestras flotas financiadas y entregadas desde sus propios astilleros. \La nueva flota nos será presentada en los próximos días.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_04: Como debe ser con el orden de las cosas, los sólidos de [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] han entregado uno de sus sistemas, [dominion_member_tribute_system1.GetName] a nuestra Vorta para que lo administre - junto con toda la riqueza y las instalaciones militares que vienen con él.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_05: Uno de nuestros mundos miembros, [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] se niega a pagarnos el respeto y el tributo que se nos debe por la protección y la seguridad que se deriva de estar dentro de la familia del Dominio. Como consecuencia directa de este acto de falta de respeto, nuestras tropas jem'hadar han destruido una de sus naves como recordatorio de quiénes son sus amos.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_06: Uno de nuestros mundos miembros, [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] se niega a pagarnos el respeto y el tributo que se nos debe por la protección y la seguridad que supone estar dentro de la familia del Dominio. Como consecuencia directa de este acto de falta de respeto, nuestras naves jem'hadar abrieron fuego contra uno de sus mundos como recordatorio de su deber con el Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_07: Uno de nuestros mundos miembros, [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] se niega a pagarnos el respeto y el tributo que se nos debe por la protección y la seguridad que supone estar dentro de la familia del Dominio. Como consecuencia directa de este acto de falta de respeto, uno de nuestros infiltrados mutantes ha matado a su gobernante, veremos si su sustituto nos rinde el respeto que nos corresponde.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.desc_08: Uno de nuestros mundos miembros, [dominion_member_tribute_country1.GetName] se niega a pagarnos el respeto y el tributo que se nos debe por la protección y la seguridad que supone estar dentro de la familia del Dominio. El representante vorta en su mundo natal les ha recordado su responsabilidad con el Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.6002.name: Una ofrenda de uno de nuestros mundos miembros
STH_dominion_flavour.6003.desc: Nuestro administrador vorta nos transmite su agradecimiento por nuestro amable tributo a los fundadores y nos promete la continua protección y apoyo de los benevolentes señores del Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.6003.name: Un homenaje a los Fundadores
STH_dominion_flavour.6004.desc: Cuando se nos convoca a la cámara de audiencias para reunirnos con nuestra representante vorta, ella nos dice en términos inequívocos que el castigo que hemos recibido a manos del Dominio es sólo una muestra de la furia de los Fundadores y que debemos recordar nuestras obligaciones con la familia del Dominio.
STH_dominion_flavour.6004.name: Un homenaje a los Fundadores
STH_dominion_flavour.6006.desc: En lo alto de la superficie de [member_capital_world.GetName], el planeta capital del [dominion_member_tribute_shipbuilder.GetName]§, se dan los toques finales a las nuevas naves de guerra del Dominio, fabricadas con los mejores recursos de [dominion_member_tribute_shipbuilder.GetName] y presentadas al Dominio en agradecimiento por la protección brindada.
STH_dominion_flavour.6006.name: Un homenaje a los Fundadores
STH_dominion_flavour.6050.desc: The Ketracel White shortages befalling The Dominon are becoming increasingly problematic. It is clear that we will have to take decisive action, otherwise the shortages will result in complete loss of control over our Jem'Hadar forces within a matter of months.
STH_dominion_flavour.6050.name: Serious Ketracel White Shortages
STH_dominion_flavour.6050.z: We shall trust in the Founders.
STH_dominion_flavour.6052.desc:
As feared our supply of Ketracel White has now reached critical levels, with Vorta reporting outages across the Dominion. 

Our Jem'Hadar population is rapidly sucomming to the effects of Ketracel White withdrawal in greater numbers, growing increasingly violent before dying a painful, but unfortunate death. 

To ensure the safety of the Founders all remaining Jem'Hadar must be purged.
STH_dominion_flavour.6052.name: Critical Ketracel White Shortage
STH_dominion_flavour.6070.desc: Being a Dominion Member is the ultimate honour for a solid, to serve the Founders should be the goal of all states. \n\nPromote one of our vassals to a fully-fledged Dominion Member with all the perks that come with that.
STH_dominion_flavour.6070.name: Promote a Vassal State
STH_dominion_story.1.desc: A thought has spread throughout the Great Link: to understand the Solids we must live as them again. By sending a hundred of our spawn out into the galaxy, they may return in due course with invaluable information on the threats that could affect our people.
STH_dominion_story.1.name: The Hundred
STH_dominion_story.100.desc: The survey of [From.GetName] is complete. Initial indications are confirmed - nothing unusual has been detected.
STH_dominion_story.100.name: Anomalous Substance
STH_dominion_story.101.desc_01:
While surveying [From.GetName], [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName]'s science officer has detected an anomalous morphogenic fluid pooled at the bottom of a natural crevice on the planet's northern hemisphere. 

It appears to exhibit some capacity for independent movement, however full analysis will require the facilities aboard the [Root.GetFleetName]. 

A substantial effort will be required to safely penetrate a naturally shielded layer of rock preventing easier extraction.
STH_dominion_story.101.desc_02:
While surveying [From.GetName], [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName]'s science officer has detected a morphogenic fluid pooled at the bottom of a natural crevice on the planet's eastern hemisphere, displaying properties similar to juvenile changelings encountered elsewhere in the galaxy. 

It appears to exhibit some capacity for independent movement, however full analysis will require the facilities aboard the [Root.GetFleetName]. 

A substantial effort will be required to safely penetrate a naturally shielded layer of rock preventing easier extraction.
STH_dominion_story.101.desc_03:
While surveying [From.GetName], [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName]'s science officer has detected a morphogenic fluid pooled at the bottom of a natural crevice on the planet's western hemisphere, displaying properties similar to the Founders of the Dominion. 

It appears to exhibit some capacity for independent movement, however full analysis will require the facilities aboard the [Root.GetFleetName]. 

A substantial effort will be required to safely penetrate a naturally shielded layer of rock preventing easier extraction.
STH_dominion_story.101.desc_04:
While surveying [From.GetName], the [Root.GetFleetName] has detected a morphogenic fluid pooled at the bottom of a natural crevice on the planet's southern hemisphere, displaying properties similar to honoured Founders. 

It appears to exhibit some capacity for independent movement, however full analysis to determine it's godhood will require the facilities aboard the [Root.GetFleetName]. 

A substantial effort will be required to safely penetrate a naturally shielded layer of rock preventing easier extraction.
STH_dominion_story.101.name: Anomalous Substance
STH_dominion_story.102.d: Return the Founder to the Great Link.
STH_dominion_story.102.desc_01: The anomalous morphogenic fluid has been safely brought aboard the [Root.GetFleetName]. [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] quickly determines that the substance is incomparable to anything discovered before, seeming to react to the various scanning techniques employed toward it. \n\nThe resources available aboard ship are insufficient to proceed with study.
STH_dominion_story.102.desc_02: The anomalous morphogenic fluid has been safely brought aboard the [Root.GetFleetName] and is confirmed to be a juvenile changeling. \n\nThe resources available aboard ship are insufficient to proceed with the tutoring the infant would require in order to learn how to interact with non-changelings.
STH_dominion_story.102.desc_03:
The anomalous morphogenic fluid has been safely brought aboard the [Root.GetFleetName] and is confirmed to be a juvenile changeling. 

The resources available aboard ship are insufficient to proceed with the tutoring the infant would require in order to learn how to interact with non-changelings. 

[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] worries about a potential military response should [changeling_empire.GetName] be alerted to the presence of the changeling aboard a [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName] vessel.
STH_dominion_story.102.desc_04: The loyal servants of the Founders aboard the [Root.GetFleetName] are truly blessed, as the morphogenic fluid is confirmed to be of a kin with the gods.
STH_dominion_story.102.name: Anomalous Substance
STH_dominion_story.105.desc.borg: While surveying [From.GetName], [Root.GetFleetName] has detected an anomalous morphogenic fluid pooled at the bottom of a natural crevice on the planet's northern hemisphere. \n\nIt appears to exhibit some capacity for independent movement, however full analysis will require the further analysis.
STH_dominion_story.105.name: Anomalous Substance
STH_dominion_story.110.desc_01: Facilities on [Root.Capital.GetName] have made some progress understanding the properties of the morphogenic fluid. It appears to contain neural-like properties in a highly distributed topology. \n\nExposure to various electromagnetic stimuli could be one path to a more fully analysis, however the equipment required is not standard issue.
STH_dominion_story.110.desc_02: Facilities on [Root.Capital.GetName] have made some progress eliciting a response from the infant changeling. It appears to have developed its neural-like properties to a level sufficient to be aware of its surroundings. \n\nExposure to various electromagnetic stimuli could help speed its development, however the equipment required is not standard issue.
STH_dominion_story.110.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.111.desc_01: Having been exposed to Kappa-band radiation, the morphogenic fluid has demonstrated what appears to be awareness of the stimuli. During the experiment the fluid appeared to create an elongated tendril which pushed the scientist conducting the experiment away from their console. \n\nWith the radiation removed, the fluid returned to its original state. Researchers believe the fluid to be a life form, and recommend bringing in a team of xenobiologists to complete the study.
STH_dominion_story.111.desc_02: Having been exposed to Kappa-band radiation, the changeling infant has demonstrated its first signs of awareness toward the stimuli. During the experiment the changeling created an elongated tendril which pushed the scientist conducting the experiment away from their console. \n\nResearchers believe it is now time to bring in a team of xenobiologists to complete the next stage of the changeling's development.
STH_dominion_story.111.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.113.desc_01: The morphogenic fluid has been confirmed as a lifeform after it appeared to reform itself into an imperfect replica of the lead xenobiologist assigned to the project. \n\nThe being appears to be trying to communicate with the research staff. The project overseer has requested the assignment of a xeno anthropological team.
STH_dominion_story.113.desc_02: The changeling has progressed well, having form itself into an imperfect replica of the lead xenobiologist assigned to the project. \n\nThe infant appears to be trying to communicate with the research staff. The project overseer has requested the assignment of a xeno anthropological team.
STH_dominion_story.113.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.114.desc_01: The lead xenoanthropologist assigned to the changeling - a term coined by the spouse of the project lead - has successfully taught the being to communicate verbally. Having formed itself into crude representation of a [Root.GetSpeciesName], it has begun to question its position in [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] society.
STH_dominion_story.114.desc_02: The lead xenoanthropologist assigned to the changeling has successfully taught the being to communicate verbally. Having formed itself into crude representation of a [Root.GetSpeciesName], it has begun to question its position in [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] society.
STH_dominion_story.114.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.120.desc: [changeling_empire.GetName] acknowledges and welcomes your actions on this matter.
STH_dominion_story.120.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.121.a: Perhaps some Solids can be trusted.
STH_dominion_story.121.desc: The [From.GetName] has returned an infant Founder to the [Root.GetName]!
STH_dominion_story.121.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.130.a: We ask only to cover our costs.
STH_dominion_story.130.b: Surely a modest reward is in order?
STH_dominion_story.130.c: We know how much you value the changeling!
STH_dominion_story.130.d: You misunderstand, this is our gift...
STH_dominion_story.130.desc: You dare to attempt to blackmail us? What do you expect out of this?
STH_dominion_story.130.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.131.a: It is a price worth paying.
STH_dominion_story.131.desc: This is [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName]. We have recently recovered what appears to be an infant changeling. \n\nIn order to return it to its people, we would request a small amount of compensation for our efforts - 100 £ and 100 £.
STH_dominion_story.131.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.132.a: It is a price worth paying.
STH_dominion_story.132.desc: This is [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName]. We have recently recovered what appears to be an infant changeling. \n\nIn order to return it to its people, we would expect a modest reward for our help in the matter - 250 £ and 250 £.
STH_dominion_story.132.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.133.a: It is a price worth paying.
STH_dominion_story.133.desc:
This is [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName]. We have recently recovered what appears to be an infant changeling. 

In order to return it to its people, we would expect a substantial reward for our help in the matter - 500 £ and 500 £. 

We know how much the changeling means to you...
STH_dominion_story.133.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.134.a: Perhaps some Solids can be trusted.
STH_dominion_story.134.desc: This is [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName]. We have recently recovered what appears to be an infant changeling. \n\nIn order to facilitate good relations between our peoples, we will deliver it to a location of your designation.
STH_dominion_story.134.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.135.desc: [changeling_empire.GetName] acknowledges and welcomes your actions on this matter.
STH_dominion_story.135.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.136.desc: [changeling_empire.GetName] agrees to your request but make no mistake, you have our... attention.
STH_dominion_story.136.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.137.desc: [changeling_empire.GetName] rejects your pathetic demands. We will annihilate your fleets ship by ship until you return what is ours.
STH_dominion_story.137.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.138.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.139.desc: With the rejection of the [Root.GetName]'s offer to return the changeling infant, several research times have requested permission to study it as they attempt to teach it to communicate.
STH_dominion_story.139.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.140.desc: The Founder discovered on [From.GetName] has been returned to the Great Link where it belongs.
STH_dominion_story.140.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.150.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am [changeling_leader.GetName] - the 'changeling' your scientists have recently guided along to sentience. I am grateful to the [Root.GetSpeciesName] people for having raised me and taught me how to master my shapeshifting abilities. \n\nI would very much wish to serve in any capacity I can.
STH_dominion_story.150.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.151.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am [changeling_leader.GetName] - the 'changeling' your scientists have recently prodded along to sentience. I am grateful to the [Root.GetSpeciesName] people for having taught me how to master my shapeshifting abilities. \n\nI am prepared to serve in a capacity that fits my skills.
STH_dominion_story.151.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.152.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am [changeling_leader.GetName] - the 'changeling' your scientists have recently prodded along to sentience. While I am grateful to the [Root.GetSpeciesName] people for having taught me how to master my shapeshifting abilities, I feel it is now time for me to explore the galaxy on my own. There is much to experience!
STH_dominion_story.152.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.153.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am [changeling_leader.GetName] - the 'changeling' your scientists have recently prodded along to sentience. While I am grateful to the [Root.GetSpeciesName] people for having taught me how to master my shapeshifting abilities, I feel it is now time for me to return to my own people. The [changeling_empire.GetName] will return me to my home.
STH_dominion_story.153.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.154.desc: I am [changeling_leader.GetName], and I believe I am a Founder. \n\nThe [FromFrom.GetName] raised me to sentience, but is now time for me to embrace the Great Link!
STH_dominion_story.154.name: The Changeling
STH_dominion_story.160.desc: [From.GetName] has improved [From.GetHerHis] shape shifting skills significantly over [From.GetHerHis] time in the [Root.GetName]. [From.GetName] now feels comfortable enough replicating a typical [Root.GetSpeciesAdj]'s appearance.
STH_dominion_story.160.name: [From.GetName]
STH_dominion_story.2.a: Separate one into a hundred and spread them amongst the stars.
STH_dominion_story.2.desc: The Hundred have been separated from the Link and sent out into the galaxy. A hundred capsules have been dispersed in every direction. \n\nThe Link yearns now for the day when it will be made whole again - though it recognises the value the project offers.
STH_dominion_story.2.name: The Hundred
STH_dominion_story.201.c: They pose no threat to the Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.201.desc: Wise Founder, we have picked up long range sightings of vessels from the Alpha Quadrant coming through the wormhole anomaly in the Idran System. These advances bring them closer to Dominion held territory , it appears they are unaware that we are observing their movements.Our Jem'Hadar forces could launch a number of tactical strikes against these ships and spread the warning that the Gamma Quadrant is out of bounds.
STH_dominion_story.201.name: Incursion into the Gamma Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.202.desc: It is time to review our policy on the continued incursions into the Gamma Quadrant, we can target the vessels using the Idran anomaly or we can invest in other efforts, the decision is yours wise Founder.
STH_dominion_story.202.name: Review Incursion Policy
STH_dominion_story.204.desc: Whilst engaging in operations within the Gamma Quadrant, one of our ships the [dominion_fleet_target_1.GetName] was attacked by unknown assailants, the ship took light damage in the hit and run attack and was unable to get a solid scan of the ships that attacked. One observer described 'bug-shaped' fighters that moved with dazzling speed and coordination.
STH_dominion_story.204.name: Vessel damaged whilst in the Gamma Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.205.desc: Our Jem'Hadar fighters were able to inflict damage against the ships from the [dominion_fleet_target_1.owner.GetName] whilst they were out exploring close to Dominion borders. As per the plan we left the ship intact and with survivors to ensure the message that the Gamma Quadrant is off limits.
STH_dominion_story.205.name: Enemy Ship Ambushed
STH_dominion_story.206.b: We must uncover the source of these attacks.
STH_dominion_story.206.desc: Whilst engaging in operations within the Gamma Quadrant, one of our ships the [dominion_fleet_target_1.GetName] was attacked by unknown assailants, the ship took significant damage in the hit and run attack and was unable to get a solid scan of the ships that attacked. Our sensors were badly damaged in the initial attack but were able to confirm the attackers used Polaran weaponry. The intent of the attack was clear, this was a warning to stay out of the Gamma Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.206.name: Vessel damaged whilst in the Gamma Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.207.desc: Our Jem'Hadar fighters were able to inflict major damage against the ships from the [dominion_fleet_target_2.owner.GetName] as part of a hit and run attack against their fleets bordering our space. As per the plan we left the ship intact and with survivors to ensure the message that the Gamma Quadrant is off limits.
STH_dominion_story.207.name: Enemy Ship Ambushed
STH_dominion_story.208.a: We cannot let these attacks continue.
STH_dominion_story.208.desc: Whilst engaging in operations within the Gamma Quadrant, one of our ships the [dominion_fleet_target_1.GetName] was attacked by unknown assailants, the ship took significant damage in the hit and run attack and was unable to get a solid scan of the ships that attacked. Our sensors were badly damaged in the initial attack but were able to confirm the attackers used Polaran weaponry. The intent of the attack was clear, this was a warning to stay out of the Gamma Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.208.name: Vessel destroyed whilst on patrol in the Gamma Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.209.desc: Our Jem'Hadar fighters have inflicted the ultimate punishment on [dominion_fleet_target_2.owner.GetName] for daring to trespass beyond the wormhole and into the domain of the Dominion, the solids will think twice before continuing their advances into the Gamma Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.209.name: Enemy Ship Destroyed
STH_dominion_story.210.desc_01: Since making our first trip through the wormhole discovered in the Bajoran system we have been attacked numerous times by an unknown foe including the destruction of one of our ships with the loss of all crew onboard. This attacker knows the territory and must be looking to ward us off further exploration within the Gamma Quadrant. We have sufficient evidence from the attacks to begin to piece together the clues and understand who is targeting our ships.
STH_dominion_story.210.desc_02: Since making our first trip through the wormhole discovered in the Bajoran system we have been attacked numerous times by an unknown foe. One that knows the territory and is looking to ward us off further exploration within the Gamma Quadrant. We have sufficient evidence from the attacks to begin to piece together the clues and understand who is targeting our ships.
STH_dominion_story.210.name: Numerous ships missing or damaged in the Gamma Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.211.a: Inform the Dominion these attacks will not be tolerated.
STH_dominion_story.211.b: Make no further gestures towards the Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.211.c: Promise to stay out of the Gamma Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.211.desc_01: After analysing the sensor logs and first hand accounts from those involved we have identified the attackers as the Dominion, a powerful interstellar state in the Gamma Quadrant. Technologically advanced and hostile the attacks were clearly meant as a threat to our ongoing exploration and advancement beyond the terminus of the Bajoran Wormhole.
STH_dominion_story.211.desc_02: After analysing the sensor logs and first hand accounts from those involved we have identified the attackers as an interstellar state known locally as the Dominion, reports and feedback from other friendlier species all state that the Dominion are a power to treat with caution. Their attacks are a warning that they will not tolerate further ventures close to their borders.
STH_dominion_story.211.name: The Dominion behind the attacks
STH_dominion_story.212.a: All fleets must travel at alert status.
STH_dominion_story.212.desc: Despite sifting through the logs, sensor readings and accounts from those involved we were unable to identify who has been attacking our fleets, we must continue to maintain extreme caution whilst on the far side of the wormhole.
STH_dominion_story.212.name: Unable to uncover the attackers
STH_dominion_story.213.desc: It looks like the [dominionTarget.owner.GetName] have finally discovered that we have been targeting their ships, making further ambushes against them impossible. We await a formal response from them.
STH_dominion_story.213.name: Our attacks discovered
STH_dominion_story.214.desc: It seems that the invaders have more teeth than expected and they have reacted angrily and with a lack of judgement we have come to expect from the Solids. We can expect further incursions into our surrounding spaces and so we must be prepared to meet this with our own show of strength, for this is the only way they will learn.
STH_dominion_story.214.name: Angry response from Alpha Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.215.desc: As predicted by the Vorta the Alpha Quadrant trespassers have reacted cautiously to the discovery that we have been targeting their ships. It is unlikely that further hit and run attacks will be successful. However relations between our two states remains tense.
STH_dominion_story.215.name: Cautious response from Alpha Quadrant Race
STH_dominion_story.216.a: We will not be bound by such an agreement.
STH_dominion_story.216.desc: Our efforts to keep the Alpha Quadrant races out of our territories and potential expansion sectors of the Dominion has been successful. We have received a message offering a truce, the [dominionTarget.owner.GetName] will no longer travel beyond the anomaly they call the Bajoran Wormhole and we will not venture into the Alpha Quadrant. Breaching this agreement will be seen as an act of hostility.
STH_dominion_story.216.name: Offer for a truce received
STH_dominion_story.217.desc: In a message from a Vorta representative of the Dominion, they have agreed to the truce and restrictions on either side travelling via the wormhole in the Bajoran system. Any further travel whilst the agreement is in place will result in a resumption of hostilities and a worsening of the relationship between both sides.
STH_dominion_story.217.name: Truce accepted
STH_dominion_story.218.desc: The Dominion have rejected our offer and in a statement by the Vorta representative they state that all ships must return to the Alpha Quadrant immediately and remain on that side of the wormhole. However the Dominion will not restrict themselves from further possibilities within the Alpha and Beta Quadrants and we would be wise to consider joining the mighty and benevolent Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.218.name: Truce rejected
STH_dominion_story.219.desc: We have passed notice to the races of the Alpha & Beta Quadrants that we no longer tolerate their presence in the Gamma Quadrant. We must live up to our promise that the might of the Dominion will be maintained.
STH_dominion_story.219.name: Truce rejected
STH_dominion_story.223.desc: Mighty Founder, it is with great regret that we must inform the Great Link that the truce arranged with the Solids from the Alpha Quadrant has been broken, one of their ships has travelled through the wormhole into space bordering the Dominion territory. Our trust in the [dominionTarget.owner.GetName] has been broken and they have made a foolish mistake in believing they can challenge the might of the Dominion and the wisdom of the Founders.
STH_dominion_story.223.name: Truce broken!
STH_dominion_story.224.desc: Oh wise Founder, our long range scans have picked up vessels from an empire calling themselves the Cardassian Union having recently passed via the anomaly in the Idran system. Our intel confirms what we have suspected, the Cardassians are a proud, yet weak species who would be a prime target to be absorbed into the might of the Dominion giving us a key strategic foothold into the Alpha Quadrant. What do our god's command us to do?
STH_dominion_story.224.name: Contact from the Cardassian Union
STH_dominion_story.225.desc: [Root.GetTitle][Root.GetRulerName] we have been approached by a Vorta from the Dominion on the far side of the Bajoran wormhole, they are offering an opportunity to build further relationships with the Cardassian Union. They appreciate our strength and power and believe we would be worthy allies and invite a further bond which could make both states stronger.
STH_dominion_story.225.name: Contact from The Dominion
STH_dominion_story.226.desc: The Cardassians have responded favourably towards our contact and our suggestions, we should continue to build on this opening and look to further exploit their arrogance and pride. In time we may need their meager offerings as a staging ground for further advances into the Alpha Quadrant to bring the rule of the Dominion over this space.
STH_dominion_story.226.name: Acceptance from the Cardassians
STH_dominion_story.227.desc: It looks like Cardassian pride has prevented them accepting our offer of friendship and support, this is disappointing, but there will be further opportunities to take advantage of their weakness and bring them closer to the rule of the Founders.
STH_dominion_story.227.name: Rejection from the Cardassians
STH_dominion_story.230.desc: Praetor, our spies monitoring activity in the Gamma Quadrant are growing increasingly concerned about the rising threat of the Dominion and their Founder masters. Their activities and the potential threat they now pose to the Alpha and Beta Quadrants cannot be ignored, we should offer [dominionTarget.GetName] one of our cloaking techs to better allow them to investigate the threat. \n\nThis also serves the purpose of providing the Dominion with a focus outside of the Star Empire...
STH_dominion_story.230.name: Tal Shiar Report
STH_dominion_story.231.b: We do not need your help.
STH_dominion_story.231.desc_01: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] we bring you an offer from your friends in the Romulan Empire, we are aware of the potential threat from the Dominion that you have been dealing with and we offer you our support and despite the treaty banning your use of cloaking devices we would present you the tech to equip on your warships to confront the Dominion. In return we ask for reseach you may obtain and that one of our officers over sees the operations.
STH_dominion_story.231.desc_02: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] we bring you an offer from your friends in the Romulan Empire, we are aware of the potential threat from the Dominion that you have been dealing with and we offer you our support and the use of our cloaking devices, to be equipped on your warships to confront the Dominion. In return we ask for research you may obtain and that one of our officers oversees the operations.
STH_dominion_story.231.name: Support from the Romulans
STH_dominion_story.232.desc: Reports are coming into the Link that there have been more incursions into our space from the solids on the far side of the Idran anomaly. It is now increasingly clear that they do not respect our borders or fear our threats. \n\nIt is time we lured them into a situation they cannot refuse and demonstrate the true power of the Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.232.name: Encroaching Threat from the Solids
STH_dominion_story.233.desc: Greetings I am [research_gamma_leader.GetName] over the last few months we have been sending probes out through the Bajoran Wormhole to investigate what's out there. \n\nWe've had time to analyse the results and have come up with a number of places that we would like to send a small expedition to investigate further.
STH_dominion_story.233.name: New data from the Gamma Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.234.desc: It appears that the Solids in charge of the major Alpha Quadrant races are too cowardly to take our bait, we shall have to try a more direct approach.
STH_dominion_story.234.name: No sign of the Alpha Quadrant
STH_dominion_story.235.desc: Our listening posts have detected movement from the Idran Anomaly, it appears the solids are too greedy for new chances to encroach on our territory. The Vorta have confirmed that the trap has been set and the Jem'Hadar lay in wait for their prey. \n\nSoon they will learn to fear the Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.235.name: The trap has been sprung
STH_dominion_story.236.a: We've lost comms with the team.
STH_dominion_story.236.desc: Science officer [research_gamma_leader.GetName] reporting from [idran_moon_location.GetName], our small team has deployed to the planet's surface and are investigating the ruins of a long-lost society, the ruins seem to date back thousands of years. The local plant life is extremely dense and we have collected a number of... hold on our motion sensors have just gone off... detecting movement at the edge of camp... <STATIC.... TRANSMISSION ENDED>.
STH_dominion_story.236.name: Inbound Science Report
STH_dominion_story.238.desc: Our failure to complete the mission has wasted a number of key resources dedicated to exploration of the Gamma Quadrant. The Science Council has decided to hold of on any further expeditions for the moment.
STH_dominion_story.238.name: Mission Incomplete
STH_dominion_story.239.desc: It seems the Solids have no desire to challenge us any further and are making no move to rescue their captured companions. Perhaps the message has been delivered.
STH_dominion_story.239.name: Cowards
STH_dominion_story.240.desc:
<Red Alert, intruder detected> 

 I am [jemhadar_gamma_leader.GetName] and I speak for the Dominion. We have captured your science team for the crime of trespassing on our territory, they are now prisoners of the Dominion and will be executed for their crimes. 

Further attempts to travel beyond the anomaly will be seen as an act of hostility and met with a show of force, this will be your only warning.
STH_dominion_story.240.e: Abandon the scientist to their fate.
STH_dominion_story.240.name: The Jem'Hadar
STH_dominion_story.241.a: Move on before the Jem'Hadar Show up.
STH_dominion_story.241.desc:
As our fleet arrives at the last known destination of the Science team a quick scan of the planet reveals no signs of life, the [Root.GetName] camp appears to have been ransacked. 

Further investigations shows signs of an attempted escape that was unsuccessful, the bodies of our officers left where they fell. 

Back in orbit our sensors detect signs of debris, we must presume this is all that remains of the science craft sent to study this planet.
STH_dominion_story.241.name: Science Team Fail to Escape
STH_dominion_story.242.desc: The Vorta in charge of the prisoners from the Alpha Quadrant has reported that they have attempted to escape, and during their attempt, they were shot and killed by the shrouded Jem'Hadar who were guarding our facility.
STH_dominion_story.242.name: Science Team Fail to Escape
STH_dominion_story.243.desc: This is [research_gamma_rescue_leader] reporting in, we have reached the last known location of the research team and are detecting signs of a struggle on the planet below. It looks like the Science team have escaped their captors. \n\nWe have managed to get them back to their vessel, however my tactical officer has detected warp signatures inbound, the scientists will not survive against the Jem'Hadar for long.
STH_dominion_story.243.name: The Search
STH_dominion_story.244.desc: Despite an intense battle, our fleet was able to fend off the attack by the Jem'Hadar who fought down to the last ship. We should look to return to safe space and re-group. \n\nHold on we are picking up a damaged Jem'Hadar fighter making a direct run for one of our ships.
STH_dominion_story.244.name: Jem'Hadar Ambushed Defeated
STH_dominion_story.245.desc: We have lost contact with our fleet sent into the Gamma Quadrant, it appears that they were engaged and defeated by an ambush orchestrated by the Dominion. \n\nWe should take stock of the damage and begin plans to fortify our borders.
STH_dominion_story.245.name: The Search
STH_dominion_story.246.desc:
The Jem'Hadar fighter makes a destructive run towards [jemhadar_target_ship.GetName], the vessel's Warp engines are still damaged from the battle, and response time a fraction too slow. 

The Jem'Hadar ship collides with [jemhadar_target_ship.GetName] destroying both ships in a firey explosion. 

Is there no limit to what the Jem'Hadar will do in order to serve the Dominion?
STH_dominion_story.246.name: The Search
STH_dominion_story.247.a: They will come to fear us.
STH_dominion_story.247.desc: Our Jem'Hadar forces successfully engaged the Alpha Quadrant forces inflicting severe casualties on them, they have since retreated back to their side of the galaxy.
STH_dominion_story.247.name: Ambush
STH_dominion_story.248.desc: The science team engages their warp engines and escapes the ongoing battle, it is clear the tide of the battle is not going our way as the Jem'Hadar forces continue to attack the fleet. \n\nThe Captain orders a full retreat and as the fleet turns to escape, one ship appears to be suffering from damage to their port nacelle, sensing this weakness a Jem'Hadar fighter quickly engages in a suicide run and collides with the ship destroying both vessels in a bright blaze of light.
STH_dominion_story.248.name: The Search
STH_dominion_story.249.desc: Our Jem'Hadar forces successfully engaged the Alpha Quadrant forces inflicting severe casualties on them, they have since retreated back to their side of the galaxy. As they attempted to flee our loyal Jem'Hadar soldiers taught them a lesson they will not soon forget.
STH_dominion_story.249.name: Ambush
STH_dominion_story.301.desc_01: Our first step in conquering the Alpha Quadrant is capturing and securing the anomaly also known as the Bajoran Wormhole. \n\nOur spies within the Alpha Quadrant have confirmed that the system is owned by a the [bajor_overlord_owned.GetName] who are the overlords to a primitive race known as the Bajorans. Our Jem'Hadar forces are confident that they could best this race in open combat, however the Vorta advise reaching out in an attempt to negotiate access.
STH_dominion_story.301.desc_02: Our first step in conquering the Alpha Quadrant is capturing and securing the anomaly also known as the Bajoran Wormhole. \n\nOur spies within the Alpha Quadrant have confirmed that the system is owned by a primitive race of religious fanatics known as the Bajorans. Their military might is nothing in comparison to the force of our Jem'Hadar warriors. We should contact them and demand access via the wormhole.
STH_dominion_story.301.desc_03: Our first step in conquering the Alpha Quadrant is capturing and securing the anomaly also known as the Bajoran Wormhole. \n\nOur Founders within the Alpha Quadrant have confirmed that the system is owned by a government who call themselves the United Federation of Planets an organisation that pride themselves in interfering in affairs that should not concern them. They would make a fine challenge for the Jem'Hadar, but we should open communications to avoid a war on multiple fronts.
STH_dominion_story.301.desc_04: Our envoys to the Cardassian Union confirm that they have already secured the anomaly within the Bajoran system, which will give us access to the Alpha Quadrant and make an important staging ground for our assault.
STH_dominion_story.301.name: Apocalypse Rising
STH_dominion_story.302.a: What do you want from us Vorta?
STH_dominion_story.302.desc_01: Greetings [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] from your neighbours in the Gamma Quadrant. We offer hearty greetings and respect from the Dominion, as you maybe aware our valued friends the Cardassians have recently been attacked without provocation and have asked us to speak with [cardassian_dom_enemy.GetName] to help resolve any animosity. All we request is access via your territory and should you like an invitation to join our mighty family.
STH_dominion_story.302.desc_02: Greetings [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] from your neighbours in the Gamma Quadrant. We offer hearty greetings and respect from the Dominion, as you maybe aware our valued friends the Cardassians have recently been attacked without provocation and have asked us to speak with [cardassian_dom_enemy.GetName] to help resolve any animosity, we are sure an empire as powerful as yourselves can appreciate the damage done to the Cardassian pride. All we request is free access via your territory and should you like what you see in the Dominion, you are welcome to apply to join our ranks.
STH_dominion_story.302.desc_03: Greetings [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] from your neighbours in the Gamma Quadrant. We offer hearty greetings and respect from the Dominion and offer a warm hand of friendship to the United Federation of Planets, as you maybe aware our valued friends the Cardassians have recently been attacked without provocation and have asked us to speak with [cardassian_dom_enemy.GetName] to help resolve any animosity, we are sure an empire as powerful as yourselves can appreciate the damage done to the Cardassian pride. \n\nAll we request is free access via your territory and should you like what you see in the Dominion, you are welcome to apply to join our ranks.
STH_dominion_story.302.desc_04: Greetings to our Cardassian members, we are ready to being our offensive against [cardassian_dom_enemy.GetName], we are pleased that you have already secured access via the wormhole in the Bajoran system. Our forces will arrive shortly.
STH_dominion_story.302.f: You are not welcome in our space.
STH_dominion_story.302.name: Apocalypse Rising
STH_dominion_story.303.desc: [quadrant_invasion_gatekeeper.GetName] have agreed to become the newest members of the mighty Dominion. We have send teams to help integrate them into the Dominion. This gives us free access via the wormhole into the depths of the Alpha Quadrant. Our root to war is now open.
STH_dominion_story.303.name: [quadrant_invasion_gatekeeper.GetName] joins the Dominion
STH_dominion_story.304.desc: In a shock move [dominion_recruit.GetName] has joined the Dominion, which gives the Founders a key foothold into the Alpha Quadrant and access to reinforcements. Many experts believe this is the first step towards a large incursion into the Alpha and Beta Quadrants.
STH_dominion_story.304.name: [dominion_recruit.GetName] has joined the Dominion
STH_dominion_story.305.desc: Our Vorta diplomats have successfully been able secure us safe passage via the Wormhole in the Bajoran system. This will allow us to move our ships freely back and forth between the Alpha and Gamma Quadrants as the Jem'Hadar say, Victory is life.
STH_dominion_story.305.name: Passage through the wormhole granted
STH_dominion_story.306.b: We shall keep an eye on you.
STH_dominion_story.306.c: We do not believe your lies!
STH_dominion_story.306.desc: Greeting [Root.GetRulerTitle] you may have heard that our fleets have secured access to the Alpha Quadrant and you maybe concerned given your recent history with our ally Cardassia. We want to assure you our fleets are only here to provide protection and much needed morale support for our friends. \n\nWe mean you no hard and only wish to co-exist peacefully with our neighbours and friends on this side of the wormhole.
STH_dominion_story.306.name: A Time to Stand
STH_dominion_story.307.desc_01: It is pleasant to see that the Dominion mean no harm and come only with peaceful intentions, this news will provide reassuring comfort to those across our planets and particularly on [Root.capital_scope.GetName] who were concerned about a new major power on this side of the wormhole. \n\nAs a famous Terran once said, there shall be 'Peace for our time'.
STH_dominion_story.307.desc_02: The Vorta's claims have fooled no one, this build up of troops and ships heading to Cardassia is clearly the preamble to a full scale invasion. Whilst our diplomats parrot back pleasantries to the Dominion we must prepare our forces and gather any allies we can find. \n\nWar will be upon us soon.
STH_dominion_story.307.desc_03: Our clear calling out of the Dominions intentions have cut through all of the Vorta's lies and deception. We know war is inevitable and so do the Changelings, there is little point in pretending otherwise. We must gather our forces and prepare for battle. \n\nAs the Klingons say 'Today is a good day to die'.
STH_dominion_story.307.desc_04: Our Dominion allies have secured passage through the wormhole and are staging their forces ready to engage and defeat our enemies. The time for our revenge is at hand and Cardassia will be a force to be feared once again.
STH_dominion_story.307.name: A Time to Stand
STH_dominion_story.308.desc: The time has come, the uneasy truce between the powers of the Alpha Quadrant and the master of the Gamma Quadrant is at an end. It is time to announce our intent and launch a full scale invasion of the Alpha and Beta Quadrants to bring them under the control of the Dominion. All major powers on that side of the wormhole will be put on notice that they should submit to the might of the Founders. \n\nWar has come.
STH_dominion_story.308.name: A Sacrifice of Angels
