STH_dominion_story.309.a: Declare war to conquer the Alpha Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.309.desc: The Alpha Quadrant is rife for invasion and our fleets are ready to attack, we should look to secure the Bajoran wormhole regardless of any previous agreement as this would be key to ensuring that any reinforcements are available to us. We should be prepared that the powers of the Alpha Quadrant may band together to protect themselves, but they are no match to our superior forces. \n\nWe shall declare war on Cardassia's enemies and anyone blocking us from access to the Alpha Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.309.name: A Sacrifice of Angels
STH_dominion_story.310.desc: The standoff between the forces from the Gamma Quadrant and their Cardassian allies has come to an end with a declaration of War. The Dominion want control over all races across the quadrant and will not stop until that goal has been achieved. We must stand firm and hold back the tide, whilst our diplomats work in the background to drum up support from other empires on our side of the wormhole.
STH_dominion_story.310.name: Favour the bold
STH_dominion_story.311.desc: The time many have feared has come, the cold war between the Dominion and a number of key powers in the Alpha Quadrant has reached boiling point and full-scale war has been declared. Time will tell who shall come out on top.
STH_dominion_story.311.name: Favour the bold
STH_dominion_story.312.desc: The war continues to rage on, with both sides taking heavy losses. We have managed to bring a number of other empires to the negotiating table to join the war on our side. \n\nWe should focus on bringing at least one empire into the war to help defend the Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.312.name: Rocks and Shoals
STH_dominion_story.313.a: Join the war against the Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.313.c: Join the war on the Dominion's side.
STH_dominion_story.313.desc:
Hello, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. 

We reach out to you whilst in the depths of a battle for the future of the Alpha Quadrant against the combined forces of the Cardassian Union and the Dominion. We urgently request any assistance you can provide and remind everyone that the Dominion will not stop until they control the whole quadrant. 

This is our time to stand united.
STH_dominion_story.313.name: A Time to Stand
STH_dominion_story.314.desc: Our recent victory over the Cardassian Union appears to have been short lived. We now appear to be the target of the Cardassians new ally the Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.314.name: Cardassian revenge
STH_dominion_story.315.desc: The Dominion War has potentially hit a turning point as [dominion_war_joiner_ally.GetName] has entered The war against the Dominion. This could potentially shift the balance of the war for the quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.315.name: New particpants in the Dominion War
STH_dominion_story.316.desc: The Dominion War has potentially hit a turning point as [dominion_war_joiner_ally.GetName] has declined to join our war against the Dominion, leaving us to stand alone against our foe.
STH_dominion_story.316.name: Dominion War
STH_dominion_story.317.desc: Despite the rallying call to join the Dominion War, it seems that [dominion_war_joiner_ally.GetName] has been talking with the Dominion in the background and has decided to side with the Dominion forces against the Alpha Quadrant alliance.
STH_dominion_story.317.name: Betrayed!
STH_dominion_story.320.desc: Victory is ours! Our victory in the Dominion War will go down in history as a momentous victory for [Root.GetName] and we have brought peace and triumph to our section of space. Now is the time to mourn the losses and to ensure that this can never happen again.
STH_dominion_story.320.name: Dominion War Won
STH_dominion_story.321.desc: We have been defeated, despite the efforts of our forces we have suffered too many losses to continue the war. Our people will need to accept defeat and rebuild what we have lost.
STH_dominion_story.321.name: Dominion War Lost
STH_dominion_story.324.desc: Greetings, I am [selected_leader.GetName] the situation at the wormhole grows more desperate each day as the Dominion sends more and more troops through the wormhole to reinforce Cardassia. Soon we shall have lost any potential war before it even starts. However we have a 3rd option, mine the wormhole and prevent more troops reaching the Alpha Quadrant, it maybe our ownly hope.
STH_dominion_story.324.name: Mine the Wormhole?
STH_dominion_story.325.desc:
Greetings [Root.GetName] allies, great songs will be sung of the upcoming battles that we shall face as friends and the halls of Sto-vo-kor will be ready to celebrate the honoured dead. 

The changelings will wish they never set foot in the Alpha Quadrant! 

To War, for today is a good day to die.
STH_dominion_story.325.name: Message from the Klingons
STH_dominion_story.326.a: Today is a good day to die!
STH_dominion_story.326.desc:
Klingon Friends, your allies in the United Federation of Planets stands ready and able to defend you against the onslaught from the Gamma Quadrant. 

Together we shall push them back and stake a victory for freedom. 

Where you lead Starfleet will follow.
STH_dominion_story.326.name: Message from the Federation
STH_dominion_story.350.desc: With the clear favouritism being shown to [cardassia_jealous.GetName] over ourselves many within the Cardassian military are starting to chafe at life under the Dominion thumb. \n\nOur leaders resent the feeling of being second class citizens on our own planets and the promises presented by the Founders have yet to materialise. Is it time to rid ourselves of these overlords.
STH_dominion_story.350.name: Freedom for Cardassia
STH_dominion_story.351.desc: Resist today. Resist tomorrow. Resist until the last Dominion soldier has been driven from our soil. For all our Sons and Daughters.
STH_dominion_story.351.name: Time for a free Cardassia
STH_dominion_story.352.desc: Those arrogant fools on Cardassia have demanded to leave the Dominion. No one has ever had the audacity to demand such a thing and this insult must not be allowed to stand.
STH_dominion_story.352.name: Cardassians demand independence
STH_dominion_story.356.desc: The Dominion's defeat at the hands of the Alpha Quadrant alliance has resulted in the Founders and their Vorta lapdogs retreating back through the Bajoran Wormhole and away from Cardassian soil. \n\nOur future is once again in our hands.
STH_dominion_story.356.name: A free Cardassia
STH_dominion_story.357.desc:
The conditions involved in our defeat to the solids of the Alpha Quadrant mean that we must abandon our claim to the Cardassian worlds. 

Those fools on Cardassia have already proven themselves unworthy of our continued embrace as part of the Dominion and no doubt contributed to our defeat. 

We abandon them to their fate
STH_dominion_story.357.name: Abandon Cardassia
STH_dominion_story.360.desc: Our plans to expand our territory into the Alpha and Beta Quadrants have not progressed as the Founders would have liked, with stiffer resistance than expected from the major powers of the Quadrants. \n\nThe Founder's faith in the Cardassian Union is starting to dip and they are now pushing our Dominion forces to take direct control of Cardassian systems and infrastructure in order to better support the war.
STH_dominion_story.360.name: Alpha Quadrant Expansion
STH_dominion_story.361.a: We serve the Founders in all things.
STH_dominion_story.361.desc: [cardassian_union.GetRutlerTitle], we bring you greetings from your overlords in the Dominion, as no doubt you are aware the war continues, and this lack of victory alarms our glorious Founders. \n\nAs you know all worlds of the Dominion belong to the Founders and they have requested that a number of Cardassian systems and starbases are transferred under the direct control of the Vorta.
STH_dominion_story.361.name: The Dogs of War
STH_dominion_story.362.desc_01: Our efforts to defeat the Alpha Quadrant Alliance has been bolstered by our ability to comandeer the Cardassian facilities and put them to use building Dominion ships, however there is still more we could be doing and more efficiencies that the Cardassian's are costing us. We should look to take more facilities to boost our war time production and foothold into the Alpha Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.362.desc_02: Those fools within the Cardassian Union have harmed our war efforts further, not only did they reject our request, but their inability to coordinate and manage the war continues to allow the Allies a means to resist our assaults. \n\nWe must take hold of their facilities now.
STH_dominion_story.362.name: The Dogs of War
STH_dominion_story.363.a: We ... we will obey the will of the Founders.
STH_dominion_story.363.desc: [cardassian_union.ruler.GetName], the Founder's patience for the continued failure to have defeated the Alpha Quadrant Alliance is now grating on their tolerance levels. \n\nThese failures will not be allowed to continue, provide our forces with more access to your territories and shipyards and we will ensure this war ends in victory for the Dominion... and Cardassia.
STH_dominion_story.363.name: The Dogs of War
STH_dominion_story.364.desc_01: Our Vorta strategists have once again recommended further takeover of Cardassian owned space, we should also look at restricting their access to our military planning sessions in favour of other members. \n\nWe should also look at redistributing their resources towards the Vorta and Jem'Hadar. This is likely to cause some unrest, but they have shown no signs of resisting our control.
STH_dominion_story.364.desc_02: The Cardassians continue to resist our overlordship, had we not been at war these continued acts of insubordination would have been dealt with by our Jem'Hadar forces. Our continued appeasement of these fools will end in their destruction.
STH_dominion_story.364.name: The Dogs of War
STH_dominion_story.365.b: Cardassia will not stand for this.
STH_dominion_story.365.desc: Cardassia! You must understand that in order to win this war your sacrifices are needed. As the Jem'Hadar know, victory is life, and this is a lesson you Cardassians must accept if we are to be victorious. Once more we ask you to show your devotion to the cause and to the Founders will serve in all things.
STH_dominion_story.365.name: The Dogs of War
STH_dominion_story.370.desc:
With the clear favouritism being shown to [cardassia_jealous.GetName] over ourselves many within the Cardassian military are starting to chafe at life under the Dominion thumb. 

Our leaders resent the feeling of being second class citizens on our own planets and the promises presented by the Founders have yet to materialise and now they take more of our worlds as their own. 

This stops here, we must resist and free Cardassia!
STH_dominion_story.370.name: For Cardassia!
STH_dominion_story.372.a: Cardassia must rise up with us.
STH_dominion_story.372.desc:
Many Cardassians have turned their back on their Dominion masters and formed a group called the Cardassian Liberation Front, they have declared this message to all parties. 

Resist today. Resist tomorrow. Resist until the last Dominion soldier has been driven from our soil. For all our Sons and Daughters. 

They have reached out to us for support with the pledge to join us against the Dominion.
STH_dominion_story.372.name: Cardassia Turns on he Dominion
STH_dominion_story.376.desc: The quadrant has been left in ruins following the Dominion War, with millions dead and whole worlds left in ruin. The Liberation Front proved to be a valuable ally, to you during the war, we now ask for your support to take back control of the Cardassian Union and ensure that all vestiges of the Dominion are removed from my homeworld and our quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.376.name: What you leave behind
STH_dominion_story.377.desc: Those arrogant fools on Cardassia have demanded to leave the Dominion. Many Cardassians now stand in open rebellion against the Dominion. No one has ever had the audacity to demand such a thing and this insult must not be allowed to stand.
STH_dominion_story.377.name: Cardassian Rebellion!
STH_dominion_story.378.desc: The Cardassian Legates have rejected our request to take direct control of their facilities, this act of defiance only shows how foolishly prideful these people are. Once this war is over we will remind them of the proper order of things.
STH_dominion_story.378.name: Cardassia Reject our request
STH_dominion_story.381.desc: It has been said by many that the key to the Alpha Quadrant is Deep Space Nine and the Bajoran System, for whoever controls these controls the Wormhole. \n\nOur decision to mine the wormhole will keep the Dominion at bay for now, but should they remove the mines their fleets can flood into the Alpha Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.381.name: Defeat at the Battle of Bajor
STH_dominion_story.382.desc: Our victory in the Bajoran System provides us with an opportunity to remove the mines preventing our reinforcements from joining the battle against our enemies! We should make every effort to bring down the minefield as soon as possible.
STH_dominion_story.382.name: Victory at the Battle of Bajor
STH_dominion_story.383.desc: Our scientists have managed to convert the deflector dish on Terok Nor to act as one giant anti-graviton emitter and disable the self-replicating mines blocking the wormhole. \n\nThe resulting explosion is bright enough for even a Vorta to see.
STH_dominion_story.383.name: Minefield Removed
STH_dominion_story.386.desc: Our victory in the Bajoran System allows us to keep the minefield safe and keeps the Dominion's war fleets from adding to their numbers already in the Alpha Quadrant.
STH_dominion_story.386.name: Victory at the Battle of Bajor
STH_dominion_story.387.desc: Losing control of Bajor is a major setback in our bid for control over the Alpha and Beta Quadrants, we must take the system back and remove those mines.
STH_dominion_story.387.name: Defeat at the Battle of Bajor
STH_dominion_story.390.desc: The war does not go well for Cardassia, not only do our troops continue to take the brunt of the attack but now the Dominion continues to take our territory and call it their own, handing it their allies! \n\nThe Cardassian Liberation Front seems to be the only element of Cardassia willing to stand up for its people. Do we let them fight alone or does Cardassia fight for its own freedom?!
STH_dominion_story.390.name: A second class Cardassia?
STH_dominion_story.391.desc: It appears that the Dominion has finally pushed the sleeping giants in the Cardassian military into action, their treatment of Cardassian citizens and the fall from grace in the eyes of the Founders was too much of an insult to bear, with the Union ridding itself of the Dominion control and declaring war.
STH_dominion_story.391.name: Cardassia United against the Dominion
STH_dominion_story.392.desc: Those fools on Cardassia have seen fit to united with the rebellion and join them in all our war against our forces!
STH_dominion_story.392.name: Cardassia Rebels against the Dominion
STH_dominion_story.400.desc: The opening of the Bajoran Wormhole offers unique opportunities for scientific discovery, Our probes have discovered a planetoid with some interesting readings. \n\nWe have petitioned the Federation Science Council to comission a survey expedition to [gamma_quadrant_survey_planet.GetName] and I would like to lead this mission.
STH_dominion_story.400.name: Planetary Survey Mission
STH_dominion_story.402.desc: Our science team on [gamma_quadrant_survey_planet.GetName] are now several days overdue in checking in and are failing to answer our requests for an update. \n\nWhilst it is still possible they have suffered equipment failure this is a concerning turn of events, we should prepare to re-route a vessel to check in on them.
STH_dominion_story.402.name: Science team fail to check in
STH_dominion_story.403.desc: Attention Federation! I am Third Talak'talan of the Jem'Hadar I am here to tell you that we are holding [gamma_quadrant_survey_leader.GetName] as prisoners of the Jem'Hadar for the crime of trespassing into Dominion Territory. You may also consider us responsible for the loss of a number of freighters found within our space. They fought well for a spiritual people...
STH_dominion_story.403.name: Incoming Message!
STH_dominion_story.405.desc:
Arriving at [gamma_quadrant_survey_planet.GetName] the [gamma_quadrant_rescue_ship.GetName] begins to search for the missing science team, aware that at any moment the Jem'Hadar could bear down on them. 

Just as [gamma_quadrant_rescue_leader.GetName] is about to give the order to head out, the team is found, having escaped from their capturers and on the run. 

Beaming the crew back to their ship [gamma_quadrant_rescue_leader.GetName] gives the order for them to retreat, just as a fleet of Jem'Hadar attack ships enters the system.
STH_dominion_story.405.name: The Jem'Hadar
STH_dominion_story.406.desc: As the science team makes the jump to warp, the Jem'Hadar focus their attention on [gamma_quadrant_rescue_ship.GeName] with multiple direct hits to the ship's right nacelle, which takes serious damage. The Chief Engineer reports that [gamma_quadrant_rescue_ship.GetName] will be unable to escape to warp until they can bring the nacelle back on time. \n\nWe must hold out against these Jem'Hadar ships.
STH_dominion_story.406.name: The Jem'Hadar
STH_dominion_story.409.desc: As the Chief Engineer brings the damaged nacelle back online and the [FromFrom.GetName] prepared to exit the system, the Jem'Hadar launched a last-gasp suicide run against the damage ship, which turns two slowly to avoid the ships . The vessels collide and are destroyed in a firey blast killing all onboard. A fearcesome show of the power and unwavery loyalty of the Jem'Hadar.
STH_dominion_story.409.name: [FromFrom.GetName] Destroyed in Suicide Attack!
STH_dominion_story.410.desc: Despite the losses and damage to our fleet, the Jem'Hadar ambush has been defeated and we have recovered the science team. \n\nWhat is clear is that the Dominion are serious in their threats against our presence in the Gamma Quadrant and many experts are now concerned that they will not stop at the Wormhole.
STH_dominion_story.410.name: Victory against the Jem'Hadar
STH_dominion_story.411.desc: Our losses against the Jem'Hadar today have been staggering, their display of ruthlessness and devotion to their Founders is unmatched. Many within the Federation Council fear that even if we retreat to our side of the Wormhole this may not be enough as the reach of the Dominion continues to grow.
STH_dominion_story.411.name: Defeat against the Jem'Hadar
STH_dreman_event.1.a: We can't interfere in their development.
STH_dreman_event.1.c: Crack the planet to gain the Dilithium.
STH_dreman_event.1.desc: As our earlier survey of the system indicated many of the planets in this star system have highly unusual geological instabilities. As a result of these instabilities the fifth planet of the system has already broken into pieces revealing deposits of dilithium deep in its crust. It is suspected that the primary cause for these strange instabilities experienced here are the unusually deep dilithium deposits found on the planets. Our earlier survey also revealed that one of the planets is inhabited.\n\nThe planet in question, Benev Selec, seems to be suffering from similar geological instabilities as the broken fifth planet and it is believed that its crust contains substantially more dilithium than that of the fifth planet. Just recently we have also intercepted a signal from an individual citizen of the inhabited planet asking, if anybody was out there.
STH_dreman_event.1.name: A planet on the edge of destruction
STH_dreman_event.2.desc: The planet Benev Selec in the Selcundi Drema system has broken and the colony there has been totally destroyed.
STH_dreman_event.2.name: A planet broken
STH_dreman_event.3.desc: It is our responsibility to help the people living down there and try to stabilize the planet before it is too late.
STH_dreman_event.3.name: Save the Colony
STH_dreman_event.4.desc: While over time the planet will most likely crack naturally, we cannot wait for it to happen during the next few hundred years. The growth and well-being of our empire requires ever increasing amounts of dilithium and here we are presented with a unique opportunity of getting vast amounts of it relatively easily.\n\nTherefore we must hurry the natural cracking process of the planet and at the same time make sure that the planet will crack in a way that gives us access to the maximum amount of dilithium available.
STH_dreman_event.4.name: Crack the Planet
STH_dreman_event.5.desc: Thanks to the diligent work of our best scientists we have managed to stabilize the planet Benev Selec and save the colony. The signal coming from the planet tells us that the conditions down there have vastly improved and the citizens of the colony are happy for the sudden and unpredicted stabilization of their planet. Many believing it to be the work of higher beings worshipped on the planet.
STH_dreman_event.5.name: The planet is saved
STH_dreman_event.6.a: The added dilithium will aid us.
STH_dreman_event.6.desc: We have successfully cracked the planet Benev Selec and gained access to the vast dilithium reserves the planet`s crust holds. All communications from the colony have ended.
STH_dreman_event.6.name: Planet successfully cracked
STH_edicts.1.desc: Este año, la gente de toda la Federación ha llevado la celebración del primer día de contacto a nuevos niveles, invitando a los escolares de todos los planetas a construir su propio motor Warp 1 original. Aunque nunca ha sido un feriado oficial del estado en [Root.GetName], todavía se celebra en todo el cuadrante. Las festividades generalmente incluyen la comida y música favorita de Zefram Cochrane, así como una recreación histórica del primer contacto. ¡El día que la humanidad se dio cuenta de que no estaban solos en la galaxia siempre será recordado!
STH_edicts.1.name: Primer día de contacto
STH_edicts.2.desc: Eitreih'hveinn, también conocido como el Festival de los Agricultores, se celebra ampliamente en todo el [Root.GetName]. Solo los comerciantes que se someten a los exámenes más estrictos y que son aprobados por los sacerdotes pueden vender sus mejores productos.
STH_edicts.2.name: Eitreih'hveinn
STH_edicts.3.desc: Las celebraciones del festival se llevan a cabo a lo largo de [Root.GetName] e incluyen la recreación ritual de la lucha de Molor contra Kahless. El festival honra la derrota del tirano Molor por Kahless the Unforgettable en combate único.
STH_edicts.3.name: Kot'Baval
STH_emanations.2.a: A science ship is required to explore the issue.
STH_emanations.2.desc: For sometime now we have detected ever increasing signs of some previously unknown element being present in one of the asteroid fields belonging to our empire. While at first these readings were believed to be nothing more than just some sensor cliches no malfunctions have been found from our sensors and at the same time the odd readings have kept steadily increasing. So it is believed now that the readings do merit further scientific study.
STH_emanations.2.name: Unusual readings from an asteroid field
STH_emanations.3.b: We should respect the dead and leave them alone.
STH_emanations.3.c: What fortune. Our population will grow.
STH_emanations.3.desc:
Upon reaching the asteroid field our scientists discover that the odd readings we were previously picking up seem to originate from caverns inside the asteroids, some of which even seem to have an atmosphere of their own. After sending a landing party to explore one of these sites our team stumbles upon a large quantity of alien bodies rapped around in some kind of biopolymer residues laying at the bottom of a cavern.

By running further tests it is discovered that the readings of the unknown element appear to be coming from these alien bodies as they slowly decompose. The asteroid field as a whole also seems to have a unique and fluctuating energy pattern that appears to be still drawing some faint energy from some of the more recently deposited alien bodies. While conducting these studies our scientists observe an opening of a subspace vacuole that disappears as suddenly as it first appeared, but leaves behind a fresh alien body.

Now the question becomes what should we do? Exploring the previously unknown element discovered here and the field's strange energy patterns could expand our scientific knowledge of the universe significantly. However what is clear as well is that this is a burial site for some unknown alien species who laid their dead here to rest.
STH_emanations.3.name: An alien burial ground discovered
STH_envoy_events.1.c: Send in an agent to carry out the task.
STH_envoy_events.1.desc: The [envoy_source.GetOwnerName] envoy, [event_envoy.GetName], has been causing a great amount of harm in [event_envoy.GetHerHis] efforts to represent [envoy_source.GetOwnerName] interests in [Root.Capital.GetName]. Right from [event_envoy.GetHerHis] first arrival, [event_envoy.GetSheHe] has criticised our government's efforts in various high profile meetings and in front of other empires. Our agencies have devised a plan to end the meddling of [event_envoy.GetHerHim], our efforts would be done under the cover of dark.\n\nAllowing this scheme to succeed would certainly be benefit us, but having a foreign dignitary die whilst in our care could impact us negatively.
STH_envoy_events.1.name: Meddling Envoys
STH_envoy_events.10.desc: Our assassins were not able to successfully complete their mission and assassinate their target envoy [dead_envoy_walking.GetName] who escaped with their lives and back to their security escorts. Our assassins were forced to withdraw to prevent being discovered, but at least our role in the attack has remained a secret. Unfortunately we will not be able to plan a repeat attack for some time.
STH_envoy_events.10.name: Envoy Escaped Death
STH_envoy_events.2.a: They shall pay for this crime.
STH_envoy_events.2.desc: [event_envoy.GetName] - the envoy we sent to mediate our disagreements with the [From.GetName] - has been found dead, our internal security services believe they have been murdered!\n\nWhilst we do not have conclusive evidence the [From.GetAdj] authorities have not offered convincing evidence that they were not behind the death of our envoy.
STH_envoy_events.2.name: Murder on [From.Capital.GetName]!
STH_envoy_events.5.desc: Our spies have identified several envoys that are actively working against the interests of [Root.GetName] and promoting the interests of their own states. There is an upcoming diplomatic conference that will involve the envoys and ambassadors from multiple different states and empires. This presents itself as an excellent opportunity to assassinate a foreign envoy and set back one of our rivals diplomatic efforts. \n\nOur security services have compelled a list of envoys that will be at the conference, we will identify any envoys deliberately targeting us in red.
STH_envoy_events.5.name: Envoy Assassination
STH_envoy_events.7.desc: [Root.GetTitle] [Root.GetName], we have alarming news, one of our top envoys, [dead_envoy_walking.GetName], was killed whilst on assignment. They were attending a conference offworld with a number of other ambassadors and envoys from various worlds when they failed to report in. Local security found them dead in their apartment with no sign of who carried out this atrocity.
STH_envoy_events.7.name: Envoy Assassination
STH_envoy_events.8.desc: Our assassins were able to successfully complete their mission and assassinate their target envoy [dead_envoy_walking.GetName]. The hosts and the dead envoy's country were unable to identify who carried out the assassination. As hoped this has caused disruption to their diplomatic efforts.
STH_envoy_events.8.name: Envoy Assassination Complete
STH_envoy_events.9.desc: [Root.GetTitle] [Root.GetName]! We must report an attempt on the life of one of our envoys, thankfully [dead_envoy_walking.GetName] was able to escape unharmed, but they were unable to provide any further details on who was behind the attack. Our security services have investigated but have also drawn a blank, we should remain on alert and review our counter-espionage policies if possible.
STH_envoy_events.9.name: Envoy Escaped Death
STH_espionage.10.desc_dominion: Dominion Report.\n\n Our initial infilitration of [from.target.GetName] has been a completed and [Root.GetSpyTitle] [from.leader.GetName] is now in a position to begin undermining the efforts of [from.target.GetName].
STH_espionage.10.desc_obsidianOrder: Permanent documentation file.\n\n As predicted our efforts to infiltrate [from.target.GetName] was a success and [Root.GetSpyTitle] [from.leader.GetName] is now securely in place to begin setting up our operations from within the heart of [from.target.GetName] space.
STH_espionage.10.desc_starfleet: Secure Transmission Received.\n\n Our mission to set up operations within [from.target.GetName] has been a success and [Root.GetSpyTitle] [from.leader.GetName] cover is in place. They will begin by setting up a secure base of operations and reporting back their findings.
STH_espionage.10.desc_talShiar: Tal Shiar Status Update: Our [Root.GetSpyTitle] within [from.target.GetName] has successfully been imbedded.\n\n[from.leader.GetName] will now begin the process of setting up a Spy Network in [from.target.GetAdj] space.
STH_espionage.10.name: Covert Report: Undercover Operation in place
STH_espionage.14.desc: As expected our Section 31 Operative REDACTED has attached themselves to [from.leader.GetName] and using them as cover has managed to infiltate the highest echalons of [from.target.GetName] government. We can now begin operations against them.
STH_espionage.14.name: Section 31 Report
STH_espionage_mechanic.10.desc_01: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de eliminación de activos extranjeros, el Director del departamento [Root.GetSpyService] de Personas de interés ofrece [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para [Root. Leader.GetHerHis] aprobación.
STH_espionage_mechanic.10.desc_obsidianO: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de eliminación de activos extranjeros, el jefe de la división de evaluación de personas de interés [Root.GetSpyService] ofrece a [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para [Root. Leader.GetHerHis] aprobación.
STH_espionage_mechanic.10.desc_talShiar: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de eliminación de activos extranjeros, la Presidenta del subcomité de Evaluación de Personas de Interés [Root.GetSpyService] ofrece [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para [Root. Leader.GetHerHis] aprobación.
STH_espionage_mechanic.10.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.100.a: Enviar a un líder para que se convierta en un activo.
STH_espionage_mechanic.100.b: Retirar a un Infiltrado de la acción.
STH_espionage_mechanic.100.desc: Our specially bread infiltration warriors, often referred to as the Caretakers, have trained for many years to alter their biology to take on the appearance of another species. These agents can then infiltrate and sow disruption. New operations can be setup via the Espionage Screen. From here we can manage our warriors in the field.
STH_espionage_mechanic.100.name: Infiltración Undine
STH_espionage_mechanic.12.desc_01: Una serie de comunicaciones filtradas a tiempo y ofensivas de nuestra presencia diplomática en la capital [FromFrom.GetName] han resultado en un deterioro sustancial en las relaciones entre nuestros dos gobiernos. \n\nAunque algunos miembros de la comunidad de inteligencia creen que esto es el trabajo de una potencia extranjera, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] desestima esa explicación y ha ordenado una investigación inmediata sobre el error.
STH_espionage_mechanic.12.name: Incidente diplomático
STH_espionage_mechanic.13.desc: Nuestros operativos han filtrado con éxito una serie de comunicaciones dañinas de la misión diplomática [From.GetName] en [FromFrom.Capital.GetName]. El gobierno [FromFrom.GetName] ha condenado a las personas [From.GetName] involucradas en las comunicaciones. \n\n La participación de [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] sigue sin divulgarse.
STH_espionage_mechanic.13.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.14.desc_01: Nuestras agencias de inteligencia han frustrado con éxito un intento del [From.GetName] de interrumpir nuestros esfuerzos diplomáticos. Si bien el intento casi tuvo éxito, los agentes [From.GetSpeciesAdj] involucrados dejaron evidencia clave de su participación en nuestra red informática. \n\n [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] ha condenado al gobierno [From.GetSpeciesAdj] por su interferencia.
STH_espionage_mechanic.14.name: Incidente diplomático evitado
STH_espionage_mechanic.15.desc: Nuestros operativos no han saboteado con éxito los esfuerzos diplomáticos de [From.GetName]. Peor aún, alguna evidencia de nuestra participación no se tuvo en cuenta. \n\nLos activos involucrados han sido retirados.
STH_espionage_mechanic.15.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.150.desc: By recalling assets embedded in enemy empires, we are able to gather more intelligence than would be available through methods which would normally be employed to preserve said asset's cover. Thus increasing our intel on that species.
STH_espionage_mechanic.150.name: Infiltración Undine
STH_espionage_mechanic.151.desc_01: One of our key leaders in the [Root.GetName] fleet, [From.GetName], has disappeared without a trace. \n\nNobody has seen from [From.GetHerHim] for several days now.
STH_espionage_mechanic.151.desc_02: An important General in [Root.GetName] planetary defence forces, [From.GetName], has disappeared without a trace. \n\nThey have failed to report in for their duty shift for a number of days now, which is most unlike them.
STH_espionage_mechanic.151.desc_03: Governor [From.GetName] has disappeared without a trace. \n\nTheir assistant has seen from [From.GetHerHim] for several days now as concerns start to rise.
STH_espionage_mechanic.151.desc_04: A key leader in the [Root.GetName] scientific establishment, [From.GetName], has disappeared without a trace. \n\nNobody has seen from [From.GetHerHim] for several days now, suspecting they have gotten caught up in work and simply forgot to check in.
STH_espionage_mechanic.151.desc_05: [From.GetName], has disappeared without a word. \n\nNobody has seen from [From.GetHerHim] for several days now, causing alarm within [Root.GetSpyService] ranks.
STH_espionage_mechanic.151.name: Infiltrador Desaparecido en Acción
STH_espionage_mechanic.152.desc: We have successfully withdrawn our agent disguised as the [From.Owner.GetName] leader [From.GetName]. The information they can present back on [From.Owner.GetName] will benefit us greatly. The Infiltrator will require time to re-adjust to being a glorious Undine warrior once again.
STH_espionage_mechanic.152.name: Infiltrador recuperado
STH_espionage_mechanic.16.desc_01:
La infraestructura planetaria clave en [destroyed_random_building_planet.GetName] ha sido saboteada, lo que hace que la ubicación esté en ruinas. 

 Las investigaciones iniciales señalan la culpa de elementos criminales en la región que intentan robar componentes de alto valor de su objetivo y desencadenan accidentalmente un ciclo de retroalimentación catastrófica en los sistemas de energía. 

Las sugerencias de participación extranjera por elementos marginales de la administración de [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] se descartan sin pruebas.
STH_espionage_mechanic.16.desc_02:
Nuestra instalación en órbita de [destrozado_ estación_de_alegación_planet.GetName] ha sido saboteada, destruyendo completamente la estación. 

 Las investigaciones iniciales señalan la culpa de elementos criminales en el sistema que intentan robar carga de alto valor de su objetivo y desencadenan accidentalmente un ciclo de retroalimentación catastrófica en los sistemas de energía. 

Las sugerencias de participación extranjera por elementos marginales de la administración de [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] se descartan sin pruebas.
STH_espionage_mechanic.16.name: Infraestructura pública dirigida
STH_espionage_mechanic.161.desc: [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] has gone missing from [FromFrom.Leader.GetHerHis] post in the [FromFrom.GetName] minutes before the fleet engaged the [From.GetName]. Our internal security teams report that alarmingly large quantities of ship and intelligence data has also gone missing.\n\nThis must be more than a coincidence.
STH_espionage_mechanic.161.name: Falta [Root.GetCaptainTitle]
STH_espionage_mechanic.162.desc: The Undine infiltrator posing as [From.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] has been successfully exfiltrated from [FromFrom.Leader.GetHerHis] post in the [FromFrom.GetName] minutes before the fleet engaged our [FromFromFrom.GetName]. In addition, several kiloquads of [From.GetName] ship schematics have been stolen.
STH_espionage_mechanic.162.name: Infiltración exitosa
STH_espionage_mechanic.163.desc: A number of ships in the [FromFrom.GetName] have suffered damage minutes before the fleet engaged the [From.GetName]. Sabotage would appear to be the most likely explanation.
STH_espionage_mechanic.163.name: Naves dañadas antes del combate
STH_espionage_mechanic.164.desc: The Undine infiltrator posing as [From.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] has successfully sabotaged a number of ships in the [From.GetName]'s [FromFrom.GetName] minutes before the fleet engaged our [FromFromFrom.GetName] causing damage and hampering their efforts to fight.
STH_espionage_mechanic.164.name: Infiltración exitosa
STH_espionage_mechanic.165.desc: The Undine infiltrator posing as [From.GetCaptainTitle] [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] is in place to reduce the effectiveness of the [From.GetName]'s [FromFrom.GetName] minutes before it engages our [FromFromFrom.GetName].
STH_espionage_mechanic.165.name: Infiltración exitosa
STH_espionage_mechanic.17.desc_01: Nuestros operativos que apuntan a la infraestructura planetaria de [From.GetName] han desactivado con éxito una instalación en [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nLas agencias de inteligencia de [From.GetName] no fueron alertados de nuestra participación, sino que culparon a los elementos criminales locales.
STH_espionage_mechanic.17.desc_02: Nuestros operarios que apuntan a la infraestructura orbital de [From.GetName] han desactivado con éxito una estación que orbita [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nLas agencias de inteligencia de [From.GetName] no fueron alertados de nuestra participación, sino que culparon a los elementos criminales locales.
STH_espionage_mechanic.17.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.171.desc: Our security services report that [Root.GetGeneralTitle] [FromFromFrom.GetName] has gone missing from [FromFromFrom.GetHerHis] post in the while the [From.GetName] bombard [FromFrom.GetName]. Their disappearance coincides with the loss of several key data repositories.\n\nThis seems to be more than just a coincidence.
STH_espionage_mechanic.171.name: Falta [Root.GetGeneralTitle]
STH_espionage_mechanic.172.desc: The Undine infiltrator posing as [From.GetGeneralTitle] [FromFromFrom.GetName] has been successfully extracted from [FromFromFrom.GetHerHis] post in the [From.GetName] while we bombard [FromFrom.GetName]. In addition, several kiloquads of [From.GetName] data has been stolen from the [From.GetName] their databanks.
STH_espionage_mechanic.172.name: Agente Undine Recuperado
STH_espionage_mechanic.175.desc: The Undine infiltrator posing as [From.GetGeneralTitle] [FromFromFrom.GetName] is in place to reduce the effectiveness of the [From.GetName]'s armies on [FromFrom.GetName] as that world is bombarded.
STH_espionage_mechanic.175.name: Ejército extranjero obstaculizado
STH_espionage_mechanic.18.desc_01: Nuestras agencias de inteligencia han frustrado con éxito un intento del [From.GetName] de interrumpir nuestra infraestructura planetaria. Si bien el intento casi tuvo éxito, los agentes [From.GetSpeciesAdj] involucrados dejaron evidencia clave de su participación en la red informática de la instalación objetivo. \n\n [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] ha condenado al gobierno [From.GetSpeciesAdj] por su interferencia.
STH_espionage_mechanic.18.name: Intento de sabotaje evitado
STH_espionage_mechanic.19.desc: Nuestros operativos no han saboteado con éxito la infraestructura planetaria en el espacio [From.GetName]. Peor aún, alguna evidencia de nuestra participación no se tuvo en cuenta. \n\nLos activos involucrados han sido retirados.
STH_espionage_mechanic.19.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.190.desc: [From.GetName] of the [FromFrom.GetName] has been revealed to be an imposter and a member of the Undine species in disguise.. Despite being uncovered as an Undine infiltrator, [From.GetName] was able to escape to back to [Root.GetName] space a large amount of intelligence on the [FromFrom.GetName].
STH_espionage_mechanic.190.name: Agente Undine Encontrado
STH_espionage_mechanic.191.desc: [From.GetName] of the [FromFrom.GetName] has been revealed to be an imposter. The [FromFrom.GetName] authorities attempted to capture [From.GetName], but [From.GetSheHe] was killed in the process.
STH_espionage_mechanic.191.name: Agente Undine Encontrado
STH_espionage_mechanic.193.desc_01: [Root.GetName] security forces have uncovered proof that [From.GetName] was in fact an Undine imposter. Unfortunately, [From.GetName]'s double was killed trying to escape capture. \n\nNo clues to the location of the original [From.GetName] have been found, and [From.GetSheHe] is presumed dead.
STH_espionage_mechanic.193.desc_02:
[Root.GetName] security forces have uncovered proof that [From.GetName] was in fact an Undine imposter. Unfortunately, [From.GetName]'s double was killed trying to escape capture. 

No clues to the location of the original [From.GetName] have been found, and [From.GetSheHe] is presumed dead.

Unlocked: $policy_counter_espionage_policy$ Policy.
STH_espionage_mechanic.193.name: Agente Undine encontrado
STH_espionage_mechanic.2.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha abierto formalmente la sesión de este año del Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia. \n\nMientras que las operaciones cotidianas generalmente se mantienen fuera de la revisión de los políticos de [Root.GetSpeciesAdj], el [Root.GetRulerTitle] tiene por ley la autoridad exclusiva para establecer los objetivos estratégicos de la Inteligencia.
STH_espionage_mechanic.2.desc_obsidianOr:
[Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] comienza la sesión del año de la Revisión de Operaciones de Inteligencia. 

Mientras que las operaciones diarias generalmente se mantienen fuera de la revisión del Comando Central, el [Root.GetRulerTitle] tiene por ley la única autoridad para establecer los objetivos estratégicos. 

Con los jefes de los diversos departamentos y dos Legados de alto rango, [Root.Leader.GetName] establece la agenda [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] para los próximos años.
STH_espionage_mechanic.2.desc_talShiar:
[Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha abierto formalmente la sesión de este año del Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia. 

Mientras que las operaciones diarias generalmente se mantienen fuera de la revisión de los políticos de [Root.GetSpeciesAdj], el [Root.GetRulerTitle] tiene, por ley y tradición, la única autoridad para establecer los objetivos estratégicos. 

Con los presidentes de los diversos Subcomités y el Ministro de Guerra, [Root.Leader.GetName] establece la agenda [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] para los próximos años.
STH_espionage_mechanic.2.f: Fin de la sesión del comité.
STH_espionage_mechanic.2.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.20.desc_01: Nuestra nave estelar [destruido_enlace_aleatorio.Nombre_Get] en el [destruido_arma_arrenda_Alemania.Nombre_Get] ha sido destruida después de una falla catastrófica con el núcleo del reactor. \n\n Los informes iniciales indican que la responsabilidad del accidente radica en una reparación defectuosa de la placa de transmisión realizada por un técnico junior en El departamento de ingeniería del barco. Se desconoce por qué un técnico generalmente asignado a tareas de reparación de replicadores podía realizar este mantenimiento sin supervisión.
STH_espionage_mechanic.20.name: Bienes militares saboteados
STH_espionage_mechanic.21.desc:
Un operativo de cobertura profunda en [From.GetName] asignado a [FromFrom.GetName] ha provocado con éxito una falla catastrófica de la unidad, destruyendo el buque. 

El operativo (lavado de cerebro para aparecer como un neurótico límite apenas competente) sirvió como técnico junior a bordo del [FromFrom.GetName]. Tras la activación de su personalidad sumergida, el operativo alteró una lista de mantenimiento de ingeniería y se asignó a la tarea de mantenimiento esencial. 

El activo se perdió junto con todos los miembros de la tripulación de [FromFrom.GetName].
STH_espionage_mechanic.21.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.22.desc_01: Nuestras agencias de inteligencia han frustrado con éxito un intento del [From.GetName] de destruir uno de nuestros activos militares mediante sabotaje. Si bien el intento casi tuvo éxito, el agente [From.GetSpyService] involucrado dejó pruebas clave de su participación en la red informática de la nave espacial objetivo. \n\n [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] ha condenado al gobierno [From.GetSpeciesAdj] por su interferencia.
STH_espionage_mechanic.22.name: Intento de sabotaje evitado
STH_espionage_mechanic.23.desc: Nuestros operativos no han saboteado con éxito los activos militares pertenecientes a [From.GetName]. Peor aún, alguna evidencia de nuestra participación no se tuvo en cuenta. \n\nLos activos involucrados han sido retirados.
STH_espionage_mechanic.23.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.24.desc_01: [assassinated_leader.GetName] murió en un accidente de transportista. El accidente parece haber sido causado por un aumento de potencia en el mecanismo de materialización de la almohadilla transportadora receptora y una falla del secundario debido a un mantenimiento deficiente. \n\nMillones en el espacio [Root.GetName] han unido el luto [assassinated_leader.GetName].
STH_espionage_mechanic.24.name: Líder asesinado!
STH_espionage_mechanic.25.desc: Nuestros operativos han eliminado con éxito [From.GetName] [FromFrom.GetTitle] [FromFrom.GetName] en lo que se enmarcó como un accidente de transporte de fluke. \n\nNo se detectó evidencia de nuestra participación.
STH_espionage_mechanic.25.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.26.desc_01: Nuestras agencias de inteligencia han frustrado con éxito un intento del [From.GetName] de asesinar a un miembro de alto rango de la administración. Si bien el intento casi tuvo éxito, los agentes [From.GetSpyService] involucrados dejaron evidencia clave de su participación. \n\n [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] ha condenado al gobierno [From.GetSpeciesAdj] por su interferencia.
STH_espionage_mechanic.26.name: Intento de asesinato evitado
STH_espionage_mechanic.27.desc: Nuestros operativos no han logrado asesinar con éxito a un miembro de alto rango de la administración [From.GetName]. Peor aún, alguna evidencia de nuestra participación no se tuvo en cuenta. \n\nLos activos involucrados han sido retirados.
STH_espionage_mechanic.27.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.28.desc: Una serie de comunicaciones filtradas a tiempo y ofensivas de la presencia diplomática de [From.GetName] en [Root.Capital.GetName] han resultado en un deterioro sustancial en las relaciones entre nuestros dos gobiernos. \n\nAunque algunos miembros de la comunidad de inteligencia creen que esto es el trabajo de una potencia extranjera, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] desestima esa explicación y ha condenado el manejo de la situación por parte del gobierno [From.GetName].
STH_espionage_mechanic.28.name: Incidente diplomático
STH_espionage_mechanic.3.desc: Mantener a los vecinos de [Root.Capital.GetName] desunidos es un método probado para garantizar el dominio [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] sobre el espacio local. \n\n Al filtrar mensajes diplomáticos falsificados, organizar ataques contra embarcaciones enemigas utilizando activos disfrazados y otras acciones disruptivas, podemos agriar las relaciones de nuestro objetivo.
STH_espionage_mechanic.3.e: Solicite un nuevo dossier de objetivos.
STH_espionage_mechanic.3.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.30.desc: Al enfocar los esfuerzos hacia adentro, la Inteligencia puede eliminar elementos radicales disruptivos que podrían amenazar el [Root.GetName].
STH_espionage_mechanic.30.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.31.desc: Con los esfuerzos diplomáticos [From.GetName] dirigidos a la interrupción, se requiere un punto focal para nuestros esfuerzos.
STH_espionage_mechanic.31.e: Solicite un nuevo dossier de objetivos.
STH_espionage_mechanic.31.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.4.desc_01: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de interrupción diplomática, el Director del departamento de Inteligencia de Evaluaciones Extranjeras ofrece [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para la aprobación de [Root.Leader.GetHerHis].
STH_espionage_mechanic.4.desc_obsidianOr: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de disrupción diplomática, el jefe de la división de Inteligencia de Evaluación Extranjera ofrece [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para la aprobación [Root.Leader.GetHerHis].
STH_espionage_mechanic.4.desc_talShiar: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de interrupción diplomática, la Presidenta del subcomité de Evaluación de Inteligencia Extranjera ofrece [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para la aprobación de [Root.Leader.GetHerHis].
STH_espionage_mechanic.4.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.5.desc: La interrupción física de la infraestructura planetaria de nuestros enemigos se puede lograr a través de varios métodos. Se pueden sobornar elementos criminales locales, se pueden emplazar virus informáticos o, más groseramente, se pueden activar explosivos. \n\nEl efecto es el mismo, las instalaciones en las que nuestro objetivo dependía se reducen a ruinas.
STH_espionage_mechanic.5.e: Solicite un nuevo dossier de objetivos.
STH_espionage_mechanic.5.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.50.desc: The Romulan Empire thrives on order and control. The presence of unrest on any of our worlds sends the wrong message to our enemies and we cannot tolerate weakness. Sending an agent to pay the civilian population a visit shall remind them that the state comes first.
STH_espionage_mechanic.50.name: Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.52.desc: The planet [talshiar_unrest_planet.GetName] has been identified as a world of unrest and discontent and a weakness that we cannot allow to continue. A Tal Shiar Operative should be selected and sent to the planet to root out the cause of the unrest and quell any problems.\n\nThe Committee believe that an army specialist would have the best chance of success given their expertise in ground based missions. An admiral may get the job done, however they may not be best placed for this mission.
STH_espionage_mechanic.52.name: Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.53.desc: As predicted the mission has been an outstanding success. Our agent was able to infiltrate the organization causing unrest within the major cities, and once the ringleaders were identified it was only a matter of time before the whole operation was dismantled and our security forces were able to clean up the rest of the malcontents.\n\nA few public executions to remind the population that the Romulan government sees and knows all.
STH_espionage_mechanic.53.name: Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.54.desc:
The mission was completed to an acceptable standard and we have restored a degree of control to the situation on [talshiar_unrest_planet.getName].

The operative was able to infiltrate much of the organization, but the ringleaders escaped. Thankfully this is enough for our ground forces to make a number of key arrests and disappearances.

This should remind the population of what actions are in their best interests...
STH_espionage_mechanic.54.name: Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.55.desc: Our mission has been an unmitigated disaster, with our operative failing to infiltrate any of the cells and being publicly outed by a group of civilians. This will severely damage the reputation of the Tal Shiar and hamper any means to control the planet in the short-term.\n\nWe shall see what becomes of the agent...
STH_espionage_mechanic.55.name: Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.57.a: El fracaso nunca fue una opción.
STH_espionage_mechanic.57.desc: Having failed their mission the Tal Shiar have deemed that operative [sth_talshiar_agent_unrest.GetName] is of no further use to the organisation. Failure will not be tolerated and their service is no longer required.
STH_espionage_mechanic.57.name: Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.58.desc: The Tal Shiar is not famed for its forgiveness, however they still have a use for [sth_talshiar_agent_unrest.GetName]. It is clear this will have a lasting impact on the agent and their once glittering career may no longer reach the expected heights.\n\nAt least they have their life.
STH_espionage_mechanic.58.name: Comité de Supervisión de Inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.6.desc_01: Habiendo seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de sabotaje de infraestructura planetaria, el Director del departamento de Inteligencia de Evaluación Económica ofrece a [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para la aprobación de [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] .
STH_espionage_mechanic.6.desc_obsidianOr: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de sabotaje de infraestructura planetaria, el jefe de la división de Evaluación Económica de Inteligencia ofrece a [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para la aprobación de [Root.Leader.GetHerHis].
STH_espionage_mechanic.6.desc_talShiar: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de sabotaje de infraestructura planetaria, el Presidente del subcomité de Evaluación Económica de Inteligencia ofrece a [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para la aprobación [Root.Leader.GetHerHis].
STH_espionage_mechanic.6.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.7.desc: Si bien se teme correctamente a la flota de [Root.GetName], a veces es más efectivo usar métodos más sutiles que una guerra directa para eliminar la capacidad militar de nuestros enemigos. \n\n Se pueden activar agentes de cobertura profunda para sabotear su nave anfitriona, se pueden colocar trampas como campos minados encubiertos a lo largo de rutas de patrulla, y se puede buscar cualquier cantidad de opciones más exóticas.
STH_espionage_mechanic.7.e: Solicite un nuevo dossier de objetivos.
STH_espionage_mechanic.7.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.8.desc_01: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de sabotaje de activos militares, el Director del departamento [Root.GetSpyService] de Evaluación Militar ofrece a [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para [Root.Leader .GetHerHis] aprobación.
STH_espionage_mechanic.8.desc_obsidianOr: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de sabotaje de activos militares, el jefe de la división [Root.GetSpyService] Military Assessment ofrece a [Root.Leader.GetName] una variedad de opciones a considerar para [Root.Leader. GetHerHis] aprobación.
STH_espionage_mechanic.8.desc_talShiar: Después de haber seleccionado [From.GetName] como el objetivo de nuestra campaña de sabotaje de activos militares, el Presidente del subcomité de Evaluación Militar [Root.GetSpyService] ofrece a [Root.Leader.GetName] una gama de opciones a considerar para [Root.Leader. GetHerHis] aprobación.
STH_espionage_mechanic.8.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_espionage_mechanic.9.desc:
A veces surge un líder con la capacidad de dar forma al destino de toda su gente, para forjar alianzas duraderas entre viejos enemigos. O un científico emerge con un instinto de descubrimiento, empujando los límites del conocimiento para el mejoramiento de su gente. 

Y a veces estos visionarios no son [Root.GetSpeciesAdj]. 

 Usando una variedad de métodos, nuestros activos de inteligencia pueden establecer eventos que deberían resultar en la desaparición temprana de los mejores y más brillantes enemigos.
STH_espionage_mechanic.9.e: Solicite un nuevo dossier de objetivos.
STH_espionage_mechanic.9.name: Comité de supervisión de inteligencia
STH_expedition.1.desc: Las misiones en el espacio profundo son el pináculo de la exploración y el descubrimiento, y sacan lo mejor que el imperio tiene para ofrecer. Probar las naves, la tripulación y los capitanes de un imperio en el proceso de la misión de tres años con el objetivo es buscar nueva vida y nuevas civilizaciones, yendo audazmente a donde ningún hombre, mujer o alienígena haya ido antes.
STH_expedition.1.name: Una nueva misión de 3 años espera
STH_expedition.10.desc: Nuestra encuesta ha descubierto ricas vetas de minerales y otros recursos raros diseminados por la superficie del planeta. Sin formas de vida sensibles en el planeta, somos libres de reclamar los recursos para nosotros mismos. Es hora de desplegar el equipo de minería y llenar nuestras bahías de carga
STH_expedition.10.name: Misión de tres años 1: encuesta del planeta
STH_expedition.100.desc: La misión está completa y todo lo que queda es informar al Capitán y a la tripulación. Se habrá ganado mucha experiencia de la misión, con muchas vidas afectadas para bien o para mal. \n\nEl líder de la expedición es libre de regresar al servicio, mientras que el barco se someterá a una reparación completa y se proporcionará un nuevo barco en el mundo natal.
STH_expedition.100.name: Misión de tres años 1: misión completa
STH_expedition.1000.name: Where no man has gone before
STH_expedition.11.desc: Nuestros escaneos han recogido los restos de una civilización antigua, hace mucho tiempo perdida en el tiempo, pero posiblemente de diseño tkoniano. Con suerte, una investigación más profunda proporcionará más información sobre la historia de estas personas desaparecidas. \n\n ¿Quién sabe qué secretos hay dentro de las ciudades en ruinas y los barcos desolados que dispersan el sistema?
STH_expedition.11.name: Misión de tres años 1: civilización antigua
STH_expedition.12.desc: Nuestros equipos de encuesta podrían encontrar poco valor físico real entre las ruinas, pero los antiguos bancos de almacenamiento contienen terabytes de información sobre proyectos que proporcionarán a nuestros científicos investigaciones y datos muy necesarios una vez que se descifren. Deberíamos extraer lo que podamos de estos sistemas.
STH_expedition.12.name: Misión de tres años 1: Civilización antigua: investigación encontrada
STH_expedition.13.desc:
Nuestros equipos de reconocimiento han descubierto los restos de las vastas matrices de armas, presumiblemente utilizadas en la destrucción del planeta, como dos bandos involucrados en una guerra civil mortal que parecía no dejar sobrevivientes. 

Aunque consideramos antiguos y bastante primitivos por nuestros estándares, estas armas tienen un componente biológico único que aún podría ser mortal contra nuestros enemigos. 

Tenemos dos opciones, mantener estas armas mortales y poco éticas o desglosarlas en sus componentes principales para que nunca más puedan ser utilizadas para dañar. .
STH_expedition.13.name: Misión de tres años 1: Civilización antigua - ¡Armas!
STH_expedition.14.desc: Nuestros equipos han investigado la ciudad capital en ruinas pero no han podido descubrir nada o valor, los fantasmas de los difuntos parecen quedarse en las salas de reuniones ahora vacías y en los mercados una vez abarrotados. Puede que nunca sepamos qué le pasó a la gente aquí
STH_expedition.14.name: Misión de tres años 1: Civilización antigua - Nada
STH_expedition.15.desc: Nuestras sondas han encontrado una cultura previa a la urdimbre, y nuestros antropólogos a bordo quisieran mirar más de cerca y tomar todas las precauciones para no interferir con el desarrollo de estas personas. Tal vez podamos ver un vistazo de cómo nuestra propia civilización se convirtió en la cultura próspera que tenemos hoy.
STH_expedition.15.name: Misión de tres años 1: cultura primitiva encontrada
STH_expedition.16.desc: Las personas en el planeta a continuación son fascinantes, claramente están experimentando un renacimiento, explorando nuevas formas de arte y cultura. Si bien es extremadamente interesante, no hay nada más que podamos aprender y debemos continuar la misión.
STH_expedition.16.name: Misión de tres años 1: cultura primitiva encontrada
STH_expedition.17.desc_01: [sth_expedition_Leader_1.GetName] ha descubierto una señal preocupante, parece que un súper volcán inactivo está a punto de entrar en erupción. Eliminaría a toda la civilización. La directiva principal establece estrictamente que no podemos interferir con el desarrollo natural de esta civilización, sin embargo, no hacerlo casi seguramente provocaría la muerte de todos en la superficie y el fin de esta gente emergente.
STH_expedition.17.desc_02: [sth_expedition_Leader_1.GetName] ha descubierto una señal preocupante, parece que un súper volcán inactivo está a punto de entrar en erupción. Eliminaría a toda la civilización. La directiva principal establece estrictamente que no podemos interferir con el desarrollo natural de esta civilización, sin embargo, no hacerlo casi con certeza resultará en la muerte de todos en la superficie y el final de esta gente emergente.
STH_expedition.17.name: Misión de tres años 1: Cultura primitiva - ¡Desastre!
STH_expedition.18.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] el informe de la misión indica que [sth_expedition_Leader_1.GetName] tuvo éxito en salvar las vidas de todos aquellos en el planeta. Quién sabe qué impacto tendrá esto en el futuro, ya que nuestra influencia ha tenido un impacto directo en el desarrollo natural de esta especie. Esperemos que sea para mejor.
STH_expedition.18.name: Misión de tres años 1: cultura primitiva salvada
STH_expedition.19.desc: A pesar de los mejores esfuerzos de todos los involucrados, el equipo no pudo evacuar la colonia cuando el volcán entró en erupción antes de lo previsto y arrasó con el asentamiento. \n\n Desafortunadamente, ninguno de los nativos sobrevivió a la erupción y el consiguiente daño ecológico. Es hora de seguir adelante
STH_expedition.19.name: Misión de tres años 1: incapaz de salvar la cultura primitiva
STH_expedition.2.desc: Command ha identificado una nueva misión de tres años, ahora es el momento de enviar una nave y un capitán a la Base Estelar designada para recoger los suministros y el equipo requerido. \n\nEl barco y el almirante seleccionados no estarán disponibles durante los tres años, pero se les proporcionará una oportunidad única de ganar experiencia, bonificaciones excepcionales y recompensas por su servicio
STH_expedition.2.name: Prepara una nave para enviar
STH_expedition.20.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], lamento informar que nuestra expedición ha llegado a un final temprano. \n\nEl primer oficial ha informado que el Capitán y los miembros superiores de la tripulación fueron asesinados en acción intentando salvar la vida de una cultura primitiva en un planeta en los confines del espacio conocido. Parece que el rescate salió mal y, como resultado, hemos ordenado que la tripulación vuelva a casa. La nave será desequilibrada mientras se lleva a cabo una investigación interna completa.
STH_expedition.20.name: Misión de tres años 1: tripulación perdida
STH_expedition.200.desc: La misión está completa y todo lo que queda es informar al Capitán y a la tripulación. Se habrá ganado mucha experiencia de la misión, con muchas vidas afectadas para bien o para mal. \n\nEl líder de la expedición es libre de regresar al servicio, mientras que el barco se someterá a una reparación completa y se proporcionará un nuevo barco en el mundo natal
STH_expedition.200.name: Misión de tres años 2: misión completa
STH_expedition.2033.desc: The holomatrix quickly began to destabilize once the hologram began questioning the world around it, resulting in a catastrophic overload that destroyed the hologram and the matrix.
STH_expedition.2033.name: World in a Bottle
STH_expedition.21.desc: Capitán, estamos bajo ataque, una nave identificada ha salido de la urdimbre alegando que hemos invadido su espacio. Los escaneos indican que sus armas son formidables y parece que están ansiosos por respaldar su amenaza. ¿Deberíamos mantenernos firmes o abandonar este sector?
STH_expedition.21.name: Misión de tres años 1: bajo ataque
STH_expedition.22.desc: Los agresores no podían competir con la habilidad y el poder de nuestro barco y logramos hacer una declaración contra aquellos que desafiarían [Root.GetName]. \n\n Como un bono adicional, pudimos obtener una cantidad decente de salvamento de Los restos de la nave destruida. Deberíamos recogerlo antes de continuar con la misión
STH_expedition.22.name: Misión de tres años 1: Victoria
STH_expedition.23.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], lamento informar que nuestra expedición ha llegado a un final temprano. Recogimos su llamada de socorro hoy temprano a través de nuestras comunicaciones de largo alcance, parece que la expedición intentó defenderse de un atacante desconocido pero finalmente no tuvo éxito. \n\nSimplemente, la nave parece haber sido destruida con todas las manos.
STH_expedition.23.name: Misión de tres años 1: derrota
STH_expedition.24.desc_01: Hemos captado la señal de una de nuestras primeras sondas de exploración espacial, que dejó [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] hace cientos de años en busca de signos de vida extraterrestre. \n\nNuestros científicos creen que debería estar ahora en el vecindad de nuestra expedición y me gustaría que fuera investigada
STH_expedition.24.desc_02: [sth_expedition_Leader_1.GetName] tenemos una nueva misión tuya de [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName]. Nuestro equipo de astrometría quisiera que realizaras una serie de escaneos en un cúmulo protoestrella no lejos de tu ubicación. \n\nSería una oportunidad única para escanear este fenómeno y deleitar a nuestros científicos en casa.
STH_expedition.24.name: Misión de tres años 1: una misión desde casa
STH_expedition.25.desc: Se detectó una llamada de socorro cerca de la ubicación de [sth_expedition_Leader_1.GetName]
STH_expedition.25.name: Misión de tres años 1: Llamada de socorro
STH_expedition.26.desc:
Al llegar a la fuente de la llamada de socorro cerca del equipo, se encontró con un transporte de pasajeros en problemas. 

Respuesta al granizo, el [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] del carguero parece desaliñado y herido. 

'Gracias por responder nuestra llamada de socorro, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle]. Llevamos pasajeros en un recorrido por el sistema, pero nuestra unidad de deformación se dañó en una tormenta de iones ''. 

Un equipo de ingeniería enviado a la embarcación puede reparar rápidamente los motores de la nave.
STH_expedition.26.name: Misión de tres años 1: Llamada de socorro
STH_expedition.27.desc: Si bien no se puede responder a todas las llamadas de socorro, cada falta de respuesta a incidentes se refleja mal en la reputación de [Root.GetName] en esta parte del espacio
STH_expedition.27.name: Misión de tres años 1: Llamada de socorro
STH_expedition.28.a: £ energía £ energía por £ boronita £ molécula Omega
STH_expedition.28.desc: Nos ha contactado un comerciante local que tiene una serie de minerales que estarían dispuestos a comerciar con nosotros.
STH_expedition.28.name: Misión de tres años 1: comerciante encontrado
STH_expedition.3.desc: Ahora no es el momento de enviar una nave y una tripulación en una misión tan larga. La oportunidad vendrá nuevamente
STH_expedition.3.name: Misión rechazada
STH_expedition.300.desc: La misión está completa y todo lo que queda es informar al Capitán y a la tripulación. Se habrá ganado mucha experiencia de la misión, con muchas vidas afectadas para bien o para mal. \n\nEl líder de la expedición es libre de regresar al servicio, mientras que el barco se someterá a una reparación completa y se proporcionará un nuevo barco en el mundo natal
STH_expedition.300.name: Misión 3 años 3: Misión completada
STH_expedition.33.desc: [sth_expedition_Leader_2.GetName] ha identificado un planeta en exploraciones de largo alcance que merece una mirada más cercana. \n\nNuestros científicos recomiendan un estudio en profundidad del planeta para ver qué misterios se pueden descubrir
STH_expedition.33.name: Misión de tres años 2: encuesta del planeta
STH_expedition.34.desc: Nuestros científicos creen que este es un mundo joven en las primeras etapas de desarrollo que demuestra una belleza y volatilidad excepcionales, pero poco en términos de minerales útiles u otros recursos recuperables. \n\n Sin embargo, ha proporcionado una experiencia útil para la nave y la tripulación.
STH_expedition.34.name: Misión de tres años 2: encuesta del planeta
STH_expedition.35.desc: Nuestros científicos creen que este es un mundo joven en las primeras etapas de desarrollo que demuestra una belleza y volatilidad excepcionales, pero poco en términos de minerales útiles u otros recursos recuperables. \n\n Sin embargo, ha proporcionado una experiencia útil para la nave y la tripulación.
STH_expedition.35.name: Misión de tres años 2: encuesta del planeta
STH_expedition.36.desc:
Nuestros escaneos han recogido los restos de un antiguo cementerio de flotas lleno de naves inactivas que no han estado activos durante miles de años. Se necesita una investigación más profunda para descubrir la historia de estas personas olvidadas hace mucho tiempo. 

¿Quién sabe qué secretos hay dentro de los pasillos y habitaciones en lo profundo de estos recipientes? 

El Oficial de Ciencias nos informa que varios de las más grandes naves están intactas y son capaces de aceptar un equipo visitante.
STH_expedition.36.name: Misión de tres años 2: flota antigua
STH_expedition.37.desc: Quedan pocos equipos recuperables en los recipientes, sin embargo, algunos núcleos de memoria permanecen en gran parte intactos, ¡notable dada la edad de los recipientes! \n\nNuestros científicos creen que deberían ser capaces de extraer algo de investigación de los fragmentos restantes que ayudarán enormemente a los nuestros. equipos de investigación
STH_expedition.37.name: Misión de tres años 2: flota antigua
STH_expedition.38.desc:
Nuestro oficial de armas ha hecho un descubrimiento interesante: los restos de un arma basada en radiación unida a una de las naves más dañadas. 

 Estas armas siempre han sido moralmente dudosas en toda la galaxia y, aunque no podemos rescatar un arma que funcione, podríamos use fácilmente este salvamento para impulsar nuestra propia investigación. 

 Alternativamente, podríamos destruir el arma para evitar que cualquier otra persona tenga acceso a esta tecnología.
STH_expedition.38.name: Misión de tres años 2: flota antigua
STH_expedition.4.desc: La misión de exploración del espacio profundo está lista para comenzar, la nave y la tripulación no estarán disponibles durante la duración del evento de tres años. Proceder cuando esté listo
STH_expedition.4.e: Flagships are not suitable for these missions.
STH_expedition.4.f.tooltip: All expeditions that are active will return home within the year.
STH_expedition.4.name: Donde ningún hombre ha ido antes
STH_expedition.40.desc: Nuestras sondas han encontrado una cultura previa a la urdimbre, y nuestros antropólogos a bordo quisieran mirar más de cerca y tomar todas las precauciones para no interferir con el desarrollo de estas personas. Tal vez podamos ver un vistazo de cómo nuestra propia civilización se convirtió en la cultura próspera que tenemos hoy.
STH_expedition.40.name: Misión de tres años 2: cultura primitiva encontrada
STH_expedition.400.desc: Deep space missions are the pinnacle of exploration and discovery, the perfect opportunity for our Flagships which are crewed by the best minds in the fleet. The aim is to seek out new life and new civilisations, boldly going where no one has gone before
STH_expedition.400.name: A new 3 year mission awaits our Flagship
STH_expedition.401.desc: Command has identified a new three year mission. Now is the time to send the Flagship and one of our heroes to the designated Starbase to pick up supplies and required equipment.\n\nThe Flagship and leader will be locked and unavailable for the duration of the three years, but will be provided with a unique opportunity to gain experience, rare bonuses and rewards for their service.
STH_expedition.401.name: Send a ship to prepare
STH_expedition.402.desc: Now is not the time to send a ship and crew on such a lengthy mission. The opportunity will come again.
STH_expedition.402.name: Mission Rejected
STH_expedition.403.c: Warning: You can only send a Flagship.
STH_expedition.403.desc: The deep space exploration mission is ready to begin.\n\nThe Flagship and leader will be locked and unavailable for the duration of the three years, but will be provided with a unique opportunity to gain experience, rare bonuses and rewards for their service.
STH_expedition.403.name: Where no man has gone before
STH_expedition.41.desc: Las personas en el planeta a continuación son equivalentes a los hombres de las cavernas de nuestro pasado distante, aunque demuestran un nivel de desarrollo rápido que eclipsa todo lo visto antes, que bien merece un estudio adicional por parte de un equipo de observación.
STH_expedition.41.name: Misión de tres años 2: cultura primitiva
STH_expedition.42.desc_01: [sth_expedition_Leader_2.GetName] ha visto un asteroide en curso de colisión con el planeta. Parece que ha estado en un curso lento hacia el planeta durante muchos años, nuestras predicciones muestran que su impacto causaría un evento de nivel de extinción, terminando con toda la vida en la superficie. \n\nEl personal superior cree que podría tener un método para desviar el asteroide fuera de curso, en lo que sería una clara violación de la directiva principal, además de representar un riesgo para la nave. Debemos decidir qué medidas tomar.
STH_expedition.42.desc_02: [sth_expedition_Leader_2.GetName] ha visto un asteroide en curso de colisión con el planeta. Parece que ha estado en un curso lento hacia el planeta durante muchos años, nuestras predicciones muestran que su impacto causaría un evento de nivel de extinción, terminando con toda la vida en la superficie. \n\nEl personal superior cree que podría tener un método para desviar el asteroide fuera de curso, pero representaría un riesgo sustancial para la nave. Debemos decidir qué medidas tomar.
STH_expedition.42.name: Misión de tres años 2: Cultura primitiva - ¡Desastre!
STH_expedition.43.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] el informe de la misión indica que [sth_expedition_Leader_2.GetName] tuvo éxito al salvar las vidas de todos aquellos en el planeta. Quién sabe qué impacto tendrá esto en el futuro, ya que nuestra influencia ha tenido un impacto directo en el desarrollo natural de esta especie. Esperemos que sea para mejor.
STH_expedition.43.name: Misión de tres años 2: cultura primitiva salvada
STH_expedition.430.desc_01: Our long range probes have identified a planet that deserves a closer look. Our scientists recommend an in depth survey of the planet to see what mysteries that can be uncovered. Our science teams are excited to get the mission off to an interesting start.
STH_expedition.430.desc_02: Our expedition has passed a solar system which contains an interesting M-Class planet, our chief scientist has asked that it be given a closer look.
STH_expedition.430.desc_03: [sth_expedition_Leader_flag.GetName] has identified a rare planet on long range scans that could use a closer look. Our scientists recommend an in depth survey of the planet to see what mysteries that can be uncovered.
STH_expedition.430.name: Flagship 3-Year Mission Year 1: Planet Survey
STH_expedition.431.desc_01: On closer inspection the planet holds many exciting new discoveries, new species that have not been seen on any planet within our borders. Our scientists could spend the next several years going through the new discoveries, but we must continue with the mission. [sth_expedition_Leader_flag.GetName] will gain a lot of experience from the brief time spent here.
STH_expedition.431.desc_02: The planet is teeming with exotic new animal species, but nothing of strategic value. It could be classed as an anthropologists dream. Our scientists have asked to spend the next couple of days cataloging the species they have seen from orbit. The experience will go a long way to furthering our understanding of the evolution of our homeworld. Despite our scientists wishing to spend longer here, it is time to move on.
STH_expedition.431.desc_03: Our scientists believe this to be a young world in the early stages of development demonstrating exceptional beauty and volatility, but little in terms of useful minerals or other salvageable resources. It has however provided useful experience for the ship and crew.
STH_expedition.431.name: Flagship 3-Year Mission Year 1: Planet Survey
STH_expedition.432.desc: Our survey has uncovered rich veins of minerals and other rare resources scattered across the planet's surface. With no sentient lifeforms on the planet, we are free to claim the resources for ourselves, time to deploy the mining equipment and fill our cargo bays.
STH_expedition.432.name: Flagship 3-Year Mission: Planet Survey
STH_expedition.433.b: We do not have time for this.
STH_expedition.433.desc: One of the key responsibilities of any Captain of a Federation ship is to represent us in vital first contact missions. The crew have been tasked with making first contact with a new species.\n\nThe captain decides it is time to dust off their dress uniform and prepare to make a good impression to see what this new species have to offer.
STH_expedition.433.name: Flagship 3-Year Mission Year 1: First Contact
STH_expedition.434.desc: Every first contact is a unique experience and full of challenges. The Captain and contact specialist arrive in the meeting room waiting for their hosts to join. Doors at the far end of the room open and a team of well presented aliens walk into the room.
STH_expedition.434.name: Flagship 3-Year Mission Year 1: First Contact
STH_expedition.435.desc: After a long session talking it is clear that our hosts are fascinated with all that we have told them.
