STH_federation_flavour.116.desc_02: Hello, my name is [accessionStateLeader.GetName] and I represent the Scientific community within [From.GetName], while many are excited to work with you, many of us are concerned that our ongoing work will not be a priority and years of hard work could be lost!
STH_federation_flavour.116.desc_03: I am calling out the bureaucratic nature of the Federation! How do we prevent our empire from being swallowed up in the behemoth nature that is [Root.GetName]... I publicly question whether this is a sensible move for us!
STH_federation_flavour.116.name: High Profile Leader rejects Federation Integration
STH_federation_flavour.117.desc: Qapla' Federation allies! As we unite our forces to create a new power in the quadrant, we must first agree on how we tackle our Great Houses, many warriors operate the Great House fleets who would be eager and deserve the chance to join the ranks of Starfleet. \n\nAgreeing to this will transfer all Great House military fleets to [Root.GetName] control within the next year.
STH_federation_flavour.117.name: The Great Houses
STH_federation_flavour.118.desc: As per the agreement in the Integration of the Klingon Empire process, the Great House military assets have now been transferred to Starfleet control.
STH_federation_flavour.118.name: The Great House Fleets
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_01: As the diplomats working to integrate the Husnock into the Federation continue the process a theme continues to crop up, the Husnock military are insisting on adorining their uniforms with the ancient symbols of their clans, this would require an allowance from our uniform policy, but would smooth out some of the issues being raised.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_02: The Bolian delegates involved with their integration into the Federation have approached us with a request, the Bolians are asking if they can continue to wear their ceremonial jewelry under their Starfleet uniforms, so long as it does not interfere with operational effectiveness.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_03: Our diplomat services wish to discuss an important matter with us, the Rigellian Consortium are currently undergoing integration into the [Root.GetName], but are now raising an important matter, their military personnel in scope for transfer into Starfleet would like to make us aware that the facial marking and items that adorn their long hair carry cultural significance to them, and whilst it may not strictly adhere to the set uniform code, it is as much a part of them as their skin.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_04: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear the headdresses that play a key part of their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_05: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear the head coverings, that play a key part of their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_06: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear their traditional facial decorations, which play a key part in their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_07: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear their traditional facial decorations, which play a key part in their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_08: The Antedians are asking if their serving crew and officers would be allowed to bring onboard a crate of vermicula, despite the likely objections and potential environmental concerns. They have promised to keep the creatures out of sight and within their own living spaces.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_09: The process that the Tamarian's have had to undertake to join [Root.GetName] has been particularly challenging, the cultural and linguistic issues have made the early discussions a challenge, but both sides have made good progress. However, a new sticking point has arisen their leadership wishes for all Tamarian officers to be allowed to carry a small ceremonial dagger on their persons, these items are considered to be talismans.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_10: The Talaxian sense of style is well known across the Delta Quadrant, now that they are looking to join the [Root.GetName] they are asking to bring a small piece of this style to the standard Federation undergarments. Allowing the request would provide a timely boost to the ongoing membership integration efforts.
STH_federation_flavour.12.name: Federation Membership
STH_federation_flavour.120.desc_01: Good day [accessionStateLeader.GetName], our Integration negotiation teams have informed us of some concerning policies regarding your treatment of males within your society. \n\nThe Federation insists on equal rights of all individuals and this remains a key cornerstone of our society.
STH_federation_flavour.120.desc_02: Hello [accessionStateLeader.GetName], our Integration negotiation teams have informed us of some concerning policies regarding your treatment of females within your society. \n\nThe Federation insists on equal rights of all individuals, which remains a key cornerstone of our society.
STH_federation_flavour.120.name: Gender Policy Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.121.desc_01: The Federation has insisted that we review and change our long-standing misandrist policies before we are allowed to become a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.121.desc_02: The Federation has insisted that we review and change our long-standing misogynist policies before we are allowed to become a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.121.name: Gender Policy Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.122.desc_01: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed the former misandrist empire has agreed to the reforms and will be pursuing more gender-equal policies from now on.
STH_federation_flavour.122.desc_02: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed the former misogynist empire has agreed to the reforms and will be pursuing more gender-equal policies from now on.
STH_federation_flavour.122.name: Gender Policy Reformed
STH_federation_flavour.123.desc_01: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed our attempts to reform the misandrist empire have failed, their views are too deeply entrenched within their society. This will significantly impact their integration into the [Root.GetName].
STH_federation_flavour.123.desc_02: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed our attempts to reform the misogynist empire have failed, their views are too deeply entrenched within their society. This will significantly impact their integration into the [Root.GetName].
STH_federation_flavour.123.name: Gender Policy Rejected
STH_federation_flavour.124.desc: President! We wish to strongly object to your agreement to allow these misandrist views within the Federation, our union stands for equality for all and your decision makes a mockery of all that we stand for!
STH_federation_flavour.124.name: Formal Objection from [STH_federation_flavour_120_country.GetName]
STH_federation_flavour.125.desc: President! We wish to strongly object to your agreement to allow these misogynist views within the Federation, our union stands for equality for all and your decision makes a mockery of all that we stand for the females in our culture have not fought for their rights for centuries to stand alongside an empire that treats them in such a way.
STH_federation_flavour.125.name: Formal Objection from [STH_federation_flavour_120_country.GetName]
STH_federation_flavour.126.a: Send a diplomatic team to discuss.
STH_federation_flavour.126.desc: President [Root.GetRulerName] we must formally object to the Federation's continued discussions with [From.GetName], their misandric views are an affront to what many within the [Root.GetName] believe in!
STH_federation_flavour.126.name: Member State Objections
STH_federation_flavour.127.desc: President [Root.GetRulerName] we must formally object to the Federation's continued discussions with [From.GetName], their views and treatment of the female gender are an affront to what many within the [Root.GetName] believe in!
STH_federation_flavour.127.name: Member State Objections
STH_federation_flavour.128.desc: President [Root.GetRulerName] we simply cannot believe you are allowing [From.GetName] to join the Federation, allowing these criminal lowlife into the UFP is a security risk and a danger to our citizens, we formally object and demand this is discussed further.
STH_federation_flavour.128.name: Member State Objections
STH_federation_flavour.129.desc: Thanks to the efforts of [diplomacy_leader.GetName] our talks have been successful and harmony has again been restored to the member worlds of [Root.GetName] and a trust that the diplomatic service knows what is is doing.
STH_federation_flavour.129.name: Talks Successful
STH_federation_flavour.130.desc: Despite the efforts of [diplomacy_leader.GetName] our talks to bring harmony to the member worlds of [Root.GetName] has failed, as multiple Ambassadors formally announce their frustration at our latest new addition.
STH_federation_flavour.130.name: Talks Fail
STH_federation_flavour.131.a.tooltip: Agree to fund education programs and fund police activities to root out the crime syndicates.
STH_federation_flavour.131.desc: Hello, [accessionStateLeader.GetName] we have had disturbing reports about the criminal underworld and activity that makes up much of your society, the [Root.GetName] has established a community free from violence and crime that plagues your empire. \n\nIn order to progress your membership you must rid yourselves of these criminal elements and we will help you.
STH_federation_flavour.131.name: Criminal Underworld Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.132.desc_01: The Federation have agreed to fund programs, education initiates and policing projects to clear the criminal elements from our society, if we agree to support.
STH_federation_flavour.132.desc_02: The Federation has demanded that we agree to remove the criminal organizations from our empire in exchange for continued talks to join the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.132.name: Criminal Underworld Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.133.desc: [temp_target.GetName] has agreed to work with [Root.GetName] authorities to tackle the criminal underworld and root out the criminal organanisations that are rife across this empire.
STH_federation_flavour.133.name: [temp_target.GetName] agrees to remove crime
STH_federation_flavour.134.desc: [temp_target.GetName] has requested a hefty amount of Latinum to rid their empire of the criminal syndicates, whilst many diplomats see this as a clear attempt at bribery, it would allow the talks to continue and achieve our goals of tackling the criminal problem.
STH_federation_flavour.134.name: Bribe Requested
STH_federation_flavour.135.desc: [temp_target.GetName] has refused to remove the criminal elements of their society and have ended their ongoing efforts to join us a a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.135.name: [temp_target.GetName] refuse to change
STH_federation_flavour.136.desc: Attention President [Root.GetRulerName] we formally object to your clear bias and foolish tactics in allowing these undesirable traits into the harmony that is the [Root.GetName], this clear failure in leadership has not gone unnoticed.
STH_federation_flavour.136.name: Message from Member World
STH_federation_flavour.137.desc: Hello, [accessionStateLeader.GetName] we have had disturbing reports that you enslave your population and curtail the freedoms of your people, this is a practice that cannot be allowed within [Root.GetName] and must stop for you to continue this journey.
STH_federation_flavour.137.name: Slaving Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.138.desc_01: The Federation has agreed to fund programs, education initiates, and policing projects to eliminate the use of slaves throughout our empire.
STH_federation_flavour.138.desc_02: The Federation has demanded that we abandon our slavery culture before we can resume our bid to join their Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.138.name: Slaving Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.140.desc: [temp_target.GetName] have told us that they will not change and abandon their slaving ways, as a result, they have abandoned their attempt to join us as a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.140.name: [temp_target.GetName] refuses to change
STH_federation_flavour.144.desc: As part of the integration process into the Federation, there is an opportunity for many of the leaders who have served [From.GetName] to request a transfer to Starfleet once [From.GetName] has completed the membership process.
STH_federation_flavour.144.name: Transfer Leaders to Starfleet
STH_federation_flavour.145.desc: As part of the transfer of fleet control to Starfleet, our Starbase will be transitioned to Starfleet control, except the Starbase belonging to our Capital. If we wish to control all Starbases it can be agreed here.
STH_federation_flavour.145.name: Starbase Control
STH_federation_flavour.147.a.tooltip: This country has failed to join the Federation and can re-apply n 20 years.
STH_federation_flavour.147.desc: Joining the Federation is not for every state, and on this occasion, the differences between the two sides were too great for the diplomats to overcome, and both parties agreed to leave the talks, with the option of re-attempting open in the future.
STH_federation_flavour.147.name: Federation Membership Process Abandoned
STH_federation_flavour.149.a: This is no concern of yours [cardassian_union_temp_leader.GetName].
STH_federation_flavour.149.b: Perhaps we need to slow down and investigate these claims.
STH_federation_flavour.149.desc: Greetings from across the border from your neighbours in the Cardassian Union, it has come to our attention that you are looking to welcome the Bajorans into your empire, let this be a friendly warning, the Bajorans cannot be trusted and from our experience are little more than petty terrorists, we would be more than willing to help you put them in their place should the need arise.
STH_federation_flavour.149.name: Message from Cardassia Prime
STH_federation_flavour.2.a.tooltip: El proceso de adhesión a la Federación de [bajoran_republic.GetName] se aceleró un 10%.
STH_federation_flavour.2.c.tooltip: El proceso de adhesión a la Federación de [bajoran_republic.GetName] retrocedió un 10%.
STH_federation_flavour.2.c: El código de vestimenta no es negociable.
STH_federation_flavour.2.desc: Saludos niño, soy Kai [bajoranKai.GetName]. Gracias por permitirme expresar mis preocupaciones sobre este asunto. \n\nLos aretes familiares que usa mi gente son una faceta clave de la expresión de su fe en los Profetas.
STH_federation_flavour.2.name: Transmisión entrante desde Kai [bajoranKai.GetName]
STH_federation_flavour.3.a: It is a shame it has ended this way.
STH_federation_flavour.3.desc_01: [Root.GetLeaderName], after much deliberation with the Vedek Council, the Kai, and the Ministers we have decided that membership is not in our best interests, while our religious beliefs may not be of much importance to you, we have given up so much of our heritage that this is a step too far. Maybe we can look at this union again, at a later date.
STH_federation_flavour.3.desc_02: Oh my child, I am sure you meant no disrespect when you turned down our request, but I am sure 'even' you can understand how we Bajorans can no longer continue this game of membership with an organisation that holds us in such contempt... perhaps a more enlighted culture would welcome us and deserve the love the Prophets, and their Kai have to offer.
STH_federation_flavour.3.name: Bajor Backs out of Federation Membership
STH_federation_flavour.4.a: Agree to discuss with the Chancellor.
STH_federation_flavour.4.desc: Our diplomats engaged in bringing the Klingon Empire into the [Root.GetName] has encountered a recurring issue that is circling with little progress. \n\nThe Klingon warriors are very proud of their Great House system and demonstrate their allegiances on their uniforms, this runs counter to our uniform policy, however the issue has reached the point it now requires direct management.
STH_federation_flavour.4.name: Klingon House Markings
STH_federation_flavour.5.desc: It is an honour to meet you [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am [klingonLeader.GetName]. I can see that you are a notable warrior willing to discuss this topic with me, many would not... Our warriors are wary of giving up the Klingon way of life and submitting to the Federation, and whilst we can see the benefits of a stronger future together, I need something to take back to the uncertain elements within the Empire who fear the loss of our culture.
STH_federation_flavour.5.name: Meeting with the Chancellor
STH_federation_flavour.500.b: Now is not the time for this competition.
STH_federation_flavour.500.desc:
[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha aumentado rápidamente en las tablas de la liga de campeonato Anbo-jytsu de la flota, y ahora se prepara para enfrentar al campeón actual [anboJytsuChampion.GetName]. 

Anbo-jytsu, considerado por muchos como la mejor forma de artes marciales [Root.Leader.Species.GetName], es al mismo tiempo visto por algunos como un pasatiempo tontamente peligroso. 

 Tomando lugar en una arena circular donde dos oponentes compiten entre sí, ambos competidores usan una armadura protectora ligera y un casco que efectivamente ciega a los participantes. Se utiliza un bastón como arma, con un sensor de proximidad en un extremo y un pequeño cojín esférico en el otro.
STH_federation_flavour.500.name: Anbo-jytsu
STH_federation_flavour.501.desc: Después de un combate intenso, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha derrotado a [From.GetName] para convertirse en el campeón de la flota Anbo-jytsu. \n\nAunque parecía que [From.GetName] presionaría [From.GetHerHis] ventaja para una victoria fácil varias veces en el partido, fue la persistencia de [Root.Leader.GetName] la que finalmente ganó el campeonato para [Root .Leader.GetHerHim].
STH_federation_flavour.501.name: Anbo-jyutsu
STH_federation_flavour.502.desc:
Después de un intenso combate, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] ha sido derrotado por [From.GetName], quien retiene el título [From.GetHerHis] como campeón de la flota Anbo-jytsu. 

Aunque parecía que [Root.Leader.GetName] tenía varias oportunidades para mejorar [From.GetHerHis], fue la experiencia de [From.GetName] la que finalmente ganó el campeonato por [From.GetHerHim]. 

 Peor, [Root.Leader.GetName] parece haber agravado una lesión previa que resulta en una función motora reducida en [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] brazo izquierdo.
STH_federation_flavour.502.name: Anbo-jyutsu
STH_federation_flavour.6.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] I come from a proud race, a fierce race, and your refusal to allow us a small token of our culture is seen as too big an insult for many of our warriors to stand. The Klingon way is proud and spirited and your position demonstrated there is too big a gap between us for the Empire to join your alliance of Planets. Maybe we can resume the talk at a later date, but not today. Qapla'.
STH_federation_flavour.6.name: The Klingons back out of Federation Membership
STH_federation_flavour.602.a: Una iniciativa que vale la pena.
STH_federation_flavour.602.desc:
Después de un largo tiempo en las profundidades del espacio,  [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName]  ha comenzado a tener dificultades para recordar el propósito original de [Root.Leader.GetHerHis]. La vida de la tripulación de  [Root.GetFleetName]  se han vuelto rutinarios y rutinarios. 

Otros podrían apuntar a este modelo de eficiencia, pero para la Flota Estelar, la moral y el bienestar de una tripulación son primordiales. 

 [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] ha comenzado a considerar organizar actividades de la tripulación para proporcionar un descanso de lo mundano.
STH_federation_flavour.602.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.604.desc:
No ha tomado mucho tiempo organizar una orquesta improvisada fuera del equipo de  [Root.GetFleetName] § !, ya que un sorprendente número de miembros del equipo tiene al menos algo de experiencia con un instrumento musical. 

Después de un mes de preparación, la tripulación ha creado algo notable. Si bien las actuaciones pueden carecer de cierta sofisticación técnica, están inculcadas con una pasión reservada solo para aquellos que han visto las profundidades del espacio. 

Más importante que eso, la tripulación se ha unido más fuerte que nunca.
STH_federation_flavour.604.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.605.desc:
stá empezando a sonar enojado de nuevo. Tal vez necesites otro tratamiento. 

'Lo que necesito es salir de esta celda. He estado encerrado aquí por días. Has controlado todos mis movimientos. ¡Me has dicho qué comer, qué pensar y qué decir, y luego, cuando muestro un atisbo de pensamiento independiente, me abrochas! Me inyectas drogas. ¡Lo llamas un tratamiento! ' 

La organización de un grupo dramático aficionado a bordo del [Root.GetFleetName] ha demostrado ser una distracción bienvenida para la tripulación.
STH_federation_flavour.605.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.606.desc:
El holodeck proporciona una amplia gama de experiencias, pero se necesita un talento único para crear en lugar de consumir su producción. 

Los miembros aburridos de la tripulación entusiasmados por las historias antiguas de sus mundos natales se han encargado de hacer precisamente eso. 

El resultado fue bien recibido, y finalmente involucró a casi todos los miembros de la tripulación de  [Root.GetFleetName]  incluyendo [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle]  [Root.GetLeaderName] § !. 

El programa se grabó y distribuyó desde entonces en toda la flota.
STH_federation_flavour.606.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.607.desc:
No ha tomado mucho tiempo organizar una orquesta improvisada fuera del equipo de  [Root.GetFleetName] § !, ya que un sorprendente número de miembros del equipo tiene al menos algo de experiencia con un instrumento musical. 

Después de un mes de preparación, la tripulación ha creado algo notable. Si bien las actuaciones pueden carecer de cierta sofisticación técnica, están inculcadas con una pasión reservada solo para aquellos que han visto las profundidades del espacio. 

Más importante que eso, la tripulación se ha unido más fuerte que nunca.
STH_federation_flavour.607.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.608.desc: Combinando teatro, literatura y escultura junto con técnicas de narración que se remontan a los días de los antiguos juegos electrónicos, la creación de una holo-novela interactiva es una forma de arte como ninguna otra. \n\nTrabajando juntos, la tripulación del  [Root.GetFleetName]  han creado algo único: tejer una historia que se basa en parte en sus propias aventuras y descubrimientos, y en parte en el resultado de su amplia imaginación colectiva, lo que permite a todos crear su propia aventura interestelar.
STH_federation_flavour.608.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.609.desc:
La tripulación del  [Root.GetFleetName]  aprobó rápidamente la idea de participar en un combate amistoso. 

Un miembro de la tripulación buscó profundamente en los archivos y encontró un antiguo juego de cartas de la Tierra que parecía adecuado: el póker. Organizando un sistema complejo que permitiría a cada oficial participar en varios combates antes de encontrar su clasificación y competir contra sus compañeros, la tripulación pasó todo el mes en feroces preparativos y combates de eliminación más feroces. 

El ganador final recibió una caja de brandy saurio, pero prometió compartirlo con la tripulación en la oportunidad más cercana.
STH_federation_flavour.609.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.610.desc:
Siempre práctico, la tripulación del  [Root.GetFleetName]  Tomó la noticia de su tiempo de inactividad con equidad y estableció un estricto régimen de capacitación. 

Para hacerlo más atractivo y encajar con la orden del [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] de relajarse, la tripulación decidió convertir el ejercicio de entrenamiento de tiro en una competencia. 

El ganador, una transferencia reciente a seguridad, recibió una caja de brandy saurio que rápidamente se compartió entre el departamento.
STH_federation_flavour.610.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.620.desc: Los oficiales de la  [Root.GetFleetName]  han declarado hoy como  [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName]  Día. \n\nOrnaments, se han planeado una gran cantidad de dulces y bebidas de la ciudad natal de [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] y una variedad de coloridos carteles.
STH_federation_flavour.620.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.621.b: Es hora de que esta tradición llegue a su fin.
STH_federation_flavour.621.desc: Tras el éxito del anterior  [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName]  Celebración del día, la tripulación del  [Root.GetFleetName]  he decidido continuar la tradición en este año una vez más.
STH_federation_flavour.621.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.630.desc.intraCre:
Los oficiales de la  [Root.GetFleetName]  han decidido celebrar un torneo de béisbol entre la tripulación en la holodeck de la nave. 

Un viejo juego de la Tierra, muchos lo consideran lo suficientemente oscuro como para garantizar que todos los participantes entren como novatos. 

Dividir a la tripulación en equipos de nivel de departamento , al lado ganador se le promete un mes de prioridad de holodeck.
STH_federation_flavour.630.desc.planet:
Los oficiales de la  [Root.GetFleetName]  han decidido celebrar un torneo de béisbol entre la tripulación en la holodeck de la nave. 

Un viejo juego de la Tierra, muchos consideran que es lo suficientemente oscuro como para garantizar que todos los participantes entren como novatos. 

Organizar a la tripulación en un solo equipo, el mundo cercano de  [baseballCompetitorPlanet.GetName]  ha sido retado a reunir un equipo y unirse a la competencia, con el lado ganador prometió varias cajas de brandy saurio.
STH_federation_flavour.630.desc.ship:
Los oficiales de la  [Root.GetFleetName]  han decidido celebrar un torneo de béisbol entre la tripulación en la holodeck de la nave. 

Un viejo juego de la Tierra, muchos consideran que es lo suficientemente oscuro como para garantizar que todos los participantes entren como novatos. 

Organizar a la tripulación en un solo equipo, el  cercano [baseballCompetitorShip.GetName]  ha sido retado a reunir un equipo y unirse a la competencia, con el lado ganador prometió varias cajas de brandy saurio.
STH_federation_flavour.630.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.631.desc.intraCre: El departamento de Ciencias de  [Root.GetFleetName]  Ha derrotado a los equipos de la otra nave en un torneo de béisbol muy disputado. \n\nPara su logro, la tripulación ha considerado organizarse para jugar con más frecuencia en el futuro.
STH_federation_flavour.631.desc.planet: El  [Root.GetFleetName]  ha derrotado al  [baseballCompetitorPlanet.GetName]  equipo en un torneo de béisbol muy reñido. \n\nPara su logro, la tripulación ha considerado organizar el equipo para jugar con más frecuencia en el futuro.
STH_federation_flavour.631.desc.ship: El  [Root.GetFleetName]  ha derrotado al  [baseballCompetitorShip.GetName]  equipo en un torneo de béisbol muy reñido. \n\nPara su logro, la tripulación ha considerado organizar el equipo para jugar con más frecuencia en el futuro.
STH_federation_flavour.631.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.632.desc.intraCre: Mientras que el departamento táctico de  [Root.GetFleetName]  Ha derrotado a los equipos de la otra nave, pocos entre la tripulación parecían encontrar el juego como una experiencia agradable.
STH_federation_flavour.632.desc.planet: El  [Root.GetFleetName]  ha sido derrotado por el  [baseballCompetitorPlanet.GetName]  equipo en un torneo de béisbol muy reñido. \n\nA pesar de la pérdida, la tripulación ha considerado organizar el equipo para jugar con más frecuencia en el futuro.
STH_federation_flavour.632.desc.ship: El  [Root.GetFleetName]  ha sido derrotado por el  [baseballCompetitorShip.GetName]  equipo en un torneo de béisbol muy reñido. \n\nA pesar de la pérdida, la tripulación ha considerado organizar el equipo para jugar con más frecuencia en el futuro.
STH_federation_flavour.632.name: Actividades a bordo
STH_federation_flavour.7.a: Agree to meet with the Nagus.
STH_federation_flavour.700.desc: El transporte de grandes cantidades de material y personal a Luna para reparar el daño causado a la Colonia Minera Orpheus está completo, y la plataforma de perforación móvil está operativa una vez más.
STH_federation_flavour.700.name: Colonia Minera Orfeo
STH_federation_flavour.701.desc: El pequeño asentamiento de Armstrong City en la luna se ha ampliado enormemente con nuevos edificios y colonos. Los colonos continúan acudiendo en masa a las nuevas oportunidades en Luna, y se cita a uno de ellos diciendo que fue la noche lunar de un mes. \n\n'La gente dice que es tan árido y duro, pero no lo es. es bonito. El amanecer es tan impactante en la luna. En un minuto estás en la noche más oscura que puedas imaginar, y al instante siguiente, el sol se levanta y esta luz gloriosa y pura explota en la superficie '.
STH_federation_flavour.701.name: Armstrong City
STH_federation_flavour.702.desc: El pequeño asentamiento de Tycho City en la luna se ha ampliado enormemente con nuevos edificios y colonos. La población lunar ahora está prosperando, y dentro de unos años, la ciudad será uno de varios hitos lunares lo suficientemente grandes como para ser vistos desde la Tierra durante el día.
STH_federation_flavour.702.name: Tycho City
STH_federation_flavour.703.desc: The upgraded Academy complex in San Francisco will be the pinciple of education across the Federation, training young officers and imparting the knowledge and skills for future captains for generations to come.
STH_federation_flavour.703.name: Starfleet Academy
STH_federation_flavour.704.desc: The small settlement of New Berlin on the moon has been expanded greatly with new buildings and colonists. The lunar population is now thriving, and within a few years the city will be one of several lunar landmarks large enough to be seen from Earth in the daytime.
STH_federation_flavour.704.name: New Berlin City
STH_federation_flavour.705.desc: The Omega training mission exercise on Titan was rapidly becoming a notorious training scenario for Starfleet recruits, the expansion of this facility to a state of the art survival training centre creates a tougher breed of officer entering Starfleet.
STH_federation_flavour.705.name: Titan Training Facility
STH_federation_flavour.706.desc: The Daystrom Institute, also known as the Daystrom Institute of Advanced Robotics, Daystrom Research Institute, Daystrom Institute of Technology, and Daystrom Technological Institute, is a Federation establishment based in Okinawa, Japan. It is considered a department within Starfleet. The Institute is named after Doctor Richard Daystrom, who invented the duotronic computer and unsuccessfully attempted to create the first multitronic computer. The institute employs both Starfleet personnel and civilians who are scientific and research specialists in their fields of study.
STH_federation_flavour.706.name: The Daystrom Institute
STH_federation_flavour.750.desc: El Proyecto Atlantis, la creación de un nuevo subcontinente artificial fuera de la Cordillera del Atlántico Medio, ha sido durante mucho tiempo un sueño del Director [atlantis_manager.GetName]. La viabilidad del proyecto ha sido rechazada en el pasado, ya que uno de los desafíos era acelerar la acumulación en la parte inferior del manto sin aumentar el estrés en las placas tectónicas. \n\nCon el Director [atlantis_manager.GetName] a cargo del equipo de investigación, se ha desarrollado una nueva técnica para utilizar potentes resonadores armónicos para aliviar la presión tectónica en las placas sin causar eventos sísmicos masivos. Según las proyecciones de [atlantis_manager.GetHerHis], el proceso llevaría varios años, pero aumentaría sustancialmente la cantidad de masa de tierra utilizable en la Tierra.
STH_federation_flavour.750.name: Nueva Atlántida
STH_federation_flavour.8.desc: Greetings, greetings! I am Grand Nagus [ferengiLeader.GetName] as excited as the citizens of [ferengi_alliance.capital_scope.GetName] are to join the mighty [Root.GetName], we do have some minor ... contractual concerns to discuss. \n\nThe appropriation of wealth and profit is essential to every warm-bodied Ferengi and we would be looking for some form of concession to our culture, perhaps limited to our headskirts?
STH_federation_flavour.8.name: Message from the Nagus
STH_federation_flavour.9.desc: Hello [Root.GetRulerTitle], we are aware of the concessions that the Federation is being forced to make to appease the Ferengi, but we ask why. \n\nWhy compromise our values for the sake of these latinum seeking cretins? We lower our high standards to allow the Ferengi into our community at the cost of our morals. The line must be drawn, here and no further!
STH_federation_flavour.9.name: Urgent Message from [objecting_country.GetName] Ambassador
STH_federation_story.1.desc: Desde hace varias semanas, [Root.GetName] Security ha estado intentando rastrear una serie de piratas informáticos ilegales. Las intrusiones parecen tener una cosa en común: todas han apuntado a ubicaciones conocidas por almacenar información histórica clasificada sobre las Guerras Eugenias de finales del siglo XX, donde los humanos genéticamente aumentados casi reclamaron la dominación total sobre la Tierra. \n\nPor qué alguien querría desenterrar los fantasmas del pasado sigue siendo desconocido.
STH_federation_story.1.name: Actividad inusual
STH_federation_story.10.desc:
Habiendo llegado a la estación de investigación en órbita [augment_research_target_2.GetName], es rápidamente evidente que no todo está bien en la estación. 

Varias infracciones de casco se detectan, y varios cuerpos flotan muertos a lo largo de la estación. 

Como un equipo de seguridad se prepara para abordar la estación, las alertas de proximidad se activan. Los buques de un enjambre de diseño alienígena de su posición en el lado lejano de la estación, las armas enganchadas.
STH_federation_story.10.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_federation_story.1001.desc: Greetings my Chancellor, I am Azetbur of House Makok, I come before the high council with a grave warning, but also a solution. \n\nThe destruction of Praxis has left our homeworld in grave danger from the debris that falls towards our home and threatens our atmosphere. Klingons make fine warriors but poor scientists, but solution lies with our former enermies, the United Federation of Planets, for they have the technology to save our world.
STH_federation_story.1001.name: A new beginning for the Empire
STH_federation_story.1002.desc: Hail Chancellor, I am General Chang! I have fought many battles against these Federation and I feel I know them better than any warrior in the Empire. I volunteer to escort you on this mission. On my honour you will be save my lord.
STH_federation_story.1002.name: General Chang
STH_federation_story.1003.desc: Greetings Admiral [fed_undiscovered_leader.GetName] we have recieved a diplomatic invitation from the Klingon Empire, a chance for lasting peace between our worlds. \n\nThe Empire needs our help and we require peace and a future where we can call the Klingons allies. Rendevouz with the Klingon Chancellor and pave a way for lasting peace.
STH_federation_story.1003.name: A Brave New World
STH_federation_story.1005.desc: Starfleet have agreed to meet with us, they are sending their Flagship and one of their finest leaders to meet with us.
STH_federation_story.1005.name: The Undiscovered Country
STH_federation_story.1010.desc: The Federation Starship [ufp_undiscovered_country_ship.GetName] has entered the system and is hailing us, they have invited us over to experence the best hospitality the Federation has to offer.
STH_federation_story.1010.name: The Undiscovered Country
STH_federation_story.1011.desc: General Chang, Lady Azetbur and Chancellor [vi_tuc_klingons.GetRulerName] have arrived onboard and are expecting to be treated as honoured guests as we begin diplomatic discussions.
STH_federation_story.1011.name: Guess who's coming to dinner?
STH_federation_story.1012.desc_01: Our Federation hosts treated us to a lavish meal in fine surroundings, treating us with the honour and respect that our leadership deserved. \n\nMany did not believe our former foe would have the capability to show such respect, but it appears they were wrong.
STH_federation_story.1012.desc_02: If that meal was the best the Federation has to offer then we should pity them, any Klingon field chef could prepare a more exciting meal that was on offer tonight. \n\nHowever the company was pleasant enough and diplomatic courtesies were maintained.
STH_federation_story.1012.desc_03: What a disgusting experience that was the food was poor and the company was rude and disrespectful, if this is how the Federation treats honoured guests then perhaps we have made a mistake entering discussions with them.
STH_federation_story.1012.name: Federation Hospitality
STH_federation_story.1013.a: Negotiations start first thing in the morning.
STH_federation_story.1013.desc_01: It appears the Klingons were impressed with our efforts this evening and are eager to resume more formal discussions with us. \n\nFew would have expected a pleasant meal with a party of Klingon warriors, but despite a few cultural mishaps it was a good evening.
STH_federation_story.1013.desc_02: Reports suggest the Klingons were far from impressed with their treatment during their stay on our ship claiming we failed to treat them with the honour and respect they deserved. \n\nThis hasn't got proceedings off to the start we would have hoped for.
STH_federation_story.1013.name: The Undiscovered Country
STH_federation_story.1015.desc_01:
As both ships settled into the night shift the calm was disrupted by the sounds of torpedoes slamming into the unshielded hull of the Klingon envoy ship. As explosions rip through the unprotected internal sections of the ship, un-noticed by the Klingon crew a team of space suited assassins beam onto the now powerless Klingon battleship. 

Warriors caught unaware whilst trying to restore power to their vessel are easily phasered down by the team as they make their way towards the Chancellors chambers.

Reaching [vi_tuc_klingons.GetRulerName] the assailants fire at the Klingon leader, causing life threatening injuries before beaming away leaving a scene of complete chaos.
STH_federation_story.1015.desc_02:
As both ships settled into the night shift the calm was disrupted by the sounds of torpedoes slamming into the unshielded hull of the Klingon envoy ship. As power failed throughout the damaged sections of the ship, un-noticed by the Klingon crew a team of space suited assassins beam onto the now powerless Klingon battleship. 

Warriors caught unaware whilst trying to restore power to their vessel are easily phasered down by the team as they make their way towards the Chancellors chambers.

Reaching [vi_tuc_klingons.GetRulerName] the assailants fire at the Klingon leader, but Azetbur manages to dive in front of the attack taking the brunt of the damage. The assassins depart leaving behind a scene of destruction.
STH_federation_story.1015.name: Klingon Ship attacked
STH_federation_story.1016.b: It is too risky to intervene.
STH_federation_story.1016.desc_01: The Klingon flagship is calling for assistance, they have sustained severe damage and have numerous casualties including the Chancellor, who is in critical condition in their sickbay.
STH_federation_story.1016.desc_02: The Klingon flagship is calling for assistance, they have sustained severe damage and have numerous casualties including the Lady Azetbur, who is in critical condition in their sickbay.
STH_federation_story.1016.name: Klingons call for aid
STH_federation_story.1017.a: It is all in the doctors hands.
STH_federation_story.1017.desc: The Starfleet captain and their doctor beam over to our Flagship with a set of medical supplies. The doctor immedialy goes to work attempting to save the lives of our injured crew and leadership...
STH_federation_story.1017.name: Federation Doctor arrives
STH_federation_story.1018.desc: Admiral [leader_name_ref.GetName] returns with the news that they were unsuccessful in their attempts to save the Klingon injured who passed from their wounds in the early hours. Worryingly the damage to the Klingons and their ship appears to be consistant with Starfleet weaponary, to make matters worse the Klingons are demanding we hand over [leader_name_ref.GetName] for crimes against the Empire.
STH_federation_story.1018.name: [klingon_killed_leader.GetName] dies
STH_federation_story.1019.desc: The Starfleet officer and his medical doctor have been handed to us. They will be sent to the prison planet of Rura Penthe where they will be the rest of the accursed days digging Dilithium from that hellish rock and regretting their crimes against our people.
STH_federation_story.1019.name: Rura Penthe
STH_federation_story.1020.desc_01: These acts by the Federation cannot be allowed to remain unchallenged they dishonour our warriors and all those who fight for the Empire. The shouts of fury ring loud across Qo'nos demanding retribution.
STH_federation_story.1020.desc_02: Starfleet has dared to defy our demands for compensation for the acts of their vessel and crew against our envoy vessel. This act of dishonour insults all Klingons and it cannot be allowed to remain unchallenged for all powers will see the Klingon Empire as weak and pathetic.
STH_federation_story.1020.name: Demand Compensation
STH_federation_story.1021.desc: Following what we believe to have been failed peace talks the United Federation of Planets and the Klingon Empire have now gone to war. \n\nThe impact of this war will be felt across the quadrant.
STH_federation_story.1021.name: Klingon Empire & UFP go to War
STH_federation_story.1022.desc: The High Council has met following the events of recent days and have agreed that although the outcome could have been worse, the insult against the Empire should be repayed with some form of tribute and recompense from the Federation.
STH_federation_story.1022.name: Demand Tribute
STH_federation_story.1023.desc: The Klingon Empire is demanding that we pay tribute as a form of recompense for the attack apon their ship. They are refusing to continue the peace talks unless we pay them these fund to repair the damage and apology for this insult. \n\nWhilst the crew claim they took no actions against the Chancellor's ship, many think that we should accept the punishment and continue the peace talks.
STH_federation_story.1023.name: Tribute Demanded
STH_federation_story.1024.desc: The howls from the Klingon warriors alert the honoured dead in Sto-vo-Kor that a new warrior is travelling to dine in the mighty halls. [klingon_killed_leader.GetName] joins the list of the honoured dead, despite the efforts from the Starfleet team. \n\nHonour must be restored and the Federation must pay for this act of betrayal and hand over the Admiral.
STH_federation_story.1024.name: [klingon_killed_leader.GetName] dies
STH_federation_story.1025.desc: As both ships settled into the night shift the calm was disrupted by the sounds of torpedoes slamming into the unshielded hull of the Klingon envoy ship. The tactical officer on the night shift was able to wrestle the shields up before any further strikes could be made against the Flagship. Critically damaged, but still operational an alarm triggers indicating intruders have beamed onto the ship. Sending a contingent of warriors to intercept the would-be assassins allows us to capture a trio of Starfleet officers.\n\nBefore they can be questioned each officer ingests a suicide capsule, at least they have enough honour to refuse to be captured alive...
STH_federation_story.1025.name: Assassination attempt prevented
STH_federation_story.1026.desc:
The Klingon vessel appears to have surived whomever attacked the ship, General Chang appears on screen accusing our ship of firing on his ship. Our Science Officer cannot explain the scenario that played out just minuits ago, the Klingons were clearly fired on, but no such order came from our ship. 

To make matters worse the bodies of three Starfleet crew members were found onboard the Klingon ship, however they killed themselves before they could be questioned. 

General Chang has declared the talks over and that we have not heard the last of this insult.
STH_federation_story.1026.name: Klingons Attacked
STH_federation_story.1027.desc:
In the early hours of the morning, the on duty security officer picked up a tripped alarm on a storage locker, with nothing else to do the officer sends a secuirty team to investigate. 

On arriving at the destination they find a small team of officers attempting to break into a weapons locker, caught off-guard the trio of officers engage an emergency transporter and vanish.

All evidence suggests that we have managed to stop some sort of covert assassination attempt, presumably on the Klingon vessel. With no further evidence to go on, all we can do now is wait for the next stage of talks and be thankful nothing worse came from this.
STH_federation_story.1027.name: Asassination attempted foiled
STH_federation_story.1028.name: Time to depart
STH_federation_story.1030.b: How can anyone escape Rura Penthe?
STH_federation_story.1030.desc:
[Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am [suggested_rura_Leader1.GetName] and I come to you with worrying news. The attack against the Klingon vessel, for which our officers were arrested was a hoax. 

We have found evidence of a plot by members of Starfleet and the Klingon Defence Force to disrupt the peace talks and frame [ufp_undiscovered_country_leader_rura_penthe.GetName] for the murders on the Klingon Flagship. 

We request permission to extract [ufp_undiscovered_country_leader_rura_penthe.GetHerHim] from the prison world of Rura Penthe and then onto Khitomer to expose this plot!
STH_federation_story.1030.name: Plot against the Khitomer Conference
STH_federation_story.1031.desc: Life on the frozen prison world is every bit as challenging as the Klingon's stated it would be, the cold, the guards and the gruelling manual labour are all potential killers. However [ufp_undiscovered_country_leader_rura_penthe.GetName] has faced challenged throughout their career. Managing to join forces with another inmate the prisoners were able to escape to the frozen surface of the planet and just as all hope of escape was about to be lost, the familiar tingle of a transporter beam and freedom.
STH_federation_story.1031.name: Escape from Rura Penthe
STH_federation_story.1032.a: Ok, but time for a new Warden.
STH_federation_story.1032.b: It had better be a good reason.
STH_federation_story.1032.desc: The warden on Rura Penthe has reported that our Federation prisoners have escaped, with the aid of a Starfleet ship. The Federation ambassador has promised to explain all and that the future of the Khitomer Conference is at stake.
STH_federation_story.1032.name: Prisoners escape Rura Penthe
STH_federation_story.1033.desc: Following repeated scans of the planets surface, no signs of life could be found. A detailed scan finds a faint trace of the hidden transponder, but no sign of the Admiral or doctor. \n\nUnable to wait any longer we can only assume they did not manage surive the inhospitable conditions on the surface, sadly we must now consider them dead and continue onward to Khitomer.
STH_federation_story.1033.name: Rescue attempt fails
STH_federation_story.1034.desc: The warden on Rura Penthe has filed a report indicating a mysterious signal was reported in orbit of the prison planet. A Bird-of-Prey was dispatched, but did not pick up anything out of the normal. With the Khitomer Conference on the horizon security should be at its tightest.
STH_federation_story.1034.name: Mysterious singal over Rura Penthe
STH_federation_story.1035.desc: As [khitomer_conf_ship.GetName] enters orbit above Camp Khitomer, the bridge crew beam down determined to uncover the plot taking place at the peace talks. With dignitories from across the Federation member worlds, Klingon Empire and observers from other major powers all in attendance it seems as if the eyes of the galaxy are on the events taking place on the planet.
STH_federation_story.1035.name: The Khitomer Conference
STH_federation_story.1036.desc: Following the anthems of the Klingon Empire and Federation of Planets, the opening talks begin. Foreign dignitories from across the sector are in attendance to join the talks and witness this historic occassion. \n\nPlanetary security has noted that the [khitomer_conf_ship.GetName] has entered orbit unannouced, General Chang has insisted on returning to his warship to monitor the situation.
STH_federation_story.1036.name: The Khitomer Conference
STH_federation_story.1037.desc: Seeing the leaders of both countries lining up to speak, [khitomer_conf_leader.GetName ] orders their crew to fan out and search for a potential assassin, the staged murder of the Federation President could bring both countries to a state of war.\n\nTo make matters more urgent all communications with [khitomer_conf_ship.GetName] have been lost...
STH_federation_story.1037.name: Wrong us... shall we not revenge?
STH_federation_story.1038.desc: A small red scope dot dances across the chest of [ufp_ruler_khitomer.GetName] unoticed by all except [khitomer_conf_leader.GetName], diving for the assassin and knocking them through the overlooking window to the ground below. \n\nGasps of concern ring out from the conference participants as a Klingon and his sniper rifle fall to the ground, however all is not as it seems, pulling the mask from the Klingon's face to reveal a Starfleet General and with a final triumphant shout the General shouts 'Chang will complete the mission'.
STH_federation_story.1039.desc: The assassin is able to fire two quick shots from his sniper rifle before the Starfleet crew are able to take the assailant down. The cries from the crowd are enough to confirm that the shots have found their targets and that the Klingon Chancellor and Federation President are both dead. \n\nWith the attacker's job now complete, they are revealed to be a Klingon before they beam away.
STH_federation_story.1039.name: Both Leaders Killed
STH_federation_story.1040.desc: The source of the commotion is quickly identified as a hidden assassin, a Klingon male, opens fire from a sniper rifle, the shots hit the rulers of the Klingon Empire and Federation killing both instantly. Looking over at the attacker the telltale sign of a Klingon transporter beam whisks him away.
STH_federation_story.1040.name: Leaders Assassinated
STH_federation_story.1041.desc: The assassin is able to fire off a single shot from his sniper rifle before the Starfleet crew are able to take the assailant down. The cries from the crowd are enough to confirm that the shot successfully found its target and the Federation President [khitomer_conf_ufp_leader.GetName] lay dead beside the podium. \n\nWith the attacker's job now complete, they are reveal themselves to be a Klingon before beaming away.
STH_federation_story.1041.name: President Assassinated
STH_federation_story.1042.desc: The source of the commotion is quickly identified as a hidden assassin, a Klingon male, who opens fire from a sniper rifle, the shot successfully strikes the Federation President before the bodyguards can protect them.
STH_federation_story.1042.name: Federation President Killed
STH_federation_story.1043.desc: The Federation team's mission is finally reviewed, it appears they were hunting an assassin in the crowd. The assassins location revealed, the attacker takes aim as Starfleet officers rush in to prevent the killer from taking his shot.
STH_federation_story.1043.name: Assassin Revealed
STH_federation_story.1044.desc: As the Assassin takes aim to fire, [ufp_khitomer_captain.GetName] heroically leaps in front of the shot in a desparate bid to knock the assassin off his aim. \n\nThe Assassin is knocked backwards and the rifle blast fires harmlessly passed the gathered leadership. The Assassin is revealed to be a human general disguised as a Klingon, before he is pulled away by security he vows that Chang will complete the mission!
STH_federation_story.1044.name: Leaders Saved
STH_federation_story.1045.a: To be or not to be?
STH_federation_story.1045.desc: Be honest, Captain, warrior to warrior. You do prefer it this way, don't you, as it was meant to be? No peace in our time. 'Once more unto the breach, dear friends'.
STH_federation_story.1045.name: Cry havoc, and let slip the Dogs of War
STH_federation_story.1046.a: Let the diplomats conclude the summit.
STH_federation_story.1046.desc: General Chang's ship finally defeated explodes in a ball of fury, in life the General's hatred for the Federation and desire to return to the ways of war had fueled his desire to betray his own people. However with the General now dead and the Starfleet officers behind the plot either dead or behind bars, maybe now there is a chance for peace.
STH_federation_story.1046.name: General Chang defeated
STH_federation_story.1047.desc: With the traitor Chang defeated, it is time to once again turn attention back to the Khitomer Summit. Many Klingons will have supported his crusade against the Federation, and it is clear that many within Starfleet shared his views, but the Empire must evolve, new threats will emerge, is it time to put aside our difference and find an ally in Starfleet?
STH_federation_story.1047.name: Will there be peace
STH_federation_story.1048.desc: Our diplomats have withdrawn from Khitomer, the acts over the last few weeks have all but destroyed any chance that the Klingons would sign the peace treaty and as feared they have pulled out of the talks and ordered all Federation envoys from their space. Our attempts to tame the Undiscovered Country has failed, the relationship between [Root.Capital_scope.GetName] and Qo'nos are perhaps worse than ever.
STH_federation_story.1048.name: Klingon's Reject the Accords
STH_federation_story.1049.desc: This is a historic day for all members of the Federation and warriors of the Klingon Empire! After years of open hostility and fierce wars both countries have signed the Khitomer Accords, which will bring each empire closer together and open the way to forge a peaceful future together.
STH_federation_story.1049.name: Khitomer Accords Signed
STH_federation_story.1050.desc: The Federation and Klingon Empire appear to have signed a historic treaty bringing each empire closer together and ending a century of on and off violence between the two major powers. \n\nWe shall see what this means for the rest of the Alpha and Beta Quadrants.
STH_federation_story.1050.name: Historic Agreement between Federation and Klingons
STH_federation_story.1051.desc: Those cowards on the Starfleet ship not only appear to have attacked us, but now refuse to help us during our time of need. This act of cowardice must not go unpunished and the dealths of our warriors must be avenged.\n\nThese peace talks are over!
STH_federation_story.1051.name: Federation refuse to help
STH_federation_story.1052.desc: Our failure to offer aid to the Klingons has only further inflamed an already tense situation, the Empire has departed the system and cut communications with us. \n\nOur admiralty have warned us to prepare for the threat of open war with the Klingons.
STH_federation_story.1052.name: Klingons depart, furious
STH_federation_story.1053.desc_01: With [ufp_undiscovered_country_leader_rura_penthe.GetName] safely back in the command chair and with the evidence of the plot against the Federation and Klingon Empire in hand, all that remains is to make best speed for Khitomer and expose this plot before it is too late.
STH_federation_story.1053.desc_02: Attempting to pursade the Klingon and Federation leaders of a plot against them will be much more difficult without [ufp_undiscovered_country_leader_rura_penthe.GetName] but we must attempt it none the less. The future of both countries could we be at stake.
STH_federation_story.1053.desc_03: With evidence in hand of something suspicious going on at Khitomer, sending a ship to investigate the conference is the only logical course of action. Hopefully we can uncover whatever is going on at the summit before it is too late.
STH_federation_story.1053.name: The Undiscovered Country
STH_federation_story.1054.desc: It is a rare feat to see such bravery from another species, but the actions of [ufp_khitomer_captain.GetName] were worthy of the most enthusiastic song! The Admiral, without a thought to their own safety, dives in to tackle the would be assassin blocking the shot and saving the delegates. \n\nSecurity forces rush in to reveal a disguised human who is loudly declaring that our General Chang will finish the mission. Could Chang have betrayed us?
STH_federation_story.1054.name: Assassin Captured!
STH_federation_story.1055.desc: The Starfleet Officers that beamed in appear to have captured an armed Klingon male. Dragging the individual in front of the security agencies it appears he was here to assassinate the conference leadership! Before being dragged away the agent reveals that General Chang was behind the plot and a traitor to the Empire.
STH_federation_story.1055.name: Assassin Captured!
STH_federation_story.1056.desc: After searching throughout the main conference room, the crew notice a locked door overlooking the podiums, a security officer lying unconcious hidden to the side of the room. Rushing into the room [ufp_khitomer_captain.GetName] confronts an assassin preparing to fire a sniper at the President and Klingon Chancellor. The attack must be stopped.
STH_federation_story.1056.name: Stop the Assassins
STH_federation_story.1060.a: Aligning with Chang will not help!
STH_federation_story.1060.desc: President! I can no longer stand by whilst the Starfleet I have served so loyally betrays its values by aligning with those Klingon animals and I am not alone, like-minded individuals across both empires will align to ensure the lasting security of the countries we love.
STH_federation_story.1060.name: We've been Betrayed!
STH_federation_story.11.desc: La flota enemiga que atacó la estación de investigación en órbita [augment_research_target_2.GetName] ha sido destruida. \n\nLos intentos de recuperar sobrevivientes han proporcionado una serie de candidatos potenciales en los restos, que ahora deben ser investigados ...
STH_federation_story.11.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_federation_story.1100.desc: Los rumores de disturbios civiles nos han llegado desde el muy avanzado pero recluido Reino de Skorr. \n\nSin embargo, no hay más información disponible, aunque dada la superioridad tecnológica que el Reino demuestra sobre los poderes más involucrados en la galaxia debemos permanecer cautelosos ante todas las posibilidades.
STH_federation_story.1100.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1101.desc_01:
Mi nombre es Ministro C'Chee del Reino de Skorr. Nuestras razas han interactuado poco a lo largo de los años, pero nosotros lo hemos observado y hemos encontrado a algunos entre ustedes que son de gran potencial. 

Lo que debo pedirte es difícil, porque pocos fuera del Reino saben lo cerca que está la galaxia de estar en peligro. ¡El alma de Alar ha sido robada! 

 Sin el Alma, mi pueblo volverá a su anterior barbarie, la guerra civil se extenderá desde nuestras fronteras hasta la galaxia más amplia. Debemos solicitar a uno de sus líderes - tal vez [suggestedLeader1.GetName] o [suggestedLeader2.GetName] - nos ayudan en la recuperación del Alma.
STH_federation_story.1101.desc_02:
Mi nombre es Ministro C'Chee del Reino de Skorr. Nuestras razas han interactuado poco a lo largo de los años, pero nosotros lo hemos observado y hemos encontrado a algunos entre ustedes que son de gran potencial. 

Lo que debo pedirte es difícil, porque pocos fuera del Reino saben lo cerca que está la galaxia de estar en peligro. ¡El alma de Alar ha sido robada! 

 Sin el Alma, mi pueblo volverá a su anterior barbarie, la guerra civil se extenderá desde nuestras fronteras hasta la galaxia más amplia. Debemos pedirle a uno de sus líderes - tal vez [suggestedLeader1.GetName]] - ayudarnos en la recuperación del Alma.
STH_federation_story.1101.desc_03:
Mi nombre es Ministro C'Chee del Reino de Skorr. Nuestras razas han interactuado poco a lo largo de los años, pero nosotros lo hemos observado y hemos encontrado a algunos entre ustedes que son de gran potencial. 

Lo que debo pedirte es difícil, porque pocos fuera del Reino saben lo cerca que está la galaxia de estar en peligro. ¡El alma de Alar ha sido robada! 

 Sin el Alma, mi pueblo volverá a su anterior barbarie, la guerra civil se extenderá desde nuestras fronteras hasta la galaxia más amplia. Debemos pedirle a uno de sus líderes que nos ayude a recuperar el Alma.
STH_federation_story.1101.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1102.desc: Al llegar a [From.From.GetName] [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] se ha unido a un equipo de especies cruzadas asignado a cazar el Alma de Alar, que se ha detectado en una luna en el sistema de L'Karedari. \n\nTchar, Príncipe de Skorr y Maestro de la Eyrie dirige la misión. El ingeniero reptil Sord, el ladrón insectoide Em / 3 / Green, la cazadora humanoide Lara y el Tzscci tianiano también han sido reclutados y presentados el uno al otro, el equipo se prepara para partir.
STH_federation_story.1102.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1103.a: Sord debe dirigir el esfuerzo de reparación.
STH_federation_story.1103.b: [Skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] debe dirigir el esfuerzo de reparación.
STH_federation_story.1103.desc:
Transmitiendo a la luna de L'Karedari Yoali a través de un transportista de larga distancia Skorr, el equipo pasa varias horas revisando sus suministros y cargandolos en el skimmer proporcionado. 

Resupply resultará difícil ya que las tormentas iónicas a través del sistema de L'Karedari impiden que las ventanas de acercamiento y transporte sean fugaces. 

 Empezando en la dirección de los sensores del skimmer colocar el alma en, el equipo pasar varias horas en discusión - ¿quién ganaría de robar el alma? - a través de un paisaje volcánico misterioso. Una roca callejera golpea las naceles antigravía del skimmer que lo envían lentamente descendiendo al suelo. 

Several cientos de metros de la skimmer el resplandor rojo de lava pulgadas hacia el equipo.
STH_federation_story.1103.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1104.desc: Los conocimientos de ingeniería natural de Sord han llegado en buen uso, y con minutos para ahorrar las nacelles antigravios del skimmer son completamente operacionales. \n\nEl equipo continúa hacia la señal del Alma.
STH_federation_story.1104.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1105.desc:
Los conocimientos de ingeniería natural de Sord cuentan poco, mientras que otras rocas golpean al skimmer y eliminan otros sistemas clave. [Skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] y el resto de la lucha del equipo para reparar el vehículo, y con momentos para ahorrar las nacelles del antigrav del skimmer son completamente operacionales. 

Reinserción del skimmer de nuevo, [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] es golpeado en el brazo por una roca más pequeña rebotando desde el casco del skimmer, hiriendo [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHim]. 

El equipo continúa hacia la señal del Alma.
STH_federation_story.1105.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1106.desc:
Los conocimientos de ingeniería natural de Sord han llegado en buen uso, y con minutos para ahorrar las nacelles antigravios del skimmer son completamente operacionales. 

El huelga de desastre, sin embargo, al intentar entrar en el vehículo de nuevo una roca de tamaño puño rebotes del casco del skimmer y golpea a Sord plana en la cara. Sangre derrama de la herida, y el equipo arrastra a Sord en el skimmer donde no lo reviven. 

El equipo continúa hacia la señal del Alma, mientras busca un lugar de enterramiento adecuado.
STH_federation_story.1106.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1107.desc:
Los conocimientos de ingeniería natural de Sord cuentan poco, mientras que otras rocas golpean al skimmer y eliminan otros sistemas clave. [Skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] y el resto de la lucha del equipo para reparar el vehículo, y con momentos para ahorrar las nacelles del antigrav del skimmer son completamente operacionales. 

Introduciendo el skimmer de nuevo, [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] empuja Sord al suelo antes de que sea golpeado por una roca que se recupera del casco del skimmer lo suficientemente grande como para matarlo. 

El Sord agradecido le ofrece [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] sus agradecimientos y se compromete a pagar la deuda. 

El equipo continúa hacia la señal del Alma.
STH_federation_story.1107.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1108.desc:
Los conocimientos de ingeniería natural de Sord cuentan poco, mientras que otras rocas golpean al skimmer y eliminan otros sistemas clave. [Skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] y el resto de la lucha del equipo para reparar el vehículo, y con momentos para ahorrar las nacelles del antigrav del skimmer son completamente operacionales. 

Introduciendo el skimmer de nuevo, [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] empuja Sord al suelo antes de que sea golpeado por una roca que se recupera del casco del skimmer lo suficientemente grande como para matarlo. 

La roca pierde Sord, pero golpea [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] en la pierna, dañando gravemente [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHim]. 

El equipo continúa hacia la señal del Alma, tratando la herida de [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] en el skimmer.
STH_federation_story.1108.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1109.b: Envíe el equipo sobre uno por uno en el skimmer.
STH_federation_story.1109.c: Utilice Sord para contrarrestar el campo del inhibidor.
STH_federation_story.1109.desc: El skimmer ha pasado apenas un centenar de kilómetros antes de ser obligado de nuevo por un campo de inhibidor gravitic generado a partir de una serie de cristales rojos siguiendo las orillas de un río de lava. \n\nEl equipo debate su próximo movimiento. Tzscci voluntarios para ayudar a arrastrar el skimmer a través del río usando la afinidad natural del Tholian para la lava junto con la salida restante de las góndolas del antigrav del skimmer para guardar los inquilinos seguros.
STH_federation_story.1109.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1110.desc:
El río de lava es poco profundo y Tzscci es capaz de permanecer completamente extendido en ella, su traje ambiental bebiendo el calor y conservando la energía que habría sido bombeada en su ambiente interior. 

Metres desde el borde del banco Tzscci patina y el skimmer cae del agarre de sus brazos mecánicamente aumentados, la parte trasera del vehículo se sumerge en la lava. 

El equipo apenas tiene tiempo suficiente para salir de la parte delantera del skimmer, usando Tzscci como un peldaño hacia el banco. 

El equipo ha cruzado el río, pero el skimmer y los suministros se han perdido.
STH_federation_story.1110.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1111.desc:
El río de lava es poco profundo y Tzscci es capaz de permanecer completamente extendido en ella, su traje ambiental bebiendo el calor y conservando la energía que habría sido bombeada en su ambiente interior. 

Metres desde el borde del banco Tzscci patina y el skimmer cae del agarre de sus brazos mecánicamente aumentados, la parte trasera del vehículo se sumerge en la lava. 

El equipo apenas tiene tiempo suficiente para salir de la parte delantera del skimmer, usando Tzscci como un peldaño hacia el banco. 

 [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] se hace inconsciente de los humos tóxicos de la lava, dejando a Tzscci para llevar [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHim] a la seguridad. 

El equipo ha cruzado el río, pero el skimmer y los suministros se han perdido.
STH_federation_story.1111.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1112.desc:
El río de lava es poco profundo y Tzscci es capaz de permanecer completamente extendido en ella, su traje ambiental bebiendo el calor y conservando la energía que habría sido bombeada en su ambiente interior. 

Metres desde el borde del banco Tzscci patina y el skimmer cae del agarre de sus brazos mecánicamente aumentados, la parte trasera del vehículo se sumerge en la lava. 

El equipo apenas tiene tiempo suficiente para salir de la parte delantera del skimmer, usando Tzscci como un peldaño hacia el banco. 

Como Tzscci emerge de la lava, la súbita caída de temperatura raja una línea eléctrica en la pierna trasera de su traje ambiental, exponiéndola a la atmósfera de Yoali. Temblando salvajemente, la estructura cristalina de Tzscci se vuelve azul profundo antes de romperse en miles de piezas. 

El equipo ha cruzado el río, pero el skimmer y los suministros se han perdido y Tzscci ha sido asesinado.
STH_federation_story.1112.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1113.desc:
El río de lava burbujea debajo del skimmer mientras que uno por uno el equipo toma vueltas para transbordarse a través, con Tzscci que arrastra el skimmer detrás después de cada funcionamiento. 

 [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName], habiéndose ofrecido como voluntario para ir por última vez, los bordes de la skimmer poco a poco hacia el equipo de espera. 

Metras del banco las nacelas antigravillas del skimmer vacilan, enviando el skimmer a la lava de abajo. [Skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] emerge justo a tiempo para ser rescatado por Tzscci. 

Noticando varias advertencias sobre el entorno exterior de Tholian, [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] insta a Tzscci a duplicar el poder al campo de integridad strutural de su traje para prevenir una brecha cuando emerge del río de lava. En la orilla, el agradecido Tholian promete pagar la vigilancia de [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName], maldiciendo su propia falta de atención. 

El equipo ha cruzado el río, pero el skimmer y los suministros se han perdido.
STH_federation_story.1113.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1114.desc:
El río de lava burbujea debajo del skimmer mientras que uno por uno el equipo toma vueltas para transbordarse a través, con Tzscci que arrastra el skimmer detrás después de cada funcionamiento. 

 [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName], habiéndose ofrecido como voluntario para ir por última vez, los bordes de la skimmer poco a poco hacia el equipo de espera. 

Metras del banco las nacelas antigravillas del skimmer vacilan, enviando el skimmer a la lava de abajo. [Skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] emerge justo a tiempo para ser rescatado por Tzscci, pero no antes de ser hecho inconsciente de los vapores tóxicos de la lava. 

El equipo ha cruzado el río, pero el skimmer y los suministros se han perdido.
STH_federation_story.1114.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1115.desc:
Los esfuerzos de Sord para contrarrestar el campo del inhibidor gravitic son parcialmente exitosos, y el skimmer parece capaz de cruzar la lava con todo el equipo a bordo. 

Contraste desde el borde del banco el skimmer registra un aumento en el campo del inhibidor cuando uno de los cristales rojos cercanos cae en la lava. 

El equipo apenas tiene tiempo suficiente para salir de la parte delantera del skimmer, usando a Tzscci en su traje ambiental como un trampolín para el banco. 

Noticando varias advertencias sobre el entorno exterior de Tholian, [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] insta a Tzscci a duplicar el poder al campo de integridad strutural de su traje para prevenir una brecha cuando emerge del río de lava. En la orilla, el agradecido Tholian promete pagar la vigilancia de [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName], maldiciendo su propia falta de atención. 

El equipo ha cruzado el río, pero el skimmer y los suministros se han perdido.
STH_federation_story.1115.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1116.desc:
Los esfuerzos de Sord para contrarrestar el campo del inhibidor gravitic son parcialmente exitosos, y el skimmer parece capaz de cruzar la lava con todo el equipo a bordo. 

Contraste desde el borde del banco el skimmer registra un aumento en el campo del inhibidor cuando uno de los cristales rojos cercanos cae en la lava. 

El equipo apenas tiene tiempo suficiente para salir de la parte delantera del skimmer, usando a Tzscci en su traje ambiental como un trampolín para el banco. 

El equipo ha cruzado el río, pero el skimmer y los suministros se han perdido.
STH_federation_story.1116.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1117.a: Tome el paso de la montaña.
STH_federation_story.1117.desc: La pérdida del skimmer es un duro golpe para la misión. Mientras que las lecturas del tricorder indican que el Alma está ahora a menos de 300 km de distancia, una serie de montañas se sitúan entre él y el equipo.\n\nDos enfoques están disponibles, un paso de montaña más corto que corta directamente a través de la cordillera, y un valle decenas de millas al sur.
STH_federation_story.1117.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1118.desc: El paso de la montaña resulta traicionero, y varias veces TChar pierde su pie y debe confiar en sus alas para volverlo al frío amargo del camino ventoso. \n\nEn la actualidad, las montañas despejan y el campo glacial se extiende hasta el ojo puede ver, mientras que una torre se eleva en el borde del horizonte. Los Tricorders indican que el Alma debe ubicarse dentro.
STH_federation_story.1118.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1119.desc:
El paso de la montaña resulta traicionero, y varias veces TChar pierde su pie y debe confiar en sus alas para volverlo al frío amargo del camino ventoso. 

 [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHim] [casi] se hunde a [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHis] la muerte como una plancha de hielo se estrella en el paso desde arriba, lo que obliga a TChar y Lara a luchar para rescatar [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHim]. 

En la actualidad, las montañas despejan y el campo glacial se extiende hasta el ojo puede ver, mientras que una torre se eleva en el borde del horizonte. Los Tricorders indican que el Alma debe ubicarse dentro.
STH_federation_story.1119.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1120.desc:
El valle parece seguro, pero después de varios kilómetros a través está claro que el equipo está siendo acosado por los depredadores que acechan en las sombras. 

Lara, una cazadora habilidosa, se ofrece para liderar al equipo. El final del valle está cerca cuando un grupo de criaturas tipo gato atacan. Utilizando las pocas armas que quedan el equipo es capaz de conducir de nuevo, pero no antes de un pines Lara en el suelo. 

A medida que eleva sus garras para rasgar la garganta de Lara, la criatura grita de dolor antes de ser vaporizada por un rayo del arma de energía de Skorr [Skorr_jihad_leader.GetName], ahora agotada. Una agradecida Lara ofrece [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] su propio arma como agradecimiento. 

 En la salida del valle, un campo glacial se extiende hasta donde el ojo puede ver, mientras que una torre se alza en el borde del horizonte. Los Tricorders indican que el Alma debe ubicarse dentro.
STH_federation_story.1120.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1121.desc:
El valle parece seguro, pero después de varios kilómetros a través está claro que el equipo está siendo acosado por los depredadores que acechan en las sombras. 

Lara, una cazadora habilidosa, se ofrece a liderar el equipo. El final del valle está cerca cuando un grupo de criaturas tipo gato atacan. Utilizando las pocas armas que quedan, el equipo es capaz de empujarlos de vuelta, pero no antes de que uno ponga [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] en el suelo y se rasque en la cara de [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHis]. 

A medida que eleva sus garras para desgarrar la garganta de [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName], la criatura grita de dolor antes de ser vaporizada por un rayo del ya empobrecido arma de energía descargada por Skorr. 

 En la salida del valle, un campo glacial se extiende hasta donde el ojo puede ver, mientras que una torre se alza en el borde del horizonte. Los Tricorders indican que el Alma debe ubicarse dentro.
STH_federation_story.1121.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1122.desc: El glaciar se extiende por kilómetros, una superficie que parece plana pero que oculta profundos valles. TChar declara su intención de seguir adelante por su cuenta, usando sus poderosas alas para evitar el traicionero hielo que se encuentra debajo. \n\nEl equipo debate quién debe tomar la iniciativa y trazar un camino seguro a través del glaciar. Los voluntarios de Lara, afirmando que el ambiente subártico natural de su gente la convierte en la opción ideal.
STH_federation_story.1122.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1123.desc: La fe en la habilidad de Lara está bien situada, ya que el equipo cruzó con éxito el glaciar en sólo dos días y se unió a TChar en la base de la torre.
STH_federation_story.1123.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1124.desc:
La fe en la habilidad de Lara está bien situada, ya que el equipo cruzó con éxito la mitad del glaciar en un solo día. 

Pulse al frente en el segundo día se escucha una gran grieta trueno mientras el suelo se mueve durante varios segundos. Un terremoto ha expuesto varias fallas nuevas en el hielo y [skorr_jihad_leader.GetName] se desliza en la brecha, chocando contra un saliente de tres metros hacia abajo. 

La lucha del equipo para guardar [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHim], pero finalmente son capaces de tirar [skorr_jihad_leader.GetHerHim] hasta el hielo de arriba. 

El resto del viaje es lento, pero después de otros dos días el glaciar se despeja y el equipo se reúne TChar en la base de la torre.
STH_federation_story.1124.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1125.desc:
La fe en la habilidad de Lara está bien situada, ya que el equipo cruzó con éxito la mitad del glaciar en un solo día. 

Pulse al frente en el segundo día se escucha una gran grieta trueno mientras el suelo se mueve durante varios segundos. Un terremoto ha expuesto varias fallas nuevas en el hielo y Lara se desliza en la brecha, chocando contra una cornisa de diez metros más abajo. 

El equipo no puede rescatarla y la caída parece haber sido fatal. 

El equipo continúa, el resto del viaje es lento, pero después de tres días el glaciar se despeja y el equipo se reúne con TChar en la base de la torre.
STH_federation_story.1125.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1126.desc:
La fe en la habilidad de Lara está bien situada, ya que el equipo cruzó con éxito la mitad del glaciar en un solo día. 

Pulse al frente en el segundo día se escucha una gran grieta trueno mientras el suelo se mueve durante varios segundos. Un terremoto ha expuesto varias fallas nuevas en el hielo y Em / 3 / Green se desliza en la brecha, chocando contra un saliente de diez metros hacia abajo. 

El equipo no puede rescatarlo y la caída parece haber sido fatal. 

El equipo continúa, el resto del viaje es lento, pero después de dos días el glaciar se despeja y el equipo vuelve a TChar en la base de la torre.
STH_federation_story.1126.name: Alma del Alar
STH_federation_story.1127.desc:
