STH_ferengi_story.2005.desc: Trusting in [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] own judgement has paid off as [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] has won the Global Tongo Championship, taking the top prize.
STH_ferengi_story.2005.name: Global Tongo Championship
STH_ferengi_story.2006.desc: Trusting in [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] own judgement has not paid off as [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] has come fourth in the Global Tongo Championship, barely earning [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] initial stake back.
STH_ferengi_story.2006.name: Global Tongo Championship
STH_ferengi_story.2010.desc: Trusting in the anonymous messenger's strategies has paid off as [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] has won the Global Tongo Championship, taking the top prize. \n\nIntrigued by the brilliance of how subtly each piece of advice was targeted at each opponent, [Root.GetRulerName] ponders whether to attempt to strike up a correspondence outside of the Tongo hall.
STH_ferengi_story.2010.name: Global Tongo Championship
STH_ferengi_story.2011.desc: Trusting in the anonymous messenger's strategies has helped avoid utter defeat as [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] has come third in the Global Tongo Championship. \n\nIntrigued by the brilliance of how subtly each piece of advice was targeted at each opponent, [Root.GetRulerName] ponders whether to attempt to strike up a correspondence outside of the Tongo hall.
STH_ferengi_story.2011.name: Global Tongo Championship
STH_ferengi_story.2012.b: Walk away and bribe her not to talk.
STH_ferengi_story.2012.desc: After several weeks of messages between [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] and [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] secret Tongo advisor on matters as diverse as trade policy, bribe etiquette and Slug-o-Cola preferences, [Root.GetRulerName] has been left stunned by the revelation that [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] confidant is in fact a female. \n\nRevealing the shocking news in the hope to strike up a romantic relationship, the female [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetName] has placed the [Root.GetRulerTitle] in a difficult situation. Accepting [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetHerHis] financial acumen would go against all of [Root.GetSpeciesName] orthodoxy, and if discovered could end [Root.GetRulerName]'s reign as [Root.GetRulerTitle].
STH_ferengi_story.2012.name: Global Tongo Championship
STH_ferengi_story.2013.b: Discuss tube grubs, not trade policy.
STH_ferengi_story.2013.desc: Pursuing a relationship with [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetName] has lifted the spirits of the [Root.GetRulerTitle], though [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetHerHis] frequent financial advice risks ruining [Root.GetRulerName]'s career should the public find out. \n\nA number of difficult trade negotiations have brought the tension to a head, with [Root.GetRulerName] undecided whether to follow [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetName]'s suggestions or else demand their conversations avoid matters of state.
STH_ferengi_story.2013.name: Females and Profits
STH_ferengi_story.2014.desc: [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetName]'s suggestions on how to proceed with a number of difficult recent trade negotiations have proven both insightful and personally profitable for [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. \n\nConvinced that orthodox [Root.GetSpeciesName] gender roles might not be optimal for the economy of the [Root.GetName], [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] still doubts the time is right to legislate change given the unrest it might unleash among more conservative [Root.GetSpeciesName].
STH_ferengi_story.2014.name: Females and Profits
STH_ferengi_story.2015.desc: The [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s relationship with [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetName] continues to develop, despite ongoing friction as to how far [Root.GetSpeciesName] society can be pushed with gender rights. \n\nA conversation on the traditions and laws around clothing have left [Root.GetRulerName] convinced of the need for change, but once again uncertain how many other [Root.GetSpeciesName] would support it.
STH_ferengi_story.2015.name: Females and Profits
STH_ferengi_story.2016.desc: [ferengi_female_rights_leader.GetName]'s influence with [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] has progressed to the point that [Root.GetRulerName] has been convinced of the benefits from allowing both genders access to employment and profit. \n\nThe only question remains whether the unrest from more traditional [Root.GetSpeciesName] would outweigh the financial benefits.
STH_ferengi_story.2016.name: Females and Profits
STH_fix.144.desc: Remove established contact with this country.
STH_fix.144.name: Remove Established Contact
STH_fridayschild.10.desc: Good news in from [planet_capella.GetName] it looks like our delegation led by [fridays_child_leader.GetName] were able to please the notoriously agressive Capellans and secure a notable quantity of Topaline to bring back to [Root.GetName].
STH_fridayschild.10.name: Friday's Child Secured the Topaline
STH_fridayschild.2.desc: Our long range scans have picked up an impressive supply of the mineral Topaline on the planet Capella IV. The planet is occupied by the primitive Capellan Tribes who have a complex set of Taboos and are quick to anger. The Capellans have had contact with space faring civilisations for many years now, yet have chosen to maintain their lifestyle. \n\nWe have been asked to dispatch a ship to secure this source of Topaline.
STH_fridayschild.2.name: Friday's Child
STH_fridayschild.3.b: Fire a torpedo at the planet.
STH_fridayschild.3.desc: Disaster! As feared the volatile Capellan's took offence to something that [fridays_child_leader.GetName] must have done or said. Without warning one of the tribes people throw a deadly weapon called a Kleegat, striking [fridays_child_leader.GetName] in the neck, killing [fridays_child_leader.GetHerHim] instantly. \n\nThis mission is now a total loss and we should withdrawn from the planet before any more harm can be done.
STH_fridayschild.3.name: Friday's Child
STH_fridayschild.4.desc: Fuelled on by the delegation from [fridays_child_rival.GetName] it appears a rival tribes leader has chosen this moment to attempt to take over the tribe. This new leader is much less inclined to assist us with our request.\n\nAs the fighting breaks out the Tribe leader Akaar requests that we keep his young son and heir safe from the battle.
STH_fridayschild.4.name: Friday's Child The Coup
STH_fridayschild.6.desc: [fridays_child_leader.GetName] and the landing party were successfully able to save Akaar's son despite the best efforts of the party from [fridays_child_rival.GetName].\n\nThankfully Akaar and his followers were able to fend off the attack from his rival. Grateful for our help Akaar pledges us a substantial amount of Topaline and bids us farewell.
STH_fridayschild.6.name: Saved the Child
STH_fridayschild.7.desc:
[fridays_child_leader.GetName] and the landing party desperately attempted to save Akaar's son, but despite their best efforts they were unable to keep the young child safe.

Furious at the loss of his heir, Akaar and his followers turn on [fridays_child_leader.GetName] who are barely able to escape back to the ship with just a skant amount of Topaline.

It is likely that [fridays_child_rival.GetName] will benefit from our failure.
STH_fridayschild.7.name: Failed to save the Child
STH_fridayschild.9.desc: Bad news in from [planet_capella.GetName] it looks like our delegation led by [fridays_child_leader.GetName] were unable to please the notoriously aggressive Capellans and secure a notable quantity of Topaline to bring back to [Root.GetName]. The party from [fridays_child_rival.GetName] appears to have pleased the Capellans more and been granted the resource.
STH_fridayschild.9.name: Friday's Child Lost the Topaline
STH_galactic_features.1.desc: Los sensores han detectado un recipiente de configuración desconocida que entra en órbita alrededor del planeta [doomsdayMachinePlanet.GetName], en el sistema [doomsdayMachineSystem.GetName]. \n\n[Root.GetName] los estrategas están instando al envío de una nave estelar para investigar.
STH_galactic_features.1.name: Lecturas extrañas
STH_galactic_features.10.desc:
Nuestra flota en el sistema [doomsdayMachineSystem.GetName] ha encontrado un buque alienígena de enorme tamaño. Parece ser construido de neutrónio sólido y como tal sería capaz de soportar un daño enorme. 

No ha respondido a granizadas, y parece estar completamente automatizado. Se utiliza un anillo de vigas de tractor para desmembrar el planeta que orbita. 

Si no se puede detener el número de muertos podría ser catastrófico!
STH_galactic_features.10.name: Máquina del día del juicio final
STH_galactic_features.1000.desc: Un barrido periódico del sensor del espacio [Root.GetName] ha indicado que el asteroide [darsay_array_asteroid.GetName] en el sistema [darsay_array_asteroid.GetStarName] puede ser más que una simple colección de hielo y escombros después de que se detectó una firma de poder débil dentro del cuerpo.
STH_galactic_features.1000.name: Asteroide inusual
STH_galactic_features.1001.desc:
Después de haber limpiado los megatones de escombros del asteroide, [Root.Fleet.GetName] ha descubierto una estructura antigua de millones de años. 

Plotting el historial del objeto indica que fue capturado en su ubicación actual después de originarse en el sistema D'Arsay a varios miles de años luz de distancia. 

La estructura aún tiene una carga residual minúscula y requeriría un esfuerzo sustancial para restablecer su funcionamiento. Alternativamente, podría ser deconstruido para cosechar los elementos raros que comprenden su casco exterior.
STH_galactic_features.1001.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1002.desc: Los esfuerzos para comprender el funcionamiento del D'Arsay Array se han completado con éxito y ahora es posible comprometer los recursos necesarios para restablecer su funcionamiento. \n\nLa estructura parece ser un archivo cultural de la civilización D'Arsay ahora extinta, que contiene petaquads de datos.
STH_galactic_features.1002.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1003.desc:
Los esfuerzos para comprender el funcionamiento del D'Arsay Array se han detenido después de que [Root.Fleet.GetName] comenzó a experimentar una serie de fenómenos extraños. 

Varios componentes en todo el barco han sido reemplazados por objetos y herramientas primitivas, y los cambios en el barco parecen estar aumentando en frecuencia. 

Evidence sugiere que la matriz en sí misma es responsable.
STH_galactic_features.1003.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1004.desc: El [Root.Fleet.GetName] ha destruido la matriz de D'Arsay con una serie de explosiones [Root.Owner.GetMainEnergyWeapon], y con ella cualquier esperanza de comprender la civilización de D'Arsay.
STH_galactic_features.1004.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1005.desc:
La tripulación del [Root.Fleet.GetName] pudo detener el proceso de sustitución de la materia que estaba convirtiendo lentamente la embarcación en un entorno de ciudad primitivo. 

 Ahora es posible comprometer los recursos necesarios para restaurar la matriz a la operación. 

La estructura parece ser un archivo cultural de la civilización D'Arsay ahora extinta, que contiene petaquads de datos.
STH_galactic_features.1005.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1006.desc: Incapaz de detener el proceso de sustitución de materia que estaba convirtiendo lentamente [Root.Fleet.GetName] en un entorno de ciudad primitivo, el barco fue destruido con todas las manos después de que los sellos de contención de antimateria se convirtieron en un par de palmeras.
STH_galactic_features.1006.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1011.desc:
Los esfuerzos para comprender el funcionamiento del D'Arsay Array se han detenido después de que [Root.Fleet.GetName] comenzó a experimentar una serie de fenómenos extraños. 

Varios componentes en todo el barco han sido reemplazados por objetos y herramientas primitivas, y los cambios en el barco parecen estar aumentando en frecuencia. 

Evidence sugiere que la matriz en sí misma es responsable. Peor aún, varios miembros de la tripulación parecen tener sus unidades de procesamiento neuronal reutilizadas por completo, adoptando varias personas alienígenas.
STH_galactic_features.1011.desc_apu:
Los esfuerzos para comprender el funcionamiento del D'Arsay Array se han detenido después de que [Root.Fleet.GetName] comenzó a experimentar una serie de fenómenos extraños. 

Varios componentes en todo el barco han sido reemplazados por objetos y herramientas primitivas, y los cambios en el barco parecen estar aumentando en frecuencia. 

Evidence sugiere que la matriz en sí misma es responsable. Peor aún, varias unidades de personal automatizadas parecen tener sus unidades de procesamiento neuronal reutilizadas por completo, adoptando varias personas extraterrestres.
STH_galactic_features.1011.desc_borg:
Los esfuerzos para comprender el funcionamiento del D'Arsay Array se han detenido después de que [Root.Fleet.GetName] comenzó a experimentar una serie de fenómenos extraños. 

Varios componentes en todo el barco han sido reemplazados por objetos y herramientas primitivas, y los cambios en el barco parecen estar aumentando en frecuencia. 

Evidence sugiere que la matriz en sí misma es responsable. Peor aún, varios drones parecen tener sus unidades de procesamiento neuronal reutilizadas por completo, adoptando varias personas alienígenas.
STH_galactic_features.1011.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1012.desc: Incapaz de detener el proceso de sustitución de materia que estaba convirtiendo lentamente [Root.Fleet.GetName] en un entorno de ciudad primitivo, el barco fue destruido con todas las manos después de que los sellos de contención de antimateria se convirtieron en un par de palmeras. \n\n Como último acto de desafío, el blindaje de la nave se organizó de una manera que pudo enfocar la explosión en la dirección de la matriz misma, destruyéndola y el riesgo para otras naves.
STH_galactic_features.1012.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1013.desc:
[Root.Fleet.GetName] ha tenido éxito en detener el proceso de sustitución de materia que estaba convirtiendo lentamente la embarcación en un entorno de ciudad primitivo. 

 Ahora es posible comprometer los recursos necesarios para restaurar la matriz a la operación. 

La estructura parece ser un archivo cultural de la civilización D'Arsay ahora extinta, que contiene petaquads de datos.
STH_galactic_features.1013.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1014.desc:
Incapaz de detener el proceso de sustitución de materia que estaba convirtiendo lentamente [Root.Fleet.GetName] en un entorno de ciudad primitivo, el barco fue destruido con todas las manos después de que los sellos de contención de antimateria se convirtieron en un par de palmeras. 

 Como último acto de defensa, el blindaje de la nave se organizó de una manera que pudo enfocar la explosión en la dirección de la matriz misma, destruyéndola y el riesgo para otras naves. 

 Inmediatamente antes de su destrucción, el [Root.Fleet.GetName] detectó una transmisión masiva del subespacio dirigida profundamente en el espacio [Root.Owner.GetName] ...
STH_galactic_features.1014.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1015.desc:
La transmisión subespacial emitida por el D'Arsay Array parece haber portado un virus que ha invadido agresivamente varios mundos [Root.GetName]. 

Describiéndose como la Restauración D'Arsay, afirma haber reencarnado miles de millones de personalidades D'Arsay almacenadas en la matriz. 

 Afortunadamente, la propagación del virus se ha detenido, pero solo la guerra misma nos permitirá recuperar nuestro territorio.
STH_galactic_features.1015.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1016.desc: Al eliminar los cortafuegos para evitar la propagación del virus D'Arsay, toda nuestra civilización será reemplazada por la cultura D'Arsay.
STH_galactic_features.1016.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.102.desc_01: Se ha perdido el contacto con el USS Franklin mientras se distorsionaba entre sistemas. Los escaneos del área no revelaron ninguna señal de la tripulación del Capitán [altamidLeader.GetName] o [altamidLeader.GetHerHis].
STH_galactic_features.102.desc_02: Se ha perdido el contacto con la ISS Franklin mientras se distorsionaba entre sistemas. Los escaneos del área no revelaron ninguna señal de la tripulación del Capitán [altamidLeader.GetName] o [altamidLeader.GetHerHis].
STH_galactic_features.102.name: Nave espacial perdida
STH_galactic_features.1020.desc: La matriz de D'Arsay ha sido completamente desmantelada y los recursos que contiene se han cosechado con éxito.
STH_galactic_features.1020.name: D'Arsay Array
STH_galactic_features.1030.desc_korgano: ¿Entiendes el dolor? ¿Muerte? Eso es todo lo que necesitas saber de Masaka. Es lo que ella es. '\n\n A medida que Korgano vuelve a dormirse, la influencia de Masaka comienza de nuevo.
STH_galactic_features.1030.desc_masaka: Creo ... que estás empezando a cansar. Es difícil iluminar el cielo para siempre. '\n\nLa depilación con Korgano vuelve a adormecer a Masaka. El ciclo puede continuar.
STH_galactic_features.1030.name: El ciclo interminable
STH_galactic_features.104.b: No tenemos los recursos en este momento.
STH_galactic_features.104.desc: [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [altamidWarner.GetName] y debo solicitar su ayuda. Mi barco fue emboscado por piratas en lo que ustedes llaman el sistema Ross 973. \n\nApenas logré escapar en mi lanzadera. Te lo ruego, envía un barco al sistema para ayudarme a buscar sobrevivientes. Había un mundo de clase M en el sistema en el que pudieron haberse refugiado.
STH_galactic_features.104.name: Un visitante extranjero
STH_galactic_features.1040.desc: Nuestras conclusiones iniciales sobre la antigua civilización D'Arsay eran incorrectas: esto no era una sola política. En cambio, parece que hace más de 100 millones de años, una colección de pequeños reinos y aldeanos adoptaron lentamente un solo panteón sincrético. Los dioses locales de la ciudad y los mitos de la creación se integraron entre sí, lo que permitió que surgiera un único ethos unificador. Antes de su extinción, todas las políticas de D'Arsry compartían muchos ideales en artes, filosofía y teología, manteniendo sus propias historias, idiomas, gobierno y moneda únicos. \n\nA pesar de esta individualidad, dos nombres continúan apareciendo constantemente en casi todos los artículos que publicamos. se han recuperado del archivo: Masaka y Korgano, la diosa principal y dios del panteón pan-global D'Arsay. Parece que esos dioses tenían más que una simple importancia simbólica, ya que esos nombres incluso aparecían en documentos gubernamentales. Además, las principales tendencias del mercado y las decisiones políticas fueron asignadas, o incluso aparentemente culpadas, a uno de esos dos. Exactamente por qué eso sigue siendo un misterio. Se requiere más investigación.
STH_galactic_features.1040.name: Informe de investigación D'Arsay: resumen antropológico
STH_galactic_features.1041.desc: El grupo de idiomas D'Arsay continúa desconcertando incluso nuestros algoritmos de traductor universal más avanzados y redes neuronales de autoaprendizaje. El nivel de complejidad y densidad de información que ofrece el script pictográfico de D'Arsay podría explicar los elementos corruptores abrumadores que encontramos cuando activamos el Archivo por primera vez. \n\nCada pictografía puede corresponder a cientos de significados diferentes, dependiendo de sutiles matices de sintaxis, dialecto , modo de enfoque e incluso la posición social relativa del hablante con respecto al lector potencial del texto. Los sabios eruditos y los maestros de la sabiduría a menudo no solo juegan trucos con el uso de palabras arcaicas, sino también reglas arcaicas de gramática y modos de referencia que pueden cargar un texto de aspecto simple con simbolismo y portentos. Solo podemos imaginar el tipo de dispositivos de comunicación y algoritmos de autoaprendizaje necesarios para que la cultura moderna de D'Arsay tenga sentido para sí misma. ¿A qué podría haber evolucionado esta civilización si alguna vez hubiera tenido la oportunidad y logrado descubrir la tecnología Warp?
STH_galactic_features.1041.name: Informe de investigación D'Arsay: Idioma
STH_galactic_features.1042.desc: Nuestros investigadores están llegando lentamente a una sorprendente conclusión sobre las personas de D'Arsay: eran poiquilotérmicos, lo que significa que sus cuerpos y estados mentales estaban muy influenciados por la fluctuación de la temperatura. Esto podría explicar su obsesión con el sol, o por qué Masaka, su diosa del sol, estaba tan ligada a tiempos de acciones brutas, sacrificios y guerras. \n\n Llegamos a esta conclusión a partir de un cuidadoso estudio de los registros holográficos de D'Arsay. de sus antiguas ciudades. Está claro que la gestión del calor era primordial: edificios de piedra diseñados para transmitir calor hacia arriba, cámaras grandes, abiertas y fluidas destinadas a distribuir cuidadosamente el calor y la luz solar. La distinción drástica entre las cámaras aireadas y frías de Korgano y las fortalezas sofocantes de Maska ahora también tenía sentido. La propia arquitectura de los edificios y la forma en que canalizaban el calor darían forma al comportamiento de todos en el edificio.
STH_galactic_features.1042.name: Informe de investigación D'Arsay: fisiología
STH_galactic_features.105.desc_01:
Al entrar en la órbita de [From.GetName], el [Root.GetName] debajo del Capitán [leader.GetName] detecta lo que parece ser una nave de enorme tamaño que se ve desde el otro lado del planeta. 

A medida que la forma se acerca, pronto se hace evidente que en realidad está compuesta por cientos de embarcaciones más pequeñas que vuelan en formación cerrada. 

Se envía una señal desde el enjambre, es el Capitán [altamidLeader.GetName], que se creía perdido con la nave Franklin hace décadas. Las características de [altamidLeader.GetHerHis] se tuercen y el habla se arrastra, mientras que [altamidLeader.GetSheHe] grita una amenaza a [Root.Owner.GetName], jurando venganza al abandonar [altamidLeader.GetHerHim] y [altamidLeader.GetHerHis] tripulación en el planeta Altamid abajo con una flota de antiguos drones encontrados enterrados en el mundo.
STH_galactic_features.105.desc_02:
Al entrar en la órbita de [From.GetName], el [Root.GetName] ha detectado lo que parece ser una nave de enorme tamaño que se ve desde el otro lado del planeta. 

A medida que la forma se acerca, pronto se hace evidente que en realidad está compuesta por cientos de embarcaciones más pequeñas que vuelan en formación cerrada. 

Se envía una señal desde el enjambre, es el Capitán [altamidLeader.GetName], que se creía perdido con la nave Franklin hace décadas. Las características de [altamidLeader.GetHerHis] se tuercen y el habla se arrastra, mientras que [altamidLeader.GetSheHe] grita una amenaza a [Root.Owner.GetName], jurando venganza al abandonar [altamidLeader.GetHerHim] y [altamidLeader.GetHerHis] tripulación en el planeta Altamid abajo con una flota de antiguos drones encontrados enterrados en el mundo.
STH_galactic_features.105.name: El enjambre
STH_galactic_features.108.a: Un final trágico para un héroe [Root.GetSpeciesName].
STH_galactic_features.108.desc: La flota de enjambres de Altamid ha sido destruida y con ella la amenaza de [altamidLeader.GetName] a [Root.GetName].
STH_galactic_features.108.name: El enjambre
STH_galactic_features.109.desc: Después de la derrota de [FromFrom.GetName] por parte de [FromFromFrom.GetName], los analistas de [Root.Capital.GetName] han identificado una debilidad clave en la coordinación del enjambre. Una transmisión de alta amplitud podría, en teoría, interrumpir por completo el enjambre.
STH_galactic_features.109.name: El enjambre
STH_galactic_features.110.desc: Los científicos de [Root.Capital.GetName] han identificado con éxito una modulación de señal y una frecuencia que interrumpirá la coordinación del enjambre de Altamid. \n\n Ahora se empleará en todos los encuentros futuros con el enjambre.
STH_galactic_features.110.name: El enjambre
STH_galactic_features.111.desc: El [FromFrom.GetName] ha activado el [FromFromFrom.GetName], con los efectos de la transmisión de interrupción del enjambre funcionando como se esperaba. \n\nEl daño contra el enjambre aumenta significativamente.
STH_galactic_features.111.name: Saboteando el enjambre
STH_galactic_features.1500.a: Intente comunicarse nuevamente con la estación.
STH_galactic_features.1500.desc: Al acercarse al sistema [FromFrom.Solar_System.GetName], los sensores recibieron lecturas intermitentes en la órbita del tercer planeta. Poco después de abandonar la urdimbre, las lecturas aumentaron y una enorme estación espacial de composición y diseño indeterminado apareció como de la nada. \n\nLos intentos para comunicarse con los ocupantes de la estación no han tenido éxito hasta ahora.
STH_galactic_features.1500.name: Guardián Rubicun
STH_galactic_features.1510.c: Tenemos la intención de reclamar este sistema.
STH_galactic_features.1510.desc: DIGA SU PROPÓSITO. \ ¿Y POR QUÉ ESTÁ AQUÍ? ¿QUÉ PRETENDES HACER A MIS HIJOS A CONTINUACIÓN? NO INTERFIERAS CON ELLOS.
STH_galactic_features.1510.name: Guardián Rubicun
STH_galactic_features.1521.b: Quizás quitar el puesto avanzado sería prudente.
STH_galactic_features.1521.desc: A medida que se construye el puesto avanzado en el sistema [FromFrom.Solar_System.GetName], el enorme guardián de la estación espacial que orbita el tercer planeta aumenta su potencia de forma exponencial. \n\nSin un medio de comunicación es imposible saber por qué lo ha hecho, pero el capitán de [FromFromFrom.GetFleetName] cree que puede ser una respuesta directa a la ubicación del puesto avanzado.
STH_galactic_features.1521.name: Guardián Rubicun
STH_galactic_features.1525.desc: SUS ESTRUCTURAS NO ESTÁN PERMITIDAS AQUÍ. SE LE DIJO NO INTERFERIR.
STH_galactic_features.1525.name: Guardián Rubicun
STH_galactic_features.2.desc: Los sensores han detectado un recipiente de configuración desconocida que entra en órbita alrededor del planeta [doomsdayMachinePlanet.GetName], en el sistema [doomsdayMachineSystem.GetName]. \n\n [Root.GetName] los estrategas están instando al envío de una nave estelar para investigar.
STH_galactic_features.2.name: Lecturas extrañas
STH_galactic_features.2000.desc:
El estudio de [Root.GetFleetName] de [From.GetName] ha revelado la presencia de extensos depósitos de pergium muy por debajo de la superficie del mundo árido. 

Aunque las técnicas de minería convencionales serían insuficientes para explotar los depósitos, los ingenieros a bordo del [Root.GetFleetName] creen que se puede acceder con una modesta inversión en tiempo y equipo. 

Enables $ decision_janus_mining_expansion_1 $ decisión sobre [De .GetName] una vez que se ha construido un puesto avanzado.
STH_galactic_features.2000.name: Depósitos extensos
STH_galactic_features.2001.desc: La expansión del complejo minero subterráneo en [From.GetName] se ha aprovechado con éxito en una rica veta de minerales raros.
STH_galactic_features.2001.name: Depósitos explotados
STH_galactic_features.2002.desc: La expansión del complejo minero subterráneo en [From.GetName] se ha aprovechado con éxito en una rica veta de pergium y otros minerales raros.
STH_galactic_features.2002.name: Depósitos explotados
STH_galactic_features.2003.desc: La expansión del complejo minero subterráneo en [From.GetName] se ha aprovechado con éxito en una rica veta de pergium y minerales electrodinámicos.
STH_galactic_features.2003.name: Depósitos explotados
STH_galactic_features.2004.desc: La expansión del complejo minero subterráneo en [From.GetName] se ha aprovechado con éxito en una rica veta de mineral de pergio entremezclado con gas de deuterio.
STH_galactic_features.2004.name: Depósitos explotados
STH_galactic_features.2005.desc: El equipo minero asignado para expandir los complejos subterráneos en [From.GetName] ha desaparecido en circunstancias misteriosas. Si bien no se ha detectado evidencia de sabotaje, los mineros restantes han comenzado a armarse al atravesar la red de cuevas.
STH_galactic_features.2005.name: Desastre minero
STH_galactic_features.2006.a: Envía un equipo científico para investigar.
STH_galactic_features.2006.b: Envía un equipo táctico para cazar a las criaturas.
STH_galactic_features.2006.desc: La mayoría de la tripulación minera asignada para expandir los complejos subterráneos en [From.GetName] han desaparecido, y un solo sobreviviente informó que fueron víctimas de criaturas hostiles similares a rocas en lo profundo de la red de cuevas.
STH_galactic_features.2006.name: Diablo en la oscuridad
STH_galactic_features.2010.a: Envía otro equipo científico para investigar.
STH_galactic_features.2010.b: Envía un equipo táctico para cazar a las criaturas.
STH_galactic_features.2010.desc: El equipo científico enviado para investigar las criaturas aparentemente hostiles en [From.GetName] no pudo informar como se esperaba. Las fuerzas de seguridad locales creen que todos los involucrados han sido víctimas de criaturas similares a rocas, y a la luz de la acción hostil han recomendado una respuesta armada a la amenaza.
STH_galactic_features.2010.name: Diablo en la oscuridad
STH_galactic_features.2011.desc:
En lo profundo de las cavernas de [From.GetName], el equipo científico enviado para descubrir más sobre las criaturas detrás de los recientes ataques al programa de minería ha encontrado un llamado 'demonio en la oscuridad' que guarda un pequeño grupo de huevos esféricos y metálicos. 

Mientras el traductor universal no puede identificar el habla convencional, la criatura se muestra inteligente después de grabar las palabras 'no matar a I' en el piso de piedra. 

Las criaturas, reveladas como el 'Horta' silicoide, se comunican mediante sofisticadas emisiones químicas. Con los nuevos parámetros conocidos, un traductor universal a medida tiene cierto éxito al abrir un diálogo con la raza. 

Con la intención de aprender más sobre la galaxia más amplia, los Horta ofrecen sus servicios como mineros a [Root.GetName] con la condición de que puedan dirigir la expansión futura en [From.GetName] para evitar sus cámaras de guardería.
STH_galactic_features.2011.name: Diablo en la oscuridad
STH_galactic_features.2020.desc: La mayoría de los equipos tácticos asignados para cazar a los llamados 'demonios en la oscuridad' que atacan las operaciones mineras en [From.GetName] han sido asesinados después de varios días de lucha. Las criaturas, muy resistentes a las armas de energía, atacaron ferozmente. \n\nAunque los mineros restantes en [From.GetName] ahora están a salvo, el costo en vidas ha sido significativo.
STH_galactic_features.2020.name: Diablo en la oscuridad
STH_galactic_features.2021.desc: Un pequeño número de los equipos tácticos asignados para cazar a los llamados 'demonios en la oscuridad' que atacan las operaciones mineras en [From.GetName] han sido asesinados después de varios días de lucha. Las criaturas, muy resistentes a las armas de energía, atacaron ferozmente. \n\nLos mineros restantes en [From.GetName] ahora están a salvo, aunque el costo en vidas ha atenuado el estado de ánimo.
STH_galactic_features.2021.name: Diablo en la oscuridad
STH_galactic_features.3001.desc: We have received a distress call from two transport vessels carrying a group of refugees belonging to a species calling themselves the El-Aurians. Should we send a vessel to attempt a rescue?
STH_galactic_features.3001.name: Refugee Transports in Danger
STH_galactic_features.3002.desc: With no attempt to rescue to Transport ships they are quickly overwhelmed by the forces within the Nexus and destroyed with the loss of all refugees and crew.
STH_galactic_features.3002.name: Transports destroyed
STH_galactic_features.3004.desc: Proximity to the Nexus was always going to be dangerous, and so it proved to be for the [nexus_ship.GetName] a stray band of energy was attracted by the [nexus_ship.GetName]'s warp core and the ship was destroyed with all hands.
STH_galactic_features.3004.name: Ship destroyed by the Nexus
STH_galactic_features.3005.desc: Sitting back at a safe distance the [nexus_ship.GetName] is able to gather some useful scans of the Nexus, which will prove extremly useful to our scientists. As expected the two Transport ships were unable to survive the forces within the Nexus and were quickly destroyed.
STH_galactic_features.3005.name: Research gained
STH_galactic_features.3006.desc: The crew of the [nexus_ship.GetName] were able to traverse the outer layers of the Nexus with skill and safely approach the stranded El-Aurian vessels. A quick scan reveals that there hulls are in a dangerous state and all aboard appear to be in a strange state of flux.\n\nThe crew offer a number of solutions, move the ship closer to the stricken ships at risk to all aboard the [nexus_ship.GetName] or attempt a long distance transport.
STH_galactic_features.3006.name: Entering the Nexus
STH_galactic_features.3007.desc: Travelling so deep within the subspace Nexus was always going to be dangerous and so it proved for the [nexus_ship.GetName], the forces within Nexus soon overwhelmed the hull of ship destroying it with the loss of all onboard.
STH_galactic_features.3007.name: Ship destroyed by the Nexus
STH_galactic_features.3008.a: Offer them a home on our homeworld.
STH_galactic_features.3008.b: Off them a home on one of our worlds.
STH_galactic_features.3008.desc: Thanks to the efforts of those onboard [nexus_ship.GetName] the passengers and crew of the El-Aurian ships were rescued from their transports. The El-Aurians dazed and confused officially asked for a new home within our borders or a sample of their collective wisdom if they were not welcome on any of our planets.
STH_galactic_features.3008.name: El-Aurians Rescued
STH_galactic_features.3009.desc: Having rescued the El-Aurian survivors the crew were able to safely back out of the Nexus and return to the safety of normal space. \n\nAs the Nexus resumes its journey through space, it leaves behind more of a mystery.
STH_galactic_features.3009.name: Leaving the Nexus
STH_galactic_features.3010.desc: In a bid to escape the clutches of the Nexus [lost_leader.GetName] made their way to deflector control in a bid to use the ships deflector to free the ship. As the ship was leaving an errant wave of energy struck the ship resulting in hull breach not far from [lost_leader.GetName]'s location.\n\nThere is no sign of the captain following the breach.
STH_galactic_features.3010.name: [lost_leader.GetName] lost to the Nexus
STH_galactic_features.3011.desc: Having rescued the El-Aurian survivors the crew were attempting to leave the Nexus and return to the safety of normal space. \n\nAs the ship was nearly clear a stray wave of energy lept from the Nexus striking the ship causing significant damage.
STH_galactic_features.3011.name: Ship damaged within the Nexus
STH_galactic_features.3012.c: Use the deflector to disperse the Nexus effects.
STH_galactic_features.3012.desc_01: The ship safely travels deeper into the Nexus and closer to the damaged ships, which are clearly close to being destroyed. The senior staff suggest beaming the refugees free or using the tractor beam to pull the ships into the hangar bay.
STH_galactic_features.3012.desc_02: The transporter chief reports that the attempt to beam the refugees free was met with failure, it appears the effects of the energy ribbon were dissipating the lock on the passengers who appear to be phasing in and out of this reality.
STH_galactic_features.3012.desc_03: The suggestion to use the tractor beam was met with silence, finally the chief engineer speaks out. 'Sir... the tractor beam wont be installed until Tuesday'.
STH_galactic_features.3012.name: Into the Nexus
STH_galactic_features.3013.desc: As feared the transporter was unable to secure a strong enough lock on the transport vessels at this distance. Forcing the [nexus_ship.GetName] deeper into the Nexus. Leaving only limited options left to the crew to save the refugees and escape the Nexus.
STH_galactic_features.3013.name: Rescue attempt failed
STH_galactic_features.3014.desc: Failure to attempt to rescue the El-Aurian survivors has led to the destruction of their ships and possibly the last remaining El-Aurians left in the galaxy.
STH_galactic_features.3014.name: Transport ships destroyed
STH_galactic_features.3015.b: Study the Nexus and leave the ships.
STH_galactic_features.3015.c: Leave them to fend for themselves.
STH_galactic_features.3015.desc: Upon arriviing at the scene, the [nexus_ship.GetName] came across an unusal sight. A giant ribbon in space travelling across the sector.\n\nWithin the ribbon, dubbed the Nexus, two small transport ships appear to be stuck and adrift, their hulls dangerously close to collapsing.
STH_galactic_features.3015.name: Energy ribbon in space
STH_galactic_features.3017.desc:
We are receiving word that [exploding_star.GetName] has exploded without warning, the star was considered to be a mainstream star with millions of years of life left within in it. 

The shockwave produced by the star has destroyed all planets and objects within the system. 

Our scientists are unable to explain what occured, but were able to pick up a small trilithium signiture.
STH_galactic_features.3017.name: Star Explodes Unexpectedly
STH_galactic_features.3018.desc: We have received another report of a star exploding without warning, again this has come as a complete surprise with no warning or indication the star was going to go supernova. Scans show that all nuclear reactions in a star stopped, thereby causing its collapse, the only unusual reading from the system picked up the galactic phenomenon known colloquially as the Nexus passing through the region.
STH_galactic_features.3018.name: Another Star Explodes
STH_galactic_features.3020.a: Captain, the Doctor has returned to the Station?!
STH_galactic_features.3020.desc: The [amargosa_ship.GetName] arrives at the stricken observatory too late to stop the attack, but were able to pick up faint life signs from within the complex. Sending an away team down to investigate, they find a number of scientists including the Research Team director, Dr. Tolian Soran, an El-Aurian with notable work into the life-cycle of stellar objects. \n\nDespite objections from the Doctor the scientists are recovered and brought back aboard [amargosa_ship.GetName].
STH_galactic_features.3020.name: Observatory Under Attack
STH_galactic_features.3021.desc: Hurrying to retrieve Dr.Soran from the Observatory, [amargosa_ship_leader.GetName] and Security Officer find the Doctor in a previously hidden section of the station. The Doctor looks up from a console having just fired an unknown device towards the sun and past the unexpecting Starfleet ship in orbit. \n\nThe Doctor draws a weapon from beneath his cloak and fires at the away team, offering the team the chance to leave before the shockwave hits the outpost or risk all attempting a futile effort to capture him.
STH_galactic_features.3021.name: Time is the fire in which we burn
STH_galactic_features.3022.desc: After a short phaser fight, the Doctor is beamed away from the battle by a previously cloaked Bird-of-Prey, looking around [amargosa_ship_leader.GetName] finds evidence of other Trilithium torpedoes with pre-programmed destinations as well as a series of notes containing details about a ribbon in space, called the Nexus. \n\nWhatever the Doctor was doing here will have to wait as the shockwave from the exploding star is approaching the observatory.
STH_galactic_features.3022.name: The Doctor Escapes
STH_galactic_features.3023.desc:
The Doctor is apparently prepared to defend his research with fierce determination and equipped with a deadly hand phaser, he is able to injure [amargosa_ship_leader.GetName]. As the Security Chief rushes to aid his Captain, Soran escapes to a hidden Bird-of-Prey. 

The Captain has the presence of mind to direct his officer to scan some of the remaining torpedoes and they recover some limited knowledge of a space entity named the Nexus and these Trilithium Torpedoes that lay scattered about. 

With the shockwave from the exploding sun fast approaching the away team beam away from the station.
STH_galactic_features.3023.name: Crew Member Wounded
STH_galactic_features.3024.desc:
The Doctor is apparently prepared to defend his research with fierce determination and equipped with a deadly hand phaser, firing a swift volley he hits [amargosa_ship_leader.GetName] in the chest killing him immediately. Soran escapes to a hidden Bird-of-Prey as the Security Chief rushes to her Captain. 

The Security Officer has the presence of mind to direct their tricorder to take a scan of the remaining torpedoes and they recover some limited knowledge of a space entity named the Nexus and these Trilithium Torpedoes that lay scattered about. 

With the shockwave from the exploding sun fast approaching the remaining members of the away team beam back to the ship.
STH_galactic_features.3024.name: [amargosa_ship_leader.GetName] Killed
STH_galactic_features.3025.desc: With little time to react to the events at the observatory the mysterious torpedo strikes the [amargosa_destination_sun.GetName] Sun and suddenly all nuclear reactions within the star stopped, causing the star to explode and sending out a level 12 shockwave easily capable of destroying everything within the star system. \n\nThe crew has no choice but to retreat and regroup.
STH_galactic_features.3025.name: Star Explodes
STH_galactic_features.3026.name: An Appointment with Eternity
STH_galactic_features.3026_desc_01:
Having retrieved a lot of data from Dr.Soran's lab on the Observatory, the crew were able to plot a lot of data into the projected course of the Nexus Energy Ribbon. 

It was clear that Soran was attempting to artificially alter the course of the ribbon by destroying stars to alter the gravitational influence within the sector. 

Why Soran is so determined to return to the Nexus is unclear, but it seems he is willing to do whatever it takes to make this happen.
STH_galactic_features.3026_desc_02: Having collected a fair amount of data, but not the full set the crew were able to determine that Soran is destroying stars in order to alter the course of the Nexus Energy Ribbon. \n\nThe missing telemetry data means that the exact location of the final star has not been calculated, but we have been able to narrow the search. We must investigate a location and hope that we are able to make it to the correct location on time.
STH_galactic_features.3026_desc_03: With very little data collected from the Observatory, the crew have not been able to narrow down the location of the final star that Soran intends to destroy. The rogue scientist has a clear motive to return to the Nexus Energy ribbon by destroying stars to alter its course, but this still leaves a number of potential sites to which the Doctor could be heading. \n\nWith time against the crew there will be limited choices of destination that can be made before Soran is able to complete his plan.
STH_galactic_features.3028.a: We have failed to stop him.
STH_galactic_features.3028.desc: As the star that [generations_crash_1.GetName] explodes, the shockwave pushes the energy ribbon known as the Nexus towards the planet, where Doctor Soran weights with arms outstretched, oblivious to the loss of life to those within the system.
STH_galactic_features.3028.name: Failed to Reach Soran in Time
STH_galactic_features.3029.desc: Arriving at the planet and running a full scan it is clear to the crew that they have made the wrong choice and Soran and his weapon are not on the planet. Judging by the amount of time remaining we will have one final chance to pick the right location and stop the Doctor.
STH_galactic_features.3029.name: Wrong Choice of Planet
STH_galactic_features.3031.desc: The [veridian_ship.GetName] arrives in orbit, scanning the planet reveals that Soran is already at the launch site preparing the torpedo, with the Bird-of-Prey nowhere in sight. [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] beams down to the planet in a last ditched attempt to stop the mad doctor from unleashing his plan.
STH_galactic_features.3031.name: It's like a predator; it's stalking you
STH_galactic_features.3032.desc: Back in orbit of the planet, an old Klingon Bird-of-Prey decloaks and opens fire on the Starfleet ship taking it by surprise. The Klingon ship is captained by the Duras Sisters, Lursa and Be'tor who would love nothing better than to take down a Starfleet ship by notorious means.
STH_galactic_features.3032.name: Time is going to hunt you down... and make the kill
STH_galactic_features.3033.a: The Warp Core is going critical.
STH_galactic_features.3033.desc: As the Duras Sister's ship explodes in a fireball, the [veridian_ship.GetName] begins to access the damage, the first shot having previously taken the shields down resulting in extensive damage across the ship's key systems. \n\nThe Chief Engineer frantically calls the bridge about the last torpedo which hit the ship.
STH_galactic_features.3033.name: Duras Sisters Defeated
STH_galactic_features.3035.desc: The Duras Sister's first attack disabled the shields and from there the attack relentlessly pummeled the ship's hull until a fatal shot hit the warp core. In a last-gasp effort to save the ship and crew the Commander attempts to 'land' the ship on the planet below.
STH_galactic_features.3035.name: Duras Sisters Victorious
STH_galactic_features.3036.desc: As the battle rages above them, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] makes their way toward Soran's location. \n\nOvercoming a menacing red forcefield the Captain approaches the Doctor's position and prepares to stop him.
STH_galactic_features.3036.name: Time is the fire in which we burn
STH_galactic_features.3037.desc: Soran with grace and speed that defies his years, spots the incoming Captain, as the two battle atop the mountain with time running down. \n\n [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] gets the upper hand and manages to reach the launch pad, but it is too late the torpedo fires from the chamber and soars into the sky, mere seconds later the Sun goes dark, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] has failed and the Nexus is coming.
STH_galactic_features.3037.name: So many things unfinished in our lives
STH_galactic_features.3038.desc: [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] opens [veridian_ship_leader.GetHisHer] eyes to the bright lights and warm glow of a fireplace, glistening with the fine decorations of a Christmas Day. With their family and friends around them, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] smiles with pure joy, this sort of family love is something they could only ever have dreamed of.
STH_galactic_features.3038.name: Time has no meaning there
STH_galactic_features.3039.desc: As the lights dance back and forth invitingly and the sound of carols can be heard mixed with the welcoming chorus of laughter and love, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] cannot imagine a time when they felt happier or more content.
STH_galactic_features.3039.name: Time has no meaning there
STH_galactic_features.3040.a: Remain in the embrace of the Nexus.
STH_galactic_features.3040.desc: The single glint from a red bauble brings back the memory of a life once led, the image of a mountainside and the red firey crackle of a ribbon echoing alongside the Christmas tinsel. [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] wonders if there is something else they should be doing.
STH_galactic_features.3040.name: You could stay forever...
STH_galactic_features.3041.desc: Breaking free of the Nexus' grasp [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] finds themself in another person's experience, exploring further they find [leader_stuck_in_nexus.GetName], thought lost many years ago. Approaching the lost hero [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] attempts to convince the lost hero to return with them to face Soran and save the galaxy one last time.
STH_galactic_features.3041.name: Who am I to argue with history?
STH_galactic_features.3042.desc_01: Returning to the scene of their previous defeat [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] and [leader_stuck_in_nexus.GetName] take on the mad doctor together with one taking on Soran, and the other attempting to reach the launch pad. \n\nIt's time to make a difference.
STH_galactic_features.3042.desc_02: Despite taking on Soran solo, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] attempt to learn from the mistakes they made last time, it is the only chance the those living in this system has. \n\nIt's time to make a difference.
STH_galactic_features.3042.name: Sometimes it takes courage to try
STH_galactic_features.3043.a: They died, as they lived, a hero.
STH_galactic_features.3043.desc: As the dust settles on the battle, the torpedo remains locked in the firing chamber, Soran lies defeated, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] looks around to celebrate with [leader_stuck_in_nexus.GetName]. Unable to find the returning hero, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] calls out and to their horror finds them lying injured, having given their life to once again save the lives of the innocent. uttering a final 'oh my' as they pass, having once again proven to be a hero.
STH_galactic_features.3043.desc_01: As the dust settles on the battle, the torpedo remains locked in the firing chamber, Soran lies defeated and many innocent lives have been saved. All but one, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] looks down at their injuries knowing that they did their part [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] weakly sits down against the cliff top and watches one last sunset knowing they died a hero.
STH_galactic_features.3043.name: Never let them take you off the bridge of that ship
STH_galactic_features.3044.desc: As the dust settles on the battle, the torpedo remains locked in the firing chamber, Soran lies defeated, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] looks around to celebrate with [leader_stuck_in_nexus.GetName] finding them, the two leaders embrace knowing that they have saved the lives of an innocent civilization, who may never even know their names.
STH_galactic_features.3044.desc_01: As the dust settles on the battle, the torpedo remains locked in the firing chamber, Soran lies defeated, [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] looks to the skies to see the Nexus pass safely overhead, for just a fleeting moment they wonder what it would have been like had they remained in that blissful place.
STH_galactic_features.3044.name: Never let them take you off the bridge of that ship
STH_galactic_features.3045.desc: Despite all the team has been through, the sound of the torpedo launching from the pad roars out hurtling toward the sun, Soran might have been defeated but it has all been in vain. For what feels like an eternity the projectile heads upwards into the sky, before reaching its target. \n\nThe sun blinks out of existence, and the deadly shockwave will soon follow, knowing there will be no third chance [veridian_ship_leader.GetName] settles to face the end.
STH_galactic_features.3045.name: History Repeats itself
STH_galactic_features.3046.desc: [veridian_ship.GetName] hurtles towards the planet's surface at incredible speeds, and only the skills of the helms person manage to level the descent and prevent further disaster. As the ship hits the planet's surface gauging a deep wound into the surrounding forest and sliding for miles before coming to its final resting place.
STH_galactic_features.3046.name: Crash Landing
STH_galactic_features.3047.desc: We are receiving a distress call from one of our Stellar Observatories which hosts a group of talented scientists working on stellar observations. It appears they are under attack from unknown forces. We should send them aid as soon as possible.
STH_galactic_features.3047.name: Distress Call from Observatory
STH_galactic_features.3050.a.tooltip: Granting Shore leave will potentially provide a short term bonus to your leader, a leader can only go on shore leave every 5 years and a planet can only host a crew every 400 days.
STH_galactic_features.3050.desc_01: The pleasure planet of Risa offers a gloriously warm climate, tropical beaches and a host population that will do everything in their power to make a stay on Risa perfect. After a long tour of duty this would be the perfect chance to rest and relax for a leader and crew. What better way to spend a number of acrude vacation days and what better way to spend it then on Risa. \n\nAfter all, as the Risians say 'All that is ours is yours'...
STH_galactic_features.3050.desc_02: The oppertunity for a chance to send a fleet on shore leave to the planet [holiday_planet.GetName] has come up, providing some long overdue rest and relaxation for one of our hardworking officers and their crew. Why pass up a chance to rest when you never know what the next mission will bring.
STH_galactic_features.3050.name: Shore Leave
STH_galactic_features.3051.desc: After a memorable few days relaxing [holiday_leader.GetName] and [holiday_leader.GetHerHim] crew are feeling relaxed and ready to return to duty with an extra spring in their step.
STH_galactic_features.3051.name: Shore Leave
STH_galactic_features.3052.desc: Not every holiday is a good one, sometimes the weather ruins it, sometimes a band of thugs desguise themselves as beautiful dancers and tie you up and leave you overnight without your uniform. Whatever the reason this was not a good shore leave for the crew of [holiday_fleet.GetName] and a few days they would rather forget.
STH_galactic_features.3052.name: Shore Leave
STH_galactic_features.3100.c: Tell them to handle it themselves.
STH_galactic_features.3100.desc: One of our research teams on the planet [mugato_world_planet.GetName] has failed to check in, they were investigating deep within the jungles of that planet. There last report indicated there were wild Mugato loose within the jungles. The planetary authorities are calling in [Root.GetName] to assist and deal with the situation.
STH_galactic_features.3100.name: Wild Mugato!
STH_galactic_features.3101.desc: The plan to round up the wild Mugato has gone terribly wrong, the beasts were not willing to go quietly and an effort to capture the animals [mugato_leader.GetName] was struck by one of them and severly wounded. Medical teams were able to save their life.\n\nOur only remaining option is to send in the army to secure the area.
STH_galactic_features.3101.name: Leader injured by Mugato
STH_galactic_features.3102.desc: The plan to round up the wild Mugato has gone horrifically wrong, the beasts were not willing to go quietly and an effort to capture the animals [mugato_leader.GetName] was struck by one of them, the poison acted quickly and despite the efforts of the medical units they were unable to save [mugato_leader.GetName].\n\nOur only option now is to send in the army.
STH_galactic_features.3102.name: Leader killed by Mugato
STH_galactic_features.3103.desc: Our efforts to contain and round up the Mugato has been a success, despite initial resistance the beasts were subdued by [mugato_leader.GetName] without harming any of the creatures. \n\nWe now have a couple of options, we can convert the area into a nature reserve, where a conservation team can care and protect them or we can transport them offworld to a safe location.
STH_galactic_features.3103.name: Mugato rounded up
STH_galactic_features.3104.desc: On closer investigation our teams have uncovered a smuggler ring on [mugato_world_planet.GetName] right under our noses! The ground team successfully manage to disrupt the operation, however the ring leader manages to escape to their ship and in an attempt to flee the planet runs into [mugato_ship.GetName] waiting in orbit.
STH_galactic_features.3104.name: Smuggler Ring Found
STH_galactic_features.3105.desc: [mugato_ship.GetName] successfully reports the capture of the smuggler command ship, faced with superior firepower the smugglers quickly surrender. \n\nWe now have a couple of options, we can convert the area into a nature reserve, where a conservation team can care and protect the Mugato or we can transport the creatures offworld to a safe location.
STH_galactic_features.3105.name: Smugglers Captured
STH_galactic_features.3106.desc: The smuggler ship manages to send a feedback pulse which disrupts [mugato_ship.GetName]'s tractor beam. To make matters worse they manage to send out a call for aid and are joined by a band of mercenaries. Keen to avoid capture and relinquishing their prize specimens they prepare to attack our ships.
STH_galactic_features.3106.name: Reinforcements arrive for the Smugglers
STH_galactic_features.3107.desc: Following an intense battle our forces were successfully able to defeat the smugglers and recover the stolen Mugato.\n\nWe now have a couple of options, we can convert the area into a nature reserve, where a conservation team can care and protect them or we can transport them offworld to a safe location.
STH_galactic_features.3107.name: Smugglers Defeated
STH_galactic_features.3108.desc: Our army under the careful leadership of [army_mugato_leader.GetName] manage to succeed where our previous efforts failed and our teams have managed to round up the wild Mugato. \n\nWe now have a couple of options, we can convert the area into a nature reserve, where a conservation team can care and protect them or we can transport them offworld to a safe location.
STH_galactic_features.3108.name: Army successfully Capture Mugato
STH_galactic_features.3200.a: You can't beat a good party.
STH_galactic_features.3200.b: There is no time for such frivolity.
STH_galactic_features.3200.desc: A command officer's life is normally all work and little play, however there are sometimes odd occassions following a tough assignment or conference that there is a small window for officers to get together and let their hair down. \n\nIt just so happens that such a window has opened at [starbase_meeting_point.GetName].
STH_galactic_features.3200.name: Command Level Social
STH_galactic_features.3201.desc: On arrival at [starbase_meeting_point.GetName] [party_leader_1.GetName] is greeted by a fine array of food dishes and beverages across [Root.GetName] space. It is time to relax and enjoy the company of their fellow officers and wait for any additional arrivals.
STH_galactic_features.3201.name: Command Level Social
STH_galactic_features.3202.desc: At arriving at the front door of the venue, [party_leader_1.GetName] is greated by a dower looking bouncer, who checks a list and shakes their head refusing access to the venue. Frustrated [party_leader_1.GetName] has no choice but to leave and complain about their treatment.
STH_galactic_features.3202.name: Entry Refused
STH_galactic_features.3203.desc: On arrival at [starbase_meeting_point.GetName] [party_leader_2.GetName] is suitably impressed by the ongoing celebration surrounded by all the finer things from within [Root.GetName] space. They spot [party_leader_1.GetName] and head over to mingle. \n\nIt is time to relax and enjoy the company of their fellow officers and wait for any additional arrivals.
STH_galactic_features.3203.name: Time to Party
STH_galactic_features.3204.desc: At arriving at the front door of the venue, [party_leader_2.GetName] is greated by a dower looking bouncer, who checks a list and shakes their head refusing access to the venue. Despite several exclamations asking if they knew who [party_leader_2.GetSheHe] was, [party_leader_2.GetName] is forced to reluctantly give up. \n\nBefore they can return to their ship the first officer suggests they look for a local venue to try and salvage the night.
STH_galactic_features.3204.name: Entry Refused
STH_galactic_features.3205.desc: After searching the Starbases expansive promenade [party_leader_2.GetName] and [party_leader_2.GetHerHis] team find a small unassuming establishment. They are welcomed inside by a team of lower deckers who are already inside and having a fun night. \n\nSenior Officers and Lower Deck crew share an thoroughly fun evening leaving morale at an all time high.
STH_galactic_features.3205.name: A good night after all
STH_galactic_features.3206.desc: Unable to find another venue, the Captain and [party_leader_2.GetHerHis] guests decide that the outing is over. Each of them feeling it has been a waste of a trip, they return to their vessel and prepare to head off on their next assignment.
STH_galactic_features.3206.name: A disappointing night
STH_galactic_features.3207.desc: On arrival at [starbase_meeting_point.GetName] [party_leader_3.GetName] joins the celebration as it is in full swing, laughing and enjoying the company of their fellow officers. Beckoned over by [party_leader_1.GetName] and [party_leader_2.GetName] now the celebration can begin!
STH_galactic_features.3207.name: Time to Party
STH_galactic_features.3210.desc_01: Commanding a ship and crew is hard work and it is not often that [party_leader_1.GetName] and their crew get to relax and enjoy time away from their duties. Leaving the venue thoroughly refreshed and ready to tackle any challenge.
STH_galactic_features.3210.desc_02: Commanding a ship and crew is hard work and it is not often that leaders such as [party_leader_1.GetName] and [party_leader_2.GetName] and their crews get to relax and enjoy time away from their duties. Leaving the venue thoroughly refreshed and ready to tackle any challenge.
STH_galactic_features.3210.desc_03: Commanding a ship and crew is hard work and it has been a long time since [party_leader_1.GetName], [party_leader_2.GetName] and [party_leader_3.GetName] have had a chance to connect and share stories of their missions. Leaving the venue all three leaders and their crews are thoroughly refreshed and ready to tackle any challenge.
STH_galactic_features.3210.name: A celebration to remember
STH_galactic_features.3211.desc: Not every opportunity can be taken and the chance to relax and enjoy the social interaction with fellow officers would have been a nice way to spend an evening.
STH_galactic_features.3211.name: An opportunity missed
STH_galactic_features.4.desc_01: El arma alienígena ha estado en órbita de [doomsdayMachineConsumingPlanet.GetName] durante algún tiempo, lentamente comiendo lejos en el exterior con una serie de tractor estrecho vigas. \n\nNuestras exploraciones de largo alcance sugieren que el planeta se ha quedado sin ninguna atmósfera superficial. El cuerpo se ha vuelto inhabitable.
STH_galactic_features.4.desc_02: Nuestras exploraciones de largo alcance de [doomsdayMachineConsumingPlanet.GetName] sugieren que el planeta ha sufrido una reducción substancial en masa. \n\n [Root.GetName] los estrategas siguen instando al envío de una nave estelar para investigar.
STH_galactic_features.4.name: Planeta Eater
STH_galactic_features.5.desc_01: El arma alienígena sigue comiendo en [doomsdayMachineConsumingPlanet.GetName]. \n\nNuestras exploraciones de largo alcance sugieren que el planeta se ha roto en una serie de piezas.
STH_galactic_features.5.desc_02: Nuestras exploraciones de largo alcance de [doomsdayMachineConsumingPlanet.GetName] sugieren que el planeta ha sufrido otra reducción sustancial en la masa. \n\n [Root.GetName] los estrategas siguen instando al envío de una nave estelar para investigar.
STH_galactic_features.5.name: Planeta Eater
STH_galactic_features.6.desc_01: El arma alienígena ha destruido casi por completo [doomsdayMachineConsumingPlanet.GetName]. \n\nNuestras exploraciones de largo alcance sugieren que el planeta se ha reducido a un puñado de fragmentos.
STH_galactic_features.6.desc_02: Nuestras exploraciones de largo alcance de [doomsdayMachineConsumingPlanet.GetName] sugieren que el planeta ha sufrido una reducción casi completa en la masa. \n\n [Root.GetName] los estrategas siguen instando al envío de una nave estelar para investigar.
STH_galactic_features.6.name: Planeta Eater
STH_galactic_features.7.desc: El arma alienígena ha sido destruida y un posible escenario apocalíptico evitado para todos los mundos habitados en este sector de la galaxia. \n\nCuando queda poco de la propia arma, una serie de haces procesados ??de los diversos planetas que había consumido han sobrevivido a la batalla.
STH_galactic_features.7.name: Día del juicio final
STH_galactic_features.8.desc_01: El arma alienígena ha sido destruida por los esfuerzos del [destroy_doomsday_country.GetName], y un escenario apocalíptico potencial evitado para todos los mundos habitados en este sector de la galaxia. \n\nAunque queda poco de la propia arma, una serie de paquetes procesados ??de los diversos planetas que había consumido han sobrevivido a la batalla, todos los cuales han sido reclamados por el [destroy_doomsday_country.GetName].
STH_galactic_features.8.desc_02: Nuestras exploraciones de largo alcance del sistema [doomsdayMachineSystem.GetName] indican que una batalla ha tenido lugar allí. Elementos de la flota [destroy_doomsday_country.GetName] fueron vistos ingresando al sistema muchos días antes.\n\n [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] ha solicitado una aclaración oficial de la administración de [destroy_doomsday_country.GetRulerTitle] [destroyed_doomsday_country.GetRulerName], sin embargo no se ha dado respuesta hasta el momento.
STH_galactic_features.8.name: Lecturas extrañas
STH_galactic_war.101.desc: Greetings my Chancellor, I am T'Kuvma of the House T'Kuvma and I come to you with a request on behalf of my house. The House of T'Kuvma has fallen from power and I seek to return us to our former position of strength, I set out to seek the ship of my ancestors, the Ship of the Dead.\n\nWith this ship I promise great things for the Empire and for T'Kuvma.
STH_galactic_war.101.name: An audiance with the House of T'Kuvma
STH_galactic_war.103.desc: My Chancellor, I have recovered the ship of my ancestors and now I know my true purpose. For two long we have lost what it truly means to be Klingon as our neighbours claims worlds that should be ours and our warriors grow fat and dull fighting amongst themselves. \n\nWe have strayed from the path that Kahless set out for us and lost what it is to Remain Klingon, grant me your bless to go forth and light the beacon and unite the houses in glorious combat against a common foe.
STH_galactic_war.103.name: The House of T'Kuvma
STH_galactic_war.104.desc: Our attempts to kill T'Kuvma and his heretic House have failed and he has rebelled against his Empire and Chancellor, we cannot let this act of dishonour go unpunished, send the fleets to put this targ down.
STH_galactic_war.104.name: T'Kuvma Rebels
STH_galactic_war.105.desc: The traitor T'Kuvma and his House of crazed fools has been crushed in glorious combat against the true warriors of the Klingon Empire. Let this be a lesson to any House that feels it is bigger than the Empire.
STH_galactic_war.105.name: T'Kuvma Defeated
STH_galactic_war.106.desc: Our operatives have successfully executed the traitor T'Kuvma ending his heretical views and his challenge to the Empire.
STH_galactic_war.106.name: T'Kuvma Executed
STH_galactic_war.108.desc: One of our long range relay stations in the Eagle-12 system has stopped reporting in. The relay is orbitting a binary star system with some extreme conditions as the two stars clash and form new worlds. The Starfleet Corp of Engineers believe the station has probably suffered a technical malfunction and are requesting a ship be sent to bring the station back online.
STH_galactic_war.108.name: Contact lost with remote relay station
STH_galactic_war.109.desc: [battle_binary_leader_selected.GetName] has reported back in from Eagle-12 with concerning news, on investigating the relay it appears that the equipment was deliberately targeted by disruptor weaponary, the station is completely inoperable and will need to be replaced. Recommend we investigate further.
STH_galactic_war.109.name: Binary Stars
STH_galactic_war.11.b: We should review this decision in a year.
STH_galactic_war.11.c: A war is not in our interests.
STH_galactic_war.11.desc: After years of over zealous expansion those soft-skinned fools in the United Federation of Planets have finally pushed and bullied themselves into a position that puts them in contact with our borders, colonising several worlds that by rights should belong to us. \n\nMany senior figures back on Cardassia Prime believe we have been too passive for too long, whilst this Federation clearly builds up a military presence along our borders and within striking distance of our worlds.
STH_galactic_war.11.name: Federation-Cardassian Border Tension
STH_galactic_war.110.desc: Having left the safety of their ship [battle_binary_leader_selected.GetName] entered the asteroid field around the Binary Stars to investigate who or what caused the damage to the probe, the mission was progressing smoothly until another contact entered the location. Armed only with a long sleek metallic sword the intruder attacked [battle_binary_leader_selected.GetName]. Barely escaping with their lives the Captain was able to identify their attackers as...
STH_galactic_war.110.name: The Vulcan Hello
STH_galactic_war.111.name: Battle of the Binary Stars
STH_galactic_war.112.desc: A conflict has broken out between the forces of Starfleet and the Klingon Empire in a Binary Star system. Battles between these two powers are often fiercly fought and we shall soon see how the balance of power shifts in the quadrant following this engagement.
STH_galactic_war.112.name: Skirmish between Klingon and Federation Forces
STH_galactic_war.113.desc: House T'Kuvma has engaged in open conflict with the Federation fleets at the Binary Stars, our long range reports suggest the battle is raging across the system with casualties on both sides. We shall wait on the output before directing our next move.
STH_galactic_war.113.name: Battle of the Binary Stars
STH_galactic_war.114.desc_01: Our attempt to open peaceful communications with the Klingons has been met with open hostility and the start of an attack on our fleets led by an individuals named T'Kuvma, we must send reinforcements and end this attack against our ships immediately.
STH_galactic_war.114.desc_02: Our fleets have opened fire as part of a preemptive strike against the Klingons and the situation has escalated into open conflict. The Klingons are led by an individual named T'Kuvma, we should focus on ending the threat he poses as soon as we can.
STH_galactic_war.114.name: Battle of the Binary Stars
STH_galactic_war.115.desc: The Beacon of Kahless has been lit signalling other Houses to join T'Kuvma in his crusade to purify the Klingon Empire. Warriors across the Empire are eager to seek glory and victory against the Federation.
STH_galactic_war.115.name: Fleets flock to T'Kuvma
STH_galactic_war.118.desc: Despite putting up a fierce fight the Klingon leader known as T'Kuvma of the House T'Kuvma has been defeated on the battlefield by Starfeet forces. During his crusade a great number of Klingon warriors have flocked to his cause to maintain the purity of the Klingon species. It remains to be seen what impact this will now have on the Klingon Empire.
STH_galactic_war.118.name: T'Kuvma Defeated
STH_galactic_war.12.desc: Our operatives within the Obsidian Order have identified an oppertunity to strike at a key meeting being held within Federation space, our agents report that they are hosting a war summit with their allies discussing their plans to attack our borders and arm their colonies to use them as staging grounds in a war against the Union. \n\nThe Obsidian Order recommeneds commissioning a covert operation to sabotage this conference and disrupt their plans.
STH_galactic_war.12.name: Federation War Conference
STH_galactic_war.120.desc: Our death toll continues to rise following the Battle of the Binary Stars, including the tragic loss of [battle_binary_leader_selected.GetName] their service to Starfleet and the Federation will never be forgotten. \n\nThe Empires victories seem to enspired many to pick up the cause and join T'Kuvma's crusade.
STH_galactic_war.120.name: Federation Loses
STH_galactic_war.121.b: Now is not the time for war.
STH_galactic_war.121.desc_01: I am Kol of House Kor, I bring you a report that the martyr T'Kuvma has been killed by the Federation targs at the Binary Stars, reports into the High Council indicate that he gave his life in combat for the Empire. The warriors in Sto-vo-Kor will be honoured to receive his presence at the great table.\n\nI bring news that many now feel that with the legendary Beacon of Kahless lit the only honourable thing to do is to answer its call and I will lead us to glorious victory.
STH_galactic_war.121.desc_02: I am Kol of House Kor, I have seen our forces leap in action, House T'Kuvma has caused some significant losses to the Federations meager forces, who now tremble at the thought of facing the Empire in open battle. Our warriors hearts now echo with the sounds of victory and the blood that pumps in their veins longs for the taste of more Federation lives. Now is the time to strike and bring glory to the Empire and I will lead us to this victory.
STH_galactic_war.121.name: Remain Klingon
STH_galactic_war.122.desc: The Klingon Empire has declared war against us, it is clear their attack on our forces at Eagle-12 was provocation to build an anger against us. Their belief that to Remain Klingon is to challenge and defeat other powers is a threat to not only our civilisation, but all that stand between them and they glory thet seek.
STH_galactic_war.122.name: Klingons Declare War
STH_galactic_war.123.desc: Whilst many on the Federation Council feared the worst following the ambush at Eagle-12 it seems that cooler heads have prevailed within the High Council on Qo'nos and they have backed away from war. Our relations with the Empire remain strained.
STH_galactic_war.123.name: Klingons Back Down
STH_galactic_war.126.desc: True to his word T'Kuvma has discovered the Beacon of Kahless within the space of the Federation, this fabled Beacon is said to unite the Houses in a common goal and against a common foe to bring the ultimate glory to the whole empire.
STH_galactic_war.126.name: The Beacon of Kahless
STH_galactic_war.127.desc: The Beacon of Kahless has been lit by House T'Kuvma. The glorious light shines across the galaxy signalling other Houses to join T'Kuvma in his crusade to purify the Klingon Empire. Warriors across the Empire are eager to seek glory and victory against the Federation.
STH_galactic_war.127.name: The Beacon of Kahless
STH_galactic_war.131.desc: The Ship of the Dead, the Duj Heg, has been discovered lying abandoned on the surface of some forgotten world. The engineers of the House of T'Kuvma have worked to restore the ancient vessel to its former glory a ship of extreme power ready to restore the glory back to the House and to the Empire.
STH_galactic_war.131.name: Ship of the Dead recovered
STH_galactic_war.133.desc: The end to this war may be in sight, our forces have managed to defeat the Klingon war leader Kol in battle, if our intelligence is to be believed Kol is instrumental in unifying the Klingon Houses in their war efforts against us. With Kol dead we only hope the Klingons thirst for battle is ended.
STH_galactic_war.133.name: Klingon War Leader Killed
STH_galactic_war.134.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] our war leader Kol has been slain in battle and with it ends the Beacon of Kahless, our warriors now believe the crusade to be over and honour to have been satisfied.
STH_galactic_war.134.name: Kol Killed in combat
STH_galactic_war.135.desc: The Cardassian Union has accepted our proposal to form a new DMZ between our two states, the Federation council has pledged to help anyone wishing to relocate to a federation world, but with the majority of colonists wishing to stay under the terms of the treaty we cannot aid them.
STH_galactic_war.135.name: DMZ Created
STH_galactic_war.14.b: This is not in our interests.
STH_galactic_war.14.desc: As part of our drive for continued peace and in the spirit of further coperation our diplomatic corp has arrange a conference with [cardassian_federation_border_war_neighbour.GetName] on [cardassian_federation_border_war_bombing_planet.GetName] . Starfleet is requested to dispatch a ship and crew to help facilitate the conference.
STH_galactic_war.14.name: Federation-[cardassian_federation_border_war_neighbour.GetName] Peace Summit
STH_galactic_war.15.desc: It appears the Federation may have gotten wind of our plans and have cancelled their conference, but all is not lost as our agents were able to infiltrate one of their starbases on the border of Cardassian space and destroy one of their starbase facilities orbitting [bw_ufp_planet_target_01.GetName], this will cause them a significant impact in any operations they maybe running against us in this system.
STH_galactic_war.15.name: Sabotage Operation
STH_galactic_war.16.desc_01: One of our Starbase facilities over [bw_ufp_planet_target_02.GetName] appears to have been sabotaged causing serious impact to our operations in this region. \n\nEvidence left at the scene has been linked to past operations carried out by the Obsidian Order, the secretive branch of Cardassian security.
STH_galactic_war.16.desc_02: One of our Starbase facilities over [bw_ufp_planet_target_02.GetName] appears to have been sabotaged causing serious impact to our operations in this region.\n\nThere is little evidence left at the scene and our internal security agents are unable to identify a lead at this time.
STH_galactic_war.16.name: Starbase over [bw_ufp_planet_target_02.GetName] sabotaged!
STH_galactic_war.17.desc_01: There has been a devastating attack on our Embassy on [cardassian_federation_border_war_bombing_planet.GetName] a bomb detonated in one of the side conference rooms and whilst the casualties reports are still coming in, they are expected to be high. \n\nStarfleet Security are continuing to investigate the brutal attack however they have identified several key pieces of evidence that would suggest the attack was orchestrated by Obsidian Order on behalf of the Cardassian Union.
STH_galactic_war.17.desc_02: There has been a devastating attack on our Embassy on [cardassian_federation_border_war_bombing_planet.GetName] a bomb detonated in one of the side conference rooms and whilst the casualties reports are still coming in, they are expected to be high. \n\nStarfleet Security are continuing to investigate the brutal attack but so far they are struggling to find any evidence to point them towards any culprit.
STH_galactic_war.17.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_galactic_war.18.desc: Our efforts to dissuade the vile Federation from continuing to encroach on our territory have so far failed to keep them in their own home system, it is now time to give them a direct warning that even those feeble minded fools can understand.
STH_galactic_war.18.name: Federation-Cardassian Border Tension
STH_galactic_war.19.a: We do not tolerate such threats.
STH_galactic_war.19.c: Agree to backdown from the region.
STH_galactic_war.19.desc: Attention [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], this is your first and final warning from the Cardassian Union. You will cease all operations along our border, the arming and provokation of your colonists will end immediately and your activities in our border region will hault. \n\nShould you continue to test our resolve you will see that the Cardassian Union has teeth, just ask your recent wounded.
STH_galactic_war.19.name: Incoming Transmission from Cardassia Prime
STH_galactic_war.2.desc:
