Dev Note: We have introduced a new feature to STNH called Canon Galactic Wars, by enabling this mode a number of events will spawn throughout your playthrough that can lead to one of the wars seen through Star Trek history. 

Each situation has a set of triggers that will cause it to fire, so the state of your STNH galaxy will directly influence which wars you may see and the outcome of each war will have a knock-on to how your game progresses. 

If you prefer a more random and natural playthough we recommend you do not active this game mode. 

The mode can be switched on or off at any time via the Stellaris console by running event STH_galactic_war.2 or speak with Q via the contacts menu.
STH_galactic_war.2.name: Galactic Wars
STH_galactic_war.20.desc:
An outbreak of the Tanerian Plague has been reported on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName] in the [border_war_plague_planet.Solar_System.GetName] system. 

While the local quarantine has so far succeeded in containing the infection within a handful of settlements on the planet, it may soon spread if untreated. 

Authorities on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName] have requested the dispatch of a medical team to the planet immediately.
STH_galactic_war.20.name: Healthcare Emergency declared on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName]
STH_galactic_war.21.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] reports from our field operatives have uncovered further evidence of the Federation delivering weapons to a ilitary outpost along our border, their claims that the ships is on a mission of mercy should be dismissed as desperate lies of a weak people.
STH_galactic_war.21.name: Federation Arming Civillians
STH_galactic_war.22.desc_01: Reports are coming in that one of our ships, the [cardassia_ufp_border_ship_violation.GetName] has been shot down whilst on route to deliver crucial medical supplies to the colony on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName], the ship managed to send out a distress call before it was destroyed and named their attackers as the Cardassians!
STH_galactic_war.22.desc_02: Reports are coming in that one of our ships, the [cardassia_ufp_border_ship_violation.GetName] has been shot down whilst on route to deliver crucial medical supplies to the colony on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName], the ship was lost with all hands along with its lifesaving cargo, there is circumstantial evidence at the scene pointing to an attack from across the Cardassian border, but no hard evidence to substantiate these claims.
STH_galactic_war.22.desc_03: Reports are coming in that one of our ships, the [cardassia_ufp_border_ship_violation.GetName] has been shot down whilst on route to deliver crucial medical supplies to the colony on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName], the ship managed to launch several escape pods, the surviving crew members all confirmed that their attackers were clearly Cardassian.
STH_galactic_war.22.desc_04: Reports are coming in that one of our ships, the [cardassia_ufp_border_ship_violation.GetName] has been shot down whilst on route to deliver crucial medical supplies to the colony on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName], the ship managed to launch several escape pods, the surviving crew members all share the same story of a swift, deadly and precise attack that was over before their attackers could be identified, however the strong suspicion remains that this was the work of a Cardassian attack fleet.
STH_galactic_war.22.desc_05: Reports are coming in that the [cardassia_ufp_border_ship_violation.GetName] came under heavy fire whilst attempting to deliver crucial medical supplies to the colony on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName], the ship whilst heavily damaged is salvagable along with its precious cargo. It appears their attackers were Cardassian in origin and were forced to retreat when a Vulcan trading vessel picked up the distress call.
STH_galactic_war.22.desc_06: Reports are coming in that the [cardassia_ufp_border_ship_violation.GetName] came under heavy fire whilst attempting to deliver crucial medical supplies to the colony on [border_war_plague_planet.GetName], the ship whilst heavily damaged is salvagable along with its precious cargo. \n\nThe attackers appear to have retreated when they picked up the long range scans from a Tellarite convoy on route. The Tellarites were unable to confirm for certain, but they believe the attackers were from the Cardassian military.
STH_galactic_war.22.name: [cardassia_ufp_border_ship_violation.GetName] destroyed whilst on humanitarian mission
STH_galactic_war.24.desc: Over the last few months tensions between the Federation and Cardassia have been rising and this week culminated with the suspected attack on a Federation vessel by a Cardassian squadron. \n\nWhilst the Cardassians have not formally accepted responsibility most powers in the region agree they are the likely culprits.
STH_galactic_war.24.name: Tension rises between the UFP and Cardassia Prime
STH_galactic_war.25.a: Empty threats from a toothless power.
STH_galactic_war.25.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] of the Cardassian Union, your unprovoked attacks against Federation ships, colonies and citizens ends now. We have only ever sought peaceful relations with our neighbours and we do not know what we have done to warrant your clear acts of agression, but we will be pushed no further, this is the last chance to avoid open hostility between our people.
STH_galactic_war.25.desc_02: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] of the Cardassian Union, whilst the evidence of your attacks against Federation ships, colonies and citizens is still unconfirmed we are in little doubt of your attacks against us. We have only ever sought peaceful relations with our neighbours and we do not know what we have done to warrant your clear acts of agression, but we will be pushed no further, this is the last chance to avoid open hostility between our people.
STH_galactic_war.25.name: Transmission from Starfleet
STH_galactic_war.26.b: We were too hasty in seeking conflict.
STH_galactic_war.26.desc: [Root.GetRulerName], our latest reports in from Obsidian Order agents strongly show that the Federation has built a new military defence post on [bw_massacre_planet.GetName], this can only be for a singular purpose, as a staging ground for an attack against our border. Our miltary commanders have prepared a plan off attack against this world and we should strike whilst they are unprepared for an attack.
STH_galactic_war.26.name: The final straw
STH_galactic_war.27.desc: Federation fools, your attempts to hide your true intentions on [bw_massacre_planet.GetName] have not gone unnoticed by the watchful guys of our Cardassian superiors, consider the world of [bw_massacre_planet.GetName] and the surrounding colonies of [ufp_border_planet_01.GetName], [ufp_border_planet_02.GetName], [ufp_border_planet_03.GetName], [ufp_border_planet_014.GetName] as properties of the Cardassian Union. \n\nYou will swiftly experience the might of the Cardassian military forces.
STH_galactic_war.27.name: A declaration of War
STH_galactic_war.28.desc: After months of speculation and rising hostility open warfare has been declared between Starfleet and Cardassia Prime following the invasion of one of their border colonies by Cardassian forces.
STH_galactic_war.28.name: War between Cardassia and the Federation
STH_galactic_war.29.desc: The rising hostility between the Federation and Cardassia ended today when the Federation President ceded a number of border worlds to the Cardassian government and agreed the creation of a DMZ between the two powers.
STH_galactic_war.29.name: UFP cedes worlds to Cardassia
STH_galactic_war.31.desc: Reports are coming in from across the remote world of [bw_massacre_planet.GetName] the Cardassians have launched an unprovoked and savage attack against this planet, claiming it to be a first strike against our forces. We must send aid to [bw_massacre_planet.GetName] as soon as possible and end this massacre against our colonists.
STH_galactic_war.31.name: Massacre on [bw_massacre_planet.GetName]
STH_galactic_war.33.desc: Greetings, [root.owner.GetRulerName] from across the border, this tension along our borders has gone on for far too long. It does neither of us any good to be at this heightened state of alert for such a long period. \n\nWe propose a peace deal to end this conflict.
STH_galactic_war.33.name: Peace Achieved
STH_galactic_war.34.desc: Greetings, [root.owner.GetRulerName] from across the border, this tension along our borders has gone on for far too long. It does neither of us any good to be at this heightened state of alert for such a long period. \n\nWe propose a peace deal to end this conflict.
STH_galactic_war.34.name: Peace Achieved
STH_galactic_war.35.desc: An agreement has been reached between the governments on Cardassia and Earth to form a Demilitarized Zone between the Federation and Cardassian Union in an attempt to end the open hostility between the two major powers.
STH_galactic_war.35.name: Demilitarised Zone Created
STH_galactic_war.36.desc: The DMZ separating the [Root.GetName] and the [From.GetName] has been dismantled, following the agreed cut-off date in the establishing treaty. \n\nSystems ceded to the Zone have been returned to their previous owners.
STH_galactic_war.36.name: [Root.GetName] - [From.GetName] DMZ Dismantled
STH_galactic_war.40.a: Set up a zone for 5 years.
STH_galactic_war.40.b: Set up a zone for 10 years.
STH_galactic_war.40.c: Set up a zone for 100 years.
STH_galactic_war.40.desc: Following the border wars with [From.GetName] many on the Federation security council are pressing for the declaration of a Demilitarised zone between the Federation and Cardassian Union with both sides seeding their claims to the worlds within the zones. \n\nWhilst this may displease those who live within the region, the lasting peace will secure their safety.
STH_galactic_war.40.name: Time to set up a demilitarized zone
STH_galactic_war.42.desc: Relations with the [From.GetName] have been strained as a result of the recent border war. As such, [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has proposed the establishment of a DMZ along the shared border, lasting for a period of 5 years. \n\nNote: Systems along the border of both the [Root.GetName] and the [From.GetName] will be temporarily ceded to establish the Zone.
STH_galactic_war.42.name: Proposed DMZ
STH_galactic_war.43.desc: Relations with the [From.GetName] have been strained as a result of the recent border war. As such, [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has proposed the establishment of a DMZ along the shared border, lasting for a period of 10 years. \n\nNote: Systems along the border of both the [Root.GetName] and the [From.GetName] will be temporarily ceded to establish the Zone.
STH_galactic_war.43.name: Proposed DMZ
STH_galactic_war.44.desc: Relations with the [From.GetName] have been strained as a result of the recent border war. As such, [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has proposed the establishment of a DMZ along the shared border, lasting for a period of 15 years. \n\nNote: Systems along the border of both the [Root.GetName] and the [From.GetName] will be temporarily ceded to establish the Zone.
STH_galactic_war.44.name: Proposed DMZ
STH_galactic_war.45.desc: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have agreed to establish a new DMZ in order to de-escalate the risk of military confrontation.
STH_galactic_war.45.name: [From.GetName] - [FromFrom.GetName] DMZ Established
STH_galactic_war.51.a: What evidence do you bring with you?
STH_galactic_war.51.c: Demand the Cardassians surrender their leadership.
STH_galactic_war.51.desc: Qapla' my Chancellor, I bring you news of great importance to the safely of our glorious Empire. For many months now I have had my suspicions about those miserable petaQ governing that pathetic excuse for an empire, the Cardassians. \n\nHowever now I have proof that they have been infiltrated by the Dominion's Changelings as part of prelude to an invasion of the Alpha and Beta Quadrants. For the safely of the Empire I emplore you to strike and wipe the changeling filth from this side of the wormhole.
STH_galactic_war.51.name: Suspicious Activities within the Cardassian Union
STH_galactic_war.52.a: What are you Klingon fools on about?
STH_galactic_war.52.b: You'll have to take them by force!
STH_galactic_war.52.c: Turn over the leaders in question.
STH_galactic_war.52.desc: I am [klingon_empire.ruler.GetName] of the Klingon Empire and this will be your one and only warning, we know that your government has been infiltrated and you are led by Changeling imposters. Your efforts to invade the Alpha and Beta quadrants will end in your destruction at the hands of the mighty Klingon Empire. \n\nThis is your only warning, hand your leaders over for execution and we may yet spare the lives of your civilians and innocents.
STH_galactic_war.52.name: Incoming Message from Q'onoS
STH_galactic_war.53.desc: It appears there has been a mass culling of the Cardassian Union's leadership under the strong recommendation of the Klingon Empire. \n\nIt seems that the upper leadership on Cardassia Prime had been replaced by Changeling infiltrators from the Dominion as part of an ambitious move from the Delta Quadrant power. This move by Cardassia will seriously set back any of their ambitions againt the Alpha Quadrant.
STH_galactic_war.53.name: Cardassia executes its leaders
STH_galactic_war.54.desc: Our spies within Cardassian space have reported that the leadership on Cardassia Prime has rejected an ultimatum from the Klingon Empire to handover its leadership for execution.\n\nThe Klingon's suspect that the Cardassian leadership has been infiltrated, but those in power on the Cardassian homeworld would rather risk the wrath of the Klingons than turn over their leaders for execution.
STH_galactic_war.54.name: Cardassia defies the Klingon Empire
STH_galactic_war.55.desc: My Chancellor, there is worrying news from the [changeling_klingon_fleet.GetName] it appears that one of our Generals, [klingon_changeling_infiltrator.GetName] lost their mind and dishonorable opened fire on our ships taking them by surprise, the attack was ended when [klingon_changeling_infiltrator.GetHerHis] ship self destructed destroying the rest of the fleet.
STH_galactic_war.55.name: Fleet destroyed by renegade warrior
STH_galactic_war.56.desc: Our colony on [klingon_bombed_planet.GetName] has suffered a devastating and cowardly attack, a large scale bomb detonated in a public area taking many warriors and honourable Klingons to their death. These Klingons may never know the joys of Sto-Vo-Kor. Whomever is responsible for this act will suffer our wrath.
STH_galactic_war.56.name: Cowardly attack on [klingon_bombed_planet.GetName]
STH_galactic_war.57.desc: Reports in from the front line fleets, one of our warships has been sabotaged killing many fine warriors and depriving our empire of the ships service. At present our internal security forces cannot find any cause behind this disaster.
STH_galactic_war.57.name: Ship Sabotaged
STH_galactic_war.58.a: Let this be a lesson to all.
STH_galactic_war.58.desc: As expected those cowards running the Cardassian Union have handed over their leaders for execution rather than face the full might of the Klingon Empire. \n\nThe quadrant is once again safe thanks to the honour of the Klingon warriors and those fools from across the Wormhole will have to fight with honour if they wish to challenge us.
STH_galactic_war.58.name: Cardassia Caves to our demands
STH_galactic_war.59.b: There will be no battle today.
STH_galactic_war.59.desc: It appears those miserable petaQ on Cardassia have more of a backbone then we gave them credit for, either that or the Founders have given them some fighting spirit. Their refusal to give up their leadership is just more evidence that they have been replaced by Changelings. We should make good on our promise of war, our warriors are eager for the taste of battle.
STH_galactic_war.59.name: Cardassia rejects our demands
STH_galactic_war.60.desc: Cardassian Fools! We offered to take care of your Changeling problem, but you rejected our offer. Now you will face us on the battlefield where the songs of our victories against your ships will fill the halls of Sto-Vo-Kor with songs for years to come. Prepare to meet your end! To War!
STH_galactic_war.60.name: Incoming Message from Q'onoS
STH_galactic_war.62.desc: Our warriors need no assistance in defeating these Cardassian Ha'DIbaH, however we fight for the future of the quadrant our allies should be given a chance to join us in the glorious conquest of the Cardassians and deal a mighty blow against the Dominion.
STH_galactic_war.62.name: Call ally to war
STH_galactic_war.63.b: We will join you in the war.
STH_galactic_war.63.c: We will not join you in war.
STH_galactic_war.63.desc: Greetings honoured ally from your friends in the Klingon Empire. Today we declared war on the Cardassian Union in a bid to purge their empire of the honourless shapeshifters from The Dominion. We invite you to share in the glory of this conquest so that we can share a bottle of blood wine on Cardassian soil. Will you join us?
STH_galactic_war.63.name: Incoming Message from Q'onoS
STH_galactic_war.64.desc: Our intelligence services have reliable intel that confirms that [war_ally_target.GetName] will be joining the Klingons in their war against Cardassia.
STH_galactic_war.64.name: Ally joins the War
STH_galactic_war.65.desc: Greetings [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] I am [klingon_cardassian_concerned.GetName] and bring you worrying news from the Klingon Empire. My sources suggest that a prominant leader within the Klingon Empire has been replaced by a Changeling and they are attempting to destablise the quadrant, as a prelude to war, by driving a war between Cardassia and the Klingon Empire. \n\nWe request permission to go on an undercover mission to reveal the full nature of this infiltration of the Klingons.
STH_galactic_war.65.name: Concerning news from Q'onoS
STH_galactic_war.66.a: Reveal the Changeling, push for peace.
STH_galactic_war.66.desc: [klingon_cardassian_concerned.GetName] has reported back from the Order of the Bat'leth ceremony they have uncovered a changeling spy masquerading as [klingon_cardassian_leader_01.GetName], a leader who has been a big supporter and influencer on the Klingon war efforts. \n\nExposing the Changeling could well convince the Klingons to back down from their war if they become aware that they have gone to war under false pretences.
STH_galactic_war.66.name: Changeling Presence Revealed
STH_galactic_war.67.a: Execute it and end the war.
STH_galactic_war.67.b: Execute it but remain at war.
STH_galactic_war.67.desc: We have been approached by [klingon_changling_exposer.GetName], they are telling us they had a team of operatives undercover at the Order of the Bat'leth ceremony where they have evidence that [klingon_cardassian_leader_01.GetName] is infact a Changeling spy. If true this calls into question all of the evidence presented against the Cardassian Union and poses clear evidence that The Dominion is targetting our own Empire.
STH_galactic_war.67.name: Changeling uncovered in our ranks!
STH_galactic_war.68.desc: It appears the Klingon Empire has agreed to withdrawn from their war against us and pull their ships and troops from our territory. It appears that they have uncovered new evidence in the case of Dominion involvement this side of the wormhole.
STH_galactic_war.68.name: Klingons withdraw from War
STH_galactic_war.69.desc: It appears the Klingon Empire has agreed to withdrawn from their war and pull their ships and troops from Cardassian territory. It appears that they have accepted our evidence and executed [klingon_cardassian_leader_01.GetName] before pulling out of all active wars to ensure that no further leaders have been compromised.
STH_galactic_war.69.name: Klingons withdraw from War
STH_galactic_war.70.desc: Mixed news is emerging from our sources within the Klingon Empire, it appears they have executed [klingon_cardassian_leader_01.GetName] for their crimes against the Empire, yet the Klingon War effort has not been halted. \n\nIt looks like the Klingon lust for violence has won the day and the Empire will continue to battle on.
STH_galactic_war.70.name: Klingons remain at war
STH_galactic_war.71.desc: Our ambassador on the Klingon First City has reported back bad news, having reviewed the evidence our team provided the Klingons have rejected our evidence and dismissed our claims as lies. They remain at war with Cardassia and our relations with Q'onoS have suffered as a result.
STH_galactic_war.71.name: Klingons remain at war
STH_galactic_war.72.desc: News back from Q'onoS is not good, our teams attempted to infiltrate the Order of the Bat'leth ceremony within the halls of the Klingon high chambers however they were caught and arrested by a team of security agents from the Klingon Defence Force led by [klingon_cardassian_leader_01.GetName]. \n\nAfter several hours negotiations our team have been returned to us alive, but our credibility has been severely damaged.
STH_galactic_war.72.name: Covert team fails in its mission
STH_galactic_war.73.a: We will not be distracted from battle.
STH_galactic_war.73.desc: A team of clandestine operatives from the cowardly [klingon_cardassian_failed_expose_1.GetName] have been captured attempting to sneak into the prestigous Order of the Bat'leth ceremony, on questioning they claim to have evidence that one of our leaders have been replaced by a Changeling. General [klingon_cardassian_leader_01.GetName] agrees that this is just a futile attempt to derail our war efforts and now is the time to show our strength.
STH_galactic_war.73.name: Undercover team captured
STH_galactic_war.74.desc: Our failure to complete our operation in Klingon space has meant that we have missed our small window of opertunity to expose any Changelings within the Klingon High Command. Additionally we have lost a small amount of support from those within the Empire who were willing to help us get agents onto their planet.
STH_galactic_war.74.name: Failed to complete Operation
STH_galactic_war.75.desc: We have been presented compelling evidence that one of our very own Generals, [klingon_cardassian_leader_01.GetName] is in fact a Changeling spy! Despite our war with Cardassia having been concluded it appears the Dominion may not yet be done with meddling in our affairs if we are to believe [klingon_cardassian_failed_exposer.GetName].\n\nWhat action should we take?
STH_galactic_war.75.name: Changeling in our ranks?
STH_galactic_war.77.desc: The quadrant has been shock into chaos as the Klingon Empire has declared war on the Cardassian Union with the aim of eliminating the Cardassian Leadership and creating a regime change on their homeworld.
STH_galactic_war.77.name: The Klingon Empire declares war against Cardassia
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.1.desc:
Tras haber salido a la superficie, el Capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] y el equipo visitante preparan alojamientos temporales para apoyar la misión de la expedicion. Las estructuras prefabricadas se completan en tres horas y el equipo comienza el proceso de mapeo de los depósitos en el área inmediata. 

Varios días pasan y se ha vuelto cada vez más difícil confirmar cualquiera de las lecturas de minerales detectadas desde la órbita. Peor aún, varios miembros de la tripulación mueren y resultan más heridos cuando un temblor sísmico causó que una hendidura se derrumbara sobre sí misma, atrapando a quienes exploraban la red de cavernas anexa. 

La misión termina con los depósitos de duranita confirmados que han sido causados ??por un fallo en la matriz de sensores [Root.GetFleetName].
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.1.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.10.desc: Los tres Proveedores hablan rápidamente entre sí, cada uno mostrando cierto interés en la oferta del Capitán. Después de varios minutos sin embargo, se hace evidente que no hay apetito entre el grupo de riesgo de perder a sus esclavos. \n\nEl capitán, al ver que el argumento se pierde, se agarra en el frasco más cercano pero se mantiene congelado en su lugar de alguna manera. Un zumbido se puede oír construyendo hasta momentos más adelante una oleada eléctrica arcos del tarro a través de [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName], matando [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHim] inmediatamente.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.10.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.11.desc:
Los tres Proveedores hablan rápidamente entre sí, cada uno mostrando cierto interés en la oferta del Capitán. Después de varios minutos los tarros anuncian al capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName]:

Muy bien. Tendrás que enfrentar a nuestros guerreros más fuertes, a oleadas contra vosotros. Si ganas, te liberaremos '. 

Y con eso una luz cegadora llena el pasillo y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] es transmitido de nuevo a los terrenos de entrenamiento de superficie.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.11.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.12.desc:
Varios días más pasan antes de que el Maestro Thrall regrese y conduce a la tripulación del capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] al enorme coliseo en el centro de la ciudad. Los muchos miles de asientos están vacíos, pero para tres orbes brillantes igualmente espaciados a lo largo del círculo del edificio, mientras que cientos de guardias alienígenas están a la atención alrededor del centro. 

Un gong se escucha y un número de alienígenas de muchas razas vierten en la arena, gritando mientras corren desarmados hacia el equipo visitante. 

Los dos grupos se enfrentan en combate de mano a mano [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] superan en número a dos a uno. La lucha es sangrienta y viciosa. 

El equipo visitante consigue incapacitar a la mayoría de sus atacantes, antes de que suene un segundo gong y una nueva ola de alienígenas entre en la arena. Exhausto, el equipo visitante es reducido uno por uno hasta que sólo el capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] permanece en pie [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis]. 

Agotado, [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetSheHe] se defiende por lo que parece una eternidad, hasta que por fin [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetSheHe] es golpeado inconsciente. 

Los atacantes alienígenas se mueven entre los miembros del equipo visitante, rompiendo el cuello de los que no están muertos.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.12.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.13.desc:
Varios días más pasan antes de que el Maestro Thrall regrese y conduce a la tripulación del capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] al enorme coliseo en el centro de la ciudad. Los muchos miles de asientos están vacíos, pero para tres orbes brillantes igualmente espaciados a lo largo del círculo del edificio, mientras que cientos de guardias alienígenas están a la atención alrededor del centro. 

 Se escucha un gong y los alienígenas de muchas razas se lanzan a la arena, gritando mientras corren desarmados hacia el equipo visitante. 

Los dos grupos se enfrentan en combate de mano a mano, [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] superan en número a dos a uno. La lucha es sangrienta y viciosa. 

El equipo visitante consigue incapacitar a la mayoría de sus atacantes, antes de que suene un segundo gong y una nueva ola de alienígenas entre en la arena. Exhausto pero decidido, el equipo visitante vence a la segunda oleada uno por uno hasta que por fin sólo permanecen en pie ellos. 

El más lejano de los grandes orbes resplandecientes ilumina y la voz de un Proveedor se escucha: 

'Tú has actuado bien. Honraremos nuestro acuerdo ahora. Un destello de luz llena el coliseo y el equipo visitante desaparece. 

Capitan [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] se despierta en medio del campamento de exploración mineral en [triskelion_original_planet.GetName], comunicador [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] con un mensaje de la nave.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.13.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.14.desc:
Las semanas pasan y la tripulación [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHim] han seguido el intenso régimen de entrenamiento que el Maestro Thrall les ha proporcionado con vigor. 

Una tarde después de una desafiante sesión de combate en grupo contra otro grupo de esclavos extraterrestres, [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] es abordado por Galt y le dijo que lo siguiera. 

Siguiendo al Master Thrall fuera de los terrenos de entrenamiento y en un edificio cercano, se le dice a [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetSheHe] que se pare en lo que parece ser una plataforma transportadora de alguna variedad. 

Entra en la plataforma, una luz cegadora destella y el Capitán desaparece de la cámara.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.14.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.15.desc:
[Triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] despierta una vez más, habiendo sido transportado dentro de una gran caverna. La iluminación débil llena un gran salón, donde en los plintos en el soporte del centro qué parecen ser tres cerebros suspendidos en jarros grandes. Un cerebro comienza a brillar intensamente y una voz dice: 

'Tú demuestras una gran promesa. Cuéntanos tu valor, para que podamos pujar entre nosotros por tu esclavitud. 

El Capitán discute con los cerebros durante varios minutos, aprendiendo que son los restos de la civilización Triskelion - los Proveedores - habiendo abandonado la necesidad de su Cuerpos físicos.

Se vuelve evidente que los cerebros viven ahora por poco más que la oportunidad de apostar sumas de dinero en concursos entre extranjeros capturados. 

Considerando esto, el capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] ofrece una propuesta.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.15.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.16.desc: Los tres Proveedores hablan rápidamente entre sí, cada uno mostrando cierto interés en la oferta del Capitán. Después de varios minutos sin embargo, se hace evidente que no hay apetito entre el grupo de riesgo de perder a sus esclavos. \n\nEl capitán, al ver que el argumento se pierde, se agarra en el frasco más cercano pero se mantiene congelado en su lugar de alguna manera. Un zumbido se puede oír construyendo hasta momentos más adelante una oleada eléctrica arcos del tarro a través de [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName], matando [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHim] inmediatamente.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.16.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.17.desc:
Los tres Proveedores hablan rápidamente entre sí, cada uno mostrando cierto interés en la oferta del Capitán. Después de varios minutos los tarros anuncian al Capitán: 

Muy bien. Tendrás que enfrentar a nuestros guerreros más fuertes, en oleadas contra vosotros. Si ganas, te liberaremos '. 

Y con eso una luz cegadora llena el pasillo y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] es transmitido de nuevo a los terrenos de entrenamiento de superficie.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.17.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.18.desc:
Varios días más pasan antes de que el Maestro Thrall regrese y conduce a la tripulación del capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] al enorme coliseo en el centro de la ciudad. Los muchos miles de asientos están vacíos, pero para tres orbes brillantes igualmente espaciados a lo largo del círculo del edificio, mientras que cientos de guardias alienígenas están a la atención alrededor del centro. 

Un gong se escucha y un número de alienígenas de muchas razas vierten en la arena, gritando mientras corren desarmados hacia el equipo visitante. 

Los dos grupos se enfrentan en combate de mano a mano [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] superan en número a dos a uno. La lucha es sangrienta y viciosa. 

El equipo visitante consigue incapacitar a la mayoría de sus atacantes, antes de que suene un segundo gong y una nueva ola de alienígenas entre en la arena. Agotado, [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetSheHe] se defiende por lo que parece una eternidad, hasta que por fin [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetSheHe] es golpeado inconsciente. 

Los atacantes alienígenas se mueven entre los miembros del equipo visitante, rompiendo el cuello de los que no están muertos.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.18.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.19.desc:
El capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] pide una audiencia con el Maestro Thrall, que a regañadientes obliga. 

Estate su negocio ", dice. 

¿Hay que haber algún modo de llegar a un acuerdo mutuamente beneficioso? [Triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] dice, antes de enumerar una serie de operaciones valiosas [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetSheHe] estaría dispuesto a hacer a cambio de la liberación de la tripulación. Galt parece indiferente, hasta que una luz cegadora los envuelve a ambos. 

[triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] despierta una vez más, habiendo sido transportado dentro de una gran caverna. La iluminación débil llena un gran salón, donde en los plintos en el soporte del centro qué parecen ser tres cerebros suspendidos en jarros grandes. Un cerebro comienza a brillar y una voz dice: 

Habla ahora.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.19.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.2.desc:
Tras haber salido a la superficie, el Capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] y el equipo visitante preparan alojamientos temporales para apoyar la misión de la expedicion. Las estructuras prefabricadas se completan en tres horas y el equipo comienza el proceso de mapeo de los depósitos en el área inmediata. 

Varios días pasan y se ha vuelto cada vez más difícil confirmar cualquiera de las lecturas de minerales detectadas desde la órbita. Peor aún, varios tripulantes resultan heridos cuando un temblor sísmico provocó que una hendidura se derrumbara sobre sí misma, atrapando a quienes exploraban la red de cavernas anexa. 

La misión termina con los depósitos de duranita confirmados que han sido causados ??por un fallo en la matriz de sensores [Root.GetFleetName].
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.2.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.20.desc: Ahora, ¿tengo una oportunidad de negocio para usted? El capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] le dice a los tres cerebros, antes de hablar largamente de las oportunidades de transferencia de tecnología, los rescates que el [From.GetName] estaría dispuesto a pagar y vagas amenazas a Triskelion si la tripulación no regresara a [From.GetName ] espacio. \n\nLos cerebros no están convencidos, y una ráfaga de luces se puede ver como discuten entre sí en cuanto a la manera más rápida de matar [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName]. El Capitán, al ver que el argumento se pierde, se agarra en el frasco más cercano pero se mantiene congelado en su lugar de alguna manera. Un zumbido se puede oír construyendo hasta momentos más adelante una oleada eléctrica arcos del tarro a través de [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName], matando [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHim] inmediatamente.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.20.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.21.desc:
Ahora permítanme contarles sobre el lucrativo mundo de la franquicia Dabo ', [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] dice a los tres cerebros, antes de hablar largamente sobre la emoción del juego y el juego que implica. 

Con cada detalle adicional los cerebros murmuran murmullos de aprobación hasta que por fin se enciende y se pide iniciar el comercio de la libertad de la tripulación para la instalación de un salón totalmente equipado Dabo. 

Capitan [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] está de acuerdo y se establece un enlace de comunicaciones con el buque, donde se confirman los detalles del tratado del comercio. 

La tripulación es transportada fuera de Triskelion y de vuelta al sitio de prospección de minerales en [triskelion_original_planet.GetName], donde una serie de cajas llenas de equipo Dabo se transportan de vuelta a Triskelion.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.21.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.22.desc:
Ahora déjenme decirles sobre el juego de Chula ', [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] dice a los tres cerebros, antes de hablar extensamente sobre la emoción del juego y el juego que implica. 

Con cada detalle adicional los cerebros murmuran murmullos de aprobación hasta que por fin se ilumina y se pide iniciar el comercio de la libertad de la tripulación para la instalación de una mesa totalmente equipada Chula. 

Capitan [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] está de acuerdo y se establece un enlace de comunicaciones con el buque, donde se confirman los detalles del comercio. 

La tripulación es transportada fuera de Triskelion y de vuelta al sitio de prospección de minerales en [triskelion_original_planet.GetName], donde una serie de cajas llenas de equipo Chula son transportadas de vuelta a Triskelion.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.22.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.3.desc:
Traspasando la superficie, el capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y el equipo visitante preparan alojamientos temporales para apoyar la misión de la expedicion. Las estructuras prefabricadas se completan en tres horas y el equipo comienza el proceso de mapeo de los depósitos en el área inmediata. 

Varios días pasan y se ha vuelto cada vez más difícil confirmar cualquiera de las lecturas de minerales detectadas desde la órbita. El capitán ordena a [Root.GetFleetName] que entre en una órbita inferior para aumentar la efectividad de sus sensores, pero cuando el barco completa el maniobre, se detecta un gran pico de energía desde la superficie. 

El [Root.GetFleetName] intenta ponerse en contacto con el capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName], pero parece que todo el equipo visitante ha desaparecido de [From.From.GetName]. 

La nave pasa varios días escaneando la superficie, pero no se encuentran pistas para explicar lo que le pasó a la tripulación desaparecida.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.3.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.4.a: No nos someteremos a la esclavitud.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.4.b: No tenemos más remedio que obedecer, por ahora.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.4.desc:
Capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] equipo de distancia despierto de la inconsciencia para encontrarse transportados a un mundo desconocido. El sol en el cielo traiciona que ya no están en [triskelion_original_planet.GetName], y una extraña vegetación desierta pinta el paisaje. 

Máximos después de componerse, el equipo visitante está acosado por un grupo de extraterrestres armados con espadas primitivas y vistiendo túnicas simples de tela. Las armas de energía resultan ineficaces en el ambiente local, sus baterías drenaron, y el equipo es rápidamente dominado. 

El equipo visitante es llevado a través del desierto a la entrada de una ciudad rodeada por un gran muro de piedra. Una figura calva les espera, vestida con una túnica negra y roja. 

 Soy Galt, Maestro Thrall de Triskelion, este mundo. ' Le dice a [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName]. "Deben ser elogiados por su espíritu de lucha. Los Proveedores harán buen uso de ti ... '
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.4.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.5.a: No tenemos más remedio que obedecer, por ahora.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.5.desc: El espectáculo de desafío no mueve a Galt, quien simplemente asiente con la cabeza a un alienígena armado con espada. El extranjero agarra al más cercano de la tripulación de [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName], un alférez mayor de edad, y con un corte rápido de la espada le abre el cuello. El resto de equipo visitante, se callan a medida que el Thrall Maestro ruge: \n\nPuede que la situación se ha aclarado. ¡No se tolerará la desobediencia!
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.5.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.6.desc:
El capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName], enfurecido por la muerte de [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis] oficial se lanza a Galt. Se enfrentan mientras el resto de la tripulación se ocupa de los extranjeros que manejan espadas. 

 A pesar de su formación avanzada, la tripulación es incapaz de soportar la embestida y son asesinados uno por uno. 

Galt y el Capitán continúan luchando por un momento, hasta que finalmente los extraterrestres arrastran [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHim] y atraviesan su corazon con una espada [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHis].
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.6.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.7.a: Vamos a entrenar, pero la fuga es nuestra meta.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.7.b: Vamos a entrenar, ningún enemigo nos derrotará.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.7.c: ¡Debemos ser capaces de hacer una ganga!
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.7.desc:
El capitán se compromete a someterse y el equipo visitante es conducido a través de las puertas de la ciudad en un cuadrado de cuarteles de piedra, donde son despojados de sus uniformes y armas y vestidos con las mismas túnicas de tela que los extranjeros usan. 

El día pasa y se encuentran de nuevo con el Galt. 

Usted se entrenará para el combate. Armados, desarmados, solos y en grupos. Esto lo harás por la voluntad de los Proveedores. Sirve y puedes vivir. 

El grupo se divide y se lleva a una serie de campos de entrenamiento por toda la ciudad.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.7.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.8.desc:
Las semanas pasan y la tripulación de [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] y [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetHerHim] han seguido el intenso régimen de entrenamiento que Galt les ha proporcionado sin vacilar, mientras venían a aprender más de Triskelion a través de los otros esclavos que se guardaban en la ciudad. 

Una tarde después de una sesión de combate de grupo desafiante, [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] es capaz de escapar de los terrenos de entrenamiento e investigar varios de los edificios cercanos antes de atravesar lo que parece ser una plataforma transportadora de alguna variedad. 

Entra en la plataforma, una luz cegadora parpadea y el capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] desaparece de la cámara.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.8.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.9.desc:
[Triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] despierta una vez más, habiendo sido transportado dentro de una gran caverna. La iluminación débil llena un gran salón, donde en el centro hay lo que parecen ser tres cerebros suspendidos en jarros grandes. Un cerebro comienza a brillar intensamente y una voz dice: 

'Tú demuestras una gran promesa. Cuéntanos tu valor, para que podamos optar por ser tu dueño.

El Capitán discute con los cerebros durante varios minutos, aprendiendo que son los restos de la civilización Triskelion - los Proveedores - que han abandonado la necesidad de sus cuerpos físicos . Se hace evidente que los cerebros viven ahora por poco más que la oportunidad de apostar sumas de dinero en los concursos entre extranjeros capturados. 

Considerando esto, el capitán [triskelion_enslaved_leader.GetName] ofrece una propuesta.
STH_gamestersOfTriskelion_event.9.name: Los Juegos de Triskelion
STH_gamma.110.b: It is not worth our time.
STH_gamma.110.desc: The crew of the [gamma_ship_name.GetName] have picked up an unusual planet on long range scanners that warrants further investigation. The science officer recommends setting course.
STH_gamma.110.name: Gamma Quadrant... Intresting Planet on sensors
STH_gamma.111.desc: On arriving in orbit of the mysterious planet, our science teams have found evidence of a primitive pre-warp race undergoing a technolgical and sociological revolution. The assembled science teams have requested a closer look at the species on the planet's surface. An undercover mission would enable us get better readings from the colony.
STH_gamma.111.name: Primitive Culture Found
STH_gamma.112.desc: After a week studying the colony the crews of the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] have brought back a wealth of information about the civilisation which will keep the anthropologists back in the [Root.GetName] occupied for years.\n\nWith the information collected it is time to resume the mission.
STH_gamma.112.name: Mission Successful
STH_gamma.113.desc: [Root.GetRulerName] reports in from the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] are troubling, the away team who went in disguised as the natives have been captured by forces on the planet. \n\nBelieving the away team to be part of an enemy faction. Our security forces have put together a plan to retrieve them, however it could lead to casualties on both sides.
STH_gamma.113.name: Away team captured!
STH_gamma.114.desc: The mission was successful and our security forces were able to rescue the hostages and safely return them to the fleet without harming the natives or blowing our cover. \n\nWhilst we were unable to gather as much information as we had hoped the team did manage to at least to find out about their justice system...
STH_gamma.114.name: Away team rescued
STH_gamma.115.desc: The mission to retrieve the away team has ended in failure, whilst attempting to infiltrate the stronghold one of the team was spotted by the guards resulting in a fire fight. \n\nSadly not all of the away team were retrieved alive and a number of the native population were injured in the attempt.
STH_gamma.115.name: Mission a disaster
STH_gamma.116.desc: [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] have uncovered a thriving civillisation on the planet and whilst they are are significantly smaller than us, they were able to provide our teams with vital information about the region and were kind enough to provide valuable research to our teams.
STH_gamma.116.name: New Culture Discovered
STH_gamma.117.desc: Not every world holds the recipe for adventure and unfortunately this newly discovered planet offers our teams nothing in the way of excitement. A barren world, with no life or remarkable features. \n\nAt least the crew got the chance to stretch their legs.
STH_gamma.117.name: A lifeless planet found
STH_gamma.118.desc: Whilst the newly discovered planet does not harbour any advanced lifeforms, our engineering teams are pleased to confirm that the planet does host an exceptionally rich amount of resources that we can harvest an return home with.
STH_gamma.118.name: MIneral rich planet found
STH_gamma.120.desc: [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] has detected an M-Class planet on long range sensors which appears to support a warp capable civilisation with deposits of Dilithium and evidence of advanced mineral refinement. It is possible we maybe able to trade for some of their resources.
STH_gamma.120.name: The Quickening
STH_gamma.121.desc_01: Our sensors have indicated that the planet is within the territory of the Dominion, readings from the planet surface seem very different from the long range estimates. It is clear that there is a population of humanoids living in the remains of a ruined society with the remnants of a once powerful civilisation in tatters all around them. \n\nOur CMO indicates that many of the life signs are erratic at best and it is clear they are in need of aid.
STH_gamma.121.name: The Quickening
STH_gamma.122.desc_01:
The species on the planet belong call themselves the Teplans and explain that they were once a powerful space faring culture, however they refused to submit to the rule of the neighbouring Dominion. After a fierce battle the Teplan forces were destroyed and as punishment for their defiance an incurable plague was placed on them by the Vorta scientists. 

Without warning the blight each teplan carries could quicken and bring a painful death. 

A stark reminder to anyone who dares to defy the might of the Founders.
STH_gamma.122.name: The Quickening
STH_gamma.124.desc_01: Despite the tireless efforts of the fleets Chief Medical Officer they were unable to undo the effects of the Dominion plague in the short span of time allocated. As the time draws on [gamma_leader_name.GetName] has made the decision that it is no longer safe to remain in Dominion space and has ordered the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] onwards and away from Teplan.
STH_gamma.124.name: Unable to find a cure for the Quickening
STH_gamma.125.a: This insult will not be allowed.
STH_gamma.125.desc: Mighty Founder, our listening posts have detected outsiders from [gamma_mission_teplan.GetName] attempting to cure the Teplan Blight we inflicted upon the unruly Teplan people. It seems a team of their medical experts beamed down to the planets surface and spent a number of days seeking to undo the punishment we applied. The fleet left the system before we could send in the Jem'Hadar who took appropriate action to remind the Teplan's of our might.
STH_gamma.125.name: Interference detected on Teplan
STH_gamma.126.desc_01: This is a message for [Root.GetRulerName] of [Root.GetName], your interference in curing the Teplan Blight has not gone un-noticed by the forces within the Dominion. Your actions will not be allowed to continue and there will be retribution for your acts against the Dominion, just as the punishment for the Teplans was severe.\n\nYou have been warned.
STH_gamma.126.desc_02: This is a message for [Root.GetRulerName] of [Root.GetName], your failed attempt to cure Teplan Blight demonstrates the solids ignorance, repeated interference in our affairs will lead to your destruction.\n\nYou have been warned.
STH_gamma.126.name: Incoming Transmission from the Dominion
STH_gamma.127.b: They are a threat to the Link.
STH_gamma.127.desc_01: The fools in the [gamma_mission_teplan.GetName] are standing by their actions on Teplan, their arrogance stance only further demonstrates why solids can not be trusted.\n\n This insolence should not go unpunished.
STH_gamma.127.desc_02: Those cowards in the [gamma_mission_teplan.GetName] have trembled in fear of our words and uttered an apology for their actions on Teplan. \n\nAs the Jem'Hadar say victory is life.
STH_gamma.127.desc_03: The idiots in [gamma_mission_teplan.GetName] believe they can lie to us and deny their actions on Teplan, however we see through their words and know the truth, any continued action against our interests should be dealt with most severely.
STH_gamma.127.name: Response to our message
STH_gamma.129.desc: Our medical team and scientists believe they have found a major breakthrough in deciphering the Teplan blight. With this hard work our Chief Medical Officer believes future generations of Teplans may be immune to the effects of this terrible disease. [gamma_leader_name.GetName] feels that the fleet has lingered to long in hostile territory and having helped the stricken Teplans we should move on before we are detected.
STH_gamma.129.name: The Quickening, a cure found
STH_gamma.130.name: Unusual Asteroid Detected
STH_gamma.131.desc: Our away team has returned from the facility with a wealth of new research on the stellar phenomenon occurring within the system.\n\nWe have collected the information and will send it back to our scientists at home for further investigation.
STH_gamma.131.name: Asteroid Facility
STH_gamma.132.desc: Our away team has returned from the facility disappointed, the previous occupants appear to have wiped all the facilities data banks and taken all information with them. Whilst it was an interesting experience for the crew, there is little scientific benefit from the mission.
STH_gamma.132.name: Asteroid Facility
STH_gamma.133.desc: On beaming down to the colony, the colony leader introduced themselves to [gamma_leader_name.GetName] as being part of an advanced team from a species called the Stakoron who had left their homeworld many year ago. The Stakorons seem extremely pleased to have met the away team and offer them a rare crystal that forms naturally on this asteroid, seemingly unaware of its importance.
STH_gamma.133.name: Asteroid Colony
STH_gamma.134.b: They can take care of themselves.
STH_gamma.134.desc: The crew from the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] are introduced to the leaders of the colony, who explain that they are the frequent victims of pirate raids, which explains their reluctance to engage the fleet in open communication. Once the colonists are convinced we mean them no harm, they offer the away team a hearty meal, warm hospitality and a sample of the Deuterium they have been refining. Our tactical officer advised that with a sample of the fleets boronite the colony could improve their defences and stand a better chance of repelling further attacks.
STH_gamma.134.name: Asteroid Colony
STH_gamma.135.desc: The colony appears to be home to a group of vicious thugs who attempt to ambush our away team, in an attempt to ransom them back to [Root.GetName], luckily the away team were able to defend themselves without taking too much damage. \n\nA number of the landing party were unfortunately injured and will carry the scars of what happened down on the asteroid.
STH_gamma.135.name: Asteroid Colony
STH_gamma.136.desc: The attack on [gamma_ship_name.GetName] was vicious and wild, but the suprior training and firepower of the [Root.GetName] vessels and crew was sufficent to repel the attack and beat back the agressors, who after taking severe casulties retreated leaving their ill-gotten cargo behind.
STH_gamma.136.name: Fleet Under Attack
STH_gamma.137.a: A tragic end to the mission.
STH_gamma.137.desc: The attack on [gamma_ship_name.GetName] took the Captain and crew by surprise, the smugglers managed to get in several lethal shots to the [gamma_ship_name.GetName] warp drive before they could raise their shields. Unfortunately the damage was severe and the ship was lost with all hands. \n\nThe Admiralty board has ordered the fleet to return to the Alpha Quadrant, the mission is over.
STH_gamma.137.name: Fleet Under Attack
STH_gamma.141.desc: [gamma_fleet_name.GetName]'s course through the Gamma Quadrant has taken them via a new type of nebula that has never been observed back in the Alpha Quadrant, the ship and crew spend several days cataloguing the findings and preparing the data to bring home to [Root.GetName].
STH_gamma.141.name: A new nebula discovered
STH_gamma.142.desc: [gamma_fleet_name.GetName]'s course through the Gamma Quadrant has taken them via a nebula rich in Deuterium.\n\nHarvesting the resource should not take too long and can be put to good use by [Root.GetName].
STH_gamma.142.name: A new nebula discovered
STH_gamma.143.desc: The [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] has been ambushed whilst exploring a nebula within the Gamma Quadrant, it appears a group of local pirates have been using the sensor blocking effects of the Nebula to catch unsuspecting vessels that get too close.
STH_gamma.143.name: Ambush at the Nebula
STH_gamma.144.desc: [gamma_ship_name.GetName] proved to be too powerful for the attackers and was able to defeat them in a decisive battle in the Nebula. A fine victory for [gamma_leader_name.GetName] and their crew.
STH_gamma.144.name: Fleet Victory
STH_gamma.145.a: A tragic end to the mission
STH_gamma.145.desc:
The attack on [gamma_ship_name.GetName] took the Captain and crew by surprise, the ambushers quickly overwhelmed the [gamma_ship_name.GetName].

 The damage was severe and the ship was lost with all hands. 

The Admirality board has ordered the fleet to return to the Alpha Quadrant, the mission is over.
STH_gamma.145.name: Fleet Defeat
STH_gamma.150.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerName] we have had reports that our fleet in the Gamma Quadrant is under attack by a group claiming to be rogue Jem'Hadar rebelling against the Founders and Vorta. It looks like they are suffering from some form of withdrawal. They have opened fire on our ships with a savage aggression.\n\nThe fleet is prepared to defend itself or attempt to flee.
STH_gamma.150.desc_02: Our fleet in the Gamma Quadrant has reported that they are under attack by unidentified assailants, they are deliberately targetting the lead vessel. \n\nShould we order the fleet to stand their ground or escape whilst they can.
STH_gamma.150.desc_03: Our fleets are under attack whilst on expedition in the Gamma Quadrant, it appears that they have been tracking our ships for a number of weeks waiting for the right moment to strike. \n\nThe pirates have us out flanked and out gunned, but lack our officers training and co-ordination.
STH_gamma.150.desc_04: [Root.GetRulerName] our fleets in the Gamma Quadrant are under attack by the Magisterial Cheka Kingdom, slavers from the planet Cheka deep within the Quadrant. It looks like they are eager to add [Root.GetSpeciesName] to their ranks of enslaved species.\n\nCrushing their fleets here will do a great deal to ease the slavery rackets terrorizing this sector.
STH_gamma.150.name: Fleet Under Attack
STH_gamma.151.desc: [gamma_ship_name.GetName] proved to be too powerful for the attackers and was able to defeat them in a decisive battle over their foes. A fine victory for [gamma_leader_name.GetName] and their crew.
STH_gamma.151.name: Fleet Victory
STH_gamma.152.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] I am saddened to report the lost of [gamma_leader_name.GetName] and the crew of [gamma_ship_name.GetName] in battle against their enemy. \n\nThis puts a serious dent in the expedition and the Admiralty board have decided to terminate the mission and order the fleet back home.
STH_gamma.152.name: Fleet Defeated
STH_gamma.2.desc: The discovery of the Bajoran Wormhole has opened up a new quadrant to explore. Our Admirals and Scientists are queuing up to explore the far reaches of this new frontier, exploring the sectors way from the major empires. Our teams have prepared our fleets for an expedition into unknown territories. Shall we set course for adventure?
STH_gamma.2.name: Expedition to the Gamma Quadrant
STH_gamma.210.desc: The [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] has encounted a group of Karemma Traders, the fleet has opened communications and the Karemman Captain is willing to trade a number of high profile materials in exchange for Latinum.
STH_gamma.210.name: Karemma Traders
STH_gamma.220.desc: We are receiving an SOS on our long range scanners, we are unable to tell who is calling for aid at this range, but it is our duty to respond to any call for help.\n\nShall we set course?
STH_gamma.220.name: SOS Call Recieved
STH_gamma.222.b: The Rakharian Free States send their thanks.
STH_gamma.222.desc_01: On arriving at the coordinates of the distress call our fleets come across a Nyberrite Cruiser testing a new warp drive system, it appears that during the test the engine failed leaving the cruiser drifting in space. Our engineers were able to render assistance to the vessel and restore the ships original engines allowing them to continue on their way home.
STH_gamma.222.desc_02: On arriving at the site of the distress call, the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] were only able to find the debris of what was once a large ship. A number of detailed scans have picked up a number of escape pods containing members of the Rakharian Free States. \n\nA swift rescue of the crews within the escape pods allows us to return them back to one of their Starbases, much to the gratitude of the Rakharians.
STH_gamma.222.desc_03: The [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] arrives at the scene of a battle and in the midst of the battlefield a small shuttle is transmitting a distress call. It looks as if a Argrathian diplomatic delegation has become caught in the battle by mistake. Engaging in a daring rescue mission our teams were able to extract the dignitaries from the battlefield and return them to Argrathian space.
STH_gamma.222.desc_04: We have found a transport submitting a distress call, communications with the ship are offline, as [gamma_leader_name.GetName] attempts to lock on to the transport another vessel drops out of warp next to our fleet. The transport is a prison transport that had been overrun. The Skrreeans are under the impression that we were attempting to help the prisoners escape. \n\nAfter persuading them that our intervention was purely well meaning, the Skrreeans ask us to be on our way.
STH_gamma.222.name: SOS Call Recieved
STH_gamma.223.b: The Rakharian Free States are offended.
STH_gamma.223.desc_01: As the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] arrives at the scene of the distress call, it soon becomes apparent that what appeared to be weapons fire is in fact the testing of a new weapons system onboard a Nyberrite cruiser.\n\nThe Nyberrite's are not pleased that we have placed ourselves on the scene of a secretive weapons test and order us to leave the vicinity immediately.
STH_gamma.223.desc_02: As the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] arrives at the scene of the distress call, the crew discover a small ship adrift in space, on attempting to rescue the crew [gamma_ship_name.GetName] is hailed by the Rakharian Free States accusing us of interfering with a right of passage ceremony for their adolescents. \n\nTheir wardens rather crudely ask us to leave the area quickly.
STH_gamma.223.desc_03: As the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] arrives at the scene of the distress call, the crew discover a small cruiser suffering from a mass power relay overload, our engineering team believe they were attempting to increase their power output. \n\nBefore we can offer help, the Argrathian Commonwealth contact us rudely asking us to leave, we are told quite simply that the Argrathian Commonwealth takes care of its own.
STH_gamma.223.desc_04: As the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] arrives at the scene of the distress call, the crew discover a small cruiser suffering from a hull breach, as our fleet approaches ready to attempt to help. The Skrreean Captain rudely tells us to mind our own business and leave them alone. \n\nYou can't help everyone...
STH_gamma.223.name: SOS Call Recieved
STH_gamma.224.desc_01: [gamma_leader_name.GetName] we are receiving a distress call from a Nyberrite Alliance freighter under attack from pirates, their shields are failing and weapons are offline. They will not be able to last much longer. \n\nIf we are to aid them, we must do it now.
STH_gamma.224.desc_02: [gamma_leader_name.GetName] we are receiving a distress call from a Rakharian Free States passenger liner, carrying dignitories from their home world. They are under heavy attack from Cheka mercenaries, their shields are failing and their limited weapons pose no risk to their attackers. They will not be able to last much longer. \n\nIf we are to aid them, we must do it now.
STH_gamma.224.desc_03: Sir, the distress calling coming from an Argrathian Commonwealth science vessel, it looks like they have strayed into the territory of an isolationist group called the Bekkir. The Bekkir are clearly determined to purge the intruders regardless of their pleas for mercy. Defending the science vessel would be interfering in another culture's affairs, but the ship will not survive much longer without our help.
STH_gamma.224.desc_04: [gamma_leader_name.GetName] we are being hailed by a Skrreean transport feeling from a T'Rogoran vessel, the transports engines are failing and they are in danger of being caught by the T'Rogorans. Our attempts to hail both vessels are being ignored and it looks like the fight is coming to our fleet whether we like it or not.
STH_gamma.224.name: SOS Call Recieved
STH_gamma.225.desc: [gamma_ship_name.GetName] proved to be too powerful for the attackers and was able to defeat them in a decisive battle over their foes. A fine victory for [gamma_leader_name.GetName] and their crew.
STH_gamma.225.name: Fleet Victorious
STH_gamma.226.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] I am saddened to report the lost of [gamma_leader_name.GetName] and the crew of [gamma_ship_name.GetName] in battle against their enemy. \n\nThis puts a serious dent in the expedition and the Admiralty board have decided to terminate the mission and order the fleet back home.
STH_gamma.226.name: Fleet Defeated
STH_gamma.230.desc: Greetings [gamma_leader_name.GetName] my name is Eav'oq, I am contacting you in need of assistance, we are the Tosk, the hunted. I have escaped with a number of my race, we have been hunted for as long as we can remember. \n\nI must get my people to freedom and we need your help.
STH_gamma.230.name: Communications from the Tosk
STH_gamma.231.a: What do you want with the Tosk?
STH_gamma.231.b: What will you do with them.
STH_gamma.231.d: You will not take them from us.
STH_gamma.231.desc: You have our Tosk and we want them back, they belong to us to hunt. This will be your only warning, return them to us now!
STH_gamma.231.name: Inbound Communications
STH_gamma.232.desc: Rejecting the Oschean Hunters was a risky decision and they have not responded positively, launching a swift attack on the [gamma_ship_name.GetName] quickly disabling the warp drive and boarding the ship. [gamma_leader_name.GetName] quickly sounds the intruder alert and calls for security teams to repel the boarders. \n\nThe Oschean's remind us that they are only after the Tosk and there is still time to hand them over.
STH_gamma.232.name: Fleet under Attack
STH_gamma.233.desc: Following a fierce firefight down the corridors of [gamma_ship_name.GetName] led by [gamma_leader_name.GetName] the [Root.GetName] forces were able to defend the ship and push the invaders back and force them into a full retreat just in time for the engineering teams to restore power to the engines to allow the fleet to make an escape to warp.
STH_gamma.233.name: Ship defence complete
STH_gamma.234.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] we have had a report back from the Executive Officer of the [gamma_ship_name.GetName], the report confirms that the ship was boarded and following a firefight the Commanding Officer and an alien guest Eav'oq were killed by an invading party whilst trying to protect an alien species. \n\nWithout a leader and with the ship heavily damaged it is clear the mission cannot continue and must be recalled.
STH_gamma.234.name: Ship's defences breached
STH_gamma.235.a: Allow them to settle on our capital.
STH_gamma.235.c: They are not welcome within our borders.
STH_gamma.235.desc: Once clear of danger the Tosk representative Eav'oq approaches [gamma_ship_name.GetName] formally asking for asylum for his people within the borders of [Root.GetName]. Once a suitable planet has been found the small community of Tosk will relocate and look to become productive members of [Root.GetName] society.
STH_gamma.235.name: Freedom for the Tosk
STH_gamma.310.desc: The Chief Science Officer of the [gamma_ship_name.GetName] has identified a planet of note in a nearby system. Deciding this mission only required the use of a single ship [gamma_leader_name.GetName] directs their ship to investigate the mysterious planet, whilst any remaining ships continue to survey a local stellar cluster.
STH_gamma.310.name: Children of Time
STH_gamma.311.desc: As the ship approaches the planet the ship is hit by a quantum energy barrier which causes the ship to shutter violently and damages the inertial dampers and the gyromagnetic stabilizers meaning that the ship will be unable to leave orbit for a few days. \n\nScanning the planet the crew pick up [Root.GetSpeciesName] life signs on the planet below!
STH_gamma.311.name: Children of Time
STH_gamma.312.a: Accept the plan and return home.
STH_gamma.312.desc: The crew beam to the planet's surface and come face to face with a small colony of races all found within the [Root.GetName]. The colony leader confirms that they are the descendants of [gamma_ship_name.GetName] which was thrust back in time when they attempted to leave the planet's orbit. The crew are reassured that their descendants have a plan that will ensure the survival of their colony and allow [gamma_leader_name.GetName] and their crew to return home.
STH_gamma.312.name: Children of Time
STH_gamma.313.desc: As [gamma_leader_name.GetName] sits in the command chair readying the ship for departure following the shield modification agreed on the planet below a last minute adjustment is sent in from an unknown source. Presenting the Captain with a choice between the original plan and this last minute change.
STH_gamma.313.name: Children of Time
STH_gamma.314.desc: After a period of violent shaking the ship passes through the mysterious barrier with only minor damage, but no casulties. Scanning the planet's surface to speak with the colony the communications officer reports that the planet below is uninhabited with no sign that a colony ever existed on the surface. \n\nThe crew saddened by the loss of those they had gotten to know over the last few days, they set course to rejoin the fleet and continue the expedition.
STH_gamma.314.name: Children of Time
STH_gamma.315.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] we have recieve a report from one of our fleets in the Gamma Quadrant, the flagship of the expedition fleet the [gamma_ship_name.GetName] has been reported missing in action. They were last seen investigating a planet with a mysterious energy barrior, but when a ship was sent to investigate we could find no sign of the ship or life on the planet. The only strange readings came in the form of 200 year old scattered debris on the northen continent.
STH_gamma.315.name: Children of Time
STH_gamma.4.a: Set course for the Denkiri Arm.
STH_gamma.4.desc: [gamma_mission_leader.GetName] has arrived in the Bajor System onboard the [gamma_ship_name.GetName] of the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName], final preparations have been made at the nearest Starbase and the crew are prepared to embark on the expedition. \n\nThe course and destination are now available to select.
STH_gamma.4.name: Expedition to the Gamma Quadrant
STH_gamma.400.desc: Every great expedition must come to an end eventually and so it is time for the [gamma_fleet_name.GetName] to return back to the Idran System and back through the Bajoran Wormhole. \n\nThe fleet will now recall their science teams and return home.
STH_gamma.400.name: Time to return home
STH_gamma.401.desc: The mission is complete and all that remains is to debrief the Captain and crew. A lot of experience will have been gained from the Gamma Quadrant, with many lives impacted for better or worse.\n\nThe expedition leader is free to return to duty and the fleet is now unlocked and ready to resume service.
STH_gamma.401.name: Fleet has returned home
STH_garidian.1.desc:
Hace mil años, el Legislador escribió cuatro pergaminos para establecer la estructura de la sociedad garidiana. Los pergaminos definen cosas como el código de honor, gobierno, religión de Garid, así como los privilegios de la clase patricia. 

También hay una vieja leyenda sobre el quinto pergamino que supuestamente describía los privilegios y las responsabilidades de los plebeyos. clase. Sin embargo, como dice la leyenda, el Legislador se vio obligado a abandonar el planeta antes de que pudiera revelar el quinto pergamino. 

Esta historia se ha vuelto especialmente popular entre las clases bajas de garidianos.
STH_garidian.1.name: El quinto pergamino
STH_gomtuu.1.desc: [Root.GetRulerName], nuestros escaneos de largo alcance han detectado un avistamiento galáctico raro, creemos que hemos encontrado la última ubicación conocida del organismo conocido por muchos como la Criatura Estelar o 'Hombre de Hojalata'. \n\n Esto podría presentar un Oportunidad única de estudiar una maravilla de la galaxia.
STH_gomtuu.1.name: El hombre de hojalata encontrado
STH_gomtuu.10.c: ¡Exigimos saber lo que está haciendo en nuestro espacio!
STH_gomtuu.10.desc: La criatura, que se identifica como 'Gomtuu' toma suavemente el control de [gomtuu_leader.GetName] y explica que tiene poderes telepáticos y necesitará comunicarse a través de nuestro líder. Nos invita a hacer preguntas.
STH_gomtuu.10.name: Comunicación de Gomtuu
STH_gomtuu.11.desc: Antes de que Gomtuu pueda responder la pregunta, la criatura es interrumpida por la repentina llegada de una banda de piratas espaciales. \n\nEstas formidables naves parecen estar fuertemente armadas y hostiles y se intentan llamarnos. Parecen ser del mismo clan que nos atacó antes.
STH_gomtuu.11.name: Piratas vistos
STH_gomtuu.12.desc: Atención buque [Root.GetSpeciesName], soy [gomtuu_pirate_leader.GetName] y reclamamos este barco como nuestro. No nos peleamos, pero si se interponen entre nosotros y nuestro premio, no dudaremos en abrir fuego. ¡Vete ahora si deseas irte con tu bonita nave en una sola pieza!
STH_gomtuu.12.name: Mensaje entrante
STH_gomtuu.13.desc: Los Piratas atacan, pero no parecen preocupados por cuál es su objetivo, lo que está claro es que deben ser derrotados antes de que podamos reanudar nuestra conversación con Gomtuu.
STH_gomtuu.13.name: El ataque de los piratas
STH_gomtuu.16.c: Diseccionar y tomar lo que podamos
STH_gomtuu.16.desc: [Root.GetName], hemos derrotado con éxito a Tin Man en la batalla y la criatura parece estar muerta, nuestros escaneos indican que hay una abundancia de tecnología e información dentro de sus bancos de memoria, que a nuestros científicos les encantaría obtener. Alternativamente, podríamos abordar el barco e intentar salvarlo agregándolo a nuestra flota.
STH_gomtuu.16.name: Gomtuu derrotado
STH_gomtuu.17.c: Ahora es nuestra oportunidad de atacar a Gomtuu.
STH_gomtuu.17.desc_01: Las naves atacantes no tenían ninguna posibilidad contra el poder de fuego combinado de Gomtuu y nuestra flota. Con las naves destruidas, somos libres de hablar con Gomtuu una vez más.
STH_gomtuu.17.desc_02: Claramente harto del ataque en curso, algo dentro de Gomtuu se rompe. Una ola masiva de energía se extiende desde la antigua nave destruyendo a sus atacantes. Gomtuu se vuelve hacia [gomtuu_leader.GetName] solo podemos esperar que guarde rencor
STH_gomtuu.17.name: Gomtuu sale solo
STH_gomtuu.18.a.tooltip: You have enough resources to keep your leader.
STH_gomtuu.18.d: Insistimos en que se quede con nosotros.
STH_gomtuu.18.desc_01: Gracias por ayudarme, siento un vínculo entre tu [gomtuu_leader.GetRulerTitle] y yo que no he sentido desde que perdí a mi antiguo equipo. \n\nEsto me llena de un nuevo deseo de vida, te ofrezco esta vez en una oportunidad única de unirte a mí en esta aventura, pero entiende si esto no es para ti.
STH_gomtuu.18.desc_02: La ira por esta injusticia ha reavivado mi deseo de vida, te ofrezco esta oportunidad de unirte a mí en mi búsqueda [gomtuu_leader.GetName]: hay mucho que podemos hacer juntos, ustedes son mejores que sus amos cobardes.
STH_gomtuu.18.name: Gomtuu se acerca una vez más
STH_gomtuu.19.desc: Parece que Gomtuu recuerda nuestra falta de apoyo y muestra poca distinción entre atacante y transeúnte. \n\nLa nave masiva está decidida a enfurecer cualquier cosa en su camino y eso incluye nuestras naves y planetas. ¡Debemos defendernos!
STH_gomtuu.19.name: Gomtuu busca venganza
STH_gomtuu.2.desc: Nuestros científicos han estado rastreando las últimas coordenadas conocidas de la ubicación de la criatura conocida como Tin Man. \n\n Lamentablemente, parece que no somos las únicas personas que rastrean a la criatura: la carrera está en marcha ...
STH_gomtuu.2.name: Carrera para encontrar el hombre de hojalata
STH_gomtuu.20.desc: Insatisfecho con los eventos que han tenido lugar, Gomtuu enciende su Bio-drive y se prepara para salir del sistema. La tripulación investigadora no recibe más noticias de la criatura que se aleja rápidamente a gran velocidad. \n\nNuestros escaneos de largo alcance no pueden encontrar rastro de Gomtuu. Parece que se ha ido para siempre, dejándonos solo los escaneos tomados mientras estuvo aquí.
STH_gomtuu.20.name: Gomtuu se va infeliz
STH_gomtuu.21.desc: A medida que [gomtuu_leader.GetName] transporta a bordo de Gomtuu, nuestro antiguo líder aparece en la pantalla de visualización confiado en la elección realizada. Explican que este es el comienzo de un nuevo viaje para el par de ellos y con nuevos mundos para explorar están ansiosos por comenzar este nuevo viaje. \n\n [gomtuu_leader.GetName] explica que a Gomtuu le gustaría dejar un regalo final para decir gracias por recordarles lo que la vida tiene para ofrecer. Nos despiden y en un instante ambos se han ido.
STH_gomtuu.21.name: [gomtuu_leader.GetName] y Gomtuu salen juntos
STH_gomtuu.22.desc: Gomtuu transmite un mensaje final a través de [gomtuu_leader.GetName], explican que este es el comienzo de un nuevo viaje y que se da cuenta de que todavía hay mucho por ver y que nuevos mundos se han inspirado al conocernos. \n\n [gomtuu_leader .GetName] explica que Gomtuu quisiera dejar un regalo final para agradecerles por recordarles lo que la vida tiene para ofrecer. Con eso completo, el barco gira su bio-drive y así se fue.
STH_gomtuu.22.name: Gomtuu sale solo
STH_gomtuu.23.desc: Gomtuu transmite un mensaje final a través de [gomtuu_leader.GetName], explican que este es el comienzo de un nuevo viaje y que se da cuenta de que todavía hay mucho por ver y que se han inspirado nuevos mundos al conocernos. [gomtuu_leader.GetName] explica que a Gomtuu le gustaría dejar un regalo final para agradecerles por recordarles lo que la vida tiene para ofrecer. Con eso completo, el barco hace girar su bio-drive y justo así se ha ido. \n\n Habiendo sido forzado a permanecer, está claro que [gomtuu_leader.GetName] no está contento con la decisión tomada en su nombre y ellos no Ya no tienen la motivación para progresar a su ritmo anterior, es poco probable que puedan alcanzar su máximo potencial.
STH_gomtuu.23.name: Gomtuu sale solo
STH_gomtuu.24.desc: La tripulación observa cómo los piratas abren fuego contra la vieja criatura, el casco parece resistir el ataque, pero la antigua nave parece incapaz o no está dispuesta a defenderse. \n\nA medida que el casco prístino se oscurece bajo el ataque, esto es difícil ver. Deberíamos dejar a la criatura a su suerte. ¿Quién sabe cómo impactará el encuentro en cada lado de la batalla?
STH_gomtuu.24.name: Gomtuu bajo ataque de piratas
STH_gomtuu.25.a: Nuestras acciones han vuelto para perseguirnos
STH_gomtuu.25.desc: Hemos recogido una señal que parece coincidir con el Gomtuu que encontramos el año pasado. Es imposible saber si es la misma criatura u otro miembro de la especie, pero está actuando de manera hostil. Claramente no es feliz que haya sido atacado mientras estaba en nuestro espacio, y está en un enfoque de ataque.
STH_gomtuu.25.name: Devoluciones Gomtuu
STH_gomtuu.26.a: Nuestras acciones han vuelto para perseguirnos
STH_gomtuu.26.desc: Hemos recogido una señal que parece coincidir con los piratas que encontramos el año pasado. Parecen haber sido afectados fisiológicamente por su encuentro con Gomtuu. \n\n ¿Quién sabe lo que les hizo? ¡Los sensores indican que parecen haber mejorado sus naves y están en curso directo hacia uno de nuestros planetas!
STH_gomtuu.26.name: ¿Gomtuu adorando a los piratas?
STH_gomtuu.28.desc: Después de una feroz batalla, los piratas adoradores de Gomtuu han sido derrotados. Deberíamos echar un vistazo a sus naves para buscar cualquier salvamento útil.
STH_gomtuu.28.name: Piratas derrotados
STH_gomtuu.3.b: Esto es una pérdida de tiempo.
STH_gomtuu.3.desc: ¡Señor!
