STH_klingon_mechanics.170.name: La disputa de la casa terminó
STH_klingon_mechanics.171.desc: After initially showing signs of cooling down tensions between the [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have escalated back up following a perceived insult toward $great_house_ruler$ [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] by the [From.GetName]'s resident war poet. \n\nDeclaring a formal feud, many believe hostilities to be inevitable.
STH_klingon_mechanics.171.name: House feud heats up again
STH_klingon_mechanics.172.desc: Tras la muerte del anterior [Root.GetRulerTitle], [newCouncilLeader.GetName] de [newCouncilFaction.GetName] ha sido elegido para dirigir el Consejo Superior.
STH_klingon_mechanics.172.name: [newCouncilLeader.GetName] se convierte en [Root.GetRulerTitle]
STH_klingon_mechanics.173.desc: [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] ha tomado el control del Alto Consejo al haber matado a [From.Leader.GetName] en combate honorable. El duelo marca el final de las hostilidades en curso entre [FromFrom.GetName] y [From.GetName].
STH_klingon_mechanics.173.name: [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] se convierte en [Root.GetRulerTitle]
STH_klingon_mechanics.175.desc.01: [From.GetName] y [FromFrom.GetName] han visto cómo las relaciones se enfrían, hasta el punto de que la alianza entre las Casas se ha disuelto. \n\nAunque no se puede identificar un solo incidente como causa raíz, un insulto percibido dirigido a un piloto [From.GetName] por el gin'tak de [FromFrom.GetName] parece haber sido el catalizador.
STH_klingon_mechanics.175.desc.02: [From.GetName] y [FromFrom.GetName] han visto cómo las relaciones se enfrían, hasta el punto de que la alianza entre las Casas se ha disuelto. \n\nAunque no se puede identificar un solo incidente como causa raíz, un insulto percibido dirigido a un piloto [From.GetName] por el gin'tak de [FromFrom.GetName] parece haber sido el catalizador.
STH_klingon_mechanics.175.name: Feudos de la casa
STH_klingon_mechanics.2.desc: Ante el conflicto con el [alienCountryKlingonWar.GetName], todos los verdaderos guerreros Klingon deben dejar de lado sus disputas para unirse contra su enemigo común. \n\nLas rebeliones en curso que han plagado el Imperio han terminado formalmente.
STH_klingon_mechanics.2.name: Casa Dividida
STH_klingon_mechanics.3.desc: La casa de la rebelión de [Root.GetRulerName] ha tenido éxito con las tropas de [Root.GetRulerName] asaltando las cámaras del Consejo Superior en [Root.Capital.GetName] y ejecutando a los líderes de la administración anterior. \n\nLas otras Grandes Casas han señalado su voluntad de aceptar la legitimidad de la Casa de la victoria de [Root.GetRulerName], aunque mucho se necesita hacer para reconstruir el Imperio del conflicto.
STH_klingon_mechanics.3.name: Casa Dividida
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.d: Transfer a fleet to this house.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.desc.dislo: nuqneH ', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]. Soy $great_house_ruler$ [houseLeader.GetName] de [factionCountryTemp.GetName]. No pierdas mi tiempo con una conversación ociosa.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.desc.loyal: Qapla ', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]! Soy $great_house_ruler$ [houseLeader.GetName] de [factionCountryTemp.GetName]. Mi casa está lista para servir.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.desc.same_: qaleghqa'neS, $great_house_ruler$ [Root.GetRulerName]. Soy yo [houseLeader.GetName], Gin'tak de nuestra casa mientras llevas al Imperio a la gloria. ¿Cómo puedo servir hoy?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.desc.dislo: We stand ready to receive stewardship of a new planet and demonstrate what true leadership looks like.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.desc.loyal: Qapla', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]! We stand ready to take ownership of one of the Empires mighty worlds and govern it with honour.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.desc.same_: qaleghqa'neS, $great_house_ruler$ [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. It is I [houseLeader.GetName], Gin'tak of our house while you lead the Empire to glory. We stand read to govern a world with honour in your name.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.name: Planet Administration
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.102.desc.loyal: Qapla', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]! We urge you to reconsider this action my Chancellor.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.102.desc.same_: qaleghqa'neS, $great_house_ruler$ [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. It is I [houseLeader.GetName], Gin'tak of our house while you lead the Empire to glory. As you desire my Chancellor.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.102.name: Remove planet from Great House
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.103.desc.dislo: This dishonourable act will not go unpunished.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.103.desc.loyal: As loyal servants of the [Root.Owner.GetName], the [factionCountryTemp.GetName] stands ready to accept any responsibility for upholding the honour of any order, or the defence of any you see fit.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.103.name: Award Titles and Honours
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.106.desc: The Empire is in need of the services of all loyal ships and crew. We demand a fleet is placed under the control of the Imperial Navy command. Failure to comply will be seen as most dishonourable.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.106.name: Commandeer a Fleet
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.107.desc: Consider this a gift from your Chancellor, the Imperial Navy hearby transfers an agreed fleet to your House as a sign of great faith.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.107.name: Gift a Fleet
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.109.desc: Having transfered the planet of [factionCountryTempNewPlanet.GetName] to our loyal [factionCountryTemp.GetName] we now have the option to transfer the whole system to their control.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.109.name: Transfer System
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.110.desc.dislo: This is another foolish and dishonorable decision by a Chancellor who knows no honour and has no understanding of success.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.110.desc.loyal: If this is the will of our House Leader than it shall be done.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.110.name: Remove Great House Control of a System
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.172.desc: Despite the intervention of the High Council the [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] continue their Feud and remain locked in a tense stand-off.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.172.name: House Feud Continues
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.a: We Close our borders to you.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.b: We Open our borders to you.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.d: Offer a bribe to improve relations.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.bad: You dare stand in front of the mighty [factionCountryTemp.GetName]? Hahaha What can we do for your honourless empire?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.good: Honoured greetings to our friends in [ROOT.GetName] from the noble [factionCountryTemp.GetName], how can we aid you today?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.kdf: nuq DaneH, qatlh bIpumchoH? nuq DaneH, qatlh bIpumchoH?! nuq DaneH, qatlh bIpumchoH??!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.neutr: Greetings, [ROOT.GetName], you stand before the noble [factionCountryTemp.GetName], what is it that you require?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.e: Attempt to purchase a cloaking device.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.f: Transfer a fleet to this house.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.name: Incoming Message
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.301.desc: [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName] has accepted our offer with gratitude which has increased their opinion towards us considerably.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.301.name: Donation has been accepted
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.302.desc: [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName] have rejected our offer claiming that their honour cannot be so easily bought. \n\nAs a result our relations with them has decreased.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.302.name: Donation has been rejected
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.303.desc: It appears that a foreign power is attempting to forge a closer relationship with [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName]. \n\nThe dishonourable fools of [klingon_houses_bribe_country.GetName] underestimated the loyalty of [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName] and the unity of the Klingon Empire!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.303.name: A Great House has rejected a bribe
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.304.desc: Lord Chancellor, our spies have confirmed that one of our Great Houses, [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName], has accepted a bribe from [klingon_houses_bribe_country.GetName] in a bid to form a closer bond. \n\nAs they did not openly disclose this contact we can only assume that they are colluding against the Empire!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.304.name: A Great House has accepted a bribe
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.305.desc: Our noble House gladly accepted any spare ships that you have to offer to ensure that we continue to grow strong!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.305.name: Fleet Transfer
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.306.desc: Our attempts to turn [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] against the Klingon Empire has been successful, and the relationship between the Great House and its master has been considerably damaged, we must now wait to see if the House is brave enough to openly rebel against the High Command.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.306.name: House Turns on the Empire
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.307.desc: Our efforts to turn [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] against the Klingon Empire have failed, the fabled Klingon Honour was too strong to break and they have rejected our attempts. \n\nTime will tell if they notify the Klingon Empire of our attempts to undermine their unity, and it is unlikely the Empire will react kindly to this.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.307.name: House Remains loyal
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.308.desc: [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] has approached us to inform us that a 3rd party has attempted to buy their loyalty and turn them against their Empire. \n\nLike all good Klingons they placed loyalty to their chancellor above all else, a truly honourable action.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.308.name: Great House remains loyal
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.309.desc: Our Klingon Intelligence agency has uncovered evidence that [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] has coluded with a faction within [klingon_houses_betray_country.GetName] in a bid to turn the House against it's Empire. \n\nRelations with the House have considerably worsened as a result of this honourless action.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.309.name: Great House willing to betray us
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.310.desc: With war declared against us, we can bring in our allies who have pledged to support us in our defensive wars. \n\nShould they agree to uphold their commitment they will join us in our battles.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.310.name: Call for assistance
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.311.desc: We have been called upon to fullfil our defensive pledge towards [great_house_war_country.GetName] as they go to war. \n\nShould we fullfil our commitment we will join them in their defensive war.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.311.name: A call for help
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.312.desc: Our so called allies [great_house_war_country.GetName] have failed to honour their pledge and come to our aid, we must win our wars without them.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.312.name: Betrayed!
STH_klingon_story.1.b: No más que la sordidez de un borracho.
STH_klingon_story.1.desc:
Un humo espeso y penetrante llena el aire de la taberna Tarj de Pujbe mientras las paredes reflejan el sonido de la canción y la risa de los guerreros reunidos. [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] encontró el Pujbe 'Targh más adecuado para aliviar el estrés de la oficina; Menos miembros del Concejo y otros nobles encontraron su camino a este lado de la Primera Ciudad donde habitaban soldados comunes, herreros y poetas. Aquellos de alto nacimiento beberían en el Quli's Qul donde el Gagh estaba siempre fresco, pero las canciones sonaban huecas. 

Entendido por la tina de Sangre Vino [Root.GetRulerName] hundió una copa en el líquido carmesí y bebió profundamente de ella. 

¡Yo te digo, puedo encontrar la espada! ', Una anciana siseos cercanos A un compañero que murmura y se aleja. La anciana se acerca a una mesa junto a la pared y se inclina por su bebida. 

'¿Qué espada buscas? [Root.GetRulerName] pregunta, intrigado. La anciana se vuelve y su rostro se tuerce pronto en reconocimiento.

'You're [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]! ¿¡Aquí!? Nos honras ... ", levanta su copa en saludo. Se inclina y dice: "Mi nombre es Le'tor y te diré lo que busco. Nada menos que la Espada de Kahless. 

'¿Sabes dónde está? ' [Root.GetRulerName] los ojos se abrieron de par en par al nombre. 

'No, pero sé por dónde empezar a buscar. Todo lo que necesitamos es un barco y creo que tienes unos cuantos. La mujer se metió la mano en la túnica y sacó un datapad antiguo. 

Esto es Hur'q, estoy seguro de que muestra la ruta que los petaQ siguieron a casa después de que los llevamos de Qo'nos. ¡Esta es la clave! Dice mientras ofrece el pad a [Root.GetRulerName].
STH_klingon_story.1.name: La espada de Kahless
STH_klingon_story.10.desc: La documentación de evacuación Hur'q es extensa, enumerando las rutas de regreso al espacio de Hur'q que cada buque de transporte debía tomar, aparentemente por medio de un agujero de gusano. Un elemento sobresale: un buque de carga con un manifiesto denominado «artefactos alienígenas», cuyo destino aparece como una instalación de almacenamiento en un mundo inhabitable lejos de aquí.
STH_klingon_story.10.name: La espada de Kahless
STH_klingon_story.1000.b: Esto no suena como una empresa honorable.
STH_klingon_story.1000.d: No, esta no es la forma Klingon.
STH_klingon_story.1000.desc:
[Root.GetRulerTitle], mi nombre es [antaak.GetName], un médico adscrito a la Flota Imperial. No quisiera deshonrarte con asuntos triviales, pero creo que he descubierto una oportunidad de enorme potencial para el pueblo klingon. 

 Recientemente hemos recibido noticias de seres humanos genéticamente modificados que demuestran fuerza y ??astucia que superan incluso a los más poderosos guerreros klingon. No podemos permitir que estos alienígenas tengan una ventaja sobre nosotros. 

Con su permiso me gustaría realizar una serie de experimentos para revertir sus mejoras genéticas, con el objetivo de aplicarlas a nuestros mejores soldados.
STH_klingon_story.1000.name: Transmisión entrante - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1001.b: Esto no suena como una empresa honorable.
STH_klingon_story.1001.d: No, esta no es la forma Klingon.
STH_klingon_story.1001.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle], soy consciente de que rechazaste mi propuesta para realizar ensayos sobre ADN humano genéticamente modificado, pero debo pedirte que reconsideres. Realmente creo que he descubierto una oportunidad de enorme potencial para la gente Klingon. \n\nCon su permiso me gustaría realizar una serie de experimentos para revertir sus mejoras genéticas, con el objetivo de aplicarlas a nuestros mejores soldados.
STH_klingon_story.1001.name: Transmisión entrante - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1003.a: Proceda con su presupuesto de energía original.
STH_klingon_story.1003.c: El riesgo es demasiado grande. Detener las pruebas.
STH_klingon_story.1003.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle], nuestros ensayos iniciales con ADN de aumento humano han tenido éxito. No estamos listos para pasar a la siguiente fase - experimentos en sujetos vivos. \n\nLos recursos que tengo son adecuados para la tarea, pero los resultados pueden ser mejorados si pudiéramos tener acceso a más energía.
STH_klingon_story.1003.name: Transmisión entrante - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1005.b: Aplicar reflejos superiores y la fuerza del ADN.
STH_klingon_story.1005.d: El riesgo es demasiado grande. Detener las pruebas.
STH_klingon_story.1005.desc:
Los ensayos han tenido éxito - ahora entendemos cómo integrar el ADN de Aumento Humano en un sujeto de prueba. 

Todo lo que queda por hacer es elegir qué rasgos deseamos integrar. Lamentablemente ciertas incompatibilidades nos impiden aplicar ambas. 

 ¡Una vez elegida no hay nada que nos impida aplicar estos cambios a toda la población Klingon! 

El único efecto secundario menor es la pérdida potencial de ciertas características cosméticas de Klingon ...
STH_klingon_story.1005.name: Transmisión entrante - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1006.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle]! Lo impensable ha sucedido - el virus que estábamos usando como vector de control para la inserción del ADN de Aumento Humano ha mutado. La población de [augmentTestColony.GetName] ha sido infectada. \n\nMientras que se espera que la mayoría se recupere, los aumentos positivos del ADN fallaron en arraigarse, dejando sólo los cambios cosméticos a los infectados. Necesitamos más expertos médicos en el terreno.
STH_klingon_story.1006.name: Transmisión entrante - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1007.desc: El virus de aumento humano que comenzó en [augmentTestColony.GetName] se ha extendido a través de la totalidad de [Root.GetName]. Guerreros y civiles por igual están enfurecidos por las mutaciones que les han deformado imitaciones de los humanos alienígenas. \n\nTabla a través del espacio [Root.GetSpeciesName] es de rebelión contra la regla de [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName].
STH_klingon_story.1007.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.1008.desc: La colonia [augmentTestColony.GetName] se ha salvado, y de ella el virus de Aumento Humano se ha extendido por el [Root.GetName].
STH_klingon_story.1008.name: Realidades aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.1009.desc: La colonia [augmentTestColony.GetName] ha sido completamente destruida, y con ella el riesgo que el virus de Aumento Humano contenía.
STH_klingon_story.1009.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.1010.desc: La colonia [augmentTestColony.GetName] ha sido completamente destruida, pero no antes de que se hayan reportado varios brotes del virus de Aumento Humano a través de [Root.GetName]. La destrucción de [augmentTestColony.GetName] ahora parece haber sido por nada ...
STH_klingon_story.1010.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.1011.a.tooltip: [Root.GetName] stands divided with some of the Great Houses supporting [rebelHouseCountry.GetName], and others pledging their loyalty to [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName].\nCivil War begins.
STH_klingon_story.1011.desc: In the aftermath of the anger from the Human Augment virus that has rampaged across [Root.GetName] space, the [rebelHouseCountry.GetName] have declared open revolt, vowing to overthrow [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName].
STH_klingon_story.1011.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.1012.desc: A raíz de la ira del virus de Aumento Humano que ha afectado a todo el espacio [Root.GetName], varias Casas Grandes han declarado una revuelta abierta. \n\nLas colonias de [firstRebel.GetName] y [secondRebel.GetName] forman las bases de poder de las dos facciones más fuertes.
STH_klingon_story.1012.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.1013.desc: Después de años de búsqueda infructuosa, los científicos [Root.GetSpeciesName] finalmente han encontrado un candidato para una cura para el virus de Aumento Humano que ha afligido a nuestro pueblo. \n\nUn esfuerzo concentrado es necesario para convertir la teoría en práctica, pero con suficiente voluntad nuestro pueblo puede ser completo de nuevo.
STH_klingon_story.1013.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.1014.desc: El virus de Aumento Humano ha sido curado, y nuestro pueblo ha vuelto a su apariencia original. ¡Somos [nombre de Root.GetSpeciesName] otra vez!
STH_klingon_story.1014.name: Realidades Aumentadas
STH_klingon_story.11.desc: Siete tripulantes de la [Root.GetFleetName] murieron intentando localizar la bóveda en [From.From.GetName], aplastado e incinerado como sus trajes ambientales falló bajo la presión y el calor. [Root.GetLeaderName], liderando la última etapa de la expedición desde el frente, no se perturbó. \n\nDespués de meses de explorar las redes de las cavernas a través de las tierras altas del sur de [From.From.GetName], por fin se ha descubierto una débil firma energética. La transmisión a la ubicación [Root.GetLeaderName] se presenta con un campo de fuerza Hur'q que impide el acceso a la cámara de seguridad de la bóveda de almacenamiento.
STH_klingon_story.11.name: La espada de Kahless
STH_klingon_story.2.desc:
Pasando casi un mes de análisis el datapad Hur'q, el [Root.GetRulerTitle] y algunos miembros de confianza de la Casa de [Root.GetRulerName] por fin han descubierto una pista a la ubicación de la Espada. 

El pad contiene documentación de logística para las fuerzas de invasión Hur'q justo antes de su expulsión de Qo'nos, siguiendo sus líneas de suministro de nuevo puede llevarnos a la espada que robaron. 

 La mayoría de los datos están dañados o cifrados más allá de nuestra tecnología para desbloquear, sin embargo uno de los pocos archivos accesibles apunta a base abandonada aquí en nuestro propio sistema. La base estaba situada en la luna apropiada de Veqlargh, Hur'q.
STH_klingon_story.2.name: La espada de Kahless
STH_klingon_story.20.desc: The approximate location of the Hur'q medical facility on [swordOfKahless2Target.GetName] has been identified.
STH_klingon_story.20.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.2000.desc_01: Reports are coming in from the Khitomer system, hostile ships have been sighted at the edge of the system with weapons active. The planetary defences around Khitomer do not seem to be responding and there is a thriving colony of Klingons living on the planet. This could become a massacre.
STH_klingon_story.2000.desc_02: An armada of attack ships have been reported heading deep into the Khitomer system, our outer system defences appear ineffectual, leaving the planet open to attack. Many in the high council fear that this could become a massacre.
STH_klingon_story.2000.name: Khitomer System under attack
STH_klingon_story.2001.a: Prepare to send the klingons aid.
STH_klingon_story.2001.b: Leave the Klingons to deal with the situation.
STH_klingon_story.2001.desc: Our scans have picked up a series of distress calls from the Klingon world of Khitomer, they are under attack from an unknown assailant and their defensive systems have been bypassed leaving the colony open to a devastating attack. We could dispatch a fleet of ships to investigate or leave the Klingons to deal with this internally.
STH_klingon_story.2001.name: Khitomer System under attack
STH_klingon_story.2002.desc: Our scans have picked up a series of distress calls from the Klingon world of Khitomer, they are under attack from an unknown assailant and their defensive systems have been bypassed leaving the colony open to a devastating attack. It is unclear what will become of the planet or its inhabitants.
STH_klingon_story.2002.name: Khitomer System under attack
STH_klingon_story.2003.desc: Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName] our defences in the Khitomer System have failed us, it appears that they have been sabotaged allowing a fleet of vessels through. Our warriors on the luna colonies have already perished at the hands of these cowardly fiends. Our experts say that cannot restore our defences and fleet coordination in time to prevent widespread losses. Should we call for aid or sacrifice our honourable warriors?
STH_klingon_story.2003.name: Devastating Attack in Khitomer System
STH_klingon_story.2004.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] the Klingon Empire has called for aid in defending the Khitomer system from attack, it is rare that the Empire seeks help from outsiders, so the situation must be dire. A fleet and one of our finest leaders must be sent to the system at once.
STH_klingon_story.2004.name: Klingons call for aid
STH_klingon_story.2005.a: Our pride shall not end lives.
STH_klingon_story.2005.b: We are Klingons, we need no one else.
STH_klingon_story.2005.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] the aid from our so called allies arrived too late to ward off the attack against the planet, Early indications show widespread devastation and loss of life. Efforts to rebuild the colony could take many years and many in the medical division do not believe that we can help those in immediate peril without inviting the orbiting rescue fleet the chance to prove their worth.
STH_klingon_story.2005.name: Khitomer: Arrived too late
STH_klingon_story.2006.desc: Despite the best efforts of our fleet we did not arrive in time to ward off the attack against Khitomer, initial scans show huge devastation to the main settlement and heavy loss of life. From this range we cannot tell who instigated this attack, but it is clear that all is not well within the Klingon High Command. However, our chance to help is not over, the Klingon authorities have asked us for additional help in assessing the damage and providing aid to those in immediate risk on the planet's surface.
STH_klingon_story.2006.name: Khitomer: Arrived too late
STH_klingon_story.2007.desc: Despite the best efforts of our fleet we did not arrive in time to ward off the attack against Khitomer, initial scans show huge devastation to the main settlement and heavy loss of life. From this range we cannot tell who instigated this attack, but it is clear that all is not well within the Klingon High Command. The Klingons are refusing any further help and have 'politely' asked us to leave their space before they consider us a target. We should leave before they turn their anger out on us. The people on the planet will need to fend for themselves.
STH_klingon_story.2007.name: Khitomer: Arrived too late
STH_klingon_story.2008.desc: Sir, our fleet in the Khitomer system have arrived just in time to catch the perpetrators in the act. It appears a fleet of Romulan warships are preparing for a fresh assault against the surface. The ships match no known Imperial warbirds, which could suggest they belong to the infamous Tal Shiar, if this is the case the Romulan senate will deny all knowledge of the attack. Our forces are in position to help repel the attack, but this will endanger [Root] lives and possibly future relations with the Romulan Star Empire. Failing to help will be seen as an act of dishonour by the Klingons.
STH_klingon_story.2008.name: Khitomer: Attack in progress
STH_klingon_story.2015.desc_01: Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName] the honourless petaQ Tal Shiar forces have been defeated with the assistance of our allies [rescueCountry.GetName]. The damage done to the colony is still substantial and reports from the surface indicate there are still warriors and civilians in dire need of assistance in the major settlements. The old adage that Klingons make fine warriors, but lousy doctors rings very true right now. Should we invite our allies to the surface to aid us?
STH_klingon_story.2015.desc_02: Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName] our brave Klingon warriors have won the day, all Tal Shiar forces have been wiped out without the help of our cowardly neighbours. Despite their lack of desire for battle we could still use their assistance saving lives on the planet's surface, should we seek further help?
STH_klingon_story.2015.name: Khitomer defended
STH_klingon_story.2016.a: Condemn the Romulans and provide help.
STH_klingon_story.2016.desc: [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] All Tal Shiar forces have been defeated, as expected they have left no trace of evidence that the ships originated from Romulus and no prisoners were taken during the assault, many voices from within are urging us to condemn the sneak attack and publicly blame the Romulans. Additionally we have received word from Q'ono'S that they would welcome an away team down the main colony to help look for survivors.
STH_klingon_story.2016.name: Khitomer defended
STH_klingon_story.2017.desc: [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] All Tal Shiar forces have been defeated, as expected they have left no trace of evidence that the ships originated from Romulus and no prisoners were taken during the assault, many voices from within are urging us to condemn the sneak attack and publicly blame the Romulans. In true Klingon fashion their homeworld has declined any further interference from outside forces and we have been asked to leave their space quickly. It appears we have done all we can here.
STH_klingon_story.2017.name: Khitomer defended
STH_klingon_story.2018.a: We came to aid the Klingons.
STH_klingon_story.2018.desc: Our away teams are ready to head to the planet's surface, our preliminary analysis suggests that the romulans were after specific intel and research that appears to have been underway. With the disarray that is taking place on the planet we have the opportunity to obtain this information and boost our standings with the Romulans or continue our mission of peace and look to cement a better relationship with the Klingons.
STH_klingon_story.2018.name: Send a team to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2019.a: He is welcome to join us.
STH_klingon_story.2019.b: The orphan's place is with his own kind.
STH_klingon_story.2019.desc: Thanks to the dedication and tireless efforts by our teams we have managed to salvage a lot of the infrastructure on the surface and rescue a great many lives that would have otherwise perished. The colony should be back on its feet in relatively short order. One of our teams also found a small orphaned Klingon boy amongst the ruins, he has asked to stay with us and is seemingly quite attached to our way of life. What we have achieved here today should go along way to building bonds between our two worlds.
STH_klingon_story.2019.name: Khitomer: Aid delivered successfully
STH_klingon_story.2020.desc: Our efforts have made a small headway in repairing the damage to Khitomer, which should speed up the time it takes for the planet to fully recover from the damage done during the sneak attack. The Klingons are mildly thankful for our efforts and it looks like this will go some way to building a better relationship between our worlds.
STH_klingon_story.2020.name: Khitomer: Sufficient help provided
STH_klingon_story.2021.desc: Our efforts to help have failed to provide sufficient help to those on the planet's surface, the damage done to the infrastructure was worse than our initial scans unveiled and our plans to help have only made a bad situation worse. The Klingons have reacted poorly to this news and we have failed to secure the boost to our relationship that many back home hoped for.
STH_klingon_story.2021.name: Khitomer: Further damage done
STH_klingon_story.2022.desc: We have managed to secure the data that the Tal Shiar was after, right underneath the Klingon's noses, plus we have managed to cover our tracks so the authorities have no clue that we have managed to complete the work started by the agents. Our contacts in the Romulan secret agency will be eager to hear from us and would pay a small future to obtain this data.
STH_klingon_story.2022.name: Khitomer: Klingon research data found
STH_klingon_story.2030.desc: Our fleet has arrived at the edge of the Khitomer system, we can see that the planetary defense systems have been powered down, it is unclear why or what happened to allow this to take place. Even at this distance we can see that the focus of the attack appears to be the Klingon settlement on the planet Khitomer and our long range scans can see fires raging on the world's surface. We cannot find any evidence of who is responsible for the attack, all we can do now is wait for a response from the High Command.
STH_klingon_story.2030.name: Arrived at Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2031.desc: Chancellor! A monumental effort has gone into helping the survivors of Khitomer our allies, the [rescueCountry.GetName] have done a truly honourable job in aiding those in need. Songs will song of the deeds done here today and the new allies we have made here today forged in battle and in defending the weak. As feared all evidence of the attack was destroyed by the assailant, but many suspect this was the work of the honourless Tal Shiar. This has been a major event in the course of the quadrant.
STH_klingon_story.2031.name: Aid sent to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2032.desc: Chancellor! The combined efforts of our forces and the aid provided from the outsiders have managed to render enough aid to the colony on Khitomer that should mean any lingering damage will not take long to undo. Our thoughts turn to revenge and many in the council chambers would rather focus on reclaiming our honour instead of focusing on the united efforts to save lives. This has been a major event shaping the future of the beta quadrant.
STH_klingon_story.2032.name: Aid sent to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2033.desc: Chancellor! Despite our best efforts and those of our so-called allies the death toll and damage done to the infrastructure of Khitomer continues to climb, this truly is a disaster. Anger and a desire for revenge against friend and foe alike is high. Our warriors demand a chance to strike back against those who have wronged us.
STH_klingon_story.2033.name: Aid sent to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2034.desc: [rescueCountry.GetTitle] [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] the attack against the Klingon world appears to have been devastating, and the death toll is still climbing. Unfortunately we were unable to identify the attackers and they have fled the scene. The Klingons have always been a insular race so it is only appropriate we wait for a decision from them before we make any further decisions.
STH_klingon_story.2034.name: Devastating Attack in Khitomer System
STH_klingon_story.2040.desc: Our operatives in the Tal Shiar have compiled a report on a secret unsanctioned mission deep into Klingon space. They obtained the planetary defence codes from a source within the Klingon government and were able to send a task force into the their space to attack the planet and secure critical research data from a hidden research outpost.
STH_klingon_story.2040.name: Report from the Tal Shiar
STH_klingon_story.2041.desc: The young orphan calls himself Worf and he is eager to repay the debt in saving his life. He has asked that we sponsor his attendance at our military academy and has promised to server with honour.
STH_klingon_story.2041.name: Potential new recruit
STH_klingon_story.2042.desc: The young orphan calls himself Worf and he is eager to repay the debt in saving his life. He has asked that we sponsor his attendance at our military academy and has promised to server with honour. He would make a fine warrior in the KDF.
STH_klingon_story.2042.name: Potential new recruit
STH_klingon_story.2043.desc: [rescueCountry.GetTitle] [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] after completing his training and proving himself multiples times, the first Klingon officer is ready to join our ranks as a new heroic admiral.
STH_klingon_story.2043.name: Worf, New Hero graduates
STH_klingon_story.2044.desc: [rescueCountry.GetTitle] [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] after completing his training and proving himself multiples times, the new Klingon officer is ready to join our ranks as a heroic admiral. This is a glorious day for the empire as the son of Mogh joins the battle.
STH_klingon_story.2044.name: Worf, New Hero graduates
STH_klingon_story.21.desc:
Their Bat'leths cutting a path through the dense foliage, the expedition force have located the remains of a hospital facility and pharmaceutical research centre. The building complex has been gutted of equipment. 

The expedition force comes across a group of aliens with smooth bald heads and light orange skin, cowering in a cellar. They're forced to the surface and interrogated brutally by the expedition leader. 

The aliens are survivors from starship that crashed on this world months ago. They found the facility as empty as we did with one exception, a single paper book which is now ours. 

After careful study, the book is revealed as little more than a medical journal...
STH_klingon_story.21.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.22.desc:
While at first the medical journal seemed to be a dead end in the quest, it has in fact given us a new location to investigate. 

Deep in the pages of the journal a Hur'q author makes reference to the location and travel times between five Hur'q bases in this part of the galaxy. 

We know all of them except one, a seafloor research facility on an ocean world. By process of triangulation and correction for stellar drift we are able pinpoint its location.
STH_klingon_story.22.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.30.desc: The approximate location of the underwater Hur'q facility on [swordOfKahless3Target.GetName] has been identified.
STH_klingon_story.30.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.3001.desc: It comes a time that the Empire must celebrate the role that our warriors play in furthering the Empires interests, and a warrior from the Great House of Mogh has demonstrated his valor in a number of border skirmishes along our border with the Romulans. \n\nThe planet [narendra_planet.GetName] will host a number of celebrations in our hnour of our glorious warriors.
STH_klingon_story.3001.name: Celebration of a Local Hero
STH_klingon_story.3002.b: It is not worth the effort.
STH_klingon_story.3002.desc: My Praetor, I am [romulan_narendra_leader.GetName] and I bring you a report from our Tal Shiar operatives within Klingon Space.\n\nThose brutish fools are currently engaging in a celebration of some foolish warrior's supposed victory against the might of the Imperial Navy. These continued insults against us are now erroding the public support for both the Imperial Navy and the Tal Shiar. We have taken it upon ourselves to prepare an attack against this colony that thanks to our intel gathered will not lead back to us.
STH_klingon_story.3002.name: Disrespect from the Klingons
STH_klingon_story.3003.desc: Our agents report that they have successfully delivered their attack against the Klingon colony, the first wave of the attack has dealt a devastating blow to the colony's defenses and military installations. The strike force remains undetected and will launch a further attack the moment the next window arrives.
STH_klingon_story.3003.name: Attack Successfully completed
STH_klingon_story.3004.desc: Our defenses on [narendra_planet.GetName] are reporting they have been overwhelmed by a sneak attack by unknown forces. The initial wave of the attack has destroyed our defenses, leaving the civilians vulnerable to a further attack. \n\nWe must call for aid.
STH_klingon_story.3004.name: [narendra_planet.GetName] is under attack!
STH_klingon_story.3005.b: Klingons do not cry for help.
STH_klingon_story.3005.desc: With our forces close to [narendra_planet.GetName] damaged and unable to render aid, we must do the honourable thing and protect the lives of those who cannot fight and call for help allowing for our warriors to regroup and fight like true Klingons!
STH_klingon_story.3005.name: [narendra_planet.GetName] is under attack!
STH_klingon_story.3006.desc: To anyone who can hear our message, I am [klingon_sos_leader.GetName] of the Klingon Empire, our planet is under attack from an unknown foe, they have breached our defenses and are preparing to deal the final blow against civilians. \n\nWe call on any ship in the vicinity to aid the Empire in its time of need.
STH_klingon_story.3006.name: Klingons Call for Help
STH_klingon_story.3007.desc: Only one foreign power received our SOS call, and the Federation has refused to answer our call to arms. We must now deal with this threat on our own.
STH_klingon_story.3007.name: No help coming
STH_klingon_story.3008.a.tooltip: This option will cost more, but will allow our ship to arrive at the destination quickly in order to save more lives, but at greater risk to the ship and crew.
STH_klingon_story.3008.desc: [This.GetName] stands ready to aid the Klingons at [narendra_destination.GetName], intel on the situation is limited, but we do know a large force of cloaked vessels are preparing a final attack on the helpless colony. \n\nThe odds of defeating the enemy ships is low and the likelihood of survival is not in our favour, but whatever time we can bring to allow the Klingons to evacuate and bring in reinforcements will save lives!
STH_klingon_story.3008.name: [This.GetName] ready to aid the Klingons
STH_klingon_story.3009.desc:
As [narendra_ship.GetName] arrives at the scene of the devastation, it is clear from the ash clouds covering the planets that the attack had been devastating and that the colony would not be able to stand any more of the assault. 

Suddenly the [narendra_ship.GetName] picks up a decloaking fleet or warbirds on a direct course with the planet, with only the Starfleet ship standing in their way. 

The [narendra_ship.GetName] must hold the line until help can arrive.
STH_klingon_story.3009.name: Battle of [narendra_destination.GetName]
STH_klingon_story.3010.a: They gave their lives to save others.
STH_klingon_story.3010.desc: The destruction of [FromFrom.GetName] will be felt across the Federation, the ship and crew gave their lives defending civilians, holding out long enough for the Klingons to send reinforcements to take out the warbirds. \n\nTheir sacrifice will live on in history as upholding some of the truest values of Starfleet. [sacrificed_leader.GetName] will live on as a hero.
STH_klingon_story.3010.name: [FromFrom.GetName] destroyed defending the Klingons
STH_klingon_story.3011.desc: We have received word from our forces in Klingon Space, it appears the humans once interfered in our affairs with their Flagship sacrificing itself to defend the Klingons. \n\nOnce again the Federation has caused us problems, one day they will truly pay for their insolence.
STH_klingon_story.3011.name: Starfleet Intervenes
STH_klingon_story.3012.a: They should be honoured as great warriors.
STH_klingon_story.3012.b: It was a fine act, no more.
STH_klingon_story.3012.desc: Chancellor [Root.ruler.GetName] it pleases me to report that our forces have fended off the attack on [narendra_destination.GetName], however, I must say that our forces would not have been able to reach the colony in time if it was not for an act of true honour and bravery from the Captain and crew of one Starfleet ship which sacrificed itself to hold off the attackers. \n\nThis act would have granted any Klingon passage to the halls of Sto-Vo-Kor, yet for it to be done by outsiders is truly a noble act and maybe demonstrates we have been wrong about the hearts of our Federation neighbours.
STH_klingon_story.3012.name: Colony Saved
STH_klingon_story.3013.desc_01:
Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I bring you thanks and gratitude from your new friends in the Klingon Empire, it is rare that we come across the values that our warriors embody in outsiders, and yet the sacrifice from your crew would be worthy of songs in the halls of our honoured dead. 

Perhaps we have miss-judged your species, you have earned our grudging respect for your actions this day. 

[klingon_empire.ruler.GetName] out.
STH_klingon_story.3013.desc_02: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], the Empire notes and offers its thanks for the role your ship played in defeating the attack against our colony. Our warriors battling side by side, demonstrate that perhaps you are a more honorable species than we originally thought.
STH_klingon_story.3013.name: Incoming Message from Qo'noS
STH_klingon_story.3020.desc:
Our forces have successfully routed the attack against the Klingon colony, saving the lives of the civilians on the planet below. 

The Empire has not been forthcoming in explaining what has prompted this attack, or who was behind the assault on their planet. 

In true Klingon fashion we shall wait to see if we even receive a thank you.
STH_klingon_story.3020.name: Attacking Force Defeated
STH_klingon_story.3021.b: They do not deserve too much praise.
STH_klingon_story.3021.desc: Chancellor, I am pleased to report that a combined force from our military and Starfleet has defeated the attackers threatening our colony. The honoured dead have been avenged and Starfleet did us a good service by fighting well and allowing us to bring our forces in to finish the battle.
STH_klingon_story.3021.name: Starfleet Aids us in Battle
STH_klingon_story.3022.desc: We have received word from our forces in Klingon Space, it appears the humans once interfered in our affairs and with the help of the Klingons they have destroyed our fleet. \n\nOnce again the Federation has caused us problems, one day they will truly pay for their insolence.
STH_klingon_story.3022.name: Starfleet defeats our ships
STH_klingon_story.3023.a: It was our duty to help.
STH_klingon_story.3023.desc_01: Greetings from the Klingon Empire, we are a proud race and so it does not come easy having to thank outsiders for coming to our aid and yet we are here thanking you for coming to our aid. \n\nWe can only hope this might lead to better longer-term relations between our worlds.
STH_klingon_story.3023.desc_02: Starfleet came to aid us when we called for help, but do not mistake this for anything more than a simple thank you for aiding us on this occasion. \n\nThe Klingon Empire recognises this as no more than a one-off act, no more, no less! Expect no more from us than this simple message and never forget the Klingon Empire remains strong.
STH_klingon_story.3023.name: Incoming Message from Qo'noS
STH_klingon_story.3024.desc: Our failure to attack the Klingons represents a missed opportunity to deal those fools a real blow, However there will always be more chances to inflict harm upon our foes.
STH_klingon_story.3024.name: Attack Failed
STH_klingon_story.3025.desc: Our failure to send ships to aid the Klingons represents a shameful stain on our reputation within the galaxy, we can only hope that the death toll does not become to high.
STH_klingon_story.3025.name: Failed to provide Aid
STH_klingon_story.31.desc:
Klingons were not made to scuttle along the sea bed like VeS GhotI!' the expedition Combat Engineer says over the comm link. The research facility was found in days of arrival, and while there are no signs of life an energy shield still protects the building, forming a bubble of breathable air Kellicams below the surface of the ocean. 

The expedition is split on whether to continue the hunt for alternative access into the facility, or to blast the shielding away and risk damaging the data we seek. 

In the third month a junior officer devises an alternative approach: using our own ship's Shields to create a shell around the facility, while bombarding the Hur'q shield with sustained by low energy disruptor fire. 

A week later the Hur'q shield has collapsed and warriors begin to search the facility.
STH_klingon_story.31.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.32.desc: We've located another semi-functional vault of Hur'q access codes, along with terraquads of biological research data. Applying these new access codes with our existing data highlights the location of an abandoned Hur'q civilian colony on a desert world. \n\nThe underwater research facility is destroyed shortly after the expedition ship reconfigured its Shields to their standard configuration, the enormous water pressure blasting the building into rubble.
STH_klingon_story.32.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.40.desc: The approximate location of the Hur'q colony on [swordOfKahless4Target.GetName] has been identified.
STH_klingon_story.40.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.41.desc: The sands have eroded most of the city outskirts, but the inner kellicam radius appears to have survived the elements by virtue of an electrostatic barrier. How the power source for the barrier has survived so long is a mystery, but it provides the expedition force an opportunity to hunt for more clues to the location of the sword. \n\nIt looks as if the city was abandoned in a hurry, with vehicles and refuse strewn through the streets. Several civilian datapads can be found, all unlocked but only displaying a single message - the evacuation order. We will need time to study this.
STH_klingon_story.41.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.42.desc: The Hur'q evacuation documentation is extensive, listing the routes back to Hur'q space that each transport ship was to take, apparently by way of a wormhole. One item stands out: a cargo ship with a manifest labelled 'alien artefacts', its destination listed as a storage facility on an uninhabitable world far from here.
STH_klingon_story.42.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.50.a: ¡Debemos hacer todo lo posible para preservar la integridad del Imperio!
STH_klingon_story.50.desc: The approximate location of the Hur'q storage facility on the colony has been identified.
STH_klingon_story.50.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.51.desc: Tras meses de debate en el Consejo Superior, el [rebeldeCountry1.GetName] ha declarado abierta revuelta contra el gobierno de [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] de su bastión en [rebelCountry1.Capital.GetName]. \n\nAunque hasta ahora ninguna otra Cámara se ha comprometido a la causa de [rebeldeCountry1.GetName], los guerreros de todo el Imperio se regocijan de la oportunidad de demostrar su valía en combate.
STH_klingon_story.51.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.52.c: For the good of the Empire!
STH_klingon_story.52.desc: Tras meses de debate en el Consejo Superior, el [rebeldeCountry1.GetName] ha declarado abierta revuelta contra el gobierno de [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] de su bastión en [rebelCountry1.Capital.GetName]. \n\nCuando las noticias llegaron a [Root.Capital.GetName] antes de que otro golpe fuera dado a la administración de [Root.GetRulerTitle] con una declaración similar del [rebelCountry2.GetName] en [rebelCountry2.Capital.GetName] . Mientras que hasta ahora ninguna otra casa se ha comprometido a las casas rebeldes, los guerreros a través del imperio se regocijan en la oportunidad de probar su valor en combate.
STH_klingon_story.52.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.60.desc: It has been several weeks since the expedition force under [Root.GetLeaderName] signalled the Imperial Fleet that they had located the Sword of Kahless. The armada sent to [From.From.GetName] to escort the blade back to the homeworld raced through the stars, and now at last an honour guard has beamed into the Council Chambers hand it to [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. \n\n[Root.Owner.GetRulerName] has vowed to use the Sword to unite all the houses and throughout the Empire there is much rejoicing.
STH_klingon_story.60.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.61.desc: It has been several weeks since the expedition force under [Root.GetLeaderName] signalled the Imperial Fleet that they had located the Sword of Kahless. The armada sent to [From.From.GetName] to escort the blade back to the homeworld raced through the stars, and now at last an honour guard has beamed into the Council Chambers hand it to [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. \n\n[Root.Owner.GetRulerName] has vowed to use the Sword to unite all the houses, but immediately it is clear that not all are happy to see the Sword remain in [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]'s hands. Fighting breaks out between a number of smaller houses, and the Imperial Fleet remains vigilant against the threat of civil war.
STH_klingon_story.61.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.62.desc:
It has been several weeks since the expedition force under [Root.GetLeaderName] signalled the Imperial Fleet that [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] had located the Sword of Kahless. The armada sent to [From.From.GetName] to escort the blade back to the homeworld raced through the stars, and now at last an honour guard has beamed into the Council Chambers hand it to [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. 

As the transport cycle finishes it is clear that something is wrong. [Root.GetLeaderName] and a force of fifty warriors storm through the hall, cutting aside all in their path. Within moments [Root.GetLeaderName] is before [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName] with the Sword of Kahless at the [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]'s throat. 

'Kahless chose ME!' [Root.GetLeaderName] bellows. 'You should feel honoured to die by his blade!'. 

In the hours that passed news spread throughout the homeworld. The Sword has returned, and with it a leader with the strength to lead the Empire to glory.
STH_klingon_story.62.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.63.desc:
It has been several weeks since the expedition force under [Root.GetLeaderName] signalled the Imperial Fleet that they had located the Sword of Kahless. The armada sent to [From.From.GetName] to escort the blade back to the homeworld raced through the stars, and now at last an honour guard has beamed into the Council Chambers hand it to [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. 

As the transport cycle finishes it is clear that something is wrong. [Root.GetLeaderName] and a force of fifty warriors storm through the hall, cutting aside all in their path. Within moments [Root.GetLeaderName] is before [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName] with the Sword of Kahless at the [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]'s throat. 

'Kahless chose ME!' [Root.GetLeaderName] bellows. 'You should feel honoured to die by his blade!'. 

In the hours that passed news spread throughout the homeworld. The Sword has returned, but in the hands of an usurper more concerned with science than combat. 

Immediately it is clear that not all are happy to see the Sword remain in [Root.GetLeaderName]'s hands. Fighting breaks out between a number of smaller houses, and the Imperial Fleet remains vigilant against the threat of civil war.
STH_klingon_story.63.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.64.a: It is better this way. For the Empire!
STH_klingon_story.64.desc:
It has been several weeks since the expedition force under [Root.GetLeaderName] signalled the Imperial Fleet that they had failed in their quest to find the Sword of Kahless. Several weeks since the confrontation in the Hur'q treasure vault. 

[Root.GetLeaderName] held fate of the Empire in hands weighed by the competing wills of the Combat Engineer and the Loremaster. 

Seeing how quickly their own expedition was turn on each other for the glory of the Sword, [Root.GetLeaderName] made a decision no Klingon should ever have to have made. 

Convincing the expedition first by argument, and where that failed by combat, [Root.GetLeaderName] drew vows from all remaining. The Sword would be buried again, transporters set to beam it to a random location beneath [From.From.GetName]. 

All agreed to accept the burden of shame the expedition failure would draw, if it meant the survival of the Empire.
STH_klingon_story.64.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_lonely_among_us.11.desc: After the crew of [Root.GetName] has blocked the transport of [Root.GetLeaderName] as energy to the energy cloud [Root.Leader.GetHeSheCap] reveals to them, that during the scanning process of the energy nebula and the energy discharges observed on the ship an energy being was accidentally picked up aboard and is now sharing [Root.Leader.GetHisHer] body. To safely break up this connection [Root.GetLeaderName] suggests setting up a portable scanner for the energy being to leave [Root.Leader.GetHisHer] body and to transport back to the cloud.\n\nIt seems that this option is acceptable for both the crew of [Root.GetName] and to the energy being, although the energy creature insists on monitoring the transporter setup and only leaving [Root.GetLeaderName]´s body for the device once transport is in progress. Finally with the transport complete [Root.GetLeaderName] is back to normal and the energy cloud once received the transport accelarates to warp speed and exits the system.
STH_lonely_among_us.11.name: Transport blocked
STH_lonely_among_us.12.desc: We have received a message originating somewhere in [lonely_leader_pick_up.Solar_System.GetName] system using some of our decades-old communication codes. The message itself is a little vague, but it says that one of our former leaders has returned from exploring the galaxy and awaits to be picked up on board a derelict freighter ship having enough food and supplies for over a year.
STH_lonely_among_us.12.name: Strange communication received using old codes
STH_lonely_among_us.13.a: All this acquired knowledge will surely benefit us.
STH_lonely_among_us.13.desc:
After arriving at the location of the strange message in [lonely_leader_pick_up.Solar_System.GetName] system [Root.GetName]´s crew locate the derelict freighter ship there with one lifeform aboard.

 After transporting the lifeform aboard [Root.GetName] it is discovered that the individual in question is in fact one of our former scientists who has returned from the travels with the energy nebula bringing wast amounts of new information about the galaxy.

 After passing rigorous medical tests aboard [Root.GetName] the rescued leader is allowed to assume the command of the vessel.
STH_lonely_among_us.13.name: A long lost leader returns
STH_lonely_among_us.14.desc: After spending considerable time wandering in the [lonely_among_us.Solar_System.GetName] system the strange nebula-like phenomenon seems to have left the system. Our sources in the system state that the nebula seemed to accelerate to warp-like speeds when it exited the system.
STH_lonely_among_us.14.name: The white nebula has disappeared
STH_lonely_among_us.15.desc: All attempts at establishing further communications with whoever was transmitting from the derelict freighter in one one of our star systems have failed. Leaving the mystery unsolved.
STH_lonely_among_us.15.name: Communications with the derelict freighter ceases
STH_lonely_among_us.2.desc: A white nebula-like phenomenon has appeared all of a sudden in [lonely_among_us.Solar_System.GetName] system. Although the nebula seems to pose no particular danger for our operations in the system it is recommended to send a science ship to explore this unusual phenomenon.
STH_lonely_among_us.2.name: Unusual white nebula detected
STH_lonely_among_us.3.desc:
After scanning what originally appeared to be a white nebula-like phenomenon in [lonely_among_us.Solar_System.GetName] system it is discovered that the unknown object actually contains considerable energy in ever-changing patterns. It is also capable of traveling at warp-like speeds, which would explain its sudden appearance in this star system.

During the scanning process it is reported that one member of the [Root.GetName]´s crew has been killed as a sudden energy spike from a console hit them.

With the possible dangers of continuing the scans further seeming real the question now becomes whether we should still continue or would it be better to just leave and not risk any more incidents?
STH_lonely_among_us.3.name: First results of the nebula scan are in
STH_lonely_among_us.4.a: We should already have plenty of data on this phenomenon.
STH_lonely_among_us.4.desc: Additional scan of the energy cloud reveals only very little extra information about the patterns of the energy currents inside the cloud and while the scan is ongoing several additional energy dischargers are reported all over the ship´s systems even appearing at the bridge. However this time luckily no one is dead or severely injured.\n\nDespite these clear signs of danger [Root.GetLeaderName] still seems oddly fascinated with the phenomenon ordering the ship to move even closer to it so nothing is missed.
STH_lonely_among_us.4.name: Additional scan complete
STH_lonely_among_us.5.a: This seems very out of character for [Root.GetLeaderName].
STH_lonely_among_us.5.desc: With the obvious risks associated with the energy nebula, as one crew member is already dead during the initial scan, [Root.GetLeaderName] orders the ship to leave the area. While the crew is plotting a new course sudden energy discharges are observed in the ship systems, briefly hitting even some of the bridge interfaces. However no faults in the ships systems are detected afterwards or further injuries among the crew reported and it seems the discharges disappeared as quickly as they first appeared.\n\nWith the sudden energy discharges ending and the ship systems being fully functional [Root.GetName] is just about to head on its new course when [Root.GetLeaderName] suddenly belays the order and insists on moving the ship instead closer to the nebula in case the first scan missed something. These new orders seem to be completely at odds with [Root.GetLeaderName]´s initial orders and also disregard the earlier safety concerns of continuing the scanning operation.
STH_lonely_among_us.5.name: Belay that order!
STH_lonely_among_us.6.a: Stop [Root.GetLeaderName] from going with the cloud.
STH_lonely_among_us.6.b: Allow [Root.GetLeaderName] to transfer to the cloud.
STH_lonely_among_us.6.desc: With the ship almost inside the energy cloud now [Root.GetLeaderName] continues [Root.Leader.GetHisHer] odd behaviour and expresses the desire to beam inside the cloud as energy only. This strange wish from [Root.Leader.GetHerHim] is met with severe objections from the crew of [Root.GetName] as beaming as energy only to the energy cloud would most likely kill [Root.GetLeaderName] and because of this and [Root.Leader.GetHisHer] earlier out of-character behaviour the crew locks the transporter controls as a precaution.
STH_lonely_among_us.6.name: Beam me to the cloud
STH_lonely_among_us.7.a: Quickly cut the power to the transporters.
STH_lonely_among_us.7.b: Allow [Root.GetLeaderName] to transfer to the cloud.
STH_lonely_among_us.7.desc:
With the ship almost inside the energy cloud now [Root.GetLeaderName] all of a sudden tells the crew to prepare for a site to site transport from [Root.GetName] to inside the nebula and also that [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] will be personally handling the transport from one of the transporter rooms. Confused by these orders the bridge crew inquires if some sort of probing device should also be prepared for the transport, but [Root.GetLeaderName] just tells them to follow the orders and leaves the bridge.

Monitoring the transport process from the bridge it soon becomes obvious to the crew that [Root.GetLeaderName] is configuring the transporter for a very specific matter to energy personnel transport to the energy cloud with no one but [Root.Leader.GetHerHim] being in the transporter room. Seeing this the bridge crew contacts [Root.GetLeaderName] to enquier about what is happening, but the only respond they get is that [Root.GetLeaderName] is joining the cloud to explore the galaxy as energy followed by the communication being cut and both the transporter controls and room door being locked.

With it now becoming obvious that [Root.GetLeaderName] is indeed trying to transport to the energy cloud the question becomes should the crew do whatever it takes to abort the transport or allow [Root.Leader.GetHerHim] to join the energy cloud despite the potential significant risks of the operation?
STH_lonely_among_us.7.name: Beam me to the cloud
STH_lonely_among_us.8.desc: After [Root.GetLeaderName] has transported to the energy cloud the cloud changes its heading, accelerates to warp speed, and exits the system. Leaving the [Root.GetName]´s crew wondering if [Root.GetLeaderName] will never be heard from again.
STH_lonely_among_us.8.name: Energy cloud leaves
STH_malon_flavour.10.desc: [Root.GetLeaderTitle]! Our waste management services must report the destruction of one of our transport vessels the [waste_destroyed_ship.GetName] following a catastrophic breakdown of their containment systems. The ship and crew were lost with all hands.
STH_malon_flavour.10.name: Accident onboard waste disposal ship
STH_malon_flavour.100.desc: Our scientists have been working tireless for a means of disposing of the theta radiation that is produced as a waste material from our antimatter technology and after many years of trying they have made a significant breakthrough. \n\nAt significant cost we can invest in this new technology and apply it to our waste management processes to enable us to remove this harmful situation.
STH_malon_flavour.100.name: Antimatter disposal breakthrough
STH_malon_flavour.101.desc: Our engineers and scientists have completed their efforts to convert our technology to the more eco friendly solution that we discovered. This has now eliminated the need to dispose of the waste products from our worlds and will provide a greener, cleaner future for our people.
STH_malon_flavour.101.name: Antimatter disposal breakthrough
STH_malon_flavour.11.desc: Planetside collection agents have prepared waste for collection on [waste_collection_planet.GetName], we must send a ship to collect and dispose of the waste before the containment fields start to break down and the deadly theta radiation is released.
STH_malon_flavour.11.name: Waste ready for collection
STH_malon_flavour.13.desc: Reports are in from our waste exporting fleet [dumping_run_ship.GetName] and the results are mixed. The controller reports that the waste material was successfully dumped at the destination, but our presence was detected by the systems owner, [dumping_loc_owner.GetName], we are waiting to hear any official word from their officials, but our diplomatic teams are all set to deny any involvement and tell them to clean up their own mess.
STH_malon_flavour.13.name: Fleet caught dumping waste.
STH_malon_flavour.14.desc: Our local patrols have caught the Malon's dumping waste in one of our systems [dumping_location.GetName] in a horrendous act of vandalism. We have already begun efforts to clean up the mess that has been left, including damage to any neighbouring planets. Our diplomatic and military leaders are standing by to respond.
STH_malon_flavour.14.name: Malon ship caught leaving flytipping
STH_malon_flavour.15.desc_01: We have now received the official response from [dumping_location_owner.GetName], and whilst they have reacted with concern it appears that they are not willing to take any further action against us, clearly fearing our superior technology and might. We should continue to exploit their weakness and refusal to act.
STH_malon_flavour.15.desc_02: We have now received the official response from [dumping_location_owner.GetName], and they have responded with anger and threats of further action against us. Our military leaders are suggesting that we should prepare for retaliation and potential violence.
STH_malon_flavour.15.desc_03: We have now received the official response from [dumping_location_owner.GetName], it seems they have closed their borders against us and will bar any of our ships from gaining entry into their space.
STH_malon_flavour.15.name: Foreign response to our actions
STH_malon_flavour.2.a: Time to take out the rubbish.
STH_malon_flavour.2.desc: Our usage of Anti-matter to power our colonies has allowed us to grow strong and powerful, however our efforts to recycle the waste products has long eluded us. As a result the harmful theta radiation has risen to a point where it needs to be dumped, we should task one of our dutiful Waste export ships with the role of removing and disposing the waste somewhere else. Failure to do so will result in a dangerous build up of Theta radiation on our worlds, judging by our usage we can expect these levels to build every five years.
STH_malon_flavour.2.name: Waste Management
STH_malon_flavour.3.desc: Failure to take action and tackle our build up in antimatter waste resulted in harmful levels of radiation around the planet [waste_planet.GetName]. This caused our citizens to suffer for a number of years, but now thankfully the levels of radiation have reduced back to safe levels. Should we fail to take action again these conditions could return.
STH_malon_flavour.3.name: Theta radiation subsides
STH_malon_flavour.4.desc: Our waste management collection experts have collected their hazardous cargo ready for it to be dumped and become someone else's problem. Our experts have identified three potential targets to deposit the waste, the first is within our own borders and is the safest option. The second two lie within the territory of other empires, this increases the risk of getting caught but the financial rewards are that much higher.
STH_malon_flavour.4.name: Theta Radiation ready to be dumped
STH_malon_flavour.5.desc: Our waste management controller has confirmed that they have successfully dumped the toxic waste at the agreed location. The Theta radiation is now someone else's problem. The Malon Sanctity is clean once again.
STH_malon_flavour.5.name: Waste run complete
STH_malon_flavour.6.desc: Our environmental scientists have picked up a deposit of Theta radiation that has been dumped in one of our systems, this harmful radiation could spread to one of our nearby worlds and would decrease the living conditions on the world until it can be appropriately cleared. Our security services could find no evidence of who has used our space as a dumping ground.
STH_malon_flavour.6.name: Theta Radiation detected in our space
STH_malon_flavour.7.desc: Failure to complete the task of removing the waste products from are planet has resulted in a catastrophic breakdown of our containment systems and a spillage of waste product out onto the planets surface. Conditions on the planet's surface have been harmed by our failure to react.
STH_malon_flavour.7.name: Failure to dispose of radiation
STH_malon_flavour.8.desc: Our waste management controller has confirmed that they have successfully dumped the toxic waste at the agreed location in a neighbour system and we have been compensated accordingly. Our waste management teams have confirmed that they operation was complete without being detected. The Theta radiation is now someone else's problem and they will have to deal with the fallout.
STH_malon_flavour.8.name: Waste run complete
STH_maquis_dmz_story.10.desc: Our operatives in the [Root.GetSpyService] report that the [From.GetName] has been arming its citizens in the DMZ, which is in direct violation to the agreements used to establish the Zone.
STH_maquis_dmz_story.10.name: Tension in the DMZ Continues
STH_maquis_dmz_story.11.desc: [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has made a public address offering [From.Leader.GetHerHis] support to the [From.GetSpeciesName] settlers in the DMZ condemning the [Root.GetName] for its lack of action to address what [From.Leader.GetSheHe] describes as terrorist activity taken out in the name of the [Root.GetName]'s.
STH_maquis_dmz_story.11.name: Tension in the DMZ Continues
STH_maquis_dmz_story.12.desc: [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has made a rare public address condemning the violence on both sides of the divide in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName].
STH_maquis_dmz_story.12.name: Tension in the DMZ Continues
STH_maquis_dmz_story.2.desc_01: Tensions in the Federation-Cardassian DMZ have begun to escalate following demonstrations between our settlers on [FromFromFrom.GetName] and [From.GetSpeciesName] colonists on [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nMany on [Root.Capital.GetName] see the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] as an admission of weakness before the [From.GetName], and urge [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] to do more to assert [Root.GetSpeciesName] authority in the region.
STH_maquis_dmz_story.2.desc_02:
Tensions in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] have increased dramatically following violent clashes between our settlers on [FromFromFrom.GetName] and [From.GetSpeciesName] colonists on [FromFrom.GetName]. 

Outrageously, [From.GetSpeciesName] terrorists have begun attacking defensive installations on [FromFromFrom.GetName]. 

Many on [Root.Capital.GetName] see the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] as an admission of weakness before the [From.GetName], and urge [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] to do more to assert [Root.GetSpeciesName] authority in the region.
STH_maquis_dmz_story.2.desc_03:
Tensions in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] have increased dramatically following violent clashes between our settlers on [FromFromFrom.GetName] and [From.GetSpeciesName] colonists on [FromFrom.GetName]. 

In a display of pure cowardice, [From.GetSpeciesName] terrorists have 'arrested' several retired military officers performing charity work on [FromFromFrom.GetName]. 

Many on [Root.Capital.GetName] see the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] as an admission of weakness before the [From.GetName], and urge [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] to do more to assert [Root.GetSpeciesName] authority in the region.
STH_maquis_dmz_story.2.name: Tensions in the DMZ
STH_maquis_dmz_story.30.desc: Almost unthinkable our citizens in the Federation-Cardassian DMZ have declared their independence and established a new state, the [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nDissatisfied with years of attacks by agents of the [From.GetName], they have vowed to defend their homes no matter the cost even if it means going against their former state.
STH_maquis_dmz_story.30.name: The Maquis
STH_maquis_story.10.desc: We have received reports from the [Root.GetSpyService] that the [From.GetName] has been arming its citizens in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName], in violation of the terms of the treaty establishing it.
STH_maquis_story.10.name: [FromFromFromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.11.desc: [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has made a public address offering [From.Leader.GetHerHis] support to the [From.GetSpeciesName] settlers in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName], condemning the [Root.GetName] for its lack of action to address what [From.Leader.GetSheHe] describes as terrorist activity taken out in the name of the [Root.GetName]'s.

STH_maquis_story.20.desc: [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has made a public address condemning the violence on both sides of the divide in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName].
STH_maquis_story.20.name: [FromFromFromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.21.desc: We have received reports from the [Root.GetSpyService] that the [From.GetName] has increased economic support to the worlds in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName].
STH_maquis_story.21.name: [FromFromFromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.22.desc: We have received reports from the [Root.GetSpyService] that the [From.GetName] has been arming its citizens in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName], in violation of the terms of the treaty establishing it.
STH_maquis_story.22.name: [FromFromFromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.3.desc_01: Tensions in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] have begun to escalate following demonstrations between colonists on [FromFromFrom.GetName] and [From.GetSpeciesName] settlers on [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nMaintaining the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] is of prime importance to the [Root.GetName] to ensure peace with the [From.GetName].
STH_maquis_story.3.desc_02: Tensions in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] have begun to escalate following violent clashes between colonists on [FromFromFrom.GetName] and [From.GetSpeciesName] settlers on [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nMaintaining the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] is of prime importance to the [Root.GetName] to ensure peace with the [From.GetName], but many citizens have questioned whether the [Root.GetName] should do more to protect its citizens who have chosen to remain in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName].
STH_maquis_story.3.desc_03: Tensions in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] have begun to escalate following an organised guerilla campaign between colonists on [FromFromFrom.GetName] and [From.GetSpeciesName] settlers on [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nMaintaining the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName] is of prime importance to the [Root.GetName] to ensure peace with the [From.GetName], but many citizens on other worlds including [Root.Capital.GetName] have begun to demand the [Root.GetName] do more to protect its citizens who have chosen to remain in the [FromFromFromFrom.GetName].
STH_maquis_story.3.name: [FromFromFromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.30.desc: Almost unthinkable our citizens in the [FromFromFrom.GetName] have declared their independence and established a new state, the [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nDissatisfied with years of attacks by agents of the [From.GetName], they have vowed to defend their homes no matter the cost.
STH_maquis_story.30.name: The [FromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.31.b: Establish a client state for a proxy war.
STH_maquis_story.31.desc:
Almost unthinkably [From.GetSpeciesName] terrorists in the [FromFromFrom.GetName] have declared their independence and established a new state, the [FromFrom.GetName]. 

They have vowed to defend their homes no matter the cost to innocent lives. 

Many on [Root.Capital.GetName] urge support for our own colonists in the region, whether by granting them independence to fight the [FromFrom.GetName] aggressors, or by demonstrating the full might of the [Root.GetName] and crushing them.
STH_maquis_story.31.name: The [FromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.32.desc: The [From.GetName] has announced the independence of what is now the [FromFromFrom.GetName]. Almost immediately upon the formalisation of the split, the [FromFromFrom.GetName] declared war against the [FromFrom.GetName], in what it describes as an act of self defence.
STH_maquis_story.32.name: The [FromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.33.desc: The [From.GetName] has declared war against the [FromFrom.GetName], referring to what it claims are the [FromFrom.GetName]'s numerous crimes against the [From.GetSpeciesName] people. \n\nWithout outside support it is unlikely the [FromFrom.GetName] will survive.
STH_maquis_story.33.name: The [FromFrom.GetName]
STH_maquis_story.34.desc: Are you sure you wish to become [FromFrom.GetName]? This action is not reversible.
STH_maquis_story.34.name: The [FromFrom.GetName]
STH_mars.1.desc_10: Los cinco miembros del Comité [Root.Owner.GetName] para Asuntos Marcianos entran silenciosamente en la pequeña habitación en la cúpula de la Estación Primus. Se leen las actas de la sesión anterior, antes de que un asistente le sirva al presidente del Comité un datapad. \n\n'Estos son los resultados del comité. La Iniciativa de Marte continúa haciendo grandes avances en la remodelación del planeta rojo. Este comité estima que § ¡Más del 45%  de los objetivos finales se han completado ".
STH_mars.1.desc_11: Los cinco miembros del Comité [Root.Owner.GetName] para Asuntos Marcianos entran silenciosamente en la pequeña habitación en la cúpula de la Estación Primus. Se leen las actas de la sesión anterior, antes de que un asistente le sirva al presidente del Comité un datapad. \n\n'Estos son los resultados del comité. La Iniciativa de Marte ya ha logrado remodelar Marte. El planeta se ha transformado sustancialmente. El liquen se aferra a las rocas, y la atmósfera incluso tiene rastros de humedad. La hoja de ruta avanza muy bien, y este comité está estimando § ¡Más del 50%  del proyecto se ha completado hasta ahora ".
