STH_observation.150.fer.desc: ¡Los operadores de [From.GetName] se enfrentan a políticos obstinados que hablan de imponer 'aranceles' e 'impuestos' a nuestras antiguas empresas trabajadoras! \n\nAlgunos latinos bien ubicados en las manos correctas pronto podrían aplacar el [From.GetName ] gobierno. Los eliminadores estarán disponibles para garantizar que la financiación adicional acelere el proceso de monopolización de su economía y obligue a [From.Owner.GetName] a nuestro imperio.
STH_observation.150.name: Arte del trato
STH_observation.150.rom.a: Asegúrese de que el Tal Shiar esté bien financiado.
STH_observation.150.rom.b: Financia solo su solicitud más importante.
STH_observation.150.rom.desc: Nuestros agentes de [From.GetName] solicitan más recursos y suministros para garantizar la lealtad de los miembros clave del gobierno de [From.Owner.GetName]. Si bien pueden continuar operando con su presupuesto actual, la financiación adicional debería acelerar el proceso de anexar el [From.Owner.GetName] a nuestro imperio.
STH_observation.152.car.a: Envíe un envío grande de kemocita. Golpea cada objetivo.
STH_observation.152.car.b: Envíe una pequeña cantidad de kemocita. Apunte solo a las estructuras clave.
STH_observation.152.car.c: Se necesitan suministros en otro lugar. Solicitud rechazada.
STH_observation.152.car.desc: Los grupos disidentes han sido infiltrados, irritados y convertidos en blanco de nuestros operativos, y los rumores de que están buscando atacar sitios civiles importantes en todo el planeta se han colocado en los oídos de los líderes más importantes en [From.GetName]. Se han identificado ubicaciones clave que son importantes para el patrimonio cultural de [From.Owner.GetName], lo que las convierte en un objetivo principal para la destrucción. \n\nNuestros operativos en [From.GetName] solicitan un gran suministro de explosivos material para enmarcar a estos disidentes para estos ataques, al tiempo que permite simultáneamente que las fuerzas cardassianas capturen a los 'perpetradores', mostrando que solo la orden cardassiana puede brindar seguridad al gobierno de [From.Owner.GetName].
STH_observation.152.fed.a: Cura esta enfermedad y proporciona una gran cantidad de suministros médicos.
STH_observation.152.fed.b: Ayude a sus investigadores, pero déjelos encontrar la cura.
STH_observation.152.fed.c: Hasta que se unan a [Root.GetName], este es su problema.
STH_observation.152.fed.desc: Una enfermedad rara, no relacionada con nuestro primer contacto, se está extendiendo rápidamente por el mundo unificado de [From.GetName]. Muchos medios de comunicación y grupos políticos en [From.GetName] nos han culpado de las muertes y han sugerido reiteradamente que el gobierno de [From.Owner.GetName] estará mejor solo que como parte de [Root.GetName], ya que nosotros No hemos compartido nuestra avanzada tecnología médica con ellos. Las protestas han comenzado a extenderse en varios lugares importantes en [From.GetName], mientras que las fuerzas del gobierno local están intentando sofocar las zonas más violentas. \n\nNuestros diplomáticos en [From.GetName] están solicitando una gran cantidad de investigación médica y equipo que se proporcionará a los hospitales locales para combatir esta enfermedad y mostrar nuestra generosidad y bienestar a la población.
STH_observation.152.fer.a: Enviar por los eliminadores! ¡Paga lo que sea necesario para detenerlos!
STH_observation.152.fer.b: Soborna a los ferengi para detener su culto.
STH_observation.152.fer.c: Nunca gaste más en una adquisición de lo que tiene que gastar. Hacer nada.
STH_observation.152.fer.desc: Muchos de los ciudadanos más pobres en el hemisferio norte de [From.GetName] han comenzado recientemente a adorar un culto extraño que ha sido propagado por comerciantes entrepenuriales [Root.GetSpeciesName] que utilizan tecnología avanzada contra nuestras órdenes directas, formando una religión secreta para ¡Subvertir secretamente y robar riquezas del gobierno! ¡Si bien es un esfuerzo comercial digno, este culto 'religioso' debe ser sofocado antes de que gane una tracción importante entre la población y subvierta nuestras fuerzas del mercado! \n\nNuestros liquidadores en [From.GetName] están solicitando más latinum para detenerlos. comerciantes deshonestos, y recuperar su riqueza robada.
STH_observation.152.name: Tratos ocultos
STH_observation.152.rom.b: Podemos ahorrar algunos para minimizar el daño.
STH_observation.152.rom.c: Solicitud denegada, déjalos creer lo que quieran.
STH_observation.152.rom.desc: ¡Muchos medios de comunicación y conglomerados de medios en [From.GetName] están publicando historias sobre los operativos [Root.GetSpeciesName] que forman una sociedad secreta para subvertir secretamente y hacerse cargo del gobierno de [From.GetName]! Si bien es completamente cierto, esta teoría de 'conspiración' debe ser sofocada antes de que gane una tracción importante entre la población. \n\nNuestros operativos en [From.GetName] están solicitando más mano de obra para combatir la propagación de rumores y mentiras provenientes de la medios de comunicación, y para garantizar que nuestras propias pistas estén cubiertas.
STH_observation.153.car.a: Una ejecución de libro de texto.
STH_observation.153.car.desc: Explosiones masivas a través de [FromFrom.GetName], que golpearon a instituciones civiles y militares, han causado temor en el corazón de [FromFrom.Owner.GetSpeciesName] y han hecho que el gobierno de [FromFrom.Owner.GetName] parezca débil e ineficaz. \ N \ Los grupos de medios locales filmaron nuestras valientes tropas [Root.GetSpeciesName] mientras atacaban a los grupos disidentes 'responsables' de estas explosiones, y en una impresionante muestra de destreza militar llevaron a todos los terroristas ante la justicia. \n\nLa población de [From.GetName] está extremadamente satisfecha con el orden y la seguridad que traen nuestros soldados, y muchas empresas y grupos están ofreciendo pagar el costo de entretener a nuestras tropas.
STH_observation.153.fed.desc: La rápida dispersión de suministros y equipos médicos en [FromFrom.GetName] ha detenido la enfermedad mortal en sus pistas, y el apoyo a los grupos disidentes se ha desvanecido. Muchos de los ex manifestantes han cambiado de opinión por la atención médica gratuita y abierta disponible para ellos ahora que el médico de la Flota Estelar está en escena.
STH_observation.153.fer.a: Cualquier cosa que valga la pena, vale la pena hacerlo por dinero.
STH_observation.153.fer.desc: Después de una cuidadosa amenaza de los lóbulos de los Ferengi a cargo de la sublevación religiosa absurda, se le ha ordenado al vasto culto de carga que sigue a [From.GetName] que abandone sus posesiones mundanas y que regrese a sus vidas cotidianas. Una empresa extremadamente rentable.
STH_observation.153.name: Impacto de ofertas ocultas
STH_observation.153.rom.a: Control a través de la división social. Excelente.
STH_observation.153.rom.desc: La 'Sociedad Secreta' en [FromFrom.GetName] ha sido expuesta como nada más que una risa y una broma por las compañías de medios y los medios de comunicación, que ahora están bajo nuestro control gracias a la mano de obra adicional proporcionada. Los rumores de una toma de poder [Root.GetSpeciesName] de su planeta se han relegado a los teóricos de la conspiración rechazados en la sociedad. \n\nMientras tanto, nuestros agentes en control de los medios de comunicación de [FromFrom.Owner.GetName] han aumentado dramáticamente nuestra influencia. sobre la población Salve Romulus.
STH_observation.154.car.desc: El desastre ha afectado a nuestra organización en [FromFrom.GetName]. ¡Los disidentes han descubierto nuestro plan para culparlos de los ataques terroristas y han expuesto nuestro envío de kemocita al gobierno de [FromFrom.Owner.GetName]! \n\n¡Esto ha causado un revés importante a nuestros planes aquí en [FromFrom.GetName ] mientras intentamos culpar a los elementos deshonestos de nuestro ejército. Mientras tanto, muchas de nuestras compañías fantasma que solían subvertir al gobierno local también han sido descubiertas, y nuestros otros operativos que quedan se han escondido a medida que nuestra influencia sobre la población se desvanece. Esto retrasará nuestra operación por algunos años.
STH_observation.154.fed.desc: La rápida dispersión de suministros y equipos médicos en [FromFrom.GetName] ha detenido la enfermedad mortal en sus pistas, aunque esto ha irritado a los manifestantes en lugar de sofocarlos, ya que ahora gritan que el [FromFrom.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural] se convertirá depende de [Root.GetName] y perderá su independencia si se vuelven dependientes de nosotros. Muchos de los manifestantes más extremistas incluso han abordado la idea de que usamos nuestra tecnología médica avanzada para crear la enfermedad en primer lugar. Esto retrasará algunos años la membresía de la Federación.
STH_observation.154.fer.a: ¡Inconcebible! Nunca gastes más en una adquisición de lo que tienes que ...
STH_observation.154.fer.desc: Después de grandes cantidades de soborno dado a [Root.GetSpeciesName] a cargo de la sublevación religiosa absurda, el gran culto de carga que sigue a [FromFrom.GetName] se ha alzado contra nuestros intereses comerciales, obligando a cerrar numerosos puntos de venta y negocios, mientras que los fundadores de culto [Root.GetSpeciesName] se ríen de nuestra ineptitud y acumulan toda la riqueza. \n\nAunque nuestros comerciantes lamentan que esto retrasará nuestros planes para [FromFrom.GetName] durante años, existe un respeto a regañadientes por La perspicacia comercial utilizada por los fundadores empresariales.
STH_observation.154.name: Impacto de ofertas ocultas
STH_observation.154.rom.desc: El desastre ha afectado a nuestra organización en [FromFrom.GetName]. El problema de la 'Sociedad Secreta' ha expuesto completamente a muchos de nuestros operativos que trabajan en la superficie después de una gran investigación realizada por los servicios de inteligencia [FromFrom.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]. Los rumores de una toma [Root.GetSpeciesName] de su planeta se han solidificado debido a la evidencia encontrada, y los teóricos de la conspiración anteriormente rechazados han sido aclamados como héroes. \n\nMientras tanto, muchas de nuestras compañías fantasma utilizadas para subvertir al gobierno local han sido descubierto también, y nuestros operativos que quedan se han escondido a medida que nuestro dominio sobre la población se desvanece. Esto retrasará nuestra operación por algunos años.
STH_observation.200.desc: Después de infiltrarse en todas las facetas del cuerpo gobernante en [From.GetName], los operativos de Tal Shiar han logrado convencer al gobierno provisional de [primitive_civ.GetName] de que unirse al Imperio Romulan Star es lo mejor para un lugar seguro y estable futuro. \n\n Como sujetos de [Root.GetName], se convertirán en ciudadanos de segunda clase y estarán sujetos a la regla [Root.GetSpeciesName]. La disidencia no es una opción.
STH_observation.200.name: Infiltración Tal Shiar
STH_observation.300.desc: La Autoridad de Comercio Ferengi ha estado apuntando selectivamente a los mercados económicos en [From.GetName] durante muchos meses, y finalmente ha ganado el control sobre muchos de los principales oficios e industrias del planeta. \n\n Aprovechando los mercados de [primitive_civ. GetName], los Liquidadores ahora tienen la propiedad de gran parte del organismo rector y de los mercados mundiales, que en su sabiduría infinita han decidido que unirse a [Root.GetName] es preferible a la ruina económica. Los operadores están acudiendo en masa a [From.GetName] para aprovechar las nuevas oportunidades.
STH_observation.300.name: Civilización monopolizadora
STH_observation.400.desc: Después de infiltrarse en todas las facetas del cuerpo gobernante en [FromFromFrom.GetName] y destruir cierta infraestructura selectiva, los operativos de la Orden de Obsidiana han convencido con éxito al gobierno provisional de [primitive_civ.GetName] que permite que nuestras tropas desembarquen para restablecer el orden y someterse a [Root.GetName] es lo mejor para un futuro seguro y estable. \n\nCon nuestras tropas en posición en cada momento clave, ahora estarán sujetas a nuestra regla.
STH_observation.400.name: Ocupación completa
STH_observation.600.desc: Nuestros diplomáticos en [From.GetName] han pasado años ensalzando las virtudes de la Federación y preparando a las personas insulares [primitive_country.GetSpeciesNamePlural] para la Membresía de la Federación, y hoy es el día de la ceremonia de firma. Después de la ceremonia, se convertirán en un miembro de pleno derecho de [Root.GetName], una ocasión trascendental. \n\nMientras sean miembros de pleno derecho de [Root.GetName], manejarán sus propios asuntos mundanos.
STH_observation.600.name: Membresía de la Federación
STH_observation.700.desc: Our Generals confirm that the planet [From.GetName] is now under our control, their primitive armies stood no chance against the forces of [Root.GetName]. The primitive [From.Owner.GetName] is no more!
STH_observation.700.name: Planet now under our control
STH_observation.701.desc: Our attempts to integrate this world into our Empire has failed, and we must now wait until we can re-attempt the process.
STH_observation.701.name: Integration Ended
STH_occupation_situation.1.a: We must look outside Cardassia for resources.
STH_occupation_situation.1.desc:
Years of neglect and over taxation of the skant resources of Cardassia Prime have finally caught up with the people of the Cardassian Union and now a period of harsh stellar activity from the Cardassian sun has ruined the crop growth for this season and put a strain on the already over worked food replication power grids. 

Environmentalists have been warning about this day from behind the scenes for many years, but have been ignored by those in power. 

Experts are predicting unless more drastic action is taken Cardassia Prime will struggle for a number of years.
STH_occupation_situation.1.name: Starvation strikes Cardassia Prime
STH_occupation_situation.10.desc: The Cardassian Union has made its intentions clear, they convert the resources from the planet Bajor and they are prepared to take them by force.
STH_occupation_situation.10.name: Cardassia wishes to annex Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.101.desc: ¡Alabado sea los profetas! Después de declarar la guerra, muchos sintieron que el poder de Cardassia sería demasiado para que nuestras escasas fuerzas se defendieran, pero el espíritu del pueblo bajorano no será derrotado y nuestra prolongada opresión finalmente ha terminado. Las fuerzas cardassianas en retirada implementaron una política de tierra arrasada y llevará algunos años recuperarse, pero nuestro futuro está de vuelta en nuestras propias manos.
STH_occupation_situation.101.name: Se acabó la ocupación de Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.102.desc: La gente del planeta Bajor ha estado oprimida durante mucho tiempo bajo una brutal ocupación de su mundo natal, parece que ya no desean vivir en estas condiciones y una serie de células de resistencia han comenzado a levantarse contra sus señores supremos. Nuestros informes de inteligencia indicaron que ha habido una ola de bombardeos y ataques contra objetivos extranjeros en el planeta. \ n \ nLa resistencia bajorana ha exigido formalmente la retirada de todas las fuerzas extranjeras del planeta en un plazo de 48 horas.
STH_occupation_situation.102.name: La ocupación bajorana
STH_occupation_situation.103.desc: La Guerra entre Bajor y Cardassia ha terminado y, a pesar de su potencia de fuego superior, la Unión Cardassiana ha declarado formalmente su retirada de Bajor. Las tácticas de guerrilla desplegadas por la resistencia parecen haber derribado a las fuerzas cardassianas y parece que el Comando Central ya no considera que el planeta valga la pena el esfuerzo de mantenerlo. \ n \ nLa gente de Bajor puede regocijarse hoy, pero parece que hay mucho trabajo por hacer para que el planeta se recupere.
STH_occupation_situation.103.name: Se acabó la ocupación de Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.105.desc: Ha llegado el momento de librar a nuestro hogar de los [bajoran_overlords.GetName], las células de la resistencia han logrado avances significativos en sus defensas y hemos asegurado un número adicional de pequeñas naves para complementar a nuestros asaltantes. Los Profetas nos guían por este camino y el camino hacia un Bajor libre. Nuestro hogar volverá a ser nuestro.
STH_occupation_situation.105.name: La ocupación debe terminar
STH_occupation_situation.106.a: Cardassia siempre ha sido amiga del pueblo bajorano ...
STH_occupation_situation.106.b: Bajor ya no merece el esfuerzo.
STH_occupation_situation.106.desc: Cardassians, this is your final chance to withdraw your forces from Bajor, your illegal occupation and plunder of our world ends here and now.
STH_occupation_situation.106.name: Bajoran Freedom
STH_occupation_situation.107.desc: Los cardassianos han rechazado nuestra demanda de que se vayan, esto nos deja sin otra opción. Si queremos ser libres, entonces debe ser la guerra.
STH_occupation_situation.107.name: Guerra declarada
STH_occupation_situation.108.desc: En una decisión impactante, el gobierno civil cardassiano nos ha notificado que su "ayuda" y "amistad" ya no se ofrecerá al pueblo bajorano. Sus fuerzas han comenzado a evacuar, destruyendo todos y cada uno de los equipos que pueden tener en sus manos, incluidos los vastos campos de la provincia de Dahkur y la matanza de Gallitep. La antigua estación de procesamiento de minerales Terok Nor ahora nos pertenece a pesar del daño masivo que le hicieron cuando los cardassianos se fueron.
STH_occupation_situation.108.name: Cardassia se retira de Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.109.desc: Después de años de ocupación, los cardassianos se han retirado de Bajor. La causa exacta del retiro es en gran parte una cuestión de opinión; mientras que los bajoranos lo atribuyeron a los esfuerzos de la resistencia bajorana, los cardassianos lo consideraron como una decisión enteramente política. En los días previos a la retirada, los cardassianos desviaron los buques de guerra de Bajor en un intento de apuntalar sus territorios fronterizos.
STH_occupation_situation.109.name: Cardassia se retira de Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.11.desc: The people of Bajor are in dire need of the firm supportive hands that we can offer and their backwater beliefs and outlook cries out for the appointment of a Prefect. \n\nA number of standout candidates have put themselves forward for the role, which we may now appoint to secure our interests on Bajor.
STH_occupation_situation.11.name: A Prefect for Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.110.desc: El último de nuestros transportes ha regresado al espacio cardassiano tras nuestra decisión de abandonar a los campesinos bajoranos en su planeta atrasado. Pronto aprenderán el significado de cruzar al pueblo cardassiano y sin duda volverán arrastrándose hacia nosotros pidiendo nuestra ayuda.
STH_occupation_situation.110.name: Cardassia se retira de Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.112.desc: Hoy es un día humillante para ser cardassiano, el gobierno civil ha firmado el acuerdo de retirada que nos obliga a dejar atrás el planeta y sus preciados recursos. Se trata de un golpe humillante para la Unión y que debemos ver vengado. Los bajoranos no nos han visto por última vez.
STH_occupation_situation.112.name: Fuerzas cardassianas derrotadas
STH_occupation_situation.113.desc: After years of living under the rule of the Cardassian Union, it appears the Bajoran people have had enough and led by their resistance movement have declared war on Cardassia in a bid to create a free Bajor.
STH_occupation_situation.113.name: Bajor Breaks from Cardassia
STH_occupation_situation.115.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] esos traicioneros tontos bajoranos han traicionado la generosa oferta de paz y reconciliación que les hemos ofrecido. \ n \ nUn explosivo colocado en la [nave_asesinada.GetName] destruyó la nave y nuestro delegado [assassinated_cardassian.GetName]. Hay fuertes reclamos de Cardassia de que hemos sido demasiado indulgentes y debemos reaccionar con venganza cardassiana.
STH_occupation_situation.115.name: Conferencia de paz saboteada
STH_occupation_situation.116.a.tooltip: Liberar a Bajor de la ocupación y permitirles convertirse en súbditos plenos de la Unión, pero perder los beneficios de ser una fuerza ocupacional.
STH_occupation_situation.116.b.tooltip: Los bajoranos solo son buenos para los esclavos, ahora es nuestra oportunidad de convertir en esclavos a todos los bajoranos del planeta.
STH_occupation_situation.116.desc: Las conversaciones de paz con los líderes bajoranos han tenido éxito y, a cambio de una mayor posición dentro de nuestra gran Unión, los ministros bajoranos y los vedeks han acordado ceder la ubicación de las diversas células de resistencia ubicadas en todo el planeta. \ n \ nObtener la lealtad del liderazgo bajorano es verdaderamente un triunfo del poder cardassiano. \ n \ nAhora podemos mantener nuestra palabra y permitir que Bajor se convierta en un verdadero súbdito de Cardassia o seguir el consejo de muchos de nuestros Legados mayores y traicionar a los bajoranos y convertirlos en esclavos.
STH_occupation_situation.116.name: Paz alcanzada en Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.117.desc: Después de años de ocupación, los cardassianos y bajoranos han llegado a un entendimiento y Bajor se ha sometido formalmente al gobierno cardassiano. La ocupación ha terminado y la resistencia ha sido derrotada.
STH_occupation_situation.117.name: Bajor y Cardassia se unen
STH_occupation_situation.118.desc: A pesar de años de resistencia, el movimiento de libertad bajorano ha terminado en un acto de traición del ejército cardassiano que ha dejado a los bajoranos como poco más que esclavos a la voluntad de la máquina cardassiana.
STH_occupation_situation.118.name: Los cardassianos esclavizan a los bajoranos
STH_occupation_situation.12.desc: Our acquisition of the Bajoran world has opened up new possibilities and new opportunities for us, but I put it to you that we cannot achieve these goals unless we fully occupy the planet with a fully armed military presence. \n\nThis occupation will help ensure that the Bajorans continue to serve the needs of our people, and of course our troops will play their part in aiding our Bajoran friends.
STH_occupation_situation.12.name: The Occupation
STH_occupation_situation.121.desc: Uno de nuestros barcos ha sufrido un mal funcionamiento inesperado que resultó en una rotura del reactor que destruyó el barco. Si bien no tenemos pruebas que lo demuestren, los miembros de alto rango de la Orden de Obsidiana creen que no fue una coincidencia que el barco hubiera recibido recientemente un cargamento que se originó en Bajor.
STH_occupation_situation.121.name: Barco saboteado
STH_occupation_situation.122.a: Mata a uno de sus Vedeks.
STH_occupation_situation.122.desc: Uno de nuestros líderes [kill_leader.GetName] ha sido encontrado muerto mientras estaba en tierra, parece que fueron asesinados por el grupo terrorista que se hace llamar la Resistencia Bajorana. No son más que criminales y pagarán por sus acciones.
STH_occupation_situation.122.name: Ciudadanos cardassianos asesinados
STH_occupation_situation.123.desc: Un miembro de alto rango del consejo civil ha desaparecido mientras viajaba de regreso del sistema bajorano, fue inspeccionada en las instalaciones de procesamiento de minerales en la estación Nor-Class que orbita Bajor y no ha informado a su oficial superior.
STH_occupation_situation.123.name: Barco saboteado
STH_occupation_situation.124.desc: Uno de nuestros transportes que transportaba carga valiosa ha desaparecido mientras viajábamos por las tierras baldías, ahora hemos perdido el transporte y la carga crucial que se transportaba a Cardassia desde Bajor. Sospechamos que esto es obra de la Resistencia Bajorana.
STH_occupation_situation.124.name: El transporte desaparece
STH_occupation_situation.13.desc:
Greetings citizens of Bajor, my name is [bajoran_occupation_prefect.GetName] and I will be your new Prefect and we want to welcome in a new era of peace and prosperity between our two worlds. 

Do not be afraid of the troops landing across the planet, they are here to help rebuild Bajor and ensure our interests are met. 

May this be the start of a long and prosperous future for our worlds.
STH_occupation_situation.13.name: Cardassian Occupation Begins
STH_occupation_situation.130.desc: Después de meses de trabajo de negociadores cardassianos, diplomáticos e intervenciones selectas de la Orden de Obsidiana, el pueblo bajorano ha sido pacificado y su liderazgo ha sido persuadido de seguir el gobierno cardassiano. Ahora podemos considerar verdaderamente a Bajor como un sirviente leal de [Root.GetName].
STH_occupation_situation.130.name: Población bajorana pacificada
STH_occupation_situation.14.desc: The time has come to assign a new Prefect to oversee the Bajoran Occupation. \n\nA list of candidates has been put forward and one mus be selected to continue our interests on Bajor.
STH_occupation_situation.14.name: A New Bajoran Prefect
STH_occupation_situation.15.desc_01: Greetings [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName], I bring you the latest progress report from our operations on Bajor and I am pleased to say that all is going well, production targets are being met and the locals are providing little resistance. Bajor continues to be a rich source of resource for Cardassia.
STH_occupation_situation.15.desc_02: Greetings [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName], I bring you the latest progress report from our operations on Bajor and we continue to see a rich production of minerals and food from our mining operations across the planet, with our production targets being consistently met. Our contacts within the Obsidian Order have started to report signs of malconent from the locals, but they remain unfocused and mostly just noise.
STH_occupation_situation.15.desc_03: Time for another report [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName], whilst operations continue with typical Cardassian efficiency the ungrateful locals continue to cause some... minor concerns, nothing that our local troops cannot handle, but it has hampered some of our production targets.
STH_occupation_situation.15.desc_04: I have little time for this [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName], but as requested the local insurgents continue to make a nuisance of themselves, nothing that we cannot handle, but had I been given the funding required I would have quite easily dispatched these Bajoran pesks. The complete pacification of the native population maybe our most effective solution...
STH_occupation_situation.15.name: Report from Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.16.desc: A list of replacement candidates for the role of the Bajoran Prefect has been made available to Central Command for their approval.
STH_occupation_situation.16.name: A New Bajoran Prefect
STH_occupation_situation.17.desc: Our mines and labour camps are now ready to turn over the resources that we have collected from Bajor, we shall approach the Bajoran government to arrange for the transportation of these resources to our orbital facilities.
STH_occupation_situation.17.name: Harvest Resources
STH_occupation_situation.18.desc: Attention Bajoran Workers! It is once again time to lay down your tools and allow your Cardassian overseers the chance to collect the efforts of your labours. \n\nAny attempt to prevent us from completing this activity will be met with severe force and punishment for you and your families.
STH_occupation_situation.18.name: Resource Collection
STH_occupation_situation.19.desc_01: As promised we provide you with all that Bajor has to offer as we continue to look to work with our Cardassian friends.
STH_occupation_situation.19.desc_02: Your payment will be made ready for you to collect Cardassian, I believe there is nothing more for us to speak on today.
STH_occupation_situation.19.desc_03: Take what you must and let us be done with this conversation.
STH_occupation_situation.19.desc_04: You Cardassians take and take with no regard for the consequences, mark our words the Prophets will see better times for the Bajoran people.
STH_occupation_situation.19.name: Resource Collection
STH_occupation_situation.2.desc: Through careful management of the remaining resources and the hard work by planetary environmentalists and leading agricultural experts we have made a significant dent in the impact in the global starvation that has been plaguing Cardassia Prime.\n\nThe government has officially declared the crisis on the homeworld as over.
STH_occupation_situation.2.name: Cardassia Starvation Over
STH_occupation_situation.20.desc_01: As promised we provide you with all that Bajor has to offer as we continue to look to work with our Cardassian friends.
STH_occupation_situation.20.desc_02: Your payment will be made ready for you to collect Cardassian, I believe there is nothing more for us to speak on today.
STH_occupation_situation.20.desc_03: Take what you must and if you feel the need to punish us then so be it, we can do no more.
STH_occupation_situation.20.desc_04: This is all we can provide, mark our words the Prophets will see better times for the Bajoran people.
STH_occupation_situation.21.a: Get out of our sights Bajoran.
STH_occupation_situation.21.desc_01: Please forgive us, the harvests have been poor this year and we have so little to give you, we will work harder to ensure future loads meet the quota.
STH_occupation_situation.21.desc_02: This is all we have to give at this stage, we will continue to slave away to produce more for next time.
STH_occupation_situation.21.desc_03: Our people slave and suffer and we can produce no more, do what must be done.
STH_occupation_situation.21.desc_04: This is all you shall receive from Bajorans and be thankful that the resistance doesn't make you pay for your crimes against our people.
STH_occupation_situation.22.a: Our lives will never be the same.
STH_occupation_situation.22.desc: The first wave of Cardassian Troops have landed on our soil bringing with them their weapons and prowess. A sense of fear and concern washes over our population centres, but our Cardassian contacts continue to assure us that these forces are here to protect us and help build our infrastructure. For now we must trust this is true, but there is little we could do either way.
STH_occupation_situation.22.name: Foreign Troops on our soil
STH_occupation_situation.24.desc: As we continue to progress our plans for Bajor, our military and expansion advisors recommend installing a new more agreeable regime that is more supportive of our goals for the planet. \n\nThe 'Bajoran Occupational Government' will continue to serve the interests of all parties and legitimise our occupation of the planet in the eyes of our galactic neighbours.
STH_occupation_situation.24.name: A puppet state
STH_occupation_situation.25.desc: Greetings Bajorans and greetings from your friends on Cardassia, as part of our continued friendship we have decided that it would be in your best interests if we helped provide you with a new stable government and leadership. \n\nFrom this moment onwards the Bajoran Republic will be run by the newly created 'Bajoran Occupational Government' and together we will build a better future for our people.
STH_occupation_situation.25.name: A new Regime
STH_occupation_situation.26.a: For the good of both worlds.
STH_occupation_situation.26.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] I bring you greetings and blessings from your loyal subjects on Bajor, the new governing body is now in place and ready to serve you in all things, just as the Prophets would desire.
STH_occupation_situation.26.name: Greetings from Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.27.desc: Children of the Prophets, I speak for the downtrodden and voiceless, for we are all loved by the Prophets... this partnership with the Cardassians is a shame, we live under occupation as our freedoms are eroded and our way of life is slowly taken from us. \n\nI urge all of us to stand united and in a single voice ask the Cardassians to leave our world.
STH_occupation_situation.27.name: Religious Leader Speaks Out
STH_occupation_situation.28.desc: It appears that a notable Bajoran religious leader has started actively speaking out against our presence on Bajor, this would not normally be a cause for concern, but those spiritualistic fools have started listening to these words risking unrest amongst those working the fields and mines. \n\nWe should instruct our planetary forces to act.
STH_occupation_situation.28.name: Bajoran Dissent
STH_occupation_situation.29.desc: Bajorans! Our forces have today arrested [BajoranReligiousLeader.GetName] for causing civic unrest, now is a time for unity among our people and the type of rhetoric being spouted will no longer be tolerated, let this be a lesson to all who wish to cause trouble, it will not be allowed!
STH_occupation_situation.29.name: Vedek Arrested
STH_occupation_situation.3.desc: Citizens from across the Union grow eager for Central Command to put our newest acquisition to good use, the fertile lands and rich mineral deposits of Bajor are ripe for use by the hardworking Cardassian's in need of the bounty.
STH_occupation_situation.3.name: Time to put the Bajoran's to Work
STH_occupation_situation.30.desc: Bajorans! You will no doubt now be aware that Cardassian forces moved in to arrest and detain Bajoran dissidents causing unrest and sowing ill will between our governments, they mean to harm our special relationship and they will face Cardassian justice. \n\nLet this be a lesson to anyone who wishes to speak out against us.
STH_occupation_situation.30.name: Population Arrested
STH_occupation_situation.31.desc: Bajorans! Today Cardassian troops moved in and executed known troublemaker [BajoranReligiousLeader.GetName] for crimes against Cardassia and Bajor. Troublemakers will not be tolerated and it will not stand. \n\nI hope this is the last I must speak to you on this subject.
STH_occupation_situation.31.name: [BajoranReligiousLeader.GetName] Executed
STH_occupation_situation.32.desc: Bajoran Citizens we know that there are those amongst you speaking out against our partnership, we offer this as a one-time warning, we will not tolerate this type of behaviour from this point forward religious gatherings will no longer be permitted. \n\nConsider yourself lucky that we were feeling benevolent.
STH_occupation_situation.32.name: A message from Cardassia
STH_occupation_situation.33.desc: Reports are coming in from the Kendra Province that a group of unarmed protesters were rounded up and arrested by Cardassian troops following a peaceful protest. \n\nThere has been no official word from our Cardassian Prefect on why they were arrested or where the protesters were taken following their arrest.
STH_occupation_situation.33.name: Pacifists Voice their Concern
STH_occupation_situation.34.desc: News coming in from Rakantha Province that there have been explosions at one of the Cardassian Military bases, the Cardassians are claiming that the matter was purely an internal incident and that there was no breach in security, however this has not stopped rumours circulating that a band of Bajoran youths manages to sneak into the base and ignite an ammunitions cache.
STH_occupation_situation.34.name: Explosions Heard
STH_occupation_situation.35.desc: Rumors are circulating that a group of Vedeks were able to successfully convince a local merchant guild to call off a protest against the trade restrictions imposed by Cardassian officials in the Kendra Valley, fearing that the Cardassian Military would intervene the Vedeks were able to persuade the merchants to take their goods and complaints elsewhere.
STH_occupation_situation.35.name: Riots Averted
STH_occupation_situation.4.desc: For too long now our people have looked out across the stars to the blue world of Bajor and the rich resources that in unfairly holds, the recent poor harvests on Cardassia Prime have led to a number of food shortages and discontent amongst the population. Military command believe the solution to our problems can be resolved with the help of the abundances of riches that Bajor holds. Annexing Bajor and bringing them into the Cardassian Union will provide us with the raw materials we need to sustain our way of life and provide the backwater Bajorans with a more evolved means of existence.
STH_occupation_situation.4.name: Resources low on Cardassia
STH_occupation_situation.40.desc: Legates and honourable members of Central Command, I bring to you a suggestion on how we can boost our dwindling gains from Bajor, our industrialists propose the construction of a new Nor-Class starbase in Orbit of the planet, with state-of-the-art ore processing facilities. What better way of constructing the station than using the most expendable resources in the system... the Bajorans themselves!
STH_occupation_situation.40.name: Terok Nor
STH_occupation_situation.41.desc: People of Bajor, as of this morning the Cardassian Union has granted permission to construct our newest orbital facility, which we have named 'Terok Nor' We will be rounding up and selecting those we need to help construct the starbase and work within its state of the art ore processing bays to ensure that your world continues to remain useful to the Cardassian Union.
STH_occupation_situation.41.name: Terok Nor
STH_occupation_situation.42.desc: Cardassia has proudly announced the construction of its latest orbital ore processing facility above the annexed world of Bajor, boosting an ability to process resources at an ever-increasing rate and proclaiming the station to be the pinnacle of Cardassian engineering and mastery.
STH_occupation_situation.42.name: Terok Nor
STH_occupation_situation.43.desc: In horrifying news reports are coming in across Bajor that the Cardassians have opened up several Labor Camps across the planet, pulling in Bajoran's as slaves from local farms and population centres far and wide. \n\nWe are now little more than slaves on our planet forced to work in the most terrible of conditions.
STH_occupation_situation.43.name: Labor Camps Open
STH_occupation_situation.44.desc: Exciting news from Bajor, the 1st of our new labor camps has now opened across the surface of Bajor the output from the planet's enslaved population will be increased as a result.
STH_occupation_situation.44.name: Labor Camps Open
STH_occupation_situation.45.desc: Our latest labor camp, Gallitep is ready to open its doors to a Bajoran workforce for the first time, this marks a new and exciting period in our occupation of Bajor as both a reminder to the natives that we are their better in every way and that there are fates worse than death when it comes to disobeying our commands.
STH_occupation_situation.45.name: Gallitep labor camp
STH_occupation_situation.46.desc: A terrifying new horror has been inflicted upon us by the Cardassians, at Gallitep close to the Dakhur Hills, a new forced labor camp has been opened up. Conditions in the camp are considered to be brutal and hostile and a death sentence to many sent there.
STH_occupation_situation.46.name: Gallitep labor camp
STH_occupation_situation.47.desc_01: With each passing update, we receive further horrific details of the atrocities occurring within the Gallitep Labor Camp, news reaches us that the new director of the camp, a Cardassian Gul named Darhe'el has taken to executing Bajoran workers for his amusement and to keep the up the moral of his own troops.
STH_occupation_situation.47.desc_02: A sizeable explosion was detected at the Camp in Gallitep today as a reported mining accident released waves of toxic fumes over Bajorans and Cardassians, the camp leader Darhe'el was reportedly off-world during the incident but his punishment is likely to be severe.
STH_occupation_situation.47.desc_03: We have received more horrifying news from Gallitep as yet more Bajoran workers are killed following an attempted escape from the facility, the Cardassian overseers responded by executing an entire work party as a message to those tempted to try and escape.
STH_occupation_situation.47.desc_04: Reports coming in from camp insiders suggest that Gul Darhe'el has been recognized as one of the most brutal overseers of any labor camp on Bajor. Innocent Bajorans were executed regularly, but not before they were tortured and humiliated.
STH_occupation_situation.47.desc_05: The Butcher of Gallitep has struck again as the latest death toll from the labor camp continues to rise.
STH_occupation_situation.47.name: News from Gallitep
STH_occupation_situation.48.desc: My fellow members of the [resistance_cell.GetName], we cannot stand and allow the atrocities at Gallitep to remain unchallenged, the time has come to make a stand, to fight back against the Cardassians. I propose that we liberate Gallitep and burn the camp to the ground as a symbol that Bajor will no longer be oppressed.
STH_occupation_situation.48.name: Liberation of Gallitep
STH_occupation_situation.49.desc: Events at Gallitep can be told in many ways, for the Bajorans it was an act of Freedom, for the Cardassians an act of terrorism... But what is known is that a small Resistance Cell was able to infiltrate and tear down one of the most brutal camps on the planet. \n\nA clear message that the Bajoran people will no longer taking the occupation lying down.
STH_occupation_situation.49.name: Liberation of Gallitep
STH_occupation_situation.5.b: Bajor will never submit to Cardassia.
STH_occupation_situation.5.desc: The audacity of the Bajoran government! They have reject our gracious offer. For their own good we have no choice but to provide our protection we must take what is ours by force.
STH_occupation_situation.5.name: Invitation to join Cardassia
STH_occupation_situation.50.desc: Despite the best efforts of the Resistance Cell the camp guards can fend off the attack, with many members of the cell captured or killed in the assault, a new attack will need to be arranged, but it will take some time for Resistance to regain it's strength in this region.
STH_occupation_situation.50.name: Liberation of Gallitep
STH_occupation_situation.51.desc: Reports from Bajor have come in, with the most concerning news, it appears that a rag-tag group of Bajoran extremists have targeted our camp at Gallitep killing hundreds of Cardassians and inflicting countless amounts of damage to our interests.
STH_occupation_situation.51.name: Liberation of Gallitep
STH_occupation_situation.6.a: Declare War on the Bajoran Republic.
STH_occupation_situation.6.desc: The audacity of the Bajoran government! They have reject our gracious offer. For their own good we have no choice but to provide our protection we must take what is ours by force.
STH_occupation_situation.6.name: Declare War on the Bajoran Republic
STH_occupation_situation.60.desc: My fellow Bajorans! It is time that we stood up and rid ourselves of the oppressing force that is the Cardassian Union, for too long they have stolen our lands, our culture, and our lives, I say no more! We must resist, for a free Bajor for every Bajoran!
STH_occupation_situation.60.name: The Bajoran Resistance
STH_occupation_situation.61.desc: The Bajoran peasants and farmers have taken up arms against us and banded together to form an organised Resistance movement! \n\nThese terrorists are now capable of harming our interests on Bajor and inflicting serious harm to our operations there.
STH_occupation_situation.61.name: Bajor Rises Up
STH_occupation_situation.62.desc: The Bajoran people have taken up arms against the Cardassians in the form of a planetary resistance movement. \n\nWe shall soon see whether they have the strength of will and character to repel their oppressors.
STH_occupation_situation.62.name: Bajor Rises Up
STH_occupation_situation.63.desc: It appears the Bajorans attempted to form a resistance movement, however it looks like their resolve faltered as they ran scared of the power of Cardassia. \n\nAny hit of an organised resistance is over.
STH_occupation_situation.63.name: Bajor is ours
STH_occupation_situation.7.desc: The Bajorans never stood a chance against our fleets and we have crushed them, our troops now walk on across their open fields and our generals lay claim to their property. However they have one last untapped resource which we should put to use, their people are excellent workers and will serve our us well in the labor camps and in the new ore processing centre built in orbit. We shall treat them well and they shall be grateful for all the benefits we will provide them.
STH_occupation_situation.7.name: Bajor belongs to us
STH_occupation_situation.70.desc: My fellow Bajorans! It is time that we stood up and rid ourselves of the oppressing force that is the Cardassian Union, for too long they have stolen our lands, our culture, and our lives, I say no more! We must resist, for a free Bajor for every Bajoran!
STH_occupation_situation.70.name: Bajoran Freedom
STH_occupation_situation.71.b: Rejected, steal an Orb as punishment.
STH_occupation_situation.71.desc: [This.GetName] Occupiers, the people of Bajor demand our freedom and the end to your wrongful occupation of our world, you have misunderstood the nature of the Bajoran people if you believe that we will continue to take this imprisonment of our world lying down! \n\nFree Bajor in the name of the Prophets!
STH_occupation_situation.71.name: Bajoran Freedom
STH_occupation_situation.72.desc: Bajor's bid to ask for its freedom has been granted, only time will tell what this means for the Bajoran people and their occupiers.
STH_occupation_situation.72.name: Bajoran Freedom Granted
STH_occupation_situation.73.desc: Bajor's bid to ask for its freedom has been rejected, only time will tell what this means for the Bajoran people and their occupiers.
STH_occupation_situation.73.name: Bajoran Freedom Rejected
STH_occupation_situation.79.desc: Our resistance team has picked up an additional opportunity, upon reaching the subspace station, the team located an outbound transport to an orbital communications station, with enough explosives to reduce the station to debris the team took the chance to set a trap for the inbound Cardassian team.
STH_occupation_situation.79.name: A further oppertunity
STH_occupation_situation.8.desc: The Cardassian Union have declared war on Bajor, it looks like the barren world seeks to harvest the riches and make them its own.
STH_occupation_situation.8.name: Cardassia claims Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.80.b: Esto no es digno de atención.
STH_occupation_situation.80.desc: Se han detectado extrañas lecturas del subespacio en la ciudad capital de nuestra nueva colonia [Root.GetName] recién adquirida. Estas interferencias irregulares bloquean una parte sustancial de nuestros canales de comunicación subespaciales y, por lo tanto, reducen nuestra capacidad de comerciar con el mundo. \n\nDebemos averiguar dónde están ubicados los dispositivos de interferencia en la superficie para restaurar los canales al comando central en [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName].
STH_occupation_situation.80.name: Interferencias subespaciales
STH_occupation_situation.81.desc: Después de un mes de investigación de las células de resistencia subterráneas [bajoranSpecies.GetName], finalmente hemos rastreado la base de operaciones de la milicia local en las afueras de la provincia de Rakhanta. \n\nPara interrogar aún más al líder de la resistencia, nuestro equipo visitante ha adquirido inteligencia que sugiere otra operación de sabotaje dirigida a [Root.Solar_System.Starbase.GetName].
STH_occupation_situation.81.name: [bajoranSpecies.GetName] Resistencia
STH_occupation_situation.82.d: Conversaciones de paz abiertas con los ministros.
STH_occupation_situation.82.desc: Al llegar a [Root.Solar_System.Starbase.GetName], el transporte de tropas apenas logra evadir los enormes pilones y los escombros estructurales que flotan alrededor del sol de [Root.GetName]. Brillando intensamente por la explosión masiva, indican la pérdida completa de la estación. \n\nDespués de transmitir las inquietantes noticias al comando central en [Root.Capital.GetName], se envió un barco de construcción para la reconstrucción inmediata de [Root.Solar_System.Starbase.GetName].
STH_occupation_situation.82.name: Interferencias subespaciales
STH_occupation_situation.83.a: Bajor will be free once again.
STH_occupation_situation.83.desc: The Bajoran people have suffered for too long at the hands of [bajoran_overlords.GetName], they plunder our world, enslave our people forcing them into concentration camps or into mining camps stealing our natural resources and committing genocide in the name of enlightening our people. The resistance movement has gathered enough support an with galactic opinion now swinging against the forced occupation of Bajor, now is our time to strike back and push [bajoran_overlords.GetName] from our home and with the Prophets on our side to guide our way we shall be victorious.
STH_occupation_situation.83.name: The Occupation must end
STH_occupation_situation.83_desc.01: We have had a concerning report in from the Prefect of Bajor, an annexed backwater resource colony outside of the badlands, the 'Bajoran Resistance', once considered to be a ragtag group of peasants and farmers has managed to unite the planet behind their movement to drive our forces from the planet, but what is more concerning is that the plight of the Bajorans is starting to reach the ears of our galactic neighbours. The Bajorans now shout with a singular message...
STH_occupation_situation.84.desc: The explosion could be seen from the majority of population locations across Bajor and sparked quiet celebrations from our downtrodden people, a clear signal of intent, that Bajor is free!
STH_occupation_situation.84.name: Cardassian Forces Destroyed
STH_occupation_situation.85.desc: Our long-range scans have picked up evidence of fighting on the remote world of Bajor, our intelligence reports suggest that the local Bajorans are fighting back against the occupying Cardassian forces that have beset their homeworld for many years.
STH_occupation_situation.85.name: Trouble brewing on Bajor
STH_occupation_situation.86.a: What business is this of theirs?
STH_occupation_situation.86.desc: Our embassy on [prev.capital_scope.GetName] has received an official message of condemnation from [prev.GetName] against our occupation of Bajor.
STH_occupation_situation.86.name: Galactic Condemnation
STH_occupation_situation.9.desc: The Cardassian Union has annexed Bajor in an audacious attempt to bolster their own resources. The galactic community has largely condemned the act, but so far no action has been taken by any of the major empires
STH_occupation_situation.9.name: Cardassia annexes Bajor
STH_onaction.1020.desc: Our new vassal [This.GetName] has a long-renowned tradition of space exploration, which has resulted in them collecting and recording star maps from their earliest ventures into space, they are now offering us those maps as a sign of respect.
STH_onaction.1020.name: Ancient Starmap
STH_onaction.7030.desc: Citizens of [Root.GetName] are going to the polls to elect a new [Root.GetRulerTitle].
STH_onaction.7030.name: Elections Open
STH_onaction.7031.desc: Polls are now closed in [Root.GetName] elections to vote in a new [Root.GetRulerTitle].
STH_onaction.7031.name: Elections Closed
STH_onaction.900.a: Vuelva a registrar el [shipCandidate1.GetName] en la memoria de [leaderTarget.GetName].
STH_onaction.900.b: Vuelva a registrar el [shipCandidate2.GetName] en la memoria de [leaderTarget.GetName].
STH_onaction.900.c: Vuelva a registrar el [shipCandidate3.GetName] en la memoria de [leaderTarget.GetName].
STH_onaction.900.desc: La reciente muerte del destacado líder [leaderTarget.GetName] se ha sentido a través de [Root.GetName]. \n\n Muchos en la comunidad [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] sienten que los logros de [leaderTarget.GetName] fueron tan buenos que renombrar una nave estelar en la memoria es un signo apropiado de respeto.
STH_onaction.900.name: Muerte de [From.GetName]
STH_onaction.900.z: Hay otras formas de honrar a [leaderTarget.GetName].
STH_onaction.901.desc: El Capitán [oldLeader.GetName] falleció dejando abierta la cuestión de la capitanía del [USS_Defiant.GetName]. \n\nDespués de muchas luchas internas entre la tripulación de [oldLeader.GetHerHis], el oficial favorito de [oldLeader.GetName], [defiant_leader.GetName] ha tomado el mando.
STH_onaction.901.name: Muerte de [oldLeader.GetName]
STH_operation.1407.desc_01: Our infiltration team have successfully loaded the explosive materials aboard [target_construction_ship1.GetName] they await our instructions to begin the plan.
STH_operation.1407.desc_02: Our teams have prepared the computer virus to upload into the core of [target_science_ship1.GetName], this will cause a warp core breach and appear as an accident as planned. Ready to begin the operation on your command.
STH_operation.1407.desc_03: Our teams have sabotaged a number of key systems onboard [target_military_ship1.GetName], this will appear as a systems failure and deal them a critical blow.
STH_operation.1407.name: Operation Report. Begin Operation
STH_operation.1408.desc: Our attempts to sabotage and destroy our target was unsuccessful and the ship continues to function with minimal damage. Our operatives are working to ensure that this cannot be traced back to us.
STH_operation.1408.name: Operation Failure
STH_operation.1409.desc: Our agents have confirmed the destruction of our target, which was destroyed with the loss of all hands. Our enemy is none the wiser that we were responsible for the vessels loss, a fine victory for our espionage agency.
STH_operation.1409.name: Operation Success
STH_operation.1410.desc: Our operatives were unable to identify a suitable target that we could destroy without compromising our own security.
STH_operation.1410.name: Unable to find a target
STH_operation.1411.desc: Our military services have reported the sad loss of the [target_ship.GetName] with the unfortunate loss of all hands. It appears that a major system failure occured and cascaded through the ship, our internal services are investigating but it appears there is very little evidence remaining.
STH_operation.1411.name: Ship Destroyed!
STH_operation.1412.desc: We have received a report from [target_ship.GetName] it appears the ship had a narrow escape, the chief engineer identifed a potential ship threatening issue, that left unchecked could have resulted in the destruction of the ship.
STH_operation.1412.name: Disaster averted
STH_operation.1501.desc: Mighty Founders, our operative within [Target.GetName] has identified a list of targets that we can send in a Founder to replace them with. Should we wish to target higher profile targets we may need to increase our efforts with a change of policy.
STH_operation.1501.name: Dominion Security. Targets Observed
STH_operation.1510.desc_01: Mighty Founders, our Security services operating on [Target.Capital.GetName] report that the next stage of the operation can begin. The Founder should make their way to [Target.GetName] space whilst we neutralise the target. Our chief agent reminds us that additional assets will aid in the success of the mission.
STH_operation.1510.desc_02: Mighty Founders, our Security services operating on within the government on [Target.Capital.GetName] report that the next stage of the operation can begin now that we are close to their [Target.GetRulerTitle]. Our chief agent reminds us that additional assets will aid in the success of the mission.
STH_operation.1510.name: Dominion Security - Neutralise Target
STH_operation.1521.desc_01: Mission Report - We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] a high ranking [From.GetCaptainTitle] from [Target.GetName] with one of our Founders from the Great Link. We now have multiple possibilities to benefit the mighty Dominion.
STH_operation.1521.desc_02: Mission Report - We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] a high ranking [From.GetCaptainTitle] from [Target.GetName] with one of our Founders from the Great Link. We now have multiple possibilities to benefit the mighty Dominion.
STH_operation.1521.desc_03: Mission Report - We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] a high ranking General within the armies of [Target.GetName] with one of our Founders from the Great Link. We now have multiple possibilities to benefit the mighty Dominion.
STH_operation.1521.desc_04: Mission Report - We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] the [From.GetRulerTitle] of [Target.GetName] with one of our wise Founders from the Great Link. We now have multiple possibilities to benefit the mighty Dominion.
STH_operation.1521.name: Dominion Security - Operation Success
STH_operation.1701.desc: Keeping [Root.Capital.GetName]'s neighbours disunited is a time-tested method of ensuring [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] superiority over local space. \n\nBy leaking falsified diplomatic messages, staging attacks on enemy vessels using disguised assets and other disruptive actions, we are able to sour our target's relations.
STH_operation.1701.name: Operations Surveillance Report
STH_operation.1800.name: Operations Surveillance Report
STH_operation.1801.desc: All resources are now in place to begin the operation.
STH_operation.1801.name: Operations. Begin Mission
STH_operation.2014.b: Cause as much damage as possible.
STH_operation.2014.desc: Our operatives have successfully struck a blow against the ability of [fromfrom.GetName] to detect our cloak operations in [target.solar_system.GetName]. [spynetwork.leader.GetName]'s team has been successful and has done a significant service for our Empire.
STH_operation.2014.name: [fromfrom.GetName] Starbase Cloak Detection Sabotaged
STH_operation.2015.desc: [from.spynetwork.leader.GetName] reports that [from.spynetwork.leader.GetHisHer] team of operatives must abandon their efforts to sabotage [sabotaged_starbase_owner.GetAdj] in the [sabotaged_starbase_system.GetName] system. Drastic changes to the [sabotaged_starbase_owner.GetAdj] interior have made our efforts so far redundant. We would be wise to choose a different target.
STH_operation.2015.name: Anti-Cloak Sabotage Aborted
STH_operation.2016.desc_01: Foreign intruders have violated our borders in the [sabotaged_starbase_system.GetName] system, destroying the anti-cloak defenses of the [sabotaged_starbase.GetName] facility. These saboteurs appear to have been acting on behalf of a foreign power; our counter-espionage forces are on red alert to try and capture these operatives.
STH_operation.2016.desc_02: Unknown forces have struck at the [sabotaged_starbase_system.GetName] system, wrecking the ability for [sabotaged_starbase.GetName] to detect cloaked vessels.\n\nOur security forces suggests this is likely the work of foreign actors, rather than any home-grown threat. We have increased security around the affected region of space in the hopes of capturing these operatives.
STH_operation.2016.desc_03: A foreign entity has breached our borders in the [sabotaged_starbase_system.GetName] system and has wantonly disrupted the anti-cloaking defences of [sabotaged_starbase.GetName] facility. We cannot yet ascertain how these saboteurs gained entry so effectively, however we have increased our internal security in direct response.
STH_operation.2016.name: Anti-Cloak Equipment Sabotaged at [target.GetName]
STH_operation.2501.desc: Our infiltrator within [Target.GetName] has identified a list of targets that we can replace. The higher profile the target the greater the risk and higher the reward.
STH_operation.2501.name: Undine Infiltration
STH_operation.2510.desc_01: Our Infiltrators operating on [Target.Capital.GetName] report that the next stage of the operation can begin. The Caretaker agent should now make their way to [Target.GetName] space whilst end the life of the target. Additional assets will aid in the success of this mission.
STH_operation.2510.desc_02: Our Infiltrators operating on within the government on [Target.Capital.GetName] report that the next stage of the operation can begin now that we are close to their [Target.GetRulerTitle]. Our chief agent reminds us that additional assets will aid in the success of the mission.
STH_operation.2510.name: Undine Infiltration
STH_operation.2521.desc_01: Mission Report We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] a high ranking [From.GetCaptainTitle] from [Target.GetName] with one of specially bred infiltrator warriors. We now have multiple routes to sabotage this empire.
STH_operation.2521.desc_02: Mission Report We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] a high ranking [From.GetCaptainTitle] from [Target.GetName] with one of specially bred infiltrator warriors. We now have multiple routes to sabotage this empire.
STH_operation.2521.desc_03: Mission Report We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] a high ranking General within the armies of [Target.GetName] with one of specially bred infiltrator warriors. We now have multiple routes to sabotage this empire.
STH_operation.2521.desc_04: Mission Report We have successfully replaced [targeted_leader.GetName] the ruler of [Target.GetName] with one of specially bred infiltrator warriors. We now have multiple routes to sabotage this empire.
STH_operation.2521.name: Undine Infiltration
STH_operation.2572.desc: After conducting a thorough sweep of the [Root.GetName] security network, $role_spymaster$ [from.spynetwork.leader.GetName] reports having found no evidence of any widespread [from.target.GetAdj] spy network operating within our borders.\n\nWith no foreign operations detected, our operative was able to focus on boosting our internal security practices, with several notable improvements being made.
STH_operation.2572.name: Counter-Intelligence
STH_operation.2575.desc_01: Our counter-intelligence operation against the [target_country.GetName] was a huge success! $role_spymaster$ [fromfrom.spynetwork.leader.GetName] was able to arrest many of the identified agents in a series of coordinated operations across the [Root.GetName]. Their operations have been significantly disrupted as a result of our efforts.
STH_operation.2575.desc_02: $role_spymaster$ [fromfrom.spynetwork.leader.GetName] was able to arrest many of the identified agents in a series of staged operations, disrupting the [target_country.GetAdj] spy network within our borders. Unfortunately, despite the efforts of our intelligence agents, a number of [target_country.GetAdj] spies managed to evade our capture and have fled our reach.
STH_operation.2575.desc_03: Our operation against the [target_country.GetName] was a huge success! $role_spymaster$ [fromfrom.spynetwork.leader.GetName] was able to identify a key asset and was able to flip it to our purposes, compromising a key portion of the [target_country.GetAdj] spy network.
STH_operation.2575.desc_04: $role_spymaster$ [fromfrom.spynetwork.leader.GetName] was able to identify a key asset in the [target_country.GetAdj] spy network. Unfortunately the [target_country.GetName] detected our plans and the asset vanished before we could acquire it for ourselves.\n\nWhile the operation did not go as planned, the loss of this asset will still result in a major setback in their efforts against us.
STH_operation.2575.desc_05: Our operation against the [target_country.GetName] was a huge success! Our agents have begun feeding the [target_country.GetAdj] spy network false information, allowing our operatives to manipulate their network and disrupt their operations against us, setting them back years.
STH_operation.2575.desc_06: Our agents have begun feeding the [target_country.GetAdj] spy network false information, allowing our operatives to manipulate their network. Unfortunately, the [target_country.GetName] have begun to suspect that some of their informants have been compromised.
STH_operation.2575.name: [target_country.GetAdj] Operations Disrupted
STH_operation.2576.desc_01: Our operations against the [From.GetName] has become the victim of active counter-espionage activity. Our $role_spymaster$ was able to prevent most of our spy network from becoming compromised, but we have still suffered a significant setback. Some of our agents have been arrested or turned against us, and our remaining operatives have gone to ground.
STH_operation.2576.desc_02: Our operations against the [From.GetName] has become the victim of active counter-espionage activity. Our $role_spymaster$ attempted to prevent our spy network from becoming compromised but was unsuccessful. Our local operations have been exposed, and our remaining agents have been forced to flee back to the [Root.GetName].
STH_operation.2576.name: Operations Disrupted
STH_operation.3023.a.tooltip: A branch office on [corp_planet_target.GetName] will be removed.
STH_operation.3023.desc_01: We have successfully expelled a [from.from.target.GetAdj] branch office on [corp_planet_target.GetName]! The [from.from.target.GetName] of course objected, but we were prepared for their legal arguments and were able to conclude our operation with minimal resistance. It may take years for the matter to be fully resolved in the courts, but in the mean time, we have the results we wanted.
STH_operation.3023.desc_02: We have conducted a successful raid on a [from.from.target.GetAdj] criminal headquarters on [corp_planet_target.GetName]! Several high ranking crime bosses have been arrested, and the rest of their network has fled the [corp_planet_target.GetPlanetMoon].
STH_operation.3023.desc_03: The [from.from.target.GetAdj] branch office on [corp_planet_target.GetName] has proven far more entrenched than expected. Although the [from.from.target.GetName] have no legitimate authority to operate within our territories, they have constructed a compelling legal fiction that will take some time for the courts to unravel. We will need to seek alternative methods to root them out.
STH_operation.3023.desc_04: The [from.from.target.GetAdj] criminals on [corp_planet_target.GetName] have proven far more entrenched than expected. The [from.from.target.GetName] were prepared for our raid, and most of the high ranking crime bosses were able to escape. We will need a new plan of action if we are to root them out.
STH_operation.3023.name: Remove Criminal Organsation
STH_operation.3024.desc_01: The [from.GetName] has shut down our corporate offices on [corp_planet_target.GetName]. Without a binding commercial treaty, our activities have few legal protections in the [from.GetAdj] territories, leaving us with little recourse to prevent the expulsion of our employees.
STH_operation.3024.desc_02: The [from.GetName] have conducted a surprise raid on our branch office on [corp_planet_target.GetName], arresting many of our local mob bosses and scattering the rest of the network. Our influence on the [corp_planet_target.GetPlanetMoon] has been broken.
STH_operation.3024.name: Branch Office Removed!
STH_operation.3025.desc: Due to the changing situation in the [fromfrom.target.GetName], our agents are unable to complete their objective. $role_spymaster$ [fromfrom.spynetwork.leader.GetName] has shut down our operation, and has reassigned our agents elsewhere.
STH_operation.3025.name: Operation Canceled
STH_operations_fail.100.desc: We have concerning news from our field operatives involved in the mission to replace a hostile leader. We have lost contact with the team and the Founder they were protecting. It is possible that counter-intelligence forces are behind the loss of contact.
STH_operations_fail.100.name: Contact lost with infiltration team
STH_operations_fail.100.toolip: Attempt to recover the asset at the cost of energy. The bigger the difference in encryption levels between the powers the better the chance of success.
STH_operations_fail.110.desc: Our special forces teams have managed to recover the Founder and our espionage team from underneath the eyes of our enermy forces. Allowing to resume our operations in this sector.
STH_operations_fail.110.name: Contact Reestablished
STH_operations_fail.111.desc: Despite our efforts we have failed to reestablish contact with our teams and should consider them lost.
STH_operations_fail.111.name: Failed to recover our team
STH_operations_fail.112.desc: Our security teams have uncovered a potential changeling infiltration plot against one of our high ranking officials. We were unable to detain the team, but we were able to stop their plot against us.
STH_operations_fail.112.name: Changeling infiltrator uncovered
STH_operations_fail.120.desc: Our Internal Security forces have detected some suspicious activity on one of our planets. Our $role_spymaster$ believes that the [from.target.GetAdj] agents have become aware of our counter-intelligence investigation and are attempting to secure their security network.
STH_operations_fail.120.name: Suspicious Activity Detected
STH_operations_fail.121.desc: Our operatives have discovered a significant security leak during a routine inspection of one of our encrypted networks. Our agents have drawn up plans to close this particular security gap; however, our $role_spymaster$ has also suggested using the leak to draw in unsuspecting foreign agents.
STH_operations_fail.121.name: Security Leak Identified
STH_operations_fail.122.desc: After conducting a thorough sweep of the [Root.GetName], $role_spymaster$ [from.spynetwork.leader.GetName] reports having found no evidence of a widespread [from.target.GetAdj] spy network operating within our borders.\n\nWith no foreign operations to thwart, our $role_spymaster$ turned [from.spynetwork.leader.GetHerHis] attention inward, meticulously assessing the state of our internal security. Several suggested improvements have been included in [from.spynetwork.leader.GetHerHis] report.
STH_operations_fail.122.name: Internal Security Operations Completed
STH_pirate.2.desc: We have received an SOS call from [gorn_target_ship.GetName], the last transmission we received was the following. \n\nWe are under attac... from an unidentified shi..p. They did not respond to our hails.. hissing... snarling... please send help immediately.
STH_pirate.2.name: SOS call received
STH_pirate.21.desc_01: Our Marauders grow eager to obtain profit and salvage via a raid on an unsuspecting foe, remember if we need justification, Rule 202: The justification for profit is profit! We have drawn up a list of potential targets for review.
STH_pirate.21.desc_02: The Orion Syndicate grows restless to extend its reach across the criminal underworld with a raid against an unsuspecting world, seeking plunder and potential slaves to sell onwards.
STH_pirate.21.desc_03: Our young grow restless for fresh meatsss and a chance to spread the limbsss with a raid against a target that is ripe for an attack. Who should we targetsss?
STH_pirate.21.desc_04: It is time for a new hunt as our hunters grow bored of our current targets, we have provided a list of worthy prey. Select a worthwhile target and let a hunt begin.
STH_pirate.21.desc_05: Our raiders are eager to stretch their claws and dig them into a new target, there is plunder and prizes to be won. We should select a target and let the raiding begin.
STH_pirate.21.desc_06: Our fighters grow tired of fighting amongst themselves and when Nausicaan's grow bored, our foes should grow scared. Let us raid and pillage and be grateful that we sought permission.
STH_pirate.21.desc_07: The Majes tire of fighting amongst themselves and demand the chance to seek a target to raid and increase their own wealth and prestige. Select a suitable target and let the raid begin.
STH_pirate.21.desc_08: Our mercenary's hunger for a taste of plunder. Commission a raid against a neighboring world to seize its wealth for our own.
STH_pirate.21.desc_09: It is time to let our raiders lose and attack an unsuspecting target, bringing us loot and plunder. Select a target to begin the raid.
STH_pirate.21.name: Our raiders grow restless
STH_pirate.22.a: What do you want from us?
STH_pirate.22.d: You win, take what you want.
STH_pirate.22.desc_01: We come to seize your profits, so hand over your Latinum and we may just leave your world able to continue trading!
STH_pirate.22.desc_02: Greetings [Root.GetName] you face the mighty Orion Syndicate, we offer you two choices, hand over the wealth of this system or we shall take them by force.
STH_pirate.22.desc_03: Thisss is the Gorn, we offer you a simple choice handover your wealthhh or we shall take it for ourselvesss. Our hatchlingsss are eager for you to reject our offer.
STH_pirate.22.desc_04: You have the honour of being marked out as worthy prey for one of our hunting parties, you have the chance to handover the wealth of this system or let the hunt begin.
STH_pirate.22.desc_05: You are the unlucky target of [raiding_leader.GetName] and we come for what is ours by conquest! So handover your treasures or be prepared for us to take them by force.
STH_pirate.22.desc_06: This is [raiding_leader.GetName], we come here to take your treasures, you can give them to us, or we take them from you!
STH_pirate.22.desc_07: The Kazon have always been free to take what we want, and we want your wealth and technology... so hand it over to us or face the consequences.
STH_pirate.22.desc_08: You are being raided by the Pirate Lord [raiding_leader.GetName], surrender your resources or we shall take them by force.
STH_pirate.22.desc_09: You are being raided by the Pirate Lord [raiding_leader.GetName], surrender your resources or we shall take them by force.
STH_pirate.22.name: Raiders Detected approaching [raiding_target_planet.GetName]
STH_pirate.23.desc: We have word back from our raiding force, their targets were too scared to face the force of their weapons and waved the white flag in surrender. \n\nWe have taken their resources and wealth... now we celebrate.
STH_pirate.23.name: Raid Target Surrenders
STH_pirate.24.desc: Our raiding party has met a foe that is willing to fight to protect their wealth, our privateers shall now battle and teach them a lesson.
STH_pirate.24.name: Raid Target willing to fight
STH_pirate.25.desc: Our refusal to back down from the threat posed by the raiding party has led to an attack on the planet [raiding_target_planet.GetName]. should the raiding fleet reach the planet they will begin to plunder resources. We must muster a defense and prevent these raiders from taking our resources.
STH_pirate.25.name: System under raiding attack
STH_pirate.28.desc: We were unable to prevent the raiders from pillaging [raiding_target_planet.GetName], the Raiders have made off with a great deal of valuable resources and disappeared into warp, leaving chaos and destruction in their wake.
STH_pirate.28.e: We must not let this happen again.
STH_pirate.28.name: [raiding_target_planet.GetName] Raided!
STH_pirate.29.desc: Our raiding party has successfully bypassed the would-be defenses standing in their way and returned to us with riches galore! \n\nIt is time for the captains to divide up the rewards and celebrate with their crews.
STH_pirate.29.name: Raid Successful
STH_pirate.3.a: It is our duty to rescue those in trouble.
STH_pirate.3.b: Raise shields we must defend the ship.
STH_pirate.3.desc: [gorn_pirate_rescue_leader.GetName] in command of [gorn_pirate_rescue_ship.GetName] have arrived on the scene. The transport ship is adrift with its power levels failing fast, sensors are picking up faint life signs. The attackers are not currently in the vicinity, but all the signs point towards a trap, in order to rescue the survivors we must lower our shields, but this will almost certainly provoke a large attack against the [gorn_pirate_rescue_ship.GetName].
STH_pirate.3.name: Transport under attack
STH_pirate.30.desc: Our forces have successfully destroyed the Raiders threatening our planet. \n\nWe have managed to retrieve part of the privateer's cargo, which has been taken from another faction. We can return it or keep it for ourselves.
STH_pirate.30.name: Raiding Force Defeated
STH_pirate.31.a: You win some, you lose some.
STH_pirate.31.desc: Our raiding fleet has been destroyed without achieving their goal of pirating and plundering. \n\nWe shall soon see if our target now turns and seeks revenge on us.
STH_pirate.31.name: Raiding Force Defeated
STH_pirate.4.desc_01: We cannot allow innocents to go without rescue, lowering the shields in an attempt to beam as many crew members from the damaged transport as possible. \n\nSensors quickly pick up the ambush as it occurs, the attackers clearly waited for the shields to be lowered and launch a full scale assault against our ships.
STH_pirate.4.desc_02: Despite the transport crew being in danger of their life support failing, the Admiral cannot risk the lives of their own crew. \n\nSensors quickly pick up the ambush as it occurs, the attackers obviously grew impatient with waiting and have sent a smaller number of ships to engage our fleet.
STH_pirate.4.name: Pirates Attack!
STH_pirate.5.desc: Our failure to come to the aid of the transport has resulted in the pirates destroying the ship with the loss of all hands.
STH_pirate.5.name: Transport Destroyed
STH_pirate.6.c: Ensure the survivors are treated with care.
STH_pirate.6.desc_01: Despite the fearsome attack our fleet was able to repel the attack and defeat the raiders. \n\nUnfortunately there was no indicuation of who the raiders were or what their intentions towards our transport. However the surviors describe snarling and hissing noises and report that several members of the crew were forcibly remove from the ship.
STH_pirate.6.desc_02: Despite the fearsome attack our fleet was able to repel the attack and defeat the raiders. \n\nUnfortunately there was no indicuation of who the raiders were or what their intentions towards our transport. It is unfortunate that we were unable to safe the crew.
STH_pirate.6.name: Pirate raiders defeated in battle
STH_policy.10.desc_01: The [Root.GetName] has always played a pivotal role on the galactic stage and when we speak with a powerful voice, other lesser empires must listen or face the consequences. \n\nThrough the Galactic Forum we may reach out to our neighbours and make them listen to our views.
STH_policy.10.desc_02: Our role on the galactic stage has always been to promote unity and freedom and ensure the whole galaxy experiences the peace and freedoms that we experience within [Root.GetName]. \n\nThrough the Galactic Forums the empires of the Milky Way come together to negotiate and attempt to shape the galaxy with words and not torpedoes.
STH_policy.10.desc_03: Our place in the galaxy has always been important, and every decision we should take must prove profitable for us. \n\nOur investment in the Galactic Forum will provide us with a seat at the galactic table where we can ensure that events work out in the best interest of the [Root.GetName].
STH_policy.10.desc_04: Our ascension to a place of Galactic power has put us in a strong position to relay the word of our Gods and help others to see the way forward. \n\nThe Galactic Forum will allow us to influence and preach our position to the wider community.
STH_policy.10.name: Galactic Politics
STH_policy.20.desc: Conflict creates instability and this ripples across the Quadrant threatening the peace that we have deemed important to our future plans. Our admiralty has prepared a list of ongoing wars in the known galaxy, presenting us with the choice on which to focus the [Root.GetName]'s diplomatic attention upon.
STH_policy.20.name: Condemn a War
