STH_redemption.69.desc: There has been no answer to our attempts to hail the cloaked fleet and subsequent scans have failed to reveal any further sign of the cloaked ships. It appears they were in no mood for confrontation and have retreated.
STH_redemption.69.name: Cloaked Fleet Retreats
STH_redemption.7.desc: Our sources within the Klingon High Council have made us aware that the Federation has been approached to assist the Empire in replacing the leader we have poisoned. Commander Sela assures us that this unexpected twist will be 'handled' by her team.
STH_redemption.7.name: Redemption
STH_redemption.70.desc: Our faith in Starfleet has been rewarded! The Federation fleet has reported in that they have successfully deterred a suspected Romulan fleet from crossing into our space to aid our foes.
STH_redemption.70.name: Federation Repel Romulans
STH_redemption.71.desc: Sela, we are in no position to offer you a fight today, nor do we wish to engage in a conflict with the Romulan Star Empire on this occasion. We urge you to reconsider your interfering in this internal matter for the Klingons as it will only lead to war.
STH_redemption.71.name: Starfleet Backs Down
STH_redemption.72.desc: It appears that the Starfleet blockade was in no mood for a fight against the Romulans and has backed down allowing them to cross into Klingon territory.
STH_redemption.72.name: Starfleet Backs Down
STH_redemption.73.desc: Be advised Romulan Commander, we are not looking to start a war here today, nor are we massing on the border looking for conflict, but we cannot allow interference in a matter for the Klingon Empire. \n\nKnowing the Klingons as we do, I suspect any public knowledge of your involvement will cause an adverse effect on the faction you are looking to support.
STH_redemption.73.name: Incoming Message
STH_redemption.74.a: The fleet has done its job.
STH_redemption.74.desc: You may have the victory today Starfleet, but rest assured we will not forget how you have interfered within our matters here today. Until we meet again... Sela out.
STH_redemption.74.name: Romulans Backs Down
STH_redemption.75.desc: It appears a fleet of Starfleet ships were involved in an altercation along the border when a fleet or Romulan warbirds attempted to cross into our territory to deliver aid to the rebel factions. It seems the Starfleet captain involve was able to 'convince' the Romulans to head home with their tails between their legs.
STH_redemption.75.name: Starfleet Exposes a Romulan theat
STH_redemption.8.desc: Our spies within the Klingon Empire have advised us that the Empire attempted to seek the help of Starfleet, who rejected their request for help. Whilst this action will no doubt damage the relationship between both sides it does not aid our attempts to gain influence within the High Council
STH_redemption.8.name: Redemption
STH_redemption.80.desc_01: Reports are coming in from our listening posts monitoring activity within the Klingon Empire, it appears that as predicted and feared the tensions between the Klingon Houses have resulted in a full-scale Civil War. \n\nNo doubt the outcome will have far reaching effects on the state of the quadrant.
STH_redemption.80.desc_02: It appears the time has finally arrived, our sensor posts have picked up the opening volleys in an attack by the Rebel Houses. \n\nIt appears this frustrating waiting is now finally over and the real battles can begin, now we fight like real Klingons!
STH_redemption.80.name: The Klingon Civil War
STH_redemption.81.desc: Our cloaked vessels watching the events unfolding in Klingon space have picked up the opening shots in the start of the Klingon Civil War. \n\nNow we wait to see if our rebel-backed faction wins. throwing their relationship with the humans into disarray!
STH_redemption.81.name: The Klingon Civil War
STH_redemption.9.desc: We have been advise by the Federation Ambassador that they will be sending no Captain to support our request to aid with the Rite of Succession. \n\nIt seems our trust in the Federation was miss-placed and they have no honour after all.
STH_redemption.9.name: Rite of Succession
STH_relic_hunters.110.a: For the might of the Empire!
STH_relic_hunters.110.desc: We have finished curating the [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesNamePlural] on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName] for maximum viability. We recovered what relics we could from the extraneous exhibits. Our Curators have decided on this exhibit description based on the species' appearance, culture, and former civilization:\n\n[STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesMuseumDescription]
STH_relic_hunters.110.title: Curation Complete
STH_relic_hunters.111.a: Place them in the Primitive Written Works exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.111.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered an artifact! It appears to be a set of scrolls discussing the formation of governments.
STH_relic_hunters.111.title: We have recovered the colAndor Scrolls!
STH_relic_hunters.112.a: Place them in the Primitive Written Works exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.112.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered an artifact! It appears to be a set of metaphors and aphorisms around the acquisition of material wealth.
STH_relic_hunters.112.title: We have recovered the Rules of Acquisition!
STH_relic_hunters.113.a: Place it in the Primitive Ceramics exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.113.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered an artifact! It appears to be an ancient clay pot with fungus growing inside of it.
STH_relic_hunters.113.title: We have recovered the Sacred Chalice of Rixx!
STH_relic_hunters.114.a: Place it in the Primitive Written Works exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.114.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered an artifact! It appears to be a set of writings of an ancient Vulcan philosopher.
STH_relic_hunters.114.title: We have recovered the Kir'Shara!
STH_relic_hunters.115.a: Place them in the Primitive Written Works exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.115.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered several artifacts! They appear to be serveral written works of Cardassian propaganda.
STH_relic_hunters.115.title: We have recovered several works of Cardassian literature!
STH_relic_hunters.116.a: Place them in the Hazardous Artifact Vaults.
STH_relic_hunters.116.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered several dangerous artifacts! They appear to be hourglass-shaped energy fields that defy analysis. Several curators have gone unconscious or died attempting to analyze them.
STH_relic_hunters.116.title: We have recovered many orbs of a dangerous nature!
STH_relic_hunters.117.a: Place them in the Primitive Armaments exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.117.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered several military artifacts! They appear to be weapons and armor made out of primitive materials that even our earliest armaments would penetrate.
STH_relic_hunters.117.title: We have recovered several intriguing weapons and armor!
STH_relic_hunters.118.a: Place it in the Primitive Armaments exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.118.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered an interesting weapon! It appears to be a 5-pointed curved blade made of a resilient material.
STH_relic_hunters.118.title: We have recovered an intriguing artifact!
STH_relic_hunters.119.a: Place it in the Primitive Clothing exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.119.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered an interesting artifact! It appears to be a communications badge with a weapon piecing a planet.
STH_relic_hunters.119.title: We have recovered an intriguing artifact!
STH_relic_hunters.120.a: Place it in the Primitive Clothing exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.120.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered an interesting artifact! It appears to be a communications badge with an avian hovering over a three-pointed star with a central V.
STH_relic_hunters.120.title: We have recovered an intriguing artifact!
STH_relic_hunters.121.a: Place them in the Primitive Armaments exhibit.
STH_relic_hunters.121.desc: After combing through the relics of the recent [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop.GetSpeciesName] acquisitions on [STH_relic_hunters_curating_pop_planet.GetName], we have recovered a pair of interesting weapons! They appear to be an ornate sword and an explosive projectile weapon.
STH_relic_hunters.121.title: We have recovered an intriguing pair of weapons!
STH_relic_hunters.201.a: Rule 34. War is good for business.
STH_relic_hunters.201.desc: Our study of the Ferengi Rules of Acquisition has finally borne fruit. One principle says that we should focus on supplying the necessary £ crews to power the warships of the [From.GetName]. With trained crews, our vessels operate more efficiently in space and the demand for weaponry and transport grows. This is entirely exemplified within one rule.
STH_relic_hunters.201.name: Reading Rules of Acquisition
STH_relic_hunters.202.a: Rule 18. A Ferengi without profit is no Ferengi at all.
STH_relic_hunters.202.desc: Our study of the Ferengi Rules of Acquisition has finally borne fruit. One principle says that we should focus on supplying the necessary £ latinum to ensure the [From.GetName] has enough working capital to operate with. With enough capital all our needs can be accomplished. This is entirely exemplified within one rule.
STH_relic_hunters.202.name: Reading Rules of Acquisition
STH_relic_hunters.203.a: Rule 23. Nothing is more important than your health - except for your money.
STH_relic_hunters.203.desc: Our study of the Ferengi Rules of Acquisition has finally borne fruit. One principle says that we should focus on ensuring the health of the population is maintained within the [From.GetName]. With enough healthy workers, profit is assured.
STH_relic_hunters.203.name: Reading Rules of Acquisition
STH_relic_hunters.204.a: Rule 214. Never begin a business negotiation on an empty stomach.
STH_relic_hunters.204.desc: Our study of the Ferengi Rules of Acquisition has finally borne fruit. One principle says that we should focus on ensuring a well fed population amongst the [From.GetName]. With enough £ food distributed amongst the workers, profit is assured.
STH_relic_hunters.204.name: Reading Rules of Acquisition
STH_relic_hunters.205.desc: Our study of the Ferengi Rules of Acquisition has finally borne fruit. One principle says that we should focus on ensuring that we can expand our influence throughout the galaxy. With enough £ influence our businesses can grow.
STH_relic_hunters.205.name: Reading Rules of Acquisition
STH_relic_hunters.206.desc: Our study of the Ferengi Rules of Acquisition has finally borne fruit. One principle says that we should focus on ensuring that we can expand our research and development throughout the [From.GetName]. With enough research our businesses can maintain their edge.
STH_relic_hunters.206.name: Reading Rules of Acquisition
STH_relic_hunters.207.a: Rule 217. You can't free a fish from water...
STH_relic_hunters.207.desc: Our study of the Ferengi Rules of Acquisition has finally borne fruit.One principle says that we should focus on ensuring that we have enough basic resources throughout the [From.GetName] to deal with thirst. With enough water our worlds can ensure the population never wants for something that is so common at home.
STH_relic_hunters.207.name: Reading Rules of Acquisition
STH_relic_hunters.2200.a: Return the Orb to the vault.
STH_relic_hunters.2200.desc_deaf: The Orb has been brought forth for a series of scientific experiments, but our researchers are still unable to explain what it is made of or what it does.They have, however, gathered valuable data which will be useful in a variety of scientific pursuits.
STH_relic_hunters.2200.desc_sensitive: The Orb has been brought forth for [Root.GetRulerName]'s examination. After an intense series of visions, filled with disjointed images and cryptic statements by people from [Root.GetRulerName]'s life, [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] emerges from the Orb experience with a greater sense of clarity.
STH_relic_hunters.2200.title: Orb Examination
STH_relic_hunters.301.desc:
The writings carved into the Kir'Shara are one of the highest examples of Vulcan philosophy.

One such section that has recently sparked a massive resurgence in our engineering divisions research reads similar to Kiri-Kin-Tha's teachings that 'Nothing unreal exists', a logical expression of how mathematics takes place abstractly. If you attempt to model something in reality with maths and logic then sometimes one can end up drawing absurd conclusions about reality itself.

By stating outright 'Nothing unreal exists' and accepting this as part of our philosophy, it serves as a reminder that as soon as we start thinking abstractly we lose relevance. It is not so much an axiom as a warning to unnecessary abstraction.
STH_relic_hunters.301.name: Teachings of Surak
STH_relic_hunters.302.desc:
The writings carved into the Kir'Shara are one of the highest examples of Vulcan philosophy.

One such section that has recently sparked a massive resurgence in our sociologists research reads similar to the teachings in the Kol-Ut-Shan, or more commonly known as IDIC - Infinite Diversity in Infinite Combinations. If you attempt to close off any part of diversity simply because you do not like it, you close off infinite possible combinations.

By embracing the Kol-Ut-Shan which symbolises the vast variables and elements in the galaxy that create truth and beauty, it serves as a reminder that we should not close ourselves off to any path just because it is different, and instead we should embrace the differences between us.
STH_relic_hunters.302.name: Teachings of Surak
STH_relic_hunters.303.desc:
The writings carved into the Kir'Shara are one of the highest examples of Vulcan philosophy.

One such section that has recently sparked a large following within our populace reiterates part of what we already teach - 'The needs of the many outweigh the needs of the few, or the one', one of the cornerstones of our philosophy.

By embracing this teaching we can ensure all who come to serve within the Vulcan Expeditionary Group or the Science Academy are serving the entirety of Vulcan. This should boost recruitment substantially.
STH_relic_hunters.303.name: Teachings of Surak
STH_relic_hunters.304.desc:
The writings carved into the Kir'Shara are one of the highest examples of Vulcan philosophy.

One such section that has recently sparked been discovered appears to be an early version of T'Plana-Hath's statement that 'Logic is the cement of our civilisation with which we ascend from chaos using reason as our guide'.

By understanding these teachings we can understand how the Vulcans ancestors and history have progressed to create the future we live in now. The logical extension of these teachings is that whilst logic may not solve all our problems, as long as it remains a foundation upon which we may build our society and research we may deepen our understanding of the universe.
STH_relic_hunters.304.name: Teachings of Surak
STH_relic_hunters.305.desc:
The writings carved into the Kir'Shara are one of the highest examples of Vulcan philosophy.

One such heavily damaged section that has recently been restored by a student has sparked a discussion stating that Logic is not the be all and end all of the Vulcan philosophy. It states that pure logic will make Vulcan's weak and helpless, something that their rituals and traditional Kahs-wan seeks to prevent.

The discovery of this section has caused members of society from all branches to return many luxuries to society and live out a more simple life.
STH_relic_hunters.305.name: Teachings of Surak
STH_relic_hunters.500.desc: The writings of 'The Never-Ending Sacrifice' are considered by many scholars to be the epitome of Cardassian literature and of the repetitive epic. The novel covers seven generations of the same family as they overcome the trials facing the Cardassian state as they live selfless lives working for the betterment of the State.
STH_relic_hunters.500.name: Literature Review
STH_relic_hunters.501.desc: The writings of 'Enigma Tales' by Shoggoth are considered by many scholars to be a fine example of mystery within the repetitive epic. The novel covers numerous suspects, all being found guilty of similar crimes, but the mystery lies in the discovery of who exactly was guilty of what.
STH_relic_hunters.501.name: Literature Review
STH_relic_hunters.502.desc: The wartime epic 'Meditations of a Crimson Shadow' by Eleta Preloc is considered to be a prime example of the collective state overcoming vast and vicious Empires across the galaxy, each more vicious and unruly than the last. The novel covers invasions of nearby Empires such as the United Federation of Planets and Klingons, and features propaganda in how it portrays how each seeks the destruction of the Cardassian Union.
STH_relic_hunters.502.name: Literature Review
STH_relic_hunters.600.desc_hasbroker: We have contracted a skilled and reliable broker, the [STH_relic_hunters_broker_country.GetName], to host the auction. They are only charging a modest commission fee. Which Relic shall we auction?
STH_relic_hunters.600.desc_nobroker: We are known as skilled and reliable brokers, so hosting our our own auction is no issue. Which Relic shall we auction?
STH_relic_hunters.600.r_meditations_on_a: Meditations On A Crimson Shadow - Min Bid:
STH_relic_hunters.600.r_sacred_chalice_o: Sacred Chalice of Rixx - Min Bid:
STH_relic_hunters.600.title: Auctioning A Relic
STH_relic_hunters.6000.desc_hasbroker: No bidder met the minumum bid for the relic, and so it has returned to our vaults. The [STH_relic_hunters_broker_country.GetName] are somewhat miffed that the relic did not attract as much attention as they expected.
STH_relic_hunters.6000.desc_nobroker: No bidder met the minumum bid for the relic, and so it has returned to our vaults.
STH_relic_hunters.6000.title: Auction Failed!
STH_relic_hunters.6000.unfortunate_recov: At least we recovered most of our expenses on this venture.
STH_relic_hunters.700.desc: If we want to plunder the wealth of the Galaxy, we must first select a target.
STH_relic_hunters.700.title: Select an Empire
STH_relic_hunters.7000.desc: The [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName] has hired a team of relic hunters to steal our cultural treasures! Fortunatly, our brave [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] forces were able to stop them!
STH_relic_hunters.7000.title: Attemted theft stopped!
STH_relic_hunters.7001.a: We must find out who did this!
STH_relic_hunters.7001.desc: A routine inspection of our vaults has discovered that one of our cultural relics has been stolen! Forensic examiners have turned up nothing!
STH_relic_hunters.7001.title: One of our cultural treasures was stolen!
STH_relic_hunters.7002.desc: The [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName] has hired a team of relic hunters to steal our cultural treasures! Our [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] forces were unable to stop them!
STH_relic_hunters.7002.title: One of our cultural treasures was stolen!
STH_relic_hunters.7003.desc: Our intelligence agency has uncovered that the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName] was the one who hired a team of relic hunters to steal our cultural treasures!
STH_relic_hunters.7003.title: We have discovered the thieves!
STH_relic_hunters.701.aquisitionsspecial: Ferengi are excellent negotiators and businessmen. Any bribes they attempt will almost always succeed. They are greedy, however, and may find ways of keeping some of the loot. They are also cowards, and will not do well in combat situations.(Specialist £ Infiltrators)
STH_relic_hunters.701.covertspecialists_: Breen are mysterious fighters and covert agents. They are more resillient than other infiltration groups. (Specialist £ Infiltrators)
STH_relic_hunters.701.desc: Now that we have decided to take the cultural riches of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], we must find persons of an adventurous and amoral nature that are willing to take the job. We have made contact with several groups, each with their own specialties:
STH_relic_hunters.701.inflitrators_desc: Infiltrators are good at stealthy incursions and have a ship that is outfitted for discrete insertions. They are more likely to remain undetected and determine genuine relics from fakes. They are not as good at brute force assaults and are unlikely to retrive heavily guarded relics.
STH_relic_hunters.701.informationspecial: Yridians are excellent spies and information brokers. They are more likely to find secret information or caches. They expect to be paid well, however, and may find ways of keeping some of the loot if they feel underpaid. (Specialist £ Infiltrators)
STH_relic_hunters.701.mercenaries_desc: Mercenaries are good at brute force assaults and have a ship that is outfitted for quick skirmishes. They are likely to breach the vault and recover loot, but may not be careful in what they take. They are not as good at infiltration and are likely to rat us out if they are paid more than what we pay them for the job.
STH_relic_hunters.701.piratespecialists_: Nausicaans are brutal pirates and raiders. They will win most skirmishes and situations requiring brute force. They are not very subtle or imaginative, however, and our involvement is more likely to be discovered. (Specialist £ Mercenaries)
STH_relic_hunters.701.raiderspecialists_: Members of the Orion Syndicate are ruthless smugglers and assassins. The team will have the support of any local Syndicate branches in any operations. However, the Syndicate will not tolerate any actions against itself or its allies. (Specialist £ Mercenaries)
STH_relic_hunters.701.title: Select a group of specialists
STH_relic_hunters.701.warriorspecialists: Klingons are honorable warriors and fighters. They will win most melee engagements and situations requiring brute force. They are not very subtle, however, and our involvement is more likely to be discovered. (Specialist £ Mercenaries)
STH_relic_hunters.701.wildcardspecialist: Humans are very diverse and resourceful. Their talents are widely varied: one group may be excellent fighters and scrappers, others may be good at stealth and deception. The specific talents of this particular group are unknown, other than that they usually get the job done. (Specialists with randomized stats, usually better than average)
STH_relic_hunters.702.desc: Now that we have selected a group of specialists to take the cultural riches of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], we must decide how much we want to pay them for the job, as well as how much backing (both financial and material) we wish to give them:
STH_relic_hunters.702.major_desc: Half now, half upon job completion.
STH_relic_hunters.702.minimal_desc: They should be glad for the job! Wretched scum!
STH_relic_hunters.702.moderate_desc: Give them a modest sum upon job completion.
STH_relic_hunters.702.ship_desc: A ship refitted with our latest weapons technologies and stealth devices will massively enhance their chances.
STH_relic_hunters.702.title: Select an Amount of Support
STH_relic_hunters.703.desc_infiltrators_: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWith the team assembled, hacking tools primed, documents forged, supplies procured, and ship ready, the team sets course for the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] to hopefully make a big score (and make their client happy as well!)
STH_relic_hunters.703.desc_mercenaries_s: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWith the team assembled, weapons loaded, explosives safely stored, supplies procured, and ship ready, the team sets course for the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] to hopefully make a big score (and make their client happy as well!)
STH_relic_hunters.703.title: They have set course for the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]...
STH_relic_hunters.704.desc_insertion_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having arrived near the borders of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], the team must now decide upon their insertion method to get past the border patrols:

As the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName] has open borders with the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], the team only needs to flag their ship appropriately.
STH_relic_hunters.705.desc_insertion_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having arrived near the borders of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], the team must now decide upon their insertion method to get past the border patrols:

The Team Lead has decided that the best course of action is to just cross the border, trying to avoid patrols and neutralizing any that they encounter.
STH_relic_hunters.706.desc_insertion_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having arrived near the borders of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], the team must now decide upon their insertion method to get past the border patrols:

The Team Lead has decided that the best course of action is to bribe a border control officer at a nearby station, utilizing an underworld contact. This will allow them to slip through the sensor grid and not appear on any logs.
STH_relic_hunters.707.desc_insertion_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having arrived near the borders of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], the team must now decide upon their insertion method to get past the border patrols:

The Team Lead has decided that the best course of action is to watch the patrol routes and look for an opening to slip through.
STH_relic_hunters.708.desc_insertion_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having arrived near the borders of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName], the team must now decide upon their insertion method to get past the border patrols:

The Team Lead has decided that the best course of action is pass the ship off as a foreign-flagged trading vessel.
STH_relic_hunters.711.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team's ship was able to slip past most border patrols and neutralized one ship that managed to spot them before it sent off a distress call.
STH_relic_hunters.712.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they surrendered. Fortunatly, the captain managed to scrub the computers of our involvement, and the crew convinced the naval officers of a border misunderstanding. They were released on the condition that they not return.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew died when the ship was destroyed.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they surrendered. Even worse, the captain told the navy officers who sent them! They were arrested and the ship impounded.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.713.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe negotiations went swiftly and the border control officer promised the team a window of time where a section of the sensor grid would undergo some unscheduled diagnostics, bringing them offline. The team waited for the window to occur and slipped through.
STH_relic_hunters.714.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just finished transferring the bribe funds to the border control officer when a suprise inspection occurred! The officer was detained, and the team barely managed to evade the responding customs patrols. They will not be able to bribe anyone else in the near future.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just finished transferring the bribe funds to the border control officer when a suprise inspection occurred! The officer was detained, and the team's ship was unable to evade the responding customs patrols. The ship was disabled and boarded. The crew were arrested and the captain told the navy officers who sent them!
STH_relic_hunters.715.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team's ship was able to slip past most border patrols. There was one tense moment where a patrol ship appeared to turn towards them, and the captain had to cut all power to reduce emissions, but then the patrol ship turned away. The bridge crew breathed a sigh of relief, then continued onwards.
STH_relic_hunters.716.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they surrendered. Fortunatly, the captain managed to scrub the computers of our involvement, and the crew convinced the naval officers of a border misunderstanding. They were released on the condition that they not return.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. Fortunatly, the captain managed to scrub the computers of our involvement. However, the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew died when the ship was destroyed.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they surrendered. Even worse, the captain told the navy officers who sent them! They were arrested and the ship impounded.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.717.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team was able to pass off the ship as a foreign-flagged trading vessel to customs inspectors. There was one tense moment when they asked to inspect the cargo hold, but a quick bribe was able to handle that problem.
STH_relic_hunters.718.desc_insertion_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a customs guard demanded that they stop for inspection. Their ship was no match for them, so they complied. Fortunatly, the captain managed to scrub the computers of our involvement, and the crew stayed silent after the cargo inspectors discovered and confiscated the infiltration gear. They were released on the condition that they not return. Their transponder was logged, and the crew had to use most available funds for bribes to avoid being arrested.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely passed through the border when a customs guard demanded that they stop for inspection. Their ship was no match for them, so they complied. The cargo inspectors discovered and confiscated the infiltration gear. Even worse, the captian told the navy officers who sent them! They were arrested and the ship impounded.
STH_relic_hunters.719.desc_infiltrators_: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough stealth or guile, the team has managed to get past the borders and is now orbiting [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the most likely location for the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].
STH_relic_hunters.719.desc_mercenaries_l: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough strength or cunning, the team has managed to get past the borders and is now orbiting [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the most likely location for the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].
STH_relic_hunters.719.landing: They will make a safe landing soon...
STH_relic_hunters.719.title: Insertion Phase Successful!
STH_relic_hunters.720.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

As the [STH_relic_hunters_ferengi_country.GetName] has a local branch office, the team will consult with the local Sub-Nagus to gain useful information.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

As the [STH_relic_hunters_karemman_country.GetName] has a local branch office, the team will consult with the local Head Trader to gain useful information.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]

As the [STH_relic_hunters_yridian_country.GetName] has a local branch office, the team will consult with the local Head Broker to gain useful information.
STH_relic_hunters.720.hopeful: Hopefully they will be willing to help the team...
STH_relic_hunters.721.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action, until another option presents itself, is to interrogate random citizens about where their government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.722.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to seek temporary off-the-record employment as guards or security consultants to find out where the government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.723.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action, until another option presents itself, is to slowly infiltrate the city networks, keeping to the shadows and trying to find out about where the government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.724.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to seek employment in cultural institutions and museums to find out where the government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.725.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and paying several bribes to meet the correct people, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Sub-Nagus. They approved of the heist and directed the team to the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAs full-blooded Ferengi, the wise decision is to pay (literally) respects to the Sub-Nagus, and in return gain the full support of the local Ferengi branch office. The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] was immediately located, and the local Sub-Nagus gave the team insights into local trading customs and laws, as well as several corrupt officals of interest who may be persuaded to part with some cultural treasures.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and selling off some cargo, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Head Trader. They directed the team to the main [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and participating in some Tsunkatse matches, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Arena Controller. They directed the team to the main [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and committing several crimes to establish trust, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Boss. They gave permission for the heist and directed the team to the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAs card-carrying members of the Syndicate, the team has gained the full support of the local Syndicate branch office. The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] was immediately located, and the local Boss gave the team more powerful weapons, schematics of the building, and credentials for the outer layers of the defences.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and telling the local brokers some juicy rumors, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Head Broker. They gave permission for the heist and directed the team to the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAs full-blooded Yridians, the best decision is to inform the Head Broker of the heist, and in return gain the full support of the local Yridian branch office. The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] was immediately located, and the local Head Broker gave the team blackmail material on the facility guards, credentials for the inner layers of the defences, and concrete rumours of a secret inner vault inside of the original.
STH_relic_hunters.725.title: The local branch office was helpful!
STH_relic_hunters.726.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter several unhelpful rounds of interrogation, the team was able to catch a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetSpeciesName] maintainence worker that is employed at the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]. After disposing of the last witness, the team heads out. A trail of bodies was left behind them...
STH_relic_hunters.727.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started interrogating a random citizen when they were spotted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! They managed to kill the officers before they reported the disturbance. The team needs to be more cautious...

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started interrogating a random citizen when they were spotted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! They were unable to kill the officers before they reported the fight. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started interrogating a random citizen when they were spotted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! They were unable to kill the officers before they reported the fight. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the rest of the team were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.728.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team was able to find employment in a number of minor bodyguard and security guard roles, until their last employer mentioned that a position recently opened up at a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]. The team suits up and heads over to inquire about the position.
STH_relic_hunters.729.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just started talking with their prospective employer when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! The job was a sting operation to flush out petty criminals, and the team has gotten caught up in it! Fortunatly, the team was able to shoot their way out, but now they are being hunted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just started talking with their prospective employer when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! The job was a sting operation to flush out petty criminals, and the team has gotten caught up in it! The team was unable to shoot their way out, and were captured! The team lead told the interrogators about our involvement!
STH_relic_hunters.730.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team spends weeks perusing a number of news and information sites about where [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetSpeciesNamePlural] store their cultural artifacts. The team was able to discover the exact location of a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] on a poorly configured site that stores information on the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] and its cultural history.
STH_relic_hunters.731.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started infiltrating the network when they were discovered by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] counterintelligence programs! They managed to disable them before they reported the intrusion. The team needs to be more cautious...

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started infiltrating the network when they were discovered by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] counterintelligence programs! They were unable to disable them before they reported the intrusion. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started infiltrating the network when they were discovered by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] counterintelligence programs! They were unable to disable them before they reported the intrusion. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the rest of the team were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.732.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team was able to find employment in a number of entry level museum positions, until their last employer mentioned that a position recently opened up at a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]. The team suits up and heads over to inquire about the position.
STH_relic_hunters.733.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just finished their first few days of work in a museum when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! Some of the team members had been flagged in a late background check, and therefore [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] dug further and was going to bring them in for questioning! Fortunatly, the team was able to shoot their way out, but now they are being hunted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just finished their first few days of work in a museum when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! Some of the team members had been flagged in a late background check, and therefore [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] dug further and was going to bring them in for questioning! The team was unable to shoot their way out, and were captured! The team lead told the interrogators about our involvement!
STH_relic_hunters.734.desc_infiltrators_: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough stealth or guile, the team has managed to locate a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]. They must now prepare for the day of the heist.
STH_relic_hunters.734.desc_mercenaries_l: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough strength or cunning, the team has managed to locate a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]. They must now prepare for the day of the heist.
STH_relic_hunters.734.title: Location Phase Successful!
STH_relic_hunters.735.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team has gained the support of the local Ferengi branch office, and therefore will be conducting a targeted negotiation, bribing key officials and removing problematic individuals to effectively purchase an extended lease on the relics inside the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team has gained the support of the local Syndicate branch office, and therefore will be conducting a night raid, neutralizing key guards and utilizing stolen credentials and codes to access the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team has gained the support of the local Yridian branch office, and therefore will be conducting a night raid, blackmailing key guards and utilizing stolen credentials and codes to access the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName].
STH_relic_hunters.736.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to make a direct assault on the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] and plant explosives on the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.737.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to utilize the contacts gained through their recent security work. They would replace or neutralize key guards of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] and plant explosives on the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.738.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to make a night assault on the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]: distract the guards, disrupt communications, and hack the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.739.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to utilize the contacts gained through their recent cultural work. They would impersonate an important member of the government archive and use their credentials to open the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.740.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were gracious escorts to the negotiation team, along with the host official, who made sure that they were welcome on the tour of the facility. As the vault doors opened, everyone gasped in awe as a treasure trove of cultural artifacts was revealed. Then copious amount of latinum were exchanged, secret account numbers revealed and many artifacts and precious materials were moved to the ship for further study. The team quickly regrouped at their ship and prepared to take off.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were taken down silently and swiftly, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. The vault doors opened after using stolen credentials, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were mysteriously absent, and the inner defences appeared to be malfunctioning minutes later. The vault doors opened after using stolen credentials, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. A careful search revealed a hidden door, leading to a secondary vault further in! The team gathered everything they could get their hands on, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.741.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were gracious escorts to the negotiation team, along with the host official, who made sure that they were welcome on the tour of the facility. As the vault doors openend, everyone gasped in awe as a treasure trove of cultural artifacts was revealed. However, from behind display cases and exhibits arose [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! The corrupt official was not so corrupt after all! The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were taken down silently and swiftly, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were mysteriously absent, and the inner defences appeared to be malfunctioning minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement!
STH_relic_hunters.742.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were not expecting the swift and sudden assault on the front entrance, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. The vault doors were blown open with a hefty amount of explosives, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.743.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards were not expecting the swift and sudden assault on the front entrance, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards were not expecting the swift and sudden assault on the front entrance, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, told interrogators of our involvement, then were subsequently executed!
STH_relic_hunters.744.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were not expecting the swift and sudden assault from within, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. The vault doors were blown open with a hefty amount of explosives, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.

The perimeter guards were not expecting the swift and sudden assault from within, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement.
STH_relic_hunters.746.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were called to respond to an incident nearby, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. The vault doors opened after some intense hacking, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.747.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards were called to respond to an incident nearby, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors failed to open even after intense hacking attempts, and were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards were called to respond to an incident nearby, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors failed to open even after intense hacking attempts, and were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire. The team was captured by the quick response forces, told interrogators of our involvement, then were subsequently executed.
STH_relic_hunters.748.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards accepted the team member's credentials, and the inner defences did not fire on them. The vault doors opened after entering their credentials, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team member obtained the most important looking relic, then attempted to walk out. Any questions asked were quickly deflected or justified using false transfer papers. They quickly returned to the ship and the team prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.749.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards accepted the team member's credentials, and the inner defences did not fire on them. However, the team member did not expect the person they were impersonating arrive just before them to inspect the vault! The team member was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement. The rest of the team attempted to flee on the ship, but were also caught by responding patrol ships.
STH_relic_hunters.750.desc_infiltrators_: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough stealth or guile, the team has managed to loot a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]! They were able to escape the planet without being detected, and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName]. The team eagerly sifts through the loot they have gathered...
STH_relic_hunters.750.desc_mercenaries_e: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough strength or cunning, the team has managed to loot a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]! They were able to escape the planet in the ensuing mayhem, and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName]. The team eagerly sifts through the loot they have gathered...
STH_relic_hunters.750.title: Execution Phase Successful!
STH_relic_hunters.751.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWhile sifting through the loot, one of the relics appears to be damaged during the return to the ship. Upon closer examination, it is revealed to be a fake artifact! Frantic examination of the rest of the loot turns up only a few real relics in the entire haul! Even worse, some time after the ship leaves orbit of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], some enemy ships appear in pursuit!
STH_relic_hunters.751.trackers: Hopefully they can escape their pursuers...
STH_relic_hunters.752.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWhile sifting through the loot, one of the relics appears to be damaged during the return to the ship. Upon closer examination, it is revealed to be a fake artifact! Frantic examination of the rest of the loot turns up only a few real relics in the entire haul! Fortunately, the ship was able to evade any patrols after leaving orbit of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName].
STH_relic_hunters.753.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWhile sifting through the loot, one of the relics appears to be damaged during the return to the ship. Upon closer examination, it is revealed to have a tracker attached to it! Frantic examination of the rest of the loot turns up several other relics with trackers! While the techincal team members work on disabling the trackers without damaging the artifacts, some enemy ships appear in pursuit!
STH_relic_hunters.753.title: They are tracking us!
STH_relic_hunters.753.trackers: Hopefully they can escape their pursuers...
STH_relic_hunters.754.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAll of the artifacts grabbed by the the team appear genuine. The team was able to evade any patrols after leaving orbit of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName].
STH_relic_hunters.755.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter evading or destroying the pursuit ships, and tossing all of the fake relics into space (of which at least one had a tracking device), the team breathes a sigh of relief after slipping through the border.
STH_relic_hunters.756.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! They were arrested and the ship impounded.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.757.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter evading or destroying the pursuit ships, and disabling all known trackers, the team breathes a sigh of relief after slipping through the border.
STH_relic_hunters.758.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! They were arrested, the ship was impounded, and the stolen artifacts were returned.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.759.desc_team_rewards_: After returning to [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName], the team was given their pay, and the haul placed in the appropriate vaults. The fact that the team was duped by fake artifacts means that they will not be hired again.

After returning to [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName], the team was given their pay, and the haul placed in the appropriate vaults. The team went their seperate ways to enjoy their portion of the loot. The relics that were recovered are put away in a secret vault.
STH_relic_hunters.759.title: A Successful Heist!
STH_relic_hunters.8001.desc: We have obtained the cultural relics of the [LastKilledCountryName] to be placed in out vaults!
STH_relic_hunters.8001.title: We have gained their cultural relics
STH_relic_hunters.relic_auction.desc_has: The auction has concluded! The [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country_cultural_owner.GetName] is now the proud owner of the [STH_relic_hunters_selling_country.GetAuctionedRelicName]. The [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country_cultural_owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural] people are grateful for the return of their heritage! This auction has improved the influence of the [STH_relic_hunters_broker_country.GetName] in the financial world, as well as making them a tidy profit.

The auction has concluded! The [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country.GetName] is now the proud owner of the [STH_relic_hunters_selling_country.GetAuctionedRelicName]. This auction has improved the influence of the [STH_relic_hunters_broker_country.GetName] in the financial world, as well as making them a tidy profit.

The auction has concluded! The [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country.GetName] is now the proud owner of the [STH_relic_hunters_selling_country.GetAuctionedRelicName]. The [STH_relic_hunters_cultural_owner_country.GetName] have learned of the auction and are angered at the sale of their cultural heritage(and of being outbid)! This auction has improved the influence of the [STH_relic_hunters_broker_country.GetName] in the financial world, as well as making them a tidy profit.

STH_relic_hunters.relic_auction.hasbroke: Good that we got rid of the [STH_relic_hunters_selling_country.GetAuctionedRelicName] then...
STH_relic_hunters.relic_auction.nobroker: This has been very profitable for us!
This has been very profitable! The [STH_relic_hunters_cultural_owner_country.GetName] should have bid higher.
This has been very profitable for us, and good for the [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country_cultural_owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural]!
STH_relic_hunters.relic_auction.title: Auction Concluded
STH_relic_hunters.steal_event.fail_detec: They may have recovered some of our technologies from the ship...
STH_relic_hunters.steal_event.title_inse: They have arrived near the borders of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]...
STH_relic_hunters.steal_event.tryagain: They may try again using a different approach...
STH_relics_flavour.1000.desc: La radiación metafásica única dentro del cinturón que rodea el planeta de Ba'ku ofrece posibilidades dramáticas de extensión de vida y regeneración de heridas. \n\nUn colector metafásico ha sido diseñado para lanzar un conjunto de inyector que iniciará una reacción termolítica en la radiación, permitiendo la partículas para ser cosechadas, aunque con una pequeña posibilidad de hacer que el planeta sea inhabitable.
STH_relics_flavour.1000.name: Colector de Partículas Metafásicas
STH_relics_flavour.1001.desc: El uso del inyector modificado en las altas concentraciones de radiación metafásica dentro de los anillos de Ba'ku ha proporcionado una gran cantidad de partículas metafásicas que se pueden utilizar para avanzar en la ciencia médica y extender la vida útil a través de [Root.GetName].
STH_relics_flavour.1001.name: Reacción termolítica
STH_relics_flavour.101.a: rupo 34. La guerra es buena para los negocios.
STH_relics_flavour.101.desc: Nuestro estudio de las antiguas Reglas de Adquisiciones que han formado la base de nuestra civilización durante siglos finalmente ha dado sus frutos. ¡Nuestro principio rector a lo largo del Gran Río Material debería centrarse en suministrar el necesario £ crew £ crews para impulsar los buques de guerra de [From.GetName]. Con tripulaciones capacitadas, nuestras embarcaciones operan de manera más eficiente en el espacio y la demanda de armamento y transporte crece. Esto se ejemplifica por completo dentro de una regla.
STH_relics_flavour.101.name: Lectura Rules of Acquisition
STH_relics_flavour.102.a: rupo 18. Un Ferengi sin ganancias no es Ferengi en absoluto.
STH_relics_flavour.102.desc: Nuestro estudio de las antiguas Reglas de Adquisiciones que han formado la base de nuestra civilización durante siglos finalmente ha dado sus frutos. ¡Nuestro principio rector a lo largo del Gran Río Material debería centrarse en suministrar el necesario £ latinum £ latinum para garantizar que [From.GetName] tenga suficiente capital de trabajo para operar. Con suficiente capital se pueden cumplir todas nuestras necesidades. Esto se ejemplifica por completo dentro de una regla.
STH_relics_flavour.102.name: Lectura Rules of Acquisition
STH_relics_flavour.103.a: rupo 23. Nada es más importante que su salud, excepto su dinero.
STH_relics_flavour.103.desc: Nuestro estudio de las antiguas Reglas de Adquisiciones que han formado la base de nuestra civilización durante siglos finalmente ha dado sus frutos. Nuestros principios rectores deben centrarse en garantizar que la salud de la población se mantenga dentro de [From.GetName]. Con suficientes trabajadores sanos, el beneficio está asegurado. El Gran Río Material nos proveerá.
STH_relics_flavour.103.name: Lectura Rules of Acquisition
STH_relics_flavour.104.a: rupo 214. Nunca comience una negociación comercial con el estómago vacío.
STH_relics_flavour.104.desc: Nuestro estudio de las antiguas Reglas de Adquisiciones que han formado la base de nuestra civilización durante siglos finalmente ha dado sus frutos. Nuestros principios rectores deben centrarse en garantizar una población bien alimentada entre [From.GetName]. Con suficiente £ food £ food distribuido entre los trabajadores, el beneficio está asegurado. El Gran Río Material nos proveerá.
STH_relics_flavour.104.name: Lectura Rules of Acquisition
STH_relics_flavour.105.desc: Nuestro estudio de las antiguas Reglas de Adquisiciones que han guiado a nuestra civilización durante siglos finalmente ha dado sus frutos. Nuestros principios rectores deben centrarse en garantizar que podamos expandir nuestra influencia en toda la galaxia. Con suficiente £ influencia £ influence Nuestros negocios pueden crecer. El Gran Río Material nos proveerá.
STH_relics_flavour.105.name: Lectura Rules of Acquisition
STH_relics_flavour.106.a: rupo 74. El conocimiento es igual a la ganancia.
STH_relics_flavour.106.desc: Nuestro estudio de las antiguas Reglas de Adquisiciones que han formado la base de nuestra civilización durante siglos finalmente ha dado sus frutos. Nuestros principios rectores deben centrarse en garantizar que podamos expandir nuestra investigación y desarrollo a lo largo de [From.GetName]. Con suficiente investigación, nuestras empresas pueden mantener su ventaja. El Gran Río Material nos proveerá.
STH_relics_flavour.106.name: Lectura Rules of Acquisition
STH_relics_flavour.107.a: §¡Regla 217. No se puede liberar a un pez del agua...
STH_relics_flavour.107.desc: Nuestro estudio de las antiguas Reglas de Adquisiciones que han formado la base de nuestra civilización durante siglos finalmente ha dado sus frutos. Nuestros principios rectores deben centrarse en garantizar que tengamos suficientes recursos básicos en todo [From.GetName] para hacer frente a la sed. Con suficiente agua, nuestros mundos pueden garantizar que la población nunca quiera algo que es tan común en el hogar. El Gran Río Material nos proveerá.
STH_relics_flavour.107.name: Lectura Rules of Acquisition
STH_relics_flavour.1300.b: ¡Cómprelo y luego desglose para descubrir cómo funciona!
STH_relics_flavour.1300.c: Una subasta privada podría generarnos grandes ganancias aquí.
STH_relics_flavour.1300.desc: Un comerciante humanoide se acercó a uno de los puestos avanzados de comercio de [Root.GetName] y nos ofreció un artefacto que supuestamente puede doblar el tiempo durante un período determinado. De dónde vino el artefacto o cómo funciona es un misterio. \n\n¿Qué debemos hacer?
STH_relics_flavour.1300.name: Comerciante que pasa
STH_relics_flavour.1301.b: ¡La herramienta perfecta para un atraco a un banco!
STH_relics_flavour.1301.c: Encuentra traidores dentro de las filas.
STH_relics_flavour.1301.d: Derrota a los retadores de liderazgo en combate.
STH_relics_flavour.1301.desc: El poder de doblar el tiempo, aunque dentro de una ventana límite, nos ofrece la capacidad única de lograr objetivos que de otra manera serían imposibles. \n\n [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] los asesores han brindado numerosas opciones para el portador del dispositivo donde un ciclo de tiempo podría ser extremadamente efectivo.
STH_relics_flavour.1301.f: Los cristales de tiempo deben ser nutridos, no explotados.
STH_relics_flavour.1301.name: Dispositivo de cristal de tiempo
STH_relics_flavour.1302.desc: Después del estrés de su uso reciente, el dispositivo de cristal de tiempo parece haberse fracturado, fragmentando su energía varias veces. El dispositivo se ha vuelto inútil.
STH_relics_flavour.1302.name: Dispositivo de cristal de tiempo destruido
STH_relics_flavour.1303.desc:
El dispositivo de cristal de tiempo ha demostrado ser invaluable, permitiendo a nuestro agente eludir todas las medidas de seguridad de un banco privado fuera del mundo. 

 Al derrotar las cerraduras magnéticas y memorizar y recitar el código de diez mil dígitos, se omitieron todas las defensas de la bóveda permitiendo el transporte de todos los bienes contenidos, algunos de los cuales son obras invaluables de cientos de civilizaciones. 

 El tesoro ha llegado a [Root.Capital.GetName] y está listo para [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] 's lectura concienzuda.
STH_relics_flavour.1303.name: Robo de dispositivo de cristal de tiempo
STH_relics_flavour.1304.desc:
El dispositivo de cristal de tiempo ha demostrado ser invaluable, lo que permite a nuestro agente eludir todas las medidas de seguridad menos estrictas de un banco privado fuera del mundo. 

 Al derrotar las cerraduras magnéticas y los escáneres visuales, se omitieron las defensas de la bóveda exterior permitiendo el transporte de algunos del latinum dentro. 

 El botín ha llegado a [Root.Capital.GetName] y está listo para el examen de [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName].
STH_relics_flavour.1304.name: Robo de dispositivo de cristal de tiempo
STH_relics_flavour.1305.desc:
El dispositivo de cristal de tiempo ha demostrado ser invaluable, lo que permite a nuestro agente eludir todas las medidas de seguridad menos estrictas de un banco privado fuera del mundo. 

 Al derrotar las cerraduras magnéticas y los escáneres visuales, se omitieron las defensas de la bóveda exterior permitiendo el transporte de algunos Sin embargo, la alarma se activó antes de que todo el botín pudiera ser transportado. 

 El agente recibió una herida y dañó el dispositivo de cristal de tiempo, que está siendo examinado para determinar si la explosión ha causado un daño irreparable.
STH_relics_flavour.1305.name: Robo de dispositivo de cristal de tiempo
STH_relics_flavour.1306.desc:
El dispositivo de cristal de tiempo ha demostrado ser invaluable, permitiendo que [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] cuestione y desafíe repetidamente a todos aquellos en el círculo interno del gobierno, determinando mentiras y falsedades. 

Determinando quién está trabajando para quién , y en quién se puede confiar activamente, [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] ha iniciado una purga de todos los miembros desleales del gobierno. 

Los leales dentro de las filas ahora garantizarán que la estabilidad sea alta entre la población durante los próximos años. .
STH_relics_flavour.1306.name: Interrogatorios de cristal de tiempo
STH_relics_flavour.1307.desc:
El dispositivo de cristal de tiempo ha demostrado ser invaluable, permitiendo que [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] cuestione y desafíe repetidamente a algunos de los miembros del círculo interno del gobierno, determinando mentiras y falsedades. 

Determinando quién está trabajando para quién , y en quién se puede confiar activamente, [Root.GetLeaderTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] ha iniciado una purga de algunos miembros desleales del gobierno. 

Los leales dentro de las filas ahora asegurarán que la estabilidad sea alta entre la población durante los próximos años. .
STH_relics_flavour.1307.name: Interrogatorios de cristal de tiempo
STH_relics_flavour.1308.desc:
El dispositivo de cristal de tiempo ha demostrado ser valioso, permitiendo que [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] cuestione y desafíe repetidamente a algunos de los miembros del círculo interno del gobierno, en un esfuerzo por determinar mentiras y falsedades. 

 Desafortunadamente el dispositivo resultó dañado en un accidente, y la deslealtad no descubierta dentro de los detalles de seguridad asignados para purgar a los traidores ha permitido que muchos escapen al subsuelo. 

Estos traidores trabajarán activamente contra [Root.GetName] durante los próximos años.
STH_relics_flavour.1308.name: Interrogatorios de cristal de tiempo
STH_relics_flavour.1309.desc:
