Captain [leader.GetName] ordena que se abra un canal e introduce [leader.GetHerHim] self. Un extraterrestre corto y rotundo aparece en la pantalla de visualización. 

'Aha? el alienígena responde. 

'Has transmitido una señal de socorro, ¿necesitas ayuda? ' 

'Aha? ', responde el alienígena una vez más. 

'¿Cuál es la naturaleza de su problema? ' El capitán [líder. GetName] pregunta con impaciencia. 

 'Estamos embalados, nuestro barco es el Mondor, busca cosas, cosas que hacen que nuestro barco vuelva a funcionar. ¿Ayudas a reparar quizás?
STH_samaritan_snare_event.1.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.10.desc:
¿Sabes lo grande ques es la flota [Root.Owner.GetName]? Tenemos mil naves para cada uno de los suyos. Libera a nuestro Capitán ahora o sufre las consecuencias. El Primer Oficial transmite sombríamente su amenaza al Capitán Pakled, quien frunce el ceño con ira. 

'¡No somos tontos! él grita, mientras dibuja su disruptor y vaporiza al Capitán [líder.GetName]. 

El disparo continúa a través del mamparo en un chorro de fuego. Momentos después, toda la nave explota, matando a todos a bordo.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.10.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.100.a: Programe un diagnóstico de nivel cinco.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.100.desc: La nave abandonada parece no haber sido más que una falla del sensor.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.100.name: Fracaso
STH_samaritan_snare_event.11.c: Base de datos de investigación de demanda.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.11.desc: La nave Pakled fue reparada principalmente a través de los esfuerzos del Capitán [leader.GetName]. Parece listo para mudarse, luego de que no pudieron retener a su rehén.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.11.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.2.desc:
El Capitán [leader.GetName] se ha unido al equipo visitante que repara la nave Pakled. 

Mientras a bordo [leader.GetSheHe] descubre que los bancos de datos de la nave contienen datos científicos extensos sobre esta región del espacio. Dada la variedad de formatos de codificación, incluido al menos un protocolo clasificado [Root.Owner.GetName], es probable que los datos sean robados de varias especies. 

El Capitán reflexiona si confrontar al Pakled sobre los datos o abandonar las reparaciones.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.2.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.3.desc: El jefe de transporte del [Root.GetName] transporta al Capitán [leader.GetName] y al equipo de reparación de vuelta a bordo, penetrando en un campo de amortiguación configurado rápidamente establecido por el Pakled. \n\nDespués de varias transmisiones que exigen el regreso del equipo de reparación la nave Pakled intenta atacar el [Root.GetName]. Sin embargo, el daño al vaso es extenso a pesar de las reparaciones, y el vaso explota tras la ruptura de sus bobinas de inducción disruptoras primarias.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.3.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.4.desc: El jefe de transporte del [Root.GetName] transporta a la tripulación de reparación de regreso a bordo, sin embargo, un campo de amortiguación configurado apresuradamente establecido por Pakled impide el regreso del Capitán. \n\nEl Capitán Pakled transmite una advertencia a [Root.GetName]: el Capitán debe completar las reparaciones a su nave solo, o ser asesinado.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.4.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.5.desc:
El Capitán [leader.GetName] acusa al Capitán Pakled de haber robado datos del [Root.Owner.GetName]. El alienígena se ríe mientras saca una pistola disruptora, vaporizando a un miembro del equipo de reparación. 

Capitán [leader.GetName] ordena al jefe de transportadores de [Root.GetName] que lleve al resto del equipo de reparación a bordo. A medida que el equipo regresa con éxito, un campo de amortiguación configurado apresuradamente establecido por Pakled evita el regreso del Capitán. 

El Capitán Pakled transmite una advertencia a [Root.GetName]: el Capitán debe completar las reparaciones a su nave solo, o ser asesinado.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.5.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.6.b: Intento de intimidar a los Pakled.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.6.desc: El Capitán [leader.GetName] se ve obligado a proceder solo con las reparaciones a la nave Pakled. Dado el estado precario del núcleo de urdimbre de la nave, la acción directa podría resultar desastrosa y destruir la nave junto con el Capitán.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.6.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.7.desc:
Tú Pakled eres ... no estúpido'. dice el primer oficial al capitán embalado en la pantalla de visualización de [Root.GetName]. El Capitán Pakled hace una pausa por un momento. 

'No. No, no somos estúpidos. el responde. 

'Usted ha pensado y derrotado. Tienes a nuestro capitán. Respetamos su fuerza y astucia. 

'Sí, somos FUERTES y muy ... ¡astutos! el Pakled está de acuerdo. 

'Bueno, te damos todo nuestro Dilithium y el contenido de nuestros bancos de datos, a cambio de nuestro Capitán. Baja tus escudos y te los enviaremos. 

La nave Pakled baja sus escudos, y momentos después el Capitán [líder.GetName] está a salvo a bordo de [Root.GetName]. Sin intención de pagar el rescate, [Root.GetName] abandona el área.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.7.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.8.desc:
Tú Pakled eres ... no estúpido'. dice el primer oficial al capitán embalado en la pantalla de visualización de [Root.GetName]. El Capitán Pakled hace una pausa por un momento. 

'No. No, no somos estúpidos. el responde. 

'Usted ha pensado y derrotado. Tienes a nuestro capitán. Respetamos su fuerza y astucia. 

'Sí, somos FUERTES y muy ... ¡astutos! el Pakled está de acuerdo. 

'Bueno, te damos todo nuestro Dilithium y el contenido de nuestros bancos de datos, a cambio de nuestro Capitán. Baja tus escudos y te los enviaremos. 

El Capitán Pakled se ríe: "¡No somos estúpidos!" mientras dibuja su disruptor y vaporiza al Capitán [leader.GetName]. 

El disparo continúa a través del mamparo en un chorro de fuego. Momentos después, toda la nave explota, matando a todos a bordo.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.8.name: Snare samaritano
STH_samaritan_snare_event.9.desc:
¿Sabes lo grande que es la flota [Root.Owner.GetName]? Tenemos mil naves para cada uno de los suyos. Libera a nuestro Capitán ahora o sufre las consecuencias. El Primer Oficial transmite sombríamente su amenaza al Capitán Pakled, quien frunce el ceño preocupado. 

'Sí. Sí, eres fuerte ... "murmura, antes de bajar los escudos de la nave. 

Captain [leader.GetName] se transmite con éxito a bordo de [Root.GetName], donde [leader.GetSheHe] ordena al timón que continúe con el próximo objetivo de la encuesta.
STH_samaritan_snare_event.9.name: Snare samaritano
STH_science.10.e: Recruit Scientists from the Science Division.
STH_science.10.name: Starfleet Science and Engineering
STH_science.1010.desc: Qa'pla [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] welcome to our science facility. This is where we coordinate our scientific efforts which aid the Klingon war machine against its enemies.
STH_science.1010.name: Klingon War and Science Facility
STH_science.1020.desc: This is where we set the focus of our research efforts to better ensure the Klingon Empire has the tools to defeat our enemies.
STH_science.1020.name: Research Focus
STH_science.20.desc: This department is responsible for setting a research focus which provides our scientists with important research bonus which last for a considerable time. However whilst we are focusing, we are unable to work on any other projects.
STH_science.20.name: Research Focus Department
STH_science.200.desc: This department is responsible for transferring scientists that are currently working at our orbital facility into the fleet to serve on the front lines. Scientists are only available to transfer for a short period of time before they become indispensable to the projects they are engaged in.
STH_science.2020.name: Romulan Ministry of Science
STH_science.210.desc: Julian Bashir was born in late 2341. Originally named 'Jules', he changed his name, at age 15, to 'Julian'. Although not an especially bright child his rise to the top of his profession was exceptional.\n\nOne of the very best in his class, Bashir could have the pick of any position within the fleet.
STH_science.212.desc: Great minds are said to be born and not made, either way the introduction of this new scientist into our fleet will bolster our advancement or exploration abilities.
STH_science.300.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle], welcome to our R&D department, where crucial technologies can be added to our research options or researched at our orbital facilities.
STH_science.300.dosi.tooltip: Unlocks the unique Dosi technology: Hostile Negotiations.
STH_science.300.eleos.tooltip: SS Eleos as seen in ST:PIC S3 refit of the science ship.
STH_science.300.eleos: Research the Phoenix Class Science Ship.
STH_science.300.future: Research the Pathfinder, Polaris and Excalibur Class.
STH_science.300.kar.tooltip: Unlocks the unique Karemma building technology: Karemman Outposts.
STH_science.300.kar: Unlock the Karemma Outposts Research Option.
STH_science.300.rav: Research the Raven Class Science Ship.
STH_science.300.spore: Investigate the potential of Spore Technology.
STH_science.300.xah.tooltip: Unlocks the Xahean Dilithium mastery technology, which can provide a boost to your dilithium production.
STH_science.3020.name: Dominion Sciences
STH_science.310.desc: The Raven Class science ship is now available to be built via our Utopia Planitia Shipyards. A small civilian ship of Federation design.
STH_science.310.name: Raven Class Science Ship
STH_science.311.desc: With the assistance of the team of scientists from Xahea we have made a major breakthrough in the field of Dilithium production. The Dilithium incubation Technology is now available for our scientists to productionize from the prototype that has been created in our labs.
STH_science.311.name: Xahean Dilithium Manufacturing
STH_science.5000.desc: Our sciences division has indicated that now is an appropriate time to build the planned dedicated science centre that has been in the planning stages for many months. The structure is available as a megastructure and will become our primary institute for scientific research.
STH_science.5000.name: New Science structure available
STH_secondChance_event.1.a: Esto debe ser un truco, bloquear [transporterClone.GetHerHim] en el bergantín!
STH_secondChance_event.1.b: ¡No seremos engañados por un shapeshifter, los phasers del sistema para matar!
STH_secondChance_event.1.c: Beam [transporterClone.GetHerHim] hasta la enfermería para poder validar estas afirmaciones.
STH_secondChance_event.1.desc:
Hace ocho años, el Jefe de Ciencia [transporterClone.GetName] estaba estacionado en este puesto de avanzada, apenas logrando emitir la estación de investigación con el último personal en el suelo antes de que una disección iónica cortara la conexión del transportador. 

El campo de interrupción finalmente ha cesado durante unos días, permitiendo a la tripulación del [Root.GetName] recuperar una gran cantidad de datos científicos dejados en la evacuación. 

Como el equipo visitante busca un terminal de computadora, notan signos de que alguien ha estado viviendo aquí. [TransporterClone.GetName] detecta los signos de vida en [transporterClone.GetHerHis] tri-corder y se mueve para investigar la señal. 

Suddenly, una voz grita y [transporterClone.GetSheHe] entra en la sala, phaser en el listo y se encuentra con una persona que se ve exactamente como [transporterClone.GetHerHim]. 

Después de unos momentos de shock, la persona explica que [transporterClone.GetSheHe] estaba atrapado en la estación de investigación después de un fallido intento de transporte hace ocho años.
STH_secondChance_event.1.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.2.desc: El equipo visitante no pudo reunir los datos a tiempo debido a los cambios realizados en la estación por el duplicado. \n\nEl equipo tuvo que emitirse antes de que el campo de distorsión regresara para evitar quedarse varado hasta la siguiente ventana de transporte. [TransporterClone.GetName] clon aparente insistió más tarde [transporterClone.GetHerHis] experiencia podría haber ayudado a reparar el daño en el tiempo previsto.
STH_secondChance_event.2.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.3.a: ¡Ese metamorfo saboteó nuestra estación! Buena Riddance.
STH_secondChance_event.3.desc: El equipo visitante no pudo reunir los datos a tiempo debido a los daños infligidos en la red eléctrica de las estaciones por el metamorfo. \n\nEl equipo tuvo que emitirse antes de que el campo de distorsión regresara para evitar quedarse varado hasta la siguiente ventana de transporte.
STH_secondChance_event.3.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.4.a: Intento de recopilar los datos de la investigación sin el duplicado de [transporterClone.GetName].
STH_secondChance_event.4.b: Pregunte al duplicado de [transporterClone.GetName] para ayudar a arreglar la estación.
STH_secondChance_event.4.desc:
Se confirma que los genes duplicados [transporterClone.GetName] son ??una coincidencia exacta. Además, los patrones cerebrales son casi iguales, lo que sugiere que ambos tienen recuerdos casi idénticos. Estos hechos descartan la posibilidad de que [transporterClone.GetHerHim] sea un metamorfo o un clon. 

El ingeniero de la nave teoriza que cuando el transportista fue interrumpido por el campo de interrupción hace ocho años, el haz de patrones debe haber reflejado una copia perfecta de [transporterClone.GetName] en la estación de investigación en [From.GetName]. 

El duplicado del transportista tuvo que adaptar la estación de investigación para sobrevivir durante ocho años [transporterClone.GetHerHis] propia. Debido a esto, los bancos de datos de la estación no son fácilmente accesibles y requieren reparaciones extensas.
STH_secondChance_event.4.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.5.a: No podemos arriesgar la vida de duplicado de [transporterClone.GetName].
STH_secondChance_event.5.desc: El duplicado de [transporterClone.GetName] tiene un plan para arreglar el daño, pero implica ahondar en una sección estructuralmente inestable de la base de investigación para vincular un conducto de potencia de nuevo al mainframe del ordenador. \n\n [transporterClone.GetSheHe] está seguro de que es seguro como [transporterClone.GetSheHe] ha estado allí muchas veces, pero el ingeniero de la nave ha completado las exploraciones que muestran que la estructura es peligrosa y podría colapsar en cualquier momento.
STH_secondChance_event.5.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.6.a: Si [transporterClone.GetSheHe] tiene que hacer esto, [transporterClone.GetSheHe] necesitará ayuda.
STH_secondChance_event.6.desc: El duplicado de [transporterClone.GetName] ha hablado con el capitán [Root.Fleet.Leader.GetName], omitiendo [transporterClone.GetHerHis] original y superior para obtener permiso para llevar a cabo el plan peligroso contra su juicio.
STH_secondChance_event.6.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.7.desc: El duplicado de la estructura [transporterClone.GetName] estaba en pie se ha colapsado mientras que [transporterClone.GetSheHe] y [transporterClone.GetHerHis] original estaban en medio de las reparaciones a los sistemas de almacén de datos de la estación. El duplicado fue capaz de ayudar a [transporterClone.GetHerHis] original ya que ambos colgaron al borde del abismo la estructura de puente, pero al hacerlo [transporterClone.GetSheHe] cayó a [transporterClone.GetHerHis] la muerte.
STH_secondChance_event.7.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.8.a: Datos científicos no vale la pena perder una vida.
STH_secondChance_event.8.desc: El duplicado de [transporterClone.GetName] no pudo reparar el conducto de potencia en la estación de investigación. Cuando [transporterClone.GetSheHe] se movió para reparar el conducto, una estructura de puente se derrumbó dejando [transporterClone.GetHerHim] trenzado. El original [transporterClone.GetName] se irradiaba y era capaz de guardar [transporterClone.GetHerHis] duplicado desde el abismo, pero no había suficiente tiempo para recuperar los datos antes de cerrar la ventana de transporte. \n\n A la luz del rendimiento ejemplar de [transporterClone.GetHerHis], se ofreció al duplicado de [transporterClone.GetName] una posición dentro de la flota que reflejaba los talentos de [transporterClone.GetHerHis].
STH_secondChance_event.8.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_secondChance_event.9.desc:
Gracias a la cooperación entre [transporterClone.GetName] y [transporterClone.GetHerHis] duplicado, el par fue capaz de reparar el conducto con éxito después de una estrecha convocatoria con un puente en ruinas. 

Eran capaces de recuperar el equipo científico requerido y una vez a bordo del [Root.GetName] confirme la integridad y el valor de los datos. 

 A la luz del rendimiento ejemplar de [transporterClone.GetHerHis], el duplicado [transporterClone.GetName] se le ofreció una posición dentro de la flota que refleja los talentos de [transporterClone.GetHerHis].
STH_secondChance_event.9.name: Segundas oportunidades
STH_shades_of_grey.1.a: We cannot afford to spend the cordrazine.
STH_shades_of_grey.1.desc:
Many members send to survey [From.GetName] have fallen severely ill after being stung by a local plant species. Including [Root.GetLeaderName]. Apparently as a result of the puncture a foreign micro-organism has spread to their body and is slowly taking over their nervous systems. Other members of the survey team have since reported having found several dead animals near the plants in question further confirming the seriousness of the situation faced here.

So far no treatment has been able to stop the spread of the organism although some cordrazine based remedies have shown promise in slowing it down. If only we had ample supply of cordrazine available experiments could be conducted on a possibly effective treatment. However as the situation now stands it doesn`t seem likely that [Root.GetLeaderName] and the other members of the survey team will survive.

As a result of this crisis normal operations of the ship have temporarily stopped.
STH_shades_of_grey.1.name: Several Members of the survey team fall ill
STH_shades_of_grey.3.desc: With help of ample supply of cordrazine the ship´s medical personnel have, after several failed attempts, found a cure that not only stops the spread of the organism, but also is able to destroy it slowly. [Root.GetLeaderName] is expected to make a full recovery. And the scientific knowledge of our empire has increased.
STH_shades_of_grey.3.name: Members of the survey team recovering
STH_shades_of_grey.4.desc: Although the ship's medical personnel eventually got their hands on the send cordrazine and experimented with several possible treatment options, the foreign organism was able to completely take over the victims nervous systems and kill [Root.GetLeaderName] and most of the other members of the landing party. However as a result of this incident the medical knowledge of our empire has expanded.\n\nAs the organisms seem to still be growing in the bodies of the dead it is recommended that they be destroyed.
STH_shades_of_grey.4.name: We ran out of time
STH_shades_of_grey.6.desc: Even though no cordrazine was sent to the ship, almost miraculously [Root.GetLeaderName] has awoken after being in coma and in critical condition for several days. Further more when the medical personnel do a check up it seems that the organism trying to invade the nervous system has died. The medical personnel can only speculate on what saved [Root.GetLeaderName]. Perhaps it was the immune system fighting back or perhaps [Root.GetLeaderName] was just somehow incompatible with the organism. However most other member of the landing party weren`t as lucky with most of them now dead.
STH_shades_of_grey.6.name: Our leader awakens
STH_shades_of_grey.7.desc: Without the help of the cordrazine shipment the ship`s medical personel weren`t able to do much to save the victims of the attack. After first loosing their consciousness and being in a coma for several days one after another of the survey team members are lost. Including [Root.GetLeaderName]. As the organism seems to still be spreading in their bodies even after death, it is recommended that the bodies be destroyed.
STH_shades_of_grey.7.name: Most members of the survey team lost
STH_shipyards.10.a: What is the role of the ASDB?
STH_shipyards.10.b: What type of Flagships can we build?
STH_shipyards.10.desc_01: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the Chief Engineer of the Starfleet Advanced Starship Design Bureau (ASDB) here at the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards. The Design Bureau is here to work on advanced starship designs and allows the commission of our new Flagships and other vessels with advanced technology designed to give our very finest crews the edge they need.\n\nHow can the Design Bureau assist you today?
STH_shipyards.10.desc_02: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the Chief Engineer of the Imperial Advanced Starship Design Bureau (ASDB) here at the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards. The Design Bureau is here to work on advanced starship designs and allows the commission of our new Flagships and other vessels with advanced technology designed to give the empire the power to defeat our enemies.\n\nHow can the Design Bureau assist you today?
STH_shipyards.10.desc_03: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], we are currently focusing on the construction of the advanced vessel here at Utopia Planitia. The ship should be completed in due course at which point we can start looking at the next design.
STH_shipyards.10.desc_04: Following the devastating attack on the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards our services are currently unavailable. Please initiate repairs at the early convenience in order to bring the fleet yards back online.
STH_shipyards.10.desc_05: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the Chief Engineer of the Confederacy Corps Advanced Starship Design Bureau (CCASDB) here at the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards. The Design Bureau is here to work on advanced starship designs and allows the commission of our new Flagships and other vessels with advanced technology designed to give humanity the power to crush our enemies.\n\nHow can the Design Bureau assist you today?
STH_shipyards.10.name: Advanced Starship Design Bureau
STH_shipyards.100.desc:
New Flagship designs will be available here. There are two different options available for each class. You can build either

Science Focused Flagships: This version of the flagship is science focused and allows Scientists or Heroic Scientists to survey and explore new systems.



Military Focused Flagships: This version of the flagship is military focused and allows Admirals or Heroic Admirals to lead fleets into conflict to defend the Federation borders.
STH_shipyards.100.name: Flagship Designs
STH_shipyards.1001.desc: The Starfleet Advanced Starship Design Bureau have advised us that a new ship design is available to construct at the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards.
STH_shipyards.1001.name: Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards
STH_shipyards.1002.desc: With the completion of the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards on the surface of Mars, the Starfleet Corp of Engineers have recommended the construction of fleet yards in geosynchronous orbit above the planet. With the construction of these yards we will be able to construct additional Starship designs including Flagships.\n\nDev Note: The Utopia Planitia Megastructure is the new facility that will allow you to build either Military or Science Flagships and Legend Ships using a new game mechanic. Flagships will no longer be available via regular ship yards.
STH_shipyards.1002.name: Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards
STH_shipyards.1002.tooltip: The Utopia Planitia Fleet Yard Megastructure allows for the construction of Flagships and Legendary Ships.
STH_shipyards.101.desc: The NX class was a type of United Earth starship in Starfleet service during the mid-22nd century. The class is notable for having been the first to be constructed with the warp five engine, allowing Humanity to explore beyond neighboring star systems.\n\nThe NX class was conceived in the early 22nd century as part of the NX Project at the Warp Five Complex: a research and development site on Earth, where Henry Archer, Zefram Cochrane, and Captain W.M. Jefferies, among others, worked on the creation of the warp five engine.
STH_shipyards.101.name: NX-Class Explorer
STH_shipyards.103.desc: Endeavour was constructed at Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards, and was completed on June 2, 2156, four months after the Atlantis (NX-05), and became the test bed for a number of early federation technologies as the fledgling Federation formed. The Endeavour had several computer software improvements that allowed it more protection against attempts by the Romulans to remotely take over the ship and later reportedly became the flagship of Admiral Archer.
STH_shipyards.103.name: NX-06 Endeavour Commissioned
STH_shipyards.104.desc: Following the successful launch of the Enterprise NX-01 in 2151, Starfleet quickly ordered an additional three NX-class starships that were to enter service in the near future. As a result, the Columbia was the second ship of the class to begin construction and upon launch began to record her own historic tales.
STH_shipyards.104.name: NX-02 Columbia Commissioned
STH_shipyards.120.desc: The Constitution-class is a Federation Starship-class, Class I Heavy Cruiser. They were the premier frontline Starfleet vessels, designed for long duration missions with minimal outside support and were best known for their celebrated 5 year missions of galactic exploration and diplomacy.
STH_shipyards.120.name: Constitution-Class Cruiser
STH_shipyards.120.tooltip: The science version of the Constitution Flagship requires the TOS Era Constitution Class ship.
STH_shipyards.121.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.122.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.130.desc: The Excelsior-class is a type of Federation starship, designed with advanced modular technologies allowing for regular upgrades as technology advances, making it one of the longest serving starship designs and one of the most recognizable ships in the fleet.\n\nStarfleet had high hopes for the first ship of this class, the prototype was equipped with a transwarp drive, and was regarded as that century's 'Great Experiment'.
STH_shipyards.130.name: Excelsior-Class Starship
STH_shipyards.131.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-B Commissioned
STH_shipyards.132.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-B Commissioned
STH_shipyards.133.desc: The Constitution II-Class, sometimes referred to as the Enterprise-Class was a major overhaul of the beloved Constitution Class and produced an almost totally new vessel, replacing virtually every major system and bringing Starfleet into a new era. Starfleet then began a program of refitting its existing Constitutions to this new design, whilst rolling out new mark II vessels in parallel.
STH_shipyards.133.name: Constitution II-Class Starship
STH_shipyards.134.desc: The loss of the USS Enterprise was felt across the Federation, and the exploits of the ship have become famous tales among the Federation member worlds. As a result Starfleet agreed to continue the legacy with the commissioning of the next Ship to carry on the name and to boldly go...
STH_shipyards.134.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-A Commissioned
STH_shipyards.140.desc: The Ambassador-class features a number of breakthrough technologies as Starfleet attempts to modernise its fleets. The Ambassador-class was designed to be a replacement for the aging fleet of Excelsior-class and Constellation-class vessels which had been in service for over three decades, and to create a true front-line heavy cruiser that could serve as the main capital vessel for Starfleet.
STH_shipyards.140.name: Ambassador-Class Explorer
STH_shipyards.141.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-C Commissioned
STH_shipyards.142.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-C Commissioned
STH_shipyards.150.desc: The Galaxy-class is a Starfleet vessel first introduced as one of the largest and most powerful Federation starship classes of its time. The Galaxy Class Starship Development Project took place at the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards. Numerous technologies implemented on Galaxy-class starships were tested aboard earlier prototype vessels. Service aboard a Galaxy-class starship was considered an extremely prestigious assignment and they attract some of Starfleet's finest officers.
STH_shipyards.150.name: Galaxy-Class Explorer
STH_shipyards.152.desc: The Galaxy-class is a Starfleet vessel first introduced as one of the largest and most powerful Federation starship classes of its time. The Galaxy Class Starship Development Project took place at the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards. Numerous technologies implemented on Galaxy-class starships were tested aboard earlier prototype vessels. Service aboard a Galaxy-class starship was considered an extremely prestigious assignment and they attract some of Starfleet's finest officers.
STH_shipyards.152.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-D Commissioned
STH_shipyards.160.desc: Whilst not as large as the Galaxy class, the Sovereign is designed to be the most advanced starship design in the fleet.\n\nNearly seven hundred meters in length, the design of the Sovereign-class consisted of two hull sections: a saucer-shaped primary hull and a secondary hull which mounted two warp nacelles and featured the latest technological breakthroughs and weaponry enhancements over previous starship classes, including quantum torpedoes as well as photon torpedoes, and numerous phaser banks and arrays.
STH_shipyards.160.name: Sovereign-Class Assault Crusier
STH_shipyards.161.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-E Commissioned
STH_shipyards.162.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-E Commissioned
STH_shipyards.163.desc: The most advanced design to come from the engineers at Utopia Planitia fleet yards, the Odyssey offers a mobile command centre, exploration hub and mobile fortress to allow Starfleet to resume its exploratory mission further than ever before. The Odyssey class makes the final frontier seem that much closer.
STH_shipyards.163.name: Odyssey-Class Command Crusier
STH_shipyards.164.desc: The most advanced ship yet produced by Starfleet has the honour of bearing the title of the legendary Enterprise. This vessel sets forth to continue the legacy of the ships that have come before. \n\nComplete with the most advanced offensive and defensive arsenal and a state of the art warp drive, this Enterprise can boldly go where no man has gone before...
STH_shipyards.164.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-F Commissioned
STH_shipyards.170.desc: As Starfleet looks to the future to secure its legacy, the time has come for a new ship to embody the spirit of the Final Frontier and to boldly go. \n\nStarfleet corp of Engineers has recommended three potential designs to service as the new Enterprise-G.
STH_shipyards.170.name: To Boldly Go...
STH_shipyards.171.desc: Space, the final frontier. These are the voyages of the Starship Enterprise. Its continuing mission, to explore strange new worlds, to seek out new life and new civilizations, to boldly go where no one has gone before!
STH_shipyards.171.name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701-G Commissioned
STH_shipyards.20.desc:
New designs are unlocked when the class of starship is available to design, we will notify you when a new design is available.

Retiring a flagship design renders it no longer available for design and opens up the next design class as long as you have researched the technology.

In order to then commission the Starship you must first decommission your old flagship, giving it a worthy retirement.
STH_shipyards.20.name: Flagship Retirement
STH_shipyards.30.desc: The following starship variants have been passed to the ASDB are are ready to be commissioned.
STH_shipyards.30.name: Available Starship designs
STH_shipyards.517.desc: Although the USS Cerritos was involved in many historic events during its service, it was not always on the right side of history. Yet this ship epitomises the very nature of the Lower Deck spirit and even though it was not crewed by Starfleet's most famous members in its own way it was the hero of its own adventure.
STH_shipyards.517.name: USS Cerritos NCC-75567 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.518.desc: Described by a senior member of Starfleet command as the toughest, fastest, most powerful ship Starfleet ever put into service, the Zheng He has gained fame for as a fast response vessel, dealing with situations which require fast and decisive action.
STH_shipyards.518.name: USS Zheng He NCC-78641 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.519.desc: The latest in a long line of noble vessels of the Excelsior linage, the Archimedes has already made an impressive name for itself, leading the Federation into First Contact scenarios with dignity.
STH_shipyards.519.name: USS Archimedes NCC-83002 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.522.desc: Continuing with both the name and history of the original Stargazer, the new Sagan Class Stargazer sets out to once again explore strange new worlds and bring light into the darkness.
STH_shipyards.522.name: USS Stargazer NCC-82893 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.527.desc: The USS Voyager NCC-74656-B was a Pathfinder-class starship operated by Starfleet, and was the third ship to carry on the legacy of the famous USS Voyager. \n\nFor I dipt in to the future, far as human eye could see; Saw the vision of the world, and all the wonder that would be.
STH_shipyards.527.name: USS Voyager NCC-74656-B Commissioned
STH_shipyards.528.desc: USS Titan (NCC-1777) was a 23rd century Shangri-La-class Federation Starfleet vessel. In 2290, the Titan was launched under the command of Captain Saavik. During it's service it was known for its multiple encounters with the Klingon Empire, including the Exo-Port takeover and Horizon Colony rescue. The Titan became the Starfleet's flagship under the recommendation of Captain Hikaru Sulu of the USS Excelsior. \n\nThe Titan was instrumental in maintaining frontier stability before the Khitomer Accords and the launch of the USS Enterprise-B.
STH_shipyards.528.name: USS Titan NCC-1777 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.529.desc: The ship was built during the Dominion War but by 2380 it operated as a science vessel on the edge of Federation space, before moving on to new adventures.
STH_shipyards.529.name: USS Resolute NCC-92317 Commissioned
STH_shipyards.530.desc: Following an extensive refit conducted and overseen by renown scientist [resolute_science_leader.GetName] the USS Resolute is ready to fly again, with a brand new secondary hull incorporating an experimental warp drive system.
STH_shipyards.530.name: USS Resolute Refit Complete
STH_shipyards.531.desc: Through its travels across the Delta Quadrant, the USS Voyager made more first contacts and experienced more dangerous than almost any other ship in the fleet. Starfleet took the time to study the technology added to Voyager and create a refitted version of the Intrepid using the advancements that Voyager was able to bring home with it.
STH_shipyards.531.name: USS Voyager-A
STH_silence_event.1.a: Lanzar una sonda de clase IV.
STH_silence_event.1.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] y la tripulación del [Root.Fleet.GetName] intentan escanear el agujero negro, pero no pueden obtener ninguna lectura de los escáneres de la nave.
STH_silence_event.1.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.10.a: Tal vez ya fue dañado por algo?
STH_silence_event.10.desc: Aunque el oficial de armas había preparado una descarga de disparos [Root.Owner.GetMainEnergyWeapon] para disparar contra la nave enemiga, tan pronto como los primeros rayos de contacto contactaban con la nave enemiga explotaron y los disparos posteriores se disiparon entre los escombros. \n\nEl oficial de armas comenta que una nave como esa debería haber podido soportar muchos más golpes.
STH_silence_event.10.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.100.b: Tome el [Root.Fleet.GetName] más cerca del vacío.
STH_silence_event.100.desc: Después de meses de investigación, los mejores científicos [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesAdj] no pueden determinar el origen de las propiedades inusuales de este agujero negro.
STH_silence_event.100.name: No se encontró nada
STH_silence_event.11.a: Establecer un rumbo para la nueva salida.
STH_silence_event.11.b: Esto no tiene sentido, todo se detiene.
STH_silence_event.11.desc:
Con la nave enemiga reducida a una pila de escombros, los sensores detectan un grupo de estrellas en la proa del puerto. [Root.Fleet.GetName] es capaz de detectar el resto del universo a través de este pequeño parche. 

 [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] ordena un curso trazado para la salida y activa la unidad warp. 

 Justo cuando el [Root.Fleet.GetName] se acerca a la salida, las estrellas se desvanecen para ser reemplazadas por la nada una vez más. 

Los escombros de la nave destruida se han perdido de los sensores y el [Root.Fleet.GetName] ahora está completamente solo. 

 ¡Unos minutos más tarde, aparece una nueva salida en la proa de estribor!
STH_silence_event.11.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.12.a: Establecer un rumbo para la nueva salida.
STH_silence_event.12.b: Esto no tiene sentido, todo se detiene.
STH_silence_event.12.desc: La nave se está acercando a la nueva salida cuando, al igual que antes, se desvanece a la oscuridad. Aparece una nueva salida, un poco más cerca que la distancia que la nave acaba de cubrir.
STH_silence_event.12.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.13.b: Deja de responder a los estímulos. No somos un juguete.
STH_silence_event.13.desc: La tripulación del [Root.Fleet.GetName] está incómoda ya que la sensación de ser observado se intensifica. Varios ahora creen que están jugando con ellos, que es una entidad de algún tipo de eventos de control.
STH_silence_event.13.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.14.a: Inaceptable, levantar escudos y disparar a la entidad.
STH_silence_event.14.b: Tenemos que seguir sin responder. Nadie reacciona!
STH_silence_event.14.c: Llame para una reunión inmediata en la sala de conferencias.
STH_silence_event.14.desc:
Fuera de la oscuridad, una cara desarticulada aparece delante de [Root.Fleet.GetName]. Al identificarse como 'Nagilum', se describe a sí misma como una entidad curiosa, preguntándose cómo la especie [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName] puede sufrir mortalidad y aún así prosperar. 

 [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] le dice a Nagilum que la mortalidad es la fuerza impulsora de la cultura [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName]. 

'Existe, luego dejas de existir. Tus mentes lo llaman ... muerte. 

Un oficial de puente comienza a temblar violentamente. Se agarra la cara en un vano esfuerzo por controlarse, pero cae de su estación gritando. Se desploma en el suelo en posición fetal, con los ojos aún abiertos. 

La entidad, fascinada por la muerte, le dice a la tripulación que estará experimentando con ellos con diferentes formas de asesinato hasta que lo entienda completamente.
STH_silence_event.14.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.15.desc:
Las armas [Root.Fleet.GetName] [Root.Owner.GetMainEnergyWeapon] no tienen ningún efecto sobre la entidad y los escudos parecen ineficaces para evitar los asesinatos aleatorios entre la tripulación. Se informan muertes al puente a través de todas las cubiertas. 

 Divertido por la demostración de fuerza, el Nagilum mata a [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] para observar la reacción de la tripulación del puente. 

Los asesinatos continúan, nada del intento de la tripulación tiene ningún efecto. 

El último miembro de la tripulación del puente mira a sus colegas muertos por última vez, antes de que también sean asesinados lentamente al tener la sangre en su cuerpo aumentando constantemente de temperatura.
STH_silence_event.15.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.16.desc:
Los miembros de la tripulación de [Root.Fleet.GetName] están siendo asesinados en grandes números, todos con diferentes causas de muerte. Nagilum parece ser capaz de presenciar múltiples muertes a la vez, en diferentes cubiertas. 

 Observa que eres una especie interesante, que ni siquiera intentas detener la violencia sin sentido. 

Después de matar cerca de dos tercios de la tripulación, la entidad murmura casi desdeñosamente lo aburrida que es la especie [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName]. 

La nada retrocede lentamente y el resto de la tripulación del [Root.Fleet.GetName] queda ileso.
STH_silence_event.16.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.17.b: Haga que la tripulación presente una representación holodeck de la muerte.
STH_silence_event.17.desc_01:
[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] reúne a los oficiales superiores de [Root.Fleet.GetName] mientras discuten los planes para evitar que Nagilum mate a todos a bordo de la nave. 

 La resistencia directa se discute y decide ser inútil, ya que la entidad ha demostrado una alta capacidad para manipular el entorno local. 

Se discuten varios planes, un oficial sugiere tratar de razonar con Nagilum y negociar que solo unos pocos mueran por sus experimentos. 

Otro indica que podrían crear una representación de holodeck de varios tipos de muerte, de modo que la entidad podría experimentar con eso. 

Se propone un plan final, sugerido por [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] para establecer un temporizador de autodestrucción para la nave de modo que la entidad no pueda observar las muertes individuales de la tripulación, siendo persuadió a liberar el barco, ya que su curiosidad no se ha cumplido.
STH_silence_event.17.desc_02:
[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] reúne a los oficiales superiores de [Root.Fleet.GetName] mientras discuten los planes para evitar que Nagilum mate a todos a bordo de la nave. 

 La resistencia directa se discute y decide ser inútil, ya que la entidad ha demostrado una alta capacidad para manipular el entorno local. 

Se discuten varios planes, un oficial sugiere tratar de razonar con Nagilum y negociar que solo unos pocos mueran por sus experimentos. 

Se propone un plan final, sugerido por [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] para establecer un temporizador de autodestrucción para la nave de modo que la entidad no pueda observar las muertes individuales de la tripulación, siendo persuadió a liberar el barco, ya que su curiosidad no se ha cumplido.
STH_silence_event.17.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.18.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] vuelve a hablar con la entidad Nagilum. [Root.Leader.GetSheHe] intenta negociar la cantidad de vidas que la entidad tomará para que al menos parte de la tripulación pueda sobrevivir. \n\nNagilum, interesado en la reacción, acepta y procede a matar metódicamente a las tres cuartas partes de la tripulación, dejando apenas lo suficiente para que [Root.Fleet.GetName] deje el vacío.
STH_silence_event.18.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.19.desc:
La negociación con Nagilum no va bien. La entidad tiene todo el poder y reconoce ese hecho, procediendo a asesinar tantos miembros de la tripulación [Root.Fleet.GetName] como lo considere necesario. 

Los asesinatos continúan, nada de lo que la tripulación pueda reunir tiene ningún efecto. 

El último miembro de la tripulación del puente mira a sus colegas muertos por última vez, antes de que ellos también sean asesinados lentamente al tener la sangre en su cuerpo aumentando constantemente de temperatura.
STH_silence_event.19.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.2.a: Acerque la nave al horizonte de eventos.
STH_silence_event.2.b: Levanta los escudos, no corramos riesgos.
STH_silence_event.2.desc: A pesar de estar dentro de sus parámetros de diseño, la telemetría de la sonda continuó solo hasta el punto en que cruzó el umbral del horizonte de eventos, sin detectar nada fuera de lo común mientras lo hacía. \n\n Se siente una sensación de inquietud a través de los oficiales del puente de [Root.Fleet.GetName]. Nervioso, un oficial subalterno cuenta la leyenda de una enorme criatura que devora naves en esta región del espacio.
STH_silence_event.2.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.20.desc:
La tripulación presenta una recreación holodeck de la muerte a la entidad. Desafortunadamente, Nagilum no toma esto como una representación adecuada de una verdadera reacción [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName] a la muerte. 

Nagilum procede a asesinar tantos [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural] como lo considere necesario. 

Los asesinatos continúan, nada de lo que la tripulación pueda reunir tiene ningún efecto. 

El último miembro de la tripulación del puente mira a sus colegas muertos por última vez, antes de que también sean asesinados lentamente al tener la sangre en su cuerpo aumentando constantemente de temperatura.
STH_silence_event.20.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.21.desc:
[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] establece una secuencia de autodestrucción en 20 minutos durante la reunión. 

19 minutos pasan. Cuando el temporizador de cuenta regresiva llega a los últimos 30 segundos, la nada que rodea a [Root.Fleet.GetName] parece retroceder. 

 Todavía, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] espera y cuando el temporizador de cuenta regresiva alcanza los 10 segundos ...
STH_silence_event.21.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.22.desc: [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] cancela la secuencia de autodestrucción. \n\nLa vasta nada se ha ido, y la nave queda de vuelta en órbita del agujero negro [Root.GetStarName], que ahora muestra lecturas normales para un cuerpo de su tamaño.
STH_silence_event.22.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.23.desc: La secuencia de autodestrucción termina, y la tripulación acepta su destino de morir. El [Root.Fleet.GetName] explota, matando a todos a bordo.
STH_silence_event.23.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.24.desc: La tripulación presenta una recreación holodeck de la muerte a la entidad. Afortunadamente, Nagilum acepta estas simulaciones como representaciones adecuadas de la verdadera reacción [Root.Owner.GetSpeciesName] a la muerte. \n\nDespués de varias horas dedicadas de esta manera, Nagilum desaparece y la nada que rodea a [Root.Fleet.GetName] parece retroceder. El vasto vacío se ha ido y la nave queda de nuevo en órbita del agujero negro [Root.GetStarName], que ahora muestra lecturas normales para un cuerpo de su tamaño.
STH_silence_event.24.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.3.a: Acerque la nave al horizonte de eventos.
STH_silence_event.3.b: Lanza otra sonda, no podemos ser demasiado cuidadosos.
STH_silence_event.3.desc: Después de varias horas, todavía no hay cambios en el comportamiento del agujero negro que justifiquen precauciones fuera de los protocolos establecidos.
STH_silence_event.3.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.4.desc:
La nave se mueve en impulsores de impulso hacia el horizonte de eventos a pocos kilómetros de donde desapareció la telemetría subespacial de la sonda. 

De repente, el horizonte aparente se expande rápidamente y envuelve el [Root.Fleet.GetName]. 

La nave parece no sufrir daños, pero a medida que la tripulación intenta escanear el área circundante no hay nada que ver ...
STH_silence_event.4.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.5.desc: Una vez más, la sonda desaparece y no informa nada inusual hasta que cruza el horizonte de eventos.
STH_silence_event.5.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.6.desc: A pesar de continuar durante varios minutos a la deformación máxima, los sensores aún no pueden confirmar si el [Root.Fleet.GetName] se ha movido realmente. \n\nEn los últimos sensores detectan algo, ¡un buque de guerra enemigo en curso de intercepción!
STH_silence_event.6.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.7.a: Devolver el fuego, deshabilitar esa nave.
STH_silence_event.7.c: Intenta abrir una frecuencia de llamadas.
STH_silence_event.7.desc:
Después de casi media hora, los sensores detectan algo, ¡un buque de guerra enemigo en un vector de ataque! 

Ya en Red Alert, el [Root.Fleet.GetName] está bien preparado. Cuando la nave enemiga entra en el rango de armas, comienza a disparar contra [Root.Fleet.GetName]. 

Después de la primera descarga de disparos, los escudos solo se reducen al 94%. No parecen ser una amenaza.
STH_silence_event.7.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.8.a: Devolver el fuego, deshabilitar esa nave.
STH_silence_event.8.desc: El buque enemigo no responde al granizo y dispara contra [Root.Fleet.GetName]. Está claro que son hostiles y no se puede razonar con ellos.
STH_silence_event.8.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silence_event.9.a: Tal vez ya fue dañado por algo?
STH_silence_event.9.desc: En el instante en que el rayo [Root.Owner.GetMainEnergyWeapon] golpea la nave enemiga, detona en una gran explosión. \n\nEl oficial de armas comenta que una nave como esa debería haber podido soportar muchos más golpes.
STH_silence_event.9.name: Donde el silencio tiene arrendamiento
STH_silver_blood_event.1.desc: After making the difficult landing to the planet´s surface our landing party has identified the source of the deuterium. It seems to be coming from pools of silver coloured metallic liquid scattered on the planet´s surface. As our landing party takes samples of the liquid they notice it trying to mimic the shape of the instruments used in taking the samples as if having some kind of will of its own. This strange liquid might merit further investigation.
STH_silver_blood_event.1.name: Silver liquid found
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.1.desc: My recent dreams have been plagued by images from my past, members of my family and other strange visions throughout my history, some potentially even from my future. They all seem to point me towards a mysterious desert on the planet [sth_site_orb_of_emissary.GetName], I feel compelled to travel and investigate this calling.
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.1.name: Mysterious Visions
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.2.desc: The planet's desert is harsh and barren with little distinguishing features, yet [Leader.GetName] appears to be transfixed on an unseen destination, talking to some unknown beings, whom we can assume are the beings known as the Prophets. With that [Leader.GetName] sets off towards an unknown destination, with their away team following closely.
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.2.name: Hunt for the Orb
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.3.desc: The fast-paced pace continues as [Leader.GetName] continues their journey across the sands, guided by unseen voices and echos of their past. All the time certain of their destination and purpose.
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.3.name: Hunt for the Orb
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.4.desc: The trek across the desert shows no sign of slowing down as the march toward the unknown target continues at pace. \n\nWe must trust in [Leader.GetName]...
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.4.name: Hunt for the Orb
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.5.desc: All of a sudden [Leader.GetName] stops, claiming this is the spot. Grabbing a shovel the Captain begins digging in a seemingly random spot in the ground. \n\nWith little else to do but watch, the crew sit and watch as [Leader.GetName] frantically begins to dig into the ground.
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.5.name: Hunt for the Orb
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.6.desc: With a gasp of triumph [Leader.GetName] holds aloft a boxed Bajoran Orb.. the Orb of the Emissary has been found. \n\nWith that [Leader.GetName] seems to return to normal with their role complete... for now.
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.6.name: The Orb of the Emissary
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.7.desc: My Child, let me introduce myself I am [bajoran_ruler.GetName] the Kai of the Bajoran people. Word has reached us of your amazing rediscovery of the Orb of the Emissary and joy has spread across Bajor. \n\nAs you can imagine we are eager to see the Orb returned to it's rightful place on Bajor, following the sacking of our religious history in the past you can imagine why this is such an emotive issue for us.
STH_site_bajoran_orbs.7.name: The Orb of the Emissary
STH_site_iconia_probe.1.desc: A medida que [Root.GetName] se acerca al barco angustiado, explota abruptamente debido a una ruptura del núcleo warp, una pérdida con todas las manos. Se han descubierto algunos de los registros recogidos de la última transmisión del buque y pueden arrojar algo de luz sobre lo que sucedió aquí.
STH_site_iconia_probe.1.name: Investigación de escombros
STH_site_iconia_probe.2.desc: La investigación de los registros muestra que se transmitió un complejo virus informático desde una sonda cercana que causó estragos entre los sistemas de la embarcación. \n\n Informes iniciales de la embarcación ahora condenada informan que creen que este mundo es el planeta capital del antiguo Iconiano. civilización, y puede contener valiosa tecnología o artefactos del pasado.
STH_site_iconia_probe.2.name: Registro atascado
STH_site_iconia_probe.3.desc: Los jefes de ingeniería informan que [Root.GetName] está definitivamente infectado con el mismo virus que destruyó el otro buque en la órbita de este planeta, causando fluctuaciones de energía y fallas en el sistema a través de la nave. Los métodos antivirus habituales ahora funcionan contra el virus, que regresa cada vez. \n\nLa sonda que transmitió el virus inicialmente se detectó sin embargo en la órbita baja del planeta, mientras que una señal de baja potencia está conectando la superficie y la sonda. La cura puede estar allí ...
STH_site_iconia_probe.3.name: Sistemas defectuosos
STH_site_iconia_probe.4.desc: La investigación de la instalación ha resultado en una gran riqueza de tecnología alienígena, pero hasta ahora no hay cura para el virus que continúa afectando a [Root.GetName], que ahora ha elevado sus escudos para evitar el transporte del equipo visitante. \n\nMás adentro En las instalaciones, nuestro equipo científico ha encontrado una gran puerta de enlace como dispositivo, que parece estar activa. Muestra numerosas ubicaciones alrededor de la galaxia y si los controles pueden descifrarse puede resultar útil para regresar a la nave.
STH_site_iconia_probe.4.name: Pasarelas
STH_site_iconia_probe.5.desc: Con la información tomada de la instalación en la superficie, se ha desarrollado una posible cura en la que apagar el núcleo de la computadora por un tiempo puede permitir que el antivirus elimine el virus de los sistemas de [Root.GetName] sin permitir que volver. \n\nLos pasos deben tomarse con cuidado, para que el virus no descubra el plan y se oculte.
STH_site_iconia_probe.5.name: Purga
STH_site_iconia_probe.6.desc: Con el virus purgado del sistema, la sonda en órbita y la instalación en el suelo han detonado en una aparente secuencia de autodestrucción. La tecnología que logramos descubrir desde la superficie debería proporcionar un impulso sustancial a nuestra investigación.
STH_site_iconia_probe.6.name: Virus erradicado
STH_site_iconia_probe.7.desc: Con el virus purgado del sistema, la sonda en órbita y la instalación en el suelo han detonado en una aparente secuencia de autodestrucción. La tecnología que logramos descubrir desde la superficie debería proporcionar un impulso sustancial a nuestra investigación.
STH_site_iconia_probe.7.name: Virus erradicado
STH_site_iconia_probe.8.desc: Con el virus purgado del sistema, la sonda en órbita y la instalación en el suelo han detonado en una aparente secuencia de autodestrucción. La tecnología que logramos descubrir desde la superficie debería proporcionar un impulso sustancial a nuestra investigación.
STH_site_iconia_probe.8.name: Virus erradicado
STH_site_pahvo_music.1.desc: Upon arrival in orbit around Pahvo, sensors have picked up a large crystalline spire that appears to be harmonised with the planet in some manner, projecting a strange alien melody into the localised space and affecting scans.
STH_site_pahvo_music.1.name: The Crystal Spire
STH_site_pahvo_music.2.desc: Transportation to the surface is unusually difficult due to the effects of the crystal transmitter, and as such the away team from the [Root.GetName] have beamed into a clearing thirty kilometers away from the main spire.\n\nInitial scans show that it is not just the spire that vibrates with a unique tone but every rock, every tree and every blade of grass - a truly remarkable discovery. A brief shout from one of the away team causes [Leader.GetName] to shift their focus - a strange blue energy is coalescing around a team member.
STH_site_pahvo_music.2.name: Rock Music
STH_site_pahvo_music.3.desc: The blue energy coalesces through and around one member of the away team from the [Root.GetName], suggesting an alien presence. All attempts to communicate fail, but every member of the away team and [Leader.GetName] feels convinced it is not hostile. Eventually the crew member who was compromised begins to understand the music.
STH_site_pahvo_music.3.name: The Blues
STH_site_pahvo_music.4.desc: [Leader.GetName] utilises the crew member as a conduit to talk to the blue energy, which turns out to be the native life on the planet. The Pahvans, as they wish to be known, only wish to share themselves and the harmony of their world with others not of their world.
STH_site_pahvo_music.4.name: Pahvan Parley
STH_site_pahvo_music.5.desc: After negotiations with the Pahvans, who are far beyond anything else uncovered, [Leader.GetName] and their team continue on with the Pahvans blessing to the crystalline transmitter - in their words the transmitter is to share their harmony with outsiders and they will allowed the team to study it.
STH_site_pahvo_music.5.name: Crystalline Transmitter
STH_situation.1.desc: Our leading scientific minds have seen our pressing situation with the Jem'Hadar population and the shortage of Ketracel White as a motivator to find a method of removing their addiction to this substance and preventing the devastating effects of Ketracel White withdrawel from impacting those who live inside our borders.
STH_situation.1.name: Free the Jem'Hadar
STH_situation.10.a: We must maintain our border security.
STH_situation.10.desc: [This.Owner.GetRulerName] I have to report that a vessel from [ship_target_country.GetName] was caught on the wrong side of the border in a clear attempt to spy on our border defenses, we can report that one of our patrols was able to intercept and force the vessel back across the border, the ship took damage and it is unclear what state the ship was in, but this clear breach of our borders only escalates an already fragile situation.
STH_situation.10.name: Border Breach
STH_situation.11.desc_01: Greetings, my name is [security_leader.GetName] our security services have identified a gap in the Cardassian defenses, and believe we have an opportunity to target one of their Starbases which poses a direct risk to our border security. \n\nWe need authorisation to conduct a covert operation into Cardassian space to take down this threat.
STH_situation.11.desc_02: I bring you a report from our Obsidian Order operatives in the field, we have identified a gap within the security grid at a Federation Starbase, which is now ripe for us to attack. \n\nWe must act quickly before Starfleet plugs this gap and the chance goes begging!
STH_situation.11.name: Security Report
STH_situation.12.desc_01: Federation Fools, my government may not officially sanction this communication, but let it be known that [insult_leader.GetName] sees you for what you really are... cowards! Standing in the way of Cardassian greatness and you shall soon know the full power of Cardassia!
STH_situation.12.desc_02: Whilst many within Starfleet would not approve of me sending this message, let it be known I am watching you Cardassians! We know the games you play and we have our phasers armed and ready.
STH_situation.12.name: Incoming Transmission from [insult_leader.GetName]
STH_situation.13.desc_01: Reports are coming in from [rioting_planet.GetName], with citizens taking to the streets protesting against our perceived lack of action against the increasing threat from the Cardassian Union. \n\nMany of the protestors feel that we should be taking a tougher stance on them to ensure that our borders remain secure.
STH_situation.13.desc_02: Our citizens on [rioting_planet.GetName] have taken to the streets rioting against our 'lenient' stance towards Starfleet. Chants of anger toward Federation pops are growing in number and are starting to be mixed with chants against our own military also heard amongst the voices.
STH_situation.13.name: Discontent on [rioting_planet.GetName]
STH_situation.14.desc: Greetings President, I must formally lodge a protest against the ongoing situation with the Cardassians, they take far too many liberties against us, and their forces mass too close to our borders threatening not only the Federation borders but the security of our own world, which you have promised to protect. \n\nWe urge more decisive action and that you take our words seriously.
STH_situation.14.name: [unhappy_member_world.GetName] Unhappy!
STH_situation.15.desc_01: I wish to officially lodge my concerns with the way we are handling the increasing tensions along the Cardassian Border, I am growing increasingly concerned that they are taking advantage of our desire for peace! We should be showing them force, and reminding them that Starfleet will not be pushed around.
STH_situation.15.desc_02: Legate, I have been a humble servant of the Cardassian people for many years now and I must formally raise my objections to our approach to allowing the Federation to continue their uncontrolled expansion into our territory that should be ours. \n\nWhen will you put our people first.
STH_situation.15.name: Senior Leader Unhappy
STH_situation.16.desc_01: The rising tensions along our border with the Cardassians has reached a new level of concern! We will need to manage this situation carefully because it could very well lead to war.
STH_situation.16.desc_02: The rising tensions along our border with the The Federation has reached a new level of concern! We will need to manage this situation carefully because it could very well lead to war.
STH_situation.16.name: Rising Tensions along our border
STH_situation.17.desc_01: Our leading experts across the Starfleet Admiralty, Starfleet Intelligence and even our diplomatic corps. all agree that tensions along the Cardassian Border have reached a point of no return. Attempts to work with the Cardassian Union have stalled and our diplomatic teams have been expelled, all of the Federation holds its breath for what is coming next.
STH_situation.17.desc_02: The Cardassian people collectively hold their breath, for tonight the ongoing situation along the Federation border have reached a tipping point and pressure on the government has reached a point where only actions will do to contain the rage and frustration of a people who feel threatened by the sickening threat of a root beer filled galaxy.
STH_situation.17.name: Border Tensions Reach Boiling Point
STH_situation.2.desc:
Our scientists have made a major breakthrough in ridding the Jem'Hadar of their addiction to the chemical drug Ketracel White. 

By slightly modifying a number of key genome pairs we have successfully tricked the soldier's bodies into converting regular foods sources into the missing compound their body requires. 

It does neutralise some of the benefits of the White and doesnt provide a full cure, but it does give the Jem'Hadar under our care more freedom than ever before.
STH_situation.2.name: Ketracel White Addiction removed
STH_situation.3.desc: We have failed to find any sort of cure for the Jem'Hadar's addiction to Ketracel White wasting valuable time that could have been used to find a meaningful solution.
STH_situation.3.name: Failed to Research Addiction Cure
STH_situation.30.desc: At the edge of the Final Frontier, the Universe's greatest mystery is about to unfold! The discovery of the Bajoran wormhole, the first stable wormhole discovered has open links to the Gamma Quadrant and new adventures beyond our Quadrant. \n\nHow you manage the situation will go along way to establishing peace and prosperity for both quadrants.
STH_situation.30.name: At the edge of the Final Frontier
STH_situation.32.desc_01: We have received reports that [target_ship.GetName] has suffered a massive explosion whilst on patrol, the ship had recently picked up a trading party from the Gamma Quadrant, who appears to have vanished in the accident.
STH_situation.32.desc_02: We have gotten word that [target_ship.GetName] has suffered serious engine damage whilst on duty, the ship had recently taken onboard a new engineering team to test a number of improvements to the Warp Drive. \n\nStrangely Starfleet security can find no trace of the team or any record of them leaving their previous location.
STH_situation.32.desc_03: We have received an alarming report from one of our monitoring stations, the [target_ship.GetName] appears to have suffered a warp core malfunction whilst in transit, resulting in the loss of most of the crew. \n\nThe ship was only recently under repair and refit passing its checks with flying colours.
STH_situation.32.name: Ship has been Sabotaged
STH_situation.33.desc: Starfleet Security Incident: We regret to inform you that we appear to have suffered a suspicious act of sabotage against one of our bases, resulting in a significant setback to operations in that sector. Our security footage appeared to capture a strange 'shimmering' on the image before the bomb detonated, but this has left our security experts puzzled.
STH_situation.33.name: Internal Security Report
STH_situation.34.desc: We have received concerning news from one of our trade convoys making their way through the Gamma Quadrant, it appears they were attacked by unknown assailants. \n\nThis follows a number of similar near misses with civilian ships traveling across the Gamma Quadrant.
STH_situation.34.name: Missing Trade Convoy
STH_situation.35.desc: Security forces on [rioting_planet.GetName] have reported that a wave of protests has begun across the planet's capitol, with citizens unhappy with restrictions put in place on trade within the Gamma Quadrant, by the local Dominion officials. Many are claiming that the Dominion are stopping and seizing shipments bound for [rioting_planet.GetName] and are unhappy that Starfleet is not doing more to assist.
STH_situation.35.name: Planetary Protests
STH_situation.36.desc: Greetings, I am [unhappy_member_world.GetRulerName] the representative of [unhappy_member_world.GetName]. Our citizens are urging us to seek further support from the Federation Council to take action on rising situations within the Gamma Quadrant. We have taken a number of reports of our ships being stopped, seized, or going missing whilst traveling beyond the Wormhole. \n\nWe were promised protection from Starfleet and we expect this to be delivered.
STH_situation.36.name: Incoming Transmission
STH_situation.37.desc: We have completed our investigation and returned our findings to [dominion_war_situation_mw.GetName]. It seems that their ships have indeed been targetted by forces from the Dominion. Our security experts recommend providing additional defenses for all ships going close to Dominion space, but this is unlikely to calm the building tensions.
STH_situation.37.name: Investigation Complete
STH_situation.38.desc: My name is [insult_leader.GetName] and I have served the Federations for many years and never have I seen a more looming threat than that from the Dominion and their leaders the Founders! They pose a significant risk to our internal security and I worry that we are far from prepared to handle an infiltration from a Changeling and I fear the damage they could cause! We must look at increasing our security measures.
STH_situation.38.name: Concerns from Leading Official
STH_situation.39.a: We don't care for your idle threats.
STH_situation.39.desc: Greetings from your friends in the Dominion, we welcome your continued exploits close to our borders and greet you as galactic friends. However, we must remind you that our borders are defended most defiantly by our loyal Jem'Hadar soldiers and we would not wish for any misunderstandings to occur especially as borders are known to change. \n\nPlease listen to our advice it may help keep your loses down.
STH_situation.39.name: Incoming Statement
STH_situation.40.desc: Greetings, I bring you a warning from those in the [insult_target_country.GetName], we see your expansion bringing you closer to the borders of the mighty Dominion. We wish to offer a warning from an empire that has known the wrath of the mighty Founders, do not cross them.. not don't challenge them, submit and their fury will not wash up against your worlds. \n\nPlease listen to our warning!
STH_situation.40.name: Warning Received
STH_situation.41.a: Thre is no record of this being your territory.
STH_situation.41.desc: Greetings, I regret to inform you that one of your ships has crossed into our territory without authorization, I am sure you did not mean any insult and are more than happy to pay the price of their cargo in order for our Jem'Hadar official to release your citizens and no doubt you will be doing everything in your power to ensure, such an event does not happen again...
STH_situation.41.name: Incoming Statement from the Dominion
STH_situation.42.desc: We have received intel from one of our trading outposts in the Gamma Quadrant that one of our envoy transports is due to be attacked by forces aligned to the Dominion, we are requesting aid from Starfleet to ensure that they can complete their mission safely.
STH_situation.42.name: Concerns from Colony [trade_route_planet.GetName]
STH_situation.43.desc: Our failure to support [trade_route_planet.GetName] has resulted in leaving the colony open to attack and whilst we have no evidence it was a targetted attack by either the Jem'Hadar or a Changeling infiltration squad we do know that the damage is extensive and we have lost some of the trust from our colonists.
STH_situation.43.name: [trade_route_planet.GetName] Attacked
STH_situation.44.desc: Hails from [trade_route_planet.GetName] are reporting concerning news, it appears that the warnings given were accurate and the peace envoy destined for the Gamma Quadrant was attacked and destroyed by unknown forces.
STH_situation.44.name: [trade_route_planet.GetName] Envoy killed
STH_situation.45.desc: Our envoy has successfully reached the representatives of the Karemman Foundation, managing to forge a good opinion with one of the leading trading countries in the Gamma Quadrant.
STH_situation.45.name: Envoy Reaches Destination
STH_situation.49.desc: The Dominion has reached out for historical talks that could secure the future of both Quadrants and bring a period of lengthy peace between the Alpha and Gamma Quadrants.
STH_situation.49.name: A chance at peace
STH_sleepingDogs_event.1.desc:
Después de lanzar una lanzadera para investigar, el capitán[Root.GetLeaderName] Y un pequeño equipo del [Root.GetFleetName] Han determinado que la tripulación del buque dañado han sido víctimas de una neurotoxina inofensiva para los miembros del equipo visitante, dejando a los alienígenas inconscientes pero vivos. 

Captain [Root.GetLeaderName]Ha hackeado con éxito en la computadora central y determinó que la toxina fue recogida por los alienígenas después de asaltar un sistema estelar cercano. 

Mientras que mira para reparar los motores del barco para levantar el recipiente de [From.GetName] Gravedad bien, capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] Fue atacado por una de las tripulaciones del buque alienígena - una mujer - aparentemente no afectada por la neurotoxina. 

Se produce una pelea y el capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] Se lesiona. El extranjero entra en contacto con el [Root.GetFleetName] Con una lista de demandas incluyendo reparaciones al barco y una sustancial compensación de materiales. Ella amenaza con matar al Capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] si sus demandas no se cumplen en breve.
STH_sleepingDogs_event.1.name: Perros durmiendo
STH_sleepingDogs_fail.1.desc: Después de lanzar una lanzadera para investigar, el capitán[Root.GetLeaderName] y un pequeño equipo del [Root.GetFleetName] Entrar en la atmósfera del gigante de gas. Un frente inesperado de la tormenta adelanta la lanzadera antes de que pueda acercarse a la nave extranjera, golpeando hacia fuera los motores de la lanzadera. El transbordador desciende a través de las profundidades de la atmósfera hasta que es aplastado por la enorme presión, matando a la tripulación.
STH_sleepingDogs_fail.1.name: Perros durmiendo
STH_sleepingDogs_fail.2.desc: Después de lanzar una lanzadera para investigar, el capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] y un pequeño equipo del [Root.GetFleetName] Entrar en la atmósfera del gigante de gas. Momentos antes de que la lanzadera atracó con el buque dañado levanta sus Escudos y carga armas. El transbordador es destruido en la primera salva, dejando al ejecutivo de la [Root.GetFleetName] momentos para ordenar a la [Root.GetFleetName] retirarse. El buque alienígena persigue fácilmente y después de un breve intercambio de [Root.GetFleetName] se destruye con todas los miembros.
STH_sleepingDogs_fail.2.name: Perros durmiendo
STH_sona_story.10.desc: The combined efforts of [Root.Owner.GetName] and the Son'a Command soon managed to get the new Duckblind facility set up under the direction of [Leader.GetName]. The Son'a's technology has allowed more efficient ways to conceal the facility and deploy the operation in a quick time. \n\nWith state-of-the-art sensors and personalised cloaking devices this operation allows for a unique chance to observe the Ba'ku culture whilst observing firsthand the effects of the radiation on the population.
STH_sona_story.10.name: Setting up the Duckblind
STH_sona_story.11.a: Are we sure the Son'a can be trusted?
STH_sona_story.11.desc: [Leader.GetName] begins to lead scientists out into the Ba'ku village using the personal cloaking units provided by the Son'a. The Ba'ku appear to be a rural society with very little interest in any form of technology, but on closer inspection, their mental acuity appears to be extremely advanced, it is obvious that there is more to these villagers than first described in the reports the Son'a produced.
STH_sona_story.11.name: Into the field
STH_sona_story.12.desc: Whilst investigating one of the lakes to the south of the Ba'ku village, [Leader.GetName] picked up a strange neutrino emission coming from the centre of the lake. On closer inspection, a cloaked holoship was found containing an exact replica of the Ba'ku village. \n\nIt looks like there is a plan to actively remove the Ba'ku from their home. As [Leader.GetName] turns to return to their base a disrupter beam blasts the wall behind them.
STH_sona_story.12.name: Holoship
STH_sona_story.13.desc: As [Leader.GetName] makes their way back to the Duckblind frantically chased by both [Root.Owner.GetName] scientists and Son'a operatives disrupting the peaceful setting of the Ba'ku village. Reaching the operation centre [Leader.GetName] is forced to make a big decision. Do they hold the scientist accountable for the attempt to forcibly remove people from their homes or allow the mission to continue?
STH_sona_story.13.name: Insurrection
STH_sona_story.14.a: Send a ship to the Briar Patch.
STH_sona_story.14.desc: [Root.GetLeaderTitle] we have received a message from our operation within the Briar Patch, it appears [insurrection_leader1.GetName] has gone rogue and is now holding both our scientists and the Son'a team hostage on the planet's surface. All attempts to communicate with our officer have been ineffective. \n\nWe must send in an Admiral to resolve the situation and recover our operation.
STH_sona_story.14.name: Scientist gone rogue
STH_sona_story.15.desc: Our agents on Ba'ku have stopped reporting in, but we have managed to intercept a message from one of our 'allies' scientists. \n\nIt appears they have been taken hostage by someone who has suddenly grown a conscience. A fleet is inbound to deal with the situation, but it is clear that this operation has just become more complicated, we should prepare a fleet to backup our team within the Briar Patch.
STH_sona_story.15.name: Betrayal on Ba'ku
STH_sona_story.16.desc: Our operation on Ba'ku is now ready to progress to the next stage, despite the many hold-ups and pointless beaurcractic nonsense from our so-called partner, we have managed to round up the Ba'ku villagers into the holoship. Despite our promise to relocate them to a new world, we cannot forget the crimes these savages committed against us. They will serve out their remaining days as slaves of the Son'a.
STH_sona_story.16.name: TIme to get rid of the Baku
STH_sona_story.17.name: Harvest the Planet
STH_sona_story.18.a: It was for the greater good.
STH_sona_story.18.desc: Son'a Command has notified us that they have begun operations to strip the rings of Ba'ku of the particles that provide the life-giving radiation. Our lead scientist on the mission reports that they have concerns that the Ba'ku may not have been relocated to a new home as promised, but are now enslaved somewhere within Son'a territory. \n\nThe operation will end with the destruction of the planet and the loss of a world close to paradise.
STH_sona_story.18.name: Metaphasic Collection Begins
STH_sona_story.2.b: No, we should be done with the Ba'ku.
STH_sona_story.2.desc:
For too long we have been forced to sit on the sidelines and watch the wretche Ba'ku live off our birthright having forced us from a world that we should have inherited. 

Our contacts within [baku_planet_country.GetName], who own the space the Briar Patch sits within, and they believe now is the time to approach them about a joint venture. 

Once we have access we can dispose of any 'temporary alliance'.
STH_sona_story.2.name: Fountain of Youth
STH_sona_story.20.desc: On arriving in the Briar Patch it is soon clear that everything is not as it was reported. The scientists appear to be no more held hostage than unwelcome guests sitting comfortably around tables at the centre of the village. The Ba'ku very quickly explain that they have no intention of harming or keeping anyone on the planet any longer than they wish. \n\nThe update from [insurrection_leader1.GetName] is less positive, they quickly explain that Son'a, backed by our own government intend to relocate the peaceful Ba'ku from their homes. Despite the Ba'ku freely admitting they are not indigenous to the planet and actually being a warp-capable people they have no desire to live anywhere else but in the homes they have made for themselves.
STH_sona_story.20.name: It doesn't have to take centuries to learn
