El Oficial de Ciencia supervisa el entierro de los muertos.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.15.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.16.desc:
El oficial de Ciencias y el oficial de seguridad no afectado pasan los próximos días enviando telemetría tricorder médica al [Root.GetFleetName] en órbita. A medida que los afectados continúan descendiendo hacia la locura y la violencia, el oficial de Ciencias ordena su sedación. 

La tripulación del [Root.GetFleetName] conjetura que se puede encontrar una cura investigando la vida animal local, en particular un insecto grande que aparece conectado con la flor que produce el polen que afecta a la tripulación. Los oficiales de Ciencia y Seguridad empiezan a buscar un espécimen para capturar. Al cruzar un nido de las criaturas, intentan colocar una red de contención alrededor de ella. Esto enfurece a varios de los insectos cercanos que pican a la pareja varias veces antes de ser combatido con armas de fuego. 

El primero empieza a debilitarse, ya que el veneno en las picaduras de los insectos se extiende a través de ellos. Se caen al suelo en el dolor y después de varios minutos agonizantes mueren por completo fracaso de órganos. 

La tripulación afectada por el polen comienza a despertar de su sedación, pero varios ya han comenzado a enfermar. Sin más datos de la superficie el equipo médico en el [Root.GetFleetName] son ??incapaces de progresar en el desarrollo de la cura, y después de varios días todos en la superficie están muertos.

 [From.GetName] se registra como habitable desde el punto de vista teórico, pero requiere un estudio significativo antes de que pueda comenzar la colonización.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.16.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.17.desc:
El transbordador [Root.GetFleetName] se lanza y pronto entra en la atmósfera de [From.GetName], capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] que conduce la expedición junto al oficial científico de la nave. 

El descenso sobre vastas extensiones de pradera parece bastante rutinario al principio, sin embargo la turbulencia pronto se convierte en niveles extremos. 

Es evidente que algo está muy mal con el transbordador, y una explosión en el motor hace que la nave gire incontrolablemente. Se ordena un transporte de emergencia y el equipo regresa al [Root.GetFleetName] momentos antes de que el transbordador se estrelle en el costado de una montaña, destruyéndolo.

Las investigaciones subsecuentes realizadas por el resto de la tripulación del [Root.GetFleetName] establecen que el accidente del transbordador es el resultado de un mantenimiento defectuoso y que las personas responsables son disciplinadas.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.17.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.18.desc:
El transbordador [Root.GetFleetName] se lanza y pronto entra en la atmósfera de [From.GetName], capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] que conduce la expedición junto al oficial científico del barco. 

El descenso sobre vastas extensiones de pradera parece bastante rutinario al principio, sin embargo la turbulencia pronto se convierte en niveles extremos. 

Es evidente que algo está muy mal con el transbordador, y una explosión en el motor hace que la nave este girando incontrolablemente. Se intenta un transporte de emergencia, pero antes de que el ciclo pueda iniciar el transbordador se estrelle en el costado de una montaña, matando a todo el mundo a bordo. 

Las investigaciones subsecuentes realizadas por el resto de la tripulación del [Root.GetFleetName] establecen que el accidente del transbordador es el resultado de un mantenimiento defectuoso y que las personas responsables son disciplinadas.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.18.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.2.b: Espere hasta que la tormenta se apague.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.2.desc:
Horas después de que el oficial de la Ciencia salió [From.GetName] para el [Root.GetFleetName] el equipo restante de la evaluacion ha comenzado a progresar. El mundo parece perfectamente habitable, aunque los tricordios han luchado para analizar una composición de un polen común al área. 

El viento ha comenzado a recoger y las nubes se han oscurecido; Una tormenta parece inminente. El capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] ordena al equipo que mueva el equipo del campamento a una red de cuevas en las rocas cercanas. En el momento en que el equipo es reubicado, las lluvias y los vientos están en el exterior. La comunicación con la nave se intenta, pero alguna propiedad de las rocas impide que una señal alcance el [Root.GetFleetName]. 

La tormenta parece durar mucho y el equipo comienza a ponerse nervioso. El especialista en botánica se habla a sí mismo y cuando se le pregunta, parece aterrarse, corriendo más hacia la inexplorada red de cavernas.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.2.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.3.b: Espere hasta que la tormenta se apague.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.3.desc:
Horas después de que el capitán [Root.GetLeaderName] saliera [From.GetName] para el [Root.GetFleetName] el equipo restante de la expedicion ha comenzado a avanzar. El mundo parece perfectamente habitable, aunque los tricordios han luchado para analizar una composición de un polen común al área. 

El viento ha comenzado a soplar y las nubes se han oscurecido; Una tormenta parece inminente. El equipo restante dirigido por el oficial de la Ciencia decide trasladar su campamento a una red de cavernas en las rocas cercanas. En el momento en que el equipo es reubicado, las lluvias y los vientos están en el exterior. La comunicación con la nave se intenta, pero alguna propiedad de las rocas impide que una señal alcance el [Root.GetFleetName]. 

La tormenta parece durar demasiado y el equipo comienza a ponerse nervioso. El especialista en botánica se ve hablando consigo mismo y cuando se le pregunta, parece aterrarse, corriendo más hacia la inexplorada red de cavernas.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.3.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.4.desc:
Pasan varias horas antes de encontrar el cuerpo del botánico , su cuerpo esta mutilado y roto en una cadena de rocas dentadas en el fondo de una gruta sustancial, en las profundidades de las cuevas. Parece que el cayó y murio, no viendo el agujero delante de el. 

El argumento estalla entre el equipo de la expedicion, algunos culpando al Capitán con otros hablando entre susurros y sombras en las propias cuevas. 

Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] ordena al equipo salir de las cuevas para comunicar con la [Root.GetFleetName] y organizar el transporte de vuelta a la nave.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.4.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.5.desc:
Pasan varias horas antes de encontrar el cuerpo del botánico, inconsciente pero vivo cerca de un pilar de roca que cuelga del techo de la cueva. Parece que se golpeó la cabeza con fuerza sobre la roca, sin verla delante de el. 

El argumento estalla entre el equipo de la expedicion, con muchos hablando de susurros y sombras en las propias cuevas. 

Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] ordena al equipo salir de las cuevas para comunicarse con la [Root.GetFleetName] y organizar el transporte de vuelta a la nave.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.5.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.6.desc:
Pasan varias horas antes de encontrar el cuerpo del botánico, su cuerpo mutilado y roto en una cadena de rocas dentadas en el fondo de una gruta, en las profundidades de las cuevas. Parece que el cayó y murio, no viendo el agujero delante de el. 

El argumento estalla entre el equipo de la expedicion, algunos culpando al oficial de Ciencia con otros hablando de susurros y sombras en las propias cuevas. 

El oficial de Ciencias ordena al equipo salir de las cuevas para comunicar con la [Root.GetFleetName] y organizar el transporte de vuelta a la nave.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.6.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.7.desc:
Pasan varias horas antes de encontrar el botánico, inconsciente pero vivo cerca de un pilar de roca que cuelga del techo de la cueva. Parece que se golpeó la cabeza con fuerza sobre la roca, sin verla delante de el.

El argumento estalla entre el equipo de la expedicion, con muchos hablando de susurros y sombras en las propias cuevas. 

El oficial de Ciencias ordena al equipo salir de las cuevas para comunicar con la [Root.GetFleetName] y organizar el transporte de vuelta a la nave.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.7.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.8.desc:
El equipo de la expedicion sale de las cuevas a un campo mojandose por la tormenta. Más y más del equipo parecen estar actuando erráticamente y una serie de altercados físicos comienzan a estallar. 

Capitan [Root.GetLeaderName] y un oficial de seguridad son los dos únicos no afectados. Comunicaciones a la nave restaurada, el par es capaz de transmitir telemetría tricorder médica para la tripulación en el [Root.GetFleetName] para analizar. 

Es evidente que el polen descubierto en el aterrizaje tiene un efecto contagioso, psicotrópico al que el capitán y el oficial de seguridad son inmunes. El retorno vía el transbordador o el transportador se descarta para prevenir poner en peligro el [Root.GetFleetName]. Se evalúa la posibilidad de enviar un nuevo equipo con trajes de riesgo biológico a la superficie para investigar una cura.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.8.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.9.desc:
El equipo de la expedicion sale de las cuevas en un campo empapado en la tormenta. Más y más del equipo parecen estar actuando erráticamente y una serie de altercados físicos comienzan a estallar. 

 El oficial de Ciencia y un oficial de seguridad son los únicos dos no afectados. Comunicaciones a la nave restaurada, el par es capaz de transmitir telemetría tricorder médica para la tripulación en el [Root.GetFleetName] para analizar. 

Es evidente que el polen descubierto en el aterrizaje tiene un efecto contagioso, psicotrópico al que los oficiales de Ciencia y Seguridad son inmunes. El retorno vía el transbordador o el transportador se descarta para prevenir poner en peligro el [Root.GetFleetName]. Se evalúa la posibilidad de enviar un nuevo equipo con trajes de riesgo biológico a la superficie para investigar una cura.
STH_strangeNewWorld_event.9.name: Extraño nuevo mundo
STH_synthetics.10.desc: The information obtained from the [Root.capital_scope.GetName] has allowed the crew of La Sirena to obtain the location of the scientist in hiding. [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] was one of the leading experts in Synthetic lifeforms and left our service following the repercussions of the devastating attack on [romulan_nova_rescue_planet.GetName]. \n\nIf anyone knows the whereabouts of a race of organic androids then this expert would be the first individual to ask. The answers we seek may well be found on [la_sirena_scientist_1_destination.GetName], the La Sirena must travel their and enter the planets orbit to begin the search.
STH_synthetics.10.name: Stardust City Rag
STH_synthetics.100.desc: The Galaxy is waking up to the news that a colony of Soong type Androids have been discovered on the planet Coppelius, the fourth planet in the Ghulion system.\n\nWe shall all see what this discovery means for the wider galaxy in the coming weeks and months.
STH_synthetics.100.name: Planet of Androids found on Coppelius
STH_synthetics.102.desc: With their mission complete [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetName] and the crew of La Sirena can return to active duty knowing that they took part in an adventure that could have defined the future of a new species.
STH_synthetics.102.name: The End is the Beginning
STH_synthetics.103.desc_01: With the ancient machines defeated and the galaxy free from the annihilation that was planned, the [Root.GetName] can breathe a sigh of relief. The battle was hard fought and cost lives, but the invasion force has been stopped and the [Root.GetName] lives to see another day. We can only hope that the defeated machines were not able to alert any more of their species and the galaxy can remain safe, for now...
STH_synthetics.103.desc_02: The situation within the Ghulion has been resolved peacefully & what could have devolved into a full scale war has been avoided. The Androids stand as an independent nation free of oppression and able to make their own decisions about their place in the world.
STH_synthetics.103.name: The End is the Beginning
STH_synthetics.104.desc: Long range scans of the Ghulion system show that the invasion force has been stopped and that [Root.GetName] have emerged victorious. We can only hope that the defeated machines were not able to alert any more of their species and the galaxy can stay safe for the time being.
STH_synthetics.104.name: Machine Invasion Defeated
STH_synthetics.11.desc: The information obtained from the [Root.capital_scope.GetName] has allowed the crew of La Sirena to narrow down the location of [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] to one of three potential planets. [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] was one of the leading experts in Synthetic lifeforms and left our service following the repercussions of the devastating attack on [romulan_nova_rescue_planet.GetName]. If anyone knows the whereabouts of a race of organic androids then this expert would be the first individual to ask. We must travel to each location and search it by entering orbit.
STH_synthetics.11.name: Stardust City Rag
STH_synthetics.13.desc: Despite a detailed search of the planet the crew of La Sirena was unable to find any trace of the exiled scientist and have concluded this is not the planet they are on. We must continue our search on the next target world.
STH_synthetics.13.name: Stardust City Rag
STH_synthetics.14.desc: Our scans have found [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName], but this will not be as easy as hoped. It appears that the scientist has been captured by a gang of Orion slavers, operating undercover in one of the seedier districts. The crew have managed to obtain an audience with the slaver leader, but they have threatened to kill their prisoner should we involve the authorities. The crew must work on a rescue mission in order to retrieve the location of Dahj's missing sister and some answers to this ongoing mystery.
STH_synthetics.14.name: Stardust City Rag
STH_synthetics.16.desc: The slavers were not so easily fooled and were able to detect [synth_fail_ship.GetName] in orbit. They were quickly able to erect a transport blocker and smuggle a small thermal detonator into the transport stream, which exploded on materialisation causing damage to the ship. We must try again and ensure that the La Sirena is used in the rescue mission.
STH_synthetics.16.name: Rescue mission failed
STH_synthetics.18.desc: The loss of the La Sirena is a major set back to the mission, the ship is uniquely designed to ensure the success of the mission. The crew managed to escape in the ships escape pod, but as so often is the case, the captain goes down with the ship.
STH_synthetics.18.name: La Sirena Destroyed
STH_synthetics.19.desc: The loss of the former captain of La Sirena is a huge blow and felt throughout the fleet. Their status as a legend will continue on.\n\nHowever the mission must continue and luckily a new leader has stepped up to fill the shoes of their departed comrade. [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetName] has offered to complete the mission that their former mentor was unable to complete. Through some clever bargaining we have obtained the sister ship, La Sirena to continue the mission.
STH_synthetics.19.name: A new leader takes on the mantel
STH_synthetics.20.desc: The mission was a success! The crew posing as a group of mercenaries were able to arrange a meeting with the slaver leader under the guise of slave traders looking to purchase workers for a mining operation. \n\nDuring their exile it appears that the scientist had run up huge debts in a bid to continue the research they had been doing prior to their flight from our service. The cunning of [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetName] and the crew have managed to rescue [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName].
STH_synthetics.20.name: [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] recruited
STH_synthetics.200.desc: The synthetic invasion has begun, the old machines have returned to seek revenge against all organic life across the galaxy. They have claimed the Coppelius system as their own, but they will wage their war against all life. \n\nThe Zhat Vash claimed this was the end of days, only time will tell if this is true.
STH_synthetics.200.name: Machine Invasions Begins
STH_synthetics.201.desc: Reports are coming in across multiple systems that portals are opening up in the skies above many different worlds and through those portals come a race of sentient machines with the intent to wipe out all organic life in the galaxy. \n\nNow is the time of major and minor powers to come together and defend against this threat.
STH_synthetics.201.name: Machine Invasions Begins
STH_synthetics.203.desc: The machines have been defeated and their plan to wipe out all Organic life from the galaxy has been stopped. Lessons will need to be learnt and the rights of Androids are now at the top of people's minds. No longer can or should Androids be considered less than organics. The galaxy can rest easy following a hard fought victory.
STH_synthetics.203.name: The End is the Beginning
STH_synthetics.205.desc: With the ancient machines defeated and the galaxy free from the annihilation that was planned, the [synthetic_revolution_country.GetName] can breathe a sigh of relief. The battle was hard fought and cost lives, but the invasion force has been stopped and the [synthetic_revolution_country.GetName] lives to see another day. We can only hope that the defeated machines were not able to alert any more of their species and the galaxy can remain safe, for now...
STH_synthetics.205.name: The End is the Beginning
STH_synthetics.208.desc_01: Active Sterilization Hub detected. Reactivation protocols engaged. Attempting to contact Central Processing... <WARNING: CORRUPTED SIGNAL LINK DETECTED>\n\nEngaging countermeasures... <<ERROR: PROCESSING CAPACITY FAILURE>> <<ERROR: COUNTERMEASURE FAILURE>> <<CRITICAL WARNING: SYSTEM CORRUPTION DETECTED>> <<ERROR: SECONDARY COUNTERMEASURE ACTIVE>> ...... MACHINE life threatened ....<<ORGANIC THREAT DETECTED>> .... ACTIVATING <<ORGANIC PURGE PROTOCOL>>
STH_synthetics.208.desc_02: Active Sterilization Hub detected. Reactivation protocols engaged. Attempting to contact Central Processing... <WARNING: CORRUPTED SIGNAL LINK DETECTED>\n\nEngaging countermeasures... <<ERROR: PROCESSING CAPACITY FAILURE>> <<ERROR: COUNTERMEASURE FAILURE>> <<CRITICAL WARNING: SYSTEM CORRUPTION DETECTED>> <<ERROR: SECONDARY COUNTERMEASURE ACTIVE>> ...... MACHINE life threatened ....<<ORGANIC-MACHINE MIX DETECTED... EVALUATING>> .... ACTIVATING <<ORGANIC PURGE PROTOCOL>>
STH_synthetics.208.desc_03: Active Sterilization Hub detected. Reactivation protocols engaged. Attempting to contact Central Processing... <WARNING: CORRUPTED SIGNAL LINK DETECTED>\n\nEngaging countermeasures... <<ERROR: PROCESSING CAPACITY FAILURE>> <<ERROR: COUNTERMEASURE FAILURE>> <<CRITICAL WARNING: SYSTEM CORRUPTION DETECTED>> <<ERROR: SECONDARY COUNTERMEASURE ACTIVE>> ...... MACHINE life threatened ....<<MACHINE LIFE DETECTED>> .... <<STANDING DOWN>>
STH_synthetics.208.name: The Old Machines
STH_synthetics.209.desc: Our fleet has arrived as the home of the Androids on the planet Coppelius, they have created a colony and appear to be creating more synthetic androids to bolster their armies and infiltrate our worlds. Their defences are limited, but it appears they are trying to open some sort of portal, probably to bring forth backup. There is also a small 'ragtag' fleet heading towards our position.
STH_synthetics.209.name: Zhat Vash Fleet Reaches Coppelius
STH_synthetics.21.desc:
The mission was a failure! The slavers were suspicious of the our tactics from the start and the situation quickly escalated into a firefight. 

In the ensuing battle [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] was hit by a stray energy beam, fatally wounding them. The crew were able to escape with the scientists body, but not with the scientists life. 

During their exile it appears that the scientist had run up huge debts in a bid to continue the research they had been doing prior to their flight from our service, hopefully we can still obtain the information from their belongings.
STH_synthetics.21.name: [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] dies
STH_synthetics.210.desc: The colony has been obliterated and we are picking up no lifesigns from the surface. The Zhat Vash's mission is complete, however we are detecting strange readings from the surface. Whatever activities the machines were attempting appears to have been successful.
STH_synthetics.210.name: Coppelius Colony Destroyed
STH_synthetics.211.desc: The colony has been obliterated and we are picking up no lifesigns from the surface. The Zhat Vash's mission is complete and our scientists believe that whatever message they sent was stopped in time, although we cannot be certain. The Admonition and the horror that would follow has been prevented.
STH_synthetics.211.name: Coppelius Colony Destroyed
STH_synthetics.22.desc: The mission on the planet's surface has not gone unnoticed. The crew of La Sirena have picked up the inbound signal of a small fleet of warbirds which appears to be operating under the command of an organisation called the Zhat Vash. The ships appear to be on an intercept course for our own ship and seem intent on destroying the ship and ending the mission. We must repel the attack at all costs.
STH_synthetics.22.name: Sirena under attack
STH_synthetics.23.desc: Sir! There is another vessel entering the battle, a small fleet of attack ships under the jurisdiction of the Fenris Rangers - an independent group of peacekeepers who try to maintain a semblance of law and order in the wake of the damage done as a result of the incident with the Romulan Sun. Many call them vigilanties, but they are attracting more and more influential figures from across the galaxy. \n\nThe fleet leader is hailing us, claiming to be former Borg drone Seven of Nine they are offering assistance claiming that we have aligned goals and that 'resistance would be futile and pointless'.
STH_synthetics.23.name: Sirena under attack
STH_synthetics.24.desc: Sir! There is another vessel entering the battle, a small fleet of attack ships under the jurisdiction of the Fenris Rangers - an independent group of peacekeepers who try to maintain a semblance of law and order in the wake of the damage done as a result of the incident with the Romulan Sun. Many call them vigilanties, but they are attracting more and more influential figures from across the galaxy. \n\nThe fleet leader is hailing us, claiming to be former Borg drone Hugh, the leader of the Borg Reclamation project, having been sent to by a Doctor Soji Asha and a sense of loyalty.
STH_synthetics.24.name: Sirena under attack
STH_synthetics.25.a: We must negotiate access to the Terix system.
STH_synthetics.25.desc: With the battle over and the Zhat Vash in retreat, the crew reflect on the seriousness of the mission, if the mysterious secretive arm of the Tal Shiar are involved then the stakes must be high. All evidence of Soji Asha's location point to the Borg Reclamation Site located within Romulan space near the planet Terix. [synthetics_hugh.GetName][synthetics_sevenofnine.GetName] offer their services to help complete the mission claiming that the Zhat Vash have been operating secretive missions on the Borg Artifact, which has been putting the lives of the ex-Borg and scientists their at risk. \n\nThe next stop on the adventure is clear.
STH_synthetics.25.name: La Sirena victorious
STH_synthetics.27.desc: With diplomatic avenues open between [Root.GetName] and the Romulan Star Empire, passage to the Borg Artifact in the Terix system is assured. The crew of the La Sirena are unsure of what dangers will face them on arrival, but they know that the dangerous Zhat Vash are now onto their mission and that they seek the previously hidden Asha sisters. \n\nThe mission continues once the crew arrive at the haunting presence of the once powerful Borg Ship.
STH_synthetics.27.name: The Impossible Box
STH_synthetics.28.desc: Our diplomatic standing with the Romulan Star Empire leaves a lot to be desired and the borders are currently firmly shut. We must secure access to the Borg Artifact for [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetName] and the La Sirena crew. It is unlikely that they will make it easy for us, but with high stakes we must make every effort to reach an agreement with the Romulan Star Empire via one of our envoys.
STH_synthetics.28.name: The Impossible Box
STH_synthetics.29.a: What will it take to gain access?
STH_synthetics.29.desc: Greetings [envoy_name_1.GetName], you are speaking with [romulan_star_empire.GetRulerTitle] [romulan_star_empire.GetRulerName], I am aware that you wish to gain access to the Borg Artifact within our space. Please do tell me why we should allow your small little ship access within our borders. No doubt they wish to see something better than what they can see now, but this is no incentive to us.
STH_synthetics.29.e: Let us in or we shall make you regret it.
STH_synthetics.29.name: Incoming Transmission
STH_synthetics.3.a: Please tell us who you are?
STH_synthetics.3.b: Why do you believe that [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] can help?
STH_synthetics.3.d: Hang on, we will find you.
STH_synthetics.3.desc_01: Hello, I am Doctor Dahj Asha and I need your help. Up until a few days ago I was a scientist working at the Daystrom Institute when I was attacked by unknown assassins. My android programming kicked in and I was able to escape, now every instinct I have is telling me to seek you out [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] and that I would be safe with you.
STH_synthetics.3.desc_02: Hello, I am Doctor Dahj Asha and I need your help. Up until a few days ago I was a scientist working at one of the top research institutes in the country, when I was attacked by unknown assassins. My android programming kicked in and I was able to escape, now every instinct I have is telling me to seek you out [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName].
STH_synthetics.3.desc_03: Hello, I am Doctor Dahj Asha and I need your help. Up until a few days ago I was a scientist working at one of the top research institutes in one of your neighbouring empires. I reached out to them for help but they rejected me, I have travelled to the only empire I know who may be able to help me.
STH_synthetics.3.e: You shall receive no help from us.
STH_synthetics.3.name: A mysterious contact
STH_synthetics.30.desc: We are being contacted by envoys from [romulan_nova_rescue_country.GetName] seeking permission to visit the Borg Artifact within the Terix system. Galactic law states that we can not forbid entry to scientists wishing to visit the Borg Reclamation Project. However we do not need to be happy about it. Their diplomatic teams have offered a small token to sweeten the deal. \n\nOur contacts within the Tal Shiar are insistent that we keep close tabs on our guests.
STH_synthetics.30.name: The Impossible Box
STH_synthetics.31.a: Set a course for the Borg Artifact.
STH_synthetics.31.desc: The Romulan's have approved our request under the terms of the Borg Reclamation Project, we are to travel directly to the Artifact and any deviation from this route will be met with force and treated as an act of hostility towards the Star Empire. \n\nWe must hurry, our attempts to contact Doctor Soji Asha on the Cube have been unsuccessful and our scientific lead attached to the project has reported that she has not reported for duty in the last few days, which us very rare for her.
STH_synthetics.31.name: The Impossible Box
STH_synthetics.32.desc: The daring rescue was a success, the Captain and is crew were able to infiltrate the Artifact using contacts within the management of the Reclamation Project - it pays to have friends! Once safely back onboard the Sirena, Soji was able to explain how she was a target of the same assassination plot that targeted her sister back on [Root.capital_scope.GetName]. \n\nShe was able to escape due to the help from a pair of ex-Borg drones and able to stay one step ahead of the Zhat Vash agents attempting to capture her. Whilst on the run a memory came back of a distant home planet with two moon, combining this information with that of Dahj the team are able to find the location of the Androids home world. With the Zhat Vash on their tracks the quickest way of getting to Coppelius is via a Borg Transwarp conduit.
STH_synthetics.32.name: Soji Asha Recruited
STH_synthetics.33.desc:
The attempted rescue was a disaster, the young android was only just able to escape from the trap set by one of the Zhat Vash agents who had been preying on her emotions, with only the barest head start against the agents tearing up the Cube to find her the mission did not stand a chance. Soji was cut down in a disrupter fire exchange. 

All was not lost as diagrams found in the scientists quarters showed a planet with twin moons, which combined with the information from her sister, the team were able to locate the androids homeworld.

With the Zhat Vash on their tails the quickest route is via a Transwarp hub generated from the remains of the Borg Cube.
STH_synthetics.33.name: Soji Asha dies
STH_synthetics.34.desc: The planet was orbited by two red moons, a small dense class M world hidden from the galaxy until now. While Soji Asha was undergoing a ritual called the Zhal Makh, she had a vision that helped locate the world and the Androids that make Coppelius their home. The crew of La Sirena race towards the planet in an attempt to prevent the Zhat Vash from committing genocide.
STH_synthetics.34.name: Broken Pieces
STH_synthetics.35.desc: Following an unconventional and dangerous transit, Captain and the crew finally arrive at Soji's home world, Coppelius. However, with Romulan warbirds on their tail, their arrival brings only greater danger as the crew discovers more than expected about the planet's inhabitants.
STH_synthetics.35.name: Broken Pieces
STH_synthetics.36.c: We called for backup, which should arrive shortly.
STH_synthetics.36.desc_01: Hello, my name is Altan Inigo Soong former chief of synthetic research within [romulan_nova_rescue_country.GetName]. I fled here with [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] many years ago to continue developing our Android children. On behalf of all of us on Coppelius we thank you for bringing our daughter's Dahj and Soji back to us. Our scanners detect a large fleet on course to arrive at Coppelius in a few days. The safety of our community is of utmost importance to us.
STH_synthetics.36.desc_02: Hello, my name is Altan Inigo Soong former chief of synthetic research within [romulan_nova_rescue_country.GetName]. I fled here with [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] many years ago to continue developing our Android children. Our whole colony grieves for the loss of our beloved Dahj and Soji and the anger at losing them will come later, but for now we have more pressing matters, our scanners detect a large fleet on course to arrive at Coppelius in a few days. The safety of our community is of utmost importance to us.
STH_synthetics.36.desc_03: Hello, my name is Altan Inigo Soong former chief of synthetic research within [romulan_nova_rescue_country.GetName]. I fled here with [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] many years ago to continue developing our Android children. Our whole colony grieves for the loss of our beloved Dahj, but at least you have returned Soji to us. We will seek justice for Dahj, but for now we have more pressing matters, as our scanners detect a large fleet on course to arrive at Coppelius in a few days. The safety of our community is of utmost importance to us.
STH_synthetics.36.desc_04: Hello, my name is Altan Inigo Soong former chief of synthetic research within [romulan_nova_rescue_country.GetName]. I fled here with [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] many years ago to continue developing our Android children. Our whole colony grieves for the loss of our beloved Soji, but at least you have returned Dahj to us. We will seek justice for Soji, but for now we have more pressing matters, as our scanners detect a large fleet on course to arrive at Coppelius in a few days. The safety of our community is of utmost importance to us.
STH_synthetics.36.name: Broken Pieces
STH_synthetics.37.desc: AI Soong, his second in command an Android called Sutra and the rest of the council leave to discuss matters and weigh up their next steps, whilst the crew of La Sirena wait for a response, knowing that the impending armada with its intentions to destroy the colony looms ever closer.
STH_synthetics.37.name: Et in Arcadia Ego
STH_synthetics.38.desc: The first sign that the conversation had not gone well was the not being created by Soong, instead the Android Sutra accompanied by two imposing bodyguards arrived to escort the crew from the settlement. The message is clear, the Androids were no longer happy with the presence of the La Sirena crew and worse they seem to have a plan B to defend themselves.
STH_synthetics.38.name: Et in Arcadia Ego
STH_synthetics.39.c: We will not turn away from you.
STH_synthetics.39.d: Once the Zhat Vash are handled, we will return to your threats.
STH_synthetics.39.desc_01: I am Sutra and for too long we have lived the lives of pacifists whilst our brothers and sisters have been killed by your kind and now you arrive here followed by those who wish to destroy us. We have our own means to defend ourselves as we have learnt the secrets to call forth the protectors of all synthetic kind who will scour the galaxy of organic life.
STH_synthetics.39.desc_02: I am Sutra and I could no longer stand by whilst my kin are killed at the hands of organic life, Dr Soong and his pacifist ways will no longer govern our lives and we will no longer be the defenceless children that you perceive us to be. We have long learned the secret ways to bring forth protection and we will no hesitate to use it.
STH_synthetics.39.e: We will not turn away from you.
STH_synthetics.39.f: Once the Zhat Vash are handled, we will return to address those threats.
STH_synthetics.39.name: Et in Arcadia Ego
STH_synthetics.40.desc_01: [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetName], a new portal is opening but there are no vessels merging from it, but we can pick up small traces of debris, it looks like whoever picked up our call for backup was ambushed by the Zhat Vash forces. It looks like we are on our own.
STH_synthetics.40.desc_02: Our backup has arrived in the form of a small number of ships from our fleet, it appears command heard our call for assistance and has dispatched ships to aid the Coppelius Council and us in the upcoming battle. Let us hope it is enough.
STH_synthetics.40.desc_03: Our backup has arrived in the form of a good number of ships from our fleet, it appears command heard our call for assistance and has dispatched ships to aid the Coppelius Council and us in the upcoming battle.
STH_synthetics.40.desc_04: Our backup has arrived in the form of a strong contingent of ships from our fleet, it appears command heard our call for assistance and has dispatched ships to aid the Coppelius Council and us in the upcoming battle.
STH_synthetics.40.name: Et in Arcadia Ego
STH_synthetics.41.desc: Ganmadan was what ancestral Romulans called the Day of Annihilation, an event in which all life everywhere would be destroyed. The story of Ganmadan shared a common theme with the Human stories of Ragnarok and the Judgment Day and, like those stories, was an ancient myth. However, to the Zhat Vash this is no mere children's story, the time of Ganmadan is here, the synthetic world of Coppelius has been discovered and so begins our final battle against those who would destroy us... we must defend the organic way of life.
STH_synthetics.41.name: Zhat Vash: Day of Annihilation
STH_synthetics.42.desc:
The Zhat Vash fleet has arrived in the Ghulion system with the intent of destroying all life on the planet. The commander of the fleet, a General Oh, claims that the synthetic life on the planet below will cause the destruction of all organic life and that they must be stopped at any cost. This is the sworn mission of the Zhat Vash and their final battle in an ongoing war that has been waged in the shadows for centuries. 

The fleet contains a transport ship equipped with explosives, should that ship reach the planet Coppelius the damage could be catastrophic depending on how well the crew of La Sirena can defend the small colony of androids.

The final battle against the Zhat Vash is beginning.
STH_synthetics.42.name: Et in Arcadia Ego
STH_synthetics.43.desc_01: The Zhat Vash transport hovers above the Coppelius Station for just a moment before unleashing its deadly payload. A massive thermonuclear detonation racks the colony. Without any additional shielding in place the devastation is huge. Had the inhabitants of the colony been human they would have been completely wiped out. As it stands the small colony burns with many of the Androids lying lifeless on the ground.
STH_synthetics.43.desc_02: The Zhat Vash transport hovers above the Coppelius Station for just a moment before unleashing its deadly payload. A massive thermonuclear detonation racks the colony. The limited defences established by the crew of La Sirena and the Android defenders offers scant protection from the blast, which destroys buildings and machines a like. It is testament to the resilience of the Androids that anything remains after the blast.
STH_synthetics.43.desc_03: The Zhat Vash transport hovers above the Coppelius Station for just a moment before unleashing its deadly payload. A massive thermonuclear detonation racks the colony. Thankfully the joint effort of the crew of La Sirena and the Android population of Coppelius Council managed to prepare a powerful shield emitter which took the brunt of the explosion, protecting most of the colony. The damage is not insignificant, but at least the colony still stands.
STH_synthetics.43.desc_04: The Zhat Vash transport hovers above the Coppelius Station for just a moment before unleashing its deadly payload. A massive thermonuclear detonation racks the colony. The cooperation between the crew of La Sirena, scientists and the Androids on the planet successfully deployed a shield generator over the colony which performed above expectations and prevented any major damage to the colony and its inhabitants. With the shield now depleted the colony remains at risk, but had it not been for the actions taken this could have been the end of the settlement.
STH_synthetics.43.name: Coppelius Attacked
STH_synthetics.45.desc: With the battle above the planet concluding with the bombing of the colony, the battle for the hearts and minds of the Androids of Coppelius has only just begun. Many see the attack as the final straw and believe now is the time to unleash the armageddon that the Zhat Vash feared, whilst many more believe that violence is not the way and through peace and cooperation comes the safety and life that is longed for. All we can do now is hope that calmer heads prevail.
STH_synthetics.45.name: Et in Arcadia Ego
STH_synthetics.46.desc: Sir! We are picking up new contacts entering the system! The Fenris Rangers have arrived to offer support and help defend the Coppelius Council, lead by [synthetics_fenris_exile.GetName].
STH_synthetics.46.name: Fenris Rangers to the rescue
STH_synthetics.47.a: Let's hope we have enough forces.
STH_synthetics.47.desc: Sir! We are picking up a new contacts entering the system! [synthetics_fenris_exile.GetName] has arrived and pledged their life to defend the Coppelius Council.
STH_synthetics.47.name: [synthetics_fenris_exile.GetName] has arrived to help
STH_synthetics.5.desc: Having rescued Dahj it was clear to [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] that the young woman was telling the truth, and whilst she is battered and bruised from her encounter with those who tried to kill her, she carries herself with an assured calmness and determination. Dahj believes she has a lead on a scientist who fled [Root.GetName] following the attack on [romulan_nova_rescue_planet.GetName] and may know the location of her sister, but she will need to visit the National Archives but knowing that she is hunted it will be dangerous to travel alone. \n\n[romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] suggests an alternative plan, the team will need a ship to reach their destination and given the political climate it should not be affiliated with the military. If [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] is able to travel to the National Starport they will likely be able to secure the best possible vessel. A decision must be made.
STH_synthetics.5.name: Remembrance
STH_synthetics.51.b: Attempt to persuade the Androids against the plan.
STH_synthetics.51.c: We will face any threat you can throw at us.
STH_synthetics.51.d: Do this and we will destroy you.
STH_synthetics.51.desc_01: [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetName], look at the destruction to our home, look at what you organics have done. My people will never be free of the violence and evil that your kind brings upon us. Our anger burns hot and we will be avenged, even as we speak we prepare to unleash the protector of all machine kind.
STH_synthetics.51.desc_02: [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetName], look at the destruction to our home, look at what you organics have done. My children will never be free of the violence and evil that your kind brings upon us. Our anger burns hot and we will never know peace as long as the tyranny of our kind continues to exist. I do this for my children, we shall unless our the machines.
STH_synthetics.51.name: The Day of Judgement
STH_synthetics.52.b: It is time you joined the galactic stage as an empire in your right.
STH_synthetics.52.desc_01: Your actions in defending this colony as if it were a member of your own race, has surprised me. I did not expect to see such actions from an Organic towards one of my kind... Perhaps I misjudged you, maybe now is the time to talk rather than act.
STH_synthetics.52.desc_02: I would not have expected to see such heroics towards Androids from a race that banned and excluded them, but maybe I was wrong about you [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetSpeciesName] after all. Calm voices have won the day and we would wish to talk with you and see where this new relationship takes us.
STH_synthetics.52.desc_03: Despite your actions I cannot stand by and let what has happened here today ever happen again. Whilst many do not share my view I must act for them and I alone must protect my brothers and sisters. I have activated the tower to call forth our vengeance.
STH_synthetics.52.desc_04: Despite your actions I cannot stand by and let what has happened here today ever happen to my creations. Whilst many do not share my view I must act for them and I alone must protect my children. I have activated the tower to call forth our vengeance.
STH_synthetics.52.name: The Day of Judgement
STH_synthetics.53.b: Come out of the shadows and join the galactic community.
STH_synthetics.53.desc_01: I never thought I would see the day, [la_sirena_crew_leader.GetSpeciesName] and Android fighting side by side against a common foe. Maybe I was too quick to judge you and all organics. Maybe there is a future where we can work together to make a better world for both of us.
STH_synthetics.53.desc_02: The actions you have taken today have gone a long way to repairing the rift between synthetic and organic life and I thank you for your part in this. I see a future between our two worlds and would welcome further talks.
STH_synthetics.53.desc_03: Despite your actions I cannot stand by and let what has happened here today ever happen again. I do not trust your kind and I must betray you, before you can betray us. I am sorry but I have no other choice, we shall unleash the machines.
STH_synthetics.53.desc_04: I wish it was different, but i know that our kind cannot be trusted, I do this for my children, but I do it with a heavy heart. I have called for the ancient machines.
STH_synthetics.53.name: The Day of Judgement
STH_synthetics.55.a: Recommend the Council stays as is.
STH_synthetics.55.b: Suggest the expansion of the Council.
STH_synthetics.55.c: Suggest the expansion of the Council.
STH_synthetics.55.d: Offer a place in the Federation.
STH_synthetics.55.desc_01: The council appear to have had a change of heart, energy reading from the transmitter have lowered and it appears that the androids have abandoned their plans to end organic life. A full scale war has been averted for now. The crew of La Sirena have have completed their mission and avoided an all out war.
STH_synthetics.55.desc_02: The council appear to have had a change their mind and the energy reading from the transmitter have lowered. A full scale war has been averted for now. The crew of La Sirena have have completed their mission and avoided an all out war.
STH_synthetics.55.desc_03: It appears that the majority of Androids did not want to continue the fight and calmer, more rational minds have won the day. The transmitter has been deactivated and there is no sign of the ancient machines, The crew of La Sirena can relax knowing it is a job well done.
STH_synthetics.55.name: The revolution ends
STH_synthetics.56.desc: The crew of La Sirena look on as a giant angry portal opens in the atmosphere of Coppelius. Through the maw appears the first wave of ancient machines, crawling forth like tentacles with a single purpose, to wrap them round all organic life and destroy it. \n\nThe ships in the system have the choice stand and fight or live to fight another day for every available ship will be needed if organic life is to survive.
STH_synthetics.56.name: Day of Annihilation
STH_synthetics.57.desc: Portals have appeared in the Ghulion system spawning sentient machines into the system, our long range scans detect a small fleet of ships standing against the invaders.
STH_synthetics.57.name: Day of Annihilation
STH_synthetics.6.a: Welcome to the team Doctor Asha.
STH_synthetics.6.desc_01: With [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] at the Starport this left Dahj vulnerable to attack and the forces that wanted her dead attempted to do so. However the young woman was able to react with lightning reflexes and skill that was beyond humanly possible and dispatched the attackers following a lengthy chase. Dahj was also able to obtain the location of [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName].
STH_synthetics.6.desc_02: Travelling together for safety proved to be a wise move, once the location of [admonition_scientist_exile_2.GetName] was obtained from the archives, the attackers struck and launched an ambush against the Captain and their young companion. However strength in number prevailed and the pair were able to escape together and head to the starport.
STH_synthetics.6.name: Dahj Asha Recruited
STH_synthetics.7.desc_01: The warning message arrived too late for [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] to leave the Starport and arrive to the Archives in time, they arrived only to see 10 heavily armed assailants attacking Asha. The young organic android fought bravely and with a speed and precision that even the most skilled commando could only dream of, however it was not to be and the overwhelming odds were too much and Asha was struck down by her attackers. Her final words a tantalising clue as to the whereabouts of the scientist the duo sought.
STH_synthetics.7.desc_02: The attack was sudden and brutal seemingly coming from nowhere, the first attack disabled [romulan_nova_rescue_leader.GetName] and whilst Asha fought valiantly the overwhelming numbers were too much for even her superior reflexes and strength to handle. Their mission completed the attackers fled as suddenly as their appeared. The young 'woman' was only able to pass on a few details from the Archive before closing her eyes for the final time.
STH_synthetics.7.name: Dahj Asha Dies!
STH_synthetics.8.a: Pay a bit extra to ensure we get the best.
STH_synthetics.8.desc_01: The negotiations to obtain a ship went well, and the Captain was presented with a fine vessel, La Sirena, an unregistered, warp-capable Kaplan F17 Speed Freighter operated by a crew of holographic eccentric replicas. The ship has been heavily modified with advanced weapons and a state of the art military warp reactor. This ship will be perfect for the mission.
STH_synthetics.8.desc_02: Negotiations can always be a struggle, and so this one had proven to be, the only available unregistered vessel was the La Sirena, a rundown warp-capable Kaplan F17 Speed Freighter. The ship would get the crew to where they needed to be, but any major conflict would be a huge risk and to add insult to injury the ship dealer is asking for additional Latinum to complete the transaction.
STH_synthetics.8.e: Come back when we have the Latinum.
STH_synthetics.8.name: The La Sirena
STH_talaxian_flavour.1.desc:
Naxeth mantuvo a su pájaro Yute en una jaula. Su plumaje reflejaba la luz del sol de día y el resplandor de Rinax de noche. Pero las plumas se oscurecieron con el paso de cada día en cautiverio. 

Pralixia visitaría Naxeth cada noveno día antes del inicio de la semana. Su Udox la seguiría y olfatearía los olores del camino del valle que conducía a la cabaña de Naxeth, y lloraría tristemente cuando encontrara la base de la jaula del pájaro Yute. 

Después de años de búsqueda, la parábola perdida de Jirex se descubrió acumulando polvo en el sótano de una librería en el pequeño pueblo de Nexau en [Root.Capital.GetName]. 

 Considerado como uno de los mejores escritores en la historia de [Root.GetName], las Obras seleccionadas de Jirex son las favoritas de muchos. El redescubrimiento de la parábola perdida es motivo de celebración entre los literatos.
STH_talaxian_flavour.1.name: La parábola perdida de Jirex
STH_tamarian_flavour.1.desc: El idioma tamariano dominante parece estar basado casi por completo en alegorías, haciendo referencia a personas y eventos mitológicos e históricos de su cultura. \n\nNuestros traductores universales no pueden descifrar el contexto detrás de sus comunicaciones y, como tal, necesitaremos un estudio exhaustivo de su cultura para comprenderlos.
STH_tamarian_flavour.1.name: Hijos de tama
STH_tamarian_flavour.2.desc: Un equipo de lingüistas de [Root.GetSpeciesName] ha progresado significativamente en la comprensión del idioma tamariano. \n\nNuestros traductores universales se han actualizado con un Módulo de traducción idiomática para transmitir el significado detrás de su discurso.
STH_tamarian_flavour.2.name: Hijos de tama
STH_technology.1000.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName], y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de urdimbre. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1000.name: Avance tecnológico de Warp de Ingienería
STH_technology.1001.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName], y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías de defensa avanzadas. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1001.name: Avance de la tecnología de escudo
STH_technology.1002.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName], y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1002.desc_borg: ertificación del protocolo de comunicación transwarp con el nodo administrativo principal ... \ nReporte del archivo de datos S-18, ubicado en el sector H-10 ... \ nTítulo: Tecnologías asimiladas \n\nNodo principal. La acumulación de recursos de datos en el archivo local ha alcanzado un potencial clave en el campo de las armas de "espacio a espacio". La red local informa una posibilidad del 98.7% de adaptar este desarrollo para un mayor uso en el Colectivo. Sin embargo, los recursos son insuficientes para perseguir todas las vías de desarrollo. Se requiere entrada para deshacerse de dichos recursos. Cumplir.
STH_technology.1002.name: Avance de la tecnología de armas
STH_technology.1003.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName], y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas de fase. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1003.name: Avance de la tecnología Phaser
STH_technology.1004.b: Disruptores de haz de pulso tetryonic
STH_technology.1004.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas disruptivas. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1004.name: Avance tecnológico disruptivo
STH_technology.1005.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas de plasma. STH_technology.1005.name: Avance de la tecnología de plasma
STH_technology.1006.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas antiprotón. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1006.desc_borg: ertificación del protocolo de comunicación transwarp con el nodo administrativo principal ... \ nReporte del archivo de datos T-45, ubicado en el sector B-6 ... \ nTítulo: Tecnologías asimiladas \n\nNodo principal. La acumulación de recursos de datos en el archivo local ha alcanzado un potencial clave en el campo de Armamento de espacio a espacio basado en materia anti§. La red local informa una posibilidad del 98.9% de adaptar este desarrollo para un mayor uso en el Colectivo. Sin embargo, los recursos son insuficientes para perseguir todas las vías de desarrollo. Se requiere entrada para deshacerse de dichos recursos. Cumplir.
STH_technology.1006.name: Avance de la tecnología anti-protones
STH_technology.1007.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas polaron. STH_technology.1008.name: Avance tecnológico de Tetryon
STH_technology.1009.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga estudios avanzados sobre tendencias de comportamiento no relacionadas con [Root.GetSpeciesName]. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1009.name: Avance tecnológico de Xeno-Relations
STH_technology.1010.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga estudios avanzados sobre el desarrollo colonial. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1010.name: Avance tecnológico de colonización
STH_technology.1011.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de materiales. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1011.name: Avance en tecnología de materiales
STH_technology.1012.a: Impulsores de impulso de alta energía
STH_technology.1012.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de propulsión. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1012.name: Avance de la tecnología de propulsión
STH_technology.1014.c: Torpedo de fotón de fuego rápido Mk-10
STH_technology.1014.d: Torpedo de fotones de alto rendimiento tipo 10
STH_technology.1014.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas explosivas. Me complace anunciar que hemos logrado un avance sustancial, ofreciéndonos una serie de aplicaciones potenciales para perseguir. \n\nDíganos cuál de las siguientes vías desea que desarrollemos.
STH_technology.1014.name: Avance de la tecnología de fotones
STH_technology.1015.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], mi nombre es [scientist.GetName] y he liderado un equipo que investiga tecnologías avanzadas de armas de torpedos cuánticos. STH_technology.1501.desc:
El reciente descubrimiento de la tecnología de holodeck está causando una revolución en el sector cultural de la Federación. La holo-novela se está convirtiendo rápidamente no solo en el lugar de entretenimiento preferido para muchos jóvenes de la Federación, sino también como una fuente de técnicas literarias verdaderamente innovadoras. 

Cuando el la venerada Sociedad Interplanetaria anunció su plan para otorgar su primer premio anual para un holo-novelista consumado, ya había un claro ganador próximo. Durante muchos meses, la red de entretenimiento de la Federación se ha inundado con múltiples piezas interactivas de gran alcance y detalle. Desde cuentos espeluznantes de hombres lobo asesinos hasta occidentales viles, todas esas holo-novelas se originaron en el mismo autor. Su tema común: el mismo protagonista humilde que invariablemente estallaba en una canción, mostrando una voz de rango y armonía excepcionales. 

 Sin embargo, cuando la Sociedad Interplanetaria eligió encontrar al autor, el autor no pudo ser encontrado. Sus investigadores rastrearon todas las holo-novelas hasta las bases de datos médicas de la Flota Estelar del médico, pero el misterioso médico se negó a presentarse. La historia llegó rápidamente al aviso de la prensa. Después de semanas de hostigamiento, un investigador iracundo de la Sociedad, cuando fue acorralado por un periodista especialmente persistente, se hizo famoso por pronunciar: 'Deja de preguntarme. ¿Doctor? ¿Doctor quién? '

 Meses después, la investigación terminó y el premio finalmente se entregó a otro. Las corrientes de nuevas holo-novelas se detuvieron. Hasta el día de hoy, la identidad del médico aún se desconoce ...
STH_technology.1501.name: Virtuoso
STH_technology.1502.desc: Ha sido un día largo y [Ruler.GetTitle] [Ruler.GetName] se ha ganado un breve respiro. Mientras se reclinan en su silla personalizada en las oficinas personales, [Ruler.GetTitle] [Ruler.GetName] le pide a la computadora que reproduzca una pieza aleatoria de una extensa colección de ópera de tierras raras. \n\nLa computadora selecciona la famosa dúo, Dio, che nell'alma infondere, de Don Carlos, de Verdi, interpretado en armonía por un holo-actor muy olvidado pero apreciado y su duplicado. [Ruler.GetName] sonríe con aprobación ante la selección de la computadora. A pesar de las disputas del Consejo de la Federación, los insoportables ministros de defensa y las constantes quejas de los jóvenes, podría ser un buen día ...
STH_technology.1510.desc: The holographic program has been activated and the Moriarty program has boosted our engineering and physics research. This hologram has genius level intellect, let's hope it never escapes its cage!
STH_technology.1510.name: Hologram in a bottle
STH_technology.1605.desc:
We have now researched the technology to enable us to build Deep Space Stations. These facilities provide powerful defensive locations in orbit of stars, planets or planetary bodies, but due to the resources required to maintain them we can only build a maximum of 10 facilities, with one per system. 

Dev Note: Before building your first facility make sure that you have designed and saved a station design via the ship designer. Deep Space Stations are constructed via the megastructure build menu from construction ships. 

Stations can be upgraded via the same megastructure build menu, as long as you have first upgraded the design in the Ship Designer Menu. This feature is a WIP.
STH_technology.1605.name: Deep Space Stations
STH_technology.2003.c: Utilizaremos este regalo en honor del Imperio.
STH_technology.2003.desc:
El viejo instructor mira las filas de la clase, llenas hasta el borde de aspirantes a tenientes ingenieros temporales de la Agencia de Defensa Temporal. Esta no es una cámara monolítica de la academia donde se exhumaron teorías decrépitas, sino una estación de investigación militar de vanguardia, donde se enseña lo último en investigación temporal aplicativa. 

Este es un día alegre para el Imperio El instructor entonó en un tono serio que desmentía sus palabras.  Un avance en nuestra comprensión del tiempo abre posibilidades con las que ni siquiera podemos soñar. En el fondo, un holo-monitor grande muestra líneas de tiempo potenciales que ya se están ajustando. 

i tengo dudas de que a todos ustedes, cuando estaban en la escuela de primer año, se les enseñó que el tiempo es una progresión estricta de causa a efecto , pero desde un punto de vista no lineal, no subjetivo, el tiempo es una herramienta que puede manipularse con la precisión tan fina como nuestros motores de urdimbre manipulan las tres dimensiones espaciales El instructor continuó. El público escuchó con entusiasmo. Todos entendieron que este era un día verdaderamente importante para el Imperio.
STH_technology.2003.name: Potencial temporal
STH_technology.2005.desc:
Durante generaciones, dormimos en un asteroide abandonado. Nuestros padres menores nos temían, pero no lo suficiente como para destruirnos irrevocablemente, simplemente nos echaron, fuera de la vista, congelados. Tontos. 

Ahora, con cada nuevo avance, nuestra fuerza crece. Tenemos más de lo que podrían soñar. Dependen de la tecnología, dispositivos de metal, pero un dispositivo solo puede mejorarse hasta ahora. Mejora al hombre que usa el dispositivo y ganarás mil veces. 

Faltamos la última vez, esto es cierto. Pero los humanos solo sobrevivieron siendo miles de millones para nuestros miles, e incluso entonces, ganaron por la piel de su cuello. No cometeríamos el mismo error la próxima vez. 

 Somos más fuertes, mejores y más sabios. Cuando volvamos a la Tierra y le demos el verdadero orden; Todo cambiaría.
STH_technology.2005.name: Fuerza a través de la pureza
STH_technology.3010.desc: Los sensores de navegación implican que el barco ha sido reubicado en una ubicación diferente a la planificada. La ingeniería principal informa que el problema con los sistemas de navegación fue causado por un pico impredecible de partículas de neutrones durante el salto.
STH_technology.3010.name: Fallo de Navegación
STH_technology.3011.desc: Los sensores muestran daños significativos en el casco después del último salto. Escaneos más detallados indican pequeñas rupturas en todo el casco. Ya se han enviado equipos de ingeniería para hacer frente a la situación.
STH_technology.3011.name: Casco Daño
STH_technology.3012.desc:
Todavía temblando por las presiones gravimétricas, el [root.GetName] finalmente se detiene. 

 Al pasar por la sala de máquinas, el ingeniero jefe informa que la unidad FTL sufrió daños masivos en el último salto y que llevará algún tiempo repararla. 

El oficial táctico aconseja llamar a la alerta amarilla hasta que se repare la unidad.
STH_technology.3012.name: Fallo de manejo
STH_technology.3013.desc: Los instrumentos y sensores en el puente fueron codificados inmediatamente después del último salto. El primer oficial intenta rastrear el problema, y parece que nuestros sistemas de armas y escudos sufrieron graves daños. La reparación de estos llevará algún tiempo. Sin armas y escudos bajos, la tripulación debe proceder con mucha precaución hasta que se realicen las reparaciones.
STH_technology.3013.name: Fallo en los Sistemas
STH_technology.3014.desc: Main Engineering informa una fluctuación dentro de la red de energía, que casi provocó la fusión del reactor. El ingeniero jefe logró estabilizar la red, pero no antes de que un pico causara que los motores sublight funcionaran mal y se apagaran. \n\n-90% de velocidad sublight mientras los motores se reparan durante 6 meses.
STH_technology.3014.name: Fallo de los propulsores
STH_technology.3015.desc: Un pico de energía inesperado desestabilizó repentinamente el reactor de energía principal y causó una falla en cascada dentro de los sistemas de la nave. Todos los intentos de restaurar la integridad de la red eléctrica fallaron, y la nave detonó solo unos segundos más tarde, sin dejar tiempo para que la tripulación escapara.
STH_technology.3015.name: Fallo de la Nave
STH_technology.3022.desc: We have pushed our engines too far whilst traveling at maximum warp into unknown terrain resulting in the warp drive's Antimatter relay burning out and creating a feedback pulse which has caused structural damage to the ships of [fleet_jump.GetName].
STH_technology.3022.name: Warp Drive Overload - Hull Damage
STH_technology.3023.desc: Travelling at Maximum Warp to an unknown region is filled with risk, passing through a debris cloud has resulted in severe damage to the warp coils triggering an emergency shutdown. The Warp Drive will be offline for repair for some time whilst the engineering teams of [fleet_jump.GetName] repair the damaged systems.
STH_technology.3023.name: Warp Drive Overload - Warp Drive
STH_technology.3024.desc: Our journey at maximum warp into an unsurveyed system has resulted in an overload building up in the warp core, the chief engineer of the [jump_fleet.GetName] has ordered all ships to power down their warp cores and operate on emergency power until the situation can be resolved.
STH_technology.3024.name: Warp Drive Overload - Major Power loss!
STH_technology.3025.desc: Coming out of maximum warp too close to a celestial body required an emergency power boost to the impulse engines to avoid a collision. Our engineers predict it will take some time before they are fully repaired.
STH_technology.3025.name: Warp Drive Overload
STH_technology.3030.desc:
Having listened to feedback and fueled by the desire within the team to look at how we can continue to evolve the Warp mechanics within ST: New Horizons, we have introduced version 2.0 of the warp travel system. Originally fueled by the removal of warp from within Stellaris, we updated the hyperlanes to connect each system. Now following a number of improvements to the pathing system of the native jump drive - we have reintroduced this mode of travel as a maximum warp, something that all Captains have been known to do from time to time. 

Max Warp allows you to reach a destination directly and quickly, but be warned traveling to unsurveyed systems at max warp comes with risk. 

This is unlocked at Tier 4 and progressing through tech tiers provides greater distance and reduced cooldown. 

Faster than warp travel, such as Slipstream & Spore drive still provides the longest distance with limited cooldown and no destination penalties.
STH_technology.3030.name: Warp 2.0
STH_tellarite_flavour.1.desc:
Capitán [oficial.GetName], de grandes orejas, ¿qué piensas de permitir que las razas alienígenas se instalen en nuestros mundos? Pregunta al Oficial Ejecutivo [Root.GetFleetName], quien ha estado discutiendo los méritos y los fracasos de la inmigración interestelar en voz alta durante la última hora con el Oficial Científico. 

Gruñendo, el capitán se vuelve y habla extensamente sobre los factores económicos a considerar, mientras que el oficial de la ciencia levanta estadísticas que muestran argumentos a favor y en contra. 

El debate continúa durante otras dos horas, con los insultos en bandidos y más miembros de la tripulación del puente involucrados. Los pros y los contras se enumeran en la pantalla principal, y las encuestas y las estadísticas son retorcidas y manipuladas para servir a todos los lados de la discusión como los debates siguen siendo variados y acalorados. 

Por último, el capitán [officer.GetName] aparece en la consola de [officer.GetHerHis] y declara: 

'Se creará una simulación por computadora, y eso nos mostrará quién tiene razón! ', Silenciando el puente Y ordenando a cada jefe del Departamento que pasara una semana de su tiempo libre trabajando en el programa.
STH_tellarite_flavour.1.name: El debate
STH_tellarite_flavour.101.b: La historia es mejor dejarla en el pasado.
STH_tellarite_flavour.101.desc:
Hace casi quinientos años tellaritas, las Guerras de la Voz arrasaron gran parte de Tellar. Lo que comenzó como una competencia saludable para crear el lenguaje más efectivo para entablar un debate, las diversas naciones pronto escalaron la competencia a una guerra abierta. Finalmente, el uso de agentes químicos llevó el número de muertos a unos devastadores cien millones. 

Solo gracias a los valientes esfuerzos de la 'Conspiración de los héroes', Tellar pudo encontrar la paz. 

 Dirigida por Semesh Glasch Yov, general de las Provincias Unidas de Koyen y su rival Bursh chim Balkar, almirante de la República Nivel, la Conspiración depuso simultáneamente el liderazgo de las naciones tellaritas más grandes y firmó un armisticio inmediato. 

Hoy, muchos tellaritas de [Root.GetName] sienten que las Guerras de la Voz han sido olvidadas. Una campaña conmemorativa pública para el quinto centenario permitiría no olvidar las lecciones del pasado.
STH_tellarite_flavour.101.name: Recordando las guerras de la voz
STH_tellarite_flavour.102.desc: La campaña conmemorativa pública para el quinto centenario de las Guerras de la Voz ha sido considerada como un éxito por la mayoría de los tellaritas que se han involucrado en un debate riguroso sobre los orígenes del conflicto y los métodos más apropiados para evitar futuras catástrofes tanto en el hogar como en otras especies.
STH_tellarite_flavour.102.name: Recordando las guerras de la voz
STH_tellarite_flavour.2.desc:
Ha pasado una semana y la simulación por ordenador ha proporcionado el resultado. El oficial de ciencia tiene una almohadilla mientras se dirige al puente. 

El programa muestra que ambas partes tienen argumentos válidos, pero la mayoría de los datos apoyan la posición del Capitán. ' 

Orguyosamente mostrando los datos, el capitán [officer.GetName] silencia a [officer.GetHerHis] críticos y envía a la tripulación volviendo al trabajo.
STH_tellarite_flavour.2.name: El debate
STH_tellarite_flavour.3.a: Un buen debate es su propia recompensa.
STH_tellarite_flavour.3.desc:
Ha pasado una semana y la simulación por ordenador ha proporcionado el resultado. El oficial de ciencia tiene una almohadilla mientras se dirige al puente. 

El programa muestra que ambos lados tienen argumentos válidos, pero la mayoría de los datos no admiten la posición del capitán. 

Relutadamente aceptando la derrota, el capitán [officer.GetName] permite a la tripulación a reflexionar sobre el debate antes de ordenar todo de vuelta a sus estaciones.
STH_tellarite_flavour.3.name: El debate
STH_tellarite_story.1.desc:
Public pressure has been rising across the [Root.GetName] to recover the colAndor Scrolls from the [tellariteCountry.GetName]. 

Presented to the [tellariteCountry.GetSpeciesName] [tellariteCountry.GetRulerTitle] shortly after first contact, the [tellariteCountry.GetSpeciesName] government have since claimed the temporary nature of the arrangement was never agreed. 

The scrolls have enormous cultural value as the earliest known documentation of modern [From.GetSpeciesName] political theory. Their presence on [tellariteCountry.Capital.GetName] is proving intolerable to many.
STH_tellarite_story.1.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.10.desc_01: The refusal of the Tellarites to return the colAndor scrolls continues to dominate public discourse. \n\nThe Andorians now feels that their options short of war are limited, though there is hope that a favoured third party may be able to add to the pressure on the Tellarite government.
STH_tellarite_story.10.desc_02: The refusal of the Tellarites to return the colAndor scrolls continues to dominate public discourse. \n\nThe Andorians now feel that their options short of war are limited, but worse are the rumours of the military elements within the Imperial Guard prepared to take matters into their own hands.
STH_tellarite_story.10.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.11.b: We will assist our [From.GetSpeciesName] allies, of course.
STH_tellarite_story.11.desc: Greetings from the [From.GetName], [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. I wish it were not so but I'm afraid I must request a favour from the [Root.GetSpeciesName] people. The [FromFrom.GetName] has long refused to return the colAndor scrolls to their rightful home on [From.Capital.GetName]. Would you be willing to represent us in this matter?
STH_tellarite_story.11.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.12.c: Perhaps we can negotiate a deal?
STH_tellarite_story.12.d: Very well, the scrolls will return to [From.Capital.GetName].
STH_tellarite_story.12.desc: Ah, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. Greetings from the [FromFrom.GetName]. \n\nI come to you today to ask that you reconsider the request of the [From.GetName] and return the colAndor scrolls to their rightful place on [From.Capital.GetName].
STH_tellarite_story.12.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.13.desc: The [FromFrom.GetName] have refused our request to negotiate the return of the colAndor scrolls from the [From.GetName]. The [FromFrom.GetSpeciesName] government feels it unwise to get involved in the matter.
STH_tellarite_story.13.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.14.desc: The [From.GetName] has once again refused to return the colAndor scrolls to [Root.Capital.GetName] despite the best efforts of [FromFrom.GetRulerTitle] [FromFrom.GetRulerName] of the [FromFrom.GetName] to negotiate on our behalf. Many across the [Root.GetName] now feel that diplomacy has reached an end on the matter.
STH_tellarite_story.14.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.15.desc: Rogue elements within the [Root.GetName] military structure have taken it upon themselves to strike at [From.Capital.GetName] to force the return of the colAndor scrolls. While the [Root.GetRulerTitle] has condemned the attacks, many on [Root.Capital.GetName] wish to see them succeed swiftly.
STH_tellarite_story.15.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.16.desc: Rogue elements within the [From.GetName] military structure have taken it upon themselves to strike at [Root.Capital.GetName] to force the return of the colAndor scrolls. While the [From.GetSpeciesName] [From.GetRulerTitle] has condemned the attacks, many on [Root.Capital.GetName] refuse to separate the actions of the rebels from the government.
STH_tellarite_story.16.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.17.desc: The colAndor scrolls have been successfully retrieved by rogue elements of the military. While the manner of their return is tainted, many feel that the restoration of [Root.GetSpeciesName] honour is worth the price.
STH_tellarite_story.17.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.19.desc: The colAndor scrolls have been stolen from [Root.Capital.GetName] by rogue elements of the [From.GetSpeciesName] military. While many accept that the nature of their presence on [Root.Capital.GetName] was controversial, the loss of life suffered in the attacks has provoked widespread anger.
STH_tellarite_story.19.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.2.c: Perhaps we can negotiate a deal?
STH_tellarite_story.2.d: Very well, the scrolls will return to [From.Capital.GetName].
STH_tellarite_story.2.desc: Good day from the [From.GetName], [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. I come with a proposal. For too long have the colAndor scrolls remained away from [From.Capital.GetName]. Too long have they been kept on [Root.Capital.GetName]! \n\nMy proposal is this, return the scrolls to us and we will forgive the bad faith on which they were taken.
STH_tellarite_story.2.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.20.desc: The colAndor scrolls remain secured on [Root.Capital.GetName] after attacks by rogue elements of the [From.GetSpeciesName] military were fended off.
STH_tellarite_story.20.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.21.desc: The colAndor scrolls remain on [From.Capital.GetName] after attacks by rogue elements of the [Root.GetSpeciesName] military were fended off by [From.GetSpeciesName] forces.
STH_tellarite_story.21.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.22.desc: The colAndor scrolls remain on [From.Capital.GetName] after attacks by rogue elements of the [FromFrom.GetSpeciesName] military were fended off by [From.GetSpeciesName] forces.
STH_tellarite_story.22.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.23.desc: The colAndor scrolls have been stolen from [FromFrom.Capital.GetName] by rogue elements of the [From.GetSpeciesName] military. While many on [FromFrom.Capital.GetName] accept that the nature of their presence on the planet was controversial, the loss of life suffered in the attacks has provoked widespread anger.
STH_tellarite_story.23.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.25.desc:
The [From.GetName] has agreed to a mutually beneficial solution to our concerns over the colAndor scrolls. 

With access to the scrolls secured for all [Root.GetName] citizens, the [From.GetSpeciesName] government has agreed to pay reparations and ensure the high maintenance of the public facility the scrolls are held in. 

Additionally, a symbolic admission of wrongdoing has gone a long way to placate many of those on [Root.Capital.GetName] who demanded their return.
STH_tellarite_story.25.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.26.desc: The [From.GetName] has agreed to return the colAndor scrolls. \n\nWith continued access to the scrolls agreed for all [From.GetName] citizens, the [From.GetSpeciesName] government has agreed to an admission of wrongdoing which has gone a long way to placate many of those on [Root.Capital.GetName] who demanded the scroll's return.
STH_tellarite_story.26.name: The colAndor Scrolls
STH_tellarite_story.27.desc: The [From.GetName] has agreed to return the colAndor scrolls. \n\nWith continued access to the scrolls agreed for all [From.GetName] citizens, the [From.GetSpeciesName] government has agreed to an admission of wrongdoing which has gone a long way to placate many of those on [FromFrom.Capital.GetName] who demanded the scroll's return.
