Unfortunately, that means that Paxton will now proceed with his plan of destroying Starfleet Command.
STH_united_earth_story.215.name: Demons
STH_united_earth_story.216.desc: A strike team led by General [root.leader.GetName] fought valiantly against the Terra Prime forces and eventually managed to secure the communications tower and other main installations controlled by John Paxton. In a final attack on the Verteron Array General [root.leader.GetName] has managed to capture John Paxton himself, before he had the chance to destroy Starfleet Command.
STH_united_earth_story.216.name: Demons
STH_united_earth_story.217.desc: A daring attack on the Martian facilities by the brave men and women of [root.GetName] military forces has led to a complete victory over the Terra Prime organisation. John Paxton and his associates have all been arrested and will soon stand trial. Finally, peace has been restored in the [root.GetName].
STH_united_earth_story.217.name: Demons
STH_united_earth_story.218.desc: After years of political swaying and negotiations, leaders of Terra Prime have finally accepted reunification of the planet Mars with the rest of [root.GetName].
STH_united_earth_story.218.name: Demons
STH_united_earth_story.219.c: There's no need for all this.
STH_united_earth_story.219.desc.nonxenop: A few decades ago a new political regime has been installed on [root.capital.GetName]. And although the current government led by [ruler.GetTitle] [ruler.GetName] does not believe in xenophobic ideas as fervently, in the eyes of foreign powers [root.GetName] is still the same humanocentric state it used to be back then. An ever-growing faction within [root.GetName] advocates for the removal of the pro-xenophobic symbols, as it would show the rest of the galaxy that [root.capital.GetName] is perhaps not as xenophobic as they choose to believe. [ruler.GetTitle] [ruler.GetName] could potentially ally with this faction and reform the political regime, but it would require a small amount of £ Influence.
STH_united_earth_story.219.desc.xenophob: A few decades ago a new political regime has been installed on [root.capital.GetName]. And although the current government led by [ruler.GetTitle] [ruler.GetName] is still true to John Paxton's vision, the political landscape both within [root.GetName] and in the galaxy at the whole is very different from what it used to be back then. A small faction within [root.GetName] voices its concern that continuing the current policy of xenophobia will inevitably lead to the destruction of [root.GetName]. [ruler.GetTitle] [ruler.GetName] could potentially ally with this xenoist faction and reform the political regime, but it would require a considerable amount of £ Influence.
STH_united_earth_story.219.name: Wind of Change
STH_united_earth_story.22.desc:
El arma Xindi ha sido destruida. Los esfuerzos de la Flota Estelar no pueden ser exagerados. 

Los Xindi-Reptilianos y los Insectoides han sido devastados por la pérdida del arma y su flota, y han aceptado el ultimátum que les ha proporcionado la especie Xindi restante por desafiar la voluntad del Consejo. 

Aceptar su manipulación en apuntar al [Root.GetName], los Primates, Arboreals y Aquatics han prometido mantener la paz entre las dos potencias, aunque las relaciones no serán fáciles.
STH_united_earth_story.22.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.220.desc.earth: Now that the crisis on [mars.GetName] has been resolved, it is once again possible to use the Verteron Array for its intended purpose. Terraforming engineers have already started preparations and soon the surface of [mars.GetName] can be terraformed into a more habitable state. All that is needed is a large amount of £ energy to power the Verteron Array.
STH_united_earth_story.220.desc.ufp: Now that the period of technical maintenance has ended, it is once again possible to use the Verteron Array for its intended purpose. Terraforming engineers have already started preparations and soon the surface of [mars.GetName] can be terraformed into a more habitable state. All that is needed is a large amount of £ energy to power the Verteron Array.
STH_united_earth_story.220.name: Dreams of a Blue Planet
STH_united_earth_story.221.a.tooltip: Begin the situation that will prepare our diplomats to bring back into the banner of [Root.GetName].
STH_united_earth_story.221.b.tooltip: Rejecting will lose you the chance to peacefully reunite Earth and Mars.
STH_united_earth_story.221.desc: With Terra Prime defeated, the politicians on Earth are keen to once again unite the Sol system and integrate Mars and Earth back under one banner.
STH_united_earth_story.221.name: Mars and Earth Reunification
STH_united_earth_story.23.desc:
El arma Xindi ha destruido [Root.Capital.GetName]. El lanzamiento apresurado del arma provocó un impulso de retroalimentación después de su primer disparo, lo que resultó en su propia destrucción. 

Tendida por la pérdida de [Root.Capital.GetName] y la muerte de miles de millones, la Humanidad ha sido llevada al borde de Extinción.

La destrucción del arma ha obligado a los Xindi-Reptilianos e Insectoides a aceptar el ultimátum proporcionado a ellos por las especies Xindi restantes para desafiar la voluntad del Consejo. 

Aceptar su manipulación en la orientación del [Root.GetName ], Los Primates, los Arbóreos y los Aquáticos han prometido defender la paz y no volver a atacar a la Humanidad. 

A través de los pocos mundos humanos que quedan, la gente reacciona con horror. Prometiendo preservar la Humanidad a toda costa La Flota Estelar promulga la ley marcial, declarando al Resto Humano Unido el estado sucesor de la antigua Tierra Unida.
STH_united_earth_story.23.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.30.desc:
Hemos llegado a las coordenadas del sistema Xindi casa, sin embargo no se pueden detectar mundos habitables. En cambio, un enorme campo de asteroides llena la zona habitable de la estrella.

Utilizando el modelado predictivo, el Oficial de Ciencias puede confirmar que el campo de asteroides vino de un solo mundo entre 150 y 200 años atrás. El análisis material del campo indica la presencia de compuestos avanzados que indican la presencia de una cultura de warp-faring. 

Si éste es el mundo natal de Xindi, se ha roto durante mucho tiempo. 

Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] Ordena una vuelta al patrón original de la búsqueda de la extensión.
STH_united_earth_story.30.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.31.a: Utilice MACOs para rescatar al equipo visitante.
STH_united_earth_story.31.desc: La empresa ha detectado una señal de socorro de Vulcan transmitida desde un campo de asteroide cercano. En inspección el buque - el Seleya - está fuertemente dañado y no responde a granizos. En el embarcadero, el capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] lidera un equipo para establecer contacto con la tripulación e intentar afectar las reparaciones. \n\nDurante la nave de Vulcan, varios miembros de la tripulación de Vulcan en una emboscada de estado frenético [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] Obligándolos a refugiarse en la sala de control de Seleya. Al analizar los biorredecimientos de un oficial vulcaniano aturdido inconsciente revela que el efecto psicótico ha sido causado por la exposición a Trellium-D que penetra el campo de asteroides.
STH_united_earth_story.31.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.32.desc:
El equipo de MACOs barrer a través de la Seleya, decenas de psicópatas Vulcans atacar a medida que progresan. Eventualmente, los MACO llegan a la sala de control y comienzan a escoltar al equipo de [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] hacia la lanzadera de espera. 

La ruta al transbordador los lleva a través de la sección de ingeniería de Seleya, donde una emboscada y el tiroteo resultante terminan perjudicando El núcleo de la urdimbre del barco y desencadenar una brecha inminente. 

El equipo visitante y los MACOs apenas tienen tiempo para despejar el área antes de las brechas del núcleo de Seleya, matando a todos a bordo. 

 [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] registra el incidente en un [ Root.Capital.GetName] para informar al gobierno de Vulcano, pero la expectativa es que el fracaso dañará las relaciones. 

La investigación de la Extensión Delphic continúa.
STH_united_earth_story.32.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.33.desc:
El Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] ordena al personal médico de la Empresa agotar todas las opciones para proporcionar una cura a los Vulcanos psicóticos en el Seleya, mientras que el equipo visitante refuerza su posición en la sala de control. 

En un día transcurre una serie de Curas potenciales se proporcionan, sin embargo, todos requieren pruebas. Seleccionando el antídoto más probable, un equipo médico distribuye la mezcla de agentes neutralizadores de Trellium-D a través de las conexiones umbilicales de soporte de vida en el puerto de estribor de Seleya. 

En unos minutos toda la tripulación del Seleya está inconsciente, permitiendo al equipo visitante Salga de la sala de control. Varias horas pasan y la tripulación comienza a despertar nuevamente, sin mostrar signos de su comportamiento anterior. 

El personal superior superviviente de los Seleya expresa su agradecimiento por los esfuerzos de la Enterprise, y se compromete a solicitar al gobierno de Vulcano para ayudar en el [Root .GetName] en busca de una solución a la crisis de Xindi, tan pronto como los efectos Seleya reparaciones.
STH_united_earth_story.33.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.34.desc:
El Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] ordena al personal médico de la Empresa agotar todas las opciones para proporcionar una cura a los Vulcanos psicóticos en el Seleya, mientras que el equipo visitante refuerza su posición en la sala de control. 

En un día transcurre una serie de Curas potenciales se proporcionan, sin embargo, todos requieren pruebas. Seleccionando el antídoto más probable, un equipo médico distribuye la mezcla de agentes neutralizadores de Trellium-D a través de las conexiones umbilicales de soporte de vida en el puerto de estribor de Seleya. 

En unos minutos toda la tripulación del Seleya está inconsciente, permitiendo al equipo visitante Salga de la sala de control. Varias horas pasan y la tripulación no se despierta de nuevo, todas con señales de daño cerebral permanente. 

Capitan [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] ordena que la tripulación efectúe reparaciones a Seleya antes de enviarla de nuevo al espacio de Vulcan en control automático, Registro de los acontecimientos que condujeron a la muerte de la tripulación.
STH_united_earth_story.34.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.35.a: [Xindi_probe_leader.GetName] para dirigir un equipo visitante a la colonia.
STH_united_earth_story.35.b: Sabotear el almacenamiento de kemocite solamente.
STH_united_earth_story.35.desc: Meses de investigación han llevado al Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] a una colonia minera de Xindi donde Kemocite, un elemento clave usado en el ataque de la sonda Xindi en la Tierra, se está produciendo en grandes cantidades. Las minas parecen estar rodeadas por una serie de pequeños asentamientos con diseños que sugieren un uso civil. \n\n Con tiempo y materiales suficientes podríamos crear una serie de cargas explosivas que destruirían las minas de Kemocite, evitando dañar las estructuras civiles, pero cualquier demora Podría permitir que los Xindi recojan más Kemocite para su próxima arma.
STH_united_earth_story.35.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.36.desc: Infiltrándose en la colonia minera, el equipo del Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] ha identificado al jefe de operaciones y lo ha capturado en su casa. \n\nConsiderando a Xindi Arboreal, un hombre llamado Gralik, revela cómo se le había asegurado que el Kemocite producido En la colonia fue para fines de investigación solamente. Horrorizado ante la perspectiva de que su trabajo mata a millones de personas, Gralik acuerda ayudar a sabotear el próximo envío de Kemocite y proporcionar un dispositivo de rastreo que permita a la Enterprise seguir el envío a donde se produzcan estas armas.
STH_united_earth_story.36.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.37.desc: Los explosivos destruyen con éxito las instalaciones mineras de Xindi, al tiempo que impiden todo daño superficial a los asentamientos circundantes. El tiempo para detonar por la noche, las bajas entre el personal de la minería se han mantenido bajos. \n\nHoras después de la destrucción de la instalación un número de naves Xindi fueron detectados cayendo de la urdimbre y el aterrizaje por el complejo. Volviendo poco después, la empresa pudo rastrear su vector de urdimbre.
STH_united_earth_story.37.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.38.desc: Los explosivos destruyeron con éxito las instalaciones mineras de Xindi, sin embargo los asentamientos circundantes fueron atrapados en la explosión resultante. Todo menos un puñado de edificios permanecen incólumes y las víctimas son altas. \n\nHoras después de la destrucción de la instalación se detectaron varias naves Xindi que salían de la urdimbre y aterrizaban en el complejo. Volviendo poco después, la empresa pudo rastrear su vector de urdimbre.
STH_united_earth_story.38.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.39.desc:
Tras haber seguido los envíos de Kemocite a un sistema cercano, la Enterprise se encontró con un buque Andoriano, el Kumari bajo el Comandante Shran de la Guardia Imperial. 

Observando el Alto Comando Vulcano por su falta de apoyo a los esfuerzos de [Root.GetName] contra los Xindi, el Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] no puede dejar de sentir que hay más en la presencia Andoriana en la Extensión. 

Mientras que los dos vasos se sientan en el borde del sistema, sus sensores detectan una descarga de energía masiva en el cinturón de asteroides interior como un planeta enano se vaporiza, lo que confirma más la amenaza de otro arma Xindi.
STH_united_earth_story.39.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.40.desc:
El rechazo de los Andorianos ayuda a engañar a Shran, quien revela sus órdenes de adquirir la tecnología detrás del arma Xindi para el Imperio Andoriano. 

El Enterprise no es rival para el Kumari, que se sumerge en las regiones internas del sistema de caza de las instalaciones de ensayo del arma . Varios barcos de patrulla Xindi emergen del cinturón de asteroides internos y enganchan al Kumari, el cual los desgarra con facilidad. 

Más tarde, el propio Arma ataca al Kumari con su haz principal subcargado, incapacitando al buque mientras causando una catastrófica sobretensión Que desgarra el Arma. 

Controlando al Kumari, el Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] recibe una respuesta cargada de insulto antes de que se aleje en una deformación baja. Escaneando los escombros del arma revela una serie de debilidades potenciales, sin embargo no hay pistas en cuanto a la ubicación de cualquier prototipo más.
STH_united_earth_story.40.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.41.desc:
Aceptar a los andorianos ayuda a Shran, cuya tripulación pasa los próximos días actualizando varios sistemas a bordo de la Enterprise

 [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] y Shran diseñan un plan para capturar el prototipo de arma usando la Enterprise como cebo para atraer a los Xindi 

La misión es exitosa y los dos buques se reúnen en la nube de Oort del sistema para investigar conjuntamente el funcionamiento del arma.

Varios protocolos de seguridad no detectados Se disparan sin embargo, y ambos buques evitar estrechamente la destrucción como el arma desencadena una sobrecarga de sus emisores de energía Kemocite-atados. El Kumari está fuertemente dañado y el Comandante Shran se ve obligado a aceptar la asignación de un pequeño continente de ingenieros de Enterprise para ayudar al buque a regresar al espacio andorrano. 

Las exploraciones iniciales del arma revelan una serie de debilidades potenciales, sin embargo no hay pistas En cuanto a la ubicación de otros prototipos.
STH_united_earth_story.41.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.42.desc:
Aceptar a los Andorianos ayuda a Shran, cuya tripulación pasa los próximos días actualizando varios sistemas a bordo de la Enterprise.

[xindi_probe_leader.GetName] Y Shran idear un plan para capturar el prototipo de arma mediante el uso de la empresa como cebo para atraer a los buques de patrulla Xindi fuera antes de permitir que el Kumari para transmitir el arma a bordo y desarmarlo.

La misión es exitosa, sin embargo Shran revela órdenes secretas de robar el arma sólo para el Imperio andorrano. 

La Enterprise persigue a los Kumari en la nube de Oort del sistema, aunque parece que los ingenieros andorianos han disparado un protocolo de seguridad sobre el arma, Desencadena una sobrecarga de sus emisores de energía Kemocite-atados. El Kumari está fuertemente dañado, incapaz de impedir que la Enterprise retransmita los restos del arma o descargue los escáneres de Kumari, antes de que logre cojear de vuelta al espacio andoriano.

 Las exploraciones del arma revelan una serie de debilidades potenciales, sin embargo no hay pistas en cuanto a la ubicación de cualquier prototipo más.
STH_united_earth_story.42.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.43.a: Abandone Degra en un mundo deshabitado.
STH_united_earth_story.43.c: Free Degra como un símbolo de buena voluntad.
STH_united_earth_story.43.desc:
Las largas semanas de caza de la Extensión han dado sus frutos cuando la Empresa ha capturado con éxito un transbordador perteneciente al científico de Primates Xindi que lidera su proyecto de armas contra [Root.Capital.GetName], un hombre llamado Degra. 

Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] Ahora debe decidir cómo sacar ventaja de [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] nuevo cautivo. El oficial táctico sugiere una rutina elaborada usando drogas inhibidoras de la memoria y un lanzadera simulada para extraer la ubicación del arma Xindi final de Degra, pero los recursos requeridos son sustanciales. 

Una interrogación inicial revela poco más allá del conocimiento que los Xindi creen aparentemente Que destruir la Tierra es su única esperanza de supervivencia.
STH_united_earth_story.43.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.44.desc: El capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] ordena a Degra y la tripulación de su lanzadera abandonar en el mundo deshabitado más cercano capaz de sostener la vida. Se ofrece una gran cantidad de provisiones, con la esperanza de que la ausencia de Degra ralentice sustancialmente el avance del arma. \n\nSin embargo, la ubicación del arma sigue siendo desconocida.
STH_united_earth_story.44.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.45.desc:
El capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] ordena la construcción de un interior de lanzadera simulada, según la propuesta del Oficial Táctico. Usando drogas inhibidoras de la memoria, el Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] es capaz de persuadir a Degra de que los dos han sido prisioneros de los reptiles de Xindi durante varios años, después de la destrucción de la Tierra y la posterior traición de las otras especies Xindi. 

Degra revela que Xindi estaba convencido de atacar a la Tierra por seres transdimensionales que se presentaron como los salvadores de Xindi.

Después de una serie de ataques falsos a la lanzadera y una promesa de [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] para rescatar a la familia de Degra, El arma Xindi se revela - Azati Prime. 

La simulación se termina y la memoria a corto plazo de Degra se borra. En un intento de generar simpatía por su causa, el Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] le ofrece a Degra ya su equipo su libertad, sin confesar que la ubicación del arma ha sido comprometida.
STH_united_earth_story.45.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.46.desc:
El capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] ordena la construcción de un interior de lanzadera simulada, según la propuesta del Oficial Táctico. Usando drogas inhibidoras de la memoria, el Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] es capaz de persuadir a Degra de que los dos han sido prisioneros de los reptiles de Xindi durante varios años, después de la destrucción de la Tierra y la posterior traición de las otras especies Xindi. 

Degra revela que Xindi estaba convencido de atacar a la Tierra por seres transdimensionales que se presentaron como los salvadores de Xindi. 

Después de una serie de falsos ataques a la lanzadera hacen que la simulación se sobrecargue y las ventanas se revelen, Degra reacciona enojada Al engaño. La simulación se termina. 

El capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] no puede perder más tiempo, y ordena que Degra y la tripulación de su lanzadera abandonen el mundo deshabitado más cercano, capaz de sostener la vida. 

 Con la esperanza de que la ausencia de Degra ralentice sustancialmente el progreso en el arma. 

Sin embargo, la ubicación del arma sigue siendo desconocida.
STH_united_earth_story.46.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.47.desc:
El capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] pasa los próximos días intentando convencer a Degra de la inocencia de [Root.GetName], que [Root.Capital.GetName] no tiene la intención de destruir el Xindi. 

En primer lugar, Al mismo punto de incredulidad, pero después de prometer liberar a Degra ya su equipo, el Xindi-Primate comienza a dudar de sus convicciones. No tarda mucho tiempo en convencer a Degra para que al menos [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] presente el caso de [Root.Capital.GetName]. 

Proporcionando un conjunto de coordenadas, Degra pide a la Enterprise que llegue al sistema dentro de 30 días para que [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] pueda hablar ante el Consejo Xindi.
STH_united_earth_story.47.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.48.desc:
Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] pasa los próximos días tratando de convencer a Degra de la inocencia de [Root.GetName], que [Root.Capital.GetName] no tiene la intención de destruir el Xindi. 

Las conversaciones vuelan una y otra vez al mismo punto de incredulidad y después de agotar todas las vías de persuasión, el Capitán ordena a Degra y la tripulación de su lanzadera abandonada en el mundo deshabitado más cercano capaz de sostener la vida. 

Se ofrece una gran cantidad de provisiones, con la esperanza de que la ausencia de Degra ralentice sustancialmente el progreso en el arma. 

Sin embargo, la ubicación del arma sigue siendo desconocida.
STH_united_earth_story.48.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.49.desc_01:
La Enterprise llega al sistema Azati, casi inmediatamente disparada por los numerosos buques de guerra Xindi que patrullan la zona. 

El ataque se detiene pronto, ya que un escuadrón de barcos Xindi-Primate y Xindi-Arboreal forma una escolta protectora alrededor de la zona. Enterprise. 

Se detectan explosiones intensas de comunicación entre los distintos barcos de Xindi, hasta que al final un transbordador con el Enterprise y un destacamento de seguridad Xindi-Primate ofrece escoltar al Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] a las cámaras del Consejo de Xindi para presentar [ Xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] caso en persona.
STH_united_earth_story.49.desc_02:
La Enterprise llega al sistema Azati, casi inmediatamente disparada por los numerosos buques de guerra Xindi que patrullan la zona. 

El ataque se detiene pronto, ya que un escuadrón de barcos Xindi-Primate y Xindi-Arboreal forma una escolta protectora alrededor de la zona. Enterprise. 

Se detectan explosiones intensas de comunicación entre los distintos barcos de Xindi, hasta que al final un transbordador con el Enterprise y un destacamento de seguridad Xindi-Primate ofrece escoltar al Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] a las cámaras del Consejo de Xindi para presentar [ Xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] caso en persona.
STH_united_earth_story.49.desc_03:
El Enterprise llega al sistema Azati, casi inmediatamente disparado por los numerosos buques de guerra Xindi que patrullan la zona.

El ataque se detiene pronto, ya que un escuadrón de barcos Xindi-Arbóreos forma una escolta protectora alrededor de la Enterprise. 

 Se detectan intensas ráfagas de comunicación entre los distintos barcos Xindi, hasta que finalmente un transbordador se conecta con la Enterprise y un destacamento de seguridad Xindi-Arbóreo ofrece escoltar al Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] a las cámaras del Consejo de Xindi para presentar [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] Caso en persona.
STH_united_earth_story.49.desc_04:
El Enterprise llega al sistema Azati, casi inmediatamente disparado por los numerosos buques de guerra Xindi que patrullan la zona. 

El ataque pronto se detiene, ya que un escuadrón de barcos Xindi-acuáticos forma una escolta protectora alrededor de la Enterprise. 

Las intensas ráfagas de comunicación se detectan entre los distintos barcos de Xindi, hasta que al final un transbordador con el Enterprise y un destacamento de seguridad Xindi-Aquatic Reptilian exige que el capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] los acompañe a las cámaras del Consejo Xindi para abogar por [xindi_probe_leader .GetHerHis] vida en persona.

STH_united_earth_story.49.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.50.desc: Pasan meses y la tripulación de la empresa comienza a perder toda esperanza de encontrar el sitio de construcción del arma Xindi. Un encuentro casual con una especie con relaciones comerciales con el Xindi ofrece una nueva oportunidad, sin embargo. \n\nLos comerciantes comparten rumores de tráfico pesado que va y viene del sistema de Azati, un capitán principal [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] no puede permitirse no seguir.
STH_united_earth_story.50.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.51.desc_01:
La Enterprise llega al sistema Azati, casi inmediatamente disparada por los numerosos buques de guerra Xindi que patrullan la zona. 

El ataque se detiene pronto, ya que un escuadrón de barcos Xindi-Primate y Xindi-Arboreal forma una escolta protectora alrededor de la zona. Enterprise. 

Se detectan explosiones intensas de comunicación entre los distintos barcos de Xindi, hasta que al final un transbordador con el Enterprise y un destacamento de seguridad Xindi-Primate ofrece escoltar al Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] a las cámaras del Consejo de Xindi para presentar [ Xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] caso en persona.
STH_united_earth_story.51.desc_02:

El ataque se detiene pronto, ya que un escuadrón de barcos Xindi-Primate y Xindi-Arboreal forma una escolta protectora alrededor de la zona. Enterprise. 

Se detectan explosiones intensas de comunicación entre los distintos barcos de Xindi, hasta que al final un transbordador con el Enterprise y un destacamento de seguridad Xindi-Primate ofrece escoltar al Capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] a las cámaras del Consejo de Xindi para presentar [ Xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] caso en persona.
STH_united_earth_story.51.desc_03:
El capitán [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] presenta [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] evidencia al Consejo Xindi, demostrando la inocencia de [Root.Capital.GetName]. Xindi teme que [Root.Capital.GetName] busque destruir su especie se muestra como la fabricación de los seres transdimensionales que ellos mismos han creado las inestabilidades subespaciales en la Extensión Delphic, para permitir que la región sea habitable a su especie.

Los representantes de los Primados están convencidos, con los Aquatics y Aboreals demandando más tiempo para considerar su respuesta, sin embargo los Reptilianos e Insectoides se enfurecen por esto. 

Seizing el control del arma, los Reptilianos e Insectoides lanzan el dispositivo de una manera directa Rumbo a la Tierra, mientras que la Enterprise corre para tratar de ponerse al día.
STH_united_earth_story.51.desc_04:
El Enterprise llega al sistema Azati, casi inmediatamente disparado por los numerosos buques de guerra Xindi que patrullan la zona.

STH_united_earth_story.51.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.52.desc: Totalmente reparado, la nave estelar Vulcan Seleya entra en el sistema Sol. Con órdenes de ayudar a la [Root.GetName] contra la amenaza de armas Xindi, la llegada de Seleya puede inclinar el equilibrio en la próxima batalla.
STH_united_earth_story.52.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.53.desc: Completamente reparado, la nave andorrana Kumari entra en el sistema Sol. Con órdenes de ayudar a la [Root.GetName] contra la amenaza de armas Xindi, la llegada de Kumari puede inclinar el equilibrio en la próxima batalla.
STH_united_earth_story.53.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.54.desc: Convencido de que el ataque a [Root.Capital.GetName] es injusto, un par de Xindi-Primate y Aboreal buques entrar en el sistema de difusión de su intención de ayudar a desactivar el arma y evitar la catástrofe en [Root.Capital.GetName].
STH_united_earth_story.54.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.56.desc:
[united_human_remnant.GetSpeciesNamePlural] and other sympathetic beings across the galaxy are reacting with shock and disbelief, as news of the destruction of their homeworld spreads. 

[Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]'s administration has expressed alarm. 

[united_human_remnant.GetRulerTitle] [united_human_remnant.GetName] has rallied the [united_human_remnant.GetSpeciesName] survivors to form the [united_human_remnant.GetName]. Understandably this new state lacks the xenophile outlook of its predecessor...
STH_united_earth_story.56.name: Earth, Destroyed !
STH_united_earth_story.57.b: Perhaps militarism isn't the way forward...
STH_united_earth_story.57.desc: Contact with the [donatingCountry.GetName] has been sporadic since the destruction of the homeworld, however recent news has suggested [donatingCountry.GetRulerTitle] [donatingCountry.GetRulerName]'s administration has authorised an aid package for immediate distribution among the worlds of the [Root.GetName]. \n\nSurvivors of the attack remain sceptical of alien motives, however moves like this go a long way to changing opinions.
STH_united_earth_story.57.name: Generous Donations
STH_united_earth_story.58.b: Perhaps xenophobia isn't the way forward...
STH_united_earth_story.58.desc: Contact with the [donatingCountry.GetName] has been sporadic since the destruction of the homeworld, however recent news has suggested [donatingCountry.GetRulerTitle] [donatingCountry.GetRulerName]'s administration has authorised an aid package for immediate distribution among the worlds of the [Root.GetName]. \n\nSurvivors of the attack remain sceptical of alien motives, however moves like this go a long way to changing opinions.
STH_united_earth_story.58.name: Generous Donations
STH_united_earth_story.59.a: The 50 energy and minerals will be useful.
STH_united_earth_story.59.b: Perhaps militarism isn't the way forward...
STH_united_earth_story.59.c: Perhaps xenophobia isn't the way forward...
STH_united_earth_story.59.desc: Contact with the [donatingCountry.GetName] has been sporadic since the destruction of the homeworld, however recent news has suggested [donatingCountry.GetRulerTitle] [donatingCountry.GetRulerName]'s administration has authorised an aid package for immediate distribution among the worlds of the [Root.GetName]. \n\nSurvivors of the attack remain sceptical of alien motives, however moves like this go a long way to changing opinions.
STH_united_earth_story.59.name: Generous Donations
STH_united_earth_story.60.desc: Listening posts have picked up a general distress signal from [unitedEarth.GetName] space. The [unitedEarth.GetSpeciesName] homeworld appears to be under attack by the 'Xindi' - a race native to the Delphic Expanse.
STH_united_earth_story.60.name: The Xindi
STH_united_earth_story.70.desc_01:
While searching for the location of the Xindi weapon, the Enterprise has detected the wreckage of a Xindi vessel on the surface of a class K world in the Uhrangei system. The vessel appears to be of Xindi-Insectoid design. 

While there are no signs of active Xindi ships in the system, Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] debates with the crew on the best course of action. 

The First Officer recommends continuing the search for the weapon as initial scans suggest nothing of value survived, while the Tactical Officer suggests destroying the remains of the vessel prior to departure, in order to deny the Xindi of any potential salvage. 

In opposition to both, the ship's Doctor urges an investigation to confirm whether or not any Insectoids survived the disaster.
STH_united_earth_story.70.desc_02:
While en route to the location of the Xindi weapon, the Enterprise has detected the wreckage of a Xindi vessel on the surface of a class K world in the Uhrangei system. The vessel appears to be of Xindi-Insectoid design. 

While there are no signs of active Xindi ships in the system, Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] debates with the crew on the best course of action. 

The First Officer recommends continuing on to the weapon as initial scans suggest nothing of value survived, while the Tactical Officer suggests destroying the remains of the vessel prior to departure, in order to deny the Xindi of any potential salvage. 

In opposition to both, the ship's Doctor urges an investigation to confirm whether or not any Insectoids survived the disaster.
STH_united_earth_story.70.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.71.desc_01: The Enterprise targets the Xindi-Insectoid vessel's wreckage on the surface and launches a torpedo. Moments later the viewscreen image of the surface brightens with the blast. \n\nCaptain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] orders the Enterprise to continue the search for the Xindi weapon.
STH_united_earth_story.71.desc_02: The Enterprise targets the Xindi-Insectoid vessel's wreckage on the surface and launches a torpedo. Moments later the viewscreen's image of the surface brightens with the blast. \n\nCaptain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] orders the Enterprise to continue on to the location of the Xindi weapon.
STH_united_earth_story.71.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.72.desc_01: Investigating the ruins of the Insectoid ship confirm that no technology of value survived whatever catastrophe occurred. As the away team prepares to return to the Enterprise a MACO guard makes a grisly discovery - a chamber filled with broken egg cases, and the remains of dozens of Xindi-Insectoid infants. \n\nAfter confirming that none of the Insectoids survived, Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] orders the Enterprise to continue the search for the Xindi weapon.
STH_united_earth_story.72.desc_02: Investigating the ruins of the Insectoid ship confirm that no technology of value survived whatever catastrophe occurred. As the away team prepares to return to the Enterprise a MACO guard makes a grisly discovery - a chamber filled with broken egg cases, and the remains of dozens of Xindi-Insectoid infants. \n\nAfter confirming that none of the Insectoids survived, Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] orders the Enterprise to continue on to the location of the Xindi weapon.
STH_united_earth_story.72.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.73.a: Sedate Captain and destroy the hatchery.
STH_united_earth_story.73.desc:
Investigating the ruins of the Insectoid ship confirm that no technology of value survived whatever catastrophe occurred. As the away team prepares to return to the Enterprise Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] makes a startling discovery - a chamber filled with Xindi-Insectoid eggs, the majority of which remain intact. 

After several hours the Captain begins to exhibit strange behaviour, diverting resources from the Enterprise to efforts to restore the Insectoid ship on the surface, and obsessing over protecting the eggs. 

The ship's doctor believes that the Captain has been affected by a pheromone compound on the eggs.
STH_united_earth_story.73.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.74.desc_01: Medics on the surface sedate Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] and bring [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHim] back to the ship. With all crew aboard, the Tactical Officer targets the Xindi-Insectoid vessel's wreckage on the surface and launches a torpedo. Moments later the viewscreen's image of the surface brightens with the blast, and the First Officer orders the Enterprise to continue the search for the Xindi weapon. \n\nIt takes several days for Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] to recover from the effects of the pheromones, and while [xindi_probe_leader.GetSheHe] accepts [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] judgement was impaired, [xindi_probe_leader.GetSheHe] still notes in the log that the destruction of the hatchery was a step too far.
STH_united_earth_story.74.desc_02: Medics on the surface sedate Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] and bring [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHim] back to the ship. With all crew aboard, the Tactical Officer targets the Xindi-Insectoid vessel's wreckage on the surface and launches a torpedo. Moments later the viewscreen's image of the surface brightens with the blast, and the First Officer orders the Enterprise to continue on to the location of the Xindi weapon. \n\nIt takes several days for Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] to recover from the effects of the pheromones, and while [xindi_probe_leader.GetSheHe] accepts [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] judgement was impaired, [xindi_probe_leader.GetSheHe] still notes in the log that the destruction of the hatchery was a step too far.
STH_united_earth_story.74.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.75.c: Leave a buoy to signal the Insectoids.
STH_united_earth_story.75.desc: After several days the medical team is able to create a synthetic compound which neutralises the effects of the Insectoid pheromones, and restores the Captain to [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] normal self. \n\nThe Insectoid eggs begin to hatch, and Captain [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] is forced to decide how to proceed - leaving the infants on the surface or 'adopting' them aboard the ship.
STH_united_earth_story.75.name: La extensión
STH_united_earth_story.76.desc: The Xindi-Insectoid infants that the Enterprise recovered from wreckage of a vessel in the Uhrangei system have grown to adulthood. While raising the infants proved difficult initially, they learned quickly and have fully embraced [Root.GetSpeciesName] culture. \n\nThe Xindi Council has expressed no desire to repatriate the young adults, and they themselves wish to become productive members of society. Several options have been presented for their resettlement within [Root.GetName] space.
STH_united_earth_story.76.name: Hatchlings
STH_united_earth_story.80.desc: Intermittent subspace readings have led [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] to a planet orbiting a small K class star. \n\nAstonishingly, the planet is inhabited by what appears to be several thousand Humans and a smaller number of unknown aliens in five small towns. Architecture and farming methods are consistent with those used in the late 19th century North American West.
STH_united_earth_story.80.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.81.c: We must not intervene. Back to the mission.
STH_united_earth_story.81.desc: [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] has spent several days infiltrating the primitive civilisation. Learning that the Humans in the colony were brought to the world centuries ago by a race called the Skagarans who they subsequently overthrew, the [Root.GetCaptainTitle] is troubled to learn that the surviving Skagarans now live in conditions little better than slavery. \n\nWorse, the colony appears to be on the brink of a race war that coupled with several years of poor harvests could destroy the viability of both populations.
STH_united_earth_story.81.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.82.desc:
Working with progressive elements in the largest settlement North Star, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] attempted to persuade local authority figures to improve the conditions of the Skagaran underclass. 

Despite [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] best efforts the attempt has failed, provoking further conflict between both communities. 

As the violence spirals out of control, it appears that several Skagarans have discovered a cache of antimatter weapons from the starship that first colonised the world centuries ago. 

Accepting [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] intervention has failed, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] orders the Enterprise to resume its mission in the Expanse, leaving the colony to its fate.
STH_united_earth_story.82.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.83.b: Let them develop peacefully on their own.
STH_united_earth_story.83.desc:
Working with progressive elements in the largest settlement North Star, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] attempted to persuade local authority figures to improve the conditions of the Skagaran underclass. 

Through [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] efforts the attempt has succeeded, reducing tensions and the risk of further conflict between both communities. 

A decision must now be made whether to reveal the presence of the Enterprise and the [Root.GetName] to the colonists.
STH_united_earth_story.83.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.84.desc:
Landing several Enterprise shuttlepods in the centre of the largest settlement North Star, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] shocked the colonists by attempting to explain to the presence of the Enterprise and their centuries of missed history, in an effort to unite both the Skagaran and Human community behind the promise of future technological support. 

Despite [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] best efforts the attempt has failed, provoking further conflict between both communities who see the Enterprise as a tool to further the aims of the other. 

As the violence spirals out of control, it appears that several Skagarans have discovered a cache of antimatter weapons from the starship that first colonised the world centuries ago. 

Accepting [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] intervention has failed, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] orders the Enterprise to resume its mission in the Expanse, leaving the colony to its fate.
STH_united_earth_story.84.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.85.a: Discuss the future of the settlement.
STH_united_earth_story.85.desc: Landing several Enterprise shuttlepods in the centre of the largest settlement North Star, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] shocked the colonists by attempting to explain to the presence of the Enterprise and their centuries of missed history, in an effort to unite both Skagaran and Human community behind the promise of future technological support. \n\nThrough [xindi_probe_leader.GetHerHis] efforts the attempt has succeeded, reducing tensions and the risk of further conflict between both communities as they adapt to the new reality of future support and intervention from the [Root.GetName].
STH_united_earth_story.85.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.86.a: Discuss the future of the settlement.
STH_united_earth_story.86.desc: Landing several Enterprise shuttlepods in the centre of the largest settlement North Star, [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] shocked the colonists by attempting to explain to the presence of the Enterprise and their centuries of missed history, in an effort to further unite both Skagaran and Human community behind the promise of future technological support. \n\nThe attempt succeeded, as both communities adapt to the new reality of future support and intervention from the [Root.GetName].
STH_united_earth_story.86.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.87.b: Offer to relocate the Human population.
STH_united_earth_story.87.c: Offer to support the colony's independent development.
STH_united_earth_story.87.desc:
With both Skagaran and [Root.GetSpeciesName] communities on better terms, the future of the colony can now be discussed. 

While [Root.GetCaptainTitle] [xindi_probe_leader.GetName] must emphasise that future contact from the [Root.GetName] is dependent on the success of the Enterprise's mission, a number of options are available. 

Both communities can be relocated to other more habitable [Root.GetName] worlds. Alternatively the [Root.GetSpeciesName] population can be resettled on a [Root.GetSpeciesName] world. The preferred option for many however is the continued settlement of the world, which most have now christened North Star after the largest settlement, with support from the [Root.GetName].
STH_united_earth_story.87.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.88.a: Leave the colony to its own development.
STH_united_earth_story.88.desc: With the Xindi crisis at a conclusion, the future of the Skagaran and [Root.GetSpeciesName] population on the world now known as North Star must be resolved.
STH_united_earth_story.88.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.9.desc: [Root.System.GetName] estaciones de monitoreo han detectado una sonda alien en un curso directo para [Root.GetName]. Todos los intentos de acallar la sonda se han encontrado con el silencio, y como tal debemos ahora suponer que el buque es hostil.
STH_united_earth_story.9.name: Sonda Alien
STH_united_earth_story.90.desc: Recently returned from the Delphic Expanse following its repairs by the [From.GetName] ship Enterprise, the captain of the VSS Seleya has requested permission to set course for [From.Capital.GetName] in order to help defend the planet against the Xindi. \n\nWhile some question the logic of this, others believe solidifying the alliance with the [From.GetName] is of critical importance.
STH_united_earth_story.90.name: The Seleya
STH_united_earth_story.91.desc: Recently returned from the Delphic Expanse following its encounter with the [From.GetName] ship Enterprise, the captain of the IGS Kumari has requested permission to set course for [From.Capital.GetName] in order to help defend the planet against the Xindi. \n\nWhile some question the tactical viability of this, others believe solidifying the alliance with the [From.GetName] is of critical importance.
STH_united_earth_story.91.name: The Kumari
STH_united_earth_story.92.desc: Starfleet has deemed this mission of utmost importance and recommends you send your most experienced ship and crew. Are you sure you wish to proceed with this ship and crew?
STH_united_earth_story.92.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.93.desc: Having returned from the Delphic Expanse, the information gathered from the NX-01 Enterprise prototype has allowed our engineers to streamline the design paving the way to mass production of additional ships.
STH_united_earth_story.93.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.94.desc: Having returned from the Delphic Expanse, the information gathered from Captain Jonathan Archer and his crew, aboard the NX-01 Enterprise, has allowed our engineers to develop further advances in Engineering Technology.
STH_united_earth_story.94.name: The Expanse
STH_united_earth_story.95.desc: Against the recommendations of Starfleet, [This.GetName] was sent into the Delphic Expanse to search for the Xindi. Initially encumbered by the Thermobaric clouds surrounding the Expanse, the crew successfully adapted their sensors and engine intake manifolds to navigate through the clouds, and passed through without incident. With Starfleet and [This.GetLeaderName] now confident in their ability to lead the expedition, the [This.GetName] pressed on into the expanse.\n\nHowever, despite this early success, its crew discovered they were ill-equipped to react to the spatial anomalies found within the Expanse. A subspace eddy passed through the ship a few days after its entry, destabilizing the antimatter containment fields and resulting in a catastrophic chain reaction within the warp core, destroying the ship and its crew.
STH_united_earth_story.95.name: The Expanse
STH_vaadwaur_story.100.desc: After scanning the ruins on and under the surface from orbit, a number of intact underground chambers have been identified. \n\nA full investigation may reveal the fate of the civilisation that once populated the planet.
STH_vaadwaur_story.100.name: Ancient Ruins
STH_vaadwaur_story.110.desc: Several occupied stasis pods have been unearthed deep beneath in the ruins of [From.Planet.GetName], alongside several hangars containing an array of ancient warships. \n\n[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] suggests studying the pods before awakening the occupants.
STH_vaadwaur_story.110.name: Ancient Ruins
STH_vaadwaur_story.121.desc: After accidentally triggering the revive sequence on a bank of stasis pods, the occupants have identified themselves as Vaadwaur. They claim to have been the victim of an extermination campaign against their species several centuries prior. \n\nGiven that their species is reduced to a handful of survivors, the revived Vaadwaur have requested the protection of the [Root.Owner.GetName].
STH_vaadwaur_story.121.name: The Vaadwaur
STH_vaadwaur_story.122.desc: After accidentally triggering the revive sequence of two stasis pods, the occupants have identified themselves as [vaadwaurLeader1.GetName] and [vaadwaurLeader2.GetName] of the Vaadwaur. They claim to have been the victim of an extermination campaign against their species several centuries prior. \n\nThe revived Vaadwaur have offered their services to the [Root.Owner.GetName], and request that the rest of the survivors in stasis on the world are revived.
STH_vaadwaur_story.122.name: The Vaadwaur
STH_vaadwaur_story.123.desc: After accidentally triggering the revive sequence on a bank of stasis pods, the occupants have identified themselves as Vaadwaur. They claim to have been the victim of an extermination campaign against their species several centuries prior. \n\nApparently unknown to [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName]'s team on [From.Planet.GetName], the Vaadwaur survivors have activated several tens of thousands of stasis pods and claimed ownership of the system.
STH_vaadwaur_story.123.name: The Vaadwaur
STH_vidiian_mechanics.103.a: Debemos buscar más donantes de órganos viables...
STH_vidiian_mechanics.103.desc: Un aumento inesperado de la demanda de órganos ha agotado la utilidad de un grupo [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesNamePlural] en [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop_planet.GetName].
STH_vidiian_mechanics.103.name: Hemos agotado un grupo de donantes de órganos...
STH_vidiian_mechanics.105.a: Ningún precio es demasiado alto para curar al Fago.
STH_vidiian_mechanics.105.b: ¡No dejaré que diseccione cientos de miles de [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesNamePlural]!
STH_vidiian_mechanics.105.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], soy el principal biólogo molecular de [Root.Capital.GetName]. Me doy cuenta de que debe recibir un número de comunicaciones como esta, pero mi equipo y yo creemos que hemos descubierto una de las vías más prometedoras para derrotar al Fago hasta ahora. \Aunque algunos se resistan a la idea, tenemos un número de buenos especímenes en [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesName] que poseen marcadores genéticos intrigantes. Con su permiso, los disecaremos con la esperanza de encontrar una cura.
STH_vidiian_mechanics.105.name: El Fago
STH_vidiian_mechanics.106.desc: El biólogo molecular principal y su equipo han llegado a [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop_planet.GetName] y han comenzado a reunir prometedores [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesNamePlural] para su disección.
STH_vidiian_mechanics.106.name: Los científicos han llegado...
STH_vidiian_mechanics.107.desc: ¡Los [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesNamePlural] programados para la disección han escapado de la custodia y están arrasando en [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop_planet.GetName]! Después de un esfuerzo sostenido de supresión, la mayoría de los fugitivos de [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesName] han muerto o se han escapado. El líder del equipo fue lamentablemente asesinado en el caos inicial.
STH_vidiian_mechanics.107.name: ¡Los sujetos de prueba han escapado!
STH_vidiian_mechanics.108.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], lamento informar que nuestros esfuerzos fueron infructuosos. La cura del Fago aún nos es esquiva.
STH_vidiian_mechanics.108.name: El Fago
STH_vidiian_mechanics.109.a: El sacrificio de cientos de miles de [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesNamePlural] no será olvidado.
STH_vidiian_mechanics.109.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], lo impensable ha sucedido... ¡hemos curado con éxito el Fago que ha estado asolando a nuestro pueblo durante milenios! Nuestra cura, sintetizada a partir del ADN de [vidiianOrganHarvesting_organ_storage_pop.GetSpeciesName], es 100% efectiva y está lista para su distribución inmediata. \Mírame, me ofrecí para la prueba final y no hay ni una pizca del virus en mí.
STH_vidiian_mechanics.109.name: El Fago
STH_vidiian_story.1.a: No price is too high to cure the Phage.
STH_vidiian_story.1.b: We won't waste resources on false cures.
STH_vidiian_story.1.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost molecular biologist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I appreciate you must receive a number of communications like this, but my team and I believe we have discovered one of the more promising avenues to defeat the Phage so far. \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.1.desc_02: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost virologist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I appreciate you must receive a number of communications like this, but my team and I believe we have discovered one of the more promising avenues to defeat the Phage so far. \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.1.desc_03: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost immunologist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I appreciate you must receive a number of communications like this, but my team and I believe we have discovered one of the more promising avenues to defeat the Phage so far. \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.1.desc_04: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost geneticist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I appreciate you must receive a number of communications like this, but my team and I believe we have discovered one of the more promising avenues to defeat the Phage so far. \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.1.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.10.b: We won't waste resources on this.
STH_vidiian_story.10.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost molecular biologist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I am sure you are aware that the members of the Vidiian species living within the [Root.GetName] suffer from a debilitating disease known as the Phage. My team and I believe we have discovered a potential avenue to cure it! \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.10.desc_02: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost virologist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I am sure you are aware that the members of the Vidiian species living within the [Root.GetName] suffer from a debilitating disease known as the Phage. My team and I believe we have discovered a potential avenue to cure it! \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.10.desc_03: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost immunologist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I am sure you are aware that the members of the Vidiian species living within the [Root.GetName] suffer from a debilitating disease known as the Phage. My team and I believe we have discovered a potential avenue to cure it! \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.10.desc_04: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am the foremost geneticist on [Root.Capital.GetName]. I am sure you are aware that the members of the Vidiian species living within the [Root.GetName] suffer from a debilitating disease known as the Phage. My team and I believe we have discovered a potential avenue to cure it! \n\nWe just need more resources to proceed...
STH_vidiian_story.10.name: The Vidiian Phage
STH_vidiian_story.11.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am sorry to report that our efforts were unsuccessful. The cure to the Phage still eludes us.
STH_vidiian_story.11.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.12.desc_01: Good news, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]! We have successfully cured the Phage that has been plaguing the Vidiians for millennia. Our cure is 100% effective and ready for immediate distribution across the galaxy.
STH_vidiian_story.12.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.13.desc_01: Reports are coming in from our assets in [From.GetName] space indicating that a cure to the devastating Phage virus has been created. \n\nThe Vidiians have shaped their society around a unwavering search for a cure which [From.GetSpeciesAdj] scientists appear to have cured. [Root.GetName] analysts believe that without the burden of the Phage, they may return to their once peaceful ways.
STH_vidiian_story.13.desc_02: Reports are coming in from our assets in [From.GetName] space indicating that a cure to the devastating Phage virus has been created. \n\nThe [Root.GetSpeciesName] people have shaped a society around the unwavering search for a cure, but the good work of the [From.GetName] has set us free.
STH_vidiian_story.13.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.14.b: We did it for our own benefit.
STH_vidiian_story.14.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am represent the Vidiian people and I come with a message of gratitude. Your people have cured the Phage, a vile affliction which had nearly laid ruin to our civilisation. \n\nWe will never forget this.
STH_vidiian_story.14.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.3.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am sorry to report that our efforts were unsuccessful. The cure to the Phage still eludes us.
STH_vidiian_story.3.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.4.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], the unthinkable has happened... we have successfully cured the Phage that has been plaguing our people for millennia! Our cure is 100% effective and ready for immediate distribution. \n\nLook at me - I volunteered for the final test and there is not a shred of the virus in me!
STH_vidiian_story.4.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.5.desc: Reports are coming in from our assets in [From.GetName] space indicating that a cure to the devastating Phage virus has been created. \n\nThe [From.GetSpeciesNamePlural] have shaped their society around a unwavering search for a cure. [Root.GetName] analysts believe that without the burden of the Phage, they may return to their once peaceful ways.
STH_vidiian_story.5.name: The Phage
STH_vidiian_story.6.c: Pay respect to the aliens we've harmed.
STH_vidiian_story.6.d: Embrace what we had to become.
STH_vidiian_story.6.desc:
For millennia the Phage has ravaged the [Root.GetName], halting [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] cultural development in order to preserve the species and find a cure. 

Now a cure has been found, the [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] people have a choice to make. To return to the outgoing, peaceful society from before the Phage and eliminate the last vestiges of its impact on [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] society, or else embrace changes that made the [Root.GetName] strong enough to survive a millennia of disease. 

Regardless of the outcome, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] has decided to stand down from [leader.GetHerHis] post, arguing that the [Root.GetSpeciesAdj] people deserve new leadership for a new, post-Phage world.
STH_vidiian_story.6.name: The Phage
STH_voth_story.1.a: Suppress this heresy! Our beliefs must be upheld.
STH_voth_story.1.b: A fascinating puzzle. We must investigate this further.
STH_voth_story.1.desc: Our first contact with the species known as 'Humans' has sent shockwaves through our scientific and religious communities. Their striking biological similarity to us has led some of our most brilliant minds to propose a radical new theory of evolution, one that challenges the very foundations of our sacred doctrines.
STH_voth_story.1.name: Doctrinal Crisis
STH_voth_story.2.a: We must obey. The stability of our society is paramount.
STH_voth_story.2.b: The truth cannot be dictated. We will continue the research in secret.
STH_voth_story.2.desc: The Ministry of Doctrine has issued a stern edict, condemning the 'alternative evolution theory' as blasphemy. They demand an immediate cessation of all related research and a public reaffirmation of our traditional beliefs.
STH_voth_story.2.name: Clerical Edict
STH_voth_story.3.a: Perhaps a new colony, far from the Ministry's gaze, is what we need.
STH_voth_story.3.b: Let them go. Their radical ideas have no place here.
STH_voth_story.3.desc: Unable to reconcile their discoveries with the rigid doctrines of our society, a group of radical thinkers has chosen self-imposed exile. They have commandeered several city-ships and are preparing to depart for the unknown, seeking a new home where they can pursue knowledge without constraint.
STH_voth_story.3.name: Exodus of the Enlightened
STH_vulcan_flavour.1.desc:
A través de las tormentas cruzó el Mar Voroth \ nPara alcanzar las orillas nubladas de Raal \ nDonde el viejo T'Para ofreció la verdad. \ n Viajó a través de las colinas azotadas por el viento \ nY cruzó las llanuras de fuego estériles \ nPara encontrar a los monjes silenciosos de Kir. \ n Aún sin cumplir, viajó a su casa \ nLas historias contadas de las lecciones aprendidas \ nY ganó verdadera sabiduría al dar . 

Una excavación arqueológica en una región sospechosa de ser el sitio de la antigua ciudad de Gol ha descubierto un manuscrito original intacto de la canción popular de T'pren, Falor's Journey. 

Se han observado varias correcciones en comparación con la narración moderna.
STH_vulcan_flavour.1.name: Viaje de Falor
STH_vulcan_flavour.101.desc: [From.GetName] ha llegado al monasterio en la base de Tai-la donde [From.GetSheHe] comenzará [From.GetHerHis] intento de purgar [From.GetHerHim] de todas las emociones.
STH_vulcan_flavour.101.name: Kolinahr
STH_vulcan_flavour.102.desc: El intento de [From.GetName] de completar el Kolinahr no ha tenido éxito. Mientras que [From.GetSheHe] pudo acercarse a lograr la fusión del intelecto y el espíritu, el Tiempo de la Verdad y el estado de lógica pura que eludía eludieron [From.GetHerHim]. \n\nMientras no descarta un intento futuro de completar el ritual, [From.GetName] cree que no es apropiado volver al deber.
STH_vulcan_flavour.102.name: Kolinahr
STH_vulcan_flavour.103.desc: El intento de [From.GetName] de completar el Kolinahr ha sido exitoso. Si bien [From.GetSheHe] pudo lograr la fusión del intelecto y el espíritu, abrazando el Tiempo de la Verdad y el estado de lógica pura que anuncia, el esfuerzo requerido fue sustancial. \n\nCon el ritual completado, [From.GetName] solicita formalmente permiso para volver al deber.
STH_vulcan_flavour.103.name: Kolinahr
STH_vulcan_flavour.104.desc: El intento de [From.GetName] de completar el Kolinahr ha sido exitoso. De hecho, como [From.GetSheHe] pudo lograr la fusión del intelecto y el espíritu, abrazando el Tiempo de la Verdad y el estado de lógica pura que anuncia, una epifanía atrapada en [From.GetHerHis] mente meditando. Al regresar al monasterio, los ancianos quedaron suficientemente impresionados con la nueva comprensión de [From.GetName] de la naturaleza de la lógica que consideraron apropiado otorgar el título de Maestro Kolinahr en [From.GetHerHim]. \n\nCon el ritual completado, [From.GetName] solicita formalmente permiso para volver al deber.
STH_vulcan_flavour.104.name: Kolinahr
STH_vulcan_story.1.desc:
After careful analysis, the sub-Administrator of the V'Shar has advised that the monastery on [pjem_planet.GetName] is the most logical site to place a proposed stealth subspace listening post. 

While the nature of the world as a religious focal point for many Vulcans is likely to cause dissatisfaction should it ever be revealed, concerns over potential threats from the [andorianCountry.GetName] can not be ignored. 

If approved, the listening post would be constructed beneath the oldest monastery building.
STH_vulcan_story.1.name: Listening Post on P'Jem
STH_vulcan_story.10.desc: The [Root.GetName] has been contacted by a monk from the [From.GetSpeciesName] holy world of [FromFrom.GetName], claiming to have intelligence vital to [Root.GetSpeciesName] interests. \n\nApparently angered - or as close to it as a [From.GetSpeciesName] can get - by the desecration of the largest monastery on [FromFrom.GetName], the monk claims that a subspace listening post has been constructed there designed to spy on the [Root.GetName].
STH_vulcan_story.10.name: Rumours from [FromFrom.GetName]
STH_vulcan_story.1000.desc: The [earthCountry.GetName] embassy on [Root.Capital.GetName] has been the target of a successful terrorist attack. Several hundred [Root.GetSpeciesName] and [earthCountry.GetSpeciesName] casualties have been reported. \n\nDomestic violence is almost unheard of on [Root.Capital.GetName] and no group has yet claimed responsibility. However, many in the Intelligence service believe the bombing to be the work of the Syrrannite movement, a group dissatisfied with the current administration's foreign policy.
STH_vulcan_story.1000.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_vulcan_story.1001.desc: The [Root.GetName] embassy on [From.Capital.GetName] has been the target of a successful terrorist attack. Several hundred [Root.GetSpeciesName] and [From.GetSpeciesName] casualties have been reported. \n\nDomestic violence is almost unheard of on [From.Capital.GetName] and no group has yet claimed responsibility. However, many in the [From.GetSpeciesName] intelligence service believe the bombing to be the work of the Syrrannite movement, a group dissatisfied with the [From.GetRulerName] administration's foreign policy.
STH_vulcan_story.1001.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_vulcan_story.1002.desc: The [FromFrom.GetName] embassy on [From.Capital.GetName] has been the target of a successful terrorist attack. Several hundred [From.GetSpeciesName] and [FromFrom.GetSpeciesName] casualties have been reported. \n\nDomestic violence is almost unheard of on [From.Capital.GetName] and no group has yet claimed responsibility. However, many in the [From.GetSpeciesName] intelligence service believe the bombing to be the work of the Syrrannite movement, a group dissatisfied with the [From.GetRulerName] administration's foreign policy.
STH_vulcan_story.1002.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_vulcan_story.1003.desc: [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] of the [From.GetName] has formally requested that a team of [From.GetSpeciesName] experts be allowed to pursue the investigation into the recent embassy bombing on [Root.Capital.GetName].
STH_vulcan_story.1003.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_vulcan_story.1004.desc: The [From.GetName] has formally approved [Root.Capital.GetName]'s request to dispatch a team of experts to investigate the recent embassy bombing on [From.Capital.GetName].
STH_vulcan_story.1004.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_vulcan_story.1005.b: Hand over to the Vulcan Authorities.
STH_vulcan_story.1005.desc: After several days analysing the rubble of the embassy building and questioning identified witnesses, [FromFrom.GetName] has concluded that the evidence does indeed point to the Syrrannites as the perpetrators of the bombing. \n\nThe evidence seems almost too strong, however. Several chemical traces which link to materials found in the Vulcan's Forge region of the planet, where the Syrrannites are known to keep a hidden commune, should have decayed within minutes of the blast and be barely detectable now.
STH_vulcan_story.1005.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_vulcan_story.1006.desc: The [From.GetSpeciesName] investigators sent to [Root.Capital.GetName] to investigate the bombing of the [From.GetName] embassy have concluded their operation. \n\nNo conclusive evidence was discovered, though circumstantial evidence reaffirms our initial view that this was an attrocity carried out by Syrrannite dissidents.
STH_vulcan_story.1006.name: Embassy Bombing
STH_vulcan_story.1007.desc:
[FromFrom.GetName]'s investigation has led [FromFrom.GetHerHim] to the Vulcan's Forge region, where the Syrrannites are known to keep at least one hidden commune. 

A vast desert, The Forge is subject to electrical sandstorms and geomagnetic anomalies that interfere with scanning technologies. 

Progress through The Forge is slow made more dangerous by the constant threat of Sehlats attack.
STH_vulcan_story.1007.name: The Forge
STH_vulcan_story.1008.desc: After taking shelter from an electrical sandstorm with a passing [From.GetSpeciesName] pilgrim, [FromFrom.GetName] has made a remarkable discovery. While referring to himself initially as Arev, the pilgrim is in fact Syrran, the leader of the Syrrannite movement. \n\nProfessing ignorance of the embassy bombing he promises to lead [FromFrom.GetName] back to the Syrrannite compound in the T'Karath Sanctuary in order to prove the matter.
STH_vulcan_story.1008.name: The Forge
STH_vulcan_story.1009.desc: Our operatives believe that [FromFrom.GetName], the [From.GetSpeciesName] investigator dispatched to [Root.GetName] by the [From.GetName] government, has apparently made contact with the leader of the Syrrannite movement and been taken to their commune. \n\n[Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] argues to the Council that a strike now would end the risk of further attacks against by the Syrrannites. While the risk to relations with [From.Capital.GetName] should [FromFrom.GetName] be killed in the operation are high, there may never be a better time to remove the current threat.
STH_vulcan_story.1009.name: The Forge
STH_vulcan_story.1010.desc:
Shortly after arriving at the T'Karath Sanctuary, [FromFrom.GetName] meets with a number of Syrrannites who together with Syrran attempt to explain the nature of their movement and how it rejects violence. A young woman named T'Pau is particularly vocal in her defence of the movement. 

The debate is interrupted by alarms and the sound of explosions. Looking to the sky, several [From.GetSpeciesName] fighters can be seen laying waste to the ground beneath them. 

The geomagnetic anomalies of The Forge have reduced their accuracy, but not enough to prevent the deaths of many Syrrannites as they attempted to escape. 

Syrran himself is fatally injured, dying shortly after placing his hands on [FromFrom.GetName]'s face and muttering 'remember'. 

[FromFrom.GetName] and T'Pau escape together into the cave network.
STH_vulcan_story.1010.name: The Forge
STH_vulcan_story.1011.desc:
The operation against the Syrrannite commune appears to be a success. While several Syrrannites were able to escape, we have confirmed the death of their leader Syrran. 

While it is regretable that lives weren't saved and the terrorists brought to justice, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] insists that the strike has made [Root.Capital.GetName] safer. 

The location of the [From.GetSpeciesName] investigator is unknown, though it is suspected [FromFrom.GetSheHe] was vaporised in the attack.
STH_vulcan_story.1011.name: The Forge
STH_vulcan_story.1012.desc_01:
[FromFrom.GetName] has experienced a number of visions following the attack on the Syrranite base. 

Learning that Syrran carried the katra or soul of Surak, now transferred to [FromFrom.GetHerHim]self, the mental toll is heavy. 

T'Pau reveals the underpinning of the Syrrannite faith is the Kir'Shara, an ancient artefact said to contain the complete writings of Surak, thought lost to time. 

With the Kir'Shara, T'Pau argues that they can prove the Syrranites' peaceful ways to the [From.GetName]. [FromFrom.GetName] offers [FromFrom.GetHerHis] help to locate the artefact.
STH_vulcan_story.1012.desc_02:
Shortly after arriving at the T'Karath Sanctuary, [FromFrom.GetName] meets with a number of Syrrannites who together with Syrran attempt to explain the nature of their movement and how it rejects violence. A young woman named T'Pau is particularly vocal in her defence of the movement. 

The underpinning of the Syrrannite faith is the Kir'Shara, an ancient artefact said to contain the complete writings of Surak, thought lost to time. 

With the Kir'Shara, T'Pau and Arev argue that they can prove their peaceful ways to the [From.GetName]. [FromFrom.GetName] offers [FromFrom.GetHerHis] help to locate the artefact, if it will help conclude the investigation into the embassy bombing.
STH_vulcan_story.1012.name: The Forge
STH_vulcan_story.1013.a: Take the Kir'Shara to the Capital.
STH_vulcan_story.1013.desc_01:
With the katra of Surak in [FromFrom.GetHerHis] mind, [FromFrom.GetName] is able to locate the underground monastery where the Kir'Shara has been kept safe for centuries. 

A small elongated pyramid with [From.GetSpeciesName] writing alongside its faces, the Kir'Shara shows evidence of containing advanced storage and display technology. 

T'Pau argues that the only logical course of action now is to present the Kir'Shara to the council of ministers and argue their innocence. 

[FromFrom.GetName] instead suggests that perhaps the Kir'Shara would be safer offworld, arguing they should locate a shuttle and return to [FromFrom.GetHerHis] ship in orbit.
STH_vulcan_story.1013.desc_02:
With the help of [FromFrom.GetName], Syrran and T'Pau are able to locate the underground monastery where the Kir'Shara has been kept safe for centuries. 

A small elongated pyramid with [From.GetSpeciesName] writing alongside its faces, the Kir'Shara shows evidence of containing advanced storage and display technology. 

T'Pau argues that the only logical course of action now is to present the Kir'Shara to the council of ministers and argue their innocence. 

[FromFrom.GetName] instead suggests that perhaps the Kir'Shara would be safer offworld, arguing they should locate a shuttle and return to [FromFrom.GetHerHis] ship in orbit.
STH_vulcan_story.1013.name: Kir'Shara
STH_vulcan_story.1014.desc_01: The journey from Vulcan's Forge to the Capital is long and arduous, but [FromFrom.GetName] and T'Pau eventually arrive at the city outskirts. \n\nFinding shelter with a Syrrannite sympathiser, the pair carefully plan their next move to confront the Council with the Kir'Shara and demonstrate their innocence.
STH_vulcan_story.1014.desc_02: The journey from Vulcan's Forge to the Capital is long and arduous, but [FromFrom.GetName], Syrran and T'Pau eventually arrive at the city outskirts. \n\nFinding shelter with a Syrrannite sympathiser, the group carefully plan their next move to confront the Council with the Kir'Shara and demonstrate their innocence.
STH_vulcan_story.1014.name: Kir'Shara
STH_vulcan_story.1015.desc: Rumours suggest that several Syrrannites have made their way to the Capital itself. Unbelievably, it is implied they have brought with them the legendary Kir'Shara, an artefact containing the complete writings of Surak, thought lost to time. \n\nWhat the terrorists plan to do next is a mystery.
STH_vulcan_story.1015.name: Kir'Shara
STH_vulcan_story.1016.desc_01: Their plan a success, T'Pau and [FromFrom.GetName] have infiltrated the Council chambers of the [From.GetName] and forced those present to bear witness to the Kir'Shara and the Syrrannites claims of innocence. \n\nWhile many were awed by the presence of the Kir'Shara, [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] reacted with uncharacteristic anger and attempted to destroy the artefact and kill T'Pau and [FromFrom.GetName] in the process...
STH_vulcan_story.1016.desc_02: Their plan a success, Syrran, T'Pau and [FromFrom.GetName] have infiltrated the Council chambers of the [From.GetName] and forced those present to bear witness to the Kir'Shara and the Syrrannites claims of innocence. \n\nWhile many were awed by the presence of the Kir'Shara, [From.GetRulerTitle] [From.GetRulerName] reacted with uncharacteristic anger and attempted to destroy the artefact and kill Syrran, T'Pau and [FromFrom.GetName] in the process...
STH_vulcan_story.1016.name: Kir'Shara
STH_vulcan_story.1017.desc_01:
Despite ample security in the Council Chambers, the Syrranite known as T'Pau infiltrated and took hostage the Councillors present. With her, the [From.GetSpeciesName] investigator [FromFrom.GetName], now apparently an advocate of the Syrranites. 

Presenting the Kir'Shara and the Syrrannites claims of innocence, many were awed by the presence of the artefact. 

[Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] reacted with uncharacteristic anger and attempted to destroy the artefact and kill T'Pau and [FromFrom.GetName] in the process. 

Stopped by a number of other Councillors, [Root.GetRulerName] argues that the T'Pau and [FromFrom.GetName] should be arrested immediately.
STH_vulcan_story.1017.desc_02:
Despite ample security in the Council Chambers, the Syrranites known as Arev and T'Pau infiltrated and took hostage the Councillors present. With them, the [From.GetSpeciesName] investigator [FromFrom.GetName], now apparently an advocate of the Syrranites. 

Presenting the Kir'Shara and the Syrrannites claims of innocence, many were awed by the presence of the artefact. 

[Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] reacted with uncharacteristic anger and attempted to destroy the artefact and kill the Syrranites and [FromFrom.GetName] in the process. 

Stopped by a number of other Councillors, [Root.GetRulerName] argues that the Syrranites and [FromFrom.GetName] should be arrested immediately.
STH_vulcan_story.1017.name: Kir'Shara
STH_vulcan_story.1018.desc: The [Root.GetName] investigator [FromFrom.GetName], tasked with uncovering the truth of the embassy bombing on [From.Capital.GetName] has been arrested by the [From.GetSpeciesName] authorities. \n\nAccused of aiding the Syrrannite movement in a terrorist endeavour, [FromFrom.GetName] is sentenced to life imprisonment with no chance of parole.
STH_vulcan_story.1018.name: Kir'Shara
STH_vulcan_story.1019.desc:
With the intruders removed from the Council Chambers, the Council itself is divided. 

Several were willing to believe the Syrrannite accusations of treachery from the office of the [Root.GetRulerTitle], while others believed further debate was needed. 

With news of the events quickly reaching the civilian population, [Root.GetSpeciesName] society is braced for unrest.
STH_vulcan_story.1019.name: Kir'Shara
STH_vulcan_story.1020.desc: The arrest of the Syrrannite leadership has done little to calm matters on [Root.Capital.GetName]. Instead, those sympathetic to the Syrrannite plight have become emboldened. Similarly those opposed to them have increased their demands that action must be taken.
STH_vulcan_story.1020.name: Syrrannite Protests
STH_vulcan_story.1021.desc: Protests have consumed most of [Root.Capital.GetName]'s cities, as those in favour and opposed to the Syrrannite movement clash. While violence has been avoided so far, it would not take much to tip either side over the edge.
STH_vulcan_story.1021.name: Syrrannite Protests
STH_vulcan_story.1022.desc: Extreme measures designed to end Syrrannite protests have backfired. While violence is anathema to the Syrrannite movement, enough now feel that there is but one way to preserve [Root.GetSpeciesName] society. \n\nConsolidating their position on colony worlds and with a portion of the fleet, the self proclaimed Confederacy of Surak has taken arms against the [Root.GetName].
STH_vulcan_story.1022.name: Civil War
STH_vulcan_story.1023.desc: Recent protests and unrest involving the Syrrannite minority group on [From.Capital.GetName] have spilled into full scale civil war. \n\nThe self proclaimed Confederacy of Surak has taken arms against the [From.GetName].
STH_vulcan_story.1023.name: [From.GetSpeciesName] Civil War
